#HSPHOTOGRAPH

text: Tempatnya bagus, tapi sayang suka ada sampah. Hati hati kalau bawa makanan kesini karena suka ada monyet berkeliaran yang suka ambil makanan.
english_translation: The place is nice, but unfortunately there's often trash. Be careful if you bring food here because there are often monkeys roaming around that like to steal food.

text: Hutan pinus yg digarap sangat baik utk wana wisata..cocok buat keluarga n anak2..sayang jalan masuknya rusak dr jalan besar ke tmpt wisatanya
english_translation: Well-managed pine forest perfect for ecotourism... suitable for families and children... it's a shame the access road is damaged from the main road to the tourist spot.

text: Kalo datang ke tangkuban perahu jm 4 sore ,pemandanganya bagus banget ,dan belum turun kabut ...jadi bisa dapet foto dengan posisi bagus bgt.
english_translation: If you come to Tangkuban Perahu at 4 pm, the view is really beautiful, and the fog hasn't descended yet... so you can get really great photos.

text: Tempatnya luaaas... dan nyaman banget, rindang, adem, dan banyak spot fotonya, anak2 suka, buat outbond nya jg oke.. cocok buat melepas lelah
english_translation: The place is spacious... and very comfortable, shady, cool, and has lots of photo spots, the kids love it, it's also okay for outbound... suitable for releasing fatigue.

text: mantap lah.. walaupun bau belerang dan jalannya nanjak(yaiyalah namanya juga gunung).. lumayan buat nambah foto. jangan lupa beli masker ya..
english_translation: Awesome. Even though there's a sulfur smell and the path is uphill (well, it's a mountain after all)... it's pretty good for adding to the photo collection. Don't forget to buy a mask.

text: Masih belum komplit pembangunan nya ada beberapa spot yg bagus tp b rampung, btw keren lah walau sana sini masuk bayar lagi bayar lagi wkwkwk
english_translation: The construction isn't complete yet, there are some good spots but they're not finished. Anyway, it's cool even though you have to pay again and again everywhere, lol.

text: Klo musim hujan,lebih baik jangan kesana. Selain jalan yang licin dan berbahaya,air yang dialiran sungainya pun tak seperti yang dibayangkan.
english_translation: During the rainy season, it's better not to go there. Besides the slippery and dangerous roads, the water in the river is also not as imagined.

text: Wisata alam yang mantulll.. tiket masuknya murah 15K.. hawanya dingin, tp sayang wahananya kurang banyak sama kalo beli makan di dalem mahall
english_translation: Amazing nature tour.. the entrance ticket is cheap at 15K.. the air is cold, but unfortunately there aren't many rides and buying food inside is expensive.

text: Bagus, baiknya sih ke sananya saat pagi, biar puas, soalnya jam 5 sore sdh closed Krn kabutnya tebal banget, dan di sana TDK ada lampu klu mlm
english_translation: Good, it's best to go there in the morning, so you can fully enjoy it, because it closes at 5 PM due to the very thick fog, and there are no lights there at night.

text:
Tempatnya asik sih, buat adrenalin pas naik kendaraan. Suasana sejuk.

Cuma tiap parkir ada kang parkir sendiri jadi mending sekali parkir aja
english_translation:
The place is fun, for adrenaline while riding. The atmosphere is cool.

It's just that every parking spot has its own parking attendant, so it's better to park only once.

text: Untuk kalian yang ingin mengisi semangat, menyegarkan jiwa, melihat cahaya kota dan tentunya matahari terbit, tempat ini adalah yang terbaik!
english_translation: For those of you who want to fill your spirit, refresh your soul, see the city lights, and of course, the sunrise, this place is the best!

text: Adem, Sejuk, tempat rekreasi bersama keluarga menikmati liburan akhir pekan. jangan lupa cobain sate maranggi nyaa, dijamin ketagihann 🤤🤤🤤🤤🤤 …
english_translation: Cool, a recreation spot for the whole family to enjoy the weekend holiday. Don't forget to try the sate maranggi, you'll be addicted guaranteed 🤤🤤🤤🤤🤤 …

text: Akses ke lokasi utama sangat jauuuhh dan ekstrim, bukan lokasi yang cocok untuk wisata keluarga bersama anak kecil atau orang tua lanjut usia.
english_translation: Access to the main location is veeery faaar and extreme, not a suitable location for family tourism with small children or elderly people.

text: Cocok untuk hiking juga..tp jalan nya masih jelek dr gerbang  menuju curugnya... licin kalo pas hujan....tp itu  tantangan mantap dan seru 😀 …
english_translation: Suitable for hiking too... but the road from the gate to the waterfall is still bad... slippery when it rains... but that's a great and exciting challenge 😀

text: Udah dua kali kesini dan tidak bosan. Suka dengan suasananya sekedar hilangin penat,  adem.... Untuk anak2 bisa lihat miniature kereta api 🚂 …
english_translation: I've been here twice and I'm not bored. I like the atmosphere for just relieving stress, it's cool... For kids, they can see miniature trains 🚂…

text: Ga seru tempat wisatanya, hanya liat kebun pinus saja  jalan menuju kelokasi nya juga jelek banget,  ngerusak kendaraan,  nyesel datang kesana
english_translation: The tourist spot wasn't fun, just looking at the pine forest. The road to the location was also really bad, it damaged the vehicle. Regret coming here.

text:
Tempat yang nyaman dan bagus untuk keluarga meninmati alam, lokasi strategis tidak jauh dari pemukiman warga dan hotel.

Next akan kesini lagi
english_translation:
A comfortable and good place for families to enjoy nature, strategically located not far from residential areas and hotels.

Will come here again next time.

text: Suasana sangat nyaman dan harus kuat jalan kaki, karna tempat yang luas, tatapi disediakan juga mobil di pintu keluar. Prokes yang cukup baik.
english_translation: The atmosphere is very comfortable and requires a good amount of walking because the place is spacious, but cars are also provided at the exit. Health protocols are quite good.

text: Asik buat Foto2...bagus, hanya saja akses jalan menuju ke lokasi masih jelek, tanah bebatuan.HTM termasuk murah Rp. 14.000 sdh termasuk Parkir
english_translation: Great for taking photos... nice, just that the road access to the location is still bad, rocky and earthen. The entrance fee is quite cheap at Rp. 14,000 which includes parking.

text: Tempatnya keren,petugasnya ramah2  sangat dibantu menuju lokasi disediakan fasilitas mobil u/antar dan jemput juga u/foto2 dan live music👍👍😍 …
english_translation: The place is cool, the staff are very friendly and helpful. They provided car service for transportation to and from the location, as well as for photos and live music 👍👍😍

text: Tempat nya luas cocok untuk berwisata edukasi negara-negara karena banyak tempat-tempat terkenal di negara-negara hanya tiketnya lomayan mahal
english_translation: The place is spacious, suitable for educational tourism of countries because there are many famous places in countries, but the ticket prices are quite expensive.

text: Beruntung bgt kesini pas kabut lagi tebel. Pemandangannya jd lebih bagus. Buat foto oke. Tp sayang lumayan pegel utk menyusuri keseluruhannya.
english_translation: So lucky to come here when the fog was thick. The view became even better. Great for photos. But unfortunately, it's quite tiring to explore the whole area.

text:
Dari luar kelihatan biasa" saja begitu masuk kedalam ternyata bagus pemandangannya dan ada resortnya juga
Sangat luas ada cafe nya juga lho...
english_translation: From the outside it looks ordinary, but once you enter, the view is beautiful and there's a resort too. It's very spacious and has a cafe as well.

text: Masjidnya luas sekarang, cuma hijab wudhu antara ikhwan dan akhwat kurang, bisa bercampur kalau pengunjung kurang menyadari pemisahan zona tsb
english_translation: The mosque is spacious now, only the wudu hijab between men and women is insufficient, they can mix if visitors are not aware of the separation of these zones.

text: Ya lumayan buat foto dan makan jagung bakar dan sosis bakar. Datang jam 7 baru lebih menikmati, kalau sudah jam 9 ke atas sudah terlalu ramai.
english_translation: It's quite good for taking photos and eating grilled corn and grilled sausage. Arriving at 7 is more enjoyable, as after 9 it's already too crowded.

text:
kebun bunga yang cantik.. ada shop nya juga buat yang mau beli dan menanam sendiri..

beberapa spot foto ada yang kotor tlg lebih diperhatikan
english_translation:
A beautiful flower garden.. there's also a shop for those who want to buy and plant themselves..

some photo spots are dirty, please pay more attention.

text: Lokasi camping yg cocok untuk anak sekolah...jalan menuju lokasi belum beraspal..nanjak...harap ber hati hati saat hujan...parkiran cukup luas
english_translation: A suitable campsite for school children... the road to the location is unpaved... uphill... please be careful when it rains... the parking lot is quite spacious

text: Tempat yang asikk nyaman dan menyanangkan buat berlibur menguji keberanian dengan bermain playing fox bahagia bersama keluarga dan teman teman
english_translation: A fun, comfortable, and enjoyable place for a vacation, testing your courage by playing Happy Fox with family and friends.

text:
puass
Udaranya dingin......
Ini masih pagi jadi belum ramai dan panas...
Kamu bisa keliling dunia hanya dalam beberapa jam... mantull dahhh
english_translation:
The air is cool......
It's still early so it's not crowded and hot yet...
You can travel the world in just a few hours... awesome!

text: Di stone garden kita dapat berfoto foto melihat pemandangan dari atas sejuk juga karena merupakan pegunungan tapi sayang aksesnya kurang bagus
english_translation: At the stone garden, we can take photos and enjoy the scenery from above. It's also cool because it's a mountainous area, but unfortunately, the access isn't very good.

text: Lokasi curugnya biasa aja, tidak sesuai ekspetasi, tapi jalan menuju lokasi curug seperti melewati hutan pemandangan bagus dan cukup menantang
english_translation: The waterfall's location was just okay, not meeting expectations, but the path to the waterfall felt like walking through a forest with beautiful scenery and was quite challenging.

text: tidak pernah bosan untuk berkunjung lagi,, setiap kesana pasti akses ksana berubah,, itu yg membuat tidak membosankan.. wisata murah meriah...
english_translation: Never tired of visiting again,, every time I go there the access changes,, that's what makes it not boring.. cheap and cheerful tourism...

text: Semoga Pemkab KBB bidang Pariwisata menjadikan destinasi wisata Situ Ciburuy kembali hidup agar perekonomian warga sekitar bangkit melejit....
english_translation: Hopefully, the West Bandung Regency government in the tourism sector will revive Situ Ciburuy as a tourist destination so that the economy of the surrounding residents can surge.

text: Sekian tahun baru kesana lagi dengan bawa 2 personil tambahan. Akses masih sama seperti yng dulu. Hanya saja ada wahana baru prosotan pelangi.
english_translation: It's been years since I went there again with 2 additional people. The access is still the same as before. Only there's a new rainbow slide attraction.

text: tempat wisatanya bagus, parkir luas dan bisa pesan tiket di traveloka. banyak tempat makanan didalam, banyak permainan juga. berbayar lagi ya.
english_translation: The tourist spot is good, parking is spacious, and you can book tickets on Traveloka. There are many food places inside, and lots of games too. It's also paid, yes.

text: so kalo buat yg suka fto fto kesini aja unchhh top bgt no komen tapi rekomendt banget buat yg suka fto fto mah dan suka bersahabat dengan alam
english_translation: So if you like taking photos, just come here. It's really top-notch, no complaints. Highly recommended for those who like taking photos and enjoy being friends with nature.

text:
Ksini cuma main aja dan lihat lihat. Suasananya emg enak banget. Disini penginapan kisaran harga 800rb keatas. Ada wahana-wahananya juga.
Bagus
english_translation:
Just here to play and look around. The atmosphere is really nice. Accommodation here is around IDR 800,000 and up. There are also attractions.
Good

text: Subhanallah keindahan yang benar-benar anugerah dari sang pencipta sungguh mempesona, tidak ada yang bisa menandinginya. Pemilik tim sukses.
english_translation: Subhanallah, the beauty is truly a gift from the Creator, truly mesmerizing, nothing can match it. The team owner is successful.

text: Tempat sejuk, kalo pas kabut tidak turun viewnya bagus. Ada jagung bakar yang bisa dinikmati. Sayang kalo mau nerbangin drone harus bayar.huhuuhu

text: Sangat menyenangkan untuk datang ketempat ini bersama dengan teman atau keluarga. Banyak pemandangan bagus untuk difoto dan udaranya dangat sejuk
english_translation: It's very pleasant to come to this place with friends or family. There are many beautiful sights to photograph and the air is very cool.

text: Tempat Wisata yang sudah lama sekali berdirinya, pernah datang tahun 1981 dan baru datang lagi akhir tahun 2018. Banyak perubahan dibanding dulu.
english_translation: A tourist spot that has been established for a very long time, I visited in 1981 and only came again at the end of 2018. Many changes compared to before.

text: Sangat bagus, kalo yang ga biasa tracking jangan maksain kesini deh apalagi medannya berat nanti malah bebanin temen2 yang bener2 mau kesini wkwk
english_translation: Very good, if you're not used to tracking, don't force yourself to come here, especially since the terrain is difficult, it will just burden your friends who really want to come here haha

text: Viewnya kereenn,outbondnya juga kereennn,tempatnya luaasss bangett. Cocok utk liburan bersama keluarga,teman,maupun rekan kerja. Terimakasih TWGC.
english_translation: The view is amazing, the outbound activities are also amazing, the place is very spacious. Suitable for holidays with family, friends, or colleagues. Thank you TWGC.

text: Ga pakai rencana mateng, tau-tau berangkat ke Gunung Tangkuban Parahu, Tanjakan extrem Alhamdulillah lancar jaya dengan Sigra M 1000cc isi 6 orang
english_translation: No solid plan, suddenly set off for Mount Tangkuban Parahu. The extreme incline, thankfully, went smoothly with a 1000cc Sigra carrying 6 people.

text: Track sangat luar biasa. Sebisa mungkin jangan membawa anak kecil dibawah 12 tahun... Potensi kepeleset tinggi. Tapi cukup menantang adrenalin 😄 …
english_translation: The track is amazing. As much as possible, don't bring children under 12 years old... High potential for slipping. But it's quite an adrenaline rush 😄 …

text: Sukaaaa sekali tempat ini. tambah lagi icon dunianya biar makin seru. O iya....ada baiknya paspor yang didapatkan distempel di setiap icon negara.
english_translation: I love this place. Add more world icons to make it more exciting. Oh, and it would be good if the passport you get was stamped at each country icon.

text: Masih belum ramai, cukup bersih, perjalanan ke lokasi tidak terlalu menguras tenaga, spot foto2 cukup menyenangkan, area berenang kurang memuaskan
english_translation: Still not crowded, quite clean, the trip to the location wasn't too strenuous, photo spots are quite enjoyable, the swimming area is less satisfying

text: Tempa rekreasi keluarga yang menarik, terletak di lereng2 yang indah. Banyak cafe dengan spot foto yang indah. Harga makanan terjangkau 50rb-100rb
english_translation: An interesting family recreation spot, located on beautiful slopes. Many cafes with beautiful photo spots. Affordable food prices of 50,000-100,000 IDR.

text:
Tempatnya Asri, ga perlu jalan jauh untuk dapet view bagus. Parkir cukup lapang. Ada warung n kamar mandi.
Salah satu lokasi hiking favorit nih...
english_translation:
The place is beautiful, no need to walk far to get a good view. Parking is quite spacious. There are kiosks and bathrooms.
One of my favorite hiking spots...

text: X ke 2 kesini lagi karena Ada wahana baru Rainbow Slide yg dipengen banget sama Jagoan😍😍 Tempat paling Favorit sbnrnya Danau & Taman Bunganya 😍😍 …
english_translation: X came here again because there's a new attraction, the Rainbow Slide, which Jagoan really wanted😍😍 The most favorite place is actually the Lake & Flower Garden 😍😍…

text: nikmati keindahan taman buatan dengan nuansa fussion bali sunda, dilatarbelakangi gunung yang indah, htm nya lumayan pricey apalagi ketika weekend
english_translation: Enjoy the beauty of an artificial garden with Balinese Sundanese fusion nuances, with a beautiful mountain backdrop. The entrance fee is quite pricey, especially on weekends.

text: Air sungainya jernih jika tidak ada hujan. Sepanjang perjalanan dari tempat parkir ke lokasi seru, tidak membosankan karena pemandangan nya bagus.
english_translation: The river water is clear if there is no rain. The journey from the parking lot to the exciting location is not boring because the scenery is good.

text:
Tempat untuk mengabiskan waktu liburan, dan menenangkan diri untuk menjadi lebih baik.
Bersama teman dan keluarga
Suasana yg asri sejuk dan nyaman
english_translation:
A place to spend your holidays and calm yourself to become better.
With friends and family
A beautiful, cool, and comfortable atmosphere

text: Tiket masuk 25ribu/orang. Spot foto banyak. Bunganya bagus2 dan terawat. Pecinta bunga pasti suka. Ada foodcourtnya juga, lumayan enak dan murmer.
english_translation: Admission is 25,000 rupiah per person. Lots of photo spots. The flowers are beautiful and well-maintained. Flower lovers will definitely like it. There's also a food court, it's quite good and cheap.

text: Lokasinya bagus banget, yg datang bisa buat foto², kulineran serta menikmati suasana, pemandangan dan kesejukan alamnya. Pokoknya keren abis 👍👍👍 …
english_translation: The location is really great. Visitors can take photos, enjoy culinary delights, and soak in the atmosphere, the scenery, and the cool, refreshing nature. Absolutely awesome 👍👍👍

text: Tempat nya adem cocok buat melepas lelah dan merenung dengan suasana pohon Pinus yang rindang angin spoy spoy cocok buat ngadem dan cari inspirasi
english_translation: The place is cool, suitable for resting and contemplating amidst the shade of lush pine trees, with a gentle breeze, perfect for chilling out and finding inspiration.

text: Kedua x nya kesini...& gak pernah bosen....viewnya cantik apalagi skrg ada wahana Rainbow Slide yg menguji adrenalin 🤭...sedu pisan eeuuyyyy 🥰🥰🥰 …
english_translation: This is the second time I've been here... and I never get bored... the view is beautiful, especially now with the adrenaline-testing Rainbow Slide attraction 🤭... so delicious 🥰🥰🥰

text: 7kali ke tmpat ini dan gak bosen bosen tempat nya keren cuma jln pas masuk ke tmpatnya ada pungutan dari pihak desa tapi akses jln kesananya jelek
english_translation: Been to this place 7 times and I'm not bored. The place is cool, but there's a fee from the village when you enter. The road to get there is bad though.

text: pergunakan sepatu untuk hiking jika dimusim hujan dan disarankan tidak membawa anak dibawah usia 12 tahun . Bawalah barang bawaan dalam tas ransel
english_translation: Use hiking boots if it's the rainy season and it's recommended not to bring children under 12 years old. Carry your belongings in a backpack.

text: Tempat wisata baru di daerah punclut satu kawasan dengan ddieu land... tempat nya berupa lembah dan menyajikan wisata dengan ikon2 negara di dunia
english_translation: New tourist attraction in the Punclut area, one area with D'Dieu Land... the place is a valley and offers tourism with icons of countries around the world

text: Hanya mencoba sarapan dan offroad pakai land rover, makananya keasinan kalau offroadnya menyenangkan dihutan pinus kawasan gunung tangkuban perahu
english_translation: Just tried breakfast and off-roading with a Land Rover. The food was too salty, but the off-roading in the pine forest area of Mount Tangkuban Perahu was fun.

text: Senang berada disanah untuk santai,selfie,poto bersama teman atau keluarga. Cuman sayang disana ada banya hewan monyet yang tanpa disadari muncul.
english_translation: It's nice to be there to relax, take selfies, and take photos with friends or family. It's just a shame there are many monkeys there that appear without you realizing it.

text: Menuju tempat ini jalannya sedikit berbatu, karna sekelilingnya gunung batu cadas, dari jalan raya kurang lebih 5-6 menit, beautiful view to see😉 …
english_translation: The road to this place is a bit rocky, because it's surrounded by rocky mountains. It's about a 5-6 minute drive from the highway, beautiful view to see😉 ...

text: Akses ke lokasi jalannya masih belum diaspal, ada pungutan liar, biaya parkir sangat mahal karena dikelola oleh warga setempat dan minim pengunjung
english_translation: Access to the road location is still unpaved, there are illegal levies, parking fees are very expensive because it is managed by local residents and there are minimal visitors.

text: di google tertera harga 15.000-20.000 tapi pas di loket masuk harganya 30.000, parkir lumayan jauh, makanannya sedikit overprice tapi enak enak kok
english_translation: Google lists the price as 15,000-20,000, but at the entrance ticket booth, the price is 30,000. Parking is quite far, and the food is a little overpriced, but it's all delicious.

text: Recomended untuk pecinta alam semesta Anugerah Ilahi di Nusantara tepat nya Curug Pelangi Parongpong Bandung Barat, masya Allah Sangat mempesona...
english_translation: Recommended for lovers of the Divine Grace universe in the archipelago, precisely at Curug Pelangi, Parongpong, West Bandung, masya Allah, truly captivating...

text: Sangat rekomended nih buat liburan bawa keluarga pasti seru harga tiket cukup terbilang sangat murah dan bikin puas Gunung Tangkuban Parahu mantap.
english_translation: Highly recommended for a holiday with family, it will surely be fun. The ticket price is quite cheap and satisfying. Tangkuban Perahu Mountain is awesome.

text: Salah satu destinasi favorit di lembang, fasilitas cukup lengkap, hanya saja untuk weekend harus pinter2 pilih waktu berkunjung agar lebih nyaman..
english_translation: One of the favorite destinations in Lembang, the facilities are quite complete, it's just that for weekends you have to be smart about choosing a visiting time to be more comfortable.

text: Dapat view yang bagus banget saat kabut tebal. Awal trek hujan rintik rintik dan angin yang kuat,seperti badai tapi nyampe puncak ga ada angin lagi
english_translation: Great view, even in thick fog. The beginning of the trail had drizzles and strong winds, like a storm, but by the summit, there was no wind.

text: Sayang nya jarak parkiran kendaraan sama curuknya terlalu jauh .jadi untuk orang tua dan anak2. Kasian .harusnya di buat parkiran kendaraan di atas
english_translation: It's a shame the parking lot is too far from the ravine. It's a pity for the elderly and children. There should be a parking lot built above.

text: Banyak anak tangga yg harus dilewati untuk sampai ke curugnya, tp krn tidak terlalu ramai jd enak dikunjungi untuk quality time bersama yg terkasih
english_translation: Many steps to climb to get to the waterfall, but since it wasn't too crowded, it was a nice place to visit for quality time with loved ones.

text: Mantap pokoknya. Tiket masuk sangat terjangkau. Pemandangan dan suasana alamnya bikin adem hati . recommended banget lah utk liburan di akhir pekan
english_translation: Excellent overall. The entrance fee is very affordable. The natural scenery and atmosphere are very soothing. Highly recommended for a weekend getaway.

text: 10-12-21 rombongan jurusan kebidanan Polkestama prodi Tasik & Cirebon mengdakan sambung rasa/kominikasi internal disini, nyaman dan sejuk tempatnya
english_translation: 10-12-21 The midwifery department delegation from Polkestama, Tasik & Cirebon study programs held an informal gathering/internal communication here; the place is comfortable and cool.

text: Lokasinya cocok untuk liburan bersama keluarga. Bisa camping dan juga ada rumah kayu untuk tinggal. ada games flaying fox jug untuk anak dan dewasa
english_translation: The location is suitable for a family holiday. You can camp and there are also wooden houses to stay in. There's a flying fox game for children and adults.

text: Buat yg suka foto", Jalan",nih ada konsep tempat yg pas banget, tempat nya luas nyaman ,banyak spot fotonya, di jamin seru deh.. yu nyoba mampir yu
english_translation: For those who love taking photos and traveling, here's a concept for a perfect place. The place is spacious and comfortable, with many photo spots. Guaranteed to be fun! Come on, come and try visiting.

text:
Orchid Forest tapi gk ada Orchid nya.. Overall baguslah.. Ada banyak pohon pinus

Seger banget di dalam jalan-jalan. Banyak spot  foto yg bagus jga
english_translation:
Orchid Forest, but there are no orchids... Overall, it's good. There are many pine trees.

It's very refreshing walking around inside. There are also many good photo spots.

text: Tempatnya belum seramai obyek wisata yg lain di Lembang...tapi asik buat santai bersama keluarga..ada beberapa wahana, tapi bayar lagi perwahananya
english_translation: The place isn't as crowded as other tourist attractions in Lembang yet... but it's nice for relaxing with family... there are a few attractions, but you have to pay for each attraction.

text: Artistik tempatnya, bagus buat hunting foto2 cantik... tapi blum terlalu banyak pilihan makanan nya dan fasilitas yg ditawarkan masi kurang menarik
english_translation: Artistic place, good for taking beautiful photos... but not too many food options yet and the facilities offered are still less appealing.

text: Tempat nya Asri... teduh dan adem..bersih banyak spot foto yang bagus kalian wajib datang apalagi tiket masuk murah dan tempat parkir luas. .👍👍👍👍 …
english_translation: The place is beautiful... shady and cool.. clean, with many good photo spots. You must visit, especially since the entrance ticket is cheap and the parking lot is spacious. .👍👍👍👍 …

text: Tempat yang nyaman dan indah, dengan jajaran pohon pinus yang teduh, selain itu pemandangan alam yang bagus, cocok untuk melepas penat dari kerjaan
english_translation: A comfortable and beautiful place, with rows of shady pine trees, besides that, a good natural view, suitable for relieving work stress.

text:
Ke sini niatnya pengen foto box, sampe sana antri di suruh tunggu dulu. Pas balik malah udah tutup poto box nya.
Tp tempatnya enak, spot foto bagus
english_translation:
Came here with the intention of taking photo booth pictures, arrived and had to queue and wait. When I came back, the photo booth was already closed.
But the place is nice, good photo spots.

text: Sepanjang perjalananya menuju tangkuban perahu d suguhkan pemandangan yang luar biasa indahny, sesampai tujuan pemandangan gak kalah menakjubkan😀 …
english_translation: Along the journey to Tangkuban Perahu, you are presented with incredibly beautiful scenery. Upon arrival, the view is no less amazing 😀 ...

text: Liat di maps kayanya bagus, cuma sayang kesini pas cuaca ga mendukung. Harga 30rb lumayan lah, tiket masuk bisa ditukar juga untuk mengambil minum.
english_translation: Looking at the map, it seems nice, it's just a shame I came here when the weather wasn't cooperating. The 30k price is okay, the entrance ticket can also be exchanged for a drink.

text:
Ga terlalu spesial
Tiket masuk 12rb + 5rb untuk parkir
Dpr t minuman 1

Aksesnya sangat berbatu
Bemper bakal rusak...

Masih bnyk sampah berserakan
english_translation:
Not too special
Entrance ticket 12k + 5k for parking
No drinks 1

The access is very rocky
The bumper will be damaged...

Still a lot of trash scattered around

text: Masyaalloh....ta,jub melihatnya ...coba guy kunjungi.....pemandangan alami dan yang pasti buat pencinta panjat tebing tantangan untuk menaklukannya
english_translation: Wow... you have to see this... come visit..... natural scenery and definitely for rock climbing enthusiasts, a challenge to conquer it.

text: Tempatnya mudah dijangkau, tidak jauh dari parkiran. Nuansa alam yg sedikit berbeda, dengan batuan purba yang sangat indah. Mahakarya sang Pencipta.
english_translation: The place is easily accessible, not far from the parking lot. A slightly different natural ambiance, with very beautiful ancient rocks. A masterpiece of the Creator.

text: Tempatnya bagus dan saya suka. Untuk turun dan naik menuju curug Malela sungguh luar biasa, perlu stamina dan tenaga. Tapi terbayar dengan curugnya.
english_translation: The place is nice and I like it. Going down and up to the Malela waterfall is truly amazing, it requires stamina and energy. But it's worth it for the waterfall.

text:
Ini adalah tempat untuk mengambil foto dengan latar belakang konstruksi boneka tujuh keajaiban.
Begitu saja... Tidak cocok untuk warga lanjut usia.
english_translation:
This is a place to take photos with the Seven Dwarfs construction background.
That's all... Not suitable for the elderly.

text: Bagus.. kabutnya haha karna waktu kesana sedang hujan deras ,dan setelah reda isinya kabut manja..  tetep indah.blm sempat turuun ,next kembali lagi
english_translation: Nice.. the fog, haha, because it was raining heavily when I went there, and after it stopped, it was filled with gentle fog.. still beautiful. Haven't had a chance to go down yet, will come back next time.

text: Waktu terbaik datang kesini adalah saat sun rise ataupun sun site... View nya amazing...jalan dr parkirannya tdk jauh dan sudah ditata dg cukup baik
english_translation: The best time to come here is during sunrise or sunset... The view is amazing... the walk from the parking lot is not far and it's already arranged quite well.

text:
Alhamdulillah sekarang sudah dikelola dengan baik. Mudah-mudahan ke depan jadi tempat primadona wisata di daerah Cimahi.
Hati-hati jalannya licin...
english_translation:
Alhamdulillah, it is now well managed. Hopefully in the future it will become a prima donna tourist destination in the Cimahi area.
Be careful, the road is slippery...

text: Cukup Bagus untuk foto2, sayangnya jalan di dalam masih buruk sehingga harus berhati-hati, banyak monyet juga jadi hati-hati untuk yang bawa makanan
english_translation: Good enough for photos, unfortunately the road inside is still bad so you have to be careful, there are also many monkeys so be careful if you bring food

text: Tempatnya luas. Ada arena permainan baru tapi gk berani nyoba. Aku takut sama ketinggian. Ada taman unggas. Jual souvernir nya juga harga terjangkau
english_translation: The place is spacious. There's a new game arena but I didn't dare to try it. I'm afraid of heights. There's a bird park. They also sell souvenirs at affordable prices.

text: tempatnya masih alami, jalan menuju ke curug dr loket lumayan jauh dan melewati beberapa jembatan yg kondisinya rusak, cukup membahayakan pengunjung
english_translation: The place is still natural, the road to the waterfall from the ticket counter is quite far and passes several bridges that are in disrepair, quite dangerous for visitors

text: masyaalloh tempatnya bagus bgt, indah pemandangannya, makanan jg enak.taoi sayang kesini udah kesorean, blm semua tempat dikunjungi..sejuk udaranya.
english_translation: Masha'Allah, the place is really nice, the scenery is beautiful, and the food is delicious too. But unfortunately, we came too late in the afternoon, and haven't visited all the places yet. The air is cool.

text: Sangat luas dan tempatnya nyaman, belum lagi banyak spot foto, cocok untuk acara outdoor, bisa untuk goto prewedding, dan bersantai bersama keluarga
english_translation: Very spacious and comfortable, not to mention many photo spots, suitable for outdoor events, can be used for pre-wedding photoshoots, and relaxing with family

text: Hotel dan Taman wisata dengan tema hutan pinus, ada flying fox walaupun tracknya pendek. Untuk balita ada taman kelinci dan bisa memberi makan rusa.
english_translation: Hotel and tourist park with a pine forest theme, there's a zipline although the track is short. For toddlers, there's a rabbit garden and they can feed the deer.

text:
Berwisata sambil mengenang sejarah sangkuriang..
😂😂.. Bandreknya enak sekali disinii apalagi minum nya pake gelas dari bambu sangat tradisional 😍😍 …
english_translation:
Traveling while remembering the history of Sangkuriang..
😂😂.. The Bandrek is very delicious here, especially drinking it from a bamboo glass, very traditional 😍😍 …

text: Pengalaman yang menyenangkan, asri, penginapan bersih, petugas kebersihan selalu ramah dan rajin,  permainan anak seru2, paintball memacu adrenalin.
english_translation: A pleasant, green experience, clean accommodation, the cleaning staff are always friendly and diligent, the children's games are fun, paintball is adrenaline-pumping.

text: Camp ground murmer, pelayanan petugas-nya ramah (pertahankan), suasananya adeeeeeem bingit...😀😀😀.......mushola+toilet+warung makanan tersedia..... …
english_translation: Campsite murmurs, the staff's service is friendly (maintain this), the atmosphere is super cool...😀😀😀.......prayer room+toilet+food stall available.....

text: Suka sih sama pemandangannya jalannya jg gak terjal bgtt banyak tempat wisata sebelum tangkuban perahu.. Ada kudanya juga jadi anak bisa naik kuda..
english_translation: I like the scenery, and the road isn't too steep either. There are many tourist attractions before Tangkuban Perahu. There are also horses, so children can ride them.

text: Selalu ramai dan suasananya tidak banyak yang berubah. Area parkir aman dan luas. Sudah menerapkan protokol kesehatan dan banyak tenda tenda makanan
english_translation: Always crowded and the atmosphere hasn't changed much. The parking area is safe and spacious. Health protocols are implemented and there are many food stalls.

text: Hari kerja yg harusnya tiket masuk 25rb, tpi di suruh bayarnya 100rb haha semoga bisa lebih amanah lg ya yg jaga tiketnya.. buat tempatnya sih bagus
english_translation: The ticket price on weekdays should be 25,000 IDR, but they asked for 100,000 IDR, haha, hopefully the ticket keeper can be more trustworthy. As for the place itself, it's good.

text:
Pemandangannya keren, udaranya sejuk, banyak bunga yg cantik
Pokoknya milenial ataupun keluarga wajib banget coba

Disini suasananya sejuk dan damai
english_translation:
The view is cool, the air is fresh, lots of beautiful flowers
Millennials and families must try it

The atmosphere here is cool and peaceful

text: tempat nya sejuk buangeeet, tiket masuk 20 ribu, parkiran free, cocok buat acara keluarga, sekolah,kantor, jajanan nya standar, gak nge-getok harga..
english_translation: The place is super cool, entrance ticket is 20 thousand, parking is free, suitable for family events, school, and office gatherings, the snacks are standard, and the prices are not rip-offs.

text: Tempat bagus tp kenapa skrg tukar uang jadi koin nya di potong, dulu tukar 200 rb tetep jadi 200 rb, skrg tukar 200 rb jadi koin nya 180 rb ..?? 😌😌 …
english_translation: Good place but why is it now that when exchanging money for coins, the amount is cut? Before, exchanging 200 thousand was still 200 thousand, now exchanging 200 thousand results in only 180 thousand worth of coins..? 😌😌 …

text: Dulu pernah baguss tp skrg jd mahal dan dibangun candi2 artificial gt... sukaan dulu pas msh alami sih.. gils lembah yg terselimutkan kabut magis bat
english_translation: It used to be good, but now it's become expensive and they've built artificial temples... I preferred it when it was still natural... crazy, a valley shrouded in magical mist

text:
Ga terlalu luas tapi padat bunga nya..
Bagus buat foto foto.. Htm 25 rebu
Di pinjemin topi di pintu masuk.. Jangan lupa balikin pas mau keluar wkwkwk
english_translation:
Not too wide but the flowers are dense.
Good for taking photos. Entrance fee 25 thousand.
They lend hats at the entrance. Don't forget to return them when you leave hahaha

text: Masuk beli tiket . tiekt dapat dtukar minumn grtis. Syaa pili milo hangat enak. Hrga mkan standrt tempt wista. Kalo rame sush cr temrp dduk. Cepat2an
english_translation: Enter to buy tickets. Tickets can be exchanged for a free drink. I chose warm milo, it was delicious. Food prices are standard for tourist spots. If it's crowded, it's hard to find a place to sit. First come, first served.

text: Sejuk enak buat liburan . Ya walau perjalanan dari jakarta ke lembang pake motor melelahkan tapi sampai sana terbayarkan dengan keindahan alamnya 😊 …
english_translation: Cool and nice for a holiday. Yes, even though the journey from Jakarta to Lembang by motorbike was tiring, it was worth it when we got there with the natural beauty 😊 …

text: Cocok untuk para pendaki kelas pemula, Tempat nyaman , toilet banyak, spot photo mantul ,Tiket untuk hikking 12K untuk Camp 20K . Kayu per ikat 10K .
english_translation: Suitable for beginner hikers, Comfortable place, plenty of toilets, awesome photo spots. Hiking ticket 12K, Camping 20K. Wood per bundle 10K.

text: Coabain ke wisata yg ada di punclut lembang bandung ini yuuuuk di jamin gak akan nyesel deh udah pasti WOWsaraehills bangeeeet yuuuuuuuk kita main🎉 …
english_translation: Let's go to the attractions in Punclut, Lembang, Bandung. Guaranteed you won't regret it, it's definitely super WOWsaraehills. Let's play! 🎉

text: tempat sejuk, luas banget banyak spot foto, untuk kembali ke parkiran setelah berjalan jauh dapat menggunakan armada yang sudah disediakan dan gratis
english_translation: Cool place, very spacious with many photo spots. To return to the parking lot after a long walk, you can use the provided free shuttle service.

text: Gak tau harus ngomong apa sama curug satu ini, Bau dan udah kotor, jelas banget udah tercemar limbah... not recommended buat liburan tema wisata alam
english_translation: Don't know what to say about this waterfall. It smells and is dirty, clearly polluted by waste... not recommended for a nature tourism holiday.

text: Destinasi wisata yang luar biasa. Serasa berkeliling di luar negeri.  Ada patung liberty dan menara paris.  Jembatan gantung yang menguji adrenalin..
english_translation: An extraordinary tourist destination. It feels like traveling abroad. There are the Statue of Liberty and the Eiffel Tower. A suspension bridge that tests your adrenaline.

text: Asri, seger, bersih, tempatnya luas, banyak spot foto yang instagramable. Sayang belum pernah nyoba jembatannya hehe next time kalo ke sana lagi aaah
english_translation: Asri, fresh, clean, the place is spacious, many Instagrammable photo spots. Too bad I've never tried the bridge hehe next time if I go there again, aaah

text: Wisata buatan berupa miniatur tempat terkenal diluar negeri terutama Eropa dan lokasinya cukup bersih, untuk lebih menarik miniaturnya perlu ditambah
english_translation: Artificial tourism featuring miniatures of famous overseas landmarks, especially in Europe, and the location is quite clean. To make it more interesting, the miniatures need to be added.

text: Tempat wisata wajib kalo liburan disekitar Subang/Bandung. Kalau kesini usahakan pagi ya, kalau udah siang, antri kendaraannya mengular sampai bawah.
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot for a holiday around Subang/Bandung. If you come here, try to go in the morning. If it's already noon, the vehicle queue will snake all the way down.

text: Jalannya gak terlalu jauh dari jalan raya, mudah dijangkau, Tempatnya masih asri meskipun banyak perubahan, sayangnya harganya jadi makin mahal. Hehe
english_translation: The road is not too far from the highway, easy to reach. The place is still beautiful/natural even though there have been many changes, unfortunately, the prices have become more expensive. Hehe

text: Tempatnya lumayan bagus,sempat ada insiden ketika kami outbond kesana salah satu guru kami terjatuh di wahana,tapi ditanggapi dgn baik oleh petugas..
english_translation: The place is quite good. There was an incident when we went there for an outbound activity. One of our teachers fell on a ride, but the staff responded well.

text: tempat tidak tertata dengan rapi, tempat sampah kurang, akses menuju curug sawer jalan setapak, kurang rambu rambu petunjuk jalan menuju curug sawer.
english_translation: The place is not tidy, not enough trash bins, access to Curug Sawer is a footpath, there are not enough signs pointing the way to Curug Sawer.

text: Tempatnya luas dan bagus banget sumpah, harus kesini pagi" biar puas bisa explore kesemua tempat, banyak banget tempat" yg bisa dijadiin spot foto 🥰😊
english_translation: The place is really spacious and amazing, swear, you have to come here in the morning to fully explore all the spots, there are so many places that can be used as photo spots 🥰😊

text: Terakhir kesini waktu SD,. Sekarang tempatnya sudah lebih bagus,.. udaranya dingin,. Makan jagung bakar dan minum segelas kopi nikmat sekali disini,.
english_translation: I last came here when I was in elementary school. Now the place is much better. The air is cold. Eating grilled corn and drinking a glass of coffee here is very enjoyable.

text: Tempat wisata dan camp yang masih natural , asri , bersih semoga semua penikmat, pecinta dan penggiat alam tetap menjaga keasrian tempat yg indah inu
english_translation: A natural, beautiful, and clean tourist spot and campsite. May all nature lovers, enthusiasts, and activists continue to preserve the beauty of this wonderful place.

text: Jalannya lumayan menantang trs jalur hikingnya ga terlalu berat, curugnya udah pasti keren jadi capenya terbayar lunas, airnya dingin bgt bikin seger
english_translation: The road is quite challenging, and the hiking trail isn't too difficult. The waterfall is definitely cool, so the effort was totally worth it. The water is super cold and refreshing.

text: Keereen tempatnya .. siapkan tenaga untuk menanjak .. sejuk bangett, jangan untuk beli stowberrynya ..hmmm manis dan murah 3 pak 50rb gk mengecewakan
english_translation: The place is steep.. prepare your energy for the climb.. very cool, don't forget to buy the strawberries.. hmmm sweet and cheap, 3 packs for 50 thousand, not disappointing

text: Tempat lumayan nyaman. Sejuk. Yg aku suka pengunjung nya tidak terlalu banyak jadi merasakan alam nya itu bener bisa di hayati . Mantap lah poko nya.
english_translation: A fairly comfortable place. Cool. What I like is that there aren't too many visitors, so you can truly appreciate nature. Awesome, all in all.

text: Udara sejuk..nyaman.hanya saja untuk kendaraan gratis tidak terlihay di lokasi wisata..jadi pengunjung tidak tahu ada mobil untuk kembali ke parkiran
english_translation: Cool air...comfortable. It's just that the free vehicle isn't visible at the tourist location... so visitors don't know there's a car to return to the parking lot.

text: Tempat yg asik bgt buat berlibur bersama keluarga. Tempat rekreasi yg lengkap. Areanya luas dan banyak pohon rindang jd ga terlalu panas kalau siang.
english_translation: A really fun place for a family holiday. A complete recreational area. The area is spacious and has many shady trees, so it's not too hot during the day.

text: Tiketnya cuma 10k, jalannya memang sempit dan agak kurang terawat. Berjalan dari gerbang sekitar 2km. Setelah sampai lokasi bisa istirahat di warung.
english_translation: The ticket is only 10k, the path is indeed narrow and a bit poorly maintained. It's about a 2km walk from the gate. Once you reach the location, you can rest at a warung.

text:
Curug nya keren...
wahana untuk anak anak nya juga ada..
Cocok untuk tamasya bersama keluarga tercinta...
camping bisa juga...
mantap dah pokok nya..
english_translation:
The waterfall is cool...
There are also rides for children...
Suitable for a picnic with your beloved family...
Camping is also possible...
Awesome, basically..

text: Berada di tengah hutan Jalan akses menuju air terjun ini ekstrim Penuh Tantangan namun sangat indah dan dan bagus sekali cocok untuk bermalam di sini
english_translation: Being in the middle of the forest. The access road to this waterfall is extreme. Full of challenges, but very beautiful and very good. Suitable for an overnight stay here.

text: Tiket masuk dan parkir murah,tiket dapat ditukar dengan minuman (lemontea/milo),parkir dibawah tidak begitu luas,pegawai ramah,tempat bersih dan bagus
english_translation: Cheap entrance and parking, tickets can be exchanged for drinks (lemon tea/milo), parking downstairs is not very spacious, friendly staff, clean and nice place

text: Easy trekking to waterfall..hanya jalan menuju lokasi rusak parah. Tolong perhatian pemerintah memperbaiki access ke lokasi Curug Layung. Terima kasih
english_translation: Easy trekking to waterfall.. the only road leading to the location is severely damaged. Please the government pay attention to repairing the access to the Curug Layung location. Thank you

text:
Tempatnya oke, adem dan banyak spot foto. Cuma minumannya gak sesuai expektasi.

Disitunya ada pilihan, tapi cuma dikasih yg jeruk.

Tapi oke, Htm 50k
english_translation:
The place is nice, cool, and has many photo spots. Only the drinks didn't meet expectations.
There were choices there, but they only gave me the orange one.
But it's okay, the entrance fee is 50k.

text: Grafika Cikole bisa dikatakan tempat wisata terpadu. Selain outbound dan tempat rekreasi, ada juga tempat untuk menginap. Pililhan untuk menginap juga
english_translation: Grafika Cikole can be said to be an integrated tourist destination. Besides outbound and recreational areas, there are also places to stay. The choices for staying also

text: Pemandangannya sangat mengagumkan, tidak banyak orang ketika saya pergi ke sana sehingga kedamaian dan kegembiraan di alam liar sangat mengasyikkan
english_translation: The view was amazing, there weren't many people when I went there so the peace and joy in nature was very exciting.

text: Pas kesini airnya lagi keruh, iya soalnya kemarinnya hujan. Dan kata pengelola wisata kalau mau jernih lagi harus nunggu 1 minggu dari hari pas  hujan
english_translation: When I came here the water was murky, yes, because it rained the day before. And the tourism manager said that for it to be clear again, we have to wait 1 week from the day it rained.

text: Tempatnya bagus, nyaman, dan asri. Udaranya bagus banget, tempat yang enak buat healing, apalagi malem malem api unggun. Tapi agak kotor aja kamarnya.
english_translation: The place is nice, comfortable, and natural. The air is great, a good place for healing, especially with a campfire at night. But the room is a bit dirty.

text: Tempatnya asri, wahananya tertata rapi, restoran tersedia dan selain untuk dewasa ada playground untuk anak- anak serta mini zoo yang bisa dikunjungi.
english_translation: The place is beautiful and natural, the rides are well-arranged, restaurants are available, and besides for adults, there's a playground for children and a mini zoo that can be visited.

text: Baiknya ke sini pada musim Kemarau, selain airnya jerniah jalan yg dilalui tidak licin. Ada guide buat antar kalau bingung jalannya, siapin ja tipsnya
english_translation: It's best to come here during the dry season, besides the water being clear, the path you take won't be slippery. There are guides to accompany you if you're lost, just prepare a tip.

text: Jalannya sangat jauh menuju ke lake/danau nya. Terjal dan berpasir. Tdk ada petunjuk. Di sebut perjalanan hanya 30” ternyata 2jam jg blm sampai hahaha
english_translation: The road to the lake is very long. Steep and sandy. No signs. It was called a 30" journey but it turned out to be not even 2 hours yet, hahaha.

text: Kecewa untuk tiket masuk 50rb per orang cuma buat foto, gak ada yg menarik dibanding dengan dusun bambu yg tiket masuk gratis, pemandangan lebih bagus
english_translation: Disappointed with the entrance ticket of 50k per person just for photos, there's nothing interesting compared to Dusun Bambu which has free entrance and better views.

text: Bagus tempat nya utk Foto2.. Masih byk progress yg msh mrk bangun. pas beli tiket nya bisa tuker minum di dalem. Panas kalo siang. Lebih baik dtg pagi
english_translation: Good place for photos.. There's still a lot of progress they are building. When you buy the ticket, you can exchange it for a drink inside. It's hot during the day. Better to come in the morning.

text: Maen di sini bersama istri dan anak di hari selasa, nggak seberapa rame sih. Personelnya juga tertib mengingatkan pengunjung kalo ada yg lepas masker.
english_translation: Playing here with my wife and child on Tuesday, it wasn't very crowded. The staff was also orderly, reminding visitors if anyone took off their mask.

text: Track ringan, bisa nge camp atau pun pulang pergi. Beberapa warung juga menyediakan penyewaan peralatan camping. Jangan lupa sampah nya bawa turun yaa
english_translation: Light track, can be used for camping or day trips. Some stalls also provide camping equipment rental. Don't forget to bring your trash down.

text: Suasan nya nyaman enak untuk menghilang kan pent.....tp sayang tempat sampah nya kurang banyak dan para pemotor cros maaf jangan merusak alam ....👌👍 …
english_translation: The atmosphere is comfortable and nice for unwinding..... but unfortunately, there aren't enough trash cans and dirt bike riders, please don't destroy nature....👌👍

text:
Kebun penuh dengan macam2 bunga...😍😍
Spot fotonya keren2....
Tiket masuk di hari libur murmer cm 20k..
20k dapet banyak spot foto...mau bangeett..😉😉 …
english_translation:
The garden is full of various flowers...😍😍
The photo spots are cool....
Entrance tickets on holidays are cheap at only 20k..
20k for lots of photo spots... really want to go..😉😉

text: Tempat yang wajib dikunjungin kalo ke Lembang, bagus banget, toilet bersih, kuliner lengkap. Pokoknya puas lah. Semoga terus terjaga kebersihannya ya.
english_translation: A must-visit place when you go to Lembang, very beautiful, clean toilets, complete culinary options. Overall, very satisfying. Hopefully the cleanliness will be maintained.

text: Tempat wisata yg komplit. Danau, tempat bermain, pasar kuliner. Taman taman tertata rapi.pepohonan rindang  dan tempat duduk/ saung2 dg view yg indah.
english_translation: A complete tourist destination. Lake, playground, culinary market. Neatly arranged gardens. Shady trees and seating areas/gazebos with beautiful views.

text: Masih agak panas mungkin karena masih tahap pembangunan. Lebih ditata lagi mungkin ruang nya biar lebih indah. Lokasi dekat sekali dengan akses jalan.
english_translation: Still a bit hot, possibly because it's still under construction. It would be better if the space was more organized to make it more beautiful. The location is very close to road access.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk bersantai. Dan jika Anda cukup berani, Anda bisa menaiki jembatan yang memiliki ketinggian 400 meter di atas permukaan tanah.
english_translation: A great place to relax. And if you're brave enough, you can walk across the bridge that's 400 meters above the ground.

text: Pengaturan parkirnya berantakan, tidak profesional, mobil masuk terus yang masuk, tapi ga gerak...sayang, tempat wisata di bangun dgn sangat mewah,...
english_translation: The parking arrangement is messy and unprofessional. Cars kept entering, but they weren't moving. It's a shame, considering the tourist spot was built so luxuriously.

text: Tempatnya sangat bagus untuk wisata bersama keluarga.. kabut dingin,  lampu2, jembatan kayu, anggrek, pinus, dan udara segar dapat dinikmati dimaree..
english_translation: The place is very good for family outings. Cool mist, lights, wooden bridges, orchids, pine trees, and fresh air can be enjoyed here.

text: Tempat luas, parkiran luas, tetapi untuk wahana di dalam masih sedikit makanan cukup banyak mungkin harus diperbanyak wahana bermain atau spot fotonya
english_translation: Spacious place, spacious parking, but there are still few rides inside, food is quite a lot, maybe more play rides or photo spots are needed.

text: Sungguh pengalaman menakjubkan! Lokasi yang sangat dekat dengan gunung berapi aktif, suasana yang sejuk,air sedingin es, cocok untuk berlibur keluarga
english_translation: Truly an amazing experience! Location very close to an active volcano, cool atmosphere, ice-cold water, perfect for a family vacation

text: Wahana wisata di lembang. Terdapat beberapa permainan dan wisata kuliner.  Untuk kuliner wajib beli koin dulu. Tiket masuk bisa ditukar dengan minuman
english_translation: Tourist attractions in Lembang. There are several games and culinary tours. For culinary, you must buy coins first. Entrance tickets can be exchanged for drinks.

text: tempat yang dulu sepi banget, dan tengah hutan juga. sekarang udah lebh baik, tapiiiii saya kaget karena tempatnya yang super rame di masa pandemi ini
english_translation: A place that used to be very quiet, and in the middle of the forest too. Now it's better, but I'm surprised because it's super crowded during this pandemic.

text: Sebenarnya cukup cantik. Tapi sayangnya kotor. Kalau air surut terlihat sekali banyak sampah di sekelilingnya. Semoga bisa dikelola dengan lebih baik.
english_translation: Actually quite beautiful. But unfortunately dirty. When the tide goes out, a lot of trash is clearly visible all around. Hopefully it can be managed better.

text: Bukit senyum merupakan wisata alam yang sangat indah udaranya sejuk lokasinya gampang di kunjungi sarana prasarana nya oke lumayan, pokoknya asik dech
english_translation: Bukit Senyum is a very beautiful natural tourist destination with cool air, an easily accessible location, and decent facilities. Overall, it's fun.

text: Tempat yg seru dan cocok buat keluarga, makanan resto nya enak banget, area luas pemandangan bagus sekaligus bisa berolah raga, tracking dll... Mantab
english_translation: A fun place, suitable for families. The restaurant food is very delicious. The area is spacious with good views, and you can also exercise, track, etc. Excellent.

text: Tidak ada penerangan sama sekali di kamar mandi:( overall keren kok recomended. Untuk yg berkunjung harap dijaga kebersihan  gunung dst. Salam lestari
english_translation: There's no lighting at all in the bathroom :( Overall it's great and recommended. For those visiting, please maintain cleanliness of the mountain, etc. Sustainable greetings

text: Kali ini sy mampir ke grafika Cikole untuk istirahat makan, tempat bagus parkiran luas dan cuaca sangat sejuk dikarenakan Deket gunung Tangkuban perahu
english_translation: This time I stopped by Grafika Cikole for a meal break, a nice place with ample parking and very cool weather because it's close to Mount Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Tempatnya cukup asri. Di weekday pengunjung gak gitu banyak. Sayang curug-curugnya terlihat agak kurang bersih. Kalo malam cukup horror suasananya. 😆 …
english_translation: The place is quite nice and green. On weekdays, there aren't that many visitors. It's a shame the waterfalls look a bit unclean. The atmosphere at night is quite spooky. 😆 …

text: Satu area yg lengkap untuk wisata keluarga,juga untuk acara gethering,ada bungalownya,juga bisa menginap di alam(camping) diantara jajaran hutan Pinus.
english_translation: A complete area for family tourism, also for gatherings, there are bungalows, and you can also stay in nature (camping) amongst the rows of pine forests.

text: Tempat enak,cuma untuk nginep,komunikasi antar room dan housekeeping agak susah,imbasnya kalau kita ada keperluan mendadak/butuh room service agak lama
english_translation: A nice place, but only for staying overnight. Communication between rooms and with housekeeping is a bit difficult, which results in longer waiting times for unexpected needs or room service.

text:
Berenang di air terjun dingin yang segar setelah berjalan jauh!
Pakailah sepatu trekking, licin setelah hujan.
Berjalan sekitar 2 km dari jalan utama.
english_translation:
Swimming in the cool, refreshing waterfall after a long walk!
Wear trekking shoes, slippery after the rain.
Walk about 2 km from the main road.

text: Taman wisata alam sebagai icon nya jawa barat yang memang layak mendapatkan aplous dari manca negara..... it's the best vulcano culture for a world....
english_translation: Nature tourism as the icon of West Java, truly deserving of applause from abroad..... it's the best volcano culture for a world....

text: Di tempat ini buat kamping asoy. Kalau malam tiba, lanskap city light kota Bandung terlihat menawan. Gak nyesel pernah kesini. Ajib margojib pokoke🇮🇩 …
english_translation: This place is great for camping. When night falls, the city lights of Bandung look charming. No regrets about coming here. Awesome, simply awesome! 🇮🇩

text: Floating Market adalah kawasan wisata terpadu yang berlokasi di jalan Grand Hotel No 33E, Kecamatan Lembang, Kabupaten Bandung, Jawa Barat Indonesia. …
english_translation: Floating Market is an integrated tourist area located at Grand Hotel Street No. 33E, Lembang District, Bandung Regency, West Java, Indonesia.

text:
Rekomendasi Wisata Alam Di Jawa Barat
Pengelola Menjalankan Protol Kesehatan Selama Pandemi Covid 19
Para Pedagang Teregistrasi Dan Diatur Dengan Baik.
english_translation:
Nature Tourism Recommendations in West Java
Management Implements Health Protocols During the Covid-19 Pandemic
Registered and Well-Regulated Vendors.

text: Tempatnya menarik harga tiketnya murah banyak spot foto yang bagus juga,  cocok juga buat bawa anak anak tapi harus aga di awasi takutnya metikin bunga
english_translation: The place is interesting, the ticket price is cheap, there are also many good photo spots. It's also suitable for bringing children, but they need to be supervised a bit, lest they pick the flowers.

text: Akan lebih baik lagi jika dikelola dengan serius  mulai dari sarana permainan air, fasilitas rumah makan, area parkir, taman dan gazebo utk pengunjung.
english_translation: It would be even better if managed seriously, starting from the water play facilities, dining facilities, parking area, gardens, and gazebos for visitors.

text: Bagi yang suka wahana alam terbuka ini bisa menjadi alternatif nya, untuk hunting foto juga bagus dan tiket nya juga terjangkau. Pokok nya the best lah
english_translation: For those who love outdoor rides, this can be an alternative, it's also good for photo hunting and the ticket price is affordable. Basically, it's the best.

text: Tempat nyaman digunakan  untuk gathering.  Fasilitas beberapa macam: soft gun, flyng fox,  area kebun,  memberi makan rusa,  ada resto, Tenpat menginap
english_translation: A comfortable place for gatherings. Various facilities: soft gun, flying fox, garden area, feeding deer, there is a restaurant, accommodation.

text: Anak pertama kali hiking ke sini sampai lari cocok untuk hiking berkeluarga, suasana enak, track lumayan buat pemula hehehe pokonya ajibbbb pisannnnnnn
english_translation: This is my first time hiking here, even running. It's suitable for family hiking, the atmosphere is nice, the track is pretty good for beginners hehehe, it's really awesomeeeee.

text:
Dulu sangat asri,, mungkin karena kurang perawatan jdi terlihat kumuh..
Tapi gk usah khawatir curug sawer ini cocok untuk dikunjungi bersama keluarga..
english_translation:
It used to be very beautiful and natural, maybe because of the lack of maintenance it looks shabby...
But don't worry, Curug Sawer is suitable for visiting with family.

text: Tempat Nyaman, bener bener enak baut yg mau healing jauh dari kebisingan kota. Arena luas, adem dan banyak arena permainannya. Air sedingin hati si dia
english_translation: Comfortable place, truly delicious for those who want to heal far from the city's noise. Spacious area, cool, and lots of play areas. Water as cold as his/her heart

text: Ternyata tdk tepat disebut curug/air terjun tp itu lbh tepatnya aliran air sebuah kali yg ada di maribaya, dan airnyanya jg kotor, bau dan bnyk sampah.
english_translation: It turns out it's not quite right to call it a waterfall, but rather it's more accurately a stream of water from a river in Maribaya, and the water is also dirty, smelly, and full of trash.

text: Menurut q pribadi harga y terllu mahal... D tker ma mnuman cuma kayak minumAn sirup... Udh gitu cma 1 rasa... 65rb jln d jmbatan... Tnpa jmbtan 50rb...
english_translation: In my personal opinion, the price is too expensive... At the store, it's just like drinking syrup... And it's only 1 flavor... 65,000 rupiah on the bridge... 50,000 rupiah without the bridge...

text: Tempat nya bagus ,view nya pun juga bagus buat foto ,dan naik ke puncak nya pun tidak sejauh dan se cape gunung” atau bukit” lain ,mantap deh pokonya..
english_translation: The place is nice, the view is also good for photos, and climbing to the summit isn't as far or tiring as other mountains or hills, it's great overall.

text: Tempat yang nyaman buat menghilangkan penat dan memanjakan mata kita dengan pemandangan yg luar biasa Indah..... Bisa buat pengetahuan Anak.... Juga...
english_translation: A comfortable place to relieve fatigue and pamper our eyes with incredibly beautiful scenery..... Can also be educational for children....

text:
Bunganya cantik" bngt disini sama banyak spot fotonya. Masuknya juga cuma 15rb aja.
Kalo yg backpackeran, Ada tempat buat titipin tas di pintu masuk :D
english_translation:
The flowers are really beautiful here, and there are many photo spots. Entrance is only 15,000 rupiah.
For backpackers, there's a place to leave your bags at the entrance :D

text: Kawasan nya bagus asri dikelola dengan baik, pemandangannya indah banget cocok juga buat spot wisata camp atau foto prewed ya dengan tarif di sesuaikan
english_translation: The area is nice, green, and well-maintained, the view is very beautiful, also suitable for camping or pre-wedding photo spots with adjusted rates.

text:
Biaya masuk trakhir kali 20 ribu, dan biaya parkir 14 ribu, tempatnya keren dan untuk yang gak terbiasa dingin, pakai jaket ya

*Minta like nya ya guys
english_translation:
The last entrance fee was 20 thousand, and the parking fee was 14 thousand. The place is cool, and for those not used to the cold, wear a jacket.

*Please give me likes, guys

text: Salah satu curug yang tinggi & lebar di Kota Bandung. Terletak di kawasan Tahura Ir.Djuanda & Maribaya menjadikan spot ini nyaman & aman utk dinikmati.
english_translation: One of the tall & wide waterfalls in Bandung City. Located in the Tahura Ir. Djuanda & Maribaya area makes this spot comfortable & safe to enjoy.

text: Objek wisata di tengah hutan pinus, bersih tertata rapih, kumplit, ada wc di beberapa tempat, ada mushola,ada rope bridge, flying fox wah pokoknya seru
english_translation: A tourist attraction in the middle of a pine forest, clean and well-arranged, complete facilities, with toilets in several places, a prayer room, a rope bridge, a flying fox, wow, it's really fun.

text: Wisata bersama keluarga besar melihat keagungan ciptaan Tuhan melalui tangan terampil yg Tuhan pakai utk keindahan dunia. Para staf baik3 dan Rama2. TQ
english_translation: A trip with the extended family to see the majesty of God's creation through the skilled hands that God uses for the beauty of the world. The staff are good and friendly. TQ

text: Seperti biasa kalo hari libur, rame pengunjung, tempat terletak di area wisata pemandangan dan Kuliner, akses jalan sempit, tanjakan dan turun nan 🛺🛺 …
english_translation: As usual, on holidays, it's crowded with visitors. The place is located in a scenic and culinary tourist area. The road access is narrow, with uphill and downhill slopes 🛺🛺…

text:
Tempat yang asik untuk sekedar hiking, atau camping. Pemandangan lampu kota saat malam juga terlihat jelas dan keren.
Bagus untuk para pecinta sunrise.
english_translation: A fun place for just hiking or camping. The city lights view at night is also clearly visible and cool. Good for sunrise lovers.

text: Datang kesini kebetulan pas lagi hujan/berkabut. Jadi tambah dingin ditambah dengan atmosfir yang misterius. Diem di mobil buat menghangatkan diri dulu.
english_translation: Came here coincidentally while it was raining/foggy. So it got colder, plus a mysterious atmosphere. Stayed in the car to warm up first.

text: Daerah curug ini sudah sangat bersih dan nyaman, udara segar nya sangat membuat hati dan pikiran tenang, sangat cocok untuk anda yang sedang mumet hehe.

english_translation: The road access to Curug Malela is narrow and prone to issues, with many parts needing improvement, from the stairs descending to the waterfall. Hopefully, in the future, it will be more comfortable to visit.

text: Tempat nya sangat Sejuk , nyaman , sangat nyaman untuk camping , Karna bisa mendapatkan pemandangan sunsite dan sunrise serta ada juga suasana kabut . 👍👌 …
english_translation: The place is very cool, comfortable, and very suitable for camping, because you can get sunset and sunrise views, and there's also a foggy atmosphere. 👍👌 …

text: Wisata keluarga dengan bunga-bunga yang siap memanjakan mata. Tiketnya dulu murah sih sekarang udah agak mahal tapi masih worth it soalnya makin diperluas.
english_translation: Family tour with flowers ready to spoil the eyes. The tickets used to be cheap, now they're a bit expensive, but still worth it because it's been expanded more.

text: Jalan menuju kesini banyak sekali truknya. Dan jalan menuju ke dalam juga belum diaspal. Tapi tempatnya indaaah sekali. Terbayar semua ketika sampai disini
english_translation: The road to get here has a lot of trucks. And the road to get inside is not yet paved. But the place is very beautiful. It was all worth it when I arrived here.

text: suasana nyaman buat keluarga apalagi bawa putra putri ..nuansa sejuk ada kereta yg mengelilingi kolam dan ada sepeda..buat keliling lembah dewata...sip deh
english_translation: A comfortable atmosphere for families, especially when bringing children. A cool ambiance with a train that circles the pond and there are bicycles to ride around the Valley of the Gods. Great!

text: Tempatnya menarik... kesini grgr mau ke rainbow slide sih hehe disamping itu ada feeding animal, floating marketnya yg disuguhi dengan pemandangan yg bagus
english_translation: The place is interesting... came here because I wanted to go to the rainbow slide hehe. Beside that, there's animal feeding, and the floating market which is served with a nice view.

text: Tempatnya keren, pas banget kesini weekday dan pagi". Ada banyak ky pedagang tp dia kasih banyak informasi soal wisata ini. Suka bgt dengan suasanannya 💕 …
english_translation: The place is cool, perfect to visit on a weekday and in the morning. There are many vendors, but they give a lot of information about this attraction. I really like the atmosphere 💕 …

text:
Masuk kesini udah dapet 2x minuman.. pas masuk sama pas keluar, asik banget..
Spot fav ku yang jembatannya.. bagus banget pokoknya. Sangat recommended! 👍 …
english_translation:
Got 2 drinks just by entering... one when I came in and one when I left, it was so fun..
My favorite spot is the bridge.. it's really good, overall. Highly recommended! 👍 …

text: Tempatnya bagus,di deket campground ada toilet,cuma kadang kalo lagi rame banyak alaynya berisik teriak2 malem2,padahal yang punya kuping buka mereka doang
english_translation: The place is nice, there are toilets near the campground. It's just that sometimes when it's crowded, there are a lot of noisy "alay" (a term for someone considered obnoxious or disruptive, often associated with loud music and behavior) shouting at night, as if they're the only ones with ears.

text:
Tempat Lumayan Bagus, Cocok untuk Camping Pemula, tapi Overall semua cocok tapi Mahal di Parkir 10.000
Masuk 17.500,
Pengelolaan mungkin lebih diperbaiki..
english_translation:
Pretty Good Place, Suitable for Beginner Camping, but Overall everything is suitable except for the Expensive Parking, 10,000.
Entrance 17,500.
Management could be improved.

text:
Untuk yang belum pernah kemari pasti ga kecewa kemari, tempatnya asik, para pedagang aksesoris & makanan pinggir jalan pada ramah.
Biaya masuk 25rban/orang
english_translation:
For those who have never been here, you definitely won't be disappointed. The place is cool, and the street vendors selling accessories and food are all friendly.
The entrance fee is around 25,000 per person.

text: Harga tiket masuk 15rb tapi kalau bawa peralatan kamera yg profesional harga tiketnya nambah lagi cukup mahal. spot foto banyak, ada patung2 binatang lucu.
english_translation: The entrance fee is 15,000 rupiah, but if you bring professional camera equipment, the ticket price increases significantly, quite expensive. There are many photo spots, with cute animal statues.

text: Yg ke arah ke kabupaten Bandung barat bisa mampir mandi, makan + ke aneka wahana permainan, bisa foto" dg view hutan Pinus, hawanya jg seger adem pisan cuy
english_translation: Those heading towards West Bandung Regency can stop by for a bath, a meal, and to enjoy various amusement rides. You can also take photos with a pine forest view, and the air is really fresh and cool, dude.

text: Skrng sudah banyak berubah,lebih terawat...tapi yang saya TDK sukai adalah penjualnya banyak yg suka ngikutin kmna kita pergi😁jadi agak gak nyaman sdkit😁 …
english_translation: It has changed a lot now, it's more well-maintained... but what I don't like is that many of the sellers follow us everywhere 😁 so it's a bit uncomfortable 😁...

text: Pemandangan alam dengan batu2 besar, sangat indah di ketinggian Gunung Masigit, Citatah, Bandung Barat. Jalan kaki tidak jauh dari tempat parkir kendaraan.
english_translation: A beautiful natural landscape with large rocks at the heights of Mount Masigit, Citatah, West Bandung. A short walk from the vehicle parking area.

text: Ntapslah air curug tilu-nya... Hanya aksesnya aja jauh, dan medannya lumayan berbahaya, terjal, licin, sekitar setengah jam jalan kaki dari parkiran motor.
english_translation: The water of Curug Tilu is amazing... Only the access is far, and the terrain is quite dangerous, steep, slippery, about half an hour's walk from the motorcycle parking.

text:
Untuk htm 2orang plus mobil tadi saya di kenakan biaya 70rb murah bgt sihh...
Apalagi tadi cuaca terang menderang gada kabut jadi hasil foto jadi bagus"...
english_translation: For the entrance fee for 2 people plus a car, I was charged 70,000, which is very cheap... Especially since the weather was bright and clear with no fog, so the photos turned out great...

text: Duh banyak ormas, parkir bayar lagi.. kan sudah ada di tiket bayar 3rb kok bayar lagi parkir.. tolong dong ormasnya dibilangin aja bikin suasana gak enak..
english_translation: There are so many community organizations, and we have to pay for parking again... The ticket already includes a 3,000 [rupiah] fee, why do we have to pay for parking again? Please, tell these community organizations to stop creating an unpleasant atmosphere.

text: Lokasi strategis, mudah di jangkau, fasilitas lengkap, pengalaman yg berkesan belanja dgn  menggunakan koin, wisata yang menawarkan pengalaman yang menarik
english_translation: Strategic location, easy to reach, complete facilities, memorable experience shopping with coins, a tour that offers an interesting experience

text: Tempat yg selalu jadi pelarian sr sumpek nya jakarta. Lihatbdedaunan dan pohon pinus seketika hilang rasa sumpek semua krn melihat keindahan ciptaan Tuhan.
english_translation: A place that always becomes an escape from the stuffiness of Jakarta. Looking at the leaves and pine trees, the stuffiness immediately disappears upon seeing the beauty of God's creation.

text: Liburan pertama kali ke Bandung pengen kesini. Enak banget banyak spot foto, adem sejuk. GK begtu ramai karna datangnya pagi pagi. Ada banyak jajanan juga.
english_translation: First time holidaying to Bandung, I wanted to come here. It's really nice, lots of photo spots, cool and refreshing. Not too crowded because I came early in the morning. There are also many snacks.

text: C bayi cantik seneng banget maen di sini.. kasih makan burung.. kasih makan rusa.. liat kelinci.. cuma dia pengen main flying fox tapi belum boleh... 🥰🥰🥰 …
english_translation: The beautiful baby is so happy playing here.. feeding the birds.. feeding the deer.. looking at the rabbits.. she just wants to try the flying fox but isn't allowed yet... 🥰🥰🥰 …

text: Curugnya sekarang kotor, dikasi pager pembatas juga jadi cuman bisa mandangin aja soalnya arusnya deras. Tapi suasanya adem asri dan udaranya sejuk banget.
english_translation: The waterfall is dirty now, and they put up a safety barrier, so you can only look at it because the current is strong. But the atmosphere is cool and serene, and the air is very refreshing.

text:
Salah satu destinasi favorit di bandung, terbaiklah pokoknya...
Yg paling terkesan tuh sama kebaikan org2 yg ada di sna yg ikhlas... 👌
Toplah pokoknya... …
english_translation:
One of Bandung's favorite destinations, the best for sure...
What impressed me the most was the sincerity and kindness of the people there... 👌
Top-notch, truly...

text: Tempat yang cocok buat mengajak keluarga berakhir pekan, atau sekedar mengajak yang terkasih jalan2 menikmati udara sejuk dan alam yang indah khas Lembang.
english_translation: A suitable place to bring the family for a weekend getaway, or simply to take your loved one for a stroll to enjoy the cool air and the beautiful natural scenery typical of Lembang.

text: Senang banget, bagus, keren, Mantap deh...👍👍 Banyak Foto² aku di Sarae Hills. Pokoknya Lokasi Keren dan Mantap 😀 puas aku...semuanya senang dan puas 👍👍😀😀 …
english_translation: So happy, good, cool, awesome...👍👍 Lots of my photos in Sarae Hills. All in all, a cool and awesome location 😀 I'm satisfied... everyone is happy and satisfied 👍👍😀😀 …

text: Tempat yang bagus dan luas untuk keluarga, banyak spot foto bagus, tempat makan yang nyaman, arena bermain anak. Saran untuk membawa payung atau jas hujan.
english_translation: A nice and spacious place for families, with many good photo spots, a comfortable dining area, and a children's play area. Suggest bringing an umbrella or raincoat.

text: Tempatnya bagus 🍃 Tapi sayang jalan akses kesini masih kurang bagus. Semoga pemerintah daerah bisa kasih perhatian lebih untuk tempat-tempat seperti ini. …
english_translation: The place is beautiful 🍃 But unfortunately, the access road here is still not very good. Hopefully, the local government can give more attention to places like this. …

text: Wisata gugusan sungai purba kars yg exotik... Tinggal mau tidak pemerintah menggali potensi wisata ini? Kesadaran masyarakat untuk bisa menjafi duta wisata

text: tempatnya sebenernya ga gede banget, ga butuh waktu lama buat jelajahin semua titik spot foto di sana, tiket masuknya murah cuma 15rb aja, tempatnya sejuk,

text: Tempatnya lumayan.. tapi disini terlalu komersil sekali.. semua2 harus bayar.. jadi kalo mau kesini harus sangu yang banyak.. apalagi kalo bawa anak kecil..

english_translation: A beautiful place to stroll. The entrance fee is still normal, around 35 thousand. But if you want to come here, don't come too late, the fog will descend and it will be a bust.

text: Curug yg paling jauh dari semua curug yg ada di kawasan ini , airnya lebih segar dari curug-curug sebelumnya. Jalan setapak , licin , udaranya sangat segar.
english_translation: The farthest waterfall from all the waterfalls in this area, its water is fresher than the previous waterfalls. The path is slippery, the air is very fresh.

text:
Untuk anda yang berjiwa petualang tempat ini sangat cocok, pemandangan yang sangat bagus..
Fasilitas yang lumayan lengkap dan harga tiket masuk yang murah..
english_translation:
For those of you with an adventurous spirit, this place is very suitable, the scenery is very good.
The facilities are quite complete and the entrance ticket price is cheap.

text: Wisata alam berupa Bebatuan yg tersusun sejak jaman purba. Panoramanya sangat mengagumkan karena dari ketinggian ini bisa melihat hamparan sawah dan gunung.

text: Semoga ke depannya bisa lebih maksimal kan sekitar, biar ga kalah sama tempat camp lainnya. Cic adalah tempat favorit sy hiking dari sekolah dlu ampe skrng.
english_translation: Hopefully, in the future, it can be maximized around, so as not to lose to other camping spots. Cic has been my favorite place for hiking since school until now.

text:
Tmp yg menyenangkan buat refreshing, hiking, camping..
Tp sayang toilet dan mesjid sepertinya hrs dibenahi lg, jg  akses jln menuju ke cic pun kurang nyaman
english_translation:
A fun place for refreshing, hiking, camping..
But unfortunately the toilets and mosque seem to need renovation, and the road access to Cic is also uncomfortable.

text:
Keren bagus banget, kemaren minggu tgl 5 November 2021 angin nya gede pisan kopi2 yg jualnya pada ketiup angin.
Telinga saya sampe sakit karena udara dingin
english_translation: Cool, it was really great. Last Sunday, November 5, 2021, the wind was super strong. The coffee stalls were blown away by the wind. My ears hurt from the cold air.

text: Taman perkemahan dengan pemandangan indah yang dapat diakses dengan sepeda motor dan mobil, mungkin akan ramai dikunjungi saat akhir pekan atau hari libur.

text:
Tempatnya alami banget ...
batu² terbentuk secara alamiah 👍
Namun akses jalan menuju lokasi perlu dibenahi. Licin dan becek...apalagi setelah turun hujan. …
english_translation:
The place is very natural...
The rocks are naturally formed 👍
However, the access road to the location needs improvement. It's slippery and muddy... especially after it rains. …

english_translation: A nice place for a casual hike and photos. Unfortunately, the road to get there, past Dusun Bambu, isn't very good and is rocky, making it a bit difficult for two-wheeled vehicles.

text:
Udara nya segar sekali, Mudah-mudahan bisa tambah kuat imun. Ada mushola, warung dan toilet...
Saran kalo kesini gunakan sandal atau sepatu naik gunung yah.

The air is very fresh, hopefully, it can strengthen the immune system. There's a prayer room, a stall, and a toilet...
Advice if you come here, use sandals or mountain climbing shoes.

text: Tempat ini perlu menyediakan fasilitas wisata yang lebih banyak dan lebih baik untuk menarik lebih banyak pengunjung. Itu harus dibersihkan secara teratur.
english_translation: This place needs to provide more and better tourist facilities to attract more visitors. It should be cleaned regularly.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk kelompok besar atau keluarga outbond dan liburan. Tapi untuk orang yang suka privasi. Tempat ini bukan tempat yang tepat untukmu.
english_translation: A great place for large groups or families for outbound and holidays. But for people who like privacy. This place is not the right place for you.

text: Jalan masuk nya rusak banyak batu nya, dan tak ada tanda masuk objek wisatanya saat dari jalan raya jadi harus menggunakan google map untuk mencari lokasinya
