text: Seneng liat pemandangan alamnya. . Awal masuknya sih disambut dengan kepulan debu apu. . Tapi sampe diatasnya. . Wuuiihh kebayarlah dengan keindahan alamnya.
english_translation: Happy to see the natural scenery. . When we first entered, we were greeted by clouds of dust. . But when we got to the top. . Wow, it was worth it for the natural beauty.

text: Spot bagus untuk pemandangan & bagi yg suka mendaki. Masuk ke dalam bayar 2x. Yg pertama sy tdk ikut bayar,karna dibayarin. Yg kedua bayar 1 orgnya Rp. 8.000
english_translation: Good spot for scenery & for those who like hiking. You pay twice to enter. I didn't pay the first time because someone else paid for me. The second time, it was Rp. 8,000 per person.

text: Tempatnya luas dan nyaman, sedikit interaksi dgn orang lain, udara sejuk banyak tempat untuk menikmati indahnya alam, sehingga tidak berkerumun di satu titik
english_translation: The place is spacious and comfortable, with little interaction with others, cool air, and many spots to enjoy the beauty of nature, so you don't crowd in one spot.

text: Gunung Putri adalah salah satu tempat wisata yang recommended dibandung, yang menyediakan lahan yang luas untuk camp, dan tarif masuknya juga terjangkau. 😊 …
english_translation: Gunung Putri is one of the recommended tourist attractions in Bandung, offering spacious grounds for camping, and the entrance fee is also affordable. 😊

text: Kebanyakan orang kagum dengan tempat itu tetapi beberapa lupa mengenakan topeng mereka dan para manajer sepertinya tidak menganggapnya sebagai masalah besar
english_translation: Most people were amazed by the place, but some forgot to wear their masks and the managers didn't seem to think it was a big deal.

text: Tempat nya bagus tapi ke Curug tilu nya lumayan jauh udah gitu ga terlalu terawat jembatan" nya kurang bagus tapi pas udah nyampe Curug nya sih lumayan happy
english_translation: The place is nice, but Curug tilu is quite far, and on top of that, the bridges aren't very well maintained. However, once you reach the waterfall, it's quite enjoyable.

text: Tempatnya bagus banget disana juga di sediakan tempat untuk beristirahat tapi harus hati hati dengan makanan yang di bawa karena di sana banyak sekali monyet
english_translation: The place is really nice, and there are also resting areas provided, but you have to be careful with the food you bring because there are a lot of monkeys there.

text: Tempat wisata legendaris. Bisa turun juga ke kawahnya untuk explore. Kalau bisa datang saat cuaca sedang baik, karena saat mendung / berkabut tidak ada view.
english_translation: Legendary tourist spot. You can also go down into the crater to explore. If possible, come when the weather is good, because when it's cloudy/foggy, there's no view.

text:
Hawa sejuk khas lembang, permainan outbound anak yg cukup banyak dan seru, resort yang sepertinya harus dicoba nih.

Waktu itu datang tanpa menginap hanya PP
english_translation:
Cool Lembang air, quite a lot of fun outbound games for kids, a resort that seems like it must be tried.

At that time, I came without staying overnight, just a round trip.

text: Baru kali ini tau curug. Katanya sih sama kayak air terjun. Menurut ku sih lebih kayak mini waterfall . Karena yang di jawa namanya air terjun tinggi banget.
english_translation: This is the first time I've known what a "curug" is. They say it's the same as a waterfall. In my opinion, it's more like a mini waterfall. Because the ones in Java are called "air terjun" and are very tall.

text:
Tempatnya adem,koleksi anggrek cukup banyak, lokasi dan spot foto yg instagramable 😉.
Tidak terlalu jauh dari pusat lembang.cocok buat daycation sekeluarga …
english_translation:
The place is cool and shady, with a good collection of orchids. The location and photo spots are Instagrammable 😉.
It's not too far from Lembang town center. Suitable for a family daycation.

text:
Beautiful place.. buka sampe jam 5.. tiket masuk 15k per orang..
Ada tambahan biaya buat masuk yg bawa kamera selain handphone..
Ada juga paket prewed dsni..
english_translation:
Beautiful place.. open until 5 o'clock.. entrance fee 15k per person..
There is an additional fee for entering if you bring a camera other than a mobile phone..
There is also a pre-wedding package here..

text: Tempatnya bagus,nyaman, tertata, tiket masuknya murah, suasana alamnya menyejukan dan menyegarkan, cocok minep dan hiking di pagi hari menelusuri hutan pinus
english_translation: The place is good, comfortable, organized, the entrance ticket is cheap, the natural atmosphere is cool and refreshing, suitable for staying and hiking in the morning through the pine forest.

text: Tiket masuk cukup mahal kurang worthed, karena kalo mau ke air panas harus bayar lagi 90 ribu. Selain air panas obyek didalam tidak banyak dan kurang menarik
english_translation: The entrance ticket is quite expensive and not worth it, because if you want to go to the hot springs you have to pay an additional 90 thousand. Besides the hot springs, there aren't many attractions inside and they are not very interesting.

text:
Harga tiket masuk IDR 20k/ orang.
Karena sudah ada tangga, jadi lebih mudah untuk mencapai air terjun. Air terjun langsung kelihatan dari tempat tiket masuk.
english_translation:
Entrance ticket price IDR 20k/person.
Because there are already stairs, it is easier to reach the waterfall. The waterfall is directly visible from the entrance ticket area.

text: Disini banyak banget cafe cafe dgn pemandangan yg luar biasa. Udara ny juga sejuk. Banyak banget tempat buat jalan2. Trus lokasi juga ga terlalu jauh dr Dago
english_translation: There are so many cafes here with amazing views. The air is also cool. There are lots of places to walk around. And the location isn't too far from Dago either.

text: Parkiran luas, tiket masuk weekend (wisatawan lokal) per orang 30k, penataan parkir 5k, parkir untuk kendaraan roda empat 35rb (harga pertanggal 6 Juni 2021)
english_translation: Spacious parking, weekend entrance ticket (local tourists) 30k per person, parking arrangement 5k, parking for four-wheeled vehicles 35k (prices as of June 6, 2021)

text: Kondisi jalan masih jelek. Tiket 12000 perorang parkir 5000 sudah dapet minuman kopi, hati2 banyak monyet jangan bawa kresek atau makananan monyetnya agresif
english_translation: The road condition is still bad. Tickets are 12,000 per person, parking is 5,000, and you get a coffee drink. Be careful, there are many monkeys, don't bring plastic bags or food, the monkeys are aggressive.

text: Hutan pinus nya kereen, sebaiknya jalur motor trail dan mobil off road dipisah dgn jalur yg trekking, spy yg trekking bisa nyaman, tidak becek dan berlumpur.
english_translation: The pine forest is cool. It's best to separate the motorbike trail and off-road car paths from the trekking paths, so that trekkers can be comfortable, not muddy and slushy.

text: Perjalanan touring motor dari bekasi melewati Track saguling... Pas sampai curug terbayar kan dengan keindahan panorama alam sekitar curug yang masih asri...
english_translation: Motorcycle touring trip from Bekasi through Saguling Track... Upon arriving at the waterfall, it was repaid with the beauty of the natural panorama around the still-natural waterfall...

text: Wisata alamnya sangat menarik, banyak spot2 untuk foto yang sangat memanjakan mata. Banyak arena hiburan outbond untuk anak-anak sampai orang dewasa. Mantappp
english_translation: Its natural attractions are very interesting, with many eye-pleasing photo spots. There are many outbound entertainment arenas for children and adults. Awesome!

text: Campground yg cocok buat bawa anak2 , tidak terlalu ramai juga tdk terlalu sepi. Area camp yg luas sampai dkt air terjun. Tempatnya lumayan bersih dari sampah

text: Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk liburan..baik untuk keluarga maupun bersama rekan2 kerja atau lingkungan  tempat tinggal kita. Udaranya juga sejuk menyehatkan.
english_translation: A pleasant place for a holiday.. good for families as well as with colleagues or our neighbors. The air is also cool and healthy.

text: Sejuk dan gada pungli. Smua bayar diawal gerbng masuk. Natal thn baru htm 30/org, 35/mobil, 5 rb parkir. Tertata rapi parkirnya. Aman banyak petugas yg ngatur

text: sekarang tempatnya mudah di jangkau tapi kalau weekend rame banget.. buat yg mapala/sispala dapet diskon yang mau main jangan lupa buang sampah di tempatnya..

text:
Kesampaian jg bs kesini..wlpn masa covid...
Semoga warga bandung sllu dkasih sehat ya..terutama yg ngelola wisata dsni dan berikut akang² penjual asesories...
english_translation:
Finally managed to come here.. even though it's the COVID period...
May the people of Bandung always be given health.. especially those who manage the tourism here and also the accessory vendors...

english_translation: The road is quite far from Bandung city, the atmosphere is cool but there are too many food and accessory vendors at the location, so I couldn't fully enjoy the crater and the natural scenery.

text: Pas untuk kamu yg ingin camping di tempat tinggi, tapi mager tracking jauh. Buka 24 jam tanpa harus booking dulu. Jangan lupa bawa sleeping bag, dingin battt brohhhh..
english_translation: Perfect for those who want to camp in high places but are too lazy for a long hike. Open 24 hours without needing to book in advance. Don't forget to bring a sleeping bag, it's super cold, brohhhh..

text: tempat wisata yg family friendly, namun agak disayangkan selama pandemi covid-19 tidak semua wahana bermain buka, dan wisatawan pasca PSBB pun taka seramai sedia kala.
english_translation: A family-friendly tourist spot, but unfortunately, during the COVID-19 pandemic, not all rides were open, and post-PSBB tourists were not as numerous as before.

text: Tempatnya indah, sayang air terjunnya banyak sampahnya. Harus hati-hati saat makan, terkadang ada monyet yg merebut makanan. Jajanannya enak, pedagangnya sangat humble
english_translation: The place is beautiful, too bad the waterfall is full of trash. You have to be careful when eating, sometimes monkeys snatch your food. The snacks are delicious, and the vendors are very humble.

text: Taman bunga yang cantik, namun areanya tidak terlalu besar. Sosmed-able! Banyak spot foto cantik. Datang bersama pasangan cocok sekali. Romantis macam drama korea.😁😋 …
english_translation: Beautiful flower garden, but the area is not too big. Social media-worthy! Lots of beautiful photo spots. Very suitable to come with a partner. Romantic like a Korean drama.😁😋

text: Tempatnya bagus buat foto-foto, fasilitas lumayan lengkap, hanya saja masih ada arena yang belum selesai, maklum masih baru. Tapi sepertinya akan jadi lebih bagus lagi
english_translation: The place is good for taking photos, the facilities are quite complete, only that there are still some areas that are not finished, understandable as it's still new. But it seems like it will become even better.

text: sekarang udah enak banget, perkembangan tempat wisata nya lumayan cepet. dulu pas awal awal buka ke sini masih pada kosong, sekarang udah beda banget, udah lebih bagus
english_translation: It's really nice now, the development of the tourist spot is quite fast. Back when it first opened and I came here, it was still empty, now it's completely different, much better.

text: Wisata yang sangat menyenangkan. Harga tiket 20 K untuk hari biasa dan 30K untuk hari Libur. Tiket bisa ditukarkan dengan segelas minuman dengan pilihan Milo, kopi dll
english_translation: A very enjoyable tour. Ticket prices are 20K for weekdays and 30K for holidays. Tickets can be exchanged for a glass of drinks with choices of Milo, coffee, etc.

text: sukaaa tempatnya adem,sejuk,hijau sekali, penetralisir pikiran❤ jaga selalu kehijauannya semoga sampai aku kunjungi lagi nanti masih tetap ada dan tetap hijau aamiin ❤
english_translation: I love the place, it's cool, fresh, very green, a mind-neutralizer ❤ May its greenery always be maintained so that when I visit again, it's still there and remains green, amen ❤

text: Enakeun banget pemandangannya walaupun pas kesana airnya lagi keruh karna mungkin hari sebelumnya ujan. Tiket masuk 20k terus sewa pelampung 15k doang. Ada toilet juga
english_translation: The scenery is really beautiful, even though the water was murky when I went, probably because it rained the day before. The entrance ticket is 20k, and renting a life jacket is only 15k. There are also toilets.

text: Tempat yang cocok buat mengajak anak-anak kesini karena tersedia banyak aktivitas permainan outbond, disini juga terdapat penginapan yang dikelilingi oleh hutan pinus.
english_translation: A suitable place to bring children here because there are many outbound play activities available, and there are also lodgings surrounded by pine forests.

text:
Sangat disarankan untuk transit wisatawan dengan fasilitas yang tidaj mengecewakan

Parkir yang luas, ruang ruang untuk makan rombongan juga ada beberapa ruang...
Sipp
english_translation:
Highly recommended for tourist transit with facilities that do not disappoint.

Ample parking, and there are also several rooms for group dining...
Great

text: Bagian dari kaki gunung burangrang. Family camp sangat cocok untuk destinasi ke tempat ini. Terorganisir dengan baik dengan tetap mempertahankan ekosistem. Pertahankan
english_translation: Part of the foothills of Mount Burangrang. Family camps are very suitable for a destination here. Well-organized while maintaining the ecosystem. Maintain

text:
Tempatnya besar dan luas.
Siap² topi ya...
Ada edukasi buat anak²..
Bikin makanan, minuman, mau jd polisi, pemadam kebakaran, pengusaha macam² deh...
Asyik juga sih...
english_translation:
The place is big and spacious.
Get your hats ready...
There's education for kids..
Making food, drinks, wanting to be a police officer, firefighter, businessman, all sorts of things...
It's fun too...

text: Uhh enak buat lepasin masalah idup lah pokoknya :V apalagi bawa pacar, duduk disaungnya berdua ahay🤣 tapi diusahakan pake sepatu warna putih ya, banyak kapur soalnya …
english_translation: Uhh, it's really nice for letting go of life's problems, basically :V Especially if you bring your girlfriend, sitting in the shade together, ahay🤣 But try to wear white shoes, there's a lot of chalk...

text: Suka banget, tempatnya indah, bersih, spot foto2nya banyak dan romantis, dan..... tiketnya bersahabat, pertahankan dan tingkatkan ya, biar pengunjungnya semakin banyak
english_translation: Really love it, the place is beautiful, clean, there are many romantic photo spots, and..... the tickets are affordable. Please maintain and improve it, so that more visitors will come.

text: Nyaman tempat nya, saran aja, kalo mau nyantai jangan weekend ,susah cari lahan buat dirikan tenda, cocok untuk pemula yg mau belajar naik gunung kayak saya. Heheh😇😁 …
english_translation: Comfortable place. Just a suggestion, if you want to relax, don't come on the weekend. It's hard to find space to set up a tent. Suitable for beginners who want to learn to hike like me. Heheh😇😁 …

text: Tempatnya sejuk,keren dan indah tp perlu badan yg fit buat sampe ke Curug nya,perjalanan pulang tenaganya harus 2x lipat sama tenanga sewaktu mulai perjalanan ke curug
english_translation: The place is cool, awesome, and beautiful, but you need to be fit to reach the waterfall. The journey back requires twice the energy compared to the journey to the waterfall.

text: Penuh dengan pemanadangan yg indah udara yg amat sejuk , outbond untuk anak anak dan dewasa , tersedia juga berbagai macam untuk penginapan dan makanan nyaa jugaa enak
english_translation: Full of beautiful scenery and very cool air, outdoor activities for children and adults, various types of accommodation are also available, and the food is also delicious.

text: sumpah banget ga bisa ngapa2in lu disini..ga seindah apa yg lu liat...semua serba bayar..ga cocok lu bawa keluarga apalagi rombonga..ga ad pemandian air panas disini..
english_translation: I swear you can't do anything here... it's not as beautiful as what you see... everything costs money... it's not suitable for you to bring your family, let alone a group... there are no hot springs here...

text:
Curug maribaya harga tiket masuk 30.000
Disini pemandangannya bagus
Airnya dingin sekali
Enak buat jalan jalan sama keluarga
Akses ke lokasi cukup lah haha
Parkir luas
english_translation:
Curug Maribaya entrance ticket price 30,000
The scenery here is beautiful
The water is very cold
Nice for a stroll with the family
Access to the location is quite good haha
Spacious parking

text:
Lumayan buat healing kalau bawa anak kecil..
Saran buat arena kayak feeding rabbit ada keterangan nya biar pengunjung pada tau kalau masuk area rabbit bayar atau gak..
english_translation:
It's quite good for healing if you bring small children..
A suggestion for the arena, like the rabbit feeding area, is to have a sign to let visitors know whether entering the rabbit area is paid or not.

text:
Bagus tp cuma dr atas aja tiketnya mahal...
Penjual strawberrynya gak jujur....

Strawberry gede di susupin kardus dan strawberry kecil

Inget tawar 60% bukan 50 lg...
english_translation:
Good but the ticket is expensive just for the view...
The strawberry seller was dishonest...

Big strawberries were hidden in the box and small strawberries were given.

Remember to bargain for 60% off, not just 50% anymore...

text: Tempat wisata disekitar Lembang, arah ke Tangkuban perahu. Sekarang suasana makin nyaman, danau nya makin terawat dan bersih. Bagus buat kalian yg mau foto prewedding.
english_translation: Tourist attractions around Lembang, on the way to Tangkuban Perahu. Now the atmosphere is more comfortable, the lake is more well-maintained and clean. Good for those of you who want to take pre-wedding photos.

text: TEMPAT OKE, SPOT BUAT FOTO-FOTO BENERBENER BAGUS, TEMPAT MAKANNYA GA TERLALU MAHAL MASI TERJAMIN, PEMPEKNYA ENAKKK BANGET, ES CENDOL ELIZABETH NYA JUGA MANTUL WUENAKKK
english_translation: Great place, really good photo spots, the food isn't too expensive and is affordable, the pempek is super delicious, and the Elizabeth cendol ice is also amazing and delicious.

text: Lokasi Wisata yg bagus namun kurang cocok untuk membawa anak kecil karena disini Medan nya bebatuan nan licin namun itu semuanya terbayar dengan pemandangan yang indah
english_translation: A good tourist location, but not very suitable for bringing small children because the terrain here is rocky and slippery, but all of that is paid off by the beautiful scenery.

text: Indah, bagus apalagi utk foto2. Tp sayang dibagian belakang(tempat jualan tanaman/bibit2an kalau tidam salah) spt nya kurang terawat/kurang perhatian) Jalanannya licin.
english_translation: Beautiful, good especially for photos. But unfortunately the back part (where they sell plants/seedlings, if I'm not mistaken) seems neglected/lacking in attention. The road is slippery.

text: Tempat yang sangat indah,udaranya segar,cocok untuk jalan jalan bersama keluarga,pemandangan sangat bagus, sangat recomended, minus nya cuman jalan masuk nya yang rusak
english_translation: A very beautiful place, the air is fresh, suitable for walking with family, the scenery is very good, highly recommended, the only minus is the damaged entrance road.

text: Bau belerang dan udara sejuk terasa di lokasi wisata,  pemandangan kawah sangat indah..ada yang jual oleh oleh, sewa kuda, pedagang camilan...saya suka tangkuban perahu
english_translation: The smell of sulfur and cool air are felt at the tourist spot, the crater view is very beautiful. There are people selling souvenirs, renting horses, and selling snacks... I like Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Mau piknik sambil hiking tipis2, cocok lah ke Gunput, cuma nanjak dikitbudh dapet view keren.. apalagi kalo mau terus ke puncaknya dan pulsng lewat hutan pinus, mantaab
english_translation: Want to have a picnic with a light hike, Gunput is perfect. It's only a short climb but you get a cool view. Especially if you want to continue to the summit and return via the pine forest, it's awesome.

text:
Sangat menarik melihat dan menyentuh bangunan bersejarah di berbagai negara dalam satu komplek rekreasi,( walaupun bentuk nya hanya bangunan miniatur,
Good place to see
english_translation: It's very interesting to see and touch historical buildings from various countries in one recreational complex, (even though they are just miniature buildings). Good place to see.

text: Bunganya Warna warni buat foto2 bagus banget.. Instragamable bngt.. Sebenarnya Tamannnya gak besar. Tapi banyak tempat buat swafoto...Ada Mushola,  Resto kecil Toilet..
english_translation: The colorful flowers are very good for photos.. Very Instagrammable.. Actually, the garden isn't big. But there are many spots for selfies... There's a prayer room, a small restaurant, and toilets.

text:
Tiketnya lumayan mahal
Di dlm area kalau mau ke jembatan, hrs bayar lg
Nebus foto jg ngeri bgt harganya (mungkin akunya yg misquen 😂)
Fasilitas toilet banyak & bersih …
english_translation:
The ticket is quite expensive.
Within the area, if you want to go to the bridge, you have to pay again.
The price to get photos is also very scary (maybe I'm the one who's mistaken 😂).
There are many and clean toilet facilities…

text:
Tempat ini sangat mengagumkan!!
Harus dikunjungi .. Dan Anda dapat tinggal sepanjang hari mengambil banyak pemotretan .. Begitu banyak tempat untuk mengambil gambar ..
english_translation:
This place is amazing!!
Must visit.. And you can stay all day taking lots of photos.. So many spots to take pictures..

text: Merupakan salah satu tempat wisata di Lembang - Kabupaten Bandung Barat yang nyaman, dengan suasana yg adem, cocok untuk kita berwisata sambil menikmati keindahan alam.
english_translation: It is one of the comfortable tourist attractions in Lembang - West Bandung Regency, with a cool atmosphere, suitable for us to travel while enjoying the beauty of nature.

text: Bagian dari tangkuban perahu adalah kawah domas, udara pegunungan yg segar, perjalanan di hutan yang menyegarkan begitu sampai di suguhi pemandangan yang mengagumkan...
english_translation: A part of Tangkuban Perahu is the Domas crater, fresh mountain air, a refreshing forest journey, and upon arrival, you're presented with an amazing view...

text: Kalau mau ke Floating Market Lembang dengan nyaman usahakan sampai lokasi pagi yaa, 2 menit sebelum buka itu pilihan bagus. Supaya fotonya bagus dan belum terlalu ramai
english_translation: If you want to go to Lembang Floating Market comfortably, try to arrive in the morning. 2 minutes before opening is a good choice, so your photos will be good and it won't be too crowded.

text: Bagus tempatnya cuma pas kemarin kesana lg kabut jd g bs lihat jelas viewnya, parkir juga teratur jln menuju lokasi jg bagus. Cuma kulinernya yg kurang pilihannya kl ya
english_translation: The place is nice, but yesterday when I went there it was foggy so I couldn't see the view clearly. Parking was also organized and the road to the location was good. It's just that the culinary options were a bit lacking.

text: Tempat destinasi warga jawabarat dimana pemandangannya memang sangat indah sekali infrastuktur juga sudaj terjaga dan terawat nyaman sekali jika pengen berlibir di sana
english_translation: A West Javanese destination where the scenery is truly beautiful, the infrastructure is well-maintained and cared for, and it's very comfortable if you want to vacation there.

text: Tempat yang cocok buat liat pemandangan perkotaan lembang diselimuti kabut dingin dan ditemani kopi hangat sambil ngobrol bareng teman ataupun keluarga, sesekali foto".
english_translation: A suitable place to see the Lembang urban scenery shrouded in cold mist, accompanied by warm coffee while chatting with friends or family, and taking photos occasionally.

text: Tempat nyabagus,cuma trek nya lumayan buat yg gak biasa jalan kaki jauh,tips saya jangan ke situ saat musim ujan,selain jalan licin,air nya keruh jadi kurang indah giru
english_translation: The place is good, it's just that the trek is quite challenging for those not used to long walks. My tip is not to go there during the rainy season, besides the slippery path, the water becomes murky so it's less beautiful.

text: Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk sekedar olahraga pagi. Udara segar dan hawa yang sejuk. Ada beberapa penjual makanan ringan, fasilitas seperti kamar mandi juga tersedia.
english_translation: A pleasant place for a morning exercise. Fresh air and cool weather. There are several snack vendors, and facilities like bathrooms are also available.

text: Keindahan alam tersembunyi di Bandung selatan,curugnya indah,tapi sayang akses menuju Curug kurang tertata rapih,kalo mau kesini pas dimusim hujan debit airnya besar👍 …
english_translation: The hidden natural beauty in South Bandung, its waterfalls are beautiful, but unfortunately the access to the waterfall is not well organized, if you want to come here during the rainy season the water flow is large 👍 …

text: Curugnya ajip banget. Cocok juga kayaknya buat bersantai dengan keluarga, sahabat dll. Tempatnya bagus tambah dengan udaranya seger dan asri banget deh. Juara pokoknya!
english_translation: The waterfall is really cool. It seems like it would also be suitable for relaxing with family, friends, etc. The place is beautiful, complemented by the very fresh and natural air. It's the best!

text: Tempatnya lumayan bagus,tanaman bunganya bagus2 cuma sayang kebon sayurnya kurang terawat ya.seperti kebon bunganya terawat.tiketnya terjangkau,cuma sdh ga dpt susu lg.
english_translation: The place is quite nice, the flowers are beautiful, it's just a shame the vegetable garden is not well-maintained. It's like the flower garden is well-maintained. The tickets are affordable, it's just that you don't get milk anymore.

text: Yang butuh kesegaran alam yang masih natural tempat ini cocok sekali, dan banyak tempat outbound menantang lainnya dan bagi yang akan menginap disini tersedia homestay.
english_translation: For those who need the freshness of nature that is still natural, this place is very suitable, and there are many other challenging outbound locations, and for those who will stay here, homestays are available.

text: Untuk kebun bunganya sangat terawat, tapi untuk farmnya agak berantakan. Tapi banyak tanaman, dan juga bunga yang jarang kita temukan di daerah perkotaan ataupun rumah.
english_translation: For the flower garden, it is very well-maintained, but for the farm, it's a bit messy. However, there are many plants, and also flowers that are rarely found in urban areas or homes.

text: Tempat yang sejuk dan nyaman untuk bermain bersama keluarga. Tiket masuknya juga tidak terlalu mahal. Didalamnya ada flaying fox dan beberapa rumah yang bisa disewakan.
english_translation: A cool and comfortable place to play with family. The entrance fee is also not too expensive. Inside, there is a flying fox and several houses that can be rented.

text:
Suasana Burangrang banget, sejuk, nyaman, akses jalan bagus, cuma bagusnya pake motor aja biar parkir di dalam.
Pokoknya recommended buat yang mau weekend sambil camping
english_translation:
Burangrang has a really great atmosphere, cool, comfortable, good road access, it's just better to use a motorbike so you can park inside.
Definitely recommended for those who want to spend the weekend camping.

text: Tempatnya bagus, keren, tapi tidak ramah stroller. Dimana-mana tangga, jadi yg bawa bayi atau anak pakai stroller susah ya. Overall bagus untuk foto-foto dan jalan-jalan
english_translation: The place is nice, cool, but not stroller-friendly. There are stairs everywhere, so it's difficult for those with babies or children using strollers. Overall, it's good for photos and sightseeing.

text: Spot foto banyak, ada wahana permainan anak juga , petugasnya ramah2 selalu menawarkan untuk di bantu di fotokan , tempat nya bagus , yang suka foto2 wajib datang kesini
english_translation: Plenty of photo spots, there are also children's play attractions, the staff are friendly and always offer to help take photos, the place is nice, those who like taking photos must come here.

text:
Tempat hiking asik, viewnya kece apalgi dikebun teh. Curugnyaaa asik banget betah disini,,

Dekat kebun teh da warung emak, kopinya enak. Dan Jajan indomie , teuteup 😂😂😂
english_translation:
Cool hiking spot, the view is awesome, especially at the tea plantation. The waterfall is really nice, I could stay here forever.

Close to the tea plantation is Mom's stall, the coffee is delicious. And Indomie snacks, of course 😂😂😂

text: HTM 20ribu Per Orang Parkir Mobil 30ribu, banyak abang-abang penjual aksesoris menjadi photografer dadakan tp harga utk aksesoris mahal kalau di kios hanya 10rb dan 15rb
english_translation: IDR 20,000 per person for entrance. Car parking is IDR 30,000. Many vendors selling accessories become impromptu photographers, but the prices for accessories are expensive; at kiosks, they are only IDR 10,000 and IDR 15,000.

text: Tempat healing yang enak buat di kunjungi, karna tempatnya yang cenderung tidak terlalu ramai. Hanya saja harus mendapatkan cuaca yang bagus untuk view yang lebih bagus.
english_translation: A nice place to visit for healing, because the place tends to not be too crowded. It's just that you have to get good weather for a better view.

text: Harga tiket weekday 20k/orang, weekend 25k/orang. Tempatnya nyamann, adem, sejuk. Buat yang capek jalan2 bisa sewa sepeda, sekuter atau becak. Ada buat sewa perahu juga.
english_translation: Weekday ticket price 20k/person, weekend 25k/person. The place is comfortable, cool, and refreshing. For those tired from walking, you can rent bicycles, scooters, or tricycles. There are also boats for rent.

text: This place so amazing.. berbagai macam bunga lengkap dengan ornamen2nya merupakan tempat yg asri dan instagramable bgt.. cocok utk wisata bersama teman dan keluarga 😍😍 …
english_translation: This place is so amazing.. various kinds of flowers complete with their ornaments are a beautiful and very instagrammable place.. suitable for vacation with friends and family 😍😍 …

text: Harga masuknya murah per orang hanya sekitar 10 rban kalo g salah... namun jangan bawa kamera SLR disini karena akan kena charge.. lagi.. bunga2nya juga bagus2 disini...
english_translation: The entrance fee is cheap, only around 10,000 Rupiah per person if I'm not mistaken... however, don't bring an SLR camera here because you'll be charged... again.. the flowers here are also beautiful...

text: Spot foto yg bagus, alami, bersih dan seger pastinya. Setelah perjalanan panjang pasti ngga akan nyesel deh setelah sampai di tempat ini. Pokoknya rekomended banget lah.
english_translation: Great photo spot, natural, clean, and refreshing for sure. After a long journey, you definitely won't regret it once you arrive at this place. Overall, highly recommended.

text: Jangan salah memasuki tempatnya, tempat ini terdiri dari beberapa restoran dan toko roti yang menawarkan view tersendiri, tentunya ada tiket masuknya (beberapa tempat).
english_translation: Don't enter the wrong place, this place consists of several restaurants and bakeries that offer their own views, of course there is an entrance fee (some places).

text: Toilet bayar, padahal kemping kan perlu air bersih dan ke toilet. Bolak balik kamar mandi sehari di sana bisa abis 10rb-15rb. Saya serombongan 25 orang, boros di toilet.
english_translation: Paid toilets, even though camping needs clean water and toilets. Going back and forth to the bathroom there daily could cost Rp10,000-Rp15,000. My group of 25 people, wasteful on toilets.

text: Pemandangannya bagus treknya mudah g cuma buat anak2 aja mak mak juga bisa harga tiket masuk murah,bisa santai untuk sampai kepuncak nya tidak lama 30 menit udah nyampai
english_translation: The view is good, the trek is easy, it's just for kids, but moms can also do it. The entrance ticket price is cheap, you can relax, it doesn't take long to reach the top, you'll get there in 30 minutes.

text: Kawasan Geopark di bandung barat, gampang di akses . Sangat panas Dan udaranya Kotor karena byk aktifitas pabrik . Lebih baik pagi2 sekali kesana jangan lupa bawa masker
english_translation: Geopark area in West Bandung, easy to access. Very hot and the air is dirty because of a lot of factory activities. It's better to go there very early in the morning, don't forget to bring a mask.

text:
cocok banget buat liburan keluarga disini, banyak destinasinya meski bayar lagi buat masuk ke wahana yg lain.
anak2 pun suka, tiket masuknya bisa ditukar dengan minuman.
english_translation:
It's perfect for a family vacation here, lots of destinations even though you have to pay extra to enter other attractions.
The kids love it too, the entrance ticket can be exchanged for a drink.

text: Bagus tempatnya..cuma kok Kotor yaa kamarnya, terutama kamar mandinya... Kayaknya perlu diperhatikan lagi kebersihannya Dari mulai sprei, dll..tp breakfast nya amazing..
english_translation: The place is nice.. but why is the room dirty, especially the bathroom... It seems cleanliness needs to be addressed again, starting from the sheets, etc.. but the breakfast is amazing..

text: Utk viewnya lumayan bagus, banyak juga  varian makanan dan juga tempat utk wisatanya belanjanya,  parkir  luas. Cuma  bingung aja sebenernya apa khasnya  tempat ini ya..
english_translation: The view is quite nice, there are also many food varieties and places for sightseeing and shopping, ample parking. I'm just confused, what is actually the specialty of this place...

text:
Alamnya sangat bagus dan jg tanjakan  menuju lokasi sangat lumayan.
Sedikit usul untuk kebersihan ditingkatkan lg Ada sampah yg dibuang kebawah kawah secara sembarangan.
english_translation:
The scenery is very good, and the climb towards the location is quite decent.
A small suggestion for cleanliness to be improved further. There is trash being carelessly thrown down into the crater.

text: Sudah beberapa kali kesini... jalanan menuju puncak sangat bagus... parkiran di atas juga luas... musholla yang besar juga tersedia... air kamar mandinya super dingin...
english_translation: I've been here several times... the road to the summit is very good... the parking lot on top is also spacious... a large prayer room is also available... the bathroom water is super cold...

text: Bagus tempatnya,serasa keliling dunia dlm sehari,,yg mau kesana siapkan fisik yah,,krn lumayan perjalanan menuju spot2 poto.nya kaya lagu anak2,,naik2 kepuncak gunung 😁😁
english_translation: The place is nice, it feels like traveling the world in a day. Those who want to go there, prepare your body, because the journey to the photo spots is quite a climb, like a children's song, climbing to the mountaintop 😁😁

text:
Situs Alam Indonesia yg sangat Indah
Bersih dan sudah tertata rapi. Penjual souvenirs ramah dan tidak "mata duitan", sangat bertolak belakang dgn yg di area Kawah Domas.
english_translation: Beautiful Indonesian natural sites, clean and well-organized. Souvenir vendors are friendly and not money-grubbing, a stark contrast to those in the Kawah Domas area.

text: Tempat yg cocok unt camp dan refreshing. Dari tempat parkir mobil cmn naik 10 mnt an ke atas. Perjalanan kesini jalan agak kecil jd harus pelan2, dari jalan raya 3 km an

text:
Dengan tiket masuk dibandingkan fasilitas tidak sebanding.
Lebih ke tempat makan dan berkumpul.
Ada beberapa permainan untuk anak2. Flying fox, ATV, Tree house, animal feeding.
english_translation:
The entrance fee is not comparable to the facilities.
It's more of a dining and gathering place.
There are some games for children. Flying fox, ATV, Tree house, animal feeding.

text: Keren.... Tapi akses masuknya belom tersentuh pembangunan, jalanan belom aspal atau beton dan masih berwujud batu pasir, kalau kesana pas hujan hati hati, licin. Bagusnya sore.
english_translation: Amazing.... But the access road hasn't been developed yet, the road isn't asphalted or concreted and is still made of sandstone. If you go there during the rain, be careful, it's slippery. It's nice in the afternoon.

text:
Tempat wisata yang lumayan enak lihat pemandangan kawah disiang hari
Tiket masuk 1 motor 2 orang 54 rb, jajanan lumayan murah sosis bakar 15 rb jasuke 10 rb. Pengen kesana lagi
english_translation: A tourist spot that’s quite nice for viewing the crater scenery during the day. Entrance fee for 1 motorcycle and 2 people is 54 thousand, snacks are reasonably cheap: grilled sausage 15 thousand, sweet corn with cheese and milk 10 thousand. Want to go there again.

text: Tempat wisata family friendly di daerah Lembang. Ada banyak wahana seperti Kota Mini (masuknya harus beli tiket lagi), Kampung Jepang (bisa sewa baju kimono dan foto-foto) dsb.
english_translation: Family-friendly tourist spots in the Lembang area. There are many attractions like Kota Mini (requires a separate ticket), Japanese Village (you can rent kimono and take photos), etc.

text: Murah tapi wisata lengkap banget ada kebun strawbery flyng fox hingga bisa menginap disana buar orang luar kota yang kesini di jamin bakalan balik lagi ke wisata grafika cikole
english_translation: Cheap but a very complete tour, there's a strawberry garden, flying fox, and you can even stay there. For people from out of town who come here, it's guaranteed they'll come back to Grafika Cikole tourism.

text: Serasa time travelling beberapa ratus tahun yang lalu! Masya Allah, amazing bagaimana Allah membuat tumpukan batu jadi terlihat luar biasa dan membuat kita merasa sangat kecil.
english_translation: Feeling like time traveling a few hundred years ago! Masya Allah, amazing how Allah makes piles of stone look extraordinary and makes us feel so small.

text: Tempat wisata dg konsep yga bagus, ada miniatur art the triomphe, menara eiffel, piramida mesir, colosseum roma italia, santorini, patung liberty, dll,  petugasnya jg ramah2😊 …
english_translation: Tourist spot with a good concept, featuring a miniature Arc de Triomphe, Eiffel Tower, Egyptian pyramids, Roman Colosseum, Santorini, Statue of Liberty, etc. The staff are also very friendly 😊

text: Alam yang indah, cuaca dingin, banyak pengunjung, jika ingin berkunjung jangan lupa siapkan masker karena bau balerang bisa merusak paru-paru, dan berhati-hati dengan penipuan.
english_translation: The beautiful nature, cold weather, many visitors. If you want to visit, don't forget to prepare a mask because the sulfur smell can damage your lungs, and be careful of scams.

text: Tempat yg pling keren di bandung ,curug y msh alami ,,disarankn motor kudu fit jln berbatu ,klo bisa jng terlalu sore kabut sllu turun ,air terjun y tersembunyi di tengah bukit
english_translation: The coolest place in Bandung, the waterfall is still natural. It's recommended to have a well-maintained motorcycle as the road is rocky. If possible, don't go too late in the afternoon as fog always descends. The waterfall is hidden in the middle of a hill.

text: Tempat ini cukup pantas untuk dikunjungi, tempatnya nyaman untuk botram dengan keluarga sambil rebahan menikmati sejuknya pegunungan...murah dan mudah untuk dikunjungi😊😊😍😍❤👍👍 …
english_translation: This place is quite worth visiting, it's a comfortable place for a picnic with family while lounging and enjoying the cool mountain air... cheap and easy to visit 😊😊😍😍❤👍👍

text: Rekomendasi untuk take a picture dengan pemandangan stone yang sangat menakjubkan. Hanya saja akses jalan masuk yang masih bebatuan dan hawa panas yang menyengat di siang hari.
english_translation: Recommendations for taking a picture with a very stunning stone scenery. However, the access road is still rocky and the hot weather is scorching during the day.

text: Tempat wisata nya di tutup...lahan parkir nya di jadikan buat razia kendaraan yg melintas..tuk yg akan ke bandung lewat cikole jgn lupa tuk kelengkapan surat2 kendaraan nya ya..
english_translation: The tourist spot is closed... the parking lot is being used for vehicle raids on those passing by.. for those going to Bandung via Cikole, don't forget to check your vehicle's documents.

text: Tempatnya bagus jika jam2 sepi pengunjung, bisa eksplorasi seluruh spot foto. Tiket masuknya agak lumayan mahal hehe, tidak ada tiket terusan, tiap taman ada tiket masuknya lagi
english_translation: The place is nice if it's quiet with few visitors, you can explore all the photo spots. The entrance ticket is quite expensive hehe, there are no combined tickets, each park has its own entrance fee.

text: Bagus sih tempat wisata dengan konsep beli makanan kuliner pake koin, area nya pun luas dan banyak wahana juga tapi harus berbayar lagi, klo kesini harus sedia uang banyak. Hehe
english_translation: It's a nice tourist spot with a concept of buying culinary food using coins. The area is also spacious and has many rides, but they have to be paid for again. If you come here, you have to bring a lot of money. Hehe

text: Pemandangan indah, tapi banyak arena yang masih belum benar-benar optimal. Ada beberapa arena untuk anak yang cukup baik, tapi jaminan keselamatan belum benar-benar diperhatikan
english_translation: Beautiful scenery, but many areas are not yet truly optimal. There are some good arenas for children, but safety guarantees have not really been taken into account.

text:
1. Lokasi di Lembang dan berbayar 30 rb./ orang.
2. Kuliner sambil rekreasi alam.
3. Banyak pilihan makanan enak.
4. Feeding hewan yang menyenangkan.
5. Ada musholla dan toilet.
english_translation:
1. Location in Lembang and costs 30k IDR/person.
2. Culinary delights while enjoying nature recreation.
3. Many delicious food options.
4. Fun animal feeding.
5. There are prayer rooms and toilets.

text: Gandeng sama orkes atau musik, ga kedengeran suara alamnya. Burung pada kabur kalih ya. Suasananya seh adem cuma berisik pisan, harus trekking masuk jauh ke hutan baru sepi deh.
english_translation: Paired with an orchestra or music, you can't hear the sounds of nature. The birds probably fled too. The atmosphere is cool, but it's really noisy, you have to trek deep into the forest to find peace.

text: Keindahan alam mempesona, dengan hawa sejuk dan dingin, meskipun kadang terciun bau belerang yang menyengat, tapi tidak mengurangi keinginan kuat untuk menikmati pemandangannya.
english_translation: The natural beauty is captivating, with cool and cold air, although sometimes the pungent smell of sulfur is detected, it does not diminish the strong desire to enjoy the scenery.

text:
Tempatnya enak.adem.sejuk.dingin.
Pelayanan nya ramah.teteh2 sama akang2 nya ramah.baik.pokoknya pelayanan nya good👍👍
Buat teteh yg nganter minuman terimakasih 🙏🙏baik banget 👍🙏.
english_translation:
The place is nice. It's cool and refreshing.
The service is friendly. The sisters and brothers there are friendly and kind. Overall, the service is good 👍👍.
To the sister who brought the drinks, thank you 🙏🙏. You are very kind 👍🙏.

text:
Pemandangan nya bagus, lokasi nya bagus walaupun masuk ke areal nya lumayan jauh

Tapi harga tiket masuk nya lumayan juga, trus didalamnya untuk masuk ke wahana harus bayar lagi
english_translation: The view is good, the location is good, although getting to the area is quite far. But the entrance ticket price is quite high, and then inside, you have to pay again to enter the attractions.

text: Breathtaking view...yang suka memacu adrenalin tempat ini cocok, bisa loncat ke danau dari ketinggian. Datanglah pada musim kemarau & airnya berwarna kehijau" an & cukup bersih.
english_translation: Breathtaking view... for those who love adrenaline, this place is suitable, you can jump into the lake from a height. Come during the dry season & the water will be greenish & quite clean.

text: Tempat wisata bandung barat, tempatnya asri banget, nyaman dan bagus buat swa foto . Gak akan nyesel main ke sini. Harga tiket sangat terjangkau buat semua kalangan. Recomended.
english_translation: West Bandung tourist attractions, the place is very green and beautiful, comfortable and good for selfies. You won't regret visiting here. The ticket prices are very affordable for all circles. Recommended.

text: Air terjunnya bagus, tapi sayang banyak sampah dan airnya kotor, karena memang sudah ramai dan letaknya dipinggir jalan. Mungkin akan lebih bagus di malam hari karena banyak LED
english_translation: The waterfall is nice, but unfortunately there's a lot of trash and the water is dirty, because it's already crowded and located by the side of the road. It might be better at night because there are many LEDs.

text: Spot bagus untuk foto, hanya jalan masuk nya yang harus di perhatikan karena papan petunjuk yg kecil, uda 3 kali ke sini tp selalu kelewatan terus, akses masuk nya jalan berbatu
english_translation: A good spot for photos, only the entrance needs to be careful of as the sign is small. I've been here 3 times but always missed it. The entrance is a rocky road.

text: Best sih tempatnya. Masuknya kayaknya 40k an kalo gsalah. Tempat fto2 ajh si. Tulisannya gabole bw makanan dr luar tp kita bawa makanan gtu makan d tempat camp ground its ok🤣🤣 …
english_translation: The place is the best. Entry is probably around 40k, if I remember correctly. It's mainly a photo spot. The sign says no outside food, but we brought our own food and ate it at the campground, it was okay 🤣🤣…

text:
View cantik, bersih, gunung yg tdk perlu mendaki, Instagramable, tp menyimpan kekuatan yg dahsyat dan tak terduga .....
aq berkunjung tgl 25/7 pagi ... tgl 26/7/19 erupsiii ....
english_translation: Beautiful view, clean, mountains that don't require climbing, Instagramable, but holds tremendous and unexpected power..... I visited on the morning of 25/7... an eruption occurred on 26/7/19...

text: Lokasi nya yg deket perkampungan warga..jadi gampang banget buat diakses..disini kita bisa berkemah,atau hanya sekedar main hammock tuhh asyik bett,secara banyak pohon"nya😁👍👍👍 …
english_translation: Its location is close to a residential area, making it very easy to access. You can camp here, or just enjoy relaxing in a hammock, it's really fun because there are many trees 😁👍👍👍

text: Recommended utk liburan bersama keluarga dan anak2..area luas dan lengkap fasilitas utk anak2..lokasi strategis di pinggir jalan raya persis...tempat bersih dan sarapan enak2...
english_translation: Recommended for holidays with family and children.. large area and complete facilities for children.. strategic location right on the main road... clean place and delicious breakfast...

text: Udaranya Sejuk dikaki Gunung Burangrang Selatan, Objek Wisata Perkemahan Bukit Senyum, Curug, Situ Lembang Dano, Kebon Teh, Track Motor Trail, Jalur Sepeda (Mountain Bike Track)
english_translation: The air is cool at the foot of Mount Burangrang Selatan, Bukit Senyum Camping Tourist Attraction, Waterfalls, Situ Lembang Dano, Tea Plantation, Motorbike Trail, Cycling Path (Mountain Bike Track)

text: Lokasinya dekat dengan the logde maribaya. Wisata alam di kawasan lembang ke arah tangkuban perahu. Dingin dan menyejukkan. Bawa pakaian ganti jika ingin mandi2 di lokasi curug.
english_translation: The location is close to The Lodge Maribaya. Natural tourism in the Lembang area towards Tangkuban Perahu. Cool and refreshing. Bring a change of clothes if you want to swim at the waterfall location.

text: Tempat wisata keren, dekat dengan cafe2 fannibjek wisata lainnya. Tiket masuk Rp 50.000,- bisa ditukar minuman. Didalam juga tak perlu cape jalan ad shuttle yg akan membawa kita.
english_translation: Cool tourist spot, close to other interesting tourist attractions and cafes. Entrance ticket Rp 50,000 can be exchanged for a drink. Inside, you don't need to get tired walking as there's a shuttle that will take us around.

text:
Baru tau ternya beliau ini pak Putra kaban sang  pengelola tempat wisata terutama  Gunung Tangkuban perahu sukses dan sehat selalu pak

Info wisata city tour Bandung
082320644122
english_translation:
Just found out that he is Pak Putra Kaban, the manager of tourist attractions, especially Mount Tangkuban Perahu. Wishing you success and good health always, Sir.

Bandung City Tour Information
082320644122

text: Bagus banget spotnya. Cocok buat foto-foto untuk sarana dan prasarana lebih ditingkatkan lagi. Toilet dan mushola bersih dan juga saung-saung tempat berteduh diatas ditambah lagi
english_translation: The spot is really good. Suitable for taking photos. For facilities and infrastructure, it needs to be improved further. The toilets and prayer rooms are clean, and the pavilions for shelter above are a plus.

text: Bayarrr terooosssss... masuk bayar, liat Kelinci Bayar, mau Main Bayaaarrr lage...Berasa Gak Ada Nilainya Duit Disitu. Makanan Biasa Ajaahhh Over price. Klo pemandangan Emang Oke
english_translation: Keep paying and paying... entering and paying, seeing the "Bayar Rabbit" (likely a name for an attraction or service), wanting to play and paying again... It feels like money has no value there. The food is just ordinary and overpriced. If we're talking about the view, it's indeed okay.

text: Tujuan wisata alam baru dan adventure Goa . Cukup asyik tempat rekreasi air. Ticket cukup murah. Gampang akses. Tempat parkir cukup aman. Sarana jalan dan toilet belum menunjang.
english_translation: New nature tourism destination and adventure Goa. Quite fun water recreation spot. Ticket is quite cheap. Easy access. Parking lot is quite safe. Road and toilet facilities are not yet supportive.

text:
Pergi ke rainbow slidenyaa seruuu bgttt!!!🫠
30rb/org tiket masik floatingnya, 30rb/org lagi buat naik wahana rainbow slidenya. Garugii!!! Ada 80k/org buat all day. Rekomenn bgt …
english_translation:
Go to the rainbow slide, it's super fun!!! 🫠
30k/person for the ticket including the floating, and another 30k/person to ride the rainbow slide attraction. Worth it!!! There's an 80k/person option for all day. Highly recommended...

text: Tmpat luas sejuk butuh stamina buat mengelilingi area ini.tiket 50-65 rb/org bisa di tuker minuman d pintu keluar.untuk parkir tidsk ada yg mengarahkan.shg bnyak org yg tidak tau
english_translation: Spacious and cool place, requires stamina to get around this area. Tickets cost 50-65 thousand per person and can be exchanged for drinks at the exit. There was no one directing parking, so many people didn't know what to do.

text: Untuk ke gunung Tangkuban Perahu, anda bisa melewati jalur jalan Jayagiri (kota Lembang) yang tentunya JALAN KAKI, tapi bisa menikmati sejuknya hutan pinus, harumnya lumut basah.
english_translation: To get to Mount Tangkuban Perahu, you can take the Jayagiri road route (Lembang town) which is of course ON FOOT, but you can enjoy the coolness of the pine forest and the scent of wet moss.

text: Buat foto foto udah gaa usah di tanya lagi..  Pasti keren keren..  Udaranya sejuk..  Angin sepoi sepoi nan menyejukkan ditambah suka ada monyet bikin suasana hati lebih nyess....
english_translation: The photos are a given, no need to even ask... They're definitely cool... The air is cool... A gentle, refreshing breeze, plus the occasional monkeys, make the mood even more blissful...

text:
Perjalanan lumayan lelah tapi sangat memuaskan pas sampe lokasi...wow pokoknya 😍
Saya datang pas posisi abis banjir, Alhamdulillah pas Dateng cuaca mendukung untuk berkunjung 😊 …
english_translation:
The journey was quite tiring but very satisfying once I reached the location... just wow 😍
I arrived right after a flood, thank God the weather supported my visit 😊

text: Disarankan datang lebuh pagi. Gunakan kenadaraan yang layak karena jalan lumayan berkelok dan naik turun. Datang di musim kemaraua lebih baik agar air sungai dalam keadaan bening
english_translation: It is recommended to come earlier in the morning. Use a suitable vehicle as the road is quite winding and undulating. Coming during the dry season is better so the river water is clear.

text:
Tempat singgah untuk wisatawan yang lagi di Lembang...
Tersedia kamar singgah, wahana petualang kayak flying fox, dll.
Seru sih, pemandangannya juga bagus.
Tapi dingin euy.. 😁😁 …
english_translation:
A stopover for tourists in Lembang...
There are rooms available, adventure rides like flying fox, etc.
It's fun, the view is also good.
But it's really cold.. 😁😁

text: Ini sih tempat nya enak banget, mau siang juga adem. Cocok buat yang nyari spot foto. Cuma makanan dan minuman di sana harga nya mahal-mahal, udah gitu belum termasuk pajak lagi.
english_translation: This place is really nice, it's cool even during the day. Suitable for those looking for photo spots. It's just that the food and drinks there are very expensive, and that doesn't even include tax.

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata di bandung, yg keren, banyak spot foto juga ada staff yg membantu kita kalau mau foto 2 ... Tiket masuk juga murah , aneka jenis tanaman banyak disana
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations in Bandung, which is cool, has many photo spots and there are also staff who help us if we want to take photos... The entrance ticket is also cheap, there are many types of plants there

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk rekreasi, ada mobil antar jemput juga jadi tidak perlu capek-capek naik turun jalan kaki, htm 50rb dan ada yg 65rb (termasuk tiket masuk jembatan gantung)
english_translation: A great place for recreation, there's also a shuttle car so you don't have to tire yourself out walking up and down the hill. The entrance fee is 50,000 IDR and there's one for 65,000 IDR (which includes the suspension bridge ticket).

text: Subhanallah pemandangan yang sangat indah , udaranya dingin sekali , tempatnya bersih , pedagang nya ramah , jalan menuju lokasi mudah di jangkau , pokoknya bagus bagus dan bagus
english_translation: Subhanallah, what a beautiful view, the air is so cold, the place is clean, the vendors are friendly, the road to the location is easy to reach, basically, it's good, good, and good.

text:
Wisata yang cocok untuk keluarga, bisa jalan2  liat monumen2 antar negara, ada tempat makannya juga..
Spot fotonya banyak.. Jadi kalo yg mau hunting foto + jalan2 cocok tempatnya
english_translation:
A tourist spot suitable for families, you can walk around and see monuments between countries, there are also places to eat..
There are many photo spots.. So if you want to hunt for photos + stroll, it's the right place.

text: Grafika cikole, tempat wisata yg bersih dan terpelihara. Cocok utk team building. Kamar penginapan nya bersih, kamar mandi, handuk, kasur, lemari bersih tidak berdebu. Recomended
english_translation: Grafika Cikole, a clean and well-maintained tourist spot. Suitable for team building. The lodging rooms are clean, with clean bathrooms, towels, beds, and wardrobes, free of dust. Recommended.

text: Pemandangannya cukup bagus dan tiketnya murah hanya 5000 per orang dan parkir mobil 7000 / motor 3000. Hanya saja diatas ga ada sungai dan hati-hati dengan binatang monyet disana
english_translation: The view is quite good and the ticket is cheap, only 5000 per person, and car parking is 7000 / motorcycle is 3000. It's just that there's no river up there and be careful of the monkeys there.

text: Ada taman kelinci lho disini. Cuma 15 ribu/ anak. bisa dapet pakan buat kelinci juga. Yg dampingin free. Dpt pinjeman topi ala2 petani pula.. 20ribu puas keliling2 taman. Segerrr
english_translation: There's a rabbit garden here, you know. It's only 15 thousand per child. You also get food for the rabbits. The accompanying person is free. You even get to borrow a farmer-style hat. For 20 thousand, you can enjoy wandering around the garden. It's refreshing.

text: yang belum pernah ke Bali ke sini aja dulu Sama aja ko dari depan gerbang udh terasa nuansa pulau Dewata nya , banyak spot photo, lokasi parkir luas banyak pilihan makanan juga ,
english_translation: If you've never been to Bali, just come here first. It's the same, the Balinese vibe is already felt from the entrance gate. Many photo spots, ample parking, and lots of food options too.

text: taman bungan dan kebun sayur yang bagus dan nyaman buat wisata dan berselfie ria..taman bunga beraneka jenis dan terawat dengan baik.kebun sayur juga bagus buat wisata dan selfie
english_translation: A beautiful and comfortable flower garden and vegetable garden for tourism and selfies.. a flower garden with various types and well-maintained. The vegetable garden is also good for tourism and selfies.

text: Tiket masuk /orang 16ribu dengan curug yang benar² sama sekali tidak terawat. Sampahnya dimana² dan akses jalannya di persulit. Not recomend klo yang dari luar bandung mau kesini
english_translation: Admission fee/person 16 thousand with a waterfall that is truly neglected. Trash everywhere and the access road is difficult. Not recommended if you are from outside Bandung wanting to come here.

text:
Tempatnya keren. Banyak spot foto bagus.

Sekarang mulai banyak orang yang tahu tempat ini, jadi mulai agak kotor karena pada buang sampah sembarangan. Semoga bisa lebih baik lagi
english_translation:
The place is cool. Lots of good photo spots.

Now many people know about this place, so it's starting to get a bit dirty because people are littering. Hopefully, it can get better.

text:
Wisata yang sangat menarik, melihat dari dekat kawah.

Tidak hanya pemandangan yg indah, berwisata sambil nikmatin jajanan cuanki enak juga sambil belanja pernak pernik buat oleh2
english_translation:
A very interesting tour, seeing the crater up close.

Not only beautiful scenery, but also a tour while enjoying delicious cuanki snacks and shopping for trinkets for souvenirs.

text: Tempat parkir sangat terbatas, jadi saat masa liburan hati hati bila kesini. Karna lokasi parkir sangat padat sekali. Diharapkan kesininya hari aktif atau gak ya hari libur biasa.
english_translation: Parking is very limited, so be careful when visiting during the holidays. Because the parking lot gets very crowded. It is recommended to visit on weekdays or during regular non-holiday days.

text: Tempat wisata sejarah yang menyuguhkan pemandangan luar biasa. Terdapat banyak spot foto menarik yang dapat dijadikan latar belakang. Terdapat bnyak penjual yang terdapat di atas.
english_translation: A historical tourist attraction offering extraordinary views. There are many interesting photo spots that can be used as backgrounds. There are many vendors located above.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata terbaik di Bandung, keliling dunia ditemani miniatur keunikan beberapa negara sebagai tempat berfoto. Lingkungan nyaman, cocok juga untuk wisata keluarga.
english_translation: One of the best tourist attractions in Bandung, travel the world accompanied by miniatures of the uniqueness of several countries as photo spots. The environment is comfortable, also suitable for family tourism.

text: Satu lokasi dengan wisata puncak ciumbuleuit... lokasinya paling bawah... Disediakan transportasi dari tempat tiket ke lokasi... Banyak tempat selfinya... Miniatur manca negara...
english_translation: One location with the Ciumbuleuit peak tour... it's located at the very bottom... Transportation is provided from the ticket booth to the location... Lots of selfie spots... Miniatures of foreign countries...

text: Biaya masuk 40rb per orang, tiket bisa ditukar jus, kopi atau coklat. Banyak spot foto menarik dan instagramable. Kita bisa membeli makanan di foodcort nya dengan menukarkan koin.
english_translation: Admission fee is 40 thousand per person, tickets can be exchanged for juice, coffee, or chocolate. Lots of interesting and Instagrammable photo spots. We can buy food at the food court by exchanging coins.

text: View alam mantaaaaap, Camp ground murmer, pelayanan penjaga tiket ramah, hanya sarana toilet mohon diperbanyak lagi, kasian yg mau ke toilet sampe nunggu antrian panjang....😂😂😂😂 …
english_translation: The view is amazing, the campsite is cheap, the ticket attendant's service is friendly. However, please add more toilet facilities, it's a pity people have to wait in a long queue to use the toilet...😂😂😂😂

text: Penataan dan pelatihan terhadap gaet lokalnya bagus, hanya saja kurang nyaman sama penjualnya yg terkesan memaksa pengunjung untuk membeli. Tapi ya itu usaha mereka juga sih..hehe
english_translation: The arrangement and training of the local guides are good, but I'm not comfortable with the sellers who seem to pressure visitors to buy. But well, that's their livelihood too... hehe

text: Kerennnnnnnnnnnnnn. Tapi gak recommended buat yang bawa anak kayaknya kemaren soalnya pas tahun baru banyak yg bawa anak, kasian anaknya kan dingin bgt soalnya trus nanjak gitu😔 …
english_translation: Amazingggggggg. But I don't recommend it for people with kids, it seems. Yesterday, a lot of people brought their kids, and it was a shame because it was very cold and uphill😔…

text: Tempat wisata yg bagus banget, masih  progres terus diperbagus . Cocok untuk prewed, atau keluarga yg membawa oranfg tua dan anak anaknya untuk bermain , makanannya juga enak enak
english_translation: A very good tourist spot, still progressing and being improved. Suitable for pre-wed shoots, or for families bringing elderly parents and children to play. The food is also delicious.

text: Berada di Padalarang Citatah.dan letaanknya di bukit kapur.. dan kalo mau ke sana hati2 dengan makanya banyak sekawanan monyet liar dan makanan saya berhasil di bajak sama mereka.
english_translation: Located in Padalarang Citatah, on a limestone hill. And be careful when you go there, there are many groups of wild monkeys, and they managed to steal my food.

text: Seru Dan menyenangkan Wisata Alam, Kegiatan outbond, Halang Rintang, FlyingFox. Sasak Gantung, camp. Apalagi Udaranya segar, pohon pinus tinggi menjulang, rumput hijau menghampar.

text: Tiket masuk 50k dan dapat minuman ukuran kecil. Untuk ketempat foto"nya disediakan naik shuttle car gratis. Tempatnya biasa aja dan ga luas  dengan harga segitu rasanya kemahalan.

text: Tempat yg eksotis alam maribaya yg sejuk suara kumbang pohon dan di temani keceriaan keluarga. Lokasi yang sangat luas ada 7 spot tmpt yg luas. Klo pnya sepeda rekomended di bawa.

text:
Datang ke sini hari libur nasional, untuk tiket masuk  30rb, 5rb parkir motor dan nanti tiket nya bisa di tukar minuman di pintu masuk
Tempat nya terawat, dan cocok untuk keluarga
english_translation:
Came here on a national holiday. For an entrance fee of 30,000 IDR, 5,000 IDR for motorcycle parking, and later the ticket can be exchanged for drinks at the entrance.
The place is well-maintained and suitable for families.

text: Tempatnya lumayan luas dan banyak bunga berwarna-warni cocok untuk berselfie ria atau sekedar menikmati pemandangan hamparan bunga  merah begonia.  Harga tiketnya 20 rb perorang..

text: Tempat nya lumayan bagus, sayangnya lokasi warungny kurang safe buat anak2 krn tidak ada pembatas dg danaunya,,, horor bgt ketika anak saya tercebur ke danaunya...untungnya gpp...

text:
Trek nya asik. Pemandangan nya indah. Banyak warung sepanjang jalan, jd bekal secukup nya saja.
Sayang nya sudah mulai kotor di sepanjang jalan setapak nya. Banyak sampah plastik.

The trek was fun. The scenery was beautiful. There were many stalls along the way, so just bring enough provisions.
Unfortunately, it was already starting to get dirty along the path. Lots of plastic trash.

text: Tempat hiking yang murah meriah, akses mudah, pemandangan bagus, tidak banyak sampah, bisa akses ke sukawana, cikole, tangkuban perahu, atau hanya keliling-keliling disekitar saja

text: Alhamdulillah bisa berlibur untuk melepas kejenuhan dijakarta krn mesti drmh saja,berlibur kepegunungan sangat cocok untuk menikmati udara yg sangat sejuk dan sangat nyaman sekali

text: Sangat bagus tempatnya bagi yg ingin jalan murah meriah di bandung silahkan datang ke tempat ini, biaya masuk Rp.10.000, tempatnya ada air terjun, camping, tempat selfie Rp. 5000.
english_translation: Very good place for those who want a cheap and cheerful trip in Bandung, please come to this place. Entrance fee Rp. 10,000, the place has a waterfall, camping, and selfie spots for Rp. 5,000.

text: lumayan seru untuk rekreasi keluarga. yg sy suka miniatur kereta api, tp sayang sudah kurang terawat. tolong di tata ulang dan dibenahi kembali miniatur2 yg sudah mulai rusak.. 👍 …

text: Beautiful place , Tempat bagus dan nyaman tapi untuk tempat masih sedikit pohon pohon yg tinggi jdi klo siang agak panas menyengat , Recommended datang kesini ketika Pagi atau Sore
english_translation: Beautiful place, good and comfortable but still a bit lacking in tall trees, so it gets quite hot and stinging during the day. Recommended to come here in the morning or afternoon.

text: saya pernah kesini sekali, air terjunnya sangat tinggi dan arusnya ccukup deras, tapi saya menikmati itu, karena keadaan lingkungannya membuat hilang rasa ngeri dari air terjun itu

text: Benteng Jayagiri Besar ada 3 bangunan terletak di Gunung Putri Jaya Giri Lembang alangkah baiknya dilakukan perawatan lebih baik lagi untuk sarana wisata alam dari pihak terkait...
english_translation: The Great Jayagiri Fortress has 3 buildings located in Mount Putri Jaya Giri, Lembang. It would be best if better maintenance were carried out for the natural tourism facilities by the relevant parties.

text: Tempat nya enak banget,di pinggiran kota,suasana nya nyaman,romantis,ada kafe nya juga,mushola,bisa metik sayuran,buah-buahan,tiket masuk nya juga murah,apalagi buat selfi/foto",,,

text:

text: Suasana yang sejuk, banyak tanaman-tanaman yang bagus dan tumbuhan yang tinggi.. tempat yang recommended buat menghilangkan jenuh dan hangout bareng teman dan saudara.. bersih juga
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool, with many beautiful plants and tall trees. A recommended place to relieve boredom and hang out with friends and family. It's clean too.

text: Pemandangannya oke, dan buat yang ga suka hiking terlalu tinggi, ini cociks banget! Parkiran cukup luas, jalannya bagus, mobil oke buat lewat. Toilet, warung, dan mushola tersedia.

text: Ada pungli, padahal sudah ada tiket dan uang parkir jadi total kesini kalau menggunakan motor maka menghabiskan uang 15 rb yang seharusnya 10rb untuk tiket 5rb dan 5rb untuk parkir
english_translation: There is an illegal fee, even though there is already a ticket and parking fee. So, coming here by motorbike costs a total of 15,000 rupiah, which should have been 10,000 for the ticket and 5,000 for parking.

text: Meskipun aksesnya agak jauh dari jalan atau tempat parkir, tapi semuanya akan terbayarkan dengan keindahan alam di sanghyang heulet. Kita bisa berenang, terjun bebas atau ngaliwet.
english_translation: Although the access is a bit far from the road or parking lot, it will all be worth it with the natural beauty at Sanghyang Heulet. You can swim, cliff dive, or enjoy a traditional communal meal.

text: Gunung yang paling bentar mendakinya, paling 10 menit, walaupun ketinggiannya agak rendah tapi ada kumpulan awan yang kaya samudra awan gitu loh, tempatnya cocok buat nenangin diri
english_translation: The easiest mountain to climb, takes at most 10 minutes. Even though it's not very high, there's a cloud formation that looks like a sea of clouds. It's a suitable place to calm your mind.

text:

text: Tempat wisata Curug Maribaya sangat bagus di kunjungi untuk keluarga anda. Suasana alam yg sangat alami..dan udara yg dinginn..selamat datang di kota Bandung Curug Maribaya lembang

text:
Tempat yang instagramable.

Instagrammable place.
It's hot there on a sunny day, it's better to come in the morning on a weekday so there aren't many people around when taking photos or selfies.

text: Keren banget tempat nya cocok bngt buat yg mau hunting photo bisa di pake prewed ada batu alami gtu yg cocok buat keindahan semesta ..ada warung" nya jual makanan murah" dan nyaman

text: Tempat asik buat camping atau sekedar menikmati pemandangan kota bandung dari ketinggian, harus siapkan fisik yg prima karena dari tempat parkiran mendaki langsung curam sekitar 70°

text: Udaranya Sejuk,kesini pakai jasa travel,bnyak pedagang asongan disini dan qt dibantuin foto keliling pas mau pulang disuruh bli gelangnya seharga 250rb ktnya itu asli batu disana,,,

text: Tempat ini berhawa sejuk, rekomendasi bagus jika anda menginginkan udara yg bersih. Tapi bau belerang agak sedikit menyengat. Saya sarankan untuk membawa masker atau penutup hidung.

text: Harga worth it dengan segala keindahan alam di dalamnya, tempatnya luas banget, sejuk adem walau matahari muncul ga berasa panasnya, tiket masuk bukan sekedar 30rb yaa per orang 🤭 …

text: Untuk akses ke tangkuban perahu cukup mudah, jalanan kondisinya baik bisa diakses oleh bus. Jika membawa anak-anak perhatikan faktor cuaca karena cukup dingin kadang disertai hujan.

text: Bagus untuk destinasi keluarga di hari libur tanpa harus menanjak najak lagi karena mobil sudah bisa masuk ke tempat destinasinya pemandangannya juga cantiikkk kaya pengunjungnyaaaa

text: Tempatnya nenarik,  cuman untuk acara keluarga yang membawa makanan Dr rumah sebaiknya makan dahulu diluar karena tidak boleh membawa  makanan kedalam, kecuali beli yg sdh disiapkan

text: Aseli seneng banget liburan di floating market, anak anak happy, dan yg pasti rasa makanan enak enak. Nyoba wahana terbaru rainbow slide asik banget. Pasti balik lagi klo ke bandung

text: Tempat yang sejuk, adem..ada banyak spot foto, bisa bermain dengan kelinci, ada Playground anak nya juga, luas sekali tempatnya..tapi jangan takut ada mobil juga klo mau ke parkiran

text: Tempatnya bagus, bersih, menarik dan sangat luas juga banyak spot foto yang instagramable. Yang jelas kudu siap stamina karena luas banget dan sayang kalo ada spot yang dilewatkan..
english_translation: The place is nice, clean, interesting, and very spacious with many Instagrammable photo spots. What's clear is you need to be prepared with stamina because it's so vast and it would be a shame to miss any spots.

text: Hawanya yang dingin dan pemandangan alam yang indah bikin ga terasa walaupun jalan kaki agak jauh ke air terjun. Airnya dangkal aman untuk anak-anak main.. airnya sejuk dingin segar
english_translation: The cool air and beautiful scenery make you not feel the distance, even though it's a bit of a walk to the waterfall. The water is shallow and safe for children to play in. The water is cool, cold, and refreshing.

text: Tempat rekreasi keluarga yang nyaman dengan penataan bunga warna warni yang cantik dan terawat , membuat pengunjung merasa betah umtuk menikmati seluruh sudut areal Floating Market.
english_translation: A comfortable family recreation spot with beautiful and well-maintained colorful flower arrangements, making visitors feel at home to enjoy every corner of the Floating Market area.

text: Jalannya jauh banget. Gasempet nyampe k tempat curugnya karena terlalu jauh. Bapak penjaganya bilang setengah jam sampe nyatanya satu jam belum nyampe akhirnya balik lagi ke bandung
english_translation: The road is very far. I couldn't reach the waterfall because it was too far. The caretaker said it would take half an hour, but in reality, after an hour I still hadn't arrived, so I went back to Bandung.

text: Tempat healing di dekat g tangkuban perahu lembang bandung, bagus rekomen **** , cuman utk yg kamping pake sewa tenda baiknya bawa lampu sendiri. Krn ngak didisediakan di lokasinya.

text: alternatif main ke alam. tantangan hikingnya moderate, agak licin karena ada bocoran pipa air. air terjunnya jernih. ada flying fox. kalau butuh instruktur utk gathering jg tersedia

text:

kebunnya kecil sih, kalo ramai gk worthed .
pergi pas ujan jd serasa milik berdua. tpi ujan 🤣

Entrance ticket 25k /person

Pretty good for photos 👌

text: Karena lagi musim kemarau. Debit air kecil/ hampir tidak ada. Belum sempat sampe curug tilu, karena harus jalan kaki lumayan  jauh, menanjak, dan jalanan agak belum terlalu terawat.
english_translation: Because it's the dry season. The water flow is small/almost non-existent. I haven't had time to reach Curug Tiga yet, because I have to walk quite far, uphill, and the road is not yet very well maintained.

text: Tempat yang cocok untuk healing. Suasananya sangat sejuk dan menyenangkan, apalagi ketika malam hari tiba. Rekomendasi sekali untuk quality time bersama keluarga atau orang terkasih
english_translation: A suitable place for healing. The atmosphere is very cool and pleasant, especially when night falls. Highly recommended for quality time with family or loved ones.

text: Infrastruktur belum dikelola dengan baik. Jalan menuju keatas terlalu berresiko karena berjalan menginjak jalanan dan paralon yang licin. Serta jembatan pada bendungan sudah keropos
english_translation: Infrastructure is not managed well. The road going up is too risky because you walk on slippery roads and pipes. As well as the bridge at the dam is dilapidated.

text: Bagus banget kebon bunga nya. Hebat bisa merawat kebun bunga sebesar itu dan berbunga semua. Tp sayang toko tanaman di depan harga nya mahal amat. Tp klo tuk jalan jalan sih ok lah.

text: Tempatnya bagus sih untuk liburan. Saran ke sini, jangan lupa bawa kendaraan sendiri dan pakai pakaian yang nyaman. Untuk spot foto bervariasi harganya jadi siapin budget sendiri 👍🏻

text: Udah beberapa kali kesini, walaupun belum sempat menyusuri setiap sudut keindahanya, karena kadang terkendala cuaca, kadang secara tiba2 hujan dan berkabut, jadi pada kalang kabut..

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk permainan yang menantang adrenaline,  pilihan tempat yg tepat untuk sekolah,  kampus, kantor untuk melakukan kegiatan outbound,  untuk foto2 juga sangat bagus

text: Pemandangan indah dengan banyak air terjun. Tempat berkemah yang sangat baik di sebelah sungai. Hanya satu hal kecil. Perlu membayar ekstra Rp. 10rb untuk masuk ke air terjun utama.

text: Lokasinya sangat memuaskan ketika saya bersama keluarga,lokasi parkirnya enak luas harga teket masuknya atandar dan terjangkau ,lingkungan bersih cocok untuk liburan bersama keluarga

text: Wisata alam yg sangat fantastis,disini juga ada beberapa Curug. airnya jernih ,tiket masuknya 10 -15k /orang. Pokoknya isi liburan kalian dengan jalan jalan ke Curug tilu Leuwi opat.

text: Kebun bunga yang indah, tiket masuk 20 ribu per orang. Anak 2 tahun sudah bayar. Bawa kamera dslr harus bayar 50 ribu lagi. Ada juga jual tanaman buah dan sayur untuk ditanam kembali

text:
Mantap ...Bandung emang keren..

english_translation:
Awesome... Bandung is indeed cool..
Here we can camp..
The atmosphere is very comfortable and the scenery is beautiful, and there are many good places for selfies..
Very suitable for holidays...

text: Wahana main untuk anak2 banyak, tp bayar lagi, tiket masuk 35rb, tempatnya rapi dan lumayan bersih, sayangnya susah untuk nyemplong langsung ke air terjunnya, lebih utk wisata selfie
english_translation: The rides for children are plentiful, but they require an additional fee. The entrance ticket is 35,000 Rupiah. The place is tidy and quite clean. Unfortunately, it's difficult to jump directly into the waterfall; it's more suited for selfie tourism.

text: Wisata alam dan penginapan ala2 glamping... seru deh pokoknya... stafnya ramah... Nginep pertama di Urban Camp... kali ini di Pondokan Cemara... next time lanjut tipe yang lainnya...
english_translation: Nature tourism and glamping-style accommodation... it's really fun... the staff are friendly... First stay was at Urban Camp... this time at Pondokan Cemara... next time I'll try other types...

text: Udara sejuk dan dingin,  wisata ini sebeleum tangkuban perahu..  Biaya seorang 40rb belum termasuk parkir mobil. Lumayan pemandangan hijau dan udara segar banyak pepohonan yg rindang
english_translation: Cool and cold air, this tour is before Tangkuban Perahu.. The cost per person is 40 thousand, not including car parking. The green scenery and fresh air with many shady trees are quite pleasant.

text: Salah satu tempat yang ingin saha kunjungi karena saat saya kecil membaca dongeng legenda Sangkuriang dan Dayang Sumbi adalah Gn. Tangkuban Parahu. Tempat yang indah dan menakjubkan.
english_translation: One of the places I wanted to visit because when I was little I read the fairy tale legend of Sangkuriang and Dayang Sumbi was Mount Tangkuban Parahu. A beautiful and amazing place.

text:
Harga tiket per orang Rp 25.000,-, spot fotonya lumayan banyak.
Buat jalan2 oke lah, kebunya gak begitu luas ya. Tapi overall menarik buat selfie dan foto-foto, anak-anak pasti suka.
english_translation:
Ticket price per person is Rp 25,000, there are quite a lot of photo spots.
Okay for a stroll, the area isn't too vast. But overall, it's interesting for selfies and photos, kids will definitely like it.

text: air terjunnya bagus sayang airnya terlihat kotor karena banyak sampah. bagusnya di buat pengendalian sampah di hulu aliran air atau water filter / treatment agar air terlihat jernih.
english_translation: The waterfall is nice, but it's a shame the water looks dirty because of the trash. It would be good to implement trash control upstream or use a water filter/treatment so the water looks clear.

text: Htm pas trial opening 30k, skrg jadi 50k. Tapi sumpah deh puas bgt pas maen kesini walaupun dpt view malam nya aja karna brgkat dari rmh sorean. Recommended bgt siii tmpat wisata ini
english_translation: Trial opening was 30k, now it's 50k. But I swear, I was really satisfied playing here even though I only got the night view because I left home in the afternoon. This tourist spot is highly recommended.

text: Berada di jalan tempat wisata Lembang, suasana sejuk dan nyaman, di pagi hari biasanya ada tempat bermain/outbound. Dan tempat makannya langsung menghadap ke Gunung Tangkuban Parahu.
english_translation: Located on the road to Lembang tourist attractions, the atmosphere is cool and comfortable. In the morning, there is usually a playground/outbound area. And the dining area directly overlooks Mount Tangkuban Perahu.

text: puncak yang tidak sulit untuk di datangi, sayange pasca letusan tidak diperkenankan lagi turun ke kawahnya. akses dari lembang hanya 4 km an dan dari tol cipali jakarta hanya 1 jaman
english_translation: A peak that is not difficult to reach. Unfortunately, after the eruption, it is no longer permitted to go down into the crater. Access from Lembang is only about 4 km and from the Cipali toll road from Jakarta is only about 1 hour.

text:
Kurang lebih tempatnya ga befa jauh dari beberapa tauuun kebelakang
Sayang,  saya k sana bukan weekend jadi spot untuk outbound tdk ada yg menjaga,  ada beberapa sampah berkeliaran..
english_translation:
More or less, the place hasn't changed much from a few years ago.
Unfortunately, I went there not on a weekend so the outbound spots weren't manned, there were some scattered trash.

text: Berbagai kegiatan outbound ada disini (paint ball, flying fox, dll) tempatnya pun mantap dan terdapat penginapan disini sehingga cocok untuk melakukan kegiatan diakhir pekan 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 …
english_translation: Various outbound activities are available here (paintball, flying fox, etc.), the place is also great, and there are accommodations here, making it suitable for weekend activities 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 …

text:
Lokasinya yang epic dan strategis.
Banyak sekali spot-spot foto menarik dan hits
Pelayanan yang ramah dan nyaman
fasilitas golf car, payung, karcis masuk dapat ditukar dengan minuman.
english_translation:
Its epic and strategic location.
Many interesting and trending photo spots.
Friendly and comfortable service.
Golf cart facilities, umbrellas, entrance tickets can be exchanged for drinks.
