text: Tempat liburan keluarga ataupun outbound sekolah maupun perusahan, tempanya sejuk, dingin, dan permainannya banyak, saran aja kalo kesini bawa switer atau jaket karna cuacanya dingin.
english_translation: A place for family vacations, school outbound, or company outings. The place is cool, cold, and has many games. Just a suggestion, bring a sweater or jacket because the weather is cold.

text: Tempatnya di lembang. Udaranya sejuk hawa dingin gitu. Bayar masuk sekitaran 30rb ya seorang. Banyak pedagang, karena masa pandemi yg berkunjung sedikit pdhl saya kesini waktu weekend
english_translation: The place is in Lembang. The air is cool and chilly. The entrance fee is around 30,000 IDR per person. There are many vendors, but because of the pandemic, few people visited, even though I came here on a weekend.

text:
Tempatnya bagusss, luass banget adem bangett, apalagi kalo pagipagi berangkat dari rumahnya .sampe disana udaranya lgi adem ademnya.
So, this is a great place for brain refreshment😍 …
english_translation:
The place is great, very spacious and very cool, especially if you leave home in the morning. When you get there, the air is at its coolest.
So, this is a great place for brain refreshment😍 …

text: Camping di Bukit Senyum nyaman dan apalagi urun hujang, menambah tantangan yng membawa nikmat tersendiri , serta tiupan angin yng menerpa dedaunan Pinus terngan suara yng menyejukkan.
english_translation: Camping at Bukit Senyum is comfortable and even more so with a sprinkle of rain, adding a challenge that brings its own special pleasure, along with the blowing wind that rustles the pine leaves with a soothing sound.

text: Uwuuuuu udaranya masih adem banget, masih asri, mantap, cocok untuk camping dan hiking, ada curugnya juga dan banyak, hanya saja tidak ada sinyal sama seperti di pedesaan pada umumnya
english_translation: Uwuuuuu, the air is still really cool, still beautiful, great, suitable for camping and hiking, there are also many waterfalls, it's just that there's no signal, just like in the countryside in general.

text: Tempat ngadem nyari angin daerah bandung barat disini sambil liat pemandangan gunung batu.. harga tiket terjangkau trs kalo laper bnyk warung2 dan harga makanan trmasuk harga normal..
english_translation: A cool place to find some breeze in West Bandung, here while enjoying the view of Batu Mountain. Ticket prices are affordable, and if you're hungry, there are plenty of stalls with normal food prices.

text: Harus jalan dulu baru bisa menikmati air terjun. Tempatnya alam bgt, jadi sangat seru. Pastikan datang ketika tidak hujan agar airnya tidak deras dan bersih, dan batu batunya terlihat
english_translation: You have to walk first to enjoy the waterfall. The place is very natural, so it's very exciting. Make sure to come when it's not raining so the water isn't too strong and is clean, and the rocks are visible.

text: Tempatnya bagus, lumayan bersih juga toilet dan tempat ibadah mudah diakses, harga tiket masuk dan tiket tambahan lainya cukup terjangkau, bisa jadi referensi liburan bersama keluarga
english_translation: The place is nice, the toilets are reasonably clean, and the prayer room is easily accessible. The entrance ticket and other additional tickets are quite affordable, making it a good reference for a family vacation.

text: Tempatnya luas, spot2 fotonya bagus, kastilnya juga keren ala-ala game of thrones gitu, sepertinya bakalan ada spot baru lagi kelak, sebaiknya weekdays kalau mau kesini biar gak penuh
english_translation: The place is spacious, the photo spots are good, the castle is also cool, like something from Game of Thrones. It seems like there will be new spots in the future. It's best to come on weekdays if you want to visit so it's not crowded.

text: Tempat ini sangat bagus untuk berkemah santai, dan ada situs bersejarah juga. Ada juga pemandangan lembang yang bagus dari atas. Tiketnya tidak mahal, dan lingkungannya cukup bersih.
english_translation: This place is great for casual camping, and there are historical sites as well. There are also nice valley views from above. The ticket price is not expensive, and the environment is quite clean.

text:
spot foto kece di padalarang, kalo ingin kesini cocok sekali saat sore hari viewnya oke banget. butuh tracking 15menit, ada spot foto goa diarea ini.
parkirannya luas, aksesnya mudah.
english_translation:
Cool photo spot in Padalarang. If you want to come here, it's perfect in the afternoon, the view is really good. It takes a 15-minute trek, there's a cave photo spot in this area.
The parking is spacious, and access is easy.

text: tempatnya enak buat berkemah kumpul ama temen, banyak tempat untuk sewa peralatan verkemah, meski kita tidak bawa peraltan ga usah kawatir, orang sekitar d perkampungan juga pada baik
english_translation: The place is nice for camping with friends. There are many places to rent camping equipment, so don't worry if you don't bring your own. The people in the village are also very kind.

text: Tempat yg enak buat santai, buat istirahat dari ke sibukan sehari-hari.. kalo udah d sini males pulang,, lupa waktu, apa lagi kalo kesini nya bareng keluarga, d jamin bikin lupa waktu
english_translation: A great place to relax, to rest from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. When you're here, you won't want to go home, you'll lose track of time, especially if you come here with family. Guaranteed to make you lose track of time.

text: Tempat nya lumayan bagus untuk menikmati indahnya pegunungan. Cuma yg disayangkan akses nya masih kurang bagus. Mohon untuk diperbaiki krna menurut saya ini sangat berpotensi. Thanks.
english_translation: The place is quite nice for enjoying the beautiful mountains. It's just a shame that the access is still not very good. Please improve it because I think this has a lot of potential. Thanks.

text: Alhamdulillah kesini sepi, pas baru buka jadi bebas dan leluasa untuk foto2. Yang hobby tanaman pasti bahagia kesini, bisa beli tanaman hias juga harga tanamannya juga masih terjangkau
english_translation: Alhamdulillah, it's quiet here. Since it just opened, I can freely and comfortably take photos. Plant lovers will be happy here, you can also buy ornamental plants, and the prices of the plants are still affordable.

text:
Tiketnya hrganya ya lumayan lah ...
Trus dsana ga blh bawa kamera, krna disana menawarkan sewa kameranya. Trus kita dpet pinjeman topi bulet per orang. Spot foto kebun bunga sdh pasti.
english_translation:
The ticket price is quite considerable...
And then you're not allowed to bring cameras there because they offer camera rentals. Then each person gets a borrowed round hat. The flower garden photo spot is a must.

text: Tempatnya Bagus, tp sayang dr dulu sampe skrg jalanan nya gak di aspal... aneh Tiket masuk bayar 2 kali, gak termasuk parkir, kesini enak nya pas sore jam 4 biar gak panas + dpt sunset
english_translation: The place is nice, but it's a shame the road hasn't been paved from the past until now... strange. Entrance tickets are paid twice, not including parking. It's best to come here in the afternoon around 4 PM so it's not hot + you can catch the sunset.

text: Tempatnya luas cocok untuk gathering keluarga. Akses tidak terlalu sulit. Ada parkir mobi. Tersedia kamar mandi dan tempat makan. Ada biaya  tambahan ika naik tangga ke arah air terjun
english_translation: The place is spacious and suitable for family gatherings. Access is not too difficult. There is car parking. Bathrooms and a dining area are available. There is an additional fee if you climb the stairs towards the waterfall.

text: Tempat yang sangat indah kalian bisa melihat sunrise dan sunset.tidak hanya itu disini pun bisa melihat pemandangan gunung lain dan kota bandung lembang yang amat sangat luas dan indah
english_translation: A very beautiful place where you can see the sunrise and sunset. Not only that, here you can also see the view of other mountains and the very vast and beautiful city of Bandung Lembang.

text:
Susah parkir kl blm booking acara, Parkir mobilnya diindomart/Alfamart/sekitar situ bayar 30rb.
Sejuk.......
Kusus anak muda, diobjek wisata hutan pinusnya banyak tangga naik turunnya.
english_translation:
Parking is difficult if you haven't booked an event. Park your car at Indomaret/Alfamart/around there and pay 30 thousand.
Cool.......
Specifically for young people, the pine forest tourist attraction has many stairs to climb up and down.

text: Ada aula untuk acara,tempat rekreasi yg bagus juga buat anak-anak karena ada kota mini,ada danau disediakan perahu naga dan lainnya. Bagus buat foto-foto dan tiket 30 rb gratis kopi👍 …
english_translation: There is a hall for events, a good recreation area for children because there is a mini-town, there is a lake with dragon boats and more. Great for photos and a 30k ticket includes a free coffee👍 …

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk menghabiskan liburan, mereka memiliki layanan antar-jemput untuk membawa Anda ke tempat yang berbeda. Mereka memiliki staf yang sangat baik dan sangat membantu
english_translation: A great place to spend a holiday, they have a shuttle service to take you to different places. They have very good and very helpful staff.

text: Disini gak usah keliling dunia lagi ada menara eifeel, patung liberty dll dan ada juga Jembatan Sirotol Mustaqim, tiketnya 50k sayang cuma 1/2 jam doang, gak sampai malam karena tutup.
english_translation: You don't need to travel the world here anymore, there's the Eiffel Tower, the Statue of Liberty, etc., and there's also the Sirotol Mustaqim Bridge. The ticket is 50k, but it's only for half an hour. We didn't stay until night because it closes.

text: Sy sampai pas malam hari  tmpt oke buat foto2 dan santai dan ada kendaraan gratis u/ kita balik ke tempat parkir setelah lelah jalan2 mengelilingi tempat ini pokonya rekomendasi banget
english_translation: I arrived at night, the place is good for photos and relaxing, and there's free transport for us to go back to the parking lot after we're tired of walking around this place, so it's highly recommended.

text: Trakhir 2003 ksini bersma tman kmpus,skrg 2022 k sini lagi sma anak2 n paksu,jlnnya dah enak tangga2'a dah rapih,ad wrung juga lmyan buat genjel perut smbil nikmatin suasana air terjun
english_translation: Traveled in 2003 with campus friends, now in 2022, back here with the kids and husband. The path is already good, the stairs are neat. There are also stalls that are quite good for filling our stomachs while enjoying the waterfall atmosphere.

text:
Tempat parkir luas banget.
Harus pake koin untuk tiap transaksi. Bisa dibeli di depan pintu masuk atau loket terdekat di wahana. Ini tempatnya luas banget. Bisa buat tempat main anak …
english_translation:
The parking lot is very spacious.
You have to use coins for every transaction. They can be bought at the entrance or at the nearest counter at the attractions. This place is very spacious. It can be a place for children to play…

text: tempat lihat citylight yg enaken...sayang toilet kurang banyak,kurang terawat akibat kurang sadarnya bbrp pengunjung...debit air pun kecil...sehingga harus mengantre untuk ke toilet...
english_translation: a good place to see the city lights...unfortunately, there aren't enough toilets, and they're not well-maintained due to the lack of awareness from some visitors...the water pressure is also low...so you have to queue for the toilet...

text: sekarang sudah lumayan untuk jalan dan angkutannya, sayang saat tiba disana sedang kabut, walaupun dapat sedikit view pemandangan kawah setelah itu ditutup oleh kabut dan gerimis hujan
english_translation: Now it's quite good for walking and transportation, it's a shame that when we arrived there it was foggy, although we got a little view of the crater, it was later covered by fog and drizzling rain.

text: pernah 2 atau 3 kali kesini, tempatnya orang orang buat pelantikan, diklat, atau sejenisnya, beberapa ada yg wisata juga, kalau mau jalan nanjak sedikit, diatasnya ada kebun teh, bagus
english_translation: Been here 2 or 3 times. It's a place for inaugurations, training, or similar events. Some people come for tourism too. If you want to walk a bit uphill, there's a tea garden at the top, it's beautiful.

text: Suasana sejuk, nyaman dan bersih sangat terasa. Koleksi anggreknya juga banyak. Musti coba jembatan tali dan flying foxnya. Harga tiket standaf cuma untuk wahana lainnya ada bayar lagi
english_translation: The cool, comfortable, and clean atmosphere is very noticeable. The orchid collection is also extensive. You must try the suspension bridge and the flying fox. The standard ticket price is for entry only, other attractions require an additional payment.

text: Tempat wisata paling payah saya gaet travle bawa tamu dari luar Bandung masuk harus bayar naik jembatan juga harus bayar dimana mana rata rata gaet travel yang ngantar tamu itu gratis!
english_translation: The worst tourist spot. I hired a travel agent to bring guests from outside Bandung, and we had to pay to enter, and also pay to go on the bridge. Everywhere else, travel agents who bring guests usually get in for free!

text: Tempat ny lumayan, tiket 50rb..banyak spot foto nya..cafe juga ada.. Cuma waktu kesana panas banget tp bagus sih bs bebas berfoto dari pada ujan iya kan bayaran ny kulit jd pd gosong😂🤣
english_translation: The place is quite nice, ticket is 50rb.. lots of photo spots.. there's a cafe too.. It was really hot when I went there, but it's good because I could take photos freely instead of it raining, right? My skin got burnt lol😂🤣

text: Tempat seru buat jalan-jalan (baca: jalan beneran), taman hutan raya mempunyai jalur sepanjang kurang lebih 6 km, kalau hanya ingin ke curug omas disarankan masuk melalui pintu maribaya
english_translation: A fun place to stroll (read: walk for real), the grand forest park has a path approximately 6 km long. If you only want to go to Curug Omas, it is recommended to enter through the Maribaya gate.

text: tiket masuk 10k. kalau camping 22k perorang. mulai rame jam 6 keatas karna banyak yg camping. viewnya keren. suhu dikisaran 14-16c. diatas lengkap ada musholla, bisa beli kayu bakar jug
english_translation: Entrance ticket 10k. If camping, 22k per person. It starts getting crowded from 6 PM onwards because many people are camping. The view is cool. The temperature is around 14-16°C. Upstairs, there's a prayer room and you can also buy firewood.

text: Jika anda pecinta alam, anda wajib mengunjungi wisata gunung tangkuban parahu yang berlokasi di kab. Bandung. Alam yang menawan serta kawah yang cantik cocok sekali untuk anda kunjungi.
english_translation: If you are a nature lover, you must visit the Tangkuban Perahu mountain tourism located in Bandung Regency. The captivating nature and beautiful craters are perfect for you to visit.

text: untuk kemah cocok bagi pemula.. track pendaki standar, sudsh bnyak tempat Wc bahkan mushola ada, ada spot foto , dan bisa menikmati sunrise dan sunset , kalau malam ada view citylight..
english_translation: suitable for camping, good for beginners. Standard hiking trail, many restrooms and even a prayer room available, there are photo spots, and you can enjoy sunrise and sunset. At night, there's a city light view.

text: Suasana alam masih asli cirug nya mantabs makanan dan jajanannya cukuplah gk semahal ditmpt wisata lain...cma jalur mnju curugnya sangat sangat exstrem tdk rekomend buat anak dan lansia
english_translation: The natural atmosphere is still original, the waterfall is great. The food and snacks are sufficient and not as expensive as in other tourist spots... It's just that the path to the waterfall is very, very extreme, not recommended for children and the elderly.

text: Tempat yang cukup asri dan bersih. Saat ini masih sepi. Cocok untuk merenung atau "we time" bersama yang kita sayangi. Hanya saja trek tidak mulus, disarankan pakai sepatu untuk hiking.
english_translation: A sufficiently beautiful and clean place. It is still quiet at the moment. Suitable for contemplation or "we time" with loved ones. However, the trail is not smooth; hiking shoes are recommended.

text: Banyak wahana dan area luas.  ada beberapa wahana yg mnrt saya terlalu mahal dan tidak sebanding dengan fasilitasnya. Contohnya di kota mini khususnya di area karnaval dan area kelinci.
english_translation: Many rides and a large area. There are a few rides that I think are too expensive and not worth the facilities. For example, in the mini town, especially in the carnival area and the rabbit area.

text:
Tempat keren sejuk nyaman bersih untuk toilet atau pun tempat bermain anak"
Ad live musik juga jadi bisa ikutan nyumbang lagu
Klo ke bandung ne musti di di datengin gak boleh di lewatin
english_translation:
A cool, pleasant, comfortable, and clean place for a toilet or even a children's play area.
There's also live music so you can join in and donate a song.
If you go to Bandung, this is a must-visit, you can't miss it.

text: Sudah 3x kesini dan nggak pernah bosen, di tengah hutan anak2 bisa lari2 dan udaranya super bersih krn jauh dari penyebab polusi..toilet banyak dan bersih, makanannya juga nggak mahal ❤
english_translation: I've been here 3 times and never get bored. In the middle of the forest, the kids can run around, and the air is super clean because it's far from pollution sources. There are many clean toilets, and the food isn't expensive either ❤

text: Saya kasih bitang 1 karna pengelola tiket ny gk sesuay dengan omongan kata nya 19.ribu sudah termasuk parkir nyata ny malah di minta lagi ama orang yang sempoyongan minta uang parkir...
english_translation: I'm giving it 1 star because the ticket manager wasn't truthful. They said 19,000 included parking, but in reality, someone who seemed drunk demanded parking money again...

text: Cocok untuk orang yang suka haiking soalnya jaraknya lumayan untuk menuju curug utama. Biaya yang di kenakan pun cukup murah, hanya 10rb/org kita bisa menikamati alam yang sangat indah.
english_translation: Suitable for people who like hiking because the distance to the main waterfall is quite far. The cost charged is also quite cheap, only 10,000 IDR per person, we can enjoy very beautiful nature.

text: Tempat bersih, suasanya enak dan banyak cafe-cafe kecil untuk makan. Foodcourt juga ada tapi cukup jauh dari pintu masuk. Kalau cape nanjak ke pintu masuk ada shuttle untuk ke parkiran.
english_translation: Clean place, pleasant atmosphere, and many small cafes for eating. There's also a food court, but it's quite far from the entrance. If you're tired of climbing to the entrance, there's a shuttle to the parking lot.

text: Bagi yg rencana ke sini..siapkan stamina fisik krn jalan tracking ke curugnya terjal lumayanlah bikin ngos2an..ada sih jasa ojek sampai kembali ke atas..itupun ga semulus ojek di aspal.
english_translation: For those planning to come here, prepare your physical stamina because the tracking path to the waterfall is quite steep, enough to make you breathless. There is a motorcycle taxi service to take you back up, but even that isn't as smooth as a motorcycle taxi on asphalt.

text: Beberapa tahun yang lalu mengunjungi Curug ini.. tempatnya cukup tersembunyi dan berada tengah hutan.. Air terjun yang indah dengan airnya yang jernih dan dingin.. layak dikunjungi lagi
english_translation: A few years ago, I visited this waterfall.. the place is quite hidden and located in the middle of the forest.. a beautiful waterfall with its clear and cold water.. worth visiting again

text: Pemandangan bagus, tempat yang tidak terlalu sulit untuk dikunjungi di Lembang, tetapi Anda masih harus melewati desa setempat untuk sampai ke sana. Tapi pandangannya, Anda harus puas.
english_translation: Nice view, not too difficult to visit in Lembang, but you still have to pass through a local village to get there. But the view, you have to be satisfied.

text:
Tempatnya mantap, sejuk dan betah banget, besok akan pasti kembali lagi.
Ada live music kalau Anda beruntung😁
Lebih baik datang di sore hari menjelang malam karena view sangat romantis🥰
english_translation:
The place is great, cool, and very comfortable, will definitely be back tomorrow.
There's live music if you're lucky😁
It's better to come in the afternoon before evening because the view is very romantic🥰

text: Tempat yang cocok untuk liburan keluarga, banyak wahana bermain untuk anak-anak, banyak makanan unik yang harganya cukup terjangkau, tersedia juga berbagai macam oleh-oleh khas Bandung.
english_translation: A suitable place for a family vacation, with many rides for children, many unique foods at quite affordable prices, and also a variety of typical Bandung souvenirs.

text: Bagus banget, jalannya terarah jadi tidak bingung, tiket masuk 25k, didalam ada lagi rainbow garden, kyotoku (jepang2an), kota mini, flying fox dengan masing2 masuk ada tambahan htmnya.
english_translation: Really great, the path is well-directed so no confusion. Entrance ticket is 25k. Inside there's also a rainbow garden, Kyotoku (Japanese style area), Mini City, and Flying Fox, each with an additional entrance fee.

text: Curug yang dikelola oleh warga, wahananya berupa kolam dan outbond tetapi tidak bisa digunakan. Cocok untuk tempat foto-foto saja. Ada cafe menarik dimana kita bisa membaca buku gratis.
english_translation: A waterfall managed by the local community, it has a pool and outbound facilities but they are unusable. It's suitable for taking photos only. There is an interesting cafe where you can read free books.

text: Sholawatin aja dlu kl kesini,kali aja bisa ke santorini,paris,new york beneran 😁 lumayan pegel jlnnya,untung ke tolong ada shuttle nya,buat pegawainya baik² bgt mau bantu kita foto² 👍 …
english_translation: Just pray here first, maybe you can go to Santorini, Paris, New York for real 😁 My legs are quite tired from walking. Luckily, there's a shuttle to help. The employees are really nice, willing to help us take photos 👍 …

text: Salah satu tempat wisata yg luas, bikin adem pikiran, oke buat foto-foto lah, dan juga ada permainan disini yaitu flying fox 😁. tiketnya terjangkau bangeet. bisa dicoba lah kesini yaa …
english_translation: One of the spacious tourist spots, it's refreshing for the mind, good for taking photos, and there's also an activity here, which is flying fox 😁. The ticket price is very affordable. You should definitely try visiting here...

text: Tempatnya sejuk..alami bnged. Spot buat foto jg banyak...ccok untuk healing bersama keluarga atau pasangan. Untuk tiket masuk 50rb cukup wort it lah dengan suasananya dan cukup luas jg..
english_translation: The place is cool... very natural. There are also many photo spots... suitable for healing with family or a partner. For the entrance ticket of 50rb, it's quite worth it considering the atmosphere and it's quite spacious too.

text: buat rekreasi kelaurga sih masih terbilang oke lah. tempat luas, spot foto banyak, untuk harga Rp35.000 per orang sih masih worth it lah, masih bisa dituker juga sama kopi atau jus jeruk
english_translation: For family recreation, it's still quite okay. The place is spacious, there are many photo spots, and for Rp35,000 per person, it's still worth it, and you can even exchange it for coffee or orange juice.

text: Sudah menjadi cerita turun temurun tentang tangkuban perahu ke anak dan cucu. Tapi masih kurangnya modern pada tempat ini yang ga bisa membawa turis non-lokal untuk me njajal tempat ini.
english_translation: It has become a family legend, passed down from parents to children and grandchildren, about Tangkuban Perahu. But the lack of modernity at this place prevents non-local tourists from experiencing it.

text: Viewnya bagus, area bersih. Akses jalan mudah hanya sedikit berbatu tp gpppp. Kesini waktu arus sungai nya lg deres karna musim ujan untung spot foto nya banyakkk! Next pasti kesini lagi
english_translation: The view is good, the area is clean. The road access is easy, just a bit rocky but that's okay. Came here when the river flow was strong due to the rainy season, luckily there are many photo spots! Will definitely come back here next time.

text: Tempatnya sejuk..,bersih cocok untu wisata keluarga..tiket masuk juga g trlalu mahal 30k,hanya saja masuk ke arena bermain anak di kota mini yg lumayan mahal, 1 kali masuk bisa 25k-50k..
english_translation: The place is cool and clean, suitable for family tourism. The entrance ticket is also not too expensive at 30k. However, entering the children's playground in the mini city is quite expensive, 25k-50k per entry.

text: Dengan lokasi yang berada di dataran tinggi, view nya jadi bikin ga bosen dan seru kemacetannya, tapi kalau ingat pengunjung nya.. Sangat ramai, kadang jadi kurang menikmati suasananya..
english_translation: With its highland location, the view is endlessly fascinating and the traffic jams are exciting, but when you remember the visitors... it's very crowded, sometimes it makes it hard to enjoy the atmosphere.

text: Gunung tangkupan prahu wisata yang menjadi favorit kota bandung jawa barat,dengan tiket masuk per orang 30.000 bisa Menik mati pemandangan gunung Tangkuban perahu di lembang jawa barat .
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu mountain, a favorite tourist destination in Bandung, West Java, with an entrance ticket of 30,000 per person, allows you to enjoy the scenery of Tangkuban Perahu mountain in Lembang, West Java.

text: Nyobain gowes ksini sepeda harus bayar 7rb di hari kerja htm 20rb pemandangan bagus banget banyak spot poto yang menarik buat goweser yang suka tanjakan wajib dicoba gowes wisata kesini.
english_translation: Tried cycling here, the bicycle costs 7k on weekdays, entrance fee is 20k. The scenery is very beautiful with many interesting photo spots. For cyclists who like uphill rides, it's a must-try cycling trip here.

text: Saat week end sangat ramai, restonya biasa saja, namun kawasan penginapannya terlihat menarik, dengan fasilitas yang cukup dan layak disebut pionir glamping (glamour camping) di Bandung.
english_translation: When the weekend is very crowded, the restaurant is just average, but the lodging area looks interesting, with sufficient facilities and worthy of being called a pioneer of glamping (glamour camping) in Bandung.

text: Sejak naek kita akan disuguhi pemandangan yg indah, jalannya yg berkelok membuat jantung berdebar, jadi agak tidak mungkin klo sampe ngantuk. Sampe di atas pemandangannya tak kalah indah
english_translation: As soon as we ascend, we will be treated to beautiful views, the winding road makes the heart race, so it's rather unlikely to get sleepy. Upon reaching the top, the scenery is no less beautiful.

text: 2x saya datang ke tempat ini,dan tetap sukak 🙂. Paket komplit bisa kita dapatkan di sini. Bisa meeting soal kerjaan sambil healing,tempat ibadah,room meeting,tempat makan semua tersedia.
english_translation: 2x I've come to this place, and I still like it 🙂. A complete package can be obtained here. You can have work meetings while healing, a place of worship, meeting rooms, and places to eat are all available.

text: Tempat ini bagus banget. Pemandangannya indah, cuacanya enak banget. Hanya bayar tiket masuk 35rb, di dalem bisa nukerin tiket sama minuman bisa hot chocolate ato orange juice ato coffee
english_translation: This place is really nice. The view is beautiful, the weather is great. You only pay an entrance fee of 35,000, and inside you can exchange the ticket for a drink, either hot chocolate, orange juice, or coffee.

text:
Tempatnya bagus dan bersih.
Posisi di atas tempat2 makan dan di bawah ada wisata selfie keliling dunia. Keren.

*: Harus bawa kendaraan sendiri, soalnya susah dapet jasa kendaraan online
english_translation:
The place is nice and clean.
The position is above the eateries and below is a "around the world" selfie tour. Cool.

*: You have to bring your own vehicle, because it's hard to get online vehicle services.

text: FM sekarang, jauh lebih bagus dari beberapa tahun yang lalu. Banyak tempat yang tambah. Cuma parkir mobilnya agak susah, dan akses masuk serta pulangnya apabila diarahkan ke jalan desa..
english_translation: FM now is much better than a few years ago. Many places have been added. Only the car parking is a bit difficult, and the access in and out when directed to the village road.

text: Masjid Jabal Nur Tangkuban Parahu menyelenggarakan sholat Jum'at, lumayan cukup besar, bersih, airnya dingin banget, cuma gak ada toiletnya, toilet berbayar ada di bangunan samping masjid
english_translation: Masjid Jabal Nur Tangkuban Parahu holds Friday prayers, it's quite large, clean, the water is very cold, there are just no toilets, paid toilets are in the building next to the mosque.

text: di indonesia semua harus dijadikan uang ya.. Gak boleh bawa makanan sendiri kenapa?? Fto bayar kenapa? bahkan toilet hrs bayar juga?? ya Alloh.. Klo di luar negeri, taman kaya gni gratis!
english_translation: In Indonesia, everything has to be turned into money, huh... Why can't we bring our own food? Why do we have to pay for photos? Even the toilet costs money?? Oh God... If it's abroad, parks like this are free!

text: Cukup bagus buat yang suka foto2, diluar itu tidak terlalu worth it. Hati-hati ketika parkir, masuk ke lereng anteng dulu agar lebih dekat, jangan parkir di lapangan luar kecuali terpaksa
english_translation: Quite good for those who like taking photos, otherwise not very worth it. Be careful when parking, go into the gentle slope first to get closer, don't park in the outer field unless absolutely necessary.

text: Indah dan dingin, kebetulan pas saya k sini lg dingin2nya perasaan kaya lg dijepang,mulut ampe ngebul berasap dinginnya minta ampun,klu ke sini bawa jaket biar gk kaya saya saltum heehehe
english_translation: Beautiful and cold, it coincidentally happened that when I came here, it was at its coldest, it felt like being in Japan. My breath was literally smoking from the biting cold. If you come here, bring a jacket so you don't end up like me wearing the wrong clothes, hehehe.

text: Tempatnya masih bersih, pemandangannya luar biasa indah, disarankan klo hujan untuk berhati" karena kondisi tanah licin, butuh akses jalan masuk yg di perbaiki dan papan nama kurang besar
english_translation: The place is still clean, the scenery is incredibly beautiful. It's recommended to be careful if it rains because the ground conditions are slippery. The access road needs improvement and the signboard is not big enough.

text: Untuk pelayanannya baik sekali Kakaknya saya disana diberi bunga yang bisa dimakan dikenalkn berbagai bunga yang ada kakaknya ramah tapi sayang tidak bisa lama menemani karena harus ganti
english_translation: Her service was excellent. My sister was given edible flowers there and was introduced to various flowers. The sister was friendly but unfortunately couldn't stay long because she had to change.

text: Walaupun agak ribet harus menukarkan uang kita dengan koin yang diakui disitu tapi macam makanan yang dijual cukup beragam. Sayang gak bisa banyak ngicipin krn perut dah gak kuat lagi 😅 …
english_translation: Even though it was a bit of a hassle to exchange our money for the local coins, the variety of food sold was quite diverse. It's a shame I couldn't taste much more because my stomach couldn't handle it anymore 😅 ...

text: Floating Market Lembang, di tempat ini memang khusus di peruntukan acara" liburan wisata keluarga, maupun rombongan, berbagai permainan tersedia di sini, tempat" kulinernya banyak pilihan
english_translation: Lembang Floating Market, this place is specifically designated for family vacation events or group tours. Various games are available here, and there are many culinary options.

text:
Tempat yang nyaman cocok untuk nongkrong dan jalan jalan sekedar untuk menikmati suasana alam pedesaan yang sejuk
Tiket 30k temapatnya juga strategis mudah dijangkau kendaraan umum juga..
english_translation:
A comfortable place suitable for hanging out and strolling, just to enjoy the cool rural natural atmosphere.
The ticket is 30k, the place is also strategic and easily accessible by public transportation too.

text: Tempatnya enak buat camping maupun buat treking, pemandangan indah dan masih banyaknya monyet2 menambah serasa dihutan, kamar mandi sudah bnyak, warung2 juga buka terus jd engak kelaperan
english_translation: The place is great for camping and trekking, the scenery is beautiful and the abundance of monkeys makes it feel like you're in the jungle. There are plenty of bathrooms, and warungs (small shops) are always open, so you won't go hungry.

text: Cocok buat pencinta alam, family gathering dan buat ng camp, makanan / warung jajanan kurang bervariatif ,toilet harap di perbaiki, tapi tmpat ini cocok untuk niis alias dinginkan pikiran
english_translation: Suitable for nature lovers, family gatherings, and camping. Food/snack stalls lack variety. Toilets need repair, but this place is good for chilling out, meaning clearing your mind.

text: Tempatnya enak banget buat refreshing, hutan pinus yang asri, bunga anggrek dimana2, tracking nya juga jadi gampang soalnya jalanannya bagus cuma akses jalan ke lokasi aja yg jelek hehehe
english_translation: The place is really nice for refreshing, a beautiful pine forest, orchids everywhere, tracking is also easy because the path is good, it's just the road access to the location that's bad hehehe

text: Bagus curugnyaaa.. Bawa minum ya! Harus makan dulu sebelum pulang wkwk. Turunnya semangat banget mau liat curug, pas naiknya harus mempunyai motivasi pribadi supaya bisa cepat istirahat 🙈
english_translation: The waterfall is great! Bring drinks! You have to eat before going home, lol. Went down so enthusiastically to see the waterfall, but going back up requires personal motivation to rest quickly 🙈

text: kawasan wista alam berada dilembang, disana terdapat goa jepang yang cukup seram, tempat penyiksaan pada zamannya, curugnya kurang bagus, tetapi ada tempat untuk berendam air panas disana
english_translation: The nature tourism area is located in the ravine, where there is a quite spooky Japanese cave, a place of torture in its time, the waterfall is not very good, but there is a place for hot spring bathing there.

text: Berkunjung bulan Juni lalu, view nya mantap banget. Ngambil gambar nya agak pagian, soal nya kalo udah jam 9an kabut nya mulai turun.. tiket perorang 20k.. Happy holiday bestie,, cmiww🥰 …
english_translation: Visited last June, the view was amazing. Took pictures a bit earlier in the morning, because by 9 am the fog starts to roll in. Ticket per person is 20k. Happy holiday bestie, caught me if you wanna 🥰

text: Wisata yang menarik karna terdapat kuliner yang mengapung diatas air dengan transaksi pembelian dengan menggunakan chip, spot foto yg lumayan bagus, terdapat game station, dan wisata air.
english_translation: An interesting attraction because it has floating culinary stalls on the water with chip transactions, good photo spots, a game station, and water attractions.

text:
Cocok banget untuk hikking / ngcamp bareng temen & keluarga, cuma sayang aja jarak toilet nya lumayan agak berjauhan.
Terus kondisi jalan menuju lokasi nya pun masih banyak berbatuan nya.
english_translation:
Perfect for hiking / camping with friends & family, it's just a shame the toilets are quite far apart.
Also, the road leading to the location still has a lot of rocks.

text: Lumayan bisa lihat kembang dan sayuran dan jdi edukasi. Tempat juga lmyn bersih. Tapi harga tiket masuknya lumayan mahal menurut saya. Rp 25 ribu cuma pemamdangan itu dan tidak dapat apa2
english_translation: It's nice to see flowers and vegetables, and it's educational. The place is also quite clean. But the entrance ticket price is quite expensive in my opinion. Rp 25 thousand just for the view and you don't get anything.

text:
Pintu masuk lewat PLTA saguling. Tracking/hiking kurang lebih 1 jam untuk sampe ke sanghyang heleut.

Sanghyang heleut tempatnya bagus dan keren, disana bisa berenang dan nyewa pelampung.
english_translation:
Entrance via the Saguling Hydroelectric Power Plant. Trekking/hiking approximately 1 hour to reach Sanghyang Heuleut.

Sanghyang Heuleut is a beautiful and cool place, you can swim there and rent floats.

text:
View nya bagus, makanannya banyak tapi harganya harga tempat wisata ya. Wkwkwk..
Terus musiknya jangan musik korea dan jangan musik jepang yang diputer, aneh. Mestinya musik karawitan 😁 …
english_translation:
The view is good, there's a lot of food but the prices are tourist trap prices, lol.
Also, no Korean or Japanese music playing, it's weird. It should be gamelan music 😁…

text: Tempatnya enak banget buat hiking singkat, bagus buat yang suka hunting foto cantik untuk di post di Instagram, aman buat anak-anak di atas 15 tahun hingga orang dewasa di bawah 65 tahun.
english_translation: The place is great for a short hike, good for those who love to hunt for beautiful photos to post on Instagram, safe for children over 15 years old up to adults under 65 years old.

text:
Selain Gua Pawon, di Gunung Masigit juga ada tebing-tebing kapur berselimut tumbuhan hijau yang Instagramable. Inilah Stone Garden Geopark yang lagi hits di Instagram.

Tarif: Rp10.000,00
english_translation:
Besides Pawon Cave, Mount Masigit also has Instagrammable limestone cliffs covered in green vegetation. This is Stone Garden Geopark, which is currently trending on Instagram.

Admission: Rp10,000.00

text: Tempat yang sejuk indah, agak disayangkan kurang terawat .. masih banyak sampah yg berserakan di jalan maupun di sungainya .. untuk selebihnya bagus .. cape bossss siap siap salonpas hehe
english_translation: A cool and beautiful place, a bit unfortunate that it's not well maintained... there's still a lot of trash scattered on the road and in the river... otherwise, it's good... tired boss, get ready for Salonpas hehe

text: Mantul sih,cuma sepi aja.recomendasi buat yang liburan sekeluarga.Di mini zoo nya jg masuknya gratis paling cuma lemah di luas,ya luas banget! Pegel pegel dah tu kaki klo keliling² disini.
english_translation: It's awesome, just a bit quiet. Recommended for family vacations. Entry to the mini zoo is free, the only downside is the size, which is really huge! Your feet will be tired from walking around here.

text: Cukup nyaman untuk bersantai dg suasana alam, dari parkiran ke lokasi ada shuttle bus. Tempat ini bisa lebih baik kalau ditambah aktivitas dan sebaiknya beberapa spot foto digratiskan saja
english_translation: Quite comfortable for relaxing in a natural atmosphere, there is a shuttle bus from the parking lot to the location. This place could be better if more activities were added and preferably if some photo spots were free.

text: Tempatnya enak, pilihan atraksi beragam, sayang pas kesitu strawberry nya blm panen, outbound anak jg lg direnov, padahal peak season, area makannya agar ditambah, waiting listnya kelamaan
english_translation: The place is nice, the variety of attractions is diverse, too bad when I went the strawberries weren't ripe yet, the kids' outbound area was also under renovation, even though it was peak season, the dining area should be expanded, the waiting list is too long

text:
Tempat bagus, tp blm sempet liat yg mulai gelap dan lightnya nyala smua. Toilet bersih, makanan agak pricey.
Tempat luas banget.
Dateng pas weekday sepiiiii.

Banyak pineconeee cantik2 :")
english_translation:
Good place, but haven't had a chance to see it when it's getting dark and all the lights are on. The toilet is clean, the food is a bit pricey.
The place is really spacious.
Came on a weekday, sooooo quiet.

Lots of beautiful pinecones :")

text:
Tempatnya indah sekali, namun jika hujan jalannya sangat licin dan terkadang becek.

Akses menuju tempat ini juga hancur, mobil agak susah ke tempat ini. Tolong jalan diperbaiki secepatnya
english_translation:
The place is very beautiful, but when it rains the road gets very slippery and sometimes muddy.
The access to this place is also ruined, cars have a bit of difficulty getting here. Please repair the road as soon as possible.

text: Lebih baik datang ketika kemarau atau air sungai menyusut. Bisa experience ke dalam Gua sanghyang kenit. Sekitar 200 meter dari jalan raya,bisa ditempuh dengan jalan kaki atau pakai motor.
english_translation: It's better to come during the dry season or when the river water has receded. You can experience going into Gua Sanghyang Kenit. About 200 meters from the highway, it can be reached by walking or by motorbike.

text: tempat yang sangat nyaman dan adem untuk berkunjung bersama keluarga untuk berjalan santai dan menghirup udara segar. area juga sangat luas jadi tidak akan cepat bosan. sangat recommended.
english_translation: A very comfortable and cool place to visit with family for a leisurely stroll and to breathe in the fresh air. The area is also very spacious so you won't get bored quickly. Highly recommended.

text: Harga tiket terjangkau, dan tempatnya rapi. Bunganya bervariasi, Bagus banget.  Dan karena masih covit19 wajib pake dan jaga jarak.  Ketat sih menurut saya tapi gpp Bagus.  Sukses terus. .
english_translation: Affordable ticket prices, and the place is tidy. The flowers are varied, really good. And because of Covid-19, masks and social distancing are mandatory. It's strict in my opinion but it's okay, good. Keep up the good work.

text: Cocokla buat liburan keluarga.. Tempat nya luas sejuk, mau nyantai, foto2, makanan banyak pilihan.. Wahana bermain tersedia.. Tiket tersedia dari online maupun langsung di tempat.. Gaskeun
english_translation: Perfect for a family vacation. The place is spacious and cool, good for relaxing, taking photos, lots of food options. Play attractions available. Tickets available online or directly at the location. Let's go!

text: Tidak terlalu ramai tempatnya asik buat mini hiking dg anak anak, cuma akses jalannya pertahankan jelek supaya gk banyak orang datang 😅, ama sampah slalu jaga kebersihan ya para pengunjung
english_translation: The place isn't too crowded and is fun for mini-hiking with kids, just keep the road access bad so not too many people come 😅, and please visitors, always maintain cleanliness regarding trash.

text: untuk lokasi cocok untuk acara keluarga atau rombongan ,,, ada tempat bermain untuk anak , cuma untuk spot foto seperti nya kurang di perhatikan ... keseluruhan ok banget ... wajib kunjung
english_translation: For locations suitable for family events or groups, there is a playground for children, but photo spots seem to be neglected. Overall, it's really great... a must-visit.

text: Tempatnya enak apalagi yg vip .. tapi takut juga kalo pulang malam2 sepi banget jalan untuk keluarnya dan para staff hanya sedikit  ga ada yg antar2 .. jadi serem juga kalo pulang mlm ....
english_translation: The place is nice, especially the VIP area. But I'm also scared to go home late at night, the road to get out is very quiet and there are only a few staff members, none of whom walk you out. So it's a bit scary to go home late at night...

text: Pemandangan menuju ke tempat ini bagus banget. Perjalanan yg pas mulai di pagi hari, biar gak terlalu sore sampenya. Karena masih ada perjalanan kurang lebih 2 jam PP menuju holy lake nya.
english_translation: The view towards this place is really great. The perfect trip to start in the morning, so you don't arrive too late. Because there's still a trip of approximately 2 hours round trip to the holy lake.

text:
Gang masuk nya agak kecil.. Pas2an 2 mobil..
Dalamnya luas.. Hijau.. Banyak spot berfoto.. Bayar masuk 30.000/orang, tidak termasuk mainan di dalam.. Tetapi tiket bisa ditukar dg minuman..
english_translation:
The entrance is a bit small.. Just enough for 2 cars side-by-side..
Inside is spacious.. Green.. Lots of photo spots.. Entrance fee is 30,000/person, not including toys inside.. But the ticket can be exchanged for a drink..

text: Tempat bagus, banyak tempat duduk jd yg bawa bayi kalo cape bisa duduk2 dlu. Tiket masuk mayan terjangkau. Pas week end jg ga terlalu rame di dalam. Sayang ga bisa bawa makanan dri luar😊 …
english_translation: Nice place, lots of seating so if you're carrying a baby and get tired, you can sit down first. The entrance fee is quite affordable. It wasn't too crowded inside even on the weekend. Too bad you can't bring food from outside😊 …

text: Lumayan bagus dan lengkap untuk anak karena ada kelinci, kastil, outbound,  dan bisa belajar tahu tanaman anggrek. Cuma akses dari tmpt parkir ke lokasi lumayam jauh, untungnya ada shuttle
english_translation: Quite good and complete for children because there are rabbits, a castle, an outbound area, and they can learn about orchids. The access from the parking lot to the location is quite far, fortunately there is a shuttle.

text: Tempatnya luas enak, lebih banyak spot fotonya...pas kesitu masih ada pembangunan sepertinya belum selesai...mungkin buat jalan" santai lebih cocok dan yang jualan makanannya masih sedikit
english_translation: The place is spacious and nice, with more photo spots... when I went there, there seemed to be ongoing construction, not yet finished... maybe it's more suitable for a leisurely stroll, and the food vendors are still few.

text: Tempatnya cukup bagus mengusung tema hutan Pinus, ada area outbound, wisata flora, dan lainnya. Sayang pelayanan dari beberapa area kurang ramah, kesopanannya kurang. Tidak rekomendasi 👎 …
english_translation: The place is quite good, with a Pine Forest theme, an outbound area, flora tourism, and more. It's a shame the service in some areas was not friendly, lacking politeness. Not recommended 👎 …

text: Bagus tempatnya menarik terutama saat hari sedang cerah ditambah dengan langit yang berwarna biru terang. This is really a great place to visit so come and try the experience for yourself.
english_translation: The place is nice and attractive, especially on a bright day with a clear blue sky. This is really a great place to visit so come and try the experience for yourself.

text: Sebenarnya lokasi wisata alam yang disajikan sangat bagus, sayangnya kurang dikelola dengan baik sehingga tidak tersedia fasilitas yang baik untuk pengunjung dan banyak sampah dimana-mana.
english_translation: Actually, the natural tourist attractions presented are very good, unfortunately they are not managed well, so there are no good facilities for visitors and there is a lot of trash everywhere.

text: Tempatnya sangat luas bisa buat sekedar ngerefresh otak tw pikiran yg lg stress, tiket masuknya masih murah lg ...10-15 masih bisa dtuker ma air mineral, pemandangan nya masih sangat sejuk
english_translation: The place is very spacious, it can be used to simply refresh your brain or clear your mind when you're stressed. The entrance ticket is still cheap. You can still exchange 10-15 [currency units, likely thousands of Rupiah] for mineral water. The scenery is still very cool.

text:
Suasana sejuk
Banyak pilihan makanan
Tempat berfoto ria dengan ala korea/japan gtu
Ada kolam renang juga tp byr lagi loh
Tiket masuk cuman 20rb bisa di tuker dengan minuman
Ada kelinci
Dll
english_translation:
Cool atmosphere
Lots of food options
Photo spots with a Korean/Japanese vibe
There's also a swimming pool but it costs extra
Entrance ticket is only 20k, can be exchanged for a drink
There are rabbits
Etc.

text: Tempat nya sejuk banyak spot foto untuk yg hobby foto2.tempat menginap nya juga variatif.makanan lumayan.cuma tiket masuk sekarang gak bisa di tuker lagi sama cemilan atau tiket permainan.
english_translation: The place is cool, with many photo spots for those who enjoy taking pictures. The accommodation options are also varied. The food is decent. It's just that the entrance ticket can no longer be exchanged for snacks or game tickets.

text: Tempat buat Nyantai & kumpul yg Pas bareng temen & keluarga cuma d Angkringan Mas No,Bnyk aneka Ragam makanan yg murah meriah, menu paling Favorit aneka Sate²an, nasi kucing & Wedang jahe..
english_translation: The perfect place to relax and gather with friends and family is at Angkringan Mas No. Lots of various cheap and cheerful food options. The most favorite menus are various satays, nasi kucing, and ginger tea.

text: Menyenangkan mengunjungi kebun ini, berbagai macam bunga dan sayuran terdapat disini, kalian bebas berfoto Selfi dg background yg cantik. Hanya saja disini tdk boleh membawa kamera sendiri.
english_translation: It's enjoyable to visit this garden; a wide variety of flowers and vegetables are available here. You are free to take selfies with beautiful backgrounds. However, you are not allowed to bring your own camera here.

text: Tempatnya bagus indah penuh dengan berbagai macam dan warna warni bunga...ada taman pertanian juga, seru asyik buat wisata keluarga santai, tapi ramai pengunjung dari berbagai macam daerah.
english_translation: The place is beautiful, filled with various kinds and colorful flowers... there's also an agricultural garden, exciting and fun for a relaxing family vacation, but it's crowded with visitors from various regions.

text: Tempat yg wonderfull ketika trekking lewatin 5 bukit dgn jarak tempuh jalan kaki pp 7,2 km dari tempat prkiran motor. Oh iya harus pake pemandu jika belum k sini per org 25rb untun pemandu.
english_translation: A wonderful place when trekking past 5 hills with a round trip walking distance of 7.2 km from the motorcycle parking area. Oh yes, you must use a guide if you haven't been here before, 25,000 per person for the guide.

text:
Tempatnya luar biasa, awesome... hanya akses jalan dari jalan rayanya masih kurang mulus, hehe... mungkin k depannya jalannya bisa diaspal ya...#ngarep banget.
Pedagang disana ramah2...👍👍 …
english_translation:
The place is amazing, awesome... only the road access from the main road is still not smooth, hehe... maybe in the future the road can be paved, right... #reallyhoping.
The vendors there are very friendly... 👍👍

text: Bangak area spot untuk foto yang instagramable, agak sepi saat weekday, ada beberapa spot foto yang berbayar, banyak toko-toko souvenir.ga sempat lihat pasar apungnya.bisa naik perahu juga.
english_translation: Bangak area is a spot for Instagrammable photos, a bit quiet on weekdays, there are some paid photo spots, lots of souvenir shops. Didn't have time to see the floating market. You can also go on a boat ride.

text: Tempatnya sangat nyaman dan udaranya sejuk bangat... Hanya saung2 nya belum terlalu banyak. Mungkin area ini hanya untuk hiking. Semoga pengelola membuat tempat untuk duduk dan saung lah...
english_translation: The place is very comfortable and the air is very cool... It's just that there aren't too many gazebos yet. Perhaps this area is only for hiking. I hope the management creates places to sit and gazebos...

text: Tempat nya adem, sejuk, view nya juga bagus...nuansa Bali begitu kental...cocok untuk refreshing bersama teman dan keluarga...selain itu ada wahana lain seperti bersepeda, naik perahu dll..
english_translation: The place is cool, refreshing, and the view is also good... the Balinese nuance is so strong... suitable for refreshing with friends and family... besides that, there are other attractions like cycling, boating, etc.

text:
seru banget ke curug layung tapi jangan lupa kuat kan pondasi kalian yah karna sebelum nyampe kesana kalian haiking dulu setetes ,melewati kebun vinus dan banyak monyet 😊
#curuglayungjos🔥 …
english_translation:
So fun going to Curug Layung, but don't forget to strengthen your foundation because before you get there, you have to hike quite a bit, pass through a Venus garden, and see lots of monkeys 😊
#curuglayungjos🔥 …

text: Harga tiket terjangkau dengan fasilitas free minuman dan suttle car.. untuk semua spot foto ga usah bayar lagi kecuali jembatan ada tambahan bayar 15 rbu per orang nanti bisa dapat paspor..
english_translation: Affordable ticket prices with free drinks and shuttle car service.. for all photo spots, no extra charge, except for the bridge which has an additional charge of 15 thousand per person, then you can get a passport.

text: Biaya tiket 20rb perorang anak usia diatas 2 tahun dikenakan biaya tiket. Wisata nya hanya taman saja yang belum terlalu banyak 1spot foto. Ada fasilitas kereta dengan 1 putaran harga 15rb.
english_translation: The ticket price is 20,000 IDR per person. Children over 2 years old are charged a ticket fee. The attraction is only the park itself, which doesn't yet have many photo spots. There's a train facility for one round at a price of 15,000 IDR.

text: Ksini tuh mau nyoba rainbow Slade tapi kaki auto gemetar liat tangga naiknya dari besi baja gtu, lemes bgt guys , cobalah ganti tangganya ky yang disemarang lewat jalanan gtu trus Slade deh
english_translation: I came here wanting to try the rainbow slide but my legs automatically started shaking seeing the stairs to climb were made of steel, I'm so weak guys, try changing the stairs to be like the one in Semarang, going through the streets and then the slide

text:
Pemandangan yg sangat bagus.. utk harga tiket masuk terjangkau.. para pedagang pun jg membantu para pengunjung dlm hal mengambil photo tanpa tip..
Juga adany arena outbond yg bs digunakan..
english_translation:
Very nice view.. for an affordable entrance ticket price.. the vendors also help visitors by taking photos without tips..
Also there is an outbound arena that can be used..

text: Cukup mahal juga ticket masuknya... Rp. 30. 000/Orang, Rp. 14.500/ kendaraan roda dua + Parkir Rp. 2.000. lokasi parkir kendaraan roda dua. Diatas cukup curam juga. Meskipun jalan nya baik.
english_translation: The entrance ticket is quite expensive too... Rp. 30,000/person, Rp. 14,500/motorcycle + Parking Rp. 2,000. Motorcycle parking location. It's quite steep up there too. Even though the road is good.

text: Sunrise disini bagus bgt! Enaknya dateng pas masih gelap biar bisa menikmati sunrisenya. Karena klo agak siang udh panas. Bisa juga nge camp disini🙌 cocok untuk healing sekitaran bandung. …
english_translation: The sunrise here is really good! It's best to come when it's still dark so you can enjoy the sunrise. Because if it's a little later, it's already hot. You can also camp here 🙌 perfect for healing around Bandung. …

text: Grafika Semakin Berkembang, kantor nya sekarang sudah keren dan tata ruang serta keindahan nya semakin di percantik lebih ke kinian.. top deh pokoke buat liburan kesini udaranya juga dingin
english_translation: Graphics are increasingly developing, the office is now cool and the layout and beauty are increasingly beautified to be more contemporary.. top notch, really, for a vacation here, the air is also cold.

text: Cocok banget untuk liburan bersama klurga, sejuk pastinya, bnyak kuliner yg hrganya terjangkau. Pas kesini sih enaknya weekday ya biar ga terllu riweh..yg paling saya suka bersih banget 🥰 …
english_translation: Perfect for a family vacation, sure to be cool, lots of affordable culinary options. When visiting, it's best to come on weekdays so it's not too crowded. What I like most is how clean it is 🥰

text:
Keren
Taman Wisata Alam yang keren banget
WAJIB kesini ajakin anak2 krena ada Cerita Legendanya Sangkuriang
Jam 11 siang kabur masih turun
Jangan khawatir banyak yang jual makanan

PUAS lah
english_translation:
Awesome Nature Tourist Park
A MUST visit with the kids because of the Sangkuriang Legend story
It was still raining at 11 am
Don't worry, there are many food vendors

VERY SATISFIED

text: Murah, Bersih, banyak spot tempat buat foto dan main, bawa anak keluarga sahabat cocok banget kesini mah. Jangan lupa bawa baju ganti dan alat mandi kalo mau nyebur, Alamnya masih asri geng
english_translation: Cheap, clean, lots of photo spots and places to play, it's very suitable for bringing kids, family, and friends here. Don't forget to bring a change of clothes and toiletries if you want to take a dip, the nature is still pristine, guys.

text: good luck banget buat hiking, jalur jalannya lumayan, di beberapa titik banyak kamar mandi yang memudahkan untuk buang air besar. saran kalau mau lebih privasi jangan datang di akhir pekan
english_translation: Good luck with your hike, the trail is decent, with plenty of restrooms at various points which makes it convenient for a bowel movement. My suggestion for more privacy is to avoid coming on the weekends.

text: Gak cocok buat personal/couple. Harus acara family/kampus/komunitas. Flying Fox nya jauh banget, tinggi tapi bawahnya tidak terkesan menakutkan. Jadi B aja. Harus nya bawahnya api neraka👌 …
english_translation: Not suitable for personal/couple use. Must be for family/campus/community events. The Flying Fox is very far, high, but the bottom doesn't seem scary. So it's just okay. It should have hellfire below👌

text: Luar biasa bagus sekali pemandangan dan spot foto, ada live music juga, ada jual makanan, biaya masuk 50k dapat minuman kyk jus, untuk masuk jembatan bayar 15k lagi, klo hujan tidak buka...
english_translation: Absolutely beautiful view and photo spots, there's also live music, they sell food, the entrance fee is 50k and includes a drink like juice, to enter the bridge it's another 15k, if it rains they don't open...

text:
Hati2 sama restoran nya. Harga makanan mahal tapi tidak layak dimakan. Banyak lalat beterbangan juga. Sebaiknya makan dahulu sebelum ke tempat ini.
Trauma liburan ke Bandung banyak mafia nya
english_translation: Be careful with the restaurant. The food is expensive but not worth eating. There are also many flies flying around. It's better to eat before going to this place. Traumatized by my holiday in Bandung, there are many mafias.

text:
Wisata Gunung Tangkuban Parahu
Wisata kawah gunung berapi aktif yang bisa dikunjungi di wilayah Lembang.
Suasana sejuk, dingin khas pegunungan.
Terkadang tercium bau belerang yang menyengat.
english_translation:
Tangkuban Perahu Mountain Tourism
A tourist destination to an active volcanic crater located in the Lembang region.
Cool, chilly mountainous atmosphere.
Sometimes a pungent smell of sulfur can be detected.

text: Subahanallah, bisa lihat kawah gunung aktif beneran, ada Mesjid nya, bangunan kontruksi beton berada di pinggiran kawah tapi ga ambruk, parkiran ribuan kendaraan, Semua karena Kuasa Allah...
english_translation: Subhanallah, to be able to see a real active volcano crater, there's a mosque, concrete structures are on the edge of the crater but haven't collapsed, parking for thousands of vehicles. All because of God's power...

text: Yg suka camping camping ceria tempat ini cocok banget, buat acara semacam makrab juga enak. Banyak tanah lapang rata ditengah2 hutan pinus. Kalo kesini jangan lupa tetep jaga kebersihan 🙏🏼 …
english_translation: This place is perfect for those who enjoy fun camping trips, and it's also great for events like orientation camps. There are many flat, open fields in the middle of the pine forest. If you come here, please don't forget to maintain cleanliness 🙏🏼 …

text: Disarankan kalo kesini jgn bawa2 makanan, banyak monyetnya, tp tak usah khawatir ada bapak pawangnya yg setia bantu ngusir monyet plus fotoin kita d spot2 foto yg akan terlihat agak xtrim...
english_translation: It's recommended not to bring food here because there are many monkeys, but don't worry, there's a keeper who will faithfully help scare away the monkeys and also take photos of us at photo spots that will look a bit extreme...

text: Untuk pertama visit lumayan menarik dengan di sajikan suasana yg sejuk lembang.. namun untuk tiap wahana harus ada tiket masuk yg harganya cukup lumayan. Tidak di sarankan di saat low buget.
english_translation: For a first visit, it's quite interesting with the cool Lembang atmosphere. However, each attraction requires a ticket with a fairly decent price. Not recommended for those on a low budget.

text: Lokasi di pusat kota Lembang, biaya tiket masuk 35.000 dengan welcome drink Nescafe hangat dan nestea dingin. Setiap wahana siapkan tiket masuk terpisah. Untuk perahu berkisar 20.000-25.000.
english_translation: Location in Lembang city center, entrance fee is 35,000 with a free Nescafe hot and Nestea cold welcome drink. Each ride requires a separate entrance ticket. Boats range from 20,000-25,000.

text: Situs purbakala batuan karang didasar laut jutaan tahun yang lalu menghasilkan taman bebatuan dipuncak gunung masigit Bandung Barat..Luar biasa indahnya. Maha Besar Allah yg menciptakannya..
english_translation: A coral rock archaeological site at the bottom of the sea millions of years ago created a rock garden on top of Mount Masigit in West Bandung. It is extraordinarily beautiful. Great is Allah who created it.

text: Tempat outbond yg seru dengan pemandangan yg oke dan udara sejuk.  Dr segi harga jg tidak mahal. Kalau dr arah jkt lebih baik ambil jalan dr subang karena macet bgt kl dari arah bandung kota
english_translation: A fun outbound place with great views and cool air. The price is also not expensive. If coming from Jakarta, it's better to take the road from Subang because it's very congested if coming from Bandung city.

text: Tempat nya asyik. Lebih baik datang pagi karena udaranya masih sejuk dan klu beruntung bisa liat matahari terbit. Tiket masuk 20 rb, sudah banyak spot buat selfy. Rekomen banget buat piknik.
english_translation: The place is nice. It's better to come in the morning because the air is still cool and if you're lucky, you can see the sunrise. The entrance fee is 20 thousand rupiah, and there are already many selfie spots. Highly recommended for picnics.

text: Disini banyak berbagai bunga2 warna warni... masuk ya murah banget. Dipinjemin topi juga disana biar foto2 jadi lebih bagus .. dan disana ada juga yang jual tanaman gitu untuk buah tangan....
english_translation: Here there are many various colorful flowers... enter, it's very cheap. They also lend you a hat there so your photos turn out better... and there's also someone selling plants there as souvenirs.

text:
Pertama kali kesini.. jalannya luar biasa 🤣bisa bikin langsing.. pas sampe bawah beuh luar biasa 😍 tiket masuk 20 ribu per orang plus parkir 3000 ribu
Pas kesana ga ada monyet yang ganggu.. …
english_translation:
First time here.. the road was amazing 🤣 it could make you lose weight.. when I got to the bottom, wow, amazing 😍 entrance ticket is 20 thousand per person plus parking 3000 thousand
When I went there, there were no monkeys bothering...

text: Pemandangan yang menyegarkan, pemandangan dan alam yang semuanya bagus. Tapi agak sulit untuk sampai ke sana jika Anda menggunakan transportasi online seperti grabbike/mobil dan gobike/mobil
english_translation: Refreshing scenery, views, and nature, all great. But it's a bit difficult to get there if you use online transportation like grabbike/car and gobike/car.

text: Tempat sempurna yang Anda cari untuk pendakian singkat, pemandangan indah dengan beberapa air terjun. Anda juga dapat membangun kemah di lokasi perkemahan. Harga tiketnya 15.000 per orang.
english_translation: The perfect place you're looking for for a short hike, beautiful scenery with several waterfalls. You can also set up camp at the campsite. The ticket price is 15,000 per person.

text: Bagus tempatnya cocok sih buat tempat selfie atau foto2 keluarga, klo pake foto hape gak ada tmabahan biaya tapi klo bawa kamera sendiri nambah 50rb, datengnya pagi2 aja biar gak terlalu rame
english_translation: The place is good, suitable for selfies or family photos. There's no extra charge if you use your phone camera, but if you bring your own camera, it's an additional 50,000 IDR. Come early in the morning so it's not too crowded.

text: Kembang nya bagus2 beli sayuran juga murah harganya, saran saya kalau mampir beli sayuran nya juga yaa tanya sama abang yg jaga manfaat sayuran yg ada di sana untuk apa saja nanti di jelaskan
english_translation: The flowers are very nice, and the vegetables are also cheap. My suggestion is, if you stop by, buy some vegetables too. Ask the person guarding there about the benefits of the vegetables they have, and they will explain them to you.

text: Saya baru pertama kali kesini mungkin udah kapok ga bakalan kesini lagi udah tiket masuknya mahal 50 rb tiap view berbayar akses jalan masuknya rusak banyak yg berlubang ga rekomendasi banget
english_translation: This is my first time here, I might be done and won't come back again. The entrance ticket is expensive at 50 thousand, every view costs money, the access road is damaged with many potholes, I really don't recommend it.

text: Kebun Bunga begonia paling pas buat foto2 Krn byk tempat yg bagus buat di upload di Instagram. Warna bunganya juga cerah2. HTM nya 20rb. Kalau kesini dari Lembang cari angkot yg arah Maribaya
english_translation: The Begonia Flower Garden is perfect for taking photos because there are many good spots to upload on Instagram. The flower colors are also bright. The entrance fee is 20,000. If you're coming here from Lembang, look for a public minivan (angkot) going towards Maribaya.

text: Udaranya segar, ada tempat outbond dan flying fox, tempat camping dan toilet yang bersih, namun jika ingin menikmati air terjun jangan datang pada saat musim kemarau karena debit airnya kecil
english_translation: The air is fresh, there are outbound and flying fox facilities, a campsite, and clean toilets, however, if you want to enjoy the waterfall, don't come during the dry season because the water flow is small.

text: Parkirnya luas, tempatnya bersih, toiletnya juga bersih. Lebih enak lagi kalau datang ketika baru buka karena bisa berfoto-foto di berbagai tempat tanpa harus antri atau terganggu orang lain.
english_translation: The parking is spacious, the place is clean, and the toilets are also clean. It's even better if you come when it just opens because you can take photos in various places without having to queue or be disturbed by other people.

text: Bersepeda dari bandung melalui jalan nasional, harus hati-hati karena banyak kendaraan besar, perjalanan yang melelahkan pada akhirnya sampai di Sanghyang Kenit tempat wisata alami yang sejuk
english_translation: Cycling from Bandung via the national road, you must be careful because there are many large vehicles. It was an exhausting journey but eventually arrived at Sanghyang Kenit, a cool natural tourist destination.

text: Tempatnya sejuk dan anginnya juga kenceng jadi enak buat nyegerin otak kalo lagi stres, parkiran luas dan banyak juga tukang jajan dan tukang makanan, untuk harga standar untuk tempat wisata.
english_translation: The place is cool and the wind is strong, so it's good for refreshing your mind when stressed. The parking lot is spacious and there are also many snack and food vendors. The prices are standard for a tourist spot.

text: Tempat nya gak begitu cape nanjak. Cocok bagi yang pemula. Di tambah susana malah mari yang bagus bisa melihat kota bandung. Jangan lupa menggunakan jaket tebal ketika akan berkunjung kesini.
english_translation: The place isn't too strenuous to climb. It's suitable for beginners. Plus, the nice atmosphere here allows you to see Bandung city. Don't forget to wear a thick jacket when you visit here.

text: tempat wisata yang ada di bandung, nyaman, masih alami, pemandangan bagus kalau tidak ada kabut, juga menerapkan protok kesehatan, biaya masuk juga masih terjangkau, tempat berfoto juga bagus
english_translation: tourist attractions in Bandung, comfortable, still natural, good views if there is no fog, also implements health protocols, entrance fees are still affordable, photo spots are also good

text: Air terjun pelangi ini merupakan air terjun terindah di bandung. Bagus banget dan masih asri. Kalo beruntung bakalan ketemu kawanan monyet. Tapi peer bgt sih turun tangga apalagi pas naiknya.
english_translation: This rainbow waterfall is the most beautiful waterfall in Bandung. It's really nice and still pristine. If you're lucky, you'll encounter a troop of monkeys. But descending the stairs is quite a challenge, especially on the way back up.

text: Sunset is great, tapi harus bayar lebih lagi kalau mau disana lebih dari jam 18.00 karena penjaganya kurang ramah, akses jalan kesana juga sudah lumayan baik. Rekomended buat sunset pokoknya.
english_translation: The sunset is great, but you have to pay more if you want to stay there after 6:00 PM because the staff are not very friendly. The access road to get there is already quite good. Definitely recommended for the sunset.

text: Track kepuncaknya lumayan, apalagi sambil gendong sepeda hehe. Tp pas nyampe atas, Subhanalloh bagus banget pemandanganya....banyak spot2 keren buat selfie/wefie, htm 8rb/org, sepeda free....
english_translation: The track to the peak was quite good, especially carrying the bike hehe. But when we reached the top, Subhanallah, the view was very beautiful....lots of cool spots for selfies/wefies, entrance fee is 8 thousand rupiah/person, bike is free....

text:
Yg gak berubah :
+ Tetap nyaman untuk cari suasana alam. Udara sejuk. Tracking di kebun teh.
- jalan masuk sampai parkiran yg msh rusak.
Yg berubah :
- wahana tdk beroperasi. Flying fox, dll.
english_translation:
What hasn't changed:
+ Still comfortable for finding nature. Cool air. Tracking in the tea garden.
- The road leading to the parking lot is still damaged.
What has changed:
- Rides are not operating. Flying fox, etc.

text: Pemandangan nya luar biasa...udara nya rejuk dan segar bangeeet...bisa detok paru2 jg...tiket masuk nya murah...pokok nya top banget tuk nenangin pikiran..cuma tempat nya aja yg lumayan jauuh
english_translation: The view is amazing... the air is really cool and fresh... it can also detox your lungs... the entrance ticket is cheap... basically, it's great for calming your mind.. it's just that the place is quite far away.

text: Tempatnya sangat luas, cocok untuk rekreasi dan belajar tentang ilmu geologi. Tempat parkir luas dan ada uang masuk, lupa berapa tapi ga terlalu mahal. Banyak spot2 foto bagus dan tempat makan
english_translation: The place is very spacious, suitable for recreation and learning about geology. The parking lot is spacious and there is an entrance fee, I forgot how much but it's not too expensive. Lots of good photo spots and places to eat.

text: Tempatnya kurang terawat ya.mungkin perlu diperbaiki lagi kaya tempat istirahatnya,buat yang jalan menuju curug karena lumyan jauh.medannya cocok buat yang suka bertualang cari oksigen bersih.
english_translation: The place is not well maintained. Perhaps it needs to be improved again, like the resting area and the path leading to the waterfall because it's quite far. The terrain is suitable for those who enjoy adventure and seeking fresh oxygen.

text:
Mantap pisan, dr segi pelayanan jg puas bgt
Harga tiket masuk lumayan murah cuma makananya yg menurut saya over price, contohnya teh poci yg biasa 5k jd 10k tp its oke karena ini tempat wisata
english_translation: Awesome, very satisfied with the service too. The entrance ticket price is quite cheap, it's just the food that I think is overpriced, for example, a regular Poci tea that's usually 5k is 10k, but it's okay because this is a tourist spot.

text:
Enak Sejuk asri cuma yg punya penyakit asma atau Kaki lebih baik jangan kesini soalnya harus naik turun banyak tangga..
Tolong buat pengunjung kebersihan di jaga buanglah sampah pada tempatnya
english_translation:
Pleasant, cool, and beautiful, but those with asthma or leg problems should probably not come here because there are many stairs to go up and down.
Please visitors, maintain cleanliness and throw trash in its place.

text: Tempat yg bagus, ada toilet dan kantin di area bawah. Suka ada gerombolan monyet, tapi baik2 kok monyetnya🙈. Sayang di beberapa spot banyak sampah pengunjung yg dibuang tidak pada tempatnya. …
english_translation: A good place, there are toilets and a canteen on the lower level. I like that there are groups of monkeys, but the monkeys are nice 🙈. It's a shame that in some spots there is a lot of visitor trash that is not disposed of properly. ...

text:
Destinasi wisata yg punya potensi untuk berkembang dan jadi idola.
Taman2 yg tersedia sudah cukup memanjakan mata.
Satu hal yg sangat saya suka adalah arca2 satria amartha...  keren luar biasa
english_translation:
A tourist destination with the potential to grow and become a favorite.
The gardens available are already quite pleasing to the eye.
One thing I really like is the Satria Amartha statues... incredibly cool.

text:
Kesana Hari jumat sore pas lagi hujan, jadinya berkabut + dingin bgt... Wood bridgenya bagus, jam 4 udah nyala lampunya.

Sepi karna emang jumat + hujan juga, bagus dapet view hutan pas hujan.
english_translation:
Went there Friday afternoon when it was raining, so it was foggy + very cold... The wooden bridge was nice, the lights were on at 4 o'clock.

It was quiet because it was Friday + raining, it was nice to get a forest view in the rain.

text: taman yang tidak terlalu luas namun indah...terletak dekat dengan sespim Polri yaitu jalan maribaya no 120 ..tiket masuk sebesar 15.000 . bagi yang akan memakai topi disediakan secara gratis..
english_translation: A garden that is not too spacious but beautiful... located close to Sespim Polri, on Jalan Maribaya no 120. The entrance fee is 15,000. For those who will be wearing hats, they are provided for free.

text:
Pada tahun 2018 harga tiket mulai dari 17.500/orang
Dan kayu bakar 15.000 /iket
Dari ketinggian bisa melihat kota bandung
Disaat malam maupun siaang
Yg punya motor trail bawa ajh bisa lewat ko
english_translation:
In 2018, ticket prices started from 17,500/person
And firewood 15,000/bundle
From the height, you can see Bandung city
Day or night
If you have a dirt bike, bring it along, you can pass through

text: Luar biasa asri masih terjaga dan belum terjamah banyak manusia. Masuk pun murah. Tapi jalanan menuju kesana nya yang muantap wkwkw pokonya best sih gak ngecewain untuk yang suka petualangan 💚
english_translation: Extraordinarily beautiful, still preserved and untouched by many humans. Entrance is also cheap. But the road to get there is amazing lol, it's definitely the best and not disappointing for those who like adventure 💚

text: SANGAT SANGAT PUAS, PEMANDANGANNYA BAGUS2, MAKANANNYA ENAK(cuma agak mahal hehe). Toiletnya bersih. Harga Tiket 50RB/ORANG. Baru buka 3 bulan jadi masih bersih dan bangunannya masih pada bagus
english_translation: VERY VERY SATISFIED, THE VIEWS ARE BEAUTIFUL, THE FOOD IS DELICIOUS (just a bit expensive hehe). The toilets are clean. Ticket price 50RB/PERSON. It just opened 3 months ago so it's still clean and the buildings are still in good condition.

text: Tempat yang cocok bagi para hiker dan camper. Tidak terlalu tinggi, sehingga  mereka yang tidak terlalu suka hiking tetap dapat menikmati pemandangan yang indah. Recommended for sunrise watch.
english_translation: A suitable place for hikers and campers. Not too high, so those who don't enjoy hiking too much can still enjoy the beautiful scenery. Recommended for sunrise watching.

text: Worth it banget healing ke sini... nyampe jam 4 pagi dan cuaca lagi dingin dinginnya karena lagi hujan 😌.  Seneng bgt. Buat ngecamp juga asyik bgt cuma kalo yang gakuat dingin ga disaranin 😬 …
english_translation: Totally worth it to heal here... arrived at 4 AM and the weather was freezing cold because it was raining 😌. So happy. It's also really fun for camping, just not recommended for those who can't handle the cold 😬 …

text: Sudah rapih dan lebih bagus dari sebelumnya,  namun pengelolaan sampah dan parkir harus lebih diperhatikan.  Akses jalan cukup sempit,  jadi harus hati2 krn banyak rombongan memakai Bus besar.
english_translation: It's tidy and better than before, but waste management and parking need more attention. The road access is quite narrow, so you have to be careful because many groups use large buses.

text: Curug layung tempat ya bersih sejuk banyak hutan pinus Ada camping ground fasilitas ada toilet bersih banyak warung di sekitar loket masuk juga di curug, kekurangannya Jalan menuju loket rusak
english_translation: Curug Layung is a clean, cool place with many pine forests. There is a campsite with clean toilet facilities and many warungs (small stalls) around. The entrance ticket is also at the waterfall. The downside is that the road leading to the entrance is damaged.

text: Saat datang kemarin kondisi lagi lumayan dingin, agak berkabut, pemandangan alam yang indah, sepanjang jalan banyak jualan baju2, tas2 rajut dengan harga yang termasuk ramah untuk tempat wisata
english_translation: When I arrived yesterday, the condition was quite cold, a bit foggy, the natural scenery was beautiful, and along the way, there were many shops selling clothes and knitted bags at prices that were quite friendly for a tourist spot.

text: Mantab tempatnya bersih.tiket masuk 30000 kalo mau paket plus kota mini , harga tiket jadi 40000... Setiap wahana didalam rata2 20-25 ribu... Khusus untuk rainbow slide 40000 dewasa anak2 15000
english_translation: Great place, it's clean. Entrance ticket is 30,000. If you want the city mini plus package, the ticket price becomes 40,000... Each ride inside costs around 20,000-25,000... Specifically for the rainbow slide, it's 40,000 for adults and 15,000 for children.

text:
nyaman dan ramai jika berkunjung saat weekend, tapi tempatnya sangat pas jika datang lg turun kabut tuh, adeem
overall ane enjoy sih, tapi ga tau pas lg terik ya hehe..
sekian dan terima kasih.
english_translation:
Comfortable and crowded if you visit on the weekend, but the place is perfect if you come when it's foggy, it's cool.
Overall I enjoyed it, but I don't know about when it's hot, hehe..
That's all, thank you.

text: Tempat nya nyaman banget bagus... Tidak bingung... Fasilitasnya juga bagus... Siap siap kedinginan kalau malam... Masih ada lingkungan hutan nya.. Penerangan kurang tp masih terlihat jalan nya.
english_translation: The place is very comfortable and nice... Not confusing... The facilities are also good... Be prepared to be cold at night... There's still a forest environment.. Lighting is insufficient but the path is still visible.

text: Tempat wisata dalam kota Lembang bagus bersih nyaman ada pool jg tempat kuliner banyak makanan tradisonal sunda ada date kelinci pula wahana air jg ada buat anak2 pokoknya ok la buat keluarga..
english_translation: The tourist spot in Lembang city is good, clean, comfortable, and has a pool. There are many culinary spots with traditional Sundanese food, and a rabbit petting zoo. There are also water attractions for children. Overall, it's great for families.

text: Salah satu destinasi kuliner dengan nuansa danau .pedagang floating diatas air ..kalo pembelinya sih tetap di darat hehe ..any way lumayan lah menjadi satu tempat yang menyajikan wahana berbeda
english_translation: One of the culinary destinations with a lake nuance. Traders float on the water.. but the buyers stay on land, hehe.. Anyway, it's quite good as a place that offers a different attraction.

text:
Tempat yang cukup nyaman untuk melepas penat.
Biasa saja. Cenderung kotor. Disarankan untuk masuk lewat CIC.
Pastikan kendaraan dalam kondisi prima untuk menuju lokasi ini. Tanjakannya lumayan.
english_translation:
A sufficiently comfortable place to relax.
Average. Tends to be dirty. Recommended to enter via CIC.
Ensure your vehicle is in excellent condition to reach this location. The incline is quite steep.

text: Tempat nya keren abis, walaupun lumayan jauh dari tempat parkir tapi udah sampe cape langsung ilang,cuma hati" kalo ujan jalan nya jadi licin banget sama suka ada air deres dari atas ke bawah..
