english_translation: The place is super cool, even though it's quite a walk from the parking lot, the tiredness disappears as soon as you arrive. Just be careful when it rains because the path gets very slippery and there's often a strong flow of water from top to bottom.

text: Tempat yang bagus dikunjungi saat pagi sampai sore karena views nya dapet, kalo dah malem views nya kurang. Bagian yang menantang di jembatan merah. Dan jalan keliling dunia hanya sehari. Gokil
english_translation: A great place to visit from morning to afternoon because you get good views, but the views are less at night. The challenging part is the red bridge. And traveling around the world in just a day. Crazy!

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata, lebih baik bawa kendaraan sendiri karena dari pos tiket tidak ada kendaraan ada kendaraan ontang anting mahal tiket masuk perguruan orang 30rb mobil 35rb parkir 5eb
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations, it's better to bring your own vehicle because from the ticket post there are no vehicles, there are expensive shuttle vehicles, the entrance ticket for people is 30,000, cars are 35,000, parking is 5,000.

text:
ternyata bagusss, padahal rumah di subang. dan setelah lebih dri 20 tahun baru kesini ngoahahahah.

tips, beli jasuke enak bgt pas di makan saat cuaca dingin, karna waktu itu berkabut dan hujan
english_translation:
It turned out to be great, even though home is in Subang. And after more than 20 years, I'm finally here, ngoahahahah.

Tip: Buy jasuke (corn cheese snack). It's really delicious when eaten in cold weather, because at that time it was foggy and raining.

text:
Tempatnya seru, ada jembatan gantung, kastil, dan tempat iconic lainnya
Banyak spot foto yang oke..

Sayang tiket terusannya lumayan mahal.. Kalo yang bareng keluarga besar agak menguras dompet
english_translation:
The place is fun, there's a suspension bridge, a castle, and other iconic spots.
Lots of great photo spots.

It's a shame the entrance fee is quite expensive. If you're coming with a big family, it can be a drain on the wallet.

text: tempat wisata yg rekomendit deh, buat yang punya waktu sabtu dan minggu libur cukup ko liburan disini, resto nya makannya enak enak, permainannya untuk menguji adrenalin sangat sangat menantang
english_translation: A recommended tourist spot, if you have Saturday and Sunday off, it's enough for a vacation here. The restaurant's food is delicious, and the games for testing adrenaline are very, very challenging.

text: pertama kali kesini bareng stranger, mantap tempatnya buat ngobrol santai, kalo agak gerah bisa langsung ngojai, wkwk untuk harga sih worth it lah, waktu itu masuk 23.000 (udah include parkir).
english_translation: First time here with a stranger, the place is great for a relaxed chat, if it's a bit hot you can immediately swim, lol for the price, it's worth it, back then it was 23,000 (including parking).

text: Tempat main dikala waktu kecil, hiking dan setelahnya botram bareng keluarga. Tolong dijaga alamnya buat para pengunjung, terutama jangan buang sampah sembarangan, bawa turun kembali sampahnya.
english_translation: A place to play when I was little, hiking and after that a picnic with family. Please take care of nature for visitors, especially don't litter, take your trash back down with you.

text: Tempatnya bersih, kamar mandi juga ada, ada tempat jual makan juga. Waktu kmarin aaku kesana perorang bayar 25 rb dapet free minum 1. Pas ajak liburan keluarga kesini. Ada sewa sepeda air juga.
english_translation: The place is clean, there's also a bathroom, and a place to buy food. Last time I went, it was Rp 25k per person and included one free drink. It's a good place for a family holiday. There's also paddle boat rental.

text: Bumi perkemahan yang emang bener bener gak nyesel bayar 22.000 juga karena ada nya kamar mandi , mushola , lampu penerangan dan tentu nya view kaya di puncak gunung tapi gak harus naik gunung .
english_translation: A campsite that I genuinely have no regrets paying 22,000 for, because it has a bathroom, a prayer room, lighting, and of course, a view like from a mountaintop, but without having to climb a mountain.

text: Tempat menginap yang paling pas untuk yang mau tidur dengan  nuansa hutan. Kamar tipe studio. Suhu malam sampai 16 derajat. Sarapan sekelas hotel berbintang dan enak. Petugas ramah. Keamanan OK
english_translation: The most suitable place to stay for those who want to sleep amidst a forest ambiance. Studio-type rooms. Nighttime temperatures reach 16 degrees. Breakfast is like a star-rated hotel and delicious. Staff are friendly. Security is OK.

text: Tempat wisata alam cocok buat keluarga dan para petualang.  Suasana hijau sejuk dan segar dgn panorama yg indah.  Fasilitas minim, bnyk sampah yg  jorok dan jalur treking bnyk terhalang pipa air
english_translation: An ideal tourist spot for families and adventurers. A cool, fresh green atmosphere with beautiful panoramas. Minimal facilities, lots of dirty trash, and the trekking paths are heavily obstructed by water pipes.

text:
Tiket masuk 30k .. setiap permainan atau wahana mulai 25k s/d 50k.
Untuk makanan mulai dari 15k s/d 25k.
Tempatnya luas dan juga indah..
Banyak spot2 menarik disana cocok untuk wisata kluarga...
english_translation:
Entrance ticket 30k.. each game or ride starts from 25k to 50k.
Food starts from 15k to 25k.
The place is spacious and also beautiful..
Many interesting spots there, suitable for family tours...

text: HTM 30 RB nanti dapat ditukerkan dengan Kopi/Milo Panas, Pasar Apung dan dapat belanja makanan jadi dengan Sistim Koin, Harga masih terjangkau, Dapat juga menikmati Wahana air seperti Perahu dll
english_translation: HTM 30 RB can be exchanged for Hot Coffee/Milo, the Floating Market, and you can buy ready-to-eat food using the Coin System. Prices are still affordable. You can also enjoy water attractions like Boats, etc.

text:
Tempat yang sangat indah
Udara yang sejuk dan dingin
Tiket masuk Rp 50.000/org
Membawa kamera SLR dikenakan cas Rp 25.000 - Rp 50.000/ kamera.
Ini saya menggunakan Kamera Handphone Xiaomi Mi A1.
english_translation:
A very beautiful place
The air is cool and cold
Entrance ticket Rp 50,000/person
Carrying an SLR camera incurs a charge of Rp 25,000 - Rp 50,000/camera.
I used my Xiaomi Mi A1 Handphone Camera.

text: jangan kesini musim ujan nerbener airnya kotor hehe terus bawa pelampung deh kalo gabisa renang wkwk kalo sewa byrnya 15k, tiket masuk juga 15k dan jalannya licin kalo ujan, agak jauh gt soalnya
english_translation: Don't come here during the rainy season, the water is dirty hehe, and bring a life vest if you can't swim wkwk, renting one costs 15k, the entrance ticket is also 15k, and the path is slippery when it rains, it's a bit far too.

text: HTM 15K. Parkir 2k. terawat, bagus, ga jauh kok jalannya dari pintu masuk. jalan masuk dr CIC berbatu parah nanjak, diminta uang perbaikan jalan di tengah jalan, tp ada karcisnya jadi resmi (2k)
english_translation: HTM 15K. Parking 2k. Well-maintained, good, the road isn't far from the entrance. The access road from CIC is very rocky and uphill, they asked for road repair money halfway, but there's a ticket so it's official (2k)

text: Taman bunga  yang tidak begitu luas namun cukup menarik untuk dikunjungi, yg menarik ada pohon pisang berdaun talas nggak tahu merupakan hasil rakayasa atau memang ada jenis talas yg seperti itu
english_translation: A not-so-spacious but interesting enough flower garden to visit. What's interesting is the banana tree with taro-like leaves. I don't know if it's a result of genetic engineering or if there's actually a type of taro that looks like that.

text: Taman hiburan baru di Area Punclut. Ada beberapa restoran yang bisa Anda pilih. Setiap restoran memiliki konsep yang berbeda. Seperti Cakrawala, Dago Bakery, Lereng Anteng, Tafso dan Boda Barn.
english_translation: New amusement park in the Punclut Area. There are several restaurants to choose from. Each restaurant has a different concept. Such as Cakrawala, Dago Bakery, Lereng Anteng, Tafso, and Boda Barn.

text: Tempatnya lumayan bagus untuk yang suka foto2, lebih cocok untuk lansia karena tempatnya tidak terlalu luas. Bunga begonianya bisa dimakan dan ada beberapa jenis bunga yang bisa dijadikan teh jg
english_translation: The place is quite good for those who like taking photos, and more suitable for the elderly because the area is not too large. The begonia flowers are edible, and there are several types of flowers that can also be made into tea.

text: Buat yg ma ke SANGHYANG HELEEUT, harus pas musim kemarau, jangan pas musim hujan, karena kalau musim hujan, airnya pasti keruh. Dan siapkan mental fisik, karena perjalanan menuju lokasi -+ 1 jam
english_translation: For those who want to go to SANGHYANG HELEEUT, it must be during the dry season, not the rainy season, because if it's the rainy season, the water will definitely be murky. And prepare mentally and physically, because the journey to the location is about 1 hour.

text:
Good place, ada bukit2 spot buat foto, bisa naik bebek2 di danau, bisa keliling lokasi ini pake kereta api, bisa keliling naik sepeda juga (rental)..

Bagus banget untuk jalan2 bareng keluarga..
english_translation:
Good place, there are hills with photo spots, you can ride paddle boats on the lake, you can go around the location by train, you can also go around by bicycle (rental)..

Great for a family outing..

text: Tempatnya luas, bergaya nuansa bali, bisa naik kereta untuk berkeliling, sewa sepedah dan becak untuk anak2, cocok untuk anak2 bemain, dan foto2, harga tiket masuk 15k /org, dan parkir mobil 5k.
english_translation: The place is spacious, Bali-themed, you can ride a train to get around, rent bicycles and pedicabs for children, suitable for children to play and take photos, entrance ticket price 15k/person, and car parking 5k.

text: Wuih mantap pisan pokonya buat nyantai sambil ngopi ,makanan juga ada sembari nikmati udara yg sejuk dan di kelilingi tanaman MIYANA...buat photo photo n Selfi mantap pisan serasa dimana gitu...
english_translation: Wow, it's really great for relaxing while having coffee. There's also food available while enjoying the cool air and surrounded by MIYANA plants... great for taking photos and selfies, it feels like you're somewhere special...

text: Katanya tutup jam 8 malam, tapi saya sampai disini pas maghrib di dalam ternyata sudah pada tutup, suasananya di dalam gelap, bayar masuk per orang 25k, dan tiap wahana ada tempat loket bayarnya
english_translation: They said they close at 8 PM, but I arrived here during maghrib prayer time and found everything already closed inside. The atmosphere inside was dark. The entrance fee is 25k per person, and each ride has its own ticket counter.

text: Jangan lewatkan kalau lagi ke Bandung mampir ke Sarae hills, nyaman enak buat selfy, makan banyak jangan takut, harga tiket terjangkau, jembatannya itu lho bikin goyang kepala hehehe pusing juga
english_translation: Don't miss Sarae Hills if you're going to Bandung. It's comfortable and great for selfies. Don't be afraid to eat a lot, the ticket price is affordable. That bridge, wow, it makes your head spin, hehehe, and it's dizzying too.

text: Perkebunan Teh milik PTPN dan hutan milik Perhutani, jalur lintas Landy atau offroad land cruiser, masuk lembang keluar dari orchid cikole , Makan diwarung Mang kumis dengan menu sunda, Nikmat😍 …
english_translation: Tea plantations belonging to PTPN and forests belonging to Perhutani, Landy or offroad Land Cruiser routes, enter Lembang and exit Cikole Orchid, eat at Mang Kumis's stall with Sundanese menu, Delicious😍 …

text: berlokasi di cikole, sekitar 20 menit dari lembang. jalan ke lokasi cikole masih tanah bebatuan. tiket masuk 30000/orang akan tetapi akan dibalas dengan indahnya kawasan orchid forest cikole tsb.
english_translation: Located in Cikole, about 20 minutes from Lembang. The road to the Cikole location is still rocky and unpaved. The entrance fee is 30,000 per person, but it will be rewarded with the beauty of the Orchid Forest Cikole area.

text: Masuk mobil 25rb, orang lupaa.., strawberry 10rb, blueberry 10rb, suasana pastinya dingin, jam 17:00 diusir sudahan, ada pedagang tasbih yg baik ramah.bantu potoin & ceritain story Gn Tang.perahu
english_translation: Car entry 25k, people forget.., strawberry 10k, blueberry 10k, the atmosphere is definitely cold, kicked out at 5 PM, there's a kind and friendly tasbih seller who helped take photos & tell the story of Mount Tang. Boat.

text: Harga relatif agak terlalu mahal dengan tambahan ekstra charge utk akses jembatan - meskipun dapat free drink dan akses gratis shuttle. Spot foto masih tidak terlalu banyak, namun cukup menghibur
english_translation: The relative price is a bit too expensive with an extra charge for bridge access - although you get a free drink and free shuttle access. The photo spots are still not too many, but quite entertaining.

text: Setelah 24 tahun hidup baru kesini. Kek masyaallah banget gitu liatnyaaa . Cuma sedihnya agak terganggu sama tukang dagangnya, terkesan agak maksa 😔 yaa tapi namanya juga cari uang kaliyaa hehe …
english_translation: After 24 years of life, I'm finally here. It's truly breathtaking, wow. The only downside is that I was a bit bothered by the vendors, they seemed a bit pushy 😔 but then again, they're just trying to make a living, right hehe...

text: Waktu tahun 2015 kesana masih rame ya, tahun 2021 balik kesana sepi, yang dagang di airnya juga sedikit.. tapi banyak kenangan lah disana... tetep top lah semoga lekas pulih dan kembali rame 🙏🏻 …
english_translation: Back in 2015 when I went there, it was still crowded. In 2021, I went back and it was quiet, and there were few vendors on the water... but there are many memories there... still top-notch. I hope it recovers quickly and becomes crowded again 🙏🏻…

text: Kecewa dengan pelayanan yg tidak profesional,mentang2 anak kecil naik flying fox di suruh nunggu  lama ujung2nya di suruh balik jalan kaki. Tolong jangan beda2 kan pengunjung,kita sama2 bayar ko.
english_translation: Disappointed with the unprofessional service. Because it was a child on the flying fox, they were made to wait a long time and in the end were told to walk back. Please don't discriminate against visitors, we all paid.

text: Wwaaaah tempat Favorite aku klo ke Lembang Walaupun Banyak tempat Wisata Baru cuman Floating Market yg ga tergerus zaman 🤭 skrg Htm nya Weekday 40 include Kota mini Wahana lain berbayar lagi ya …
english_translation: My favorite place when I go to Lembang. Even though there are many new tourist attractions, Floating Market is the one that stands the test of time 🤭. Now the entrance fee on weekdays is 40k, including Kota Mini. Other attractions are paid separately...

text: Retribusi terlalu besar untuk kawasan wisata yang dibangun dengan merusak alam. Jalan menuju curug dipenuhi pipa pvc untuk mengambil air dari kawasan curug ke permukiman warga dan kawasan wisata.
english_translation: The retribution is too large for a tourist area built by damaging nature. The road to the waterfall is filled with PVC pipes to take water from the waterfall area to residential areas and the tourist area.

text: Tempat wisata punclut, terdiri dari cafe dan wisata foto wow sarae hills di dalam nya terdapat miniatur bangunan dari penjuru dunia seperti menara eiffel, santorini,, yang suka foto wajib kesini.
english_translation: Punclut tourist attraction, consisting of cafes and photo attractions like Wow Sarae Hills, which features miniature buildings from around the world such as the Eiffel Tower and Santorini. Those who like taking photos must visit here.

text:
Harap hati-hati di jalan menuju pintu masuk dikarenakan kondisi jalan berbatu, tidak ada penerangan di malam hari, dan jalan licin disaat hujan.

#Salam_Lestari
#Melehoy_Explorer
#Explore_Bandung
english_translation:
Please be careful on the road to the entrance due to the rocky condition of the road, no lighting at night, and the road being slippery when it rains.

#Salam_Lestari
#Melehoy_Explorer
#Explore_Bandung

text: Ya Allah..Allah Maha Besar sungguh keajaiban yg luar biasa, bisa memandang pemandangan alam yg sungguh indah dan cantik,,udaranya pun suegeeer bgt,,kapan2 pasti kembali lagi kesini, loving it 😍 …
english_translation: Oh Allah.. Allah is Great, truly an extraordinary wonder, to be able to gaze upon such a beautiful and lovely natural scenery,, the air is also so refreshing,, I will definitely come back here again sometime, loving it 😍 …

text: Tempatnya adem, ada banyak spot foto yang bagus dan instagramable, ada banyak saung-saung juga buat neduh. Tempatnya enak buat piknik tapi harus hati-hati kalau bawa makanan karena banyak monyet.
english_translation: The place is cool, there are many good and Instagrammable photo spots, and there are also many gazebos for shade. It's a nice place for a picnic but you have to be careful if you bring food because there are a lot of monkeys.

text: Suka bangeeet sama air terjun nya bener2 tinggi, megah, dan bagus. Cuman agak capek ya bund buat turun kebawahnya because anak tangganya ribuan ahahahahaa. Mangat yg mau kesini dijamin ga nyeseel
english_translation: Absolutely love the waterfall, it's really tall, majestic, and beautiful. It's just a bit tiring going down though, because the stairs are thousands, hahaha. Good luck to those who want to come here, guaranteed you won't regret it.

text: Tempat yang menarik untuk menikmati berbagai jenis bunga dan tanaman sayuran lainya. Tersedia fasilitas petik sayuran. Tiket masuk 20k. Tempat ini juga menyediakan penjualan bibit dan media tanam.
english_translation: An interesting place to enjoy various types of flowers and other vegetable plants. Vegetable picking facilities are available. Entrance ticket is 20k. This place also provides sales of seeds and planting media.

text: Menakjubkan melihat geopark di citatah kecamatan Cipatat Kabupaten Bandung Barat.. hanya saja cukup banyak pungli disini.. disini terdapat gua pawon yg dalam dinding gua nya terdapat aksara sunda.
english_translation: Amazing to see the geopark in Citatah, Cipatat sub-district, West Bandung Regency. It's just that there's quite a lot of extortion here. Here there is Pawon Cave, on the cave walls of which there are Sundanese script.

text: Lembah dewata sebelah kanan jalan dari arah lembang menuju cikole, tiket murah Rp. 10rb/orang, tempatnya bagus buat poto-poto. Dan dalam tahap pembangunan untuk meningkatkan daya tarik pengunjung.
english_translation: The "Lembah Dewata" is on the right side of the road from Lembang towards Cikole, ticket is cheap at Rp. 10,000/person, the place is good for taking photos. And it is under development to increase visitor appeal.

text: Jalan setapaknya sudah bagus, udaranya sejuk, seru buat hiking bagi pemula dan anak-anak, curugnya lumayan besar dengan debit air yang deras dan terdapat jembatan untuk berfoto dengan latar curug.
english_translation: The walking path is good, the air is cool, it's exciting for beginner hikers and children, the waterfall is quite large with a strong current, and there's a bridge for taking photos with the waterfall as a backdrop.

text: Konsep nya bagus. Ada candi candi nya. Ada sungai dan jembatan dengan taman bunga yang cantik. Sepertinya masih dalam tahap pembangunan. Ada area area yang masih berupa tanah kosong tanpa tanaman.
english_translation: The concept is good. There are temples. There is a river and a bridge with a beautiful flower garden. It seems to be still under construction. There are areas that are still empty land without plants.

text: hiking menanjak 10 menit tapi dapat view seindah ini dengan harga tiket murah meriah, enaknya camp hari jumat karna gak terlalu ramai jadi gak perlu antri-antri di toilet, suhu malam hari 16°-18°C
english_translation: A 10-minute uphill hike but you get such a beautiful view for a very cheap ticket price. It's nice to camp on Friday because it's not too crowded, so no need to queue for the toilet. Nighttime temperature is 16°-18°C.

text: Sekarang tidak seramai dulu. Mungkin karena jika dulu orang datang dengan membawa bekal dari rumah dan dimakan didepan air terjun. Sekarang tidak bisa lagi. Lebih modern lebih terawat lebih serius.

The freshness of enjoying the beauty of His creation.

Visited the crater that erupted four times yesterday.
Experienced fog so thick that visibility was only 30 meters.

Great for those who like taking photos.

text: Tracknya sdh disesuaikan kemampuan kendaraan, jd jgn khawatir ga kuat nanjak. Jajanan ringan dan souvenir banyak. Bea ticket masuk 3 orang+mobil 120rb, free parking. Masjid ada jumatan. Toilet banyak
english_translation: The track has been adjusted for the vehicle's capabilities, so don't worry about it not being strong enough for the climb. There are plenty of light snacks and souvenirs. The entrance ticket for 3 people + car is 120,000 IDR, with free parking. There's a mosque for Friday prayers. There are many toilets.

text: Ada berbagai macam bunga, sayur2an, dan tanaman lainnya. Cocok untuk liburan, famgath, studi lapang. Bisa petik sendiri, beli, dan dibawa pulang. Buah dan sayurnya besar2, subur jadi puas pas liburan
english_translation: There are various kinds of flowers, vegetables, and other plants. Suitable for holidays, family gatherings, and field trips. You can pick yourself, buy, and take them home. The fruits and vegetables are large and abundant, so you'll be satisfied during your holiday.

text: Lokasi ga jauh dari tempat parkir..air masuk Sanghyang tikoro keluar di sanghyang kenit..bisa rafting sampai rajamandala.mancing..camping..explore goa..view nya bagus benerr..👍👍..surga yg hobi foto …
english_translation: Not far from the parking lot. Enter Sanghyang Tikoro and exit at Sanghyang Kenit. You can go rafting to Rajamandala. Fishing, camping, cave exploring. The view is truly amazing. 👍👍 A paradise for photo enthusiasts.

text: We visit here in 2016. Lokasinya cukup jauh di bandung barat. Menuju curugnya perlu jalan 1-2km, jalurnya menyejukkan mata. Curug malela versi mini Niagara Fall nya di Canada. Bagus utk foto hunting.
english_translation: We visited here in 2016. The location is quite far in West Bandung. To reach the waterfall, you need to walk 1-2 km, and the path is pleasing to the eye. Curug Malela is a mini version of Niagara Falls in Canada. It's good for photo hunting.

text: Harga tiket masuk camp 30k wisata biasa 15k parkirnya 5k.. pasilitas ada WC, panggung"an, di bagian bawah dekat air terjun ada warung juga. the best, cocok buat ngadem.. airnya dingin banget kaya dia
english_translation: Entrance ticket to the camp is 30k, regular tourism is 15k, parking is 5k. Facilities include toilets, a stage, and a food stall near the waterfall downstairs. The best, suitable for cooling off.. the water is really cold, like him.

text: Udh lama gak k kebun begonia,hr ni ajak kluarga makin kerennnnn tempatnya, ....sayangnya bunga yg mau dibeli ternyata hbis. Makin bnyak jenis bunga. Harga bunga jg gak mahal lho kalau bli di situ. Tq
english_translation: Haven't been to the begonia garden in a long time, today I brought the family, the place is even cooler.... unfortunately, the flowers I wanted to buy were sold out. More and more types of flowers. The flowers are also not expensive if you buy them there. Thanks

text: Buat yang suka bunga cocok banget wisata ksni , bisa d buat ngiler liat tanaman2 nya .. Tapi yang engga pun bisa banget wisata ksni banyak spot fto bisa skalian kuliner juga , wahana utk anak pun ada
english_translation: This is a great place for flower lovers, you'll drool over the plants. But even if you're not, you can still enjoy visiting here. There are many photo spots, and you can also enjoy culinary delights, plus there are rides for children.

text: Tempat yang menyenangkan untuk santai sejenak, semua dalam keadaan tersusun rapi dan bersih, semua karyawan ramah , sangat rekomendasi utk jadi salah satu destinasi tempat wisata jika ke Bandung lagi
english_translation: A pleasant place to relax for a moment, everything is neatly arranged and clean, all employees are friendly, highly recommended as one of the tourist destinations if you go to Bandung again.

text: Adeeeem dikelilingi pohon pinus, ada play ground untuk anak2, yang lupa bawa bekal makanan tdk perlu khawatir coz ada banyak warung yg menjual makanan berat & ringan, banyak spot yg bagus unk foto😉 …
english_translation: Cool surrounded by pine trees, there's a playground for kids, if you forgot to bring food supplies, no need to worry because there are many stalls selling heavy and light food, lots of good spots for photos 😉…

text: HTM nya 30.000 kalo bundling dgn Rainbow slide 45.000. Luas banged harus siap stamina yg strong.gak ada akses untuk kursi roda untuk berkeliling.banyak wahana dan jajanan nusantara yg bisa dinikmati.
english_translation: The HTM is 30,000 if bundled with the Rainbow slide, it's 45,000. It's very spacious, so you need to be well-rested. There's no wheelchair access to get around. There are many rides and Indonesian snacks to enjoy.

text: Kalo mau kesini dari stasiun Bandung naik angkot jurusan lembang nanti turun di alun alun lembang naek angkot cikole nnt bilangi mw sewa ke tangkupan perahu bisa ditunggu, dengan kesepakan harga brp.
english_translation: If you want to come here from Bandung Station, take the Lembang-bound angkot and get off at Lembang Square. Then take the Cikole angkot and tell them you want to rent a car to Tangkuban Perahu and will wait, with an agreed-upon price.

text: Masuknya itu 24rb untuk camping. Kamar mandi cukup bersih. Hanya perlu menyiapkan mental karena jalan mulai Dusun Bambu sampai lokasi cukup tidak kondusif.  Dan bersiap kalau pagi akan banyak monyet.
english_translation: The entrance fee for camping is 24,000 Rupiah. The bathroom is quite clean. You just need to prepare yourself mentally because the road from Dusun Bambu to the location is quite challenging. And be prepared for lots of monkeys in the morning.

text: Tempat kemping yang asik, fasilitas nya bagus, spot sunset dan sunrisenya keren lokasi tidak jauh dari lembang, parkiran memadai, treking awalnya jalannsudah di paving block, view city nya luar biasa
english_translation: A cool campsite, good facilities, awesome sunset and sunrise spots, not far from Lembang, adequate parking, the initial trekking path is paved, the city view is extraordinary

text: Harga tiketnya 50.000 sampai 65.000. Sudah termasuk gratis minuman. Lokasinya bagus banyak spot foto menarik. Serasa keliling dunia di lembang. Pelayanan nya juga ramah ramah. Sukses terus sarae hills
english_translation: The ticket price is 50,000 to 65,000. It includes a free drink. The location is good with many interesting photo spots. It feels like traveling the world in Lembang. The service is also friendly. Keep up the success, Sarae Hills.

text:
Tiket termasuk mahal, kalo hanya hiking, dengan fasilitas yang mulai usang,

Baiknya ada perhatian pengelola, supaya pengunjung punya kesan yang mendalam, bukan hanya daper lelah dan jalan  licin saja
english_translation:
The ticket includes expensive, if only for hiking, with facilities that are starting to become outdated.

It would be good for the management to pay attention so that visitors have a deep impression, not just fatigue and slippery paths.

text: Pesona alam di bawah kaki gunung tangkuban prahu di kabupaten Bandung, menawarkan keindahan yang luar biasa untuk di nikmati,,, yang suka selfi2 pas banget dah,,, kuliner nya enak2... Ga nyesel dah...
english_translation: The natural charm at the foot of Mount Tangkuban Perahu in Bandung Regency offers extraordinary beauty to be enjoyed. It's perfect for those who like taking selfies. The culinary delights are delicious. You won't regret it.

text:
Tempat yang bagus untuk dikunjungi bersama keluarga, banyak spot untuk selfie, untuk makanan tidak ada makanan berat seperti nasi dll.
Tiket masuk 50rb ditukar dengan minum Thai tea atau lemon tea.
english_translation:
A great place to visit with family, many spots for selfies. For food, there are no heavy meals like rice, etc.
Entrance fee is 50k, which can be exchanged for Thai tea or lemon tea.

text: Tempatnya enak buat foto2, bayar masuknya 20rb per orang. Dalemnya ada 2 bagian, kebun bunga sama kebun sayur. Makanan di dalem cuma sebatas cemilan aja. Ada disediain topi jerami gitu kalo kepanasan.
english_translation: The place is nice for taking photos, the entrance fee is 20,000 per person. Inside, there are 2 sections, a flower garden and a vegetable garden. Food inside is limited to snacks only. Straw hats are provided if it's too hot.

text: Tangkuban perahu adalah destinasi liburan yang cocok untuk melihat pemandangan dari ketinggian dan suhu disana dingin. Kalau mau ke tangkuban perahu disarankan berangkat pagi agar tidak terjebak macet
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu is a suitable holiday destination for enjoying panoramic views from above and has a cold temperature. If you want to go to Tangkuban Perahu, it is recommended to leave in the morning to avoid traffic jams.

text: Tempat wisata yg wajib dikunjungi saat kita berada diLembang, Wisata Alam yg sangat esotik view alam pegunungan yg sangat indah, ditambah udara dingin yg membuat kita tdk akan bosan selama dilokasi...
english_translation: A must-visit tourist destination when you are in Lembang. A very exotic natural attraction with beautiful mountain views, plus the cold air that will keep you from getting bored while at the location...

text:
Curug paling terawat.
Bisa berenang, cuma banyak pasir yg mengendap, jadi kalau berenang agak keras, air langsung keruh padahal aslinya jernih banget, bahkan katanya mata air curug ini buat air minum.
english_translation: The most well-maintained waterfall. You can swim, but there's a lot of sediment, so swimming feels a bit rough. The water gets cloudy immediately, even though it's actually very clear. In fact, they say the spring water from this waterfall is used for drinking water.

text: Cocok buat melepas penat bersama keluarga, ada banyak tipe penginapan. Dari mulai tenda, glamping, vila. Ada outbond juga yg tersedia dalam paketan. Dari bayi hingga dewasa bisa menikmati alam disini.
english_translation: Suitable for relaxing with family, there are many types of accommodation. From tents, glamping, to villas. There are also outbound activities available in packages. From babies to adults can enjoy nature here.

text: Mudah di jangkau. Pendakian tidak begitu tinggi. Jalan sudah bisa dilalui mobil. Tapi belum di aspal. Sudah tersedia toilet umum. Ada saung. Dekat dg pacuan kuda. Mulai di tata bisa juga untuk camping
english_translation: Easily accessible. The climb isn't too high. The road is passable by car. But it's not paved yet. Public toilets are available. There are gazebos. Close to the horse racetrack. It's starting to be developed and can also be used for camping.

text: Wow,,, tempatnya bagus, dingin dan sejuk, ada monyet banyak di taman ini, kita bisa memberi makan secara langsung dan Curug di tempat ini sangat deras aliran arus airnya, selamat berkunjung kemari ya.
english_translation: Wow, the place is nice, cool and refreshing. There are many monkeys in this park, we can feed them directly, and the waterfall here has a very strong current. Have a good visit here.

text:
Bagus bangeet, salah satu kekayaan negeri ini.

..tp harus selalu dijaga kebersihannya terutama pengunjung hrs dididik utk buang sampah pd tempatnya

Jalan menuju lokasi hrs diperbaiki, rusak parah ..
english_translation:
Very good, one of this country's treasures.

..but its cleanliness must always be maintained, especially visitors must be educated to throw trash in its place.

The road to the location needs to be repaired, it's severely damaged..

text: udara pegunungan yg segar,ditambah dengan suara aliran sungai yg bikin hati jadi damai.yg lebih mengesankan,kita bisa menyusuri goa sepanjang kurang lebih 400m.dengan berbagai bebatuan yg masih alami.
english_translation: Fresh mountain air, combined with the sound of flowing water that brings peace to the heart. What's more impressive is that we can explore a cave approximately 400 meters long, with various natural rock formations.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang lumayan dekat dari Kota Bandung, dengan suguhan tatanan bebatuan yang cukup indah. Akan menjadi Bintang 5 apabila pengelolaannya lebih serius lagi, terutama masalah kebersihan.
english_translation: A nature tourist attraction quite close to Bandung City, with a fairly beautiful rock arrangement. It would be a 5-star if the management were more serious, especially regarding cleanliness.

text: Tepatnya OK banget, ada full music, ada rabit forest, jembatan gantung + flying forest (htm kemarin 20rb), tempat hunting foto juga banyak. Dan klo balik keatas (parkiran) tinggal naik angkot (gratis)
english_translation: Exactly OK, there's full music, there's a rabbit forest, a suspension bridge + flying forest (entrance fee yesterday was 20,000 IDR), lots of photo spots too. And when you go back up (to the parking lot), you can just take the public van (free).

text: Dari pintu gerbang dusun bambu, ambil jalan d kiri, teruss lg. Jalan nya ga bagus, berbatu sekitar 1 km. Kalo ktmu konvoi tentara yg habis latihan deket daerah itu, kasih jalan... support pasukan tni.
english_translation: From the entrance of Dusun Bambu, take the road to the left, keep going. The road is not good, it's rocky for about 1 km. If you meet a military convoy that has finished training near that area, give them way... support the TNI troops.

text:
Tempat yang luas, banyak spot foto. Tiket masuk Rp 20.000 bisa ditukar minuman Dan makanan di pasar apung. Terdapat Kota mini dan spot foto lain yang banyak.
Tempat yang unik until dikunjungi keluarga.
english_translation:
Spacious place, many photo spots. Entrance fee of Rp 20,000 can be exchanged for drinks and food at the floating market. There is a mini city and many other photo spots.
A unique place to visit with family.

text: Tempat yg nyaman untuk piknik,namun jalan nya sempit,harus bener² supir yg udh pro kalo mau kesini takut nya bentrok sama mobil lain,jangan kesini kalo di hari sebelum nya hujan,karena jalan nya licin.
english_translation: A comfortable place for a picnic, but the road is narrow. You really need a pro driver to come here, otherwise you might clash with other cars. Don't come here if it rained the day before, because the road will be slippery.

text: Banyak spot foto keren, harga 50rb/org. Free minuman, cuman milonya kurang manis kaya kebanyakan air hehe. Over all sangat memuaskan, abang dan mbanya ramah2, selalu nawarin buat fotoin. Baik2 pokoknya
english_translation: Lots of cool photo spots, price 50k/person. Free drink, just the milk tea was less sweet like it had too much water hehe. Overall very satisfying, the guys and gals were friendly, always offering to take photos. They were nice overall.

text: Taman bunga yang cantik dan terawat, cocok untuk wisatawan yang ingin memanjakan mata dengan warna-warni berbagai jenis bunga. Untuk tiket masuk cukup terjangkau 15.000 per orang. Bagus untuk foto-foto
english_translation: A beautiful and well-maintained flower garden, perfect for tourists who want to feast their eyes on the colorful variety of flowers. The entrance fee is quite affordable at 15,000 per person. Great for photos.

text:
Tempat wisata di bandung wajib banget dikunjungi bagi wasatawan luar tepatnya di daerah punclut lembang
Untuk tiket biaya masuknya ada 2
50k sama 65k bedanya kalo yang 65k itu bisa lewat jembatan merah
english_translation:
Tourist attractions in Bandung that are a must-visit for out-of-town tourists, precisely in the Punclut Lembang area.
There are 2 ticket prices for admission:
50k and 65k. The difference is that for the 65k ticket, you can cross the red bridge.

text: 2-10-2021.... Tidak ditanyakan sertifikat vaksin untuk masuk kesini. HTM 30rb, 40rb jika terusan dg kota mini. Tempatnya unik, dg berbagai macam jenis jajanan. Banyak spot-spot foto yang instagramable.
english_translation: 2-10-2021.... Vaccination certificates were not asked for entry here. Entrance fee 30k, 40k if you get a combo ticket with Mini City. The place is unique, with a wide variety of snacks. Many Instagrammable photo spots.

text:
Pokonya walau capeknya lumayan, tapi pas sampe di si sanghyang heleut semua lelahnya terbayar sama keindahan alamnya,

Pokonya yg gakpernah kesini saya saranin coba kesini biar tau gimana keinndahannya
english_translation:
No matter how tired you are, by the time you reach Sanghyang Heulet, all your exhaustion is paid off by the natural beauty.

For those who have never been here, I recommend you visit so you can experience its beauty.

text: Tempat healingnya bandung, disini bisa liat yang ijo2 sampe puas banget, apalagi ada live musiknya yang juga asik banget, spot foto buanyaq, jangan lupa bawa jas hujan kalo kesini seandainya hujan hehe
english_translation: Bandung's healing spot, here you can see plenty of green to your heart's content, especially with the cool live music, lots of photo spots, don't forget to bring a raincoat if you come here in case it rains hehe

text: Sebuah wisata alam yg menyuguhkan panorama alam kawah gunung yang terletak di kab. Bandung. Selain itu juga pemandangan hutan tanaman khas yg terletak di sekitaran kawah lereng gunung tangkuban perahu.
english_translation: A nature tour that presents the natural panorama of a volcanic crater located in Bandung Regency. In addition, there are also views of special cultivated forests located around the crater on the slopes of Mount Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Cocok untuk camping pemula. Perlengkapan camping bagus dan fasilitasnya lengkap. Harga lumayan terjangkau. Pemandangan sangat bagus. Hiking pemula juga nyaman. Hanya, akses masuk yang harus diperbaiki.
english_translation: Suitable for beginner campers. Good camping equipment and complete facilities. Reasonably affordable price. Very nice scenery. Beginner hiking is also comfortable. However, the access road needs to be improved.

text:
Tempat yg asik buat wisata akhir pekan dgn susunan batu yg wah (bingung jelasinnya) 😅 deket sini juga ada goa.
Tapi kalo bisa yg pergi siang hari pake baju lengan panjang karna panasnya nusuk sangat. …
english_translation:
A cool place for a weekend getaway with stunning rock formations (hard to explain) 😅 There's also a cave nearby.
But if you can, go during the day and wear long sleeves because the heat is very intense.

text:
Seru  bagus juga tempatnya
Wc bersih
Minuman enak
Wahana banyak tapi kita terlalu sore datang ke tkp karna jalanan lembang macet parah.  Bayar 100k tiket wahana bisa pilih 5 mainan edukasi untuk anak2.
english_translation:
Fun, the place is also good
Clean toilets
Delicious drinks
Lots of rides but we came too late because the Lembang road was terribly jammed. Paying 100k for a ride ticket, you can choose 5 educational toys for the kids.

text: Tempatnya luas, bisa naik perahu. Makanan banyak dan parkir luas. Tiket dapat ditukar dgn minuman. Cocok untuk liburan bareng keluarga. Kursi Roda jg bisa tp hati2 di pintu utamanya saja krn ada tangga.
english_translation: The place is spacious, you can ride a boat. Lots of food and ample parking. Tickets can be exchanged for drinks. Suitable for a family holiday. Wheelchairs are also possible but be careful at the main entrance as there are stairs.

text: Tempatnya nyaman, adem, ada musholla juga utk sholat. Disaat menikmati indahnya ciptaan Tuhan jangan lupa juga menjalankan perintah Tuhan. tp tidak menyediakan mukena utk wanita. Jd bawa sendiri aja ya.
english_translation: The place is comfortable and cool, and there's also a prayer room for worship. While enjoying God's creations, don't forget to follow His commands. However, they don't provide prayer garments (mukena) for women, so please bring your own.

text:
Cocok untuk kawula muda yang ingin berfoto dengan spot luar negeri.
Masuk ke area bisa lewat jembatan, ataupun angkutan yang telah disediakan.
Naik ke area parkir cukup menguras tenaga untuk lanjut usia
english_translation:
Suitable for young people who want to take photos with international-themed spots.
Entry to the area can be via a bridge or provided transportation.
Climbing to the parking area is quite tiring for the elderly.

text: Tempatnya bagus, sejuk, bisa buat edukasi anak karena ada wahana outbound + kasih makan hewan rusa, kambing, burung... Paket kasih makan rusa jan 2019 jg cuma 10rb udh dapet wortel dan jus strawberry...
english_translation: The place is nice and cool, suitable for educating children because there are outbound facilities + feeding deer, goats, and birds... The deer feeding package in Jan 2019 was only 10k and you got carrots and strawberry juice...

text: Tempat nya asri enak bwt wisata bersama keluarga,wahana nya banyak ada 34 permainan/spot untuk foto2 aman untuk anak2 dan dewasa,pokok nya dijamin puas klo datang kesini.orchid forest cikole the best...
english_translation: The place is beautiful and nice for family tourism. There are many attractions, with 34 games/photo spots. It's safe for children and adults. You're guaranteed to be satisfied if you come here. Orchid Forest Cikole is the best...

text: Cikole tmp outbond yg recomended bgt ...knp ? Karena buat aku cikole selain tempatnya okey bgt juga harganya sangat terjangkau. Buat kantong anak sekolah okey bgt lho... gak ada salahnya dicoba yukkk...
english_translation: Cikole is a highly recommended outbound spot... why? Because for me, Cikole is not only a great place but also very affordable. It's perfect for a student's budget, you know... There's no harm in trying it, come on!

text: Tempatnya bagus, ada permainan buat anak juga, curugnya menurut saya g begitu bagus, airnya juga kotor, beberapa permainan gratis dan ada beberapa permainan yg harus bayar lagi setelah beli tiket masuk.
english_translation: The place is nice, there are also games for children, the waterfall in my opinion isn't that good, the water is also dirty, some games are free and there are some games that require additional payment after buying the entrance ticket.

text: Tiket masuk 40rb dan ada tambahan untuk akses playground putput golf dan wood bridge.. asikkk sih tempatnya bersih dan kids friendly bgttt.. best time to visitnya sore! Syahdu banget suasananya asikkk!!
english_translation: Entrance fee is 40rb, and there's an additional charge for access to the playground, putt-putt golf, and wood bridge. It's really fun, the place is clean and very kid-friendly. The best time to visit is in the afternoon! The atmosphere is so peaceful and enjoyable!

text: Wisata air terjun yang dikelola cukup baik.. Untuk air terjun nya menurut saya biasa aja, di sana lebih cocok untuk foto2 saja.. Dari lokasi parkir ke lokasi wisata ada Suttle bus yang siap antar jemput
english_translation: The waterfall attraction is quite well-managed. As for the waterfall itself, I think it's just ordinary; it's more suitable for taking photos. From the parking lot to the attraction, there is a shuttle bus ready to pick you up and drop you off.

text: Sekarang lokasinya instagramable banget. Untuk hiking bayar 10k utk camping 20k. Akses ke curug nya lumayan mudah. Hanya kondisi jalan nya yang masih berbatu jadi harus hati-hati apalagi di musim hujan.
english_translation: The location is very instagrammable now. For hiking, it's 10k, and for camping, it's 20k. Access to the waterfall is quite easy. Only the road condition is still rocky, so you have to be careful, especially in the rainy season.

text: Gunung tangkuban perahu merupakan gunung berapi aktif di Bandung. Lokasinya di lembang. Gunung ini terakhir meletus Agustus 2019. Sekarang destinasi wisata sudah dibuka untuk umum pasca erupsi terakhir.
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu mountain is an active volcano in Bandung. Its location is in Lembang. The mountain last erupted in August 2019. Now the tourist destination has been reopened to the public following the last eruption.

text: Suasana hutan pinus dengan daya tarik outbond (flying fox, turun tebing, jembatan tunggal, paint ball) ada jg spot camping & glamping. Harga yang terjangkau, obyek wisata keluarga adventurer di Lembang.
english_translation: Pine forest ambiance with outbound attractions (flying fox, rappelling, single rope bridge, paintball) also has camping and glamping spots. Affordable prices, an adventurous family tourist destination in Lembang.

text:
2015 kesini via Cianjur selatan lebih dekat melewati Gunung cempaka
Jalan masuk ke perkebunan msh bebatuan perlu tenaga extta mengendalikan kendaraan
Tapi keindahan Curug membayar semua lelah perjalanan
english_translation:
Since 2015, the route via southern Cianjur has been closer passing Gunung Cempaka.
The access road to the plantation is still rocky, requiring extra effort to control the vehicle.
But the beauty of the waterfall makes up for all the travel fatigue.

text:
Tempat wisata yg asik nih..
Apa lagi yg suka selfie..
Tempatnya yg asri bs buat refresing atopun cari inspirasi..
Baru pertama kali jg saya kesini..
Dr Solo ketemu dgn tmn tmn apk Yogrt disini..
Kenngan
english_translation:
This is a fun tourist spot..
Even more so for those who like to take selfies..
The place is lush and green, good for refreshing or finding inspiration..
It's my first time here too..
From Solo, I met friends from the Yogrt app here..
Memories

text: Kalau kesini bawa payung atau pakai topi ya, panas banget. Tempat bagus buat foto2. Lebih baik kalau kesini jangan waktu liburan karena susah banget mau foto kalau terlalu ramai. Dan jangan waktu hujan.
english_translation: If you come here, bring an umbrella or wear a hat, it's very hot. It's a good place for photos. It's better to come here not during holidays because it's very difficult to take pictures if it's too crowded. And don't come when it's raining.

text: Salah satu tujuan wisata ramah anak. Disini kita bisa memetik strawberry, memberi makan beberapa jenis satwa, seperti rusa dan burung. Anak2 pemberani bisa juga bermain flying fox yang sangat menantang.
english_translation: One of the child-friendly tourist destinations. Here we can pick strawberries, feed several types of animals, such as deer and birds. Brave children can also try the very challenging flying fox.

text: Lokasi wisata yang sangat bagus, fasilitas yg lengkap,  petugas2 yg ramah,  area yg bersih n harga masuk yg terjangkau..  Sangat rekomended utk berkunjung bersama keluarga, sahabat, rekan n kolega.. TOP
english_translation: A very good tourist location, complete facilities, friendly staff, clean area, and affordable entrance fee. Highly recommended for visiting with family, friends, colleagues, and associates. TOP.

text: Tempat yang menyimpan sejuta cerita dari waktu awal tempatnya belum sekeren ini, sampai sekarang sudah sekeren ini. Makasih bisa jadi tempat buat kumpul dan foto"bareng keluarga di hari libur tahun ini.
english_translation: A place that holds a million stories from when it wasn't as cool as it is now, to how cool it is now. Thanks for being a place to gather and take photos with family on this year's holiday.

text: Sumpah keren banget baru nemuin soalnya gunungnya ga terlalu tinggi dengan view sebagus ini, prau tipis tipis aku julukin dia nih hihih. Diatas ada toiletnya, pokoknya nyaman senyaman pelukan dia hahaha
english_translation: So cool, I just found this because the mountain isn't too high with such a good view. I'll call the little boat "Prau" haha. There's a toilet up there, it's as comfortable as can be, as comfortable as his hug hahaha.

text: ticket masuk Rp.5000 dan tidak akan menyesal. tidak terlalu jauh dari jalan raya walaupun jalan nya masih terjal. nama resminya stone garden geopark. yg jelas puas foto foto buat persediaan upload medsos
english_translation: Entrance ticket Rp. 5000 and you won't regret it. Not too far from the highway, although the road is still steep. The official name is Stone Garden Geopark. What's clear is that you'll be satisfied taking photos to stock up for social media uploads.

text: Keren tempat'a tpi klo bisa kebersihan'a di jaga..  Bnyak sampah'a..  Untuk pengunjung tolong jagalah kebersihan jgan buang sampah sembarangan..  Dan untuk pengelola untuk selalu di lakukan pembersihan..
english_translation: The place is cool, but if possible, please maintain cleanliness. There's a lot of trash. Visitors, please take care of the cleanliness and don't litter. And for the management, please always conduct cleaning.

text:
Tamannya keren, rapi, banyak spot foto,,,, seneng banget bisa kesini,,, romantis dan sesuai tema karena udah Deket natal jadi ada boneka salju di depan pintu masuk
Bisa beli bunga dan sayuran juga disini
english_translation:
The park is cool, tidy, with many photo spots,,,, I'm so happy I could come here,,, romantic and fitting the theme because it's close to Christmas, so there's a snowman at the entrance
You can also buy flowers and vegetables here

text: Pas kesini cuaca nya kurang bershabat,jadi kurang dapat menikmati.dan jelek nya disini petugas nya anak kecil saja di buat bayar saya dengan tiket orang dewasa.dan bayar pakir 14 ribu padahal bawa motor.
english_translation: When I came here, the weather wasn't friendly, so I couldn't enjoy it much. And the bad thing is that here, the staff charged me an adult ticket even though I'm a child. And the parking fee was 14 thousand, even though I brought a motorbike.

text: Kalau mau foto tempat ini bisa jadi salah satu pilihan destinasi, waktu yg tepat ketika ada sinar matahari, kalau pas mendung kurang menurut saya, saya suka koleksi anggrek disini, bisa liat di foto2 ini
english_translation: If you want to take photos, this place can be one of the destination options. The right time is when there is sunlight; if it's cloudy, it's less ideal in my opinion. I like the orchid collection here, you can see it in these photos.

text:
Tempat yang masih sangat asri, sangat bagus untuk ngecamp, atau hanya ingin refreshing.
Untuk melepas penat di kota yang penuh polusi, tempat ini sangat rekomendasi
Apalagi pergi bersama teman-teman. 😁 …
english_translation:
A place that is still very natural, great for camping, or just for a refreshing getaway.
To relieve fatigue from a polluted city, this place is highly recommended.
Especially going with friends. 😁 …

text: Tempatnya dingin, terus pas mau checkout turun dari gunung petugas kebersihan langsung sigap sterilin tempat camp nya lagi ❤️ yang disayangkan dilokasi camp wc nya pas malem gak berfungsi dengan baik 😌 …
english_translation: The place was cold, and when we were about to check out, after coming down from the mountain, the cleaning staff immediately and diligently sterilized our campsite again ❤️ What was unfortunate was that the toilets at the campsite didn't function well at night 😌 …

text: Bisa banget buat yg baru mau nyoba camping pertama kali. Atau hanya untuk menikmati ketinggian dan udara dingin khas di atas gunung tanpa terlalu capek seperti naik gunung beneran. Bisa banget kesini 🥰 …
english_translation: It's very suitable for those who are trying camping for the first time. Or just to enjoy the altitude and the typical cold mountain air without being too tired like a real mountain hike. You can definitely come here 🥰 …

text:
Back to nature
Mensyukuri keindahan alam ciptaan Tuhan , dengan tidak membuang sampah sembarang tempat. Semoga keindahan ciptaan Tuhan ini bisa terus terjaga dan menjadi warisan utk anak cucu kita kelak.
english_translation:
Back to nature
Grateful for the beauty of God's creation, by not littering indiscriminately. May the beauty of God's creation continue to be preserved and become a legacy for our children and grandchildren in the future.

text: tempatnya luas dan sejuk tp semenjak pandemi banyak tmpt yg sudah tdk terlalu dirawat dan berhenti operasi sperti yg kebun bunga sudah rusak tmptnya, tp tmpt lain masih bagus dan tiket masuk jg tdk mahal
english_translation: The place is spacious and cool, but since the pandemic, many places are no longer well-maintained and have stopped operating, like the flower garden which is damaged, but other places are still good and the entrance ticket is not expensive.

text: Pilihan pas buat liburan keluarga. Banyak wahana yg bisa dicoba, paling pas buat anak kecil itu wahana kota mini, buat kakak2nya banyak spot foto yg instagramable. Welcome drink nya juga oke, enak hehehe
english_translation: Perfect choice for a family vacation. Many rides to try, the mini town rides are most suitable for young children, and there are many Instagrammable photo spots for the older ones. The welcome drink is also good, delicious hehehe.

text:
Tempatnya sekarang lebih Bagus dari sebelumnya,, tempat wisata yang lagi hits d Bandung,, cocok untuk ngadem sama temen" karna d dukung cuacanya yang sejuk 😊
Cuma sebagian lagi masih dalam pengerjaan,, …
english_translation:
The place is now better than before, a popular tourist spot in Bandung, suitable for relaxing with friends because of the cool weather 😊
Only some parts are still under construction...

text: Tempat enak untuk spot foto tapi kalau kesini jangan bawa makanan berwarna soalnya disana banyak monyet terus kalau kalian masih penasaran gimana disana kalian bisa liat di YouTube Chanel Bestie Official
english_translation: A nice place for photo spots, but if you go here, don't bring colorful food because there are many monkeys there. If you're still curious about what it's like there, you can watch it on the Bestie Official YouTube channel.

text: Pertama kali kesini, kebetulan lagi kemarau mungkin ya, sungai & air terjunnya tidak begitu deras. Good experience, medannya dan pemangangannya lumayan untuk objek wisata alam yg dekat dari bandung kota.
english_translation: First time here, it happened to be the dry season, maybe, so the river & waterfall weren't very strong. Good experience, the terrain and views are decent for a natural attraction close to Bandung city.

text: Melewati jln yg masih biasa ky jln masuk kampung tp masyaallah... setelah sampai diatas luar biasa indahnya,dan saat cuaca ngga bgtu panas duduk" di sawung angin semilir rasanya ngga kpengin pulang hehee
english_translation: Passing through a road that's still ordinary, like a village entrance road, but wow... upon reaching the top, the beauty is extraordinary, and when the weather isn't too hot, sitting in the bamboo gazebo with a gentle breeze, it feels like I don't want to go home, hehe.

text:
Recommended banget buat liburan
Laper tinggal makan didalem
Untuk wahana anak2 juga banyak dan kita mini juga bagus,. Yg paling keren rainbow slide nya,. Awesome..
This place make me want to go back again
english_translation:
Highly recommended for a holiday.
Hungry? Just eat inside.
There are also many rides for children, and the mini zoo is good. The coolest is the rainbow slide. Awesome!
This place makes me want to go back again.

text: Mbak putri gunung waktu belum masuk ticketing :( gantung di toko ema, harnessnya menghangatkan keju di perapian. Camping disana jurig, Sekarang aku sibuk entah kemana. Jadi ada musolla dan kamar mandi.
english_translation: Miss Princess Mountain, before we entered ticketing :( Hanging at Ema's shop, the harness is warming cheese by the fireplace. Camping there is spooky, now I'm busy somewhere. So there's a prayer room and a bathroom.

text: Seru buat yang cari spot foto sama acara shoot pre wedding, di lokasi banyak monyet. Jangan lupa ajak keluarga, pacar atau temen2 kocak biar nggak baper, monyet aja pasang2an masa lo sendirian? Haa,,haa,,
english_translation: Exciting for those looking for photo spots and pre-wedding shoot locations, there are many monkeys here. Don't forget to bring family, a partner, or hilarious friends so you don't get emotional. Even the monkeys have partners, why are you alone? Ha ha ha.

text: Tempatnya keren , bagus buat foto foto dengan latar aliran sungai yang tebing tebingnya berwarna oranye , di sini juga terdapat goa sanghyang kenit yang panjangnya 500 meter dan tembus ke sanghyang tikoro
english_translation: The place is cool, great for taking photos with the river flow background and orange cliffs. Here, you'll also find the Sanghyang Kenit cave, which is 500 meters long and connects to Sanghyang Tikoro.

text:
Jalan menuju curug/air terjun mudah karena sudah di bikin tangga sehingga memudahkan pengunjung.
Monyetnya banyak sekali jadi pengunjung harap tidak membawa jinjingan kantong kresek biar aman dari monyet.
english_translation:
The path to the waterfall is easy because stairs have been built, making it convenient for visitors.
There are many monkeys, so visitors should refrain from bringing plastic bags to be safe from them.

text: Pemandangannya indah, cocok buat foto-foto, lokasi nya sejuk, saran klo ke atas Tdk beli masker juga tidak apa-apa karena bau belerang nya tidak tercium. Alhamdulillah waktu kesana 2 Minggu sebelum erupsi
english_translation: The view is beautiful, perfect for taking photos. The location is cool. My advice is that you don't need to buy a mask if you go up, because the sulfur smell is not noticeable. Thank God I went there 2 weeks before the eruption.

text: Tempat nya sejuk, pemandangan nya lumayan indah,, mantap pokok nya,, cuma jalan menuju ke area tempat wisata nya sungguh ekstrim, apalagi kalau di perjalanan nya hujan, haduh sangat melelahkan kan kayanya
english_translation: The place is cool, the view is quite beautiful, excellent overall. It's just that the road leading to the tourist area is really extreme, especially if it rains along the way, oh my, it seems very tiring.

text: Tempatnya indah banget, bersih, luas, spot untuk foto juga banyak,nyaman,ada warung makan juga, parkiran luas. Untuk Harga/tiket masuk di Papan dan di karcis harga tertera 40rb tapi ternyata 1 orang 50rb.
english_translation: The place is very beautiful, clean, spacious, with many photo spots, comfortable, there's also a food stall, and ample parking. For the price/entrance ticket, the board and the ticket both say 40rb, but it turned out to be 50rb per person.

text: Seneng banget bisa berkunjung kesini. Kalau datang masih sangat pagi, tempatnya sangat sejuk dan bersih. Semua fasilitasnya terawat baik. Tiket masuknya berkisar 40k-50k (harga weekday & weekend berbeda).
english_translation: It's great to be able to visit here. If you come very early in the morning, the place is very cool and clean. All the facilities are well maintained. The entrance ticket ranges from 40k-50k (weekday & weekend prices differ).

text: keindahan alam yang luar biasa.. bebatuan purba dan air yg jernih.. wajib berenang jika  kesana.. karena airnya akan membuat badan segar..apalagi setelah lelah berjalan menempuh perjalanan yg lmyan jauh..
english_translation: The extraordinary natural beauty.. ancient rocks and clear water.. you must swim if you go there.. because the water will make your body feel fresh.. especially after being tired from a long journey..

text: Tempat hiking yang cukup mudah dan ramah anak. Ada playground dan beberapa instalasi yang bisa dipakai untuk berfoto. Di sini tidak banyak muncul monyet. Banyak ditemukan beberapa kebun sayur saat hiking.
english_translation: A relatively easy and child-friendly hiking spot. There's a playground and several installations for photos. Monkeys don't appear much here. Many vegetable gardens are found during the hike.

text: Di awali dengan melewati pipa besar bendungan saguling sampai kemudian menyusuri trek jalan yang lumayan unik dan berliak liuk tp terbayar sudah ketika mencapai ke lokasi suasana dan pemandangannya ajibbb
english_translation: Starting by passing through the large pipe of the Saguling dam, then following a rather unique and winding trail, but it's all worth it when you reach the location, the atmosphere and scenery are amazing.

text: Pemandangan yang menyegarkan dengan angin sepoi-sepoi, jika Anda berencana untuk mendaki ke curug tilu, bersiaplah di situs Anda perlu mengambil tangga panjang, bagi saya itu sepadan. Ditambah ada monyet
english_translation: A refreshing view with a gentle breeze, if you plan to hike to Curug Tilu, be prepared at the site you will need to take a long ladder, for me it was worth it. Plus there are monkeys

text: datanglah kesini , bisa naik damri jurusan Ciburuy danau /situ Ciburuy tempat nongkrong yang enak, jangan lupa beli makan ikan atau ayam goreng bakar harga makanan sepantasnya tempat wisata so far so good
english_translation: Come here, you can take the Damri bus route Ciburuy. Ciburuy lake/pond is a nice hangout spot, don't forget to buy fried fish or grilled chicken. The food prices are reasonable for a tourist spot. So far so good.

text: Suasananya sejuk,cocok untuk kumpul dengan keluarga,teman atau sahabat... terdapat banyak penjual makanan dan saung untuk makan bersama.... pembayaran menggunakan koin yang harus ditukar terlebih dahulu..
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool, suitable for gathering with family, friends, or close friends... there are many food vendors and gazebos for eating together.... payment is made using coins that must be exchanged first.

text:
Wisata Alam di jawa barat
Saya sudah berkali  Kali  kesini tapi tidak bosan bosan selalu ingin kembali
Usahakan berkunjung dibawah jam 11.00 Pagi  intuk menghindari kabut yang menghalangi pemandangan kita
english_translation:
Nature Tourism in West Java
I've been here many times but never get bored, always wanting to return
Try to visit before 11:00 AM to avoid the fog that obstructs our view

text: Seru deh klo udah jalan sama keluarga. Apalagi kalau anak sudah besar nanti, akan jadi pengalaman positif yang akan terrekam di memorinya. Cuma ngga sempet masuk ke Flower Garden, karena saat itu gerimis.
english_translation: It's fun when you go out with family. Especially when the children are older, it will be a positive experience that will be recorded in their memories. I just didn't have time to go into the Flower Garden, because it was drizzling at the time.

text: First time kesini view nya menjanjikan, kita dimanjakan dengan view yg bagus, asri dan sejuk. Untuk tiket masuknya dan parkirnya relatif tapi untuk makanan dan minuman yg dijual agak lumayan untuk porsinya
english_translation: First time here, the view is promising, we were spoiled with a good, beautiful, and cool view. The entrance and parking fees are reasonable, but the food and drinks sold are a bit pricey for their portions.

text: Indah curugnya   sayang akses menuju lokasi yg terlalu curam..licin dan berbahaya tidak cocok untuk keluarga...mungkin untuk  anak muda...klu anda bisa turun dan naik tanpa keluhan...anda luarbiasa sehat..
english_translation: The waterfall is beautiful, but unfortunately, the access to the location is too steep, slippery, and dangerous. It's not suitable for families... maybe for young people... If you can go down and come back up without complaints, you are exceptionally healthy.

text: Kebun begonia ini untuk weekend harganya 20000/orang. Di dalamnya banyak banget spot foto. Buat yang suka banget sama bunga2 tempat ini cocok banget sih. Dan di dalamnya juga menjual beberapa bibit tanaman
english_translation: This begonia garden is 20,000 Rupiah per person for the weekend. Inside, there are tons of photo spots. For those who really love flowers, this place is perfect. And inside, they also sell some plant seedlings.

text: Mantap nih tempatnya bagus banget dan indah pemandangannya dari atas. Terletak di Kab Bandung Barat disarankan kalo kesini sekalian mengunjungi spot wisata disekitarnya seperti Goa Pawon dan Puncak Masigit
english_translation: Awesome, this place is great and the view from the top is beautiful. Located in West Bandung Regency, it's recommended to visit nearby tourist spots like Goa Pawon and Puncak Masigit when you come here.

text: Walau masih dalam tahap pengembangan tapi taman tertata rapi, bersih, wahana rekreasinya ada beberapa pilihan, cocok untuk healing dan piknik. Beberapa tahun kedepan mungkin akan lebih bagus lagi taman ini
english_translation: Although still in development, the park is well-maintained, clean, and offers several recreational activities, making it suitable for relaxation and picnics. In a few years, this park will likely be even more beautiful.

text: Tempat wisata bernuansa Bali yg keren dgn harga tiket murah dan ada parkiran luas bgt , banyak tempat makan n minum jg spot photo bagus . Cuma kl kesini ketika aga sore karena panas bgt kl pas siang hari..
english_translation: Cool Bali-themed tourist spot with cheap ticket prices and a very large parking lot. Lots of food and drink places, as well as good photo spots. Just come here in the late afternoon because it's very hot during the day.

text: One word. Over priced! Materialistic. Semua serba bayar. Masuk mahal, per orang 35rb. Di dalam tempat main bayar, spot foto tertentu bayar. Tempat main dikit, ga luas. Not worth it banget. Ga sesuai harga.
english_translation: Overpriced. Materialistic. Everything costs money. Expensive entrance fee, 35k per person. Inside, attractions cost extra, certain photo spots are paid. Limited and small play area. Not worth it at all. Doesn't match the price.

text: Tempat yang nyaman dan murah bgt, airnya pun masih jernih dan kadang sering ada hewan liar seperti monyet yang memberikan kesan asri lalu disini juga ada tempat outbound dan fasilitas yg lumayan lengkap...
english_translation: A very comfortable and cheap place, the water is still clear, and sometimes there are wild animals like monkeys, which gives a natural impression. There is also an outbound area and quite complete facilities here...

text:
cukup melelahkan karena harus naik turun tangga yang cukup banyak. tapi air terjunnya sangat indah.

Saya juga sedikit takut karena banyak monyet liar di daerah ini, tapi itu pengalaman yang menarik ahaha
english_translation:
quite tiring because I had to go up and down a lot of stairs. but the waterfall is very beautiful.

I was also a little scared because there are many wild monkeys in this area, but it was an interesting experience ahaha

text: Akses jalan masuk dari jalan raya sulit terlihat, jalannya masih batu dan tanah agak licin kalau hujan. Ada pungli di akses masuk dan tempat parkir padahal sudah termasuk biaya parkir saat beli tiket masuk
english_translation: Access to the entrance from the highway is difficult to see, the road is still stone and earth, and it's quite slippery when it rains. There are illegal levies (pungli) at the entrance and parking area, even though parking is already included in the entrance ticket price.

text: Wisata outbound untuk melatih kebersamaan teamwork...saran untuk pengelola tempat makan disediakan tempat piring kotor dan membiasakan pengunjung untuk membersihkan tempat makan setelah makan, Terima kasih
english_translation: Outbound tourism to train teamwork... suggestions for restaurant managers: provide a place for dirty dishes and encourage visitors to clean their dining area after eating. Thank you.

text: Yang mau dapetin pemandangan ini, cobain kesini, tapi di saranin pakai GPS, karena jalan untuk masuk ke area Geopark ini pas belokan, jadi agak bahaya jika tiba tiba rem mendadak...dan sering terlewat juga
english_translation: If you want to get this view, try coming here, but it's recommended to use GPS, because the road to enter this Geopark area is right at the turn, so it's a bit dangerous if you suddenly brake... and it's often missed too.

text:
Ngga pernah bosan sama tempat yang satu ini
Banyak kenangan dari kuliah sampai udah punya keluarga masih punya kengininan buat nenangin jiwa disana
Bandung bagi saya adalah rumah ke dua setelah bukittinggi
english_translation:
I never get bored with this place.
There are many memories from college until I have a family, I still have the desire to soothe my soul there.
For me, Bandung is a second home after Bukittinggi.

text:
Akses jalan nyaman mgkn karena weekday. Tiket masuk mobil 25rb+5rb utk parkir, per orang 20rb.

Cuaca panas matahari tapi tau2 angin dingin, mendings edia jaket.

Petugas sigap dan gesit membantu pengunjung
english_translation:
Comfortable road access possibly because it's a weekday. Car entrance fee 25k + 5k for parking, per person 20k.

The weather was hot with sun but suddenly a cold wind, bring a jacket.

Staff were alert and agile in assisting visitors.

text:
Ada toilet tapi kurang banyak jadi antriannya panjang 😁 dan airnya sering habis. Tiket 22rb, parkir motor 10rb, parkir motor dan mobil luas.
Cocok yg pengen healing atau belajar bushcraft. Adem dan syahdu …
english_translation:
There are toilets, but not enough, so the queue is long 😁, and the water often runs out. Tickets are 22k, motorcycle parking is 10k, motorcycle and car parking is spacious.
Suitable for those who want to heal or learn bushcraft. Cool and serene…

text: taman bunga, ya pasti banyak bunga, tetangganya juga bunga, cocok buat liburan yang bawa anak kecil, kalo bisa pulang bawa juga bunganya ya, hahahaa. ada live musicnya di tempat makannya. nyaman bet.. anjay
english_translation: Flower garden, of course there are many flowers, the neighbors are also flowers, suitable for a holiday with small children, if possible, bring the flowers home too, hahahaa. There's live music at the eating place. Really comfortable.. damn.

text: Akses menuju lokasi masih agak sulit karena jalan masih dalam kondisi yang tidak bagus seluruhnya, lokasinya enak untuk bermain, memiliki lahan yang luas, tempat berteduh, masjid, toilet dan ada juga warung
english_translation: Access to the location is still a bit difficult because the road is not entirely in good condition. The location is pleasant for playing, has a large area, a place to take shelter, a mosque, toilets, and there is also a small shop.

text: Tempat yang bagus, cocok buat kalian yg mau ngadem ❤️ udara yg masih segar alami  . Tiket masuknya pun standar 😊👍 pelayanan wisata bagus, kebersihan tempat & fasilitas juga oke 👍 sukses selalu sarae hills 👍
english_translation: A great place, perfect for those who want to cool down ❤️ the air is still fresh and natural. The entrance ticket is also standard 😊👍 the tourist service is good, the cleanliness of the place & facilities is also okay 👍 success always Sarae Hills 👍

text: Nice, cocok buat rekreasi keluarga udaranya segerbuat piknik. cuman macet aj menuju kesini berhubung public holiday, rekomen buat kamu yg dome dibdg bukan pendatang prefer lewat cimahi lebih lowong ekekekek
english_translation: Nice, suitable for family recreation, the air is fresh for picnics. It's just that the traffic is bad coming here because of the public holiday. Recommended for those who live in Bandung and are not newcomers, prefer to go through Cimahi, it's less crowded.

text: Tempat yang sejuk, nyaman dan indah. Fasilitasnya juga bagus, walau masih ada yg di perbaiki. Tempat makannya kece dan asik . Makannya juga variasi dr makanan ringan sampai berat. Tiket untuk 2 orang 110 rb
english_translation: A cool, comfortable, and beautiful place. The facilities are also good, although some are still being repaired. The dining area is cool and fun. The food also has variety, from snacks to heavy meals. Tickets for 2 people are 110 thousand.

text:
Resort yang berlokasi di kawasan ciater ini sangat lah menarik.
Hamparan hutan pinus yang ada dengan bentuk villa yang terbuat dari kayu membuat kita merasa nyaman dan betah untuk menghabiskan waktu disini.
english_translation:
The resort located in the Ciater area is very attractive.
The expanse of pine forest with villas made of wood makes us feel comfortable and at home spending time here.

text: Tempat wisata yg luas namun krn masih terbilang baru, masih dlm pembangun masih banyak area kosong,namun indah dipandang dan saya penasaran dgn area S1ada apa yaa ga sempet kesitu krn puanasnyaaa ampun deh.
english_translation: A spacious tourist spot, but because it's still considered new, it's still under development and there are many empty areas. However, it's beautiful to look at and I'm curious about area S1, wondering what's there because I didn't have time to go there due to the unbearable heat.

text: Tempatnya nyaman dan cukup buat sekedar bersantai sejenak. Lebih enak pagi hari agar lebih sepi dan udaranya sejuk. Kekurangannya tiket masuk berbayar lumayan juga kalau rombongan, karena dihitung perorang.
english_translation: The place is comfortable and enough for a brief moment of relaxation. It's better in the morning to avoid crowds and enjoy the cool air. The downside is that the entrance fee is quite pricey for a group, as it's charged per person.

text:
Tempat wisata yg luas, bnyk sarana permainan utk anak dan dwwasa, bungalownya bagus dan bersih, resto nya  jg keren, breakfastnya enak2. Pelayanan nya baik dan ramah.  Terbaik pokoknya 💯
Thank u grafika ❤ …
english_translation: A spacious tourist spot, with many recreational facilities for children and adults, the bungalows are nice and clean, the restaurant is also cool, and the breakfasts are delicious. The service is good and friendly. Simply the best 💯 Thank you Grafika ❤

text:
Pros :
-Suasana camping
-Banyak hiburan dalam hotel (tracking / paint ball / kasi makan hewan, etc)
-Api unggun
-Pegawai ramah

Cons :
-Wifi hanya ada di resto
-Kadang ada suara buah pinus jatuh diatas atap
english_translation:
Pros:
- Camping atmosphere
- Many hotel entertainment options (tracking / paintball / feeding animals, etc.)
- Bonfire
- Friendly staff

Cons:
- Wi-Fi only available in the restaurant
- Sometimes the sound of pine cones falling on the roof

text:
bener2 bagus pemandangannya.. tempat nya juga luas ccok buat jlan2 skedar melihat2 pemandangan.. monggo jikalau ada yg mau nyoba kesana..
untuk tiket masuknya juga murah cuman 10rb/orng.. parkir motor 2rb..
english_translation:
The view is really beautiful.. the place is also spacious, suitable for strolling around just to see the scenery.. please, if anyone wants to try going there..
the entrance ticket is also cheap, only 10k per person.. motorcycle parking is 2k..

text: Masuk 15rb perorang, tiket motor 5rb .. isinya lumayan dan bagus, bisa naik kuda, perahu bebek, lebih ke pemandangan dan spot2 foto sih, ada candi dan patung patung ala ala bali .. good buat foto recomended
english_translation: Entry is 15,000 per person, motorcycle ticket is 5,000. The contents are decent and good, you can ride horses, paddle boats, it's more about the scenery and photo spots, there's a temple and Balinese-style statues. Good for photos, recommended.

text: Untuk hiking, melalui hutan Dan menyusuri pinggir sungai berbatu. jalan kaki dari tempat parkir sekitar 1 jam ,di lokasi banyak warung. Petunjuk arah kurang. Kalau baru pertama Kali lebih baik bersama guide.
english_translation: For hiking, through the forest and along the rocky riverbank. About a 1-hour walk from the parking lot, there are many stalls on site. Poor directions. If it's your first time, it's better to go with a guide.

text: Salut banget sama warga lokal. Bisa kelola tempat dengan mandirinya. Jalur tracking nya cukup menantang dan asik. Sayangnya karena musim hujan, air kurang jernih. Lebih baik kemari saat musim kemarau. 🙌🏻🙌🏻 …
english_translation: Really salute the local residents. They manage the place independently. The tracking path is quite challenging and fun. Unfortunately, due to the rainy season, the water wasn't very clear. It's better to come here during the dry season. 🙌🏻🙌🏻 …

text: sempat nyasar sebelum nyampe lokasi, karena kami ngambil rute dari jayagiri atas bukan dari jalan raya 😂, suka sih tempat nya buat camp cuma knp ke sini banyak cabe²an 🤣. negeri di atas awan jika beruntung …
english_translation: got lost before reaching the location, because we took the route from Jayagiri Atas instead of the main road 😂, I like the place for camping but why are there so many young girls here 🤣. land above the clouds if you're lucky…

text: Bersama keluarga maen ke sini menyenangkan, selain hawanya sejuk, airnya dingin dan parkirnya juga  luas, didalam banyak pendopo2 buat istirahat gratis tidak bayar lagi. Diatas juga ada sofa buat duduk duduk
english_translation: Playing here with family is enjoyable, besides the cool air and cold water, the parking is also spacious. Inside there are many free gazebos for resting without any additional charge. Upstairs there are also sofas for sitting.

text:
Parkir mobil 30rb sedangkan tiket masuk 15rb perorang
Medan jalan cukup menegangkan saat kabut turun dan jalanan terus menanjak
Banyak yang menjajakan makanan, oleh, naik kuda di atas
Pemandangan cukup bagus
english_translation:
Parking is 30,000 rupiah while the entrance ticket is 15,000 rupiah per person.
The road was quite tense when fog descended and the road kept climbing.
Many were selling food, souvenirs, and offering horse rides above.
The view is quite good.

text: Udara disana seger sih...lumayan rame... parkir klo weekend rame...untuk makanan sebenernya bisa ditemuin juga di kota bahkan lebih murah, tp disini lebih mahal harganya...cocok klo utk keluarga dgn anak2...
english_translation: The air there is fresh... it's quite crowded... parking is packed on weekends... for food, you can actually find it in the city and it's cheaper, but the prices here are more expensive... suitable for families with children...

text:
pemandangannya bagus,banyak spot foto yg instagramable banget.apalagi kalau sore,sunsetnya indah.
cuma hati2 aja kalau kesini sehabis hujan soalnya jalan licin,dan tanah merah pasti nempel disandal/sepatu😋 …
english_translation:
The view is good, lots of very Instagrammable photo spots. Especially in the afternoon, the sunset is beautiful.
Just be careful if you come here after it rains because the road is slippery, and the red soil will definitely stick to your sandals/shoes 😋 ...

text: Tempat yang sejuk,nyaman,htm 20 rb/orang bisa di tukar dgn minuman.terdapat cafe di dlm.tempat sgt luas di tengah hutan pinus,bagus untuk family gathering,bnyk kegiatan yg bisa dilakukan semacam outbond dll.
english_translation: A cool, comfortable place, entrance fee 20 thousand IDR per person, exchangeable for drinks. There is a cafe inside. The place is very spacious in the middle of a pine forest, good for family gatherings, many activities can be done such as outbound etc.

text:
Air jernih, tempat yang bagus untuk hiking, memiliki entri yang bagus. Tolong jangan pergi ke tempat ini sendirian karena jalurnya agak berbahaya.

Anda bisa merasakan angin sepoi-sepoi di dekat air terjun.
english_translation:
Clear water, a great place for hiking, has a nice entrance. Please don't go to this place alone as the trail is a bit dangerous.

You can feel the breeze near the waterfall.

text:
Tiket masuknya week day 40.000
Asli keren banget.
Sejuk dan Indah tempatnya.
Kekurangannya hanya jalannya ada yg rusak.
Dan sialnya ban bocor pas lagi di atas.
🤦🏻‍♂️🤦🏻‍♂️🤦🏻‍♂️
Tapi secara keseluruhan mantab.
english_translation:
The entrance fee on weekdays is 40,000.
It's really amazing.
The place is cool and beautiful.
The only downside is that some of the roads are damaged.
And unfortunately, I got a flat tire while I was up there.
🤦🏻‍♂️🤦🏻‍♂️🤦🏻‍♂️
But overall, it's great.

text: Keren, dingin polll, edukasi ke pedagang mulai diperbaiki, waktu berkunjung udah ga ada pungli. Pas datang kesini hujan deres suasananya jadi tambah epic. Sayangnya masjidnya ga terawat bocor di semua bagian
