english_translation: Cool, extremely cold, the education for traders is starting to improve, there's no more extortion for visiting hours. When I arrived here, it was raining heavily, which made the atmosphere even more epic. Unfortunately, the mosque is neglected, with leaks everywhere.

text: Wah tempat yang satu ini sangat sangat cocok untuk kita jalan sehat sambil.berfoto.. tempat yang luas yang memberikan pemandangan dan memanjakan mata cocok untuk alternatif pilihan liburan budget tentunya...
english_translation: Wow, this place is very, very suitable for us to take a healthy walk and take photos. It's a spacious place that offers scenic views and is pleasing to the eye, making it a suitable alternative for a budget holiday.

text: Gunung yg cocok untuk pendaki pemula, keadaan yang sejuk, asri tapi juga dingim karena berada di ketinggian. Parkir luas, biaya masuk tidak lebih dari 20rb. Area camp luas dan juga banyak spot foto yg bagus.
english_translation: A mountain suitable for beginner hikers, cool and green, but also cold due to its altitude. Spacious parking, entrance fee no more than 20,000 IDR. The camping area is vast and there are many good photo spots.

text:
Saya masuk dg istri dan 2 anak pake motor kena 79rb... Udah termasuk biaya parkir, jgn mau bayar lagi ke tk parkir, bilang tiket udh termasuk parkir..
Btw view kawah n alamnya ga pnh bikin bosen dikunjungi..
english_translation:
I entered with my wife and 2 children on a motorcycle, it cost 79,000 IDR... It already includes parking fees, don't be willing to pay the parking attendant again, say the ticket already includes parking.
By the way, the crater view and nature are never boring to visit.

text:
Tempat nya bagus banyak spot foto nya,ada mini zoo juga ( kelinci,domba,burung) harga tiket 50.000/orang tiket bisa di tuker minuman
Suka ada promo dari bank tertentu kemaren dari BRI beli 3 tiket gratis 1 👍
english_translation:
The place is nice with many photo spots, there's also a mini zoo (rabbits, sheep, birds). The ticket price is 50,000 IDR/person, and the ticket can be exchanged for a drink.
They often have promotions from certain banks. Yesterday, with BRI, we bought 3 tickets and got 1 free 👍

text: Tempat nyaman untuk keluarga, ada slider rainbow, ada macam2 permainan dan juga banyak macam makanan. Buat yang punya anak dan ingin mengajarkan anaknya untuk interaksi dengan hewan, disini juga ada minizoo.
english_translation: A comfortable place for families, there's a rainbow slider, various games, and also many kinds of food. For those who have children and want to teach them to interact with animals, there's also a mini zoo here.

text: Salah Satu Destinasi Wisata Di Daerah Lembang, Dengan Menyuguhkan pemandangan yang indah, danau, dan hamparan bukit yang indah, disertai spot selfi dan banyak wahana,, Pelayanan Karyawan juga Ramah Dan Prima
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations in the Lembang area, offering beautiful scenery, a lake, and beautiful rolling hills, along with selfie spots and many attractions. The employee service is also friendly and excellent.

text: Bagi masyarakat Jawa barat khususnya, destinasi wisata Tangkuban Parahu tidak asing. Destinasi ini sangat bagus akan pemandangannya yang alami. Suasana nyaman, udara sejuk menambah betah berlama-lama disini.
english_translation: For the West Javanese community in particular, the Tangkuban Parahu tourist destination is familiar. This destination has very good natural scenery. The comfortable atmosphere and cool air make you want to linger here.

text:
Wisatanya luas n bnyk wahananya, cm tiap wahana bayar lg..
Htm 30rb/org, naik perahu motor 25rb/org, sepeda air 30rb/org anak diatas 1th udh kena tiket, ksh makan kelinci 25rb/org, dan msh bnyk lg wahana lain
english_translation:
The attractions are extensive and have many rides, but each ride costs extra.
Entrance fee is 30,000 IDR/person, motorboat ride is 25,000 IDR/person, pedal boat is 30,000 IDR/person, children above 1 year old already need a ticket, feeding rabbits is 25,000 IDR/person, and there are many other attractions.

text: Bagus tempatnya Sepi nyaman,  bayar masuk gratis minuman,  luas,  cuman untuk labirin jgn masuk sebaiknya kalau musim hujan karena becek kaya rawa,  lebih bagus kayanya kalau danau perbaikan nya sudah selesai
english_translation: The place is good. Quiet and comfortable. Entrance is free, drinks are provided. It's spacious. Just don't go into the maze during the rainy season, it's muddy like a swamp. It would be better, I think, if the lake repairs are finished.

text: Dateng ke Curug Maribaya jalan dari Tahura, pas nyampe tempatnya enak banget buat istirahat. Adem, ada suara air dan ada monyet monyet yang berkeliaran. Cocok untuk piknik bareng keluarga atau temen-temen 😊 …
english_translation: Went to Curug Maribaya, the road from Tahura, when we arrived at the place, it was really nice to rest. Cool, there was the sound of water and monkeys roaming around. Suitable for a picnic with family or friends 😊

text: Biasa aja sih tempat foto2 gitu aja.. Kesana pas hujan, karena tmptnya outdoor jadi susah gt buat foto2 nya.. Spot fotonya ada yg diatas banget, lelah jalannya, tp fasilitas shuttle nya sangat membantu banget
english_translation: It's just an ordinary place for taking photos. I went there during the rain, and since the place is outdoors, it was difficult to take pictures. Some photo spots are very high up, the walk is tiring, but the shuttle facility is very helpful.

text: Tempatnya Luasss.. banyak spot foto yg menarik..  Camp.Rumah.Pondokan semua Terawat dengan bersih.. ada juga permainan paintball.flying fox.. Reccomend banget untuk yg mau camping dengan suasana hutan pinus..
english_translation: The place is huuuuuge.. lots of interesting photo spots.. Campsites, houses, and cabins are all kept clean.. There's also paintball and flying fox games.. Highly recommended for those who want to camp in a pine forest atmosphere..

text: Makanan disini kisaran harga 15rb-35rb,- dan Minuman 5rb-25rb,-porsi... Tidak bisa menggunakan uang cash lgsg ke penjual.. harus menukarkan uang menjadi koin dan skrg dikenakan pajak untuk penukaran uang 10%.
english_translation: Food here ranges from 15k-35k, and drinks from 5k-25k. You cannot pay the seller directly with cash. You must exchange your money for coins, and now there is a 10% tax on money exchange.

text: Tempat nyaman, cuma keganggu aja sama populasi monyet yang ada disana. Insting hewannya sudah hilang karena sering diberi makanan oleh manusia, jadi dia akan merebut kresek yang dibawa pengunjung dengan paksa
english_translation: Comfortable place, just disturbed by the monkey population there. Their animal instincts are gone because they are often fed by humans, so they will forcibly snatch plastic bags carried by visitors.

text: spot photo nya bgus2 dan terawat, ada mushola , toilet nya bersih dan tersedia tissu, foodcourt nya juga enk2 dan hrga nya terjangkau ,dan prokes nya juga di jalankan dengan sangat baik , pko nya mantaappp👍 …
english_translation: The photo spots are great and well-maintained, there's a prayer room, the toilets are clean and have tissues, the food court is also delicious and affordable, and health protocols are implemented very well. Overall, it's excellent 👍

text:
tiket 40rb+10rb per orng. mobil 10rb.
t4 sangat luas , di sediakan kendaraan untuk kembali ke t4 parkir.
koleksi anggreknya sedikit.
ada arena outbond. ada t4 bermain anak2. kelinci. dan jembatan gantung kayu
english_translation:
ticket 40k+10k per person. car 10k.
The location is very spacious, vehicles are provided to return to the parking area.
The orchid collection is small.
There is an outbound arena. There is a children's play area. rabbits. and a wooden suspension bridge

text: Gunung putri lembang..  Khusus para pendaki pemula seperti saya. . Tempat ini cocok buat kita nge camp.. Tempatnya keren. Diatas kita bisa melihat pemandangan kota bandung. Dan sunrise yg sangat menakjubkan..
english_translation: Gunung Putri Lembang.. Specifically for beginner hikers like me. This place is perfect for us to camp. The place is cool. From above we can see the city view of Bandung. And a very amazing sunrise..

text:
Saya pernah kesana pke bus pas mau sampe  tiba2 ada yg kawal bus...kirain gratis tau2 bayar minta 300rb ..hadewuh kasih panitia..
Tolong pihak maribaya di tindak dong oknum kaya gtu...bisa mngurangi pngunjung
english_translation:
I went there by bus, and just before we arrived, someone escorted the bus. I thought it was free, but then they asked for 300,000 rupiah. Oh my, I gave it to the committee.
Please, Maribaya authorities, take action against such individuals. They can reduce the number of visitors.

text:
Sdh 4 kali ke sini tetap mengasyikkan...selalu ada spot baru🤗
masukan utk pengelola:1.Mushola & tempat wudhu dekat Kampung Leuit utk wanita utk lebih tertutup saja 2.Tambah jumlah tempat sampahnya juga ya 🙏 …
english_translation:
It's the 4th time I've been here and it's still fun... there's always a new spot 🤗
Suggestions for management: 1. The prayer room & ablution area near Kampung Leuit for women could be more private. 2. Please add more trash bins as well 🙏 ...

text: Mungkin krn baru, areanya masih terbatas. Banyak tempat main lain di sekitar sana. Mungkin konsepnya seperti food court tp versi tempat main. Beragam tempat main di area yg sama tp htm dan pintu masuk beda2 😅
english_translation: Perhaps because it's new, the area is still limited. There are many other play areas around there. Perhaps the concept is like a food court but a play area version. Various play areas in the same area but with different entrance fees and entrances 😅

text: Keren pkonya mh trs brsih terawat gak berserakan sampah ingat wkt itu bru aja seminggu kita dr situ eh sminggu yg lalunya gunung tangkuban prahu lg erupsi. Kaget bnr smg tdk ada lg musibah2 kdpanya. Aamiin...
english_translation: It's amazing, it's always clean and well-maintained, no scattered trash. I remember we were just there a week ago, and the week before that, Mount Tangkuban Perahu erupted. I was so shocked, I hope there are no more disasters in the future. Amen...

text: Adem, tiketnya masih terjangkau, bunga bunga nya bagus, sayang sekali pas beli nasi goreng dan mie tektek difoodcourt "DAPUR IBU", rasa makanannya kurang enak.. harganya range 30-40rb sudah pajak.. ga worth..
english_translation: The ticket price is still affordable, the flowers are nice. It's a shame that when I bought fried rice and mie tektek at the food court "DAPUR IBU," the food didn't taste good. The price was around 30-40rb including tax... not worth it.

text: Tempatnya kaga luas,fasilitas masih kurang,seperti lift.soalnya kasian ibu2 naik tangga lumayan.and ke jembatan bayar lagi ,ke pintu masuk bayar .seharusnya pintu masuknya aja yg bayar ,soalnya belum lengkap.
english_translation: The place is not spacious, facilities are still lacking, like an elevator. Because it's a pity for the mothers to climb the stairs, it's quite a lot. And to get to the bridge there's another fee, to get to the entrance there's a fee. They should only charge for the entrance, because it's not complete yet.

text: Tempatnya indah cocok sekali untuk berfoto selfi,disini juga terdapat beberapa permainan ada 3 permainan,yaitu:Flyng Fox,Jembatan Gantung dan Turun Tebing harga tiket permainanya ada yang 15.000 hingga 25.000
english_translation: The place is beautiful, very suitable for taking selfies. There are also several games here, there are 3 games, namely: Flying Fox, Hanging Bridge and Cliff Descent. The ticket prices for the games range from 15,000 to 25,000.

text: Tempat wisata yang sudah terkenal di indonesia, pemandangannya bagus banget, cuacanya juga sejuk. Tiket masuknya 54rb untuk 2org dengan motor, gak dipungut biaya parkir lagi. Semoga next time bisa kesana lagi
english_translation: A famous tourist spot in Indonesia, the scenery is really beautiful, and the weather is also cool. The entrance ticket is 54,000 for 2 people with a motorcycle, and there's no additional parking fee. Hopefully, I can go there again next time.

text: Salah satu wisata alam yang menjadi andalan kota kembang ini cukup ramai dikunjungi wisatawan. Tersedia shuttle dari parkiran bawah menuju puncak. Atau yg membawa mobil pribadi bisa langsung parkir di puncak.
english_translation: One of the natural attractions that is the mainstay of the flower city is quite crowded with tourists. A shuttle is available from the lower parking area to the summit. Or those who bring their private car can park directly at the summit.

text:
Bagus viewnya udaranya sejuk banget, pengalaman saya pertama kali kesini cukup menyenangkan

Masuknya cukup jauh. Di atas banyak penjual makanan ala kadarnya.

Jalannya lumayan terjal waktu mau turun ke kawah.
english_translation:
The view is good, the air is very cool, my first experience here was quite pleasant.

The entrance is quite far. Upstairs there are many makeshift food vendors.

The road is quite steep when going down to the crater.

text:
Lembah Dewata berlokasi di wilayah Lembang. Cocok banget buat yang mau dapet feel ala pulau Bali. Suasananya nyaman, udara sejuk dan bikin fresh banget.
🔖HTM 20.000 * dituker air mineral tiketnya
Parkir 5000 …
english_translation:
Lembah Dewata is located in the Lembang region. It's perfect for those who want to get a Bali-like feel. The atmosphere is comfortable, the air is cool, and it's very refreshing.
*Entrance Fee 20,000 (can be exchanged for a mineral water ticket)
Parking 5,000…

text: Kalau yang bawa kursi roda rada ribet karena terkadang nanjak dan ada tangganya, tapi so far asik buat yang bawa anak kecil karena banyak wahana bermain walaupun setiap masuk wahananya beda tersendiri harganya
english_translation: If you're bringing a wheelchair, it can be a bit tricky because sometimes there are slopes and stairs, but so far it's fun for those with young children because there are many play areas, although each ride has its own separate price.

text: Ke sini tahun 2020, saat itu untungnya masih sepi karena masih parah2nya covid. Hutan nya luas, vibe nya enak buat ngopi-ngopi santai sambil menikmati alam. Cuma sayangnya ada beberapa spot foto yang berbayar.
english_translation: Came here in 2020, luckily it was still quiet then because it was the height of COVID. The forest is vast, the vibe is great for relaxing with coffee while enjoying nature. It's just a shame that some photo spots have a fee.

text: Tempat yang menyejukan,,, Adem,,, memang belum banyak dibangun tapi menurut saya tetap nya cukup asik da masuk nya tidak begitu mahal hanya 10k,,, ada kereta nya lagi bikin sesuatu yang berbeda gitulah.  👍👍👍 …
english_translation: A cool place,,, refreshing,,, not much has been built yet but in my opinion it's quite fun and the entrance fee isn't too expensive, only 10k,,, and there's a train which makes it something different. 👍👍👍 …

text:
2 x kesini, gak pernah lama.
Mudah"an nanti bisa kesini lagi lain waktu.
Tempat nya bagus, sejuk, banyak spot foto, liat pemandangan dari atas bukit nya indah banget.
Masih ada beberapa yang masih di perbaiki.
english_translation:
Been here twice, never stayed long.
Hopefully, I can visit again another time.
The place is nice, cool, with many photo spots. The view from the hilltop is beautiful.
There are still some things under renovation.

text:
keren...tmpt wisata unik yg mudah dijangkau dr kota bdg ...biaya masuk murah....👍
saran u/ yg botram sebaiknya jgn dipinggir sungainya menghalangi yg mau explore batu2&sungai...agar disediakan tmpt khusys..🙏 …
english_translation:
Cool... a unique tourist spot that's easy to reach from Bandung city... cheap entrance fee.... 👍
Suggestion for those having picnics: it's better not to picnic by the river, as it obstructs those who want to explore the rocks and river... please provide a special place for picnics... 🙏

text: Tempat wisata di lereng Gunung Putri Lembang, ketinggian di atas 1000 mdpl, sore kesini sejuk banget.. banyak spot foto instagramable pokoknya wajib ke sini kalau main ke Lembang selain floating market dan zoo
english_translation: Tourist attractions on the slopes of Mount Putri Lembang, at an altitude above 1000 meters above sea level. It's very cool to come here in the afternoon. There are many Instagrammable photo spots, so it's a must-visit if you're going to Lembang besides Floating Market and the Zoo.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk hiking, treknya mudah untuk anak-anak, pemandangan yang bagus, jarak perjalanan pulang pergi kira-kira. 5,5 km, sayang sekali banyak sampah dimana-mana dan tidak ada toilet yang layak.
english_translation: A great place for hiking, the trail is easy for kids, good views, the round trip distance is approx. 5.5 km, it's a shame there's a lot of trash everywhere and no decent toilets.

text: Murah meriah,, bersih ...dan akses yang mudah di jangkau ,, cuma jalan nya masih batu2 kalo bisa untuk pemerintah daerah atw desa bisa lebih memperhatikan lagi masalah jalan ini ...agar lebih banyak pengunjung
english_translation: Cheap and cheerful, clean... and easily accessible. Just the road is still rocky. If possible, the local government or village can pay more attention to this road issue... to attract more visitors.

text: Air terjun yang bagus tapi banyak tangga dan tidak aman dengan anak kecil. Tetapi jika Anda bugar, itu pasti sepadan dengan perjalanan turun. Tangga perlu diperbaiki dan biaya 24k rupiah per orang jika lokal.
english_translation: A beautiful waterfall but many stairs and not safe with small children. But if you're fit, it's definitely worth the trip down. The stairs need fixing and it costs 24k rupiah per person if local.

text: Disni lebih ke banyak budaya chinnes gitu, bisa foto ala-ala pake kimono juga, banyak tempat untuk spot foro yang Instagramable, ada danau yg memanjakkan mata. Tiketnya juga bisa ditukar dengan sebuah minuman.
english_translation: It's more about having many Chinese cultures here, you can take photos dressed up in kimonos too, there are many Instagrammable photo spots, and a lake that's a feast for the eyes. The ticket can also be exchanged for a drink.

text: Tidak pernah bosan ke tempat ini. Ada miniatur kereta, naik perahu, wisata kuliner juga, terbaru ada rainbow slide. Menikmati udara sehat sambil bermain. Dengan tarif masuk 30rb per orang diluar wahana lainnya
english_translation: Never tired of coming to this place. There are train miniatures, boat rides, culinary tours, and most recently, a rainbow slide. Enjoying the fresh air while playing. With an entrance fee of 30,000 per person, excluding other attractions.

text: Panas banget... Ada yg bantu foto kita.. Dia tukang dagang, tapi ga mau di kasih duit .. Di sana ga ada pungli .... Baik2 tukang dagang nya ... Akhir nya buat tanda terimakasih saya pun beli mainan yg dia jual
english_translation: It's so hot... Someone helped us take a photo. He's a street vendor, but he refused to take money. There are no extortions there... The vendors are nice... In the end, as a thank you, I bought a toy he was selling.

text: Pemandangan bagus harga terjangkau, tapi yg disayangkan adanya polusi dari pertambangan pasir atau batu yg membuat kebul sekitar, ada juga monyet monyetnya galak gan wkwkw,p perlu reboisasi dan pengaturan alam
english_translation: Great view, affordable prices, but unfortunately there's pollution from sand or stone mining which creates dust all around. There are also fierce monkeys, lol. Reforestation and nature management are needed.

text: Taman Begonia.. Suka bgt disini.. Banyak hamparan bunga berwarna warni enak dipandang mata.. Saat masuk membawa kamera (selain kamera handphone) akan kena charge.. Tapi kalau kameranya mau dititip juga boleh..
english_translation: Begonia Park.. I really like it here.. Lots of colorful flower beds that are pleasing to the eye.. If you bring a camera (besides your phone camera) upon entering, there will be a charge.. But you can also leave your camera here if you wish..

text: sarana rekreasi keluarga, harga terjangkau suasananya adem sepanjang mata memandang, banyak view keren spot photo insta mania , arena bermain anak playing Fox, jembatan gantung banyak yang harus di coba d sini
english_translation: Family recreation facilities, affordable prices, cool atmosphere as far as the eye can see, many cool views for insta-mania photo spots, a children's play area called Playing Fox, a suspension bridge, many things to try here

text: Ini yang katanya lagi Viral, HTM 50.000/px, jembatan gantung 15.000/px, free 1 cup lemon tea, area lumayan luas tapi disedikan shuttle car. Untuk bawa anak2 belum cocok, lebih ke instragammable untuk dewasa...
english_translation: This is what they say is viral, Entrance fee 50,000/person, suspension bridge 15,000/person, free 1 cup of lemon tea, the area is quite spacious but a shuttle car is provided. Not suitable for bringing children, more for adults to be Instagrammable...

text: Buat emak2 yg suka selfie ini pas neh buat foto-foto...cuma harus kuat jalan kaki ya🤭hampir sama dengan GAA . Di sini buat yg pinter atau suka nyanyi boleh nyanyi sepuas nya asal nyawer buat akang sound nya🤣 …
english_translation: This is perfect for moms who like to take selfies... you just have to be able to walk a lot 🤭 it's almost the same as GAA. Here, those who are smart or like to sing can sing to their heart's content as long as they tip the sound guy 🤣...

text:
Saat review ini dibuat, Situ Ciburuy sedang tutup karena sedang proses pembangunan. Tetapi walaupun ditutup, terlihat bahwa bangunannya indah.
Sepertinya bakal menjadi tempat wisata yang menyenangkan nantinya.
english_translation: As this review is being made, Situ Ciburuy is closed due to ongoing construction. However, even though it's closed, the building looks beautiful. It seems like it will be a pleasant tourist spot in the future.

text: bagusssss! Keliling hutannya satu jalurr dan jalannya turunan 🤗 kalo mau balik ke parkiran naik shuttle bus yang udah disediain (free). kalo mau rabbit feeding bayar lg, kelincinya banyakkk + gembul-gembul 🥺 …
english_translation: Great! The forest tour is a single path and the path is downhill 🤗 if you want to go back to the parking lot, take the shuttle bus provided (free). if you want to do rabbit feeding, it costs extra, there are lots of rabbits + they are so chubby 🥺 …

text: Hidden gem! The best waterfall in Bandung! Must go! Tp hati2 karena perjalanan dr tempat parkir ke curug cukup curam .. harus pake sepatu yg tidak licin. Mobil kesana .. harus extra hati² krn jalan naik turun.
english_translation: Hidden gem! The best waterfall in Bandung! Must go! But be careful because the journey from the parking lot to the waterfall is quite steep... you must wear non-slip shoes. Getting there by car... you have to be extra careful because the road is up and down.

text: Pas weekend dsini dicharge 25,000, lumayan bisa jalan2 tapi waktu kesini rame banget.. jalan2nya juga lumayan jauh, naik wahana pastinya bayar lg, dsni juga bsa foto pake baju kimono dari Jepang di atas perahu
english_translation: On weekends, the charge here is 25,000. It's decent enough for a stroll, but it was very crowded when I came here. The walk itself is quite far. Riding attractions definitely costs extra. Here, you can also take photos wearing a Japanese kimono on a boat.

text: Suka bgt kesini..banyak spot foto, udaranya fresh bangt..bener2 kaya di hutan tapi hutan modern 😬 dan kalo kesini, pakai alas kaki yg nyaman yaa..dan yg pasti outfitnya harus keren..sayang aja kalo ga foto2 😬😬
english_translation: I really like coming here.. there are many photo spots, the air is so fresh.. it really feels like a forest but a modern one 😬 and if you come here, wear comfortable footwear.. and of course, the outfit must be cool.. it would be a shame not to take photos 😬😬

text: Saya sangat suka melihat aneka bunga yg begitu banyak jenis nya dan membuat mata saya manja selalu ingin berswa foto di objek bunga serta di tambah dengan bermacam bentuk binatang yg di buat dengan sempurna...
english_translation: I really love seeing the wide variety of flowers, so many different kinds, and it always makes my eyes want to take photos of the flower displays, plus there are various animal shapes that are perfectly made.

text: Tiket masuk 35 rb per orang, anak 2 th sudah dihitung, tiap permainan bayar, prosotan 30 rb, game VR kisaran 30 rb, jajanan sangat mahal bagiku sosis/condok 25 rb/biji, es cendol 15 rb/cup, gorengan 20 rb isi 3
english_translation: Entrance fee 35,000 IDR per person, children 2 years and up are counted, each game is paid for separately, slide 30,000 IDR, VR games around 30,000 IDR, snacks are very expensive for me, sausage/corn dog 25,000 IDR each, cendol ice 15,000 IDR per cup, fried snacks 20,000 IDR for 3 pieces

text: Lebih rapi, tertata, hanya saja utk turun ke kawah domas, harus pakai pemandu lokal, kalau harganya lebih bersahabat, akan lebih menarik. 100rb utk ber5 terlalu tinggi, dan sudah ada tiket masuk di pintu utama.
english_translation: Neater, more organized, but to go down to the Domas crater, you need a local guide. If the price were more friendly, it would be more attractive. 100,000 rupiah for 5 people is too high, and there's already an entrance ticket at the main gate.

text: dulu ini sebelum anak zaman now datang masih gratis, masih mantap, sekarang parkir bayar, masuk bayar, makan disekitar jadi mahal. ya tak apalah jadi penghasilan bagi warga sekitar. kebayar sama pemandangannya.
english_translation: Before the current generation arrived, this was still free and great. Now parking costs money, entry costs money, and eating nearby has become expensive. But that's okay, it provides income for the local residents. The scenery makes up for it.

text: Cocok buat spot foto, cuma agak kemahalan kalo 50k hanya dapat soft drink, shuttle car aja. Nilai plus nya selain spot fotonya para pegawainya baik, ramah dan sabar bgt bantuin pengunjung yg minta tolong fotoin
english_translation: Great for photo spots, just a bit overpriced if you only get a soft drink and shuttle car for 50k. The plus points, besides the photo spots, are the staff. They are kind, friendly, and very patient in helping visitors who ask them to take photos.

text: Formasi batuan nya unik. Jalan menuju ke tempat masih berbatu tapi bisa di lewati dgn mudah. Ada pungutan melewati jln sebelum lokasi rp 10 rb per kendaraan entah resmi atau liar di luar biaya tiket dan parkir.
english_translation: The rock formations are unique. The road to the place is still rocky but easily passable. There is a fee to pass the road before the location, Rp 10,000 per vehicle, whether official or unofficial, outside of ticket and parking fees.

text: Bagus lah nantinya klau semua sudah selesai pembangunanya....jarang loo tiket di ganti dengan minuman ,snack ,yg sudah disediakan pertahankan terus niih karena ng semua ada kaya gini ...menambah promosi deh ...
english_translation: It will be good when all the construction is finished... it's rare for tickets to be replaced with drinks and snacks that have been provided, keep it up because not everyone has this... it adds to the promotion...

text: Asyik banget kalau yang mau cari tempat lega buat ngadem di kala pandemi kaya gini.. tempatnya lega.. bisa ngadem di danau atau ditamannya.. maenan sedikit tp no problem.. anak2 bisa lari2 bebas aja udh happy..
english_translation: It's so fun if you're looking for a spacious place to cool off during a pandemic like this. The place is spacious; you can chill by the lake or in the garden. Not many toys, but no problem; kids are happy just being able to run around freely.

text:
Tempatnya luas bangat,  viewnya bagus.
Beli tiket dapat 1 minuman gratis.
Banyak gazebo gazebo dirute jalan jadi kalau lelah bisa istirahat.
Untuk belanja makanan/jajanan harus beli coin.
Kamar mandinya banyak.
english_translation:
The place is very spacious, the view is good.
Buying a ticket gets you 1 free drink.
There are many gazebos along the path, so you can rest if you get tired.
To buy food/snacks, you need to buy coins.
There are many bathrooms.

text: Tempatnya luas, banyak spot² buat foto yg keren. Ada berbagai wahana juga di sini, seperti taman kelinci, kota mini, kolam renang, wahana air (perahu, sampan, kano), rainbow garden. Banyak bunga yg cantik² juga
english_translation: The place is spacious, with many cool photo spots. There are also various attractions here, such as a rabbit park, mini city, swimming pool, water attractions (boats, sampans, canoes), and a rainbow garden. There are also many beautiful flowers.

text: Airnya coklat kalo lagi musim hujan. Masuk dari atas, parkir diatas dekat warung. Tiket masuk 15rb, parkir motor 5rb. Jalan kebawah dari parkiran sekitar 2km lewat jalan setapak bertanah, licin kalo lagi hujan.
english_translation: The water is brown during the rainy season. Enter from above, park on top near the stall. Entrance ticket is 15,000 IDR, motorcycle parking is 5,000 IDR. Walk down from the parking lot for about 2km via a dirt path, it's slippery when it rains.

text: Bagus banget .. bagi wisatawan cocok utk selfi2.. kalo bisa ditingkatkan lagi utk pelayanan serta tempat parkir ditambahi ... atau dbuatkan bangunan rooftop lebih banyak biar bisa melihat pemandangan lebih luas
english_translation: Great.. perfect for tourists who want to take selfies. If possible, the service could be improved and more parking spaces added, or more rooftop buildings could be built to offer a wider view.

text: Anak usia 7th naik faying fox,,,, orang tua nunggu balik 1 jam lebih. Ternyata suruh jalan sama petugas. Ini klo hilang ngga tau jalan balik ketempat semula siapa yg tanggung jawab? Dengan medan yg ngga gampang
english_translation: A 7-year-old child is riding the flying fox... parents waited over an hour for them to return. It turns out the staff told them to walk. If they get lost and can't find their way back to the starting point, who will be responsible? Especially with difficult terrain.

text: Harga tiketnya 50.000 sampai 65.000 per orang baik weekday maupun weekend. Sudah gratis minuman juga. Tempatnya bagus Pelayanan nya ramah serta banyak spot spot foto menarik cocok buat hiburan dan liburan anda.
english_translation: The ticket price is 50,000 to 65,000 per person, both on weekdays and weekends. A drink is also included for free. The place is nice, the service is friendly, and there are many interesting photo spots, suitable for your entertainment and holidays.

text: Waktu dateng kesnaa airnya kotor banget keruh, jalan menuju kesana dari tempat parkir juga cukup jauh + jalannya kurang bagus, harga masuknya 15.000 dan disana disediakan penyewaan pelampung dengan harga 10.000
english_translation: When I went there, the water was very dirty and murky. The path from the parking lot to get there was also quite far and the road wasn't good. The entrance fee was 15,000, and they provided life jacket rentals for 10,000.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang asri  nyaman serta aman . Perlu peningkatan kerapihan dan kebersihan . Pelayanan ramah dan cepat agar dipertahankan ... betah bermalam dgn harga yg terjangkau dan masakan restonya yg enak
english_translation: The natural attractions are beautiful, comfortable, and safe. Improvements in tidiness and cleanliness are needed. Friendly and fast service should be maintained... you'll feel at home staying overnight with affordable prices and delicious restaurant food.

text:
Tempat yg cocok utk camping dan outbond, ga jauh dari gn tangkuban perahu dan wisata alam lainnya. View nya mantap... Recomended buat yg ingin uji nyali outbond dan camping.
Tersedia byk villa juga urban camp...
english_translation:
A suitable place for camping and outbound, not far from Mount Tangkuban Perahu and other nature attractions. The view is awesome... Recommended for those who want to test their courage with outbound and camping.
Many villas are also available, including urban camps...

text: Tempat rekreasi alam bebas untuk pelepas penat ketika liburan kerja. Karna masih di kelilingi hutan pinus dan jg air terjun . Maribaya menyediakan pula makann siap saji untuk wisatawan yg berkunjung di tempat in
english_translation: An outdoor recreation spot to relieve fatigue during work holidays. Because it is still surrounded by pine forests and waterfalls. Maribaya also provides ready-to-eat food for tourists who visit this place.

text:
Asli tempatnya bagus banget. Bersih, sampai ke toilet juga bersih. Murah dan petugasnya cukup ramah. Udaranya seger cocok buat yang mau healing-healing.

Untuk tiket masuk 50rb per orang. Parkir untuk motor 5rb.
english_translation:
The place is really great. Clean, even the toilets are clean. Cheap and the staff are quite friendly. The air is fresh, suitable for those who want to heal.

The entrance ticket is 50,000 IDR per person. Parking for motorcycles is 5,000 IDR.

text: Tempat yang sejuk untuk melepaskan diri sejenak dari rutinitas. Tiket parkir mobil 10rb, tiket masuk per orang kalau weekend 50rb (anak di atas 3 tahun dihitung). Di dalam bisa ditukarkan dengan makanan/minuman.
english_translation: A cool place to escape from the routine for a while. Car parking ticket 10rb, entrance ticket per person on weekends 50rb (children over 3 years old are counted). Inside can be exchanged for food/drinks.

text: Ini lokasi ngemping paling deket dari wilayah cimahi, tempatnya adem nyaman, asri, hutan pinus nya lebat, spot fotonya banyak, air terjunnya seger bisa dipake mandi atau sekedar maen air, untuk prewed juga bagus
english_translation: This is the closest camping location to the Cimahi area, the place is cool, comfortable, beautiful, the pine forest is dense, there are many photo spots, the waterfall is refreshing and can be used for bathing or just playing in the water, it's also good for pre-weddings

text:
Mantap
Gowes di siang hari di sambut kera" yang kelaparan. sampai puncak berteduh di saung disuguhi Pemandangan yang Indah & angin sepoy" Jadi tidak ingin pulang.
Semoga di tingkatkan lagi sarana & prasarana nya
english_translation:
Awesome! Cycling during the day, welcomed by hungry monkeys. Reached the summit and took shelter in a gazebo, treated to a beautiful view and a gentle breeze. Didn't want to go home.
Hope the facilities and infrastructure can be improved further.

text:
Aneka kuliner dan spot foto instagramable, pas buat family gathering dan anak-anak bermain di beberapa wahana..
Kesini di weekday juga seringnya ada rombongan. Reservasi aja sebelumnya,

Cek You Tube: Fitri Keuw
english_translation:
A variety of culinary delights and Instagrammable photo spots, perfect for family gatherings and children playing on several rides.
Even on weekdays, there are often groups here. Just make a reservation in advance.

Check You Tube: Fitri Keuw

text: Tempat yang asri. Anda bisa membeli tiket masuk ke kebun strawberry 10ribu beserta jus strawberry,  memberi makan rusa secara langsung.  Pengalaman yang menarik. Tempat rekomendasi untuk dijadikan tujuan wisata.
english_translation: A beautiful place. You can buy tickets to the strawberry garden for 10,000 Rupiah including strawberry juice, and feed the deer directly. An interesting experience. A recommended place to visit.

text: Track menuju curug menuruni anak tangga, relatif aman sudah rapi dibatu plester semen, fasilitas yg ada; warung sedia mie instan & aneka minuman, toilet, mushola, parkir motor & mobil di samping area pintu masuk
english_translation: The track to the waterfall descends via stairs, relatively safe and neatly paved with cemented stones. Available facilities include a kiosk selling instant noodles and various drinks, a toilet, a prayer room, and parking for motorcycles and cars next to the entrance area.

text: Sudah lama tidak kesini, sekarang sudah disulap menjadi tempat wisata yang nyaman untuk refreshing bersama keluarga, dengan harga makanan yang wajar dan parkirnya juga tidak bayar. Pokoknya recommended tempatnya
english_translation: It's been a long time since I've been here, now it has been transformed into a comfortable tourist spot for family relaxation, with reasonable food prices and free parking. Definitely a recommended place.

text: Sangat kecewa.bawa makanan minuman ngga boleh,ngga ada tempat istirahat,ngga ada tempat buat ibu menyusui,tiket mahal,mau renang bayar lg,mau foto di atas jembatan pun harus bayar lg.tempat rekreasi  payahhhhhhh
english_translation: Very disappointed. Bringing food and drinks is not allowed, there are no resting places, no breastfeeding room, tickets are expensive, and you have to pay again to swim, and you have to pay again to take photos on the bridge. This recreational place is terrible.

text: Buat Foto OOTD bagus bgt, cuman kekurangan tiap masuk ke tempat satu ke yg yg lainnya ada tarif bayar. Kalo yg gak suka track kayak bukit, mendingan jangan kesini 😅. Walaupun ada mobil untuk naik dan turunnya. …
english_translation: The OOTD photos are really good, but the only downside is that there's a fee every time you go from one place to another. If you don't like tracks like hills, it's better not to come here 😅. Even though there are cars for going up and down. …

text: Pengen lama-lama disiniii🏞 akses jalan pun lumayan mudah, recomended bgt buat tambahin foto" instagram❣️ juga menghidupkan ekonomi masyarakat daerah sana yg juga mencari rupiah lewat tempat wisata tersebeut👍👍👍 …
english_translation: I want to stay here for a long timeeee🏞 The road access is quite easy, highly recommended for adding Instagram photos❣️ It also revitalizes the local economy, as the people there earn their living through this tourist spot👍👍👍 …

text: Sempet nyasar jauh pas masuk lokasi Curug Sawernya, malah naik terus ke atas pake motor 😂😂😂, ternyata deket aja masih di bawah deket hutan pinusnya. Dari hutan pinus ke curug sawernya cuma jalan aja dikit haha …
english_translation: Got lost for a while when entering the Curug Sawer location, ended up going further up on the motorbike 😂😂😂, it turns out it was close by, still below near the pine forest. From the pine forest to Curug Sawer, it's just a short walk haha…

text: Air terjunnya tinggi banget, akses kebawah agak licin dan berbahaya pas musim hujan. Rekomen banget buat yang masih muda2 tapi ga rekomen untuk yang sudah tua mau kesini, tangga akses naik turunnya lumayan jauh.
english_translation: The waterfall is very high, access down is quite slippery and dangerous during the rainy season. Highly recommended for young people but not recommended for older people to visit here, the stairs for going up and down are quite far.

text: Kawasan luas , fasilitas lengkap , untuk makan istirahat dan shalat , banyak spot yang bisa dikunjungi dan siap siap takjub bagi yang pertama kali datang berkunjung , di saran kan membawa kamera untuk stock poto
english_translation: Spacious area, complete facilities for eating, resting, and praying, many spots to visit, and prepare to be amazed for first-time visitors. It is recommended to bring a camera for photo stock.

text: Tempat dg pemandangan yg sangat indah,pelayanan yg ramah,warga setempat yg welcome,harga makanan/jajanan yg standar,dan panting suhu yg sangat2 dingin sekali...siapkan jaket tebel sma selimut kalo mau berkunjung
english_translation: A place with a very beautiful view, friendly service, welcoming locals, standard food/snack prices, and critically, very, very cold temperatures... bring a thick jacket and a blanket if you plan to visit.

text: Pertama masuk langsung ngerasa kayak di Bali gitu suasana nya. Udah gitu cocok banget buat anak2 yang mau berinteraksi sama kuda poni, keledai, kelinci, domba. Pemandangannya juga bagus dan cukup memanjakan mata.
english_translation: As soon as you enter, you feel like you're in Bali with the atmosphere. Plus, it's perfect for kids who want to interact with ponies, donkeys, rabbits, and sheep. The scenery is also beautiful and quite pleasing to the eye.

text: Tempat camping favorit di Bandung, bisa lihat lautan awan dari sini ketika pagi. Sambil lihat sunrise yang juga bagus. Tempatnya lumayan luas. Ada fasilitas toilet dan mushala juga. Trekingnya tidak terlalu jauh.
english_translation: Favorite camping spot in Bandung, you can see a sea of clouds from here in the morning. While enjoying the beautiful sunrise. The place is quite spacious. There are also toilet and prayer room facilities. The trekking is not too far.

text:
Wisata alam yang cukup menyenangkan bersamaan keluarga, bsa liwetan, berenang, dan bermain swafoto dengan bebatuan alam eksotik
Untuk rute perjalan cukup terjal,
Harga karcis masuk 8rb dan harga parkir motor 2 rb
english_translation:
A fairly enjoyable nature trip with family, you can have a picnic, swim, and take selfies with exotic natural rocks.
The travel route is quite steep.
Entrance ticket price is 8,000 rupiah and motorcycle parking is 2,000 rupiah.

text: Ngga ush panjang lebar ini salah satu wisata yg bs dibilang hampir semua org mgkn sdh prnh kesini. Terakhir kesini bbrp bln lalu dan tempatnya udh enak bgt, bagus. Bnyk spot photo. Cuma aja jajanannya mehong2 🤭 …
english_translation: No need to be long-winded, this is one of those tourist spots that arguably almost everyone has been to. Last time I was here was a few months ago, and the place was already really nice, good. Lots of photo spots. It's just that the snacks are really expensive 🤭...

text:
Suasana nyaman baik Dewasa maupun Anak2,Ada danau,disitu kita bisa naik perahu & ditengah Danau ada kuliner,jadi kita bisa makan disitu....
Saran....Jalan menuju obyek diperbaiki utk kenyamanan pengunjung,tks....
english_translation:
A comfortable atmosphere for both adults and children. There's a lake where you can go boating, and in the middle of the lake, there's a dining area, so you can eat there.
Suggestion: The road leading to the attraction should be improved for visitor comfort. Thanks.

text: Gunungnya tidak terlalu tinggi, dari bawah paling 30 menit sampai puncak. Treknya tidak terlalu susah cocok bawa anak kecil. Tempat kemping juga luas. Walau tidak begitu tinggi, pemandangan puncaknya luar biasa..
english_translation: The mountain isn't too high, it takes about 30 minutes to reach the summit from the bottom. The trail isn't too difficult, suitable for bringing small children. The campsite is also spacious. Although not very high, the summit view is amazing.

text: Lumayan utk liburan ketika di Bandung. Banyak spot bagus untuk foto. Air panasnya juga okelah. Sayang kl gak berendam jauh-jauh ke sini. Tapi sebaiknya jangan hari libur. Jadi kolam seperti milik sendiri, hehe...
english_translation: Quite good for a holiday when in Bandung. Many good spots for photos. The hot springs are also okay. It would be a shame not to soak in them when you've come all this way. But it's best not to come on holidays. Then the pool feels like it's all yours, hehe...

text: Lumayan bagus. Hanya saja untuk kamera dikenakan charge apabila dibawa masuk, padahal kalau pengunjung free foto pakai kamera pribadi akan semakin bagus hasilnya dan akan menjadi media promosi bagi pihak pemilik.
english_translation: Pretty good. It's just that there's a charge for bringing in a camera, even though if visitors could take photos with their personal cameras for free, the results would be even better and it would serve as promotional material for the owners.

text: Tempat yang asri, sejuk. Cocok untuk camping ceria bersama keluarga. Untuk mencapai curug aseupannya memang agak sulit dan tidak disarankan untuk anak- anak, tapi sesuai dengan yang kita harapkan sangatlah keren.
english_translation: A beautiful, cool place. Suitable for cheerful camping with the family. Reaching Aseupan waterfall is indeed a bit difficult and not recommended for children, but it was very cool, just as we had hoped.

text: Bagus tempatnya, banyak wahananya, explore tempatnya juga luas. Yg pasti capek sih tapi puas. Usahain kalo mau dapet foto bagus datengnya pas sore jam 3 ke atas, karna lampunya baru dinyalain jam 5an. Puas kesana
english_translation: The place is good, has many rides, and is spacious to explore. Definitely tiring but satisfying. Try to come after 3 PM if you want to get good photos, because the lights are only turned on around 5 PM. Satisfied with the visit.

text: Sekarang udah di renovasi jadi makin bagus. tiket masuk juga over pricey 30k satu orang. tempat yang bagus buat foto instagram gitu, terus disini juga nyediain studio buat photoshoot style jepang gitu pake kimono
english_translation: It's been renovated now, so it's even better. The entrance ticket is also overpriced at 30k per person. It's a good place for Instagram photos, and they also provide a studio for Japanese-style photoshoots using kimonos.

text: Selalu ada spot foto yg keren buatan alam.,alhamdulillah cuaca mendukung.,pokoknya salah satu destinasi wisata di lembang yg wajib dikunjungi.,oleh2nya juga terjangkau bnget harganya.,ada jual makanan juga.,♥♥♥♥♥
english_translation: There are always cool natural photo spots, thank God the weather supported it. Anyway, it's one of the must-visit tourist destinations in Lembang. The souvenirs are also very affordable. They also sell food. ♥♥♥♥♥

text:
Kurang begitu terawat.
Petunjuk jalan kurang, jemabatan menuju curug rusak.

Akses jalan juga kurang bagus. Agak susah kalau gak bawa kendaraan sendiri.
Tiketnya 15.000 sudah bisa masuk ke kebun teh sukawana juga
english_translation:
Not very well maintained.
Directions are lacking, the bridge leading to the waterfall is broken.

The road access is also not good. It's a bit difficult if you don't bring your own vehicle.
The ticket is 15,000 and you can also enter the Sukawana tea garden.

text: tempat nya lumayan enak buat refreshing, tiket masuk nya murah cuma 10 ribu, parkir motor nya ga bayar lagi, ada tempat outbond juga tapi harus bayar lagi, pemandangan nya enak untuk hunting, lokasi nya strategis
english_translation: The place is quite nice for refreshing, the entrance ticket is cheap at only 10 thousand, motorcycle parking is free, there is also an outbound area but it has to be paid for, the scenery is nice for hunting, the location is strategic.

text: HTM 25rb saja bisa puas swafoti disini,tanaman segar semua,banyak spot2 foto yang indah..banyak jenis tanaman yang bisa kita beli bibit atau yg sudah jd pohon dan berbuah..toilet bersih..ada kantin jg di dalamnya
english_translation: Only 25,000 IDR to take great selfies here. All plants are fresh, with many beautiful photo spots. There are many types of plants whose seeds or fruit-bearing trees you can buy. The toilets are clean. There's also a canteen inside.

text: Tempat nya asri, udaranya segar, dan petugas sekitar sana ramah serta cekatan. Respect untuk petugas di curug sana, cuma yg bawa barang bawaan atau makanan harus hati" jangan di tinggal, takut di ambil kera liar.
english_translation: The place is beautiful and natural, the air is fresh, and the staff around there are friendly and efficient. Respect to the staff at the waterfall there, but those carrying luggage or food should be careful not to leave them unattended, as wild monkeys might take them.

text: Wisata murah meriah dengan htm 15k bisa menikmati hutan pinus, kebun teh & airterjun wajib dikunjungi bagi pecinta wisata alam. Udara nya yang segar benar2 menghilangkan kepenatan bisa untuk wisata keluarga juga.
english_translation: Affordable and budget-friendly tourism with an entrance fee of 15k allows you to enjoy pine forests, tea plantations, and waterfalls. It's a must-visit for nature lovers. The fresh air truly relieves fatigue and it's also suitable for family trips.

text:
tempat yang bagus dengan menejemen yang buruk. dari kecil sampe terakhir kesini taun lalu gak berubah baik pemandangan dan kelakuan menejemennyah.
tapi kesini buat menikmati pemandangan dan suasana dingin di sini.
english_translation:
A great place with bad management. From when I was little until my last visit last year, neither the scenery nor the management's behavior has changed.
But I come here to enjoy the view and the cold atmosphere.

text: Tempatnya bersih dan suasananya adem serta nyaman karena banyak pohon. Cuma untuk dapet view foto yg bagus-bagus harus bayar lagi. Tapi ada kebun binatang mininya yang bisa kasih makan hewan plus pegang dari dekat
english_translation: The place is clean and the atmosphere is cool and comfortable because there are many trees. It's just that to get good photo views, you have to pay extra. But there is a mini zoo where you can feed the animals and hold them up close.

text: Sensasi alamnya luar biasa...tiket masuknya terjangkau...asyiknya pas mau foto2 di bantu mas mas yg berjualan gelang dicarikan view yg bagus..ramah dan santun 👍👍alhamdulillah...insyaallah kelak akan kembali lagi …
english_translation: The natural sensation is amazing... the entrance fee is affordable... it's fun when taking photos, the bracelet vendors help find good views... friendly and polite 👍👍 Alhamdulillah... God willing, we will return again in the future...

text:
Bagus tempatnya dingin bagus untuk wisata bersama keluarga banyak tempat makan dan souvenir juga .
Biaya masuk 20rb/orang kebetulan saya pake motor roda 2 parkir paling atas 12rb/motor nya.
Next pengen kesini lagi
english_translation:
The place is good and cool, great for family trips. There are many food stalls and souvenir shops too.
The entrance fee is 20,000 IDR per person. Coincidentally, I used a 2-wheeled motorcycle, parking at the top cost 12,000 IDR per motorcycle.
Next time, I want to come here again.

text:
Tempat yang super nyaman.
Di kaki Gunung Tangkuban Perahu, rasakan keindahan alamnya
Di Grafika Cikole ini terdapat
•Permainan Outbond
•Kamar mandi tentunya :D
•Aneka objek foto seperti gambar yang saya potret ini
english_translation:
A super comfortable place.
At the foot of Mount Tangkuban Perahu, experience its natural beauty
At Grafika Cikole, you will find
•Outbound games
•Bathrooms, of course :D
•Various photo spots like the one I photographed

text: Gunung Putri Lembang salah satu spot favorit saya dimana bisa menikmati cantiknya view Lembang dan sekitarnya dari puncak bukit hingga view kearah Subang.  Jarak tempuh pun dekat dari Lembang. Worth it bangeeet!!!
english_translation: Gunung Putri Lembang is one of my favorite spots where I can enjoy the beautiful view of Lembang and its surroundings from the top of the hill to the view towards Subang. The travel time is also close to Lembang. Totally worth it!!!

text: Namanya kebun & taman Begonia, tapi isinya tidak begonia saja, ada berbagai macam bunga, buah-buahan & sayuran. Sayuran dapat di petik sendiri, bibit tanaman hias dapat debeli juga. Tersedia tempat makan & toilet.
english_translation: Its name is Begonia Garden & Park, but it doesn't only contain begonias; there are various kinds of flowers, fruits, and vegetables. You can pick your own vegetables, and ornamental plant seedlings can also be bought. There are dining areas and toilets available.

text: Sdh 2 kali ke sini ..smakin bikin kangen... terutama taman labirinnya...subhanallah...pertahankan kebersihan dan keasriannya ya... dan masih 10 rb tiketnya plus bisa tuker teh pucuk harum buat buka puasa...😊😊😊😊😊 …
english_translation: Have been here twice already... it makes me miss it even more... especially the maze garden...subhanallah... maintain the cleanliness and natural beauty... and the ticket is still 10 thousand rupiah plus you can exchange it for a Teh Pucuk Harum to break your fast... 😊😊😊😊😊 …

text: Untuk tiket masuknya weekend 50k. Tempatnya luas. Banyak spot foto menarik. Jadi untuk ketempatnya kita pakai mobil wisata gitu. Oh iya dapat free minuman juga. Masih dalam pembangunan untuk beberapa spot fotonya.
english_translation: For the entrance ticket, it's 50k on weekends. The place is spacious. There are many interesting photo spots. So, to get around the place, we used a tour vehicle. Oh yes, you also get a free drink. Some of the photo spots are still under construction.

text: Daerah yang sangat sejuk dan segar. Area jalannya tidak terjal jadi untuk orang tua pun masih aman untuk jalan jauh jauh. Cocok untuk spot foto foto di sekitarnya dan ada cafe untuk nyambil makan melihat curug nya
english_translation: A very cool and refreshing area. The road is not steep, so it's safe for the elderly to walk for long distances. Suitable for taking photos around the area and there is a cafe to enjoy food while watching the waterfall.

text: Ajibbbb euuy, mantap segala segala nya, permainanan nya lumayan, curug nya walaupun kecil tapi ajibbb pokoknya, harga makanan cukup pas lah pokoknya. Enak dapat jemputan, ramah juga, sadisss pokoknya mah mantapppp
english_translation: Awesome, everything is amazing, the games are decent, the waterfall is small but amazing anyway, the food prices are quite fitting. Nice to get picked up, friendly too, it's just awesome.

text:
Tempatnya adem dan asik
Cocok untuk kalian yang ingin camp ceria , liburan keluarga atau pun kegiatan liburan kantor kalian
Ada beberapa pilihan kamar yang bisa kalian tentutakan dan beberapa spot atraksi tentunya
english_translation:
The place is cool and fun
Suitable for those of you who want a cheerful camp, family vacation, or even your office holiday activities
There are several room options you can choose, and of course several attraction spots

text: Perjalanan dari bawah sampai menjuju gerbang masuk nya cukup jauh, fasilitas toilet saat di atas gunung kurang baik, karena hanya menyediakan beberapa saja, pemandangan ok, kebersihan terjaga, alamnya juga terawat
english_translation: The journey from the bottom to the entrance gate is quite far, the toilet facilities at the top of the mountain are not good, as they only provide a few, the scenery is okay, the cleanliness is maintained, and the nature is also well-cared for.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang tempatnya strategis, ada penyewaan kamar hotel, sma tenda camp yang suasana nya nyaman , alam terbuka tapi aman, fasilitas memadai,ada outbound kegiatan wisata nya juga banyak cukup beragam
english_translation: A strategically located natural tourist spot, with hotel room rentals and camping tents, offering a comfortable atmosphere, open yet safe nature, adequate facilities, and a diverse range of outbound tourist activities.

text:
Salah satu tempat bebatuan purbakala yang masih terjaga keindahan dan keaslian nya hingga saat ini...

Pertama kali menginjakkan kaki ditempat ini ...disuguhkan dengan pemandangan asri yang sangat eksotis sekali..
english_translation:
One of the ancient rocky sites that still preserves its beauty and authenticity to this day...
The first time I set foot in this place... I was presented with a very exotic and pristine view...

text:
Kesininya pas musim liburan jadi rame banget.. 😁
Agak capek juga bolak balik kalo ke Masjid dan WC umumnya.. jauh dan yaa namanya jg tanjakan turunan.. 🤭
Ga sempat beli oleh2 karena ngejar menunjungi tempat lain..
english_translation:
It's very crowded because it's during the holiday season.. 😁
It's a bit tiring going back and forth to the Mosque and the public restrooms.. they're far and yes, it's uphill and downhill, as expected.. 🤭
Didn't have time to buy souvenirs because I was rushing to visit other places..

text:
Bersiiihhhh....
Para petugas maupun pedagang juga ramah.
Pemandangannya sangat bagus apalagi kalau cerah.
Jangan lupa pakai masker ya kalau mau berkunjung, selain soal prokes bau belerangnya juga lumayan menyengat
english_translation:
Sparkling clean....
The staff and vendors were also friendly.
The view is very nice, especially when it's sunny.
Don't forget to wear a mask if you want to visit, besides the health protocols, the sulfur smell is also quite pungent.

text:
Luas banget, ku kira dingin tapi kenyataannya kegerahan. Mungkin karna rame kali yaa.
Bunga nya pada bagus, ada kuda juga, ga ke jembatan karena udah capek duluan dan lumayan banget jauh ke bawah. Overall bagus ko
english_translation:
It's so vast, I thought it would be cold but it's actually too hot. Maybe because it's crowded.
The flowers are all beautiful, there are horses too. Didn't go to the bridge because I was already tired and it's quite far down. Overall it's good.

text:
6 november 22. Tiket 25rb (hanya berkunjung) sudah termasuk parkir 2orang dewasa 1org anak 4thn.
Kalo camping 22rb blm termasuk tiket.
Fasilitas mck kurang terawat (sebagian)
Fasilitas warung makan dan sewa cukup.
english_translation:
November 6, 2022. Ticket 25,000 IDR (visiting only) includes parking for 2 adults and 1 child aged 4.
Camping is 22,000 IDR, not including the ticket.
Restroom facilities are (partially) poorly maintained.
Food stall and rental facilities are sufficient.

text: Banyak terdapat bunga unik yang ditata rapi sehingga cocok untuk spot foto. Disini kalian bisa melihat kebun sayur juga dan bisa di petik dan beli langsung loh. Untuk masuk  ke sini dikenakan biaya kisaran 20rban.
english_translation: There are many unique flowers neatly arranged, making them perfect for photo spots. Here you can also see a vegetable garden, and you can even pick and buy them directly. There is an entrance fee of around 20,000 rupiah to enter.

text:
Tempat wisata keluarga dengan konsep home stay & camping ground millenial yg keren bgt,nyaman dan sejuk.
Tapi bisa juga untuk one day trip.
Banyak spot untuk photo,dan ga susah untuk cari makan.
Recomended bgt deh.
english_translation:
A great millennial-concept family tourist spot with cool, comfortable, and cool homestays & camping grounds.
But it can also be for a one-day trip.
Lots of photo spots, and it's not hard to find food.
Highly recommended.

text:
Harga tiket 40rb+17,5rb
Sudah free naik flying fox dan voucher makan 25rb... nagih pengen kesini lagi, dan untuk yg mau kesini agar lebih berhati2 di toiletnya, jangan lupa baca do'a untuk keselamatan dan kemudahan
english_translation:
Ticket price 40k + 17.5k
Already includes free flying fox and a 25k food voucher... I'm craving to come back here, and for those who want to come here, be more careful in the toilet, don't forget to say a prayer for safety and ease

text: Cocok banget buat refresing bareng keluarga, lumayan komplit fasilitas di Grafika ada outbond, utk berkemah, bermain bersama burung dibird parknya juga ada tmp bermalam utk disewa.. udaranya sejuk dan segar.. 😉😊👍 …
english_translation: Perfect for a refreshing trip with the family. Grafika has quite complete facilities: there's outbound activities, camping, a place to play with birds at the bird park, and even rooms for rent to stay overnight. The air is cool and fresh. 😉😊👍

text:
Tiket masuk 15rb/org, parkir motor 2rb/org
Dtg pas hari Senin biar sepi pengunjung, tp yg jualan jg sepi bgt 🤭
Tempatnya sedikit kurang terawat, toilet agak kotor, ga ada penjaga didalam mungkin krn emg lg sepi.. …
english_translation:
Entrance fee 15k/person, motorcycle parking 2k/person
Came on Monday to avoid crowds, but there were very few vendors too 🤭
The place is a bit neglected, the toilets are a bit dirty, no attendant inside, maybe because it was quiet...

text: Tempat wisata yang berada di kawasan bandung barat, tempat yg luar biasa,, sangat bagus untuk berfoto,, tiket masuk terjangkau dan ada spot foto lain di dekat situ, yaitu indiana camp, hanya beda tiket masuk lagi,,
english_translation: Tourist attractions located in the West Bandung area, an extraordinary place, very good for taking photos, affordable entrance tickets and there are other photo spots nearby, namely Indiana Camp, just a different entrance ticket again.

text:
Tempat wisata bernuansa alami hutan.dan tempat kemping keluarga yg lengkap..ada tenda maupun rumah nuansa pegunungan.dan asiknya ada arena ATV yg cukup luas dan menantang.pokonya asik deh
Tiket masuknya murah lagi.
english_translation: Natural forest-themed tourist spot and a complete family camping site. There are tents and houses with a mountain ambiance. And the fun part is a spacious and challenging ATV arena. Overall, it's great. The entrance ticket is cheap too.

text: Puas banget harga yg dibayar melebihi apa yg didpt tempat alam yg rindang hutan2 pinus dan bnyk playground buat anak2 seperti rabbit town dan flyingfox. Pokoknya puas disana bnyk spot2 foto yg tentunya sangat keren
english_translation: Very satisfied, the price paid exceeded what was received, a shady natural place with pine forests and many playgrounds for children like Rabbit Town and Flying Fox. Basically, I was satisfied, there are many photo spots there, which are certainly very cool.

text: Keren untuk berphoto, berenang, hiking. Warung makan minum dan mushola ada dipertengahan perjalanan antara sanghyang poek ke sanghyang heuleut. Dilokasi fasilitas makan minum, kamar mandi dan mushola juga tersedia.
english_translation: Great for photos, swimming, and hiking. Food and drink stalls and a prayer room are available midway between Sanghyang Poek and Sanghyang Heuleut. Food and drink facilities, restrooms, and a prayer room are also available at the location.

text: Sangat rekomendid buat yg cari tempat hangout dgn udara yg sangat segar dan view yg menyegarkan mata..susunan lokaasinya jg nyaman skali buat sekedar jalan ksana kemari..bersama keluarga dan anak2 bakal lebih seru.
english_translation: Highly recommended for those looking for a hangout spot with very fresh air and a refreshing view. The arrangement of the location is also very comfortable for just strolling around. It will be even more exciting with family and children.

text: Contact personnya coba diganti sama nomer yg emang bisa aktif dan respon orang yg mau tanya tanya atau reservasi tempat. Ini saya kontek dari kemarin gak ada bales. Ditelpon gak diangkat. Padahal wa nya ceklis dua.
english_translation: Please try to change the contact person to a number that is actually active and responsive to people who want to inquire or book a place. I've been trying to contact them since yesterday and there's no reply. The phone wasn't answered. Even though the WhatsApp shows two checkmarks.

text: Perjalanan dari parkiran pergi ke curug nya aman, karena cuma turun tangga. Pas dari curug ke parkiran wah banget, naik tangga banyak. Buat ibu2 atau remaja jompo ga disaranin main sampai curug, liat dari atas aja.
english_translation: The journey from the parking lot to the waterfall is safe because it's only downhill stairs. Going from the waterfall back to the parking lot is quite an experience, with many stairs to climb. For mothers or "elderly" teenagers, it's not recommended to go all the way to the waterfall; just view it from above.

text: Curug cimahi indah namun alangkah lebih baik apabila akses turun lebih diperhatikan perawatannya dan juga perbaikan di beberapa titik yg licin dan juga curam karena sangat membahayakan apabila saat tiba tiba hujan.
english_translation: Curug Cimahi is beautiful, but it would be much better if the access down was better maintained and improved in some slippery and steep spots, as it is very dangerous if it suddenly rains.

text: menyenangkan sekali setelah 3 tahun lalu ke bandung, akhirnya bisa main ke floating market lagi. mencoba wahana baru, perosotan pelangi. foodcourt mohon ditambah menu yang mengenyangkan seperti nasi padang dong 😁 …
english_translation: It's so fun after 3 years since the last time I went to Bandung, I can finally visit the Floating Market again. Tried a new attraction, the rainbow slide. Foodcourt, please add more filling menu options like Nasi Padang 😁

text:
Salah satu tempat rekreasi bertema alam di kabupaten Bandung Barat, tepatnya di daerah Rajamandala. Aksesnya strategis, tiketnya murah meriah.
Untuk wahana nya tolong diperbanyak lagi biar lebih bisa instagramable.
english_translation:
One of the nature-themed recreational spots in West Bandung Regency, precisely in the Rajamandala area. Its access is strategic, and the tickets are very affordable.
As for the rides, please add more so they can be more Instagrammable.

text:
kedua kalinya ke sinii!! suka bgt sama suasana nya dan tempat nya yang terawat! bersih , tapi hati2 kalau cuaca sedang angin kencang suka ada ranting besar jatuh.
saya pergi weekend rate htm di harga 50.000 per org
english_translation: Second time here!! I really love the atmosphere and the well-maintained place! It's clean, but be careful if the weather is windy, as large branches sometimes fall. I went on the weekend, the entrance fee was IDR 50,000 per person.

text: Makin luass banyak bgt spot foto udara nya seger sekali dan bersih tempat parkir nya pun luass ada playingfox jga sejuk bersih kamar mndi pun bnyak dan tmpat nya makin mewah harga terjangkau pko nya the best 💞🌹💞💞 …
english_translation: The aerial photo spots are much wider and there are so many, it's very fresh and clean. The parking lot is also spacious, there's a playground too. It's cool and clean, there are also many bathrooms, and the place is getting more luxurious. The price is affordable, it's really the best 💞🌹💞💞 …

text: Dah 2x kesini hehe... Tempatnya bersih, spot2 foto nya banyaakkk, puas deh foto2 disini :D mas2 mbak2 nya ramah... Saran aja kalo mau kesini jangan pas weekend, soalnya rameee bgt, Ampe susah mau foto di piramid :D
english_translation: This is my second time here, hehe... The place is clean, there are lots of photo spots, I'm satisfied with taking pictures here :D The staff are friendly... Just a suggestion, if you want to come here, don't come on the weekend, because it's very crowded, so crowded it's hard to take pictures at the pyramid :D

text:
Taman yang cukup luas.
Tersedia lahan parkir yang cukup besar.
Untuk berkeliling bisa pake mobil kereta dengan berbayar 15 k per orang nya.
Biaya masuk weekday 20 K & weekend 25 K yang dapat ditukar dengan minuman.
english_translation:
Spacious park.
Ample parking space is available.
To get around, you can use the train car for 15K per person.
Weekday entrance fee is 20K & weekend is 25K, which can be exchanged for a drink.

text: Permainan menyenangkan dengan alam yg segar, tapi sangat mengesalkan ketika memesan makan siang di taste of cikole resto. Pelayanan nya sangat buruk, menunggu 4 menu makanan selama 1,45 jam dan rasa pun biasa saja.
english_translation: A fun game with fresh nature, but very annoying when ordering lunch at Taste of Cikole resto. The service was very bad, waiting 1 hour and 45 minutes for 4 food menus and the taste was ordinary.

text: Tempat nya asik buat foto, murah, cukup membuat orang kepincut lagi dan lagi ingin datang ke tempat ini. Air nya segar dan dingin, cukup untuk mencari atau tempat weekend bersama teman, sahabat, pacar dan keluarga.
english_translation: The place is fun for photos, cheap, and enough to make people want to come back again and again. The water is fresh and cold, perfect for finding or a place for a weekend getaway with friends, companions, a partner, and family.

text: Jaraknya jauh banget dari tempat pemberangkatan, sekitar 5km perjalanan. Bener2 bikin kaki gempor :( tapi diperjalanan ada banyak spot yang bisa di tuju jg jadi bikin g terlalu berasa. Pas nyampe hasilnya....... :”
english_translation: It's a really long way from the departure point, about a 5km journey. It really made my legs exhausted :( but along the way, there are many spots you can visit, so it didn't feel that bad. When I arrived, the result was....... :”

text:
Tempatnya dipinggir jalan raya jadi gampang untuk diakses kendaraan roda 4.
Tiket masuk 20rb/orang, parkir mobil 10rb.
Didekat air terjun sudah tersedia toilet umum, mushola dan warung.
Jangan lupa siapin fisik 😁 …
english_translation:
The place is on the roadside, making it easy for 4-wheeled vehicles to access.
Entrance fee is 20k/person, car parking is 10k.
Near the waterfall, public toilets, a prayer room, and food stalls are available.
Don't forget to prepare physically 😁

text: Curugnya keren dan airnya bersihh. Harga tiketnya 15.000/orang kalo mau ke curug yg di atasnya bayar lagi 10.000/orang tapi worth it bgtt. Nyobain jalan ke belakang kaya lagi di negeri dongeng xixi keren pokoknya👍🏼
english_translation: The waterfall is cool and the water is clean. The ticket price is 15,000/person. If you want to go to the waterfall above, you have to pay another 10,000/person, but it's totally worth it. Trying to walk behind it felt like being in a fairy tale, lol, it's really cool 👍🏼

text: Tempat yang nikmat untuk sekedar bersantai dan berfoto. Tidak terlalu luas. Harga tiket yang dikeluarkan tidak mahal, cukup 10.000 namun untuk masuk arena atau menggunaka permaianan tertentu harus bayar tiket lagi.
english_translation: A pleasant place to simply relax and take photos. Not too spacious. The ticket price is not expensive, only 10,000, but to enter the arena or use certain games, you have to pay another ticket.

text: Jelajah alam dengan sepeda....indah....naik meninggi menyisir mengiris bukit.....turun merendah membelah lembah.....bermain bersama angin...ramah....menyapa mengusap wajah.....membasah peluh......Alhamdulillah.....
english_translation: Explore nature by bicycle....beautiful....climbing higher, tracing, slicing through hills.....descending lower, splitting valleys.....playing with the wind...friendly....greeting, caressing the face.....moistening sweat......Praise be to God.....

text: Tempat yang bagus, luas, dari awal masuk sampe parkiran total biaya yang di keluarin 25rb untuk 1 motor, banyak tempat makanan dan minuman, disarankan datang pagi atau sore, karena siang cuaca disini sangat panas..
english_translation: A nice, spacious place. From the entrance to the parking lot, the total cost for one motorcycle was 25,000 [rupiah]. There are many food and drink places. It's recommended to come in the morning or afternoon because the weather here is very hot during the day.

text:
Tempatnya nyaman... udaranya sejuk... spot fotonya banyak... pokoknya instagramebel banget..
Cuma sayang kemaren kepotong sama hujan... jd banyak nya berteduh... tp tetap ok... lah... harga tiket masuk terjangkau...
english_translation:
The place is comfortable... the air is cool... lots of photo spots... basically, it's very Instagrammable.
It's just a shame it was cut short by the rain yesterday... so we had to shelter a lot... but it was still okay... the entrance ticket price is affordable.

text:
Biaya masuk = 40K / org ( domestik )

tempat yang sangat sejuk dan indah,
didalamnya terdapat beberapa kafe yg sangat instagramable yg memiliki harga makanan bs dibilang ga begitu mahal sekitar 35rb-50rb per porsi .
english_translation:
Entrance fee = 40K / person (domestic)

A very cool and beautiful place,
Inside there are several very Instagrammable cafes that have food prices that can be said to be not too expensive, around 35K-50K per portion.

text: Menikmati wisata gunung yang mengingatkan akan kekuasaan Allah yang menciptakan bumi dan seisinya yang sangat luar biasa  uang menambah rasa keimanan kita dan mendalam rasa tafakur kita terhadap Alam yang diciptakan
english_translation: Enjoying mountain tourism reminds us of the extraordinary power of Allah, the Creator of the earth and all its contents, which increases our faith and deepens our contemplation of the created universe.

text: Tidak bosan karena disini banyak resto yang menawarkan suguhan menarik, seperti d'dieuland, dago bakery, lereng anteng, tafso dan sebagainya. Jadi banyak pilihan tempat yang bisa dikunjungi dengan gaya yang berbeda.
english_translation: Not bored because here there are many restaurants offering interesting treats, such as d'dieuland, dago bakery, lereng anteng, tafso, and so on. So there are many choices of places that can be visited with different styles.

text: Tempatnya bagus buat acara keluarga atau gathering kantor atau komunitas makanannya juga macam2 dan wahana permainan airnya cukup safety dan disini itu cashless cuman spot foto2nya kalo bisa freelah jgn dikit2 bayar
english_translation: The place is great for family events, office gatherings, or community events. The food is also varied, and the water play attractions are quite safe. It's cashless here, but if possible, the photo spots should be free, not charged for every little thing.

text:
buat ngelatih anak2 belajar hiking,belajar menyukai alam,tempat ini cocok banget.seru juga ada banyak air terjun. buat family camping jg bagus tempat outboundnya ada lebih atas lg

Youtube Channel : Abiyaka Activity
english_translation:
To train kids to learn hiking and to love nature, this place is very suitable. It's also fun with many waterfalls. It's also good for family camping, and the outbound area is even higher up.

Youtube Channel: Abiyaka Activity

text:
Tempat indah untuk betfoto ria with keluarga atau pasangan.
Harga murah cukup 20k untuk harga februari 2019 hanya orang yah, jika bawa kamera beda lagi harganya.
.
Cukup besar tempatnya tp gak bikil kaki pegal kok 😊
english_translation:
A beautiful place for photos with family or a partner.
Cheap price, only 20k for February 2019 prices, just for people, if you bring a camera, the price is different.
The place is quite big but won't make your feet tired 😊

text: tempat yang nyaman, bersih, ada live music juga, diharapkan yang menggunakan angkutan umum pulang dari tempat ini jangan terlalu sore karena akan susah mencari angkutan. Grab dan Gojek sangat susah ketika sore hari.
english_translation: A comfortable and clean place, there's also live music. It is advised that those using public transportation going home from this place should not leave too late in the afternoon, as it will be difficult to find transportation. Grab and Gojek are very hard to get in the late afternoon.

text: sekarang akses jalan ke curug ini udah lumayan bagus, dibandingkan 5 tahun yang lalu, dulu mah butuh perjuangan banget buat sampe sini, lokasinya curug ini juga cukup jauh dari kota Cimahi sekitar 2-3 jam naik motor
english_translation: Now the access road to this waterfall is quite good, compared to 5 years ago. Back then, it took a lot of effort to get here. The location of this waterfall is also quite far from Cimahi city, about 2-3 hours by motorbike.

text:
Tempatnya nyaman, wisata bareng keluarga, Temen ataupun pacar. banyak spot untuk berfoto dengan latar belakang kebun teh dan pohon pinus.
Tapi sayang dengan kondisi jalan yang rusak menjadi lebih lama di perjalanan.
english_translation:
The place is comfortable, a vacation with family, friends, or a partner. There are many photo spots with tea garden and pine tree backgrounds.
But unfortunately, the damaged road conditions make the journey longer.

text:
Ada dua jalur masuk :
1. Lewat deket Cipanas
2. Satu lewat jalan sebelum bendungan.

Ekstra effor jalur masuk dari parkiran ke lokasi sekitar 2.5, dengan trek tanjakan curam. Tapi lokasi keren, sampai bawah terbayar.
english_translation:
There are two entrances:
1. Via near Cipanas
2. One via the road before the dam.

The extra effort from the parking lot to the location is around 2.5, with a steep uphill trek. But the location is cool, worth it once you get down.

text: Tempatnya tidak jauh dari Gunung Tangkupan perahu, banyak info tentang angrek. Murah dan menyenangkan. Hutan pinus dan banyak tanaman. Paling cocok kalau sore, jam 4 an kabut datang dan lampu lampu mulai dinyalakan..
english_translation: The place is not far from Mount Tangkupan Perahu, with lots of information about orchids. Cheap and fun. Pine forests and many plants. It's best in the afternoon, around 4 o'clock the fog comes in and the lights start to turn on.

text: Di saran kan datang pas saat tidak musim hujan , trek dari parkiran ke TKP cukup lumayan jauh , tp untuk anak yg suka trip pasti asik dehh .. dan jgn lupa untuk coba loncat dari batu yg tinggi ke air .. seruuuuuuuuuu
english_translation: It is recommended to come during the off-rainy season. The trek from the parking lot to the location is quite far, but it will be fun for kids who like trips. And don't forget to try jumping from the high rock into the water. It's suuuuuuuuper fun.

text: Tiket 20-25rb/org. No food and drink from outside. Harga cemilan 25rb up. Tempatnya kecil. Jalan didalam kurang lebar. Jadi gak leluasa anak2 mau main sepeda, selis, mobil remot, kereta.. gk leluasa... Parkiran luas.
english_translation: Tickets 20-25rb/person. No outside food and drink. Snack prices 25rb and up. The place is small. The paths inside are not wide enough. So kids don't have enough room to play with bikes, scooters, remote control cars, trains... not enough room... Parking is spacious.

text:
Tempat wisata alam yg asri,  dengan berbagai fasilitas outbound yang seru, juga menyediakan tempat Family camp dengan paket" menarik,  akses parkiranya pun luas 👍 tunggu apalagi yu ke Grafika cikole
#ikutijejaksaya …
english_translation:
An asri natural tourist spot, with various exciting outbound facilities, also provides Family camp spots with interesting packages, the parking access is also spacious 👍 what are you waiting for, let's go to Grafika Cikole
#ikutijejaksaya

text:
Skrg lbh luas...
Tp skrg sisa koin tidak bisa di rupiahkan sprti dulu.
Jdi klo mau nuker secukup nya aja
Dan biaya masuk yg di depan gerbang itu 25k sebenar nya ga harus, bisa nolak kok soalnya di dlm apa2 bayar lagi
english_translation:
Now it's more spacious...
But now leftover coins can't be converted to rupiah like before.
So if you want to exchange, only exchange what you need.
And the entrance fee at the front gate is 25k, which actually isn't mandatory. You can refuse because everything inside costs money anyway.

text: Lokasi mudah dijangkau dan parkir luas. Pelayanan untuk wahana dan penginapan cukup memuaskan tapi di restoran kurang. Pelayan tidak memberitahukan menu yang habis di awal pemesanan sehingga harus menunggu lebih lama
english_translation: Easy to reach location and ample parking. Services for rides and accommodation were quite satisfactory, but lacking in the restaurant. Waitstaff did not inform about unavailable menu items at the start of ordering, leading to longer waiting times.

text: Tempat yg bagus , untuk menikmati curug dan keindahan alam , bisa langsung melihat gunung tangkuban perahu , asik juga untuk berkemah , walau ada tulisan tutup sementara , tapi alhamdulillah masih bisa masuk , 👍👍👍. …
english_translation: A great place to enjoy waterfalls and natural beauty. You can directly see Mount Tangkuban Perahu. It's also fun for camping. Even though there was a sign saying temporarily closed, Alhamdulillah we could still enter. 👍👍👍. …

text: Wisata air di daerah Cipanas, rajamandala atau jalur bendungan Saguling... Cocok buat keluarga,, anak2 juga bisa berenang dengan air yg jernih dan bersih.... Tapi jangan lupa tetep buang sampah dan cintai alam yah...
english_translation: Water tourism in the Cipanas, Rajamandala area or the Saguling dam route... Suitable for families, children can also swim in the clear and clean water.... But don't forget to keep throwing away trash and love nature, okay...

text:
Tempatnya asri, pilihan outboundnya juga banyak, dan juga toilet nya banyak.
Kami datang bersama Geo Adventure , kami bermain ATV dan Paintball..
Tempat parkir juga ckup luas, namun saya lupa mengabadikan fotonya 😂 …
english_translation:
The place is beautiful and natural, the outbound options are also many, and there are also many toilets.
We came with Geo Adventure, we played ATV and Paintball.
The parking lot is also quite spacious, but I forgot to take photos 😂

text:
HTM Weekday 35.000

Udara dingin , angin sepoi-sepoi
Banyak spot foto yg instagrameble bangett
Ajak keluarga kesini cocok banget, apalagi yg suka foto - foto

Yang mau prewedd di sini bisa banget
Biaya cuma 500rb aja
english_translation:
HTM Weekday 35,000

Cool air, gentle breeze
Lots of very Instagrammable photo spots
