Perfect for bringing the family here, especially those who like taking photos

If you want to do pre-wedding photos here, it's very possible
The cost is only 500,000 IDR

text: untuk tempat dan pemandangan enak adem jalan juga lumayan bagus walau ada yang jelek sedikit, untuk tempat ada di pinggir jalan tidak susah nyarinya, parkir juga lumayan luas. naik turunnya lumayan cape tapi enak👍🏻 …
english_translation: For a nice, cool place with good views, the walking path is also quite good, even though there are some rough patches. The place is by the roadside, so it's not hard to find, and parking is also quite spacious. The ups and downs can be a bit tiring, but it's enjoyable 👍🏻 ...

text: Jika anda ingin merasakan bagaimana rasanya berpetualangan dengan alam, tempat ini sangat dianjurkan! Anda dapat secara langsung berpetualang menyusuri hutan untuk mencapai keindahan Tuhan yg tersembunyi di dalamnya!
english_translation: If you want to experience what it's like to adventure with nature, this place is highly recommended! You can directly adventure through the forest to reach God's hidden beauty within it!

text: Untuk santai dan rekreasi keluarga oke.. jajanan juga lumayan banyak dan harga yg terjangkau disini.. hanya untuk yg bawa anak2 baiknya selalu dalam pengawasan orang tua ya guys karna dekat dengan kolam apung disini.
english_translation: Okay for family relaxation and recreation.. lots of snacks are also available and at affordable prices here.. just for those bringing children, it's best to always keep them under parental supervision, guys, because it's close to the floating pool here.

text: Spot foto nya banyak banget, view siang & sorenya indah dengan udara sejuknya  Cikole. Betah buat lama-lama disini. Sayangnya pas kesini lg hujan jadi sebentar doang disini nya. Recomended buat yg suka foto & selfie.
english_translation: There are so many photo spots, the day and evening views are beautiful with the cool Cikole air. You'll want to stay here for a long time. Unfortunately, it was raining when I came, so I could only stay for a short while. Recommended for those who like taking photos and selfies.

text: Tempat wisata yg murah meriah dan bagus banget. Konsep nya jualan di atas danau. Tempat nya rame, yg jualan makanan apa aja ada. Lumpia basahnya enak bgt. Mau coba mie Klungkung tp blm kesampaian coz antri nya banyak
english_translation: A very cheap, cheerful, and amazing tourist spot. The concept is selling on top of a lake. The place is crowded, they sell all sorts of food. The fresh spring rolls are really delicious. I wanted to try Klungkung noodles but haven't had the chance yet because the queue was too long.

text: Dari goha Pawon mampir ke sini jarak cuma 300 m, Indahnya luar biasa, tiket berdua 29ribu dapat minuman 2 botol yg kecil, jng lupa klo kesini bawa topi atau kaca mata krn panas klo siang, luar biasa batu nya sng indah
english_translation: From Goha Pawon, stopping by here is only a 300m distance. The beauty is extraordinary. The ticket for two is 29 thousand and you get 2 small bottles of drink. Don't forget to bring a hat or sunglasses when you come here because it's hot during the day. The rocks are incredibly beautiful.

text: Tempat nya sejuk dengan pemandangan indah, mau pake sepeda, motor atau mobil tetap mantap, kalo mau beli makanan sebaiknya tanya2 dulu harga biar tidak dicekik. Masa gorengan 3 biji sama kopi kapal api sampai 19 ribu.
english_translation: The place is cool with beautiful views, whether you use a bicycle, motorcycle, or car, it's still great. If you want to buy food, it's best to ask about the price first so you don't get ripped off. A serving of 3 fried snacks and a Kapal Api coffee cost 19 thousand.

text:
Lumayan bagus buat keluarga besar atau kecil
Wahananya juga lumayan
Untuk makanan lumayan iya siapkan dompet aja sama wahana dompet yang tebel 😁
Kalau sekedar foto2 ya tenang gratis apa lagi jalan- jalan 😁 santai  👍 …
english_translation:
Pretty good for a big or small family.
The rides are also quite good.
For the food, it's decent. Just prepare your wallet, and a thick wallet for the rides! 😁
If it's just for photos, then it's free, what more for a stroll! 😁 Relaxing 👍…

text:
#LetsGuide
Salah satu objek wisata kekinian di kota Lembang Bandung. Tempat swaFoto aneka macam hot spot bunga ad. Tiket masuk berbayar, jual souvernir juga. Untuk akhir pekan dengan keluarga sangat cocok, Recommended
english_translation:
#LetsGuide
One of the contemporary tourist attractions in Lembang Bandung. A place for taking selfies with various flower hot spots. Entrance ticket required, souvenirs also sold. Very suitable for weekends with family, Recommended

text: waktu itu diajak sama pacar (skrg mntn), ga jelas mau kemana akhirya aku dibawa kesini deh, kebetulan waktu itu aku lagi pake sepatu wedges, jadinya di tawarin pake sandal. aku nya yg nolak, aku nya jga yg malu,heehhe
english_translation: At that time, I was invited by my boyfriend (now ex), and it wasn't clear where we were going, so I ended up being brought here. Coincidentally, I was wearing wedge shoes at the time, so they offered me sandals. I was the one who refused, and I was also the one who felt embarrassed, hehehe.

text: Waktu itu lagi angin besar cukup berbahaya, tapi area ini sangat cocok untuk hiking santai keluarga. Trayeknya juga aman dan tidak terjal, untuk camping juga bisa banget, kalau beruntung bisa dapat sunset yang cantik.
english_translation: At that time, the wind was quite strong and dangerous, but this area is very suitable for a relaxed family hike. The trail is also safe and not steep, it's also great for camping, and if you're lucky, you can get a beautiful sunset.

text: Pemandangannya sangat bagus. Jalan ke lokasi hanya 400 m dari parkiran mobil. Jalan menurun, tapi sudah dipelur. Sepeda dapat digowes sampai ke lokasi. Tetapi tetap harus hati-hati, karena jalannya sempit dan menurun.
english_translation: The view is very good. The road to the location is only 400m from the parking lot. The road is downhill, but it has been paved. Bicycles can be ridden to the location. But still be careful, because the road is narrow and downhill.

text:
Sekarang udah makin hits aja nih Gn. Putri lembang. Fasilitas dan pintu masuk udah di permak total jd makin kece.

Dari puncak di Gn. Putri saat pagi kita bisa melihat lautan awan. Dan cocok untuk.para pendaki pemula.
english_translation:
Mount Putri is becoming increasingly popular. The facilities and entrance have been totally renovated and now look cooler.

From the summit of Mount Putri in the morning, we can see a sea of clouds. It's also suitable for beginner climbers.

text: Jika musim hujan, tanah bisa saja basah dan sangat lengket. Harga tiket 15000, jika anda membawa Drone, anda dikenakan 25000-50000 lagi. tempat ini menyajikan lansekap bebatuan jaman dahulu ( fosil ) yang sangat unik!
english_translation: If it's the rainy season, the ground can be wet and very sticky. The ticket price is 15,000, and if you bring a drone, you will be charged an additional 25,000-50,000. This place presents very unique ancient rock landscapes (fossils)!

text: Hamparan batu seperti karang dan pemandangan sejauh mata memandang membuat kita rilek dan ini membuktikan bahwa dulunya adalah lautan ...yg menyurut... ao kapan lagi berkunjung ke sini bro n sis... keburu tiket mehong
english_translation: The expanse of rocks like coral and the view as far as the eye can see make us relax, and this proves that it was once an ocean... that receded... When will you visit here again, bros and sis... before the tickets get expensive

text: Tempatnya tempatnya enak nyaman tidak terlalu luas tapi setiap sudut bisa untuk foto harga masuknya murah Cuma Rp15.000 meskipun long weekend tetap Rp15.000 tidak boleh bawa makanan ada mushola ada WC ada tempat makan
english_translation: The place is nice and comfortable, not too spacious but every corner is good for photos. The entrance fee is cheap, only Rp15,000, even on a long weekend it's still Rp15,000. You're not allowed to bring food. There's a prayer room, a restroom, and a dining area.

text: Masuknya agak membingungkan, gate nya agak gak jelas, harus bayar masuk dl 20k, terus jalan kaki luamayan jauh. Kecuali yg menginap katanya lgsg pny akses mobil masuk k dlm parkiran mobil yg ada di Depan resto nya. 🙄 …
english_translation: The entrance is a bit confusing, the gate is unclear, you have to pay an entrance fee of 20k first, then walk quite a distance. Except for those staying overnight, they apparently have direct car access to the parking lot in front of the restaurant. 🙄 ...

text: 😍😍😍😍 egak pernah bosen dateng kesini, warna-warni bunganya bikin mood booster naik 100% . Cuma kalau siang panasnya minta ampyuuun cyiiin.  Semoga kedepannya makin bagus. Jadi lainkali bisa berkunjung kembali kesini. …
english_translation: 😍😍😍😍 Never tired of coming here, the colorful flowers boost my mood 100%. It's just that the heat during the day is unbearable, darling. Hopefully, it will get even better in the future. So I can visit here again next time. …

text: Tempatnya enak banget. Direkomendasikan buat yg suka hunting foto. Didalemnya juga ada beberapa kafe. Kemarin yg didatengin aspasia kafe. Makanannya enak-enak, harga standar. Tempat enak banget, ada outdoor dan indoor.
english_translation: The place is really nice. Recommended for those who like to go on photo hunts. Inside, there are also several cafes. Yesterday, we visited Aspasia Cafe. The food was delicious, and the prices were standard. The place is really nice, with both outdoor and indoor seating.

text: Tempatnya nyaman,asik untuk liburan keluarga dan team building..ada outbound dan sangat sejuk.. krn datang di musim hujan,disana dingin sekalii dan sangat berkabut.. tapi tetap menyenangkan,,keluar dari padatnya kota..
english_translation: The place is comfortable, fun for family holidays and team building.. there's outbound and it's very cool.. because I came during the rainy season, it was very cold and very foggy there.. but it was still fun,, escaping the crowded city..

text: Sekedar informasi air nya bagus kalo musim kemarau atau sekitar beberapa Minggu tidak hujan,kalau musim hujan atau  beberapa hari terakhir hujan air nya bakal jauh dari ekspektasi karena warna nya akan berwarna coklat.
english_translation: For your information, the water is good during the dry season or if it hasn't rained for a few weeks. If it's the rainy season or it has rained in the last few days, the water will be far from expectations because it will be brown in color.

text: Tempat menyenangkan untuk liburan, lokasi cukup bersih dan rapi. Sangat padat saat weekend. Banyak jajanan kuliner lokal dengan rasa yang belum pernah dicoba. Banyak makanan unik dan tradisional, untuk harga terjangkau
english_translation: A pleasant place for a holiday, the location is quite clean and tidy. Very crowded on weekends. Lots of local culinary snacks with flavors never tried before. Lots of unique and traditional foods, at affordable prices.

text: Curug maribaya ? Ada hots spring, ada curug ciomas dan bbrpa curug lain. Ga tau tuh curug nya ada dmn, krn yg ada hanya selokan kotor. Tempat tdk terawat. Yg belum ke tempat ini lebih baik jangan deh spy ga nyesel 👎. …
english_translation: Maribaya Waterfall? There are hot springs, Ciomas Waterfall, and several other waterfalls. I don't know where the waterfalls are, because all there is is a dirty ditch. The place is unkempt. It's better if you haven't been here yet, don't go, so you don't regret it 👎. …

text: Outdoor garden Yg gede banget.. Bersih... Bisa jd alternatif buat yg bosen dirumah aja... Selama covid 19 msh ada lbh baik main ketempat outdoor gini..... Tempatnya keren bersih dan yg pasti banyak spot bagus buat foto
english_translation: Huge outdoor garden. Very clean. Can be an alternative for those bored of staying home. As long as COVID-19 is still around, it's better to go to outdoor places like this. The place is cool, clean, and most importantly, has many good spots for photos.

text: Hujan hujan kesana ternyata bagus bund, memang awal dibawah hujan pas diatas reda dan ada mataharinya, langit biru indah, kawah jg keliatan jelas. Htm per maret 2021 ini hrf per org 20rb untuk motor 14rb parkir yaaa ..
english_translation: It turned out to be nice going there in the rain, bund. It was raining at first, but when we got to the top, it had stopped and the sun was out. The sky was beautifully blue, and the crater was clearly visible. The entrance fee as of March 2021 is Rp 20,000 per person, Rp 14,000 for motorcycles, and parking is [price not specified].

text: Cukup oke untuk family, namun kordinasi untuk penyelengara outbond disana tidak terlalu oke, makanan tidak terlalu bervariatif kecuali waktu sarapan. Tapi kamarnya bersih sekali. View kamarnya oke banget, pohon2 pinus.
english_translation: Quite okay for families, but the coordination for the outbound organizers there isn't very good. The food isn't very varied except for breakfast. But the room is very clean. The room view is great, pine trees.

text: Kami membawa rombongan anak² Panti Asuhan Amanah Bandung, mereka sangat senang dan menikmati game² serta pelaksanaan yg memicu adrenalin..., soal harga termasuk asuransi cukup terjangkau, tempat parkir luas, recomended
english_translation: We brought a group of children from the Amanah Orphanage Bandung, they were very happy and enjoyed the adrenaline-pumping games and execution..., the price including insurance was quite affordable, the parking lot was spacious, recommended

text:
Mengecewakan, kamar yg dibooking jauh2 hari dibilang penuh dan dipindah k kmr lain. Lokasi kotor bnyk sampah2 bekas team building.
Dissapointing, we got a room type that we didn't reserved. Dirty place around the room.
english_translation: Disappointing, the room booked months in advance was said to be full and we were moved to another room. The location was dirty with lots of leftover trash from team building.

text: Taman wisata alam yg ada di Jawa barat, diatas ketinggian perbukitan sehingga khas suasana hawa dingin. Parkir luas, toilet bersih, aneka jualan aksesoris dan oleh2 khas Jabar ada, warung2 makanan dan minuman juga ada.
english_translation: Nature tourism park located in West Java, situated on a hilly elevation, giving it a distinct cool atmosphere. Spacious parking, clean restrooms, various stalls selling accessories and typical West Javanese souvenirs are available, as well as food and drink stalls.

text:
Biaya masuk untuk 1 agustus 2022
12rb, parkir 5rb, total 17rb ini untuk ke situs stone garden, klo ke gua pawon ada tiket masuk lagi (kurang tau)

Tempat bagus, cuman fasilitas kurang terawat aja, tempat lumayan bersih
english_translation:
Entrance fee for August 1, 2022
12k, parking 5k, total 17k for the Stone Garden site. If you go to Pawon Cave, there's another entrance fee (not sure).

Nice place, just the facilities are not well maintained. The place is quite clean.

text:
Tempat spot foto yang menawan, menawarkan traveling ke negara Eropa dan Amerika. Disediakan penjaga di setiap post bertugas untuk membantu memfoto.
Tapi menurut saya dengan fasilitas yang ada harga tiket terlalu mahal.
english_translation:
A charming photo spot, offering travel to European and American countries. A guard is provided at each post to assist with photos.
But in my opinion, with the existing facilities, the ticket price is too expensive.

text: tempat nya keren, bagus buat foto2, view nya mantep, buat pecinta alam, tapi emang panas kalau siang2 kesana, di sarankan pagi2 atau sore.. tapi akses jalan kesana masih kurang, jalanan jelek. dan msh ada pungli xoxoxo
english_translation: The place is cool, good for taking photos, the view is amazing, for nature lovers, but it is indeed hot if you go there during the day, it's recommended to go in the morning or afternoon.. but the road access there is still lacking, the roads are bad. and there are still illegal levies xoxoxo

text: Ketika berkunjung ke maribaya masih di masa pandemi, terlihat banyak warung yang tutup, namun tak merusak keindahan alam yang tersaji. Kawasan wisata yang aman dan nyaman untuk dikunjungi bersama teman, ataupun keluarga
english_translation: When visiting Maribaya during the pandemic, many stalls were closed, but it did not detract from the natural beauty on display. A safe and comfortable tourist area to visit with friends or family.

text: Biaya masuk kawasan wisata tangkuban perahu 40rb/orang. Cukup mahal, padahal di dalemnya kurang menarik. Banyak penjual masker sebelum memasuki kawasan kawah. Jangan terjebak untuk membeli karena baunya tidak menyengat.
english_translation: The entrance fee for the Tangkuban Perahu tourist area is IDR 40,000 per person. It's quite expensive, even though it's not very interesting inside. There are many mask vendors before entering the crater area. Don't be tricked into buying because the smell isn't that strong.

text: Sy datang bersama2 teman2, sebelum masuk hrs beli tiket dulu 12 rb. Tidak perlu ngantri dan langsung masuk, Tempatnya bagus tp hrs hati2 karena batunya runcing2, di sana jg banyak monyet liar, dan licin klo habis hujan.
english_translation: She came with friends, before entering you have to buy a ticket first for 12 thousand. No need to queue and went straight in. The place is nice but you have to be careful because the rocks are sharp, there are also many wild monkeys there, and it's slippery after rain.

text: Grafika Cikole cukup terkenal di kalangan pelaku pariwisata. Di tempat ini lengkap, ada resto, tempat outbond, wahana bermain outdoor dll. Tersedia mushollah dan banyak toilet. Halaman parkir luas muat beberapa big bus.
english_translation: Cikole Graphics is quite famous among tourism actors. This place has it all, including a restaurant, an outbound area, outdoor rides, etc. There is a prayer room and many toilets. The spacious parking lot can accommodate several big buses.

text:
HTM 30rb waktu weekdays,
Di floating market kta petugas penukarang uang bisa dkembaliin kalau lebih. Pas mau dtuker kata petugas lain gabisa harus habis.
Kok beda keterangan si
Kalo mau ke wahana² lg berbayar lg gais...
english_translation:
HTM 30rb weekdays,
At the floating market, the money exchange officer said the change could be returned if there was excess. When I wanted to exchange it, another officer said it couldn't be returned, it had to be spent completely.
Why is the explanation different?
If you want to go to other rides, it's an additional charge again, guys...

text: Suka tempatnya bagus banyak spot foto, tiket juga murah. Di Indiana camp juga bagus banget buat foto foto bayar lagi 10.000 murah ko dan hati hati banyak monyet. Jangan lupa jaga lingkungan jangan buang sampah sembarang
english_translation: I like the place, it's good with many photo spots, and the ticket is also cheap. Indiana Camp is also very good for taking photos, it costs another 10,000, which is cheap, but be careful, there are many monkeys. Don't forget to take care of the environment and don't litter.

text: Untuk camp, parkir motor 10k, masuk 22k, kayu bakar 15k. Tapi sangat disayangkan pihak pengelola tidak memperhatikan kebersihan, khususnya untuk WC yang sangat kotor, bau, & tidak ada air. Untuk view sangat bagus sekali
english_translation: For camp, motorcycle parking 10k, entrance 22k, firewood 15k. But it is very unfortunate that the management does not pay attention to cleanliness, especially for the toilets which are very dirty, smelly, & have no water. The view is very good.

text: Tracknya seru sekitar 2 km dari loket. Rasa lelahnya tebayar oleh keindahan sungai sanghyang heuleut. Cukup sewa pwlampung 15 ribu kita bisa berenang renang dan meloncat loncat dari tebing ala2 citumang atau greencanyon
english_translation: The track is exciting, about 2 km from the ticket counter. The fatigue is paid off by the beauty of the Sanghyang Heuleut river. By renting a float for 15 thousand, we can swim and jump from cliffs like Citumang or Green Canyon.

text: Untuk menuju kesini kamu harus berjalan kaki dari parkiran plta Saguling, lumayan jalannya 3 km dengan Medan yang lumayan ekstrim. Tapi setelah kamu sampai ditempat itu kamu akan "speechless" sungguh indah ciptaan tuhan
english_translation: To get here, you have to walk from the Saguling PLTA parking lot. The road is quite a long 3 km and the terrain is rather extreme. But once you reach this place, you will be speechless, truly the beautiful creation of God.

text: Bagus. Lumayan luas. Ada free shuttle utk antar jemput dr pintu masuk kawasan wisata punclut ke lokasi sarae hills. HTM 50rb. Utk naik jembatan hrs bayar lagi. Best time to visit sekitar jam 3an biar ga panas mentereng.
english_translation: Good. Quite spacious. There's a free shuttle to pick up and drop off from the Punclut tourist area entrance to the Sarae Hills location. Entrance fee is 50k IDR. To go up the bridge, you have to pay again. Best time to visit is around 3 PM so it's not scorching hot.

text: Akses agak sulit, lebih disarankan untuk naik mobil, jalannya berbatu, akses minim sinyal, tidak sempat ke curugnya juga karena ada tni sedang latihan jadi akses ke curug ditutup, Total biaya : Parkir 10.000 camp 20.000
english_translation: Access is a bit difficult, it's more recommended to go by car, the road is rocky, minimal signal access, didn't have time to go to the waterfall either because there were TNI soldiers training so access to the waterfall was closed. Total cost: Parking 10,000, camping 20,000.

text: Rekomen pisan ini. Qta aja udah berpa kali ke sini. Ga ada bosennya..kumplit. Nyari makan..rupa aneka pilihan, main anak anak...asa. jalan jalan keliling doang...apalgi. Mau main air..banyak. Asik fresh lah kalo pulang.
english_translation: Highly recommended. We've been here so many times. We never get tired of it... complete. Looking for food... a variety of choices, kids' play... plenty. Just walking around... even better. Want to play in the water... lots of it. It's refreshing when you go home.

text:
Lokasinya di area punclut ddieland tiket mulai 50rban dan ada tiket terusannya 65 & 85rb sesuai pilihan,

Disediakan mobil wara wiri sampai lokasi kalau bis besar turun di depan, Hiace & Elf bisa masuk langsung ke bawah
english_translation:
The location is in the Punclut area. Tickets start at 50,000 rupiah, and there are continuous tickets for 65,000 and 85,000 rupiah depending on your choice.

A shuttle car is provided to the location if you arrive by large bus, which has to drop off at the front. Hiace and Elf can go directly down.

text: Seru tempat nya asik agak dingin sih tapi cocok buat pendaki pemula sama buat yg dana terbatas soal nya harga tiket murah,parkiran luas dan aman,ada warung buat beli makanan,sewa tenda,hamok,kompor,dll pokok nya lengkap
english_translation: The place is exciting and cool, a bit chilly but suitable for beginner hikers and those on a tight budget because the ticket price is cheap. The parking lot is spacious and safe. There's a small shop to buy food, rent tents, hammocks, stoves, etc. Basically, it's complete.

text:
Kaki2 mobil rusak lewat jalan depannya itu loh ancur se ancur ancur nya..
Dalem orchid nya oke tapi makanannya ga banget deh itu chicken teriyaki kalo ga salah😅 sorry to say

Over all tempatnya bagus banget, so refresh~
english_translation:
The car tires are broken from going down the road in front of it, completely destroyed.
The orchid place itself is okay, but the food is terrible, that chicken teriyaki, if I recall correctly 😅 sorry to say.

Overall the place is really nice, so refreshing~

text: Suasana hutan yg sejuk, tertata rapih, tempat wisata yg enak bersama keluarga, ada playground yg agak mahal (40rb) dibanding ukurannya. Jembatan gantung, flying fox, rabbit town. Tiket orchid 40rb, tiket perhutani 7500.
english_translation: The cool, neatly arranged forest atmosphere, a pleasant tourist spot with family, has a playground that is a bit expensive (40 thousand) considering its size. Suspension bridge, flying fox, rabbit town. Orchid ticket 40 thousand, Perhutani ticket 7500.

text:
Tempat wisata yang murah meriah, kalau lg kena macet bisa mampir sebentar utk santai dan melepas penat. Tiket masuk bisa ditukar snack.

Mau coba nginep disini, sepertinya asik kalau bangun tidur hawa sejuk liat pohon2.
english_translation:
An affordable tourist spot, you can stop by for a bit to relax and unwind if you get stuck in traffic. Entrance tickets can be exchanged for snacks.

I want to try staying here, it seems nice to wake up to cool air and see the trees.

text:
Mantap & gokil banget Tempat Wisata ini.
Selain hawanya yg sejuk, pemandangan Kawah Gunung Tangkuban Perahu juga sangat menakjubkan & eksotik.

Harga Tiket Masuk nya pun juga terbilang cukup terjangkau.

Amazing..... !!!
english_translation:
Amazing and incredibly cool tourist spot.
Besides the cool air, the view of the Tangkuban Perahu Crater is also very stunning and exotic.

The entrance ticket price is also quite affordable.

Amazing..... !!!

text: Tempatnya,,bagus... Perjalanan dr lokasi tiket ke atas menantang krn jln ny bnyk tikungan... Dan jng lupa klo kesini mkn baso abang gerobak dijamin enak dan hrga terjangkau tpi sblm mkn yang dulu brpa seporsi ny,,, 😄😄😄 …
english_translation: The place is nice... The trip from the ticket location to the top is challenging because the road has many turns... And don't forget if you come here, eat the meatball soup from the street vendor, guaranteed to be delicious and affordable, but before you eat, how much is one portion?... 😄😄😄 …

text: Jalan menuju kesini ada yang mulus ada yang engga. Seru ini kalau arung jeram disini. Ada goanya, sayang ketika saya kesini goanya tenggelam karena pintu air lagi dibuka. Tiket masuk 8k sama parkir 5k kok. Rekomen banget
english_translation: The road here is partly smooth and partly not. It would be fun to go white-water rafting here. There's a cave, too bad it was submerged when I came because the floodgates were open. The entrance ticket is 8k and parking is 5k. Highly recommended.

text:
Lumayan indah, murah & asri, tp blm selesai. Msh dalam tahap pembangunan. Mungkin sengaja blm di publikasikan atau izin yg msh dlm  proses.
Buka jam.9 pagi s/d jam. 17 sore
Tiket masuk weekday Rp.10.000  & weekend 15.000
english_translation:
Quite beautiful, cheap & pleasant, but not finished. Still under construction. Perhaps intentionally not publicized or permits still in process.
Open 9 AM to 5 PM
Weekday entrance ticket Rp. 10,000 & weekend Rp. 15,000

text: Tempat yang tepat untuk liburan keluarga, masih terawat dengan baik (semoga fasilitasnya tetap terawat) dan makanan cepat saji yang lebih terkenal tersedia jika memungkinkan untuk menarik lebih banyak orang untuk datang
english_translation: The right place for a family vacation, still well-maintained (hopefully the facilities will remain so) and the more famous fast food is available if it's possible to attract more people to come

text: Tempatnya bagus buat spot foto.. Disana dingin bgt harus pake jaket ya klau mau kesana.. Diatas tu sampe 19°c klau hujan bisa smpai 16°c,ke gunung tangkuban perahu bisa bermain sambil belajar tentang kisah sangkuriang😊 …
english_translation: The place is good for taking photos. It's very cold there, so you have to wear a jacket if you want to go. Upstairs it's up to 19°C, and if it rains it can drop to 16°C. At Tangkuban Perahu mountain, you can play while learning about the story of Sangkuriang.

text: Akses jalannya tidak terlalu sulit, sebelum sakpe tujuan kita dusuguhi view alam yg dikelilingi pegunungan hijau, suasana masih asri, disarankan selalu ada guide yg mengantar khawatirnya kalian tersesat jika tanpa guide.
english_translation: The road access isn't too difficult, before reaching our destination we are treated to natural views surrounded by green mountains, the atmosphere is still pristine, it is recommended to always have a guide to escort you, otherwise you might get lost without one.

text: Bagus sih tempatnya, spot-spot foto juga menarik, tapi untuk wahana-wahana (bisa disebut spot foto) nya, yg di kota mini kenapa harus kena charge juga.. lebih enak bayar agak mahal di awal, tapi kita bebas pilih wahana..
english_translation: The place is nice, the photo spots are also interesting, but for the attractions (which can be called photo spots), why do the ones in the mini city also have to be charged separately? It would be better to pay a bit more upfront, and then we can freely choose the attractions.

text: Terbaik sih pokonya ,buat yang mau nyoba hiking atau camp buat pemula cocok banget karena gunung nya engga terlalu tinggi ada jalan setapak nya sama di atas ada fasilitas WC sama mushola nya jadi buat pemula cocok banget
english_translation: The best, really. For those who want to try hiking or camping for the first time, it's very suitable because the mountain isn't too high. There are trails and facilities like a toilet and prayer room at the top, so it's perfect for beginners.

text: Banyak spot foto bagus. Tempat tujuan yg oke dan seru. Pelayanan mas dan mba nya juga ramah, mau bantuin taking pic. Dapet welcome drink, bisa dianter shuttle bus pas pulang. Mushola di deket santorini tenang dan bersih.
english_translation: Lots of good photo spots. A great and fun destination. The service from the staff was also friendly, willing to help with taking pictures. Got a welcome drink, and could be taken by shuttle bus when leaving. The prayer room near Santorini was quiet and clean.

text:
Ada 2 Destinasi tinggal pilih sekedar ngopi di kafe or wisata di area WOW nuansa Eropa...
Pilihan kafe cukup bnyak, ada Tafso, Sudut Pandang, Langit dll dg menu berat a d ringan...
Parkir dan Musholla yg cukup luas
Sukses
english_translation:
There are 2 destinations to choose from: just have coffee at a cafe or visit the WOW European-themed area...
There are quite a few cafe options, such as Tafso, Sudut Pandang, Langit, etc., with both heavy and light menus...
Sufficiently spacious parking and a prayer room
Success

text:
Tempat wisata yang bersih, sejuk, asri, bagus banget buat foto foto.. banyak spot foto nya!!
Tiket masuk 40rb/orang, mobil 10rb, motor gatau berapa..

Tersedia shuttle juga buat balik ke parkiran, jd gausah takut cape.. 😂
english_translation:
A clean, cool, and beautiful tourist spot, great for taking photos... lots of photo spots!
Entrance ticket is 40k/person, car 10k, don't know the price for motorcycles.

There's also a shuttle available to return to the parking lot, so no need to worry about getting tired. 😂

text: Mini niagara nya cililin, yg dulu kesini 5 taun ke belakang, pasti tau akses jalan nya sperti apa, meskipun dari parkiran sampe ke bawah lumayan menguras keringat, tpi terpuaskan dengan cipratan dan pemandangan air terjun
english_translation: Mini Niagara of Cililin, those who came here 5 years ago will surely know what the road access was like. Even though from the parking lot to the bottom was quite a sweat-drainer, it was satisfying with the splashes and the view of the waterfall.

text: Pandai-pandailah memilih spot, niscaya hasilnya luar biasa. Saat tiba seperti biasa saja. Karena belum dikelola secara profesional, bisa dimaklumi. Sampah masih ada di sana sini, tapi tidak parah. Buat saya, asyik lah....
english_translation: Choose your spots wisely, and the results will be extraordinary. When you arrive, it's just so-so. Because it's not yet professionally managed, it's understandable. There's still trash here and there, but it's not too bad. For me, it's enjoyable.

text: Cocok buat refreshing, ada spot baru tempat foto ala korea n jepang dan yang jadi ciri khas nya jajan nya pake koin dan kita kudu tuker dulu d tempat" yg disediakan dan tukar seperlunya aja karena ga bisa tuker balik ya,,
english_translation: Perfect for refreshing, there's a new photo spot with a Korean and Japanese theme, and the unique feature is that you pay with coins, which you have to exchange first at the provided counter. Exchange only what you need, as there are no refunds.

text: G sesui sama yg banyak d shre d ig...akses kesana licin dan nampak kurNg ter urus zona foto2 juga banyak yg rusak, air nya waktu ke sana kebetulan lagi g jernih juga jd kurang puas sie setelh penjalanan yg cukup panjang..
english_translation: It matches what's shared a lot on IG... the access there is slippery and looks neglected. The photo spots are also mostly broken, the water wasn't clear when I went, so I was quite unsatisfied after a long journey.

text: Tempat ini sangat cocok untuk refreshing dari hiruk-pikuk kehidupan kota, ada beberapa air terjun yang bisa dikunjungi, dengan jalan setapak yang memadai. Satu kekurangannya adalah jalan raya menuju tempat ini agak rusak.
english_translation: This place is perfect for a refreshing break from the hustle and bustle of city life, there are several waterfalls to visit, with adequate walking paths. The only downside is that the main road leading to this place is a bit damaged.

text: Pemandangannya bagus dan udara nya sejuk, banyak tempat² yang bagus untuk foto². Harga tiket yg lumayan murah plus dapat minuman, terdapat tempat wahana dari naik perahu hingga memakai kostum ala korea. Parkiran yang luas
english_translation: The view is nice and the air is cool, there are many good spots for photos. The ticket price is quite cheap plus you get a drink, there are attractions from boat rides to wearing Korean-style costumes. Spacious parking

text: tempat yg paling pas...buat yg ingin melepas kejenuhan aktifitas kota yg super sibuk, dengan suasana  alam pegunungan yg alami dan asri,membuat suasana jd relax,pikiran jd fress ,pokok nya cocok bwt yg ingin bersantai..lah
english_translation: The most fitting place... for those who want to escape the fatigue of super busy city activities, with a natural and beautiful mountain atmosphere, making the atmosphere relaxing, the mind fresh, in short, suitable for those who want to relax.

text: tempat wisata seputaran bandung yang cukup bagus dan dapat menjadi rekomendasi apabila berwisata bersama keluarga. banyak wahana dan tepat yang dapat dikunjungi. adanya playground untuk anak serta tempat yang instagramable
english_translation: Tourist attractions around Bandung that are quite good and can be recommended for family vacations. There are many rides and places to visit. There is a playground for children and instagrammable spots.

text: Tempat hiking maupun camping yg ga anti mainstream, bisa jelajah hutan tembus ke tangkuban parahu. Akses masuk ke lokasi bisa dari jl jayagiri lewat kantor desa cikole ke atas, tiket relatif murah ga sampe 10-20k per orang
english_translation: A non-mainstream hiking and camping spot where you can explore the forest all the way to Tangkuban Perahu. Access to the location is from Jl. Jayagiri, passing the Cikole village office and going up. The ticket price is relatively cheap, not even 10-20k per person.

text: Tempat yang sangat nyaman untuk outbond. Ada banyak spot menarik bagi anak-anak. Olah raga sambil mengedukasi anak-anak mengenai flora dan fauna. Tersedia juga berbagai wahana permainan seperti flying fox, paint ball, dll.
english_translation: A very comfortable place for outbound activities. There are many interesting spots for children. Sports while educating children about flora and fauna. Various recreational rides are also available, such as flying fox, paintball, etc.

text:
Mantap sekali pemandangan dan pengelolaannya, untuk dapat kesini anda bisa jalan atau menggunakan ojek dari jalan raya sebelum situs Stone Garden di Padalarang.
Hati-hati kalau bawa makanan dicolong monyet makanannya hehe.
english_translation:
The view and management are excellent. To get here, you can walk or take a motorcycle taxi from the main road before the Stone Garden site in Padalarang.
Be careful if you bring food, the monkeys will steal it, hehe.

text: Tempat nya enak buat liburan bersama keluarga, temen, sahabat, pacar, banyak spot spot foto yang bagus, ada perahu dayung, perahu bebek, perahu ikan, ada sepeda, ada becak, ada kereta api. Buat makan bareng keluarga mantap
english_translation: The place is nice for a holiday with family, friends, companions, and partners. There are many good photo spots, paddle boats, duck boats, fish boats, bicycles, pedicabs, and a train. It's great for eating together with family.

text: Buat prewedding harga sewa tempat 300rb, blm termasuk tiket masuk, pedagangnya ramah2, ada tempat ganti baju di atas, tp tidak ada kamar mandi, untuk barang2 ada petugas yg jaga dari jauh karna ada monyet suka acak2 barang
english_translation: Pre-wedding venue rental is 300k, not including entrance tickets. The vendors are friendly, there's a changing area upstairs but no bathroom. For belongings, there's a staff member watching from a distance because monkeys tend to mess with things.

text:
Setelah bbrapa tahun baru datang lagi ke Tangkuban perahu , liburan bersama keluarga.
Pas tgl.1 Jan 2020, Tangkuban Perahu lagi berkabut dan angin kencang . Dingiinn.
Dapet banget suasana gunung nya yg emang bikin kangen .
english_translation:
After several years, I came back to Tangkuban Perahu again for a family holiday.
On January 1, 2020, Tangkuban Perahu was foggy and windy. It was cold.
It really captured the mountain atmosphere that I miss.

text:
Sejuuuk, tertata rapii.. buka sampe jam 8an oke juga deh kayanyaa.. tapi mungkin dibanyakin lampu aja.. indah banget kalo malem tu..

Pakai alas kaki yang nyaman yaa karna luas bangeet..
bisa but tempat wedding dan prewedd
english_translation:
Cool, neatly organized.. open until around 8 PM would probably be good too.. but maybe add more lights.. it would be beautiful at night..

Wear comfortable footwear because it's really spacious..
can be used for weddings and pre-weddings

text: Curug nya cukup bagus dan pengunjung nya juga lumayan banyak.. Tapi sayang jalan nya jelek sekali bebatuan nya tajam..jalan pintas nya juga jelek licin sekali.. Klw jln debenahi lagi pasti pengunjung nya lebih banyak lagi.
english_translation: The waterfall is quite good and there are quite a lot of visitors. But unfortunately, the road is very bad with sharp rocks. The shortcut is also very bad and slippery. If the road were improved, there would definitely be even more visitors.

text: Lumayan buat hiking dan camping. Camp ground agak jauh dari parkiran. Jd untuk camping di sisi kendaraan tidak bisa. Barang-barang harung dibawa keatas. Tp banyak penyewaan alat alat camping di sekitar warung dan parkiran.
english_translation: Decent for hiking and camping. The campground is a bit far from the parking lot, so you can't camp by your vehicle. You have to carry your gear up. But there are many camping equipment rentals around the stalls and parking lot.

text: wisata bunga yg menampilkan aneka ragam n varian tanaman begonia .bagus banget buat selfi2 .sangat romantis buat yg lagi pacaran .dan bagus jg buat selfi bersama keluarga karena nuasa disini cocok baget buat tua dan muda .
english_translation: Flower tour showcasing various types and varieties of begonia plants. Great for selfies. Very romantic for couples. And also good for family selfies because the atmosphere here is very suitable for all ages.

text:
Jalan buat kesananya perjuangan banget, buat yang suka tracking recommended tapi kalo yang fisiknya belum siap buat jalan nanjak2 jangan kesini.
Sama jangan kesini pas lagi musim panas, air danaunya jadi gabagus dan surut.
english_translation:
Getting there was quite a struggle, it's recommended for those who like trekking, but if your physical condition isn't ready for uphill walks, don't come here.
Also, don't come here during the hot season, the lake water becomes bad and recedes.

text: Tidak recommended untuk didatangi, kurang menarik, tidak rapi, agak mahal dibanding wisata lain di sekitar lembang, tidak sesuai antara harga dan yang didapatkan, sedikit-sedikit bayar lagi, . Hanya mengobati penasaran saja
english_translation: Not recommended to visit, not interesting, not tidy, quite expensive compared to other attractions around Lembang, the price does not match what you get, there are many small additional payments. Only satisfies curiosity.

text: Tempatnya adem, sejuk tapi agak lelah yaa karna naik turun tanggaa. Pas kesini nyobain flying fox, jembatan tali, turun tebing. Terus juga ada kasih makan rusa, kelinci sama burung. Rekomen si buat yg mau liat hijaunya alam
english_translation: The place is cool and refreshing, but it's a bit tiring because of the stairs going up and down. When I came here, I tried the flying fox, rope bridge, and rappelling. There was also feeding deer, rabbits, and birds. Recommended for those who want to see the green nature.

text:
Suasananya sejuk. Salut deh soalnya tempatnya bersih banget. Dan masakan nya enak enak.
Cocok buat liburan berkeluarga dan dan sering banget dipakai buat pelatihan kepemimpinan.. Apalagi ada wisata kebun stroberi, gua dll..
english_translation:
The atmosphere is cool. Kudos because the place is very clean. And the food is delicious.
Suitable for family holidays and is often used for leadership training. Moreover, there are strawberry garden tours, caves, etc.

text: Begitu banyak skematik untuk banyak ide kreatif. Petunjuk jalan masuknya dari jalan utama raya padalarang kurang jelas. Jangan terlalu siang terlalu terang buat fotografi. Idealnya jam 6-8 pagi. Biaya masuk per orang 5.000.
english_translation: So many schematics for many creative ideas. The entrance sign from the main Padalarang road is unclear. It's too bright for photography if it's too late in the morning. Ideally between 6-8 AM. The entrance fee is 5,000 per person.

text:
Tempat sedikit kurang Terawat,  akses masuk jln sedikit jelek .  Papan petunjuk kurang jelas dan kecil terlebih petunjuk lokasi berada tepat di tikungan

FYI, ada 2 jalan masuk. lewat gua pawon atau langsung ke stone garden
english_translation:
The place is a bit less maintained, the road access is a bit bad. The signs are unclear and small, especially the location sign which is right at the turn.

FYI, there are 2 entrances. via Pawon Cave or directly to Stone Garden.

text: Tempat yang sangat bagus.. tertata sangat rapi dan bersih. Mengikuti protokol kesehatan. Tempat cuci tangan, Cek suhu, semprotan disinfektan dan dapet bonus masker saat pembelian tiket. Namun sayang hanya sampai pukul 18.00
english_translation: A very nice place.. very well organized and clean. Following health protocols. Handwashing station, temperature check, disinfectant spray, and a bonus mask upon ticket purchase. However, unfortunately, it's only open until 6:00 PM.

text: Tempat yg baik dan bagus utk liburan keluarga,tiket masuknya bisa di tukar dgn minuman....tapi kalo mau bisa masuk atau bermain di semua tempat,jatuhnya mahal juga...ada tempat makan juga di dalemnya,tp rasanya kurang enak.
english_translation: A good and nice place for a family vacation, the entrance ticket can be exchanged for drinks....but if you want to enter or play everywhere, it ends up being quite expensive...there is also a place to eat inside, but the taste is not very good.

text: Tempatnya luas dan bingung masuk ke sini mesti lewat tangga banyak banget. Kebetulan saya datang habis maghrib tapi tiket udh ditutup padahal wahana tutup jam 8 seharusnya masih bisa masuk tapi kaga. Kecewa sih tapi ya gpp.
english_translation: The place is spacious, and it's confusing to get in here, having to go through so many stairs. Coincidentally, I arrived after Maghrib (evening prayer) but the ticket counter was already closed, even though the rides are open until 8 PM. I should have been able to enter but I couldn't. I'm disappointed, but it's okay.

text: Jalan tidak terlalu jauh ke lokasi jika anda naik mobil, dan jalan menurun sekitar 10 menit ke lokasi, buat kendaraan roda dua bisa langsung parkir dan tiba di lokasi.ada goa juga didekat sini, di musim hujan air agak keruh
english_translation: The journey to the location is not too far by car, and it's a downhill walk of about 10 minutes, allowing two-wheeled vehicles to park directly and reach the site. There is also a cave nearby. The water is a bit murky during the rainy season.

text:
Cobalah untuk pergi ke tempat ini, Anda akan menyukainya.
Ada begitu banyak tempat untuk mengambil foto, pastikan Anda mengenakan pakaian yang nyaman.
Ikuti saya di Instagram aletheaa
Harga tiket : 50rb dan dapat lemon tea
english_translation:
Try to go to this place, you will love it.
There are so many spots to take photos, make sure you wear comfortable clothes.
Follow me on Instagram aletheaa
Ticket price: 50,000 IDR and includes lemon tea

text: Pas lg makan diresto yg view nya air terjun..sbnr nya bagus cm sampah plastik pd bersangkutan di sela sela batu jd ngerusak pemandangan aj..overal nasi ayam betutu di resto nya enak dan staff service nya ramah dan baik..thx
english_translation: While eating at a restaurant with a waterfall view. Actually it's nice but there's plastic trash stuck in the crevices of the rocks which spoils the scenery. Overall, the chicken betutu rice at the restaurant was delicious and the staff service was friendly and kind. Thanks.

text:
Tempatnya sederhana tapi bagus karena alami
Sejuk kalau datang pagi, dan anginnya cukup kencang
Warung baru sebagian yang buka dan kalau pagi cuma ditarif untuk parkir, tidak ada tiket masuk waktu itu
Kurang tau kalau siang
english_translation:
The place is simple but nice because it's natural.
It's cool if you come in the morning, and the wind is quite strong.
Only some of the stalls were open, and in the morning, there was only a parking fee, no entrance ticket at that time.
I don't know about the afternoon.

text:
Mantep sih tempatnya, wisata alam.
Banyak spot fotonya, bisa berenang juga (ada guide jg) disarankan dateng saat gak hujan, biar airnya kelihatan jernih.
Lelahnya berjalan akan terbayar saat kalian nyampe ditempat tujuan 👍👍
english_translation:
The place is great, a nature attraction.
Lots of photo spots, you can also swim (there's a guide too). It's recommended to come when it's not raining so the water looks clear.
The fatigue from walking will be worth it when you reach your destination 👍👍

text:
Tempatnya bagus, bagi yg tdk terbiasa hiking sebaiknya jangan kesini, tapi penduduk sekitar ramah dan sangat peduli, siap menandu yg tdk kuat dipanggul pakai saroeng.

tiket masuk 10k, parkir 2k, pemandu 50k, pelampung 15k.
english_translation:
The place is nice, for those not used to hiking, it's better not to come here, but the locals are friendly and very caring, ready to carry those who can't walk using a sarong.

Entrance ticket 10k, parking 2k, guide 50k, life vest 15k.

text:
Tempat berwisata, bermain, menginap, foto foto atau lainnya. Banyak wahana termasuk flying fox dan paint ball.
Mencoba paintball dengan 40 peluru dan lokasi bermain paintball cukup baik, peluru meluncur dengan baik (lurus).
english_translation:
A place to visit, play, stay, take photos, or do other things. Many attractions including a flying fox and paintball.
Tried paintball with 40 bullets and the paintball playing area is quite good, the bullets fly well (straight).

text: Tempat wisata yang sejuk, pemandangan indah, ada berbagai macam tanaman, dan banyak hutan pinus. Menyediakan berbagai wahana, spot foto, kegiatan outbond, camping ground, jika tidak membawa kendaraan tersedia angkutan umum.
english_translation: A cool tourist spot with beautiful scenery, a variety of plants, and many pine forests. It offers various attractions, photo spots, outbound activities, and camping grounds. Public transportation is available if you don't bring your own vehicle.

text: Tempat buat camping ceria, spot view nya bagus banget, ada bunker zaman dulu peninggalan Belanda, ada toilet juga cocok buat camping bersama keluarga atau bawa anak anak. Open Job n endorse follow my Instagram: dianakyora18
english_translation: A great place for a cheerful camping trip, the view spots are really good, there's an old bunker from the Dutch era, and there are toilets too, suitable for camping with family or bringing children. Open for jobs and endorsements, follow my Instagram: dianakyora18

text: Makanannya agak pricey tapi tempatnya bagus banget. Tempat fotonya instagramble. Kalo kesini sebaiknya pake sepatu yang nyaman soalnya jalan2 jauh. Nanti kalo mau beli jajan tuker koin dulu ya. Dapet voucher minum juga ntar
english_translation: The food is a bit pricey, but the place is really nice. The photo spots are Instagrammable. If you come here, it's best to wear comfortable shoes because there's a lot of walking. Later, if you want to buy snacks, you'll need to exchange for coins first. You'll also get a drink voucher later.

text:
(+) Destinasi wisata baru, bersih, Jembatan emas paling ikonik, harga tiket terjangkau
(-) Beberapa spot foto sangat umum (menara Eiffel, Colosseum, Spinx, patung Liberty), perlu lebih banyak ide untuk membuat yang lain...
english_translation:
(+) New tourist destination, clean, most iconic Golden Bridge, affordable ticket prices
(-) Some photo spots are very common (Eiffel Tower, Colosseum, Sphinx, Statue of Liberty), need more ideas to create others...

text: Biasa aja ya g ga waah gimana gitu.. Apalagi kalo weekend tanggal merah rame banget.. Bayar masuknya 50rb..kayanya kalo mau nikmatin nyaman disini datang hari biasa dan datang pagi hari atau sore hari.. Siang panas banget..
english_translation: Just ordinary, not anything spectacular or wow. Especially if it's a weekend or a public holiday, it's really crowded. The entrance fee is 50,000 Rupiah. It seems like to enjoy it comfortably here, come on a weekday and come in the morning or late afternoon. It's very hot in the afternoon.

text:
Mantap wahananya.
Paket terusan dewasa 50rb dapat
Flying fox PP, jembatan tali, jembatan kayu, dan turun tebing.
Kalau eceran @15rb.

Paket terusan anak 40rb dapat Flying fox PP dan outbond rumah pohon dgn banyak tantangan.
english_translation:
Great attractions.
Adult all-inclusive package for 50k gets you:
Round-trip flying fox, rope bridge, wooden bridge, and rappelling.
If bought individually, it's @15k each.

Children's all-inclusive package for 40k gets you:
Round-trip flying fox and treehouse adventure with many challenges.

text: Okelah. Wahananya ga terlalu banyak.. makanan disini mahal ga wajar, nasi goreng juga alakadarnya aja rasanya. Pengunjung juga masih belum terdidik-buang sampah sembarangan. Tapi yang menarik buat saya, bisa sepedaan disini.
english_translation: Okay. The rides aren't that many. The food here is unreasonably expensive, even the fried rice tastes mediocre. The visitors are also not well-behaved yet – littering carelessly. But what's interesting for me is being able to cycle here.

text: Seperti bebatuan purba cukup ok tempatnya, cuman agak masuk ke dalam agak terjal dan bagus untuk spot foto. Tiketnya tidak terlalu mahal dapat free kopi botol kecil lumayan buat menghilangkan haus pas mendadi bukit bebatuan.
english_translation: Like ancient rocks, the place is quite okay, just a bit steep going in and good for photo spots. The ticket is not too expensive, and you get a small free bottled coffee, which is decent for quenching thirst while climbing the rocky hills.

text: Recomeded banget dehh, dengan harga yang terjangkau kita bisa dapat fasilitas yang banyak dan juga pelayanan yang sangat memuaskan. Semoga makin banyak fasilitas yang bisa dikembangkan. Baik spot foto ataupun spot edukasinya
english_translation: Highly recommended, with an affordable price we can get many facilities and also very satisfying service. Hopefully, more facilities can be developed. Both photo spots and educational spots.

text:
Tempat yg bagus untuk refresing.. Wonderfull ..
Butuh perjuangan dari parkir kendaraan utk sampai dicurug malela dan sebaliknya.
Kedepan perlu dipikirkan agar lebih mudah utk sampai di curug....
Gimana nich dinas pariwisata?
english_translation:
A great place for refreshing.. Wonderful..
It takes a struggle from the vehicle parking to reach Curug Malela and vice versa.
In the future, it needs to be considered to make it easier to reach the waterfall...
What about the tourism department?

text:
Salah satu geopark tersembunyi di Bandung barat, view dari atas bagus banget.
Tempat ini sangat indah dan tenang,
Mudah dikunjungi juga Dan biayanya pun cukup murah Kalau dilihat ini tempat wisata yg berbeda dari yg lainnya.
english_translation:
One of the hidden geoparks in West Bandung, the view from above is really good.
This place is very beautiful and peaceful,
Easy to visit too and the cost is quite cheap. If you look at it, this is a tourist spot that is different from others.

text: Tempatnya sangat luas sekali area di kawasan wisata Lembang terjangkau dari kota bandung dan tidak jauh banget. Tempatnya masih asri dan hawanya masih dingin banget terus banyak tempat makanan yang menggugah selera. Best lah
english_translation: The place is very spacious, an area in the Lembang tourist region, accessible from Bandung city and not far at all. The place is still lush and the air is still very cool, plus there are many appetizing food stalls. Best lah

text: Baru nginjek daerahnya dah bayar RW, bayar parkir lagi, bayar tiket untuk ke daerah wisata sebelah kanan, eh ke kiri bayar lagi krn beda pengelola.. Pemandangan bagus tapi lama2 ngebosenin.. Khusus untuk foto2 aja palingan..
english_translation: As soon as I entered the area, I had to pay the RW fee, then parking, then a ticket for the tourist area on the right. Huh, on the left, I had to pay again because it's a different management. The scenery is nice, but it gets boring after a while. It's best suited for photos, I guess.

text: Kalau ngeliat postingan orang lain tempatnya keren banget, tapi sayang pas kita dateng hujan, jadi cuma bisa foto di area parkir doang, next pengen dateng lagi, penasaran sama spot spot yang ada di dalem, Insya Allah, aamiin
english_translation: When I see other people's posts, the place looks really cool, but unfortunately, it rained when we came, so we could only take photos in the parking area. Next time, I want to come again, I'm curious about the spots inside. God willing, amen.

text: Lokasinya sangat mudah dicapai. Dapat dicapai dengan menggunakan kendaraan jenis apapun. Terdapat restoran di tengan pulauyang dapat dicapai dengan menyewa rakit/perahu kecil. Pagi hari sering dijadikan lokasi latihan canoe.
english_translation: The location is very easy to reach. It can be reached by any type of vehicle. There is a restaurant in the middle of the island that can be reached by renting a raft/small boat. The morning is often used as a canoe practice location.

text:
(+) Pemandangan alam bebatuan
(+) Bersih
(+) Alam terbuka, puanas kalau matahari terik. Disarankan datang saat berawan, atau pagi/sore.
(-) Ada pungutan 10 ribu di jalan. Katanya dari RW.
(-) Jalan masuk jelek. Area tambang.
english_translation:
(+) Scenic view of rocks
(+) Clean
(+) Open nature, hot if the sun is strong. Recommended to visit when cloudy, or in the morning/afternoon.
(-) There is a charge of 10 thousand on the road. They say it's from the RW (neighborhood head).
(-) Bad entrance road. Mining area.

text: Bagi para pendaki harap membawa trashbag. Dan sampah bekas 🏕 camping dibawa lagi ke bawah. Jangan sampai berserakan dimana2. Sayang alam yg tadinya bersih malah kotor oleh para pendaki yg malas membuang sampah sembarangan. …
english_translation: For hikers, please bring trash bags. And take your camping trash back down. Do not let it be scattered everywhere. It's a shame the beautiful nature becomes dirty because of lazy hikers who litter.

text: Seru, pemandangan yg sangat indah, banyak spot foto keren dimana mana..mau makan, ada warung2 yg menyediakan cemilan hingga makanan berat. Lokasi yg mudah ditemukan dan aksesnya bagus, bisa dilalui kendaraan roda 2 dan roda 4
english_translation: Exciting, a very beautiful view, many cool photo spots everywhere.. Want to eat, there are stalls providing snacks to heavy meals. The location is easy to find and the access is good, it can be passed by 2-wheeled and 4-wheeled vehicles.

text: Lokasinya dekat dgn bbrp tempat wisata lainnya di Lembang. Nyaman dan selalu ramai jika ingin berkunjung disini dr pagi saja agar terhindar dr kemacetan. Banyak area utk spot berfoto dan bermain bersama dgn keluarga tercinta.
english_translation: The location is close to several other tourist attractions in Lembang. It's comfortable and always crowded, so it's best to visit in the morning to avoid traffic. There are many areas for photo spots and playing with your beloved family.

text: Sangat seru ngecamp disini,, pemandangannya keren, udar sejuk & segar,, pokoknya amazing menghabiskan malam tahun baru disini, tapi sayang air di toilet habis , hanya toilet atas yg berfungsi,, semoga bisa segera diperbaiki..
english_translation: Camping here was so fun. The scenery was cool, the air was cool and fresh. It was truly amazing spending New Year's Eve here, but unfortunately, the water in the toilet ran out. Only the upstairs toilet was working. Hopefully, it can be fixed soon.

text: Lokasinya sangat bagus. Airnya hijau dan ada tips, kalau mau kesini dari bandung, berangkat dr rumah abis subuh.. Sehingga air masih bersih dan hijau. Saya sampai di lokasi jam 8an setelah menempuh jalan kaki sekitar 45 menit
english_translation: The location is very good. The water is green, and there's a tip: if you want to come here from Bandung, leave home after dawn. That way, the water will still be clean and green. I arrived at the location around 8 o'clock after walking for about 45 minutes.

text: pas kesana lagi banyak pengembangan. cukup sepi, efek  pandemi mngkin. tiket masuk 15k/orang. lumayan kalau mau liat danau, hijau hijauan. balinya gak begitu kerasa hehe,mngkin nanti setelah pengembangan, baru keliatan bangeg
english_translation: When I went there, there were a lot of developments. It was quite quiet, maybe due to the pandemic. The entrance ticket was 15k per person. It's decent if you want to see the lake and greenery. The "Bali" feel wasn't really there, hehe, maybe after the development is complete, it will be more apparent.

text:
Masih sama seperti pertamakali saya ke tempat ini, th 2015.
Tapi parkirannya semakin rapi dan tertata.
Btw bukanya jam 7 pagi.
Ngga perlu datang pagi2 banget.
By masuk 30 rb/org.
By mobil 35rb/mobil
By parkir mobil 5 rb/mobil
english_translation:
Still the same as the first time I came to this place, in 2015.
But the parking lot is neater and more organized.
By the way, it opens at 7 AM.
No need to come too early.
Entrance fee is 30,000 IDR per person.
Car entry is 35,000 IDR per car.
Car parking is 5,000 IDR per car.

text: Tempatnya luas banget... Ada banyak pilihan tema foto. Dari kios jajanan terapung, tempat-tempat bertema jepang, disediakan juga penyewaan baju ala jepang. Cocok untuk widata keluarga. Masih satu tempat dengan rainbow garden.
english_translation: The place is very spacious... There are many photo theme options. From floating snack stalls, Japanese-themed spots, they also provide rental of Japanese-style clothing. Suitable for family tours. Still in the same place as Rainbow Garden.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang cocok utk keluarga yang kuat secara fisik untuk berjelajah hahaha. Tempatnya yang luas tapi jalan utk pejalan kaki agak sempit jadi seperti berdesakan. Sangat rekomendasi karna banyak spot untuk foto..
english_translation: A natural tourist spot suitable for physically fit families to explore, hahaha. The place is vast but the walking paths are a bit narrow, making it feel crowded. Highly recommended because there are many photo spots.

text: tiket 1 pengujung 30rb, tiket untuk kendaraan beda lagi. ke sana pas lagi hujan jadi udaranya makin sejuk. mungkin lebih bagus lagi pas ada matahari sih. i suggest y'all to keep the mask on karna bau belerangnya masih terasa.
english_translation: Ticket for 1 visitor is 30k, tickets for vehicles are different. Went there when it was raining so the air was even cooler. It would probably be even better with sunshine. I suggest y'all to keep the mask on because the sulfur smell is still noticeable.

text: Curug yang cukup indah karena sudah dibangun dan didesain agar para pengunjung tidak perlu bersusah payah untuk mengaksesnya, namun karena tempatnya sudah didesain sedemikian rupa sehingga unsur alaminya sudah cukup berkurang
english_translation: A waterfall that is quite beautiful because it has been built and designed so that visitors do not need to struggle to access it, but because the place has been designed in such a way that its natural elements have been significantly reduced.

text:
Air terjun yang satu ini memang diselimuti mitos dan cerita mistis. Tetapi selama Anda berhati-hati, tidak akan terjadi masalah saat mengunjunginya. Apalagi pemandangan di Curug Maribaya memang cukup indah.

Tarif: Rp3.000,00
english_translation:
This waterfall is indeed shrouded in myths and mystical stories. But as long as you are careful, there will be no problems when visiting it. Moreover, the scenery at Curug Maribaya is quite beautiful.

Entrance Fee: Rp3,000.00

text: Senang sekali bisa sampai gua kahuripsn meski kawah upas ditutup..sempat hujan berteduh diwarung sambil ngopi..sejuk segar ..naik kuda lumayan mahal 75 rb tapi tukang kudanya baik & ramah..yg penting anak happy naik kuda nya.
english_translation: So happy to reach Kahuripan cave even though Upas crater was closed. It rained for a while, so we took shelter at a stall and had coffee. It was cool and refreshing. Riding a horse was quite expensive at 75,000 Rupiah, but the horse keeper was kind and friendly. The most important thing is that the child was happy riding the horse.

text:
Tempat sangat nyaman suasana dipenuhi dengan bunga dan sejuk
Rumah makan disediakan di dalam dengan berbagai menu dengan harga yang standar
Tiket masuk terjangkau dan diaediakan juga topi untuk digunakan di dalam kawasan kebun
english_translation:
The place is very comfortable, the atmosphere is filled with flowers and it's cool.
A restaurant is provided inside with a variety of menus at standard prices.
The entrance ticket is affordable and hats are also provided for use within the garden area.

text: Penginapan nya tidak langsung kelihatan dari depan jalan, tapi di dalamnya tjakepp. Enak buat melepas penat di tengah suasana hutan gunung. Sayang kurang sarana pemesanan online jadi harus pesan manual dan 2 minggu sebelumnya.
english_translation: The lodging isn't immediately visible from the street, but it's very nice inside. It's great for unwinding amidst the mountain forest atmosphere. Unfortunately, there are limited online booking facilities, so you have to book manually and two weeks in advance.

text: Tempatnya sangat bagus,lagi ngehits di kota Bandung khususnya wilayah Bandung Barat, ada cafe dan spot2 foto di dalamnya. Sangat cocok bagi keluarga yang ingin menikmati indahnya pemandangan dan suasana terutama di malam hari.
english_translation: The place is very good, it's trending in Bandung city, especially in the West Bandung region, there are cafes and photo spots inside. It is very suitable for families who want to enjoy the beautiful scenery and atmosphere, especially at night.

text: Tempat yang nyaman dengan udara Segar. Masuk ke sini gratis untuk sekedar jalan2. Di dalam Ada warung dan restoran, outbound, bird park, dan glamour camp. Cocok untuk santai menunggu waktu check in hotel kalau lagi ke Bandung.
english_translation: A comfortable place with fresh air. Entry here is free for just a stroll. Inside there are stalls and restaurants, an outbound area, a bird park, and a glamping site. Suitable for relaxing and waiting for hotel check-in time when you're in Bandung.

text: Kawah terbesar nya kawah ratu. View nya jarang di dapat di tempat yang lain. Pada kunjungan saya di weekend di September 2018, harga tiket masuk per orang 30rb. Moto 17rb. Parkir motor 2rb. Kalo berdua naik motor total 79 ribu
english_translation: The largest crater is Kawah Ratu. The view is rarely found elsewhere. On my visit during a weekend in September 2018, the entrance ticket price per person was 30,000 IDR. Motorcycle entrance was 17,000 IDR. Motorcycle parking was 2,000 IDR. If two people came by motorcycle, the total was 79,000 IDR.

text: Tempat camping ground yg nyaman bisa sambil outbound baik perusahaan maupun keluarga...sy suka mengantar peserta outbound   dan ini salah satu camp favorit saya....dari tempat yg nyaman dan fasilitas yg memadai...joss pokoknya
english_translation: A comfortable camping ground that can also accommodate outbound activities for companies or families... I like taking outbound participants, and this is one of my favorite camps.... with a comfortable place and adequate facilities... excellent, really.

text:
Sangat cocok utk plesiran keluarga. Banyak alternatif hiburan yg disewakan. Harga cukup bersahabat. Tempat terbuka luas sejuk.
Sayang mushola kurang rutin dibersihkan, toilet perlu ditambah lagi spy tdk mengantri klau lg rame.
english_translation:
Very suitable for family vacations. Many entertainment alternatives are available for rent. Prices are quite friendly. Spacious, cool open space.
Unfortunately, the prayer room is not cleaned regularly enough, and more toilets are needed so there aren't queues when it's crowded.

text: Tempat wisata keluarga super lengkap. Dari arena santuy, sampai arena yang memicu adrenalin anda a.k.a rainbow slide. Note;rainbow slide sangat dianjurkan dicoba once in your lifetime, kecuali bagi para pengidap sakit jantung.
english_translation: A super complete family tourist spot. From relaxing areas to those that trigger your adrenaline a.k.a. the rainbow slide. Note; the rainbow slide is highly recommended to try once in your lifetime, except for those with heart conditions.

text: tempatnya masih agak sepi ada kereta buat muter2 , sewa sepeda,sewa becak mini,berkuda,perahu bebek2an food court tempatnya nyaman buat ngadem dan anak2 main masih murah meriah tempatnya pas sebelah kanan setelah jalan turunan
english_translation: The place is still a bit quiet. There are carts for cruising around, bike rentals, mini-pedicab rentals, horseback riding, duck boats, and a food court. The place is comfortable for cooling off and for kids to play. It's still cheap and cheerful. The place is just on the right side after the downhill road.

text: Dengan HTM terjangkau, area yang luas, curug dengan air bening dan menyegarkan disertai berbagai fasilitas outbond, camping ground dan mushola yang bersih maka tempat ini cukup recomended untuk wisata keluarga dan sahabat. 🥰 …
english_translation: With affordable HTM, a large area, a waterfall with clear and refreshing water accompanied by various outbound facilities, a camping ground, and a clean prayer room, this place is quite recommended for family and friends' tours. 🥰

text:
Ternyata cuma begitu. Hanya gitu2 doang..
Bagi pecinta kawah dan gunung pasti akan kecewa.
Tiket masuk 30rb/orang
Kendaraan R4 35rb
Parkir kendaraan R4 5rb
Banyak penjual masker harga 5rb/2pcs
Padahal diatas tidak butuh masker.
english_translation:
Turns out it's just like that. It's just that simple..
Lovers of craters and mountains will definitely be disappointed.
Entrance ticket 30,000 IDR/person
R4 vehicles 35,000 IDR
R4 vehicle parking 5,000 IDR
Many sellers of masks for 5,000 IDR/2pcs
Even though masks aren't needed up there.

text:
Tempat yg bagus untuk relaksasi karena tempatnya sepi.
Namun ternodai karena tidak terawat, fasilitas taman bermain sudah rusak & berkarat, tidak layak untuk anak.
Sampah dimana2, padahal ada biaya tiket masuk harusnya dirawat.
english_translation:
A nice place for relaxation because it's quiet.
However, it's marred by neglect, the playground facilities are broken and rusty, unfit for children.
Trash everywhere, despite the entrance fee, it should have been maintained.

text: Tiket sabtu/minggu 20k, hari biasa 15k. Tiket bisa di tuker leminerale ukuran kecil atau teh poci original ukuran kecil tapi nambah 3k. Aku kesini hari selasa, lumayan sepi sih. Terus kayanya ini masih dalam proses pembangunan.
english_translation: Weekend ticket 20k, weekday ticket 15k. Tickets can be exchanged for a small bottle of Le Minerale or a small bottle of Teh Poci Original for an additional 3k. I came here on Tuesday, it was quite empty. It also seems like it's still under construction.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk mencari spot foto dan bermain bersama keluarga, pasangan dan teman. Tempat ini sangat luas sekali.  Bisa jg loh dipakai untuk sewa menjadi tempat wedding.  Untuk tiket masuk saat ini per orng harga 30rb.
english_translation: A great place to find photo spots and have fun with family, partners, and friends. This place is very spacious. It can also be rented for weddings. The current entrance ticket price is 30,000 per person.

text: Setelah 9th berlalu kmi kembali ke gunung tangguban..byk perubahan lbh baik.tmpt jauh lbh bersih.pedagang teratur..jika mau foto dilayani org penjual yg tdk mau diksh tip loh..balasannya kt bs membeli souvenir yg dijual mereka.
english_translation: After the 9th passed, we returned to Mount Tangkuban. Many changes for the better. The place was much cleaner. Vendors were organized. If you wanted a photo, the vendor would assist you, and they didn't want tips. Their reply was that we could buy souvenirs they were selling.

text: pemandangan nya bagus, utk wahananya bisa di tambah seperti flying fox karena tempatnya luas tapi wahananya cm ada kereta keliling, goes bebek, penyewaaan sepeda, kuda  over all pemandangan nya luar biasa, ada tempat makan juga
english_translation: The scenery is nice, for the rides, you can add more like a flying fox because the place is spacious, but the rides only include a carousel, duck boats, bike rentals, and horses. Overall, the scenery is amazing, and there's also a place to eat.

text:
Tiket masuk 50 ribu per orang, tapi ga sesuai dengan yang ada di dalam, belum pada beres.
Parkir motor 3 ribu per jam, 4 jam jadi 12 ribu kaya bayar parkir mobil aja
Di tempat wisata lain sebentar atau lama paling mahal 5 ribu.
english_translation:
Admission is 50 thousand per person, but it doesn't match what's inside, it's not finished yet.
Motorcycle parking is 3 thousand per hour, 4 hours is 12 thousand, like paying for car parking.
At other tourist attractions, whether short or long, the most expensive is 5 thousand.

text:
Tempat parkir luas, motor, helm dan mobil diparkir AMAN.
Lebih baik datang pukul 5 atau 6 sore karena lebih mudah memilih spot camping yang bagus buat foto-foto.
Malam view city light nya keren dan pagi view nya ga kalah keren.
english_translation:
Spacious parking lot, motorcycles, helmets, and cars are parked SAFELY.
It's better to come around 5 or 6 PM because it's easier to pick a good camping spot for photos.
The city light view at night is cool, and the view in the morning is no less cool.

text: Tiket masuk per org 5 rb , parkir mobil 6 rb .. akses jalan menuju kecurug tolong di perbaiki lagi supaya lebih mudah tuk di lewati , Pemandangan di Curug nya asri sekali begituh juga Curug nya indah bangetttt .. memuaskan 😎👍 …
english_translation: Entrance ticket per person is 5 thousand, car parking is 6 thousand. Please fix the access road to the waterfall again so it's easier to pass. The scenery at the waterfall is very beautiful and green, and the waterfall itself is incredibly beautiful... Satisfying 😎👍

text:
Kereeen..
Buka smpe jam 5 soree gan..
Jgn lupa blii pernik2 jg oleh2ny skalian bantu2 umkm dmasa pandemi ini boskuuu.. rateny gocap klo naik mtor plus parkir mtor seiklasny tapi kmrin di kasih 10 rbu seneng bgt abang parkirny😁😁
english_translation:
Awesome..
Open until 5 PM, gan..
Don't forget to buy souvenirs too, while supporting MSMEs during this pandemic, my boss... the rate is 50k if riding a motorcycle plus parking fee is optional, but yesterday the parking attendant was very happy with the 10k I gave him 😁😁

text: Kurang nyaman, masuk 35rb free minuman, ada tmpat makan namun sedikit pilihan, tempat berendam kamar per kamar, cafe twig sepi pengunjung, tempat berendam vip pun mini zoo sepi pengunjung pokoknya,. Kurang nyaman kalo bagi saya
english_translation: Uncomfortable, 35k entrance fee includes a free drink, there's a dining area but limited options, bathing areas are private rooms, the Twig cafe is quiet with few visitors, even the VIP bathing area with a mini zoo is quiet overall. Uncomfortable, in my opinion.

text: Kesana hari sabtu pas tgl tua, jadi ga rame bgt dan ga macet, bagus buat foto2,bersih, service bagus, tiap spot foto karyawannya siap bantu untuk fotoin kita, mereka sdh terlatih untuk foto menggunakan hp, hasil fotonya  bagus2
english_translation: Went there on Saturday, close to the end of the month, so it wasn't crowded at all and no traffic jams. Good for taking photos, clean, good service. At every photo spot, the employees were ready to help take our pictures. They are trained to take photos using phones, and the results are very good.

text: Pemandangannya bagus .. udara sejuk. Htm @25k, masuk motor 15k, eh di dalam bayar lagi parkir motor .. harga makanan disana sering nembak2 aja, jd better tanyakan dulu berapa harganya. Beberapa penjual juga memaksa utk dibeli..
english_translation: The view is good.. the air is cool. Entrance fee @25k, motorcycle entrance 15k, eh inside you have to pay for motorcycle parking again.. the food prices there are often random, so it's better to ask the price first. Some sellers also force you to buy..

text: Klo trurus mh bagus lah recomended utk selfie2 dan utk nge camp jg nyaman,airnya bersih,kamar mandi bersih,mushola jg ada..lbh di tata lg biar ramai pengunjung wlpun akses nya jauh dan saya nyasar karena ngikutin mbah google😀😀 …
english_translation: This place is good, recommended for selfies and also comfortable for camping. The water is clean, the bathroom is clean, and there's a prayer room too. It would be even better if it was more organized to attract more visitors, even though the access is far and I got lost following Google Maps.

text: Ada berbagi macam tempat wisata disini, contohnya gunung batu citatah yang keren untuk foto foto, dan jika turun kebawah terdapat goa yang amat sepi.. Cocok untuk refreshing disana, tapi jangan bawa makanan, karena banyak monyet
english_translation: There are various tourist attractions here, for example, Citatah Stone Mountain which is cool for photos, and if you go down there is a very quiet cave. It's suitable for refreshing there, but don't bring food, because there are many monkeys.

text:
Biya tiket masuk untuk 6 orang + parkir 230.000
Usahakan mobil dalam keadaan fit karena jalan menanjak, berkelok, dan menurun. Apabila ingin datang kesana jangan terlalu sore karna akan banyak kabut dan kawah ratu tidak terlihat
english_translation:
Buy entrance tickets for 6 people + parking for 230,000.
Ensure the car is in good condition as the road is uphill, winding, and downhill. If you want to go there, don't go too late in the afternoon as there will be a lot of fog and the queen's crater will not be visible.

text:
Tetap menjadi primadona wisatawan lokal. Udara sejuk, penataan taman, makanan ok. Ada wahana baru rainbow slide yg jd favorit wisatawan.
Saran, penataan taman dan pemeliharaan agar ditingkatkan demikian jg untuk kolam renangnya.
english_translation:
Remains a favorite for local tourists. Cool air, garden landscaping, food is okay. There's a new attraction, the rainbow slide, which has become a tourist favorite.
Suggestion, garden landscaping and maintenance should be improved, as well as the swimming pool.

text:
Tenpatnya tidak terlalu besar, tapi banyak spot menarik untuk foto.. Disarankan datang pagi dekat jam buka jadi masih sepi dan pada saat cuaca cerah jadi foto-foto bisa sampai puas..
Btw, sampel foto terlampir, no edit edit ya 😉
english_translation:
The place isn't too big, but there are many interesting spots for photos. It's recommended to come in the morning, close to opening time, so it's still quiet and when the weather is clear, so you can take photos to your heart's content.
By the way, the photo samples are attached, no edits 😉

text: Tempatnya semakin asik karna sudah banyak tmpt tmpt duduk dan untuk istirahat yang di sediakan, area ini juga sudah diperluas dan diperbarui, saran saya pakai lah sepatu yang ringan karna disni akan banyak jalanannya yg menanjak
english_translation: The place is getting more enjoyable because there are now many seating and resting areas provided. This area has also been expanded and renovated. My suggestion is to wear lightweight shoes because there will be many uphill paths here.

text: tamannya kecil dan rata2 bunga disini bunga begonia ... bukan tempat untuk pencinta bunga ... tapi tempat buat foto2 soalnya byk spot bagus buat berfoto ria ... ada resto didalam jd bs nikmatin makanan/minuman ditengah2 tamannya
english_translation: The garden is small and mostly begonia flowers... not a place for flower lovers... but a place for photos because there are many good spots for taking pictures... there's a restaurant inside so you can enjoy food/drinks in the middle of the garden

text: Tempatnya bagus ada banyak wahana dan spot fotonya menarik. Wahana favorit saya Flying Fox soalnya seru banget. Namun kurangnya adalah sarana untuk mencapai satu tempat ke tempat lainnya jadi kita diharuskan untuk berjalan kaki.
english_translation: The place is nice, there are many rides and the photo spots are interesting. My favorite ride is the Flying Fox because it's really exciting. However, the drawback is the lack of facilities to get from one place to another, so we are required to walk.

text:
Pemandangan alamnya baguss, dan dingin sekali. Sayangnya pas sampe ke sana ujan jd gunung dan kawahnya lebih sering trtutup sm kabut. Tp puas dan senang bisa berkunjung ke sana👍.
Btw pemandangan di sekitar masjidnya juga bagus 😁
english_translation:
The natural scenery is beautiful, and it's very cold. Unfortunately, it rained when I got there, so the mountains and craters were often covered by fog. But I was satisfied and happy to have visited there👍.
By the way, the scenery around the mosque is also beautiful 😁

text: seru buat liburan bareng keluarga, fasilitas yang ditawarin juga cukup menarik. Banyak wahana bermain khususnya anak anak maupun keluarga  dengan harga terjangkau. Belum explore lebih jauh lagi soalnya cuma nginep 2 hari 1 malam
english_translation: Exciting for a holiday with family, the facilities offered are also quite interesting. Lots of rides, especially for children and families, at affordable prices. Haven't explored further because I only stayed for 2 days and 1 night.

text: tempatnya sangat bagus untuk camping ataupun sekedar hanya berkunjung main , tempatnya juga bersih karena para pendaki selalu membawa sampahnya kebawah lagi untuk di tukarkan dengan ktp yang di titipkan kepada petugas setempat ,
english_translation: The place is very good for camping or just visiting and playing. The place is also clean because the hikers always bring their trash back down to exchange it for their ID cards, which are entrusted to the local officers.

text: Menyajikan suasana sejuk ala hutan. Dengan harga tiket Rp50 ribu, sangat sepadan dengan view yang bisa dinikmati. Dilengkapi dengan beberapa wahana hiburan di dalamnya, seperti PuttPutt Golf dan Flying Fox dengan biaya tambahan.
english_translation: Presenting a cool, forest-like atmosphere. With a ticket price of Rp50,000, it is very worthwhile for the view that can be enjoyed. Equipped with several attractions inside, such as PuttPutt Golf and Flying Fox with an additional fee.
