text: Fresh air, clean, cozy place.. Tempat perkemahan dekat ke toilet, tempat makan, serta area permainan (flying fox, jembatan gantung, turun tebing, dan lainnya). It was sunny day when I visited. Clear sky and unforgettable moments!
english_translation: Fresh air, clean, cozy place. The campsite is close to the toilets, dining area, and play area (flying fox, suspension bridge, abseiling, and more). It was a sunny day when I visited. Clear sky and unforgettable moments!

text: Tempatnya cukup indah & cukup luas. parkirannya tapi tidak terlalu luas & sayangnya aliran air yang sangat kotor, berwarna coklat dan terkadang mengeluarkan bau jadi bukti nyata seberapa parah pencemaran air yang ada di Indonesia
english_translation: The place is quite beautiful & quite spacious. However, the parking lot is not too spacious & unfortunately, the very dirty water flow, which is brown and sometimes emits an odor, is a real testament to how severe water pollution is in Indonesia.

text: Exotic,batu² yang berhamparan menjadi daya tarik tersendiri,cuman ada sedikit kendala di akses jalan kurang cukup baik..dan ada pemandangan yg kurang mengenakan (asap hitam) dalam tanda kutip kalian tau sendiri apa maksud saya :)
english_translation: Exotic, the scattered rocks are a unique attraction. There's just a slight issue with the road access not being good enough. And there's an unpleasant sight (black smoke), you know what I mean :)

text: Pernah kemah disini,dan cukup puas.harus booking jauh2 hari,tempatnya selalu full kalo weekend/liburan.akses jalan mudah,depannya banyak yg jual makanan,jadi kalo gak mau makan di restonya,keluar aja,didepannya juga ada alfamart.
english_translation: Once camped here, and was quite satisfied. Must book far in advance, the place is always full on weekends/holidays. Easy road access, many food vendors in front, so if you don't want to eat at the restaurant, just go out, there's also an Alfamart in front.

text: Tempatnya cukup enak dan unik  buat wisata kuliner menu makanananya juga banyak variasinya, cuma kalo hujan deras air danaunya naik ke jalan tenpat kulineran menggenang dibeberapa tempat, jd sdikit merepotkan buat yg pakai sepatu
english_translation: The place is quite nice and unique for culinary tourism. The food menu also has many variations, but if it rains heavily, the lake water rises onto the road, flooding the culinary spot in several places, making it a bit inconvenient for those wearing shoes.

text: permata tersembunyi bandung, air terjun terbaik di bandung, tetapi ketika Anda datang ke air terjun haseupan, Anda harus masuk ke bagian terbaik, yang tersembunyi di balik air terjun atas ... ada pemandangan terbaik di dalam ...
english_translation: Bandung's hidden gem, the best waterfall in Bandung, but when you come to Haseupan Waterfall, you must enter the best part, which is hidden behind the upper waterfall... there are the best views inside...

text:
Akses jalan menuju lokasi masih perlu perhatian serius dr pengelola dan dinas terkait.
Rekomended banget buat yg suka petualangan dan tantangan. tp buat yg pingin indahnya aja tp gak mau perjuangannya lebih baik cari lokasi lain.
english_translation: The road access to the location still needs serious attention from the management and relevant agencies. Highly recommended for those who enjoy adventure and challenges. But for those who want only the beauty without the struggle, it's better to find another location.

text: Bagus cuma ada pemandangan yang ngga terlalu enakeun dilihat pembakaran apa gitu. Mungkin bisa ditambah petunjuk arah juga karna kmrn pas mau balik nyasar gitu makin kebawah. Spot2nya bagus buat foto, cuma cape juga bikin ngos2an
english_translation: It's good, but there's a view that's not very pleasant to see, some kind of burning. Maybe you could also add directional signs because yesterday when I wanted to go back, I got lost going further down. The spots are good for photos, but it's also tiring and makes you breathless.

text: Selama pandemi tetap menerapkan physical distancing, tiket masuk Rp. 30.000 perorang tetap dapat minuman, fasilitas umum bersih, tersedia banyak toilet dan bersih, makanan enak dan terjangkau, sekarang koin tidak dapat di refund.
english_translation: During the pandemic, continue to practice physical distancing. Admission is Rp. 30,000 per person and includes a drink. Public facilities are clean, there are many clean toilets, the food is delicious and affordable. Currently, coins cannot be refunded.

text:
Cocok untuk berlibur bersama keluarga. Disediakan saung juga. Akses untuk ke curug agak kecil dari loket, jadi harus berjalan kaki agak jauh.

Untuk toilet dekat area curug, masih kurang memadai 😅 semoga kedepan bisa ditingkatkan
english_translation:
Suitable for a family vacation. Gazebos are also provided. The access to the waterfall is a bit narrow from the ticket counter, so you have to walk quite a distance.

The toilets near the waterfall area are still inadequate 😅 hopefully they can be improved in the future.

text: Siapkan diri kalian bila ingin berwisata ke Curug Maribaya. Perjalanan dari pintu masuk ke beberapa titik wisata yang jauh, tidak disarankan bila kalian telah menempuh perjalanan jauh sebelumnya. But overall, the view was amazing!
english_translation: Prepare yourselves if you want to travel to Curug Maribaya. The journey from the entrance to some distant tourist spots is not recommended if you have already traveled a long distance beforehand. But overall, the view was amazing!

text: untuk pengunjung hanya kurang kesadaran diri saja, naik bawa sampah tapi pas turun sampahnya ga dibawa, terus di wc atas tuh sedikit kurang terjaga kebersihannya karena gaada tempat sampah jadi orang orang nyimpen tisu sembarangan
english_translation: for visitors, there's just a lack of self-awareness, they bring trash up but don't take it down, and the restrooms upstairs are a bit lacking in cleanliness because there are no trash cans, so people just leave their tissues anywhere.

text: Cocok sekali untuk tempat rekreasi keluarga. Tempatnya sejuk, bersih. Kemudian sekarang juga sudah banyak spot-spot wisata yang bisa di kunjungi, seperti taman bunga, floating market, wahana air, dan masih banyak lagi. Recomended.
english_translation: Perfect for family recreation. The place is cool and clean. Moreover, there are now many tourist spots that can be visited, such as flower gardens, a floating market, water attractions, and many more. Recommended.

text: Tempat yang luas. Banyak spot area utk swafoto. Bisa berfoto naik kapal maupun memberi makan hewan, berkuda, dan sewa pakaian di berbagai negara mini yang tersedia. Ada playground dan seperti pasar apung yg menjual banyak makanan.
english_translation: Spacious place. Many photo spots. You can take photos on a boat, feed animals, go horseback riding, and rent costumes in various mini-countries available. There's a playground and something like a floating market selling lots of food.

text: Tempat wisata Yang tidak keurus.. kamar Mandi Dan mushollanya bau. Pengawasan Yang kurang sehingga jadi tempat dua2an. Semoga ini bisa segera Di perbaiki oleh manajemennya. Permainan wisatanya kurang menarik Dan kurang bervariasi.
english_translation: Unmaintained tourist spot. The bathrooms and prayer rooms smell. Lack of supervision makes it a place for couples. Hopefully, this can be fixed by the management soon. The tourist attractions are uninteresting and lack variety.

text: Bagus, banyak bunga nya. Kebanyakan warna merah. Ada spot2 keren buat foto2. Harga ticket bervariasi untuk yang bawa SLR, pengunjung tanpa SLR. Ada juga packet untuk foto prewed per 2 jam. Ada mushola. Lokasi dekat dengan de ranch
english_translation: Good, lots of flowers. Mostly red. There are cool spots for photos. Ticket prices vary for those bringing an SLR, and for visitors without an SLR. There are also packages for pre-wedding photos per 2 hours. There is a prayer room. Location is close to de ranch.

text:
Bagus, harga nya juga lumayan mahal, dan yang buat kurang asik, ada wahana di dalam dan harus membayar,
Sudah bayar mahal tiket di dalam harus bauyar jika mau coba wahana nya ..
Kan buat ketawa.
Tp lumayan bagus tempatnya.
Oke lha
english_translation:
Good, the price is also quite expensive, and what makes it less fun is that there are rides inside and you have to pay,
After paying an expensive ticket, you still have to pay if you want to try the rides..
It's funny, isn't it.
But the place is quite good.
It's okay.

text:
Kebun Begonia Lembang, cocok banget buat wisata bareng temen, pasangan and keluarga.
bagi yg suka hunting foto ini juga recommanded.
untuk HTM/orang 25K ya..
toilet dan musholla juga tersedia ko.
kalo weekend hati2 ya, suka rame..
english_translation:
Begonia Lembang Garden is perfect for a trip with friends, a partner, and family.
It's also recommended for those who love to hunt for photos.
The entrance fee is 25K per person.
Toilets and a prayer room are also available.
Be careful on weekends, it can get crowded.

text: Tempat ini rekomendasi buat bawa keluarga dan teman. Cukup mudah di akses dari jalan raya, ada kamar mandinya juga, tempat jual makan juga ada. Jalur naiknya nggak terlalu sulit. Kalo musim liburan banyak anak2 yg main disini juga
english_translation: This place is recommended for bringing family and friends. It's quite easy to access from the main road, there are bathrooms, and a place to buy food. The path up isn't too difficult. During the holidays, many children play here too.

text: Hijauu bangett, luas banget, ada flying fox, ada tmpt makan juga semacam foodcourt gtu , tp susah sinyal bgt disinii , kalau hujan tuh susah deh mau balik ke parkiran mobil , tp ada shuttle sih dari pintu keluar ke tempat parkiran
english_translation: Super green, really spacious, there's a flying fox, there's also a place to eat, like a food court, but the signal is really bad here. If it rains, it's difficult to get back to the car park, but there is a shuttle from the exit to the parking lot.

text:
Serasa di bali
Teduh dg ada danaunya
Indah dg banyaknya bunga...
Tempatnya gampang di capai,berada d pinggir jalan
Setiap sudut tamannya indah buat d foto...
Di dalamnya ada kereta u berkeliling,ada penyewaan sepeda dan becak juga
english_translation:
Feels like Bali
Shady with a lake
Beautiful with many flowers...
The place is easy to reach, located by the roadside
Every corner of the garden is beautiful for photos...
Inside there is a train to go around, there are also bicycle and pedicab rentals

text: tempat bagus buat hunting foto, banyak banget spot spot foto yang bisa diabadikan. tiket masuk cukup dengan 8000 rupiah saja, berhati hati dengan monyet liar yang berkeliaran karena mereka bisa saja mengambil barang barang kalian.
english_translation: A great place for photo hunting, with lots of photo spots to capture. The entrance ticket is only 8,000 rupiah. Be careful of the wild monkeys roaming around, as they might take your belongings.

text: Lokasi wisata dg tiket masuk 30rb/person. View alam gunung Tangkuban perahu dg angin dingin yg bertiup kencang ... tersedia masjid dg air wudhu yg dingin, toilet, food court, jualan pakaian sbgai oleh2.  Good view gunung g & kawah
english_translation: Tourist location with an entrance fee of Rp 30,000/person. Natural view of Mount Tangkuban Perahu with strong cold winds blowing... a mosque is available with cold ablution water, toilets, food court, clothing stalls for souvenirs. Good view of mountain g & crater.

text: Merupakan destinasi wisata alam yaitu hutan pinus yg d sulap menjadi berbagai macam lingkup wahana bermain dll, dijamin betah Karana udara sejuk dingin dan banyak dihiasi lampu lampu cocok untuk refreshing, menghilangkan kepenatan
english_translation: It's a natural tourist destination, a pine forest transformed into various recreational attractions, etc. Guaranteed to be enjoyable because of the cool, cold air and many decorative lights, perfect for refreshing and relieving fatigue.

text: Perjalanan lumayan panjang dengan jalur mobil yg pas pasan bahkan ada yg hanya cukup untuk 1 mobil, sampai parkiran harus jalan kaki atau naik ojeg sekitar 1 km menuju curug, tp semua terbayar dg pemandangan curug yang indah...👍 …
english_translation: The journey was quite long with a narrow car path, some only wide enough for one car, and from the parking lot, you have to walk or take a motorbike taxi for about 1 km to the waterfall, but it was all worth it with the beautiful view of the waterfall...👍

text: Banyak spot foto disini, cuma saya saranin yg mau kesini jangan pake sepatu mending pakai sendal karna nanti kita akan di sebrangin pake getek kecil untuk menuju ke batu batuan besar. Biaya masuk hanya 8.000 per orang murah meriah
english_translation: There are many photo spots here, I just suggest that those who want to come here don't wear shoes, it's better to wear sandals because later we will be crossed by a small raft to reach the big rocks. The entrance fee is only 8,000 per person, cheap and cheerful.

text: Wisata kawah Tangkuban perahu, hanya pemandangan kawah saja, tidak bisa turun langsung ke kawah karena berbahaya, masih aktif, banyak yg menjajakan cinderamata, dan didekat area parkir ada tempat fotogenic, pohon2 akar khas gunung
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu crater tour, only crater views, cannot go down directly into the crater because it is dangerous, still active, many selling souvenirs, and near the parking area there is a photogenic spot with distinctive mountain root trees.

text: Wisata di bandung yang oke banget. Kesini serasa keliling dunia. Dengan tiket masuk 50 rb (tanpa jembatan gantung) atau yg 65 rb dengan jembatan gantung. Tiket bisa ditukar minuman. Ada berbagai macam spot foto dr beberapa negara.
english_translation: A really great tour in Bandung. Coming here feels like traveling the world. With an entrance ticket of 50 thousand rupiah (without the suspension bridge) or 65 thousand rupiah with the suspension bridge. The ticket can be exchanged for a drink. There are various photo spots from different countries.

text: Kereen, geopark yg ada dipadalarang bandung barat, bongkahan batu2 putih alami, cocok utk yg mau cari spot foto bagus dan keren, apalagi buat prewedding , utk prewedding dikenakan biaya 300rbu dan tiket masuk beserta parkirnya jga
english_translation: Kereen, a geopark in Padalarang, West Bandung, with natural white rock formations. It's perfect for those looking for good and cool photo spots, especially for pre-wedding shoots. For pre-wedding shoots, there's a fee of 300,000 Rupiah, which includes entrance tickets and parking.

text: Tmpt banyak di renov pas photoshoot tidak banyak atraksi untuk foto. Guide tidak pandai sudah bayar mahal tidak ngerti shooting frame. Sewa perahu pun tidak bisa pakai. Sungguh nyesal kita, bannding dusun bambu sini nga worth trip.
english_translation: The place is undergoing a lot of renovations. During the photoshoot, there weren't many attractions for photos. The guide wasn't good; we paid a lot but they didn't understand shooting frames. We couldn't even use the boat rental. We truly regret it. Compared to Dusun Bambu, this trip wasn't worth it.

text: View nya juara, penerangan diwaktu malam juara, kebersihan juara, toilet berjajar dengah gagahnya... tapi sayang airnya sangat terbatas bahkan tdk ada air sama sekali.. mohon kpd pengelola utk memperhatikan fasilitas yg satu ini ya
english_translation: The view is champion, the night lighting is champion, the cleanliness is champion, the toilets stand proudly in a row... but unfortunately, the water is very limited, even non-existent. Please, management, pay attention to this one facility.

text: bagi yang suka wisata adventure..this is one of  great place to visit..alamnya natural..tmpatnya menarik, batu2ny tersusun rapi dan bagus untuk foto2..tp jangan lupa bawa minum ya..soalnya pasti haus untuk exploring..love n like it
english_translation: For those who like adventure tourism.. this is one of the great places to visit.. the nature is natural.. the place is interesting, the rocks are neatly arranged and good for photos.. but don't forget to bring drinks.. because you'll surely be thirsty from exploring.. love and like it

text: Bunganya bagus-bagus dan bermekaran. Tempatnya ga luas2 amat amat sih, tapi bisa memanjakan mata dan bagus untuk foto-foto. Disarankan jangan pas lagi hujan kesininya, sayang klo hujan ngga ke kubek semua, padahal bunga2nya cantik.
english_translation: The flowers are beautiful and blooming. The place isn't very big, but it's pleasing to the eye and great for photos. It's recommended not to come when it's raining; it would be a shame if all the flowers couldn't be fully enjoyed due to the rain, especially since they are so pretty.

text: Kami masuk dari Resto Tafso karena bertujusn unt menikmati pemandangan dan kmd dilanjutkan ke Sarae Hills tiket masuk dari 60k-95k.  Lokasi yg cocok unt berfoto dgn latar belakang Sphinx, Eiffel Tower, Liberty, Arc de Triomphe, dsb
english_translation: We entered from Tafso Restaurant with the intention of enjoying the view, and then proceeded to Sarae Hills. The entrance fee is 60k-95k. The location is suitable for taking photos with backgrounds of the Sphinx, Eiffel Tower, Liberty, Arc de Triomphe, etc.

text:
Hawa nan jesuk khas lembang bandung ini salah satu distinasi tempat wisata dan makan di kota kembang ini menawarkan panorama yang mantab dan indah..

Untk makanan enakt
Toilet bersih 1000k
Cocok buat yang lagi santai untuk liburan.
english_translation:
This Hawa Nan Jesuk in Lembang, Bandung, is one of the tourist and culinary destinations in the "City of Flowers." It offers amazing and beautiful panoramic views.

The food is delicious.
The toilets are clean (1000k).
It's suitable for those looking for a relaxing holiday.

text: Tempatnya sangat asri, datang kesana pagi pagi sekali sekitar jam 9 pagi. Disana kita bisa keliling2 dan menikmati suasana alam. Waktu kesini saya dapat masker. Ada satu rumah kaya rumah kacagitu isinya bunga orchid berbagai jenis.
english_translation: The place is very beautiful, arrived there very early in the morning, around 9 AM. There, we can walk around and enjoy the natural atmosphere. When I came here, I got a mask. There is one house, like a glass house, filled with various kinds of orchids.

text: Waktu kesana kebetulan akhir pekan dan libur panjang juga jadi agak penuh, karena di jalan macet sampe nya jam 2 siang hujan pula. Ga terlalu menikmati karena berkabut, tapi recomend sih untuk yang suka refreshing di alam terbuka ☺
english_translation: When I went there, it happened to be the weekend and a long holiday, so it was quite crowded. There was traffic on the way, so I arrived at 2 PM, and it was raining too. I didn't enjoy it too much because it was foggy, but I do recommend it for those who like refreshing themselves in the great outdoors ☺

text: tempat camping yang cocok untuk keluarga atau rombongan, tempatnya tidak terlalu capek untuk mendapatkan view yg baik! banyak spot" camping untuk sekedar melepaskan penat. perjalanan menuju curug sekitar 20 menit dari area camping.
english_translation: A campsite suitable for families or groups, the location offers good views without too much effort! Plenty of camping spots to just unwind and relieve stress. The journey to the waterfall takes about 20 minutes from the camping area.

text: pemanfaatan lahan yang sangat baik sekali. dlu namanya situ umar dan hanya dijadikan kolam pemancingan saja tetapi saat ini telah berbah menjadi salah satu tempat objek wisata yg banyak dikunjungi wisatawan. selain itu juga disini …
english_translation: Excellent land utilization. Previously it was named Situ Umar and was only used as a fishing pond, but now it has transformed into a tourist attraction visited by many tourists. Besides that, here...

text: Tempat yang nyaman buat refresing kalo kita Naik ke atas lagi bakal menemukan pemandangan yg luar biasa apalagi dipake kemping bareng temen temen atau keluarga. Cuma akses jalannya ga bagus, saya kepeleset terus karna licin tanahnya
english_translation: A comfortable place for refreshing, if we go further up, we'll find an extraordinary view, especially for camping with friends or family. It's just that the road access isn't good; I kept slipping because the ground was slippery.

text: Ngajak keluarga kesini mumpung anak masih libur sekolah. Sengaja datang berangkat dari lampung senin biar di lembang gak padet. Tapi ternyata floating market tetep ruameeeeeee hahahahaaha.  Walopun capek muter2 tapi yg penting happy
english_translation: Invited the family here while the kids are still on school holiday. Intentionally came from Lampung on Monday so it wouldn't be crowded in Lembang. But it turns out the Floating Market is still super crowded hahahahaha. Even though I'm tired from walking around, the important thing is that we're happy.

text: ada sate kelinci ayam kambing sapi...susu sapi murni..lotek..kupat tahu gorengan..mie rebus...kayu bakar...sal..kaos tangan..tas rajut...alat kemping..di kelola karang taruna bhina jaya bhakti jayagiri...silahkan mampir masih promo8
english_translation: Rabbit, chicken, goat, beef satay... fresh cow's milk.. lotek.. kupat tahu.. fried snacks.. boiled noodles... firewood... sate... gloves... knitted bags... camping equipment.. managed by Karang Taruna Bhina Jaya Bhakti Jayagiri... feel free to stop by, still on promotion.

text:
Tempat wisata alam alternatif di daerah Bandung Barat dengan pesona keindahan hutan pinus. Air terjunnya tidak begitu bagus. Banyak objek untuk membuat foto yang intagramable.

Jalan menuju ke tempat ini masih jelek, sangat berbatu.
english_translation:
Alternative natural tourist destination in West Bandung area with the charm of pine forest beauty. The waterfall is not very good. Many objects for Instagrammable photos.

The road to this place is still bad, very rocky.

text: Konsep pasar kuliner terbaik dan pertama yang hits di Jawa Barat. Tempatnya bersih, nyaman, asri. Cocok untuk berwisata kuliner bersama keluarga tercinta. Makanannya enak, fasilitas umum yang lengkap membuat pengunjung betah disini.
english_translation: The best and first concept of a hit culinary market in West Java. The place is clean, comfortable, and green. Suitable for a culinary tour with your beloved family. The food is delicious, and the complete public facilities make visitors feel at home here.

text:
Tempatnya cocok buat "sesi photo2 buat update medsos".
Nyobain beberapa makanan, qualitasnya cenderung buruk, dengan harga yang cenderung lebih mahal (wajar, karena tempat wisata; ga wajar karena harga vs makanannya tidak berimbang)
english_translation:
The place is suitable for "photo sessions to update social media".
Tried several foods, the quality tends to be bad, with prices that tend to be more expensive (understandable, because it's a tourist spot; not understandable because the price versus the food is unbalanced).

text: Setelah Dago bakery sekarang sarae Hills yang menawarkan pesona lain dari yang lain untuk yang suka berfoto.dengan spot foto yang luar biasa mulai mulai dari jbatan gantung dan miniatur 7 keajaiban dunia menambah keunikan spot poto.
english_translation: After Dago Bakery, now Sarae Hills offers an unparalleled charm for photography enthusiasts, with incredible photo spots ranging from suspension bridges to miniatures of the 7 Wonders of the World, adding to the uniqueness of the photo opportunities.

text:
Recommended..
anak anak happy, pengen kesini lagi
kalo kesini lebih asyik kalo rame rame jadi anak anak bisa outbond emak emak bisa santai ngupi,selfi2 dan mengabadikan momen
mesti bawa powerr bank ya pasti kehabisan batre deh..hehe
english_translation:
Recommended..
The kids were happy, they want to come here again
When coming here, it's more fun if it's crowded, so the kids can do outbound activities, the moms can relax, have coffee, take selfies, and capture moments.
You must bring a power bank, the battery will definitely run out.. hehe

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata dijawa barat, alam yg begitu elok ,cocok buat refret dan untuk stady tour karena selain alamnya yg elok juga kawah belerang yg masih aktif.. Gunung tangkuban prahu salah satu gunung berapi di jawa barat .
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations in West Java, with such beautiful nature, suitable for refreshing and for study tours because in addition to its beautiful nature, there is also an active sulfur crater. Mount Tangkuban Perahu is one of the volcanoes in West Java.

text:
Masuknya 20 rb perorg
Motor 12 rb
Parkir 4 rb
Makan di warung nasi sekitar situ harganya lumayan
Pas ksana hujan jd byk petir dan berkabut bgt
Ada parkir motor lagi dkt masjid dan byr seikhlasnya
Kamar mandi bersih
Bagus dan menarik
english_translation:
Entrance fee 20,000 per person
Motorcycle parking 12,000
General parking 4,000
Food at the rice stalls around there is quite expensive
It rained when I went, so there were many lightning strikes and it was very foggy
There's another motorcycle parking near the mosque, pay what you want
Clean bathroom
Good and interesting

text: Floating market, konsep tempat makan dgn jajanan kaki lima diatas perahu yang berada di kolam yang cukup besar..htm 30 rb hr biasa, parkir 10 rb, belum termasuk atraksi lainnya...tempat parkir lumayan besar, suasana tenang & sejuk..
english_translation: Floating market, a dining concept with street food served from boats on a rather large pond. HTM (admission fee) 30 thousand on weekdays, parking 10 thousand, not including other attractions... The parking lot is quite large, the atmosphere is calm & cool.

text: Sekarang udh enak jalurnya lewat sanghyang poek,,,,jalurnya bisa dibilang datar karena cuma ada tanjakan tipis2 doang trs d tengah perjalanan ada yg jualan jga jadi klo anda merasa lelah bisa rehat sejenak sambil beli minuman dingin
english_translation: Now the route through Sanghyang Poek is good. The route can be considered flat because there are only slight inclines, and halfway through there are also vendors, so if you feel tired, you can rest for a moment while buying a cold drink.

text:
Stone Garden Citatah Destinasi Wisata Keindahan Alam Batu Karang Di Atas Pegunungan.
Udaranya Yang Dingin & Segar Membuat Anda Terinspirasi Akan Keindahan Alamnya.
Banyak Sekali Spot-Spot Foto Yang Keren Untuk Tempat Prewedding Anda.
english_translation:
Stone Garden Citatah: A Tourist Destination of Natural Rock Beauty on the Mountains.
The Cool & Fresh Air Will Inspire You with its Natural Beauty.
There are Many Cool Photo Spots for Your Pre-wedding Location.

text: Udh pesen makanan dikantin/kios apalah namanya itu udh jelas ngomong pake sambal sm saos eh pas dateng polos dan si mba nya terkesan cuek & jutek , attitude nya emg pada gitu ya?... Kya yg ga seneng terhadap cs bad attitude👎👎 sorry …
english_translation: I already ordered food at the canteen/stall or whatever it's called, I clearly said with chili and sauce, but when it arrived it was plain and the woman seemed indifferent and grumpy, is their attitude always like that?... Like they're unhappy with customers, bad attitude 👎👎 sorry...

text: Masih bagus di kunjungan kami Oktober 2022, tempat luas dan nyaman, sayang nya klo makanan dan minuman ya termasuk di mahalin ya namanya di lokasi wisata, beberap spot sedang dalam renovasi dan mudah-mudahan segera menjadi bagus lagi
english_translation: Still good during our visit in October 2022, the place was spacious and comfortable. It's a shame that the food and drinks are a bit overpriced, as is expected at a tourist location. Several spots are currently undergoing renovation and hopefully will become nice again soon.

text: Baguuusss 😍 Karena aku suka bunga jadi suka banget tempat ini. Dateng pas hujan jadi nunggu sebentar dan hujan reda langsung keliling, jadi ga banyak orang. Beli tanaman juga di nursery nya, tanamannya sehat semua, akarnya bagus 👍🏻 …
english_translation: Sooo good 😍 Because I like flowers, I really love this place. Came when it was raining so I waited a bit, and as soon as the rain stopped I went around, so there weren't many people. Bought plants at the nursery too, all the plants were healthy with good roots 👍🏻 …

text:
Tempat wisata berjarak kurang lebih dua jam dari kota Bandung. Tempat mudah di jangkau karena sudah ada jalan beraspal tepat menuju bibir kawah Gunung.

Di tempat ini juga tersedia banyak souveir dan tanpat beristirahat yang memadai.
english_translation:
The tourist attraction is approximately two hours away from Bandung city. The place is easy to reach because there is already an asphalt road leading directly to the crater's edge.

At this place, there are also many souvenirs and adequate resting spots available.

text: Tempatnya asik banget..untuk liburan keluarga, meeting, serta refreshing sangat cocok sekali. Udara sangat sejuk, pemandangan yang indah sekali membuat pengunjung yang datang bisa betah berlama-lama ditempat ini. Sangat recommended..
english_translation: The place is really cool.. very suitable for family vacations, meetings, and refreshing. The air is very cool, and the beautiful scenery makes visitors who come feel at home for a long time. Highly recommended..

text:
tempat berkemah, dan salah satu pilihan buat photo sunrise terbaik bandung, tiket masuk hanya under 10.000/ orang,
disini juga ada tempat2 berjualan, jadi kalo pas berkemah, lapar, tinggal turun sedikit dan kita bisa pesen makanan...
english_translation:
campsite, and one of the best choices for watching the sunrise in Bandung, the entrance ticket is only under 10,000/person,
there are also shops here, so if you're camping and hungry, just go down a little and you can order food...

text: Tempat hiburan yang bisa memberikan sensasi... Yang membuat kita tanpa sadar. Sudah menghabiskan berjam-jam waktu tanpa terasa.. Keren... Lembang memang tempat menghilangkan rasa... Stress.. dan kejenuhan dari rutinitas sehari-hari..
english_translation: An entertainment venue that can give you a thrill... That makes us unconsciously. Spend hours without realizing it... Cool... Lembang is indeed a place to eliminate feelings of... Stress.. and boredom from daily routines..

text:
Wisata yang bisa memanjakan diri, dgn suasana alam yang asri dgn wahana permainan yg membuat qt senang, bisa tertawa.
Bersama keluarga berwisata ke sini membuat qt bahagia bs berfoto, bermain, makan bersama. Pokoknya bahagia bersama.
english_translation:
A self-indulgent tour, with a beautiful natural atmosphere and exciting rides that make us happy and laugh.
Traveling here with family makes us happy, we can take photos, play, and eat together. Basically, happiness together.

text: Floating Market salah satu wisata di Lembang, Kabupaten Bandung Barat. Parkir mobil motor sangat luas. Tiket masuk Rp. 30.000 / orang (tiket bisa ditukar minuman). Rekomended untuk wisata keluarga karena banyak spot foto dan bermain.
english_translation: Floating Market is one of the tourist attractions in Lembang, West Bandung Regency. Car and motorbike parking is very spacious. Entrance ticket is Rp. 30,000 / person (the ticket can be exchanged for a drink). Recommended for family tours because there are many photo and play spots.

text:
Kedua kalinya ke Sanghyang Heuleut.. Pertama tahun 2014 dan sekarang 2019.
Banyak perubahan terutama trek menuju lokasi akibat Banjir Bandang Tahun 2017.
Sudah banyak warung dan penyewaan pelampung...
Semoga tetap terjaga keasriannya
english_translation:
Second time to Sanghyang Heuleut.. The first was in 2014 and now in 2019.
Many changes, especially the path to the location due to the Flash Flood in 2017.
There are already many stalls and life jacket rentals...
Hopefully, its natural beauty will be preserved.

text:
Tempat yg fresh, segar, alami, jauh dari hiruk pikuk kota, yg ingin refreshing dari daily rutin kota ini pilihan yg tepat, nyaman n ga ramai jg walaupun parkiran cukup penuh.

Makanan"nya harga standar lah masih masuk akal n enak" jg
english_translation:
A fresh, refreshing, natural place, far from the hustle and bustle of the city. If you want to refresh from the city's daily routine, this is the right choice. It's comfortable and not crowded, even though the parking lot is quite full.

The food prices are standard, still reasonable and also delicious.

text: Seruuu bisa jajan aneka makanan khas Bandung, harus tukar uang dulu dengan koin. Oh iya penukaran koin kena pajak. Range harga makanan antara 10rb -30 rb. Meski agak mahal dibandinhkan diluar tapi makanannya enak-enak semua. Worth it.
english_translation: It's fun to snack on various Bandung specialties, you have to exchange money for coins first. Oh yes, coin exchange is taxed. The food price range is between 10k - 30k. Although a bit expensive compared to outside, all the food is delicious. Worth it.

text: Ini tempat cocok banget buat kalian yang mau camping tapi gamau terlalu cape buat naik ke puncaknya. Lahan campingnya cukup luas, tetapi suka membeludak pengunjung apalagi di weekend. Inget bro&sis buat jangan buang sampah sembarangan
english_translation: This place is perfect for those who want to camp but don't want to be too tired climbing to the summit. The campsite is quite spacious, but it gets crowded, especially on weekends. Remember, bros and sis, not to litter.

text: Tempatnya enak, nyaman dan asri. Banyak sekali spot foto di sini. Tidak hanya dipajang, beberapa bunga bahkan dijual di sini dengan harga bervariasi. Selain kebun bunga ada juga kebun buah, ruang pertemuan, restoran dan toko souvenir.
english_translation: The place is nice, comfortable, and beautiful. There are many photo spots here. Not only displayed, but some flowers are even sold here at varying prices. Besides the flower garden, there is also a fruit garden, a meeting room, a restaurant, and a souvenir shop.

text:
Tempatnya sangat luas, terlihat cukup dikelola dengan baik, dan banyak sudut yang bisa digunakan berfoto-foto.

Bagi yang ingin menikmati wisata kuliner, wahana air, dan taman bunga di satu kawasan, mungkin tempat ini cocok bagi Anda.
english_translation:
The place is very spacious, looks well-maintained, and has many spots for taking photos.

For those who want to enjoy culinary tourism, water rides, and a flower garden in one area, this place might be suitable for you.

text:
Tempat jajan dengan berbagai macam jajanan lezat di danau seolah olah terapung, menarik sekali, kalo saya paling suka Pisang Dayang Sumbi..
Spot fotonya juga sangat banyak sehingga dapat memenuhin beranda instagram dan facebook Anda..
english_translation:
A snack spot with a variety of delicious snacks on the lake, as if floating, very interesting. If I had to pick, I'd most like Pisang Dayang Sumbi.
There are also many photo spots that can fill your Instagram and Facebook feed.

text: Banyak spot untuk foto, setelah capek berjalan keliling, floating market menyediakan berbagai macam makanan mo yg berat atau pun sekedar cemilan, jangan lupa tukar koin dulu untuk belanja makanan. Seru banget....capek nya terbayarkan.
english_translation: Lots of spots for photos. After getting tired from walking around, the floating market offers a wide variety of food, whether it's a hearty meal or just snacks. Don't forget to exchange for coins first to buy food. It was very fun... the tiredness was worth it.

text:
Suasananya adem, enak buat camping ala2 gitu soalnya enak banget dan estetik. Bisa sewa sepeda juga (bayar lagi 25 rb 1 jam). Buat pacaran/bawa keluarga cucok bangett!

P.S: jangan beli es podeng di sana soalnya banyak lalat dan mahal
english_translation:
The atmosphere is cool and perfect for a casual camping trip because it's really nice and aesthetic. You can also rent bikes (another 25,000 for 1 hour). It's super suitable for dating or bringing the family!

P.S.: Don't buy es podeng there because there are many flies and it's expensive.

text:
Hutan pinus nya cocok untuk piknik keluarga, tiket yang murah serta akses yang dekat dengana jalan utama.
perlu rehabilitasi serta penataan kembali dengan fasilitas fasilitas kekinian.  akses dari hutan pinus ke curug perlu perbaikan.
english_translation:
Its pine forest is suitable for family picnics, with cheap tickets and close access to the main road.
It needs rehabilitation and rearrangement with modern facilities. Access from the pine forest to the waterfall needs improvement.

text: Untuk tempat wisata alam, viewnya masih terjaga & terlihat alami. Lumayan bersih dari sampah, toilet lumayan bersih tapi jumlahnya kurang banyak saat pengunjung membludak, lantai masjidnya basah karna tidak ada keset di luar masjid...
english_translation: For a natural tourist spot, the views are still preserved and look natural. It's reasonably clean of trash, the toilets are reasonably clean but not enough when visitors are overflowing, the mosque floor is wet because there are no mats outside the mosque.

text: Tempat nya indah dan enak buat jalan jalan, tiket masuk terjangkau tapi untuk masuk wahana di dalam harus bayar lagi, mungkin bisa dipertimbangkan semacam tiket terusan. Kebersihan terjaga dengan baik, air hangat nya ok buat rendeman.
english_translation: The place is beautiful and nice for a walk, the entrance ticket is affordable but you have to pay again to enter the attractions inside, perhaps a package ticket could be considered. The cleanliness is well maintained, the warm water is good for soaking.

text: Hari Minggu 31 Oktober 2021, mampir kesini, HTM weekend 30rb per orang , weekdays 20rb, mobil 35rb, motor 12rb, parkir 5rb. pengunjung sudah ramai, jangan lupa pake masker.berhubung sudah musim hujan, disini beberapa kali turun hujan.
english_translation: Sunday, October 31, 2021, stopped by here. Weekend entrance fee is 30,000 IDR per person, weekdays 20,000 IDR. Car parking is 35,000 IDR, motorcycle 12,000 IDR, general parking 5,000 IDR. The place was already crowded. Don't forget to wear a mask. Since it's already the rainy season, it rained here several times.

text: Curug maribaya, terletak di lembang, jawa barat, tersedianya pemamdian air panas dan spot foto yang banyak, dan suasana yang sejuk nan asri, namun sayang, dari tiket masuk saja sudah mahal, ditambah di dalam beberapa arena bayar lagi,
english_translation: Maribaya Waterfall, located in Lembang, West Java, offers hot spring baths and many photo spots, with a cool and beautiful atmosphere. However, unfortunately, the entrance ticket is already expensive, and in addition, several areas inside require additional payment.

text: Luas bgt tempatnyaaa, byk bgt spot fotonyaaa. Tp syg klo mau ke jembatan kudu bayar lagi 20k per org eh tapi itung2 naik flying fox sih setelahnyaa. Pulangnya dr bawah kita bsa naik shuttle ke tempat parkiran. Enak bgt tempatnya sejuk
english_translation: The place is so spacious, with so many photo spots. But it's a shame you have to pay an extra 20k per person to go to the bridge. Oh well, you can consider it like a flying fox ride afterwards. On the way back, we can take a shuttle from downstairs to the parking lot. The place is really nice and cool.

text: Lokasi mudah di akses dengan motor dan mobil. Tempat parkir luas. Biaya masuk murah. Dari area tiket ke air terjun jalan menuruni tangga sudah tertata rapi dan aman. Siapkan bekal supaya tidak kehausan krn anak tangganya lumayan banyak
english_translation: Easily accessible by motorcycle and car. Spacious parking area. Cheap entrance fee. From the ticket area to the waterfall, the path down the stairs is well-maintained and safe. Prepare supplies so you don't get thirsty because there are quite a lot of stairs.

text: Gunung incess, trekkingnya sebentar, tiket masuk kalau camp Rp 22000 kalau hiking aja Rp 10000. Ada toilet baru yg bersih, airnya juga bersih bisa dipake masak, ada mushola, ada warung di dekat parkiran. Akses bisa pake mobil dan motor
english_translation: Mount Incess, the trek is short. Entrance ticket: Rp 22,000 if camping, Rp 10,000 if just hiking. There are new, clean toilets, the water is also clean and can be used for cooking. There's a prayer room and a kiosk near the parking area. Access is by car or motorcycle.

text: Habiskan waktu Anda di sini untuk liburan singkat, airnya cukup deras saat musim hujan, tetapi tidak jernih, lebih jernih di musim panas tetapi arusnya mungkin lebih lemah. Ada 3 spot air terjun yang bisa dicapai dengan berjalan kaki.
english_translation: Spend your time here for a short holiday, the water is quite strong during the rainy season, but not clear, clearer in the summer but the current may be weaker. There are 3 waterfall spots that can be reached by walking.

text:
Gowes bareng kesini sangat seru...
Viewnya mantap cocok buat foto2 alam yg keren.
Fasilitas udh cukup bagus... Banyak warung2 juga untuk tempat istirahat.

Cuma minusnya...
Harusnya sih tiket masuk untuk warga sekitar bisa lebih murah.
english_translation:
Riding bikes here together was very exciting... The view is great, perfect for taking cool nature photos. The facilities are already quite good... There are also many stalls for resting.

The only downside is... the entrance ticket for local residents should really be cheaper.

text:
Selalu mampir kesini kalo jalan-jalan ke Lembang.
Tempat nya menarik, bukan hanya spot foto doang.
Tapi, seru juga buat anak-anak. Banyak pilihan kegiatan dari memberi makan hewan, naik bebek gowes dan rainbow slide nya wajib coba sih.
english_translation:
Always stop by here when traveling to Lembang.
The place is interesting, not just for photo spots.
But, it's also fun for children. There are many activity options from feeding animals, riding swan bikes, and the rainbow slide is a must-try.

text:
Tempat yang menyenang bersama keluarga teman maupun sahabat
KIta bisa menikmati berbagai macam wahana, saat itu tahun 2014 kami memiliki banyak kenangan yang tak terlupakan disini :)

Ini adalah sedikit foto kenangan kami di tahun 2014
english_translation:
A fun place with family, friends, or companions.
We can enjoy a variety of rides. Back in 2014, we had many unforgettable memories here :)

Here are a few photos of our memories from 2014.

text: Kesini karena anak2 penasaran dengan permainan rainbow slidenya, yg lainnya biasa saja, untuk kuliner terapungnya harga rata2 25 rb sistemnya tukar koin , klu tukar koin ga bisa di refund kembali uangnya serta dikenakan 10 persen pajak
english_translation: Came here because the kids were curious about the rainbow slide. The other things were ordinary. For the floating culinary experience, the prices are around 25 thousand, it's a coin exchange system. If you exchange coins, you cannot get a refund for the money, and a 10 percent tax is applied.

text:
Tiket masuk 35 ribu/orang (bisa ditukar dengan air mineral) .
Parkiran luas, di bawah untuk bis di atas untuk mobil roda 4 dan sepeda motor .
Untuk spot photo jangan ditanya, banyak sekali spot2 yg bagus. Asal kuat jalan nya aja wkwkwk
english_translation:
Entrance ticket 35 thousand/person (can be exchanged for mineral water).
Spacious parking, downstairs for buses and upstairs for 4-wheeled vehicles and motorcycles.
As for photo spots, don't even ask, there are so many good spots. As long as you can walk, haha.

text:
Terakhir kesana beberapa tahun yang lalu, sekarang sudah rapi tempatnya...
Tapi, yang disayangkan..fasilitas umum seperti parkir dan toilet masih bayar😁
Hal kecil sih, tapi kadang yang bikin berpikir ulang mau kesana lagi atau ngga.. …
english_translation:
I was last there a few years ago, now the place is neat...
But, unfortunately... public facilities like parking and toilets still have a fee😁
It's a small thing, but sometimes it makes you reconsider whether you want to go there again or not...

text:
Sebenarnya ingin memberikan 5 bintang ⭐ untuk tempat foto, semuanya benar-benar luar biasa 👍🏻

Tetapi! Makanannya mengerikan 😂 jamur goreng dan sate bakso rasanya buruk.

Gelato terlalu manis, yang seharusnya tidak terasa seperti itu.
english_translation:
Actually wanted to give 5 stars ⭐ for the photo spot, everything was really amazing 👍🏻

But! The food was terrible 😂 the fried mushrooms and meatball satay tasted bad.

The gelato was too sweet, which it shouldn't taste like.

text: Tempatnya membingungkan antara rumah makan tempat wisata dan area parkir. Pokoknya patokan ada alfamart dan indomart, ada gedung tinggi seperti hotel . Reservasi dulu disitu, agak awkward awal karena bawa motor jas uja. Dan malam hari.
english_translation: The place is confusing, a mix of a restaurant, tourist spot, and parking area. Basically, the landmarks are an Alfamart and an Indomart, and a tall building like a hotel. You have to reserve first. It was a bit awkward at first because I arrived on a motorcycle in the rain and at night.

text:
Disekitar curug ada untuk area outdoor activity banyak. Ada painball, flying fox, area camp.
Kalau mau adakan gathering bagus juga.
Pemandangan alam dan suara air dari curug yg menaglir memberikan nuansa relax yang baik buat refrsehing
english_translation:
Around the waterfall, there are many areas for outdoor activities. There's paintball, flying fox, and a camping area.
It's also good for hosting gatherings.
The natural scenery and the sound of the flowing waterfall provide a good relaxing atmosphere for refreshment.

text: Tempat wisata instragamable,selpi-selpi,udara sejuk pemandangan nya okeh,akses menuju nya yg lumayan lama, jalan rada sempit, kebenaran hari libur jadi parkir penuh, dan rada jauh dari pintu masuk jadi jalan kaki,,,, okeh siip dah 😌🤗 …
english_translation: Instagrammable tourist spot, lots of selfies, cool air, the view is okay, access is quite long, the road is a bit narrow, it happened to be a holiday so parking was full, and a bit far from the entrance so had to walk,,,, okay, it's great 😌🤗

text:
Curug pelangi yg bener-bener ada pelanginya. Cantik banget 🥺🥺 tiketnya 20k parkir 5k
Dibawah ada toilet, mushola dan warung
Turun tangga gak kerasa. Perjalanan pulang alias naik tangganya itu mantab banget. Bikin kaki Tremor parah wkwkw
english_translation:
A rainbow waterfall that *actually* has a rainbow. So beautiful 🥺🥺 Ticket is 20k, parking is 5k
Below there are toilets, a prayer room, and a small shop.
Going down the stairs doesn't feel like anything. The trip back, meaning climbing the stairs, is amazing. Makes your legs shake badly lol

text: Jarak dari pintu masuk ke curug tilu lumayan menguras tenaga, tetapi seru. Sangat cocok untuk orang yang mempunyai jiwa petualang karena perjalanan masuk ke hutan dan menyusuri aliran air. Di curugnya pun terdapat warung kopi, mie, dll.
english_translation: The distance from the entrance to Curug Tilu is quite tiring, but exciting. It's very suitable for adventurous people because of the journey into the forest and along the stream. At the waterfall, there's also a coffee shop, instant noodles, etc.

text: Pemandangan yang sangat menakjubkan dan pengunjung nya pun ramai meski beberapa kali diselimuti kabut dan diguyur hujan tidak mengurangi rasa penasaran para pengunjung semoga pemandangan alam tangkuban perahu selalu terjaga kealamiannya
english_translation: A very amazing view and the visitors were crowded even though it was covered by fog several times and showered with rain, it did not reduce the visitors' curiosity. Hopefully, the natural beauty of Tangkuban Perahu will always be preserved in its naturalness.

text: One of the best Curug nearby Bandung. Treknya cukup menantang, karena pulangnya baru nanjak. Ke sana pas musim panas, jd warnanya hijau, bersih, sedikit orang mungkin karena lokasinya lebih sulit u dijangkau dibanding Sanghyang Heuleud.
english_translation: One of the best waterfalls near Bandung. The trek is quite challenging because the return trip is uphill. Went there during the dry season, so it was green, clean, and had few people, possibly because the location is harder to reach compared to Sanghyang Heuleud.

text: cukup baik, lingkungan alam masi asri, cocok untuk tempat menghilangkan kejenuhan, utk kebersihan perlu ditingkatkan lagi karena banyaknya sampah yang ada di dalam tempat wisata mudah dijumpai. overall cukup baik, next time kembali lagi
english_translation: Quite good, the natural environment is still beautiful, suitable for a place to relieve boredom. For cleanliness, it needs to be improved again because a lot of trash is easily found within the tourist spot. Overall, it's quite good, will come back next time.

text: Wisata yang bernuansa alam, membuat pengalaman yang menakjubkan... Sangat cocok untuk berlibur bersama keluarga... Mungkin jika tempat penginapan nya ditambah WiFi dan telephone yang tersambung ke room service akan terasa lebih maxsimal
english_translation: Nature-themed tourism makes for an amazing experience... Very suitable for holidays with family... Perhaps if the accommodation added WiFi and a telephone connected to room service, it would feel even more maximized.

text: Tempat nya cocok buat refresh karena di alam. Sangat bagus.  Tapi utk camp nya kalo bisa di tingkatkan lagi pelayanannya.  Karna camp beberapa ada yg bocor dan sleping bag bau smua karna lembab.utk restonya kalo bisa menu nya di cocokan
english_translation: The place is suitable for refreshment because it's in nature. Very good. But for the camp, if the service can be improved. Because some of the tents were leaking and all the sleeping bags smelled musty due to dampness. For the restaurant, if the menu can be adjusted.

text:
Tampat nya oke banget , akses jalan bagus , udah pake tangga juga . Jalan kaki beberapa menit udah nyampe di area camp . Cocok buat liburan keluarga .
Klo cuaca nya cerah bisa liat citylight dimalam hari and lautan awan di pagi hari nya
english_translation:
The location is really great, the road access is good, there are already stairs. You can reach the camp area by walking for a few minutes. It's suitable for a family holiday.
If the weather is clear, you can see the city lights at night and the sea of clouds in the morning.

text:
Tempatnya adem, banyak wahana, atau kalau cuma pengen lihat pemandangan saja juga enak.
Tiket akhir pekan 35k dan bisa ditukar welcome drink.
Sayangnya toilet dan mushola terbatas sekali, mungkin sudah waktunya pengelola membuat masjid.
english_translation:
The place is cool, there are many rides, or if you just want to enjoy the scenery, it's also nice.
Weekend tickets are 35k and can be exchanged for a welcome drink.
Unfortunately, the toilets and prayer rooms are very limited, maybe it's time for the management to build a mosque.

text: Sarae hills tergolong tempat wisata baru. Tapi untuk pelayanannya sangat baik. Hanya saja daerahnya cukup panas. Mungkin akan jadi tempat yang nggak musiman kalau disediakan aneka makanan khas negeri luar sesuai bangunan landmark disana
english_translation: The Sarae hills are considered a new tourist spot. But the service is very good. It's just that the area is quite hot. It might become a year-round destination if various international cuisines are provided according to the landmark buildings there.

text: Tempatnya bersih..rindang n asri..cocok untuk acara keluarga..gathering..reunian..ditambah dng pasar apungnya..buat foto-2 okay..👍👍.sayang saat itu toiletnya ada yg nutup...🙏untuk kedepannya smoga floating market makin yg terdepan...😘 …
english_translation: The place is clean.. shady and green.. suitable for family events.. gatherings.. reunions.. plus the floating market.. good for photos.. 👍👍. It's a shame that some of the toilets were closed at the time... 🙏 Hopefully in the future the floating market will become even more leading... 😘 …

text: Tempat okee cuman siap siap aja buat kalian yang dateng kesini jadi ank kecil,semua d atur oleh panitia,gaboleh kesana kesini,kita kan tujuan nya main bersenang senang lah ini  malah  di atur atur klooo perlu gwe bilang anjinggg babyyy,
english_translation: Okay place, but be prepared, kids, everything is managed by the committee. You can't go here and there. We came here to play and have fun, but instead we're being controlled. Honestly, I'd call you a "baby dog" if I could.

text: Akses ke lokasi mudah, lebih baik berkunjung saat weekdays dan sore hingga malam, banyak spot foto yang menggunakan lampu, lebih terlihat oke saat sore hari, namun ada beberapa tempat yang berbayar lagi selain tiket masuk.. so sad.. 😢 …
english_translation: Easy access to the location, better to visit on weekdays and in the afternoon until evening. Many photo spots use lights, looking better in the afternoon. However, there are some places that require additional payment besides the entrance ticket... so sad.. 😢 ...

text:
Kesini d akhir pekan usai lebaran
Rame bgt
Bks-Bandung
Cm mau ke sarae hills
Thn lalu kesini blm ada
Tmpt'a bagus,klo sejuk mah gak usah d tnya yaa
Tp sedih pas plng helm'a hilang
Tmpt penitipan helm'a trlalu kecil
Mlah plng ke Bekasi 😭
english_translation:
Came here at the end of the weekend after Eid.
So crowded.
Bekasi-Bandung
Just wanted to go to Sarae Hills.
Last year when I came here, this wasn't here yet.
The place is nice, and of course, it's cool.
But sad, my helmet disappeared when I was leaving.
The helmet check counter was too small.
Ended up going back to Bekasi 😭

text: Pemandangan cukup bagus. Sayang tempat parkir kurang dan banyak kera di dalam area wisata yang agak mengganggu kenyamanan wisatawan. Bisa ditempuh dari Setiabudi-Lembang maupun Dago. Untuk rute dari Lembang sangat macet di mada liburan.
english_translation: The view is quite good. Unfortunately, the parking lot is insufficient and there are many monkeys within the tourist area which are quite disruptive to tourist comfort. It can be reached from Setiabudi-Lembang or Dago. The route from Lembang is very congested during holidays.

text: Waaaah berkesan krn penuh perjuangan ,entah bisa kesitu lagi atau ngga, mendapatkan medan seperti itu, semoga saja cepat mendapat perhatian dr pihak terkait buat memperingan akses menuju kesana, sayang tempatnya indah tp sulit dijangkau
english_translation: Waaaah, it was memorable because it was full of struggle. I don't know if I'll ever be able to go there again, to get such a terrain. Hopefully, it will quickly get attention from the relevant parties to ease access to get there. It's a shame the place is beautiful but difficult to reach.

text: Berkemah sehari semalam di tempat ini sungguh menyenangkan. Curug yang indah, udara yang dingin, suluh-suluh untuk dibakar yang mudah dipesan, toilet yang lumayan, jalur tracking yang menantang, sungai dengan air dingin yang mengesankan.
english_translation: Camping for a day and a night in this place was truly enjoyable. Beautiful waterfall, cold air, readily available firewood, decent toilets, challenging trekking trails, and a river with impressive cold water.

text: Tempatnya luas dan bersih. Untuk wahananya lumayan banyak dan spot foto banyak. Biayanya masuknya tidak terlalu mahal. Kawasannya luas dan trayek jalannya banyak turunan dan naikan, kayanya ga cocok untuk orang tua yang sulit jalan jauh.
english_translation: The place is spacious and clean. There are quite a lot of rides and many photo spots. The entrance fee is not too expensive. The area is large and the paths have many ups and downs, so it's probably not suitable for elderly people who have difficulty walking long distances.

text: Gak bersahabat buat yang solo traveller. Masuk harus ada pemandu dengan harga 80.000 utk 2 org pas weekend. Krn saya sendiri. Yah ogah bayar 80 ribu mah. Cus langsung ke curug cimahi yang lebih bersahabat dr segi harga itk solo traveller
english_translation: Unfriendly for solo travelers. Entry requires a guide with a price of 80,000 for 2 people on weekends. Since I was alone, I wasn't willing to pay 80,000. So, I directly went to Curug Cimahi which is more solo-traveler friendly in terms of price.

text: Dari luar kota ngajakin anak2 liburan ke Bandung, dan nyempetin harus ke Floating Market. Worth it 🥰. Ternyata explore nya gak cukup 1 hari buat keliling2. Tambah lagi ke Kota Mini, anak2 excited banget, udah jam 5 sore menolak pulang😂 …
english_translation: Invited the kids for a vacation to Bandung from outside the city, and made sure to visit Floating Market. Worth it 🥰. Turns out exploring it takes more than 1 day to get around. Also went to Kota Mini, the kids were so excited, they refused to go home even at 5 PM 😂 …

text: Pemandangannya sangat luar biasa. Cukup jauh. Dan untuk menuju lokasi air terjun harus berjalan kaki atau naik ojek. Kalau jalan kaki cukup menguras tenaga. Kalau naik ojek cukup menguras adrenalin. Ongkos ojeg 25 - 30 ribu sekali jalan.
english_translation: The view is amazing. Quite far. And to get to the waterfall location, you have to walk or take a motorbike taxi. Walking is quite tiring. Taking a motorbike taxi is quite adrenaline-inducing. The motorbike taxi fare is 25-30 thousand one way.

text:
Tempat wisata kuliner yang penjualnya menjajakan dagangannya di atas perahu kecil.
Menarik, tempatnya bagus, banyak jajanan yang enak, asik buat liburan. Toiletnya juga cukup bersih.
Harga tiket Rp20.000,- bisa ditukarkan dengan minuman.
english_translation:
A culinary tourist spot where vendors sell their wares from small boats.
Interesting, the place is nice, there are many delicious snacks, great for a holiday. The toilets are also quite clean.
The ticket price is Rp20,000, which can be exchanged for a drink.

text: Mantap siihh.... Tempatnya bersih, nyaman, enakeun curug yang kalian ga harus jalan jauh jauh duluu, bisa buat ngecamo juga... sayang akses buat ke curugnya cuma ada tangga kecil banget dan harus bayar lagi... Tapi worth ut banget siihhh
english_translation: Awesome... The place is clean, comfortable, and the waterfall is great as you don't have to walk far. It's also suitable for camping... Unfortunately, the access to the waterfall is only a very small staircase and you have to pay again... But it's totally worth it.

text: Tempatnya luas dan ada wahana baik wahana di air ataupun wahana di darat. Salah satu wahana yang rekomen ada rainbow slide. Harga makanan dan wahana masih cukup terjangkau namun untuk makanan harus pintar memilih agar tidak mengecewakan.
english_translation: The place is spacious and has attractions both in the water and on land. One recommended attraction is the rainbow slide. The prices for food and attractions are still quite affordable, but you have to choose carefully when it comes to food to avoid disappointment.

text: Rekreasi keluarga wajib datang ke tempat ini, tiket saat weekend yang all in 75k/orang dan 60k/orang yang biasa. Ada music live nya juga saat weekend. Kalau kalian mau ke mesir, newyork, roma, itali dalam 1 tempat, sarae hills jawabannya
english_translation: A family recreation must-visit! Tickets on weekends are all-in for 75k/person and the regular is 60k/person. There's also live music on weekends. If you want to go to Egypt, New York, Rome, and Italy all in one place, Sarae Hills is the answer.

text:
Wisata alam. Cocok utk petualangan anak2 dan juga outbond kantor. Suasana yg sejuk bisa merefresh penatnya pekerjaan,
Sudah tersedia tenda-tenda yg di tata rapi dan rumah kayu yg sudah ada air hangatnya.
Tidak nyesel n layak utk di coba.
english_translation:
Nature tourism. Suitable for children's adventures and also for office outbound. The cool atmosphere can refresh the fatigue from work.
Tents are already neatly arranged and wooden houses with hot water are available.
You won't regret it and it's worth trying.

text:
Pokoke mantap bro,,kalo mau masuk lewat batu aki aja ,karna disana pintu masuk resminya,lebih deket lagi tapi agak nanjak dikit
.ni gw ada pin pengelola nya,biar lu biar konfir dulu kalo lo mao ksitu,biar dapet air nya lagi keren d3366a1c
english_translation: Whatever, it's great bro. If you want to enter, just go through Batu Aki, because that's the official entrance. It's closer but a bit uphill. Here, I have the manager's pin, so you can confirm first if you want to go there, so you can get the water again. d3366a1c

text: Tempatnya menarik buat dikunjungi, apalagi bareng pacar sambil menikmari sunrise. Hati-hati terhadap barang karena banyak monyet berkeliaran. Jalan masuk dan tempat parkir perlu dibenahi lagi sehingga jadi tempat wisata yang benar2 layak.
english_translation: The place is interesting to visit, especially with a boyfriend/girlfriend while enjoying the sunrise. Be careful with your belongings as there are many monkeys roaming around. The entrance and parking area need to be improved to make it a truly worthwhile tourist spot.

text:
Taman'y bagus, saran ku kalo kesini jgn pas weekend / tgl merah. Karena utk menikmati taman di sini enak'y agak sepi pengunjung, kalo terlalu rame, sumpek & kurang menikmati utk foto².
Yg jual makanan banyak, sampe bingung mau jajan apa 😅
english_translation:
The park is nice, my suggestion is to not come here on weekends or public holidays. Because it's best to enjoy the park when it's less crowded, if it's too crowded, it's stuffy and less enjoyable for taking photos.
There are many food vendors, so many that you'll be confused about what to buy 😅

text: Kawah Ratu Tangkuban Parahu, tak hanya kaya akan keindahannya tetapi juga kaya akan mitos dan legenda nya. Lebih baik datang pagi hari saat sunrise buat dapat view yang indah, kalau siang hari akan panas sehingga sulit explore semua view.
english_translation: Kawah Ratu Tangkuban Parahu is not only rich in beauty but also in myths and legends. It's better to come in the morning during sunrise for beautiful views, as it gets hot during the day, making it difficult to explore all the sights.

text: amazinggggggg!!!!! sukaaaa banget,,,batu nya eksotis lah,,,secara mereka bukan sembarang batu kan,,,kaya idup aja tuh batu,,,merka batu sejarah yg lamaaaaaa ketimbun  kena hujan panas ,,efek CO2 nya itu yg bikin mreeka gitu,,,aku suka!!!!
english_translation: Amazinggggggg!!!!! I love it sooooo much,,, the stones are exotic,,, since they are not just any stones,,, the stones look alive,,, they are historical stones that have been buried for a looooong time exposed to rain and sun,,, the CO2 effect is what makes them like that,,, I love it!!!!

text:
Harga tiket masuk kalo buat maen doang cuma 7,5K tapi kalo ngecamp 17,5K. Parkirnya agak mahal 10K kalo buat camp. Jalan dari bawah/pos ke puncak atas itu sekitar 15menit.
Kalo udah di atas wagelaseh ada pohon pinus dan tugu atau monumen.
english_translation: The entrance fee for just playing is 7.5K, but for camping it's 17.5K. Parking is a bit expensive at 10K if you're camping. The walk from the bottom/post to the top peak takes about 15 minutes. Once you're at the top, wow, there are pine trees and a monument.

text: Ini adalah tempat yang indah untuk menghabiskan waktu dan menikmati alam. Kamu dapat mencapai tempat ini menggunakan mobil langsung kesana atau via THR Juanda dimana kamu harus berjalan kaki terlebih dahulu dan menikmati lebih banyak spot
english_translation: This is a beautiful place to spend time and enjoy nature. You can reach this place by car directly, or via THR Juanda where you have to walk first and enjoy more spots.

text:
Tempatnya oke,
Tiket hanya 10K untuk hiking,20k untuk camping
Curugnya sendiri dr pintu masuk 15menit,
Area campingnya ada bbrpa lokasi.
Sayangnya aksesnya ke lokasi (dari dsn bambu ) sangat kurang bersahabat jalannya (rusaaaaak paraaaah)
english_translation:
The place is okay.
Tickets are only 10K for hiking, 20K for camping.
The waterfall itself is 15 minutes from the entrance.
There are several locations for the camping area.
Unfortunately, the access to the location (from Dusun Bambu) is very unfriendly, the road is (terribly broken).

text: Tempatnya luas, keren, parkiran luas. Tapi sayang, Musholanya kecil dan kenapa Mushola menghadap toilet? Jadi kesannya kayak Musholanya di toilet. Semoga lekas diperbaiki, dan jika Mushola sudah diperbaiki, saya perbaiki pula rating saya.
english_translation: The place is spacious, cool, and has ample parking. But unfortunately, the prayer room is small, and why does the prayer room face the toilet? So it gives the impression that the prayer room is in the toilet. Hopefully, it will be fixed soon, and once the prayer room is fixed, I will improve my rating.

text: Untuk restoran standard service makan, rasanya hampir mirip dengan restoran transit atau resto tempat bus melakukan service makan. Untuk kamar mandi kurang banyak sehingga banyak antrian apabila ada banyak bus yang datang secara bersamaan
english_translation: For a standard service restaurant, the taste is almost similar to a transit restaurant or a restaurant where buses stop for meals. For the restrooms, there aren't enough, leading to long queues when many buses arrive simultaneously.

text: Dr parkiran ke atas harus naik kemdaraan seperti elf tp terbuka, stlh itu baru sampai kawasan kawah Ratu. Udara di sana lumayan dingin. Panas pas terik. Dateng pas hari libur kemaren jadi rame banget. Toilet dan jajanan jg banyak di sini.
english_translation: The parking lot upstairs requires riding an open-air vehicle like an elf, after which you will reach the Ratu Crater area. The air there is quite cold. Hot when it's sunny. It was very crowded because we came on a holiday. There are also many toilets and snacks here.

text: Tempatnya tidak terlalu luas, cocok buat temen-temen yang suka selfie dan swafoto. Jual bibit tanaman juga, tapi kalau mau yang murah di pinggirnya ada yang jualan bunga. Harga tiket 10k aja per orang. Kalau bawa kamera, harus bayar lagi.
english_translation: The place isn't too spacious, perfect for friends who like to take selfies and group photos. They also sell plant seedlings, but if you want something cheap, there are flower sellers on the outskirts. The ticket price is only 10k per person. If you bring a camera, you have to pay extra.

text: Harganya terlalu mahal sedangkan wahana nya bayar semua dan mahal, dan kulinernya TDK lengkap, cuma ayam Krispy +nasi+teh tawar seharga 28 ribu, sedang kan biaya masuk 20k per orang , parkir motor 5k, pantesan sepi .TDK sesuai expektasi..
english_translation: The price is too expensive, while all the rides are paid and expensive, and the culinary options are not complete, just crispy chicken + rice + plain tea for 28 thousand, while the entrance fee is 20k per person, motorcycle parking is 5k, no wonder it's empty. It did not meet expectations.

text: Tempatnya amazing banget..masyaalloh segala puji bagi Alloh..maha pencipta keindahan yg sempurna..tiket masuk dan parkir terjangkau.senang main air tapi banyak binatang kecil ky lintah nempel2 di kaki dan tangan.bagus buat foto2 aja ya...
english_translation: The place is amazing... all praise be to Allah... the perfect creator of beauty... entrance ticket and parking are affordable. It's fun to play in the water, but there are many small creatures like leeches sticking to your legs and hands. It's good for taking pictures.

text: Akses jalan ke sana aman buat kendaraan biasa. Parkirnya luas banget. Trekkingnya seru, variatif, ada batuan serta pepohonan. Banyak yang jualan makanan. Seru bisa renang dan terjun dari batuan, dari yang pendek sampai yang tinggi banget.
english_translation: The road access there is safe for regular vehicles. The parking is very spacious. The trekking is exciting and varied, with rocks and trees. Lots of food vendors. It's fun to swim and jump from the rocks, from short ones to very high ones.

text: Tempatnya bagus , asri karena banyak pohon di sini. Petugas ramah. Tempat parkir banyak sampah berserakan. Tapi di dalamnya bersih. Saya mencoba flying fox dan suka sekali. Tidak terlalu tinggi. Aman Alhamdulillah 😁. Ingin ke sana lagi. …
english_translation: The place is nice, green with many trees here. The staff are friendly. The parking lot has a lot of scattered trash. But inside it's clean. I tried the flying fox and loved it. Not too high. Safe, thank God 😁. Want to go there again. …

text:
Bagus sekali untuk berakhir pekan disini, tempat nyaman, sangat mudah untuk solat disini karena mushola dan kamar mandinya sangat bersih.

Kita tidak boleh membawa stroller masuk kedalam karena hampir lebih dari 50% jalanannya bertangga..
english_translation:
Excellent for a weekend getaway, a comfortable place, very easy to pray here because the prayer room and bathrooms are very clean.

We are not allowed to bring strollers inside because more than 50% of the pathways are stairs.

text: Ini adalah tempat yang sangat bagus untuk aktivitas luar ruangan seperti hiking. Tapi saya tidak merekomendasikan jika Anda ingin berkemah untuk malam di gunung ini karena toilet sangat jauh dari lokasi perkemahan dan tidak cukup bersih.
english_translation: This is a great place for outdoor activities like hiking. But I don't recommend it if you want to camp overnight on this mountain because the toilets are very far from the campsite and not clean enough.

text: Pemandangannya sangant bagus meski perjuangan untuk sampai ke tempat sangat berat karena akses jalan setapak dan naik turun tapi setelah sampai lokasi terbayar sudah rasa lelah dengan air yg sangan segar dan ada wangi kayu cendananya.....
english_translation: The view is very beautiful even though the journey to get there was very tough due to the trail access and the ups and downs, but once you reach the location, the fatigue is paid off with the very fresh water and the scent of sandalwood.

text: Sebuah situ iconik di bandung barat, sampai dibuatkan sebuah lagu yg sangat terkenal. Lokasinya strategis dipinggir jalan utama bandung jakarta. Hanya saja promosi wisata dan event yg kurang jd blm menjadi tempat destinasi wisata populer.
english_translation: An iconic place in West Bandung, so famous it even has a song made about it. The location is strategic, on the side of the main Bandung-Jakarta road. It's just that tourism promotion and events are lacking, so it hasn't become a popular tourist destination.

text: Di Maribaya ada beberapa lokasi menarik yang dapat Anda kunjungi, salah satunya Air Terjun Maribaya. Air terjun ini adalah air terjun yang masih sangat alami dengan latar pepohonan yang akan membuat Anda merasa tenang bila berada di sini.
english_translation: In Maribaya, there are several interesting places you can visit, one of which is Maribaya Waterfall. This waterfall is still very natural with a backdrop of trees that will make you feel calm when you are here.

text:
Sangat indah meskipun airnya keruh karena sedang musim hujan
Walaupun dengan perjuangan yang luar biasa, tapi hilang lelah begitu sampai lokasi
Cuma karena efek pandemi, jadi saung2 pada rusak, akses kurang terawat
Ayoo bangkit lagiii @KBB
english_translation:
Very beautiful even though the water is murky because it's the rainy season
Despite the extraordinary struggle, the fatigue disappeared upon arriving at the location
It's just because of the pandemic's effect, so the huts are all damaged and the access is poorly maintained
Let's rise again @KBB

text: Tempat wisata yg baik. Sejuk dan bersih. Sangat terlihat terawat. Tersedia banyak toilet dan di sediakan mobil untuk antar ke tempat parkir. Karna jalur wisata hanya satu arah. Tempat² foto begitu banyak. Dan tersedia untuk area anak-anak.
english_translation: A good tourist spot. Cool and clean. Very well maintained. Plenty of toilets available, and a car is provided to take you to the parking lot. Because the tourist route is one-way. Many photo spots. And there's an area for children.

text: Tiket masuk 30k, dari Lembang dapat naik angkot yang berwarna kuning. Jika ke Tangkuban Parahu dapat disempatkan untuk mengunjungi pusat informasi untuk mengetahui sejarah Gunung Tangkuban Parahu. Jangan lupa mengenakan jaket karena dingin
english_translation: Admission is 30k, you can take a yellow angkot from Lembang. If you're going to Tangkuban Perahu, make time to visit the information center to learn about the history of Mount Tangkuban Perahu. Don't forget to wear a jacket because it's cold.

text:
Tetap menakjubkan dan indah seperti yg saya ingat.... hanya saja sangat di sayangkan pengunjung kurang mengerti untuk menjaga lingkungan dengan tidak membuang sampah sembarangan
Berikut saya sertakan foto² keindahan gunung tangkuban perahu
english_translation:
Still amazing and beautiful as I remember it.... it's just a shame that visitors don't understand how to take care of the environment by not littering.
Here I include photos of the beauty of Tangkuban Perahu mountain.

text: Wisata murah meriah didaerah Padalarang Bandung. Cuma ada baiknya kalian kesini pas hari cerah soalnya akses jalannya masih tanah. Kalo habis hujan rawan untuk pengendara terutama roda dua... Buat yg mau prawed rekomend banget seriusan 😂 …
english_translation: Affordable and cheerful tourism in the Padalarang area of Bandung. It's just that it's better to come here on a sunny day because the road access is still unpaved. If it has rained, it's risky for riders, especially two-wheeled vehicles... For those who want pre-wedding photos, highly recommended, seriously 😂 …

text:
Sudah lebih bagus lagi, wisata alam yg menyejukkan mata. HTM di hari sabtu 30k per orang, parkir mobil 35k + 5k.
Bisa menikmati pemandangan dari berbagai sisi. Di gerbang masuk ada pemeriksaan suhu dan kartu vaksin. Tetap perhatikan prokes
english_translation:
It's even better now, a refreshing natural attraction. Entrance fee on Saturdays is 30k per person, car parking is 35k + 5k.
You can enjoy the scenery from various angles. At the entrance, there's a temperature and vaccination card check. Please continue to observe health protocols.

text: Untuk tempat lumayan nyaman buat camping. Namun saran kepada pengelola fasilitas seperti Toilet/MCK agar ditambah lagi. Karena pengunjung banyak banget. Toilet hanya beberapa saja. Alhasil ngantri berjam². Semoga kedepannya lebih baik lagi
english_translation: For a place, it's quite comfortable for camping. However, a suggestion to the facility managers like the Toilets/Restrooms is to add more. Because there are so many visitors. There are only a few toilets. As a result, people queue for hours. Hopefully, it will be better in the future.

text: Saat ini dibuka kembali, krna lagi covid dibrikan perhatian khusus bagi para pengunjung ,bnyk tempat untuk cuci tangan pemeriksaan suhu serta dapat free masker . Untuk tempatnya sangat luas dan bersih, fasilitas dan sport ftonya sngt bagus
english_translation: It is now reopened, and due to COVID, special attention is given to visitors. There are many places to wash hands, temperature checks, and free masks are provided. The place is very spacious and clean, with excellent facilities and photo spots.

text:
Tempat nya sangat indah & luas sehingga hampir di setiap area, dapat dijadikan spot photo yang cantik.
Semoga kesan alami nya dapat dijaga oleh pengelola tanpa menambah hiasan hiasan atau mainan anak anak berwarna warni dangdut nan norak!!
english_translation:
The place is very beautiful & spacious, so almost every area can be a beautiful photo spot.
Hopefully the natural impression can be maintained by the management without adding gaudy, colorful decorations or children's toys.

text:
Sanghyang Kenit, tempat wisata Alan asri nan sejuk yg wajib sahabat pelesir kunjungi. Merupakan salah satu destinasi wisata yang berada di daerah Bandung barat.

Simak ulasan lengkapnya di wisatapelesir.com

"Sahabat Wisata & Pelesir Anda"
english_translation:
Sanghyang Kenit, a beautiful and cool natural tourist spot that is a must-visit for friends traveling. It is one of the tourist destinations located in the West Bandung region.

Read the full review at wisatapelesir.com

"Your Travel & Tour Companion"

text: Indah sekali, sejuk...bnyk tmpt spot poto, ada Prosotan Rainbow, prosotan bwt anakw jg ada, yg bikin hati deg2 an, klo blh saran tlg dong d sediakan semacam pengangkut org scra otomatis gtu jd pas naik k ats k wahana Rainbow gk ngos2 an gtu
english_translation: So beautiful, cool... lots of photo spots, there's a Rainbow Slide, a slide for children too, which makes the heart beat faster. If I may suggest, please provide some kind of automatic transporter so that when going up to the Rainbow attraction, you don't get out of breath.

text: Tempat wisata yang dapat menguras keringat. Cocok bagi yang senang berolahraga jalan kaki, bersepeda, berkuda dan mendayung perahu sembari menikmati pemandangan alam yang indah. Tersedia mushola, toilet, kantin, dan lapang parkir yang luas.
english_translation: A tourist spot that will make you sweat. Suitable for those who enjoy walking, cycling, horse riding, and rowing a boat while enjoying beautiful natural scenery. A prayer room, restrooms, a canteen, and a spacious parking lot are available.

text: bagus sebenernya bunga2nya cuman terlalu banyak aksen kayak patung2, trus burung kertas yang di gantung gantung gitu membuat ke estetikan bunganya jadi hilang. Lebih ke kayak taman anak anak sih menurutku. Kalo buat wisata anak anak okelah.
english_translation: Actually, the flowers are nice, but there are too many accents like statues, and the paper birds hanging around make the aesthetics of the flowers disappear. I think it's more like a children's garden. If it's for children's tourism, it's okay.

text: Tempat wisata atau lebih tepat nya tempat jajan yang unik di Lembang, Karena semua pedagangnya berada di atas Perahu. Ada wahana sepeda air Dan perahu juga. Spot foto nya banyak, bisa sewa kostum ala Korea Dan jepang juga, pokoknya mantap..
english_translation: A tourist spot, or more precisely a food spot, that's unique in Lembang. Because all the vendors are on boats. There are also paddle boat and boat rides. There are many photo spots, and you can rent Korean and Japanese-style costumes too, it's just great.

text: Tampatnya enak untuk menghilangkan penat, suasana sejuk dan banyak area bermain buat anak-anak cocok, ada adventure, mini golf, kelinci, flaying fox dan saat mau naik ke tempat parkir sudah ada angkutan yang siap membawa kita kembali gratis
english_translation: The place is nice for relieving fatigue, cool atmosphere and many playgrounds for children are suitable, there is adventure, mini golf, rabbits, flying fox and when going up to the parking lot there is already transportation ready to take us back for free.

text:
Hiking ringan yang bagus
Agak kotor karena banyak pengunjung tidak begitu peduli dengan lingkungan
Yang lebih buruk, banyak trek dalam kondisi buruk seperti menggunakan motor cross
Jejak sebenarnya bisa pergi ke tangkuban prahu ceater juga
english_translation:
Good light hike
A bit dirty due to many visitors not caring much about the environment
Worse, many trails are in bad condition, like being used by dirt bikes
The actual trail can also go to Tangkuban Prahu center

text: Tempat wisata lokal,,yg belum terlalu banyak di kunjungi,,akses ke lokasi agak lumayan menguras tenaga,cocok yg senang treking,disarankan tidak mengunjungi di musim penghujan,,ada beberapa warung yg berjualan sepanjang jalan menuju lokasi..
english_translation: Local tourist spot, not yet too crowded, the access to the location is quite tiring, suitable for those who enjoy trekking, it is advised not to visit during the rainy season, there are several stalls selling along the road leading to the location.

text: Masih banyak yg belum jadi situs²nya. Tp lebih bermasalah sama sistem penukaran voucher tiketnya untuk free drink, air minumnya ga bisa milih dan lsg dikasih pas di awal gate masuk padahal di dalam nya banyak tempat buat nukarin vouchernya.
