english_translation: Still many sites are not ready. But more problematic is the ticket voucher exchange system for free drinks, you can't choose the drinking water and it's given directly at the entrance gate even though there are many places inside to exchange the vouchers.

text: Salahsatu Destinasi tempat wisata keluarga yang paling saya favoritkan di jawa barat, tapi jangan lupa untuk selalu memakai masker penutup hidung agar tidak terjadi hal hal yang tidak di ingin kan / mengurangin dampak dari asap bau belerang.
english_translation: One of my favorite family tourist destinations in West Java, but don't forget to always wear a nose mask to prevent unwanted incidents / reduce the impact of sulfurous odors.

text: Tempat nya indah, nyaman,sejuk dan sangat bgs dan recommend banget buat wisata klg atau pun buat acr apapun.ada beberapa permainan buat game dan ada edukasi satwa nya jg.bagi yg mau camping pun tersedia di sn ...seru dan pasti menyenangkan 👍
english_translation: The place is beautiful, comfortable, cool, and very good, highly recommended for family tours or any events. There are several games available and also animal education. For those who want to camp, it is also available there... fun and definitely enjoyable 👍

text: Perjalanan Naik Turun, terbayarkan semua, saat sampai di Puncak TWA Tangkuban Perahu, Kawah Ratu. Maa syaa ALLAH Tabarakallah. Destinasi Wisata Lokal, yang harus terus dan terus dimajukan, dengan cara, datangi dan rawat bersama. Terimakasih.
english_translation: The up and down journey was all worth it when we reached the peak of TWA Tangkuban Perahu, Kawah Ratu. Masha'Allah Tabarakallah. A local tourist destination that must be continuously promoted by visiting and caring for it together. Thank you.

text: Untuk jalan2 bersama keluarga cocok banget karna dari wahana, kuliner, dan kegiatan cocok untuk segala usia. Tempat duduknya juga banyak jadi bisa lesehan duduk2 untuk makan dan istirahat sejenak. Makanan yang dijual juga cukup ramah kantong
english_translation: Perfect for a family outing, as the rides, culinary options, and activities are suitable for all ages. There are also plenty of seats, so you can relax on the floor or sit to eat and rest for a while. The food sold is also quite affordable.

text:
Pilihan tepat untuk acara gathering kantor atau hanya sekadar mengajak keluarga

Wahana favorit masih dipegang flying fox

Jika Anda ingin berhemat, sebaiknya membawa makanan dan minuman sendiri karena harga tempat makan disini relatif mahal
english_translation:
The right choice for a company gathering or just for a family outing

The favorite attraction is still the flying fox

If you want to save money, it's best to bring your own food and drinks as the food prices here are relatively expensive

text: Fasilitas di bawah ada penyewaan hammock, beli kayu bakar, warung, parkir, wc, mushola. Fasilitas di atas gunung ada wc dan sudah banyak dataran untuk dibangun tenda. Tempatnya ramai, apalagi liburan. Pemandangan terbaiknya di waktu sunrise.
english_translation: The facilities below include hammock rentals, firewood purchases, a shop, parking, restrooms, and a prayer room. The facilities on the mountain include restrooms and many flat areas for setting up tents. The place is crowded, especially during holidays. The best view is at sunrise.

text: Rekomendasi untuk liburan keluarga, harga masuk hanya 30k dan dapet free coffe, dan rekomendasi untuk yang doyan makan tempat ini Rekomendasi untuk wisata kuliner nya, unik nya sistem pembayaran pakai duit bambu, sebuah daya tarik tersendiri
english_translation: Recommendations for a family vacation, entrance fee is only 30k and you get a free coffee. And a recommendation for those who love to eat, this place is a recommendation for culinary tourism. Uniquely, the payment system uses bamboo money, which is an attraction in itself.

text: Harga masuk 25rb perorang, parkirr motor 2rb. Lalau bawa kamera lain selain hp seperti nya harga tiket berbeda. Udara sejuk cocok untuk photo2. Kamar mandi bersih. Hanya kurang luas sedikit. Bunga segar dan bersih dr sampah. Ada musola juga.
english_translation: Admission fee is 25,000 IDR per person, motorcycle parking is 2,000 IDR. If you bring a camera other than a phone, the ticket price might be different. The air is cool, suitable for taking photos. The bathroom is clean. It's just a bit small. Fresh flowers and clean of trash. There is also a prayer room.

text:
Curug Malela terkenal karena menjadi salah satu air terjun terbesar di Jawa Barat.

Air terjun ini bentuknya lebar mirip dengan Air Terjun Niagara di perbatasan Amerika-Kanada, bahkan air terjun ini populer dengan sebutan The Little Niagara.
english_translation:
Curug Malela is famous for being one of the largest waterfalls in West Java.

This waterfall is wide in shape, similar to Niagara Falls on the American-Canadian border, and is even popularly known as The Little Niagara.

text:
Letaknya di kawasan konservasi perhutani, mudah diakses karena berada di pinggir jalan raya. Tapi utk ke curugnya kita perlu tracking ke bawah dari loket masuk. Curugnya lumayan tinggi, suasana nya rimbun dan asri.
Harga tiket 20K per orang.
english_translation:
It is located in a forestry conservation area, easily accessible because it is on the side of the highway. But to get to the waterfall, we need to track down from the entrance gate. The waterfall is quite high, the atmosphere is lush and beautiful.
Ticket price is 20K per person.

text: Curugnya bagus. Tapi lebih cocok untuk jelajah alam, kawasan wisatanya luas, berdampingan dengam Ciwangun Indah Camp. Bisa untuk beragam aktivitas seperti camping. Ada fasilitas bermain anak, outbond (tambah biaya), kantin, toilet, musholla.
english_translation: The waterfall is beautiful. But it's more suitable for nature exploration, the tourist area is spacious, adjacent to Ciwangun Indah Camp. It can be used for various activities like camping. There are facilities for children's play, outbound (additional cost), a canteen, toilets, and a prayer room.

text: Ya baru kali ini naik gunung sampai puncak liat kawah bisa naik motor, mantap, mungkin untuk tarifnya khususnya tarif kendaraan dihilangkan saja soalnya kendaraan juga cuma parkir bukan piknik wkw, cukup htm/orang sama parkir saja lebih baik
english_translation: "It's the first time I've climbed a mountain to the summit and seen a crater that I could reach by motorcycle, amazing. Maybe for the tariff, specifically the vehicle tariff, it could just be removed since the vehicle is just parked, not for a picnic, lol. It would be better to just charge the entrance fee per person and parking."

text: Uji nyali dengan melewati jembatan gantung merah dengan protokol keselamatan yang safe 👍 dan spot foto yang menarik dari ikonik banyak negara , ada menara Eiffel, Liberty, dan banyak lagi ... Di dukung udara yang sejuk dan fresh ... Seru 😀 …
english_translation: Test your courage by crossing the red suspension bridge with safe safety protocols 👍 and attractive photo spots from iconic many countries, there's the Eiffel Tower, Liberty, and many more... Supported by cool and fresh air... Exciting 😀 …

text: Jika ingin menikmati udara sejuk mengarah ke dingin, tempat ini adalah salat satunya. Banyak kegiatan yang dapat dilakukan di sini mulai dari hanya buang waktu sampai kepada outdoor activities seperti memanah, tracking, paint ball dan lain2.
english_translation: If you want to enjoy cool to cold air, this place is one of them. Many activities can be done here, from just passing time to outdoor activities like archery, trekking, paintball, and others.

text:
Fantastis..... bepergian ke banyak tempat terkenal di dunia... jembatan golden gate, colloseum, eifel, santorini.... Petualangan hebat melintasi jembatan gantung.... menantang
Mereka menyajikan makanan dan minuman yang enak dan berkualitas?
english_translation:
Fantastic..... traveling to many famous places in the world... Golden Gate Bridge, Colosseum, Eiffel Tower, Santorini.... Great adventure crossing suspension bridges.... challenging
Do they serve delicious and quality food and drinks?

text: Temoatnya bagus, view nya menarik, dikasih free minum, dan bisa naik sepedah disana, spot foto yang menarik, hanya saja tempat belum tertata rapih sepenuhnya tetapi overall great place disana.. Recomended buat tempat bermain bersama keluarga
english_translation: The atmosphere is good, the view is attractive, they give free drinks, and you can ride a bicycle there. It's an interesting photo spot. It's just that the place isn't fully organized yet, but overall it's a great place to be. Recommended for a place to play with family.

text:
Tempatnya enak nyaman, kemaren dapat villa yg tipe pinus krn ternyata hanya tersisa itu doank
Padahal hari biasa tp kamar full booked. Malam ramai banyak krn yg menginap dpt api unggun tiap villa. Free breakfeast.
Mantul pokoknya. Recomended.
english_translation:
The place is nice and comfortable, yesterday I got the Pine type villa because it was the only one left.
Even though it was a weekday, the rooms were fully booked. It was crowded at night because each villa got a bonfire. Free breakfast.
Awesome, absolutely. Recommended.

text: Tempatnya bagus, sudah banyak berubah (tempat baru). Kesini gampang sekali, tempat parkir banyak. Namun, biaya yg dikeluarkan cukup besar dari tiket masuk Rp 30.000. Makanan berkisar Rp 20.000-Rp40.000, banyak pilihan makanan yang bervariasi.
english_translation: The place is nice, it has changed a lot (new location). It's very easy to get here, with plenty of parking. However, the cost is quite high with an entrance ticket of Rp 30,000. Food ranges from Rp 20,000-Rp 40,000, with many varied food options.

text: Walu sudah beberapa kali kesini tapi tempatnya selalu Bikin Mao kesini lagih...dan sekarang Ajak Si cantik Mengenal Asal usul "Gunung Tqngkuban Prahu" hiar cuman gg liat di YT biar liat langsung dan Si cantik Pun terpukau sama keindaHannya...
english_translation: Walu has been here several times, but the place always makes me want to come back... and now I'm bringing the beautiful one to learn about the origin of "Mount Tangkuban Prahu". Even though we only saw it on YouTube, seeing it in person made the beautiful one mesmerized by its beauty...

text: Harga tiket masuk masih 20rb. Ada rumah kopi luwak juga disini & bisa nanya2 seluk beluk kopi luwak (pas banget lg bawa rombongan anak2 remaja).Akhirnya tertarik beli kopi bubuk & lsg nyeduh kopi tubruk di tempat. Sayang banget lg ga bawa v60
english_translation: The entrance fee is still 20k. There's also a luwak coffee house here & you can ask about the ins and outs of luwak coffee (perfect for bringing a group of teenagers). Finally, I was tempted to buy coffee powder & immediately brewed tubruk coffee on the spot. Too bad I didn't bring my V60.

text: Bagus bgt air terjunnya, tapi kotooor banyak sampah dan berbusa kayanya sdh tercemar syg sekali. Mari jaga lingkungan alam gais... Kalau jalan kaki cape bgt, dari pos Dago kurleb 5km, kalau mau langsung bisa ke arah Lembang cuma 1 km jalannya
english_translation: The waterfall is very beautiful, but it's dirty with lots of trash and foamy, it seems like it's already polluted, what a shame. Let's protect our natural environment, guys... Walking is very tiring, it's about 5km from Dago post, if you want to go directly, it's only 1km towards Lembang.

text:
Tempat bagus banget, tapi diluar tiket masuk ada biaya lagi. Terus parkir motor jauh banget, mau ikut parkir di dekat tangga malah dimarahin petugas parkirnya.

Udah parkir motornya jauh, masih harus naik/turun tangga yg lumayan tinggi lagi 🥲
english_translation:
The place is really nice, but besides the entrance ticket, there are additional fees. Then parking for motorcycles is very far away. We wanted to park near the stairs but were scolded by the parking attendant.

Not only is the motorcycle parking far, but we also have to go up/down quite a lot of stairs 🥲

text: Tempat nya asri, cafe ditengah hutan konsep yang bagus.. makanannya lumayan enak2 juga, harga sesuai kok.. ngopi disini juga lumayan enak, mungkin suasananya juga enak yaa... bayar tiket 20k, bisa dituker sama makanan hewan yg ada disana.. 😁😁
english_translation: The place is lush, a cafe in the middle of the forest, a good concept. The food is also quite delicious, and the prices are reasonable. Having coffee here is also quite nice, perhaps the atmosphere is also pleasant. Pay a 20k ticket, which can be exchanged for animal food that's available there. 😁😁

text: Tempatnya sejuk. Bisa foto-foto sepuasnya disini. Bisa petik sayur sendiri, kalau mau dibawa pulang tinggal ditimbang hasil kita petik lalu bayar. Pelayanan ramah. Kamera hp boleh masuk, tp untuk kamera DSLR ada biaya tambahan sebesar 50ribu.
english_translation: The place is cool. You can take as many photos as you want here. You can pick your own vegetables, and if you want to take them home, you just weigh your harvest and pay. The service is friendly. Phone cameras are allowed, but there's an additional charge of fifty thousand for DSLR cameras.

text: Jalannya kalo dari kota cimahi cukup jauh, askes menuju lokasi dari jalan utama cukup jelek, bebatuan. Namun saat tiba di lokasi, pemandangan yg menakjubkan menyambut. Banyak susunan bebatuan yg sangat keren untuk dijadikan tempat berfoto ria
english_translation: The road is quite far from Cimahi city, access to the location from the main road is quite bad, rocky. However, upon arriving at the location, an amazing view welcomes you. There are many really cool rock formations that are perfect for taking photos.

text: Suana baru nih,buat nyantai rehat sejenak,dari lelahnya bekernya rifres dl guy, menikmati udara yg sejuk spot"yg keren ..mantep banget nyaman ,bagus banget tempatnya rekomendasi bannget deh nih ada Terminal wisata Grafika Cikole. Yu mampir yu
english_translation: New place here, for relaxing and taking a short break from the tiring work. Refresh yourself, guy, enjoy the cool air, cool spots... really great, comfortable, the place is really good, highly recommended. There's Terminal Wisata Grafika Cikole. Come visit!

text:
Jalan dari arah Jakarta/Subang sampai gerbang ada penyekatan Ganjil Genap PPKM, tp kalo mo ke sini aja diperbolehkan, kecuali yg ke arah Bandung
Lama gak ke sini, prasarana sudah banyak perbaikan, lebih bagus. Tukang foto, souvenir jg ramah2.
english_translation:
From Jakarta/Subang, there is a Odd-Even PPKM (public activity restriction) checkpoint until the gate, but if you only want to come here, you are allowed, except for those going to Bandung.
Haven't been here in a long time, the facilities have been greatly improved, it's better. The photographers and souvenir sellers are also very friendly.

text: Tempatnya tidak terlalu besar, unik dan yang terbaik adalah karyawan di sana, ramah2 dan tidak segan membantu pengunjung untuk mengambil foto dengan hp kita bahkan sampai belum kita minta, mereka langsung menyodorkan diri untuk membantu. Best
english_translation: The place isn't too big, it's unique, and the best part is the employees there, they are very friendly and readily help visitors take photos with our phones, even before we ask, they immediately offer to help. Best.

text: Stone Garden Citatah adalah situs karst yang menjadi destinasi wisata dan dikelola oleh pokdarwis (masyarakat lokal). Amenities cukup lengkap akan tetapi toilet kurang terawat dengan baik. Banyak warung tersedia dengan harga yang cukup murah.
english_translation: Stone Garden Citatah is a karst site that is a tourist destination and managed by the Pokdarwis (local community). The amenities are quite complete, however, the toilets are not well-maintained. Many stalls are available with reasonably low prices.

text: Tempat bagus untuk pmandangan di atas gunung tiket murah. ada saung saungan juga di sini. tp sayang nya dari atas sini juga bisa liat tempat penambangan batu kapur yang ga terlalu jauh dari tmpat ini dan ngeluarin polusi udara yang lumayan...
english_translation: A good place for mountain views with cheap tickets. There are also huts here. But unfortunately, from up here, you can also see the limestone mining site not too far from this place, which emits quite a bit of air pollution...

text: wisata batugamping kekinian tempat spot foto yang bagus,rekomended untuk wisata keluarga dan rombongan,fasilitas tempat parkir luas,warung kopi,toilet,tiket terjangkau,tapi jalan menuju ke lokasi cukup berbatu namun cukup lebar untuk 2 mobil.
english_translation: Modern limestone tour, a great photo spot, recommended for family and group tours, ample parking, coffee shop, restrooms, affordable tickets, but the road to the location is quite rocky but wide enough for 2 cars.

text: Tempatnya sangat cocok untuk liburan bersama keluarga atau rombongan dilain sisi tempatnya yang sangat luas dan banyak tempat wisatanya ada danaunya dan bisa naik perahu disana,  kemudian taman bunga yang luas,  dan kota mini,  dan yang tak …
english_translation: The place is very suitable for a vacation with family or a group. On the other hand, it is very spacious and has many tourist attractions, including a lake where you can go boating. Then there is a large flower garden, and a miniature city, and what's more...

text: Pemandangan disini bagus. Ada banyak jajanan disini. Lalu ada permainan seperti flying fox, naik kereta perahu,perahu dayung,perahu gowes,dll. Untuk harga makanan tergantung dengan siapa orangnya :) . Cuma Jalan untuk masuk kesana agak sempit
english_translation: The view here is good. There are many snacks here. Then there are games like flying fox, boat rides, paddle boats, pedal boats, etc. The price of food depends on who the person is :). It's just that the road to get there is a bit narrow.

text: Tiket masuk murah bgt. Cuman untuk masuk ke beberapa wahananya harus bayar lagi (wajarlah ya 🤭) Tempat ini cukup luas, kalian bisa nyewa sepeda kalau mau menjelajah semua tempatnya 😁 cocok untuk family gathering atau buat foto prewedding 👌🏻 …
english_translation: The entrance ticket is very cheap. However, you have to pay again to enter some of the rides (which is understandable 🤭). This place is quite spacious, you can rent a bicycle if you want to explore all the spots 😁 suitable for family gatherings or pre-wedding photos 👌🏻 ...

text: Banyak spot foto yg bagus banget dan cocok untuk ajak keluarga menikmati suasana dan berbagai macam wisata didalamnya . Dan arena baru rainbow cukup menarik untuk dicoba . Yukk ajak keluarga untuk dteng kesini. . recommended banget buat anak2
english_translation: There are many very good photo spots that are suitable for bringing the family to enjoy the atmosphere and the various attractions within. And the new rainbow arena is quite interesting to try. Let's bring the family to come here. Highly recommended for kids.

text: Subhanallah... Pemandangan nya amazing banget, hanya Allah yang mampu menjadikan keindahan ini.. Kuyy... Dateng ya ke sini ga bakal nyesel, bawa makanan yang banyak, powerbank juga biar bisa foto foto terus, jangan lupa jaga kebersihan nya!!!
english_translation: Subhanallah... The scenery is truly amazing, only God could create this beauty.. Come on... Come here, you won't regret it, bring lots of food, a power bank too so you can keep taking photos, and don't forget to keep it clean!!!

text: Tempat suci yang indah bagi pecinta fotografi di Limbang, tetapi sejauh ini belum selesai, mengumpulkan model-model paling penting dari landmark dunia, dan ada danau dan jembatan masuk 50 ribu rupee yang berdekatan dengan kafe-kafe Limbang
english_translation: A beautiful sacred place for photography lovers in Limbang, but not yet finished, collecting the most important models of world landmarks, and there is a lake and an entrance bridge for 50 thousand rupees adjacent to Limbang cafes.

text:
Salah satu tempat camp & hiking yang bagus.

Tiketnya ga terlalu mahal, bisa camping, parkir tersedia.

Track nya 1/2 paving, 1/2 tanah.
Toilet bersih (yang atas)
Ramai juga.

View nya bagus, City Light Bandung kalo malam & Sunrise kalo pagi.
english_translation:
A great camping & hiking spot.

The ticket isn't too expensive, you can camp, parking is available.

The track is half paved, half dirt.
Clean toilets (the upper ones)
Quite crowded.

The view is good, Bandung City Lights at night & Sunrise in the morning.

text: Tempat wisata dan juga tempat menginap yang bagus, fasilitas menginap dibagi beberapa bagian dan tersusun rapih, disini terdapat fasilitas outbound. Ada acara api unggun juga setiap malam. Cocok sekali untuk keluarga dan acara gathering kantor
english_translation: A great tourist destination and place to stay, the lodging facilities are divided into several neat sections. There are outbound facilities here. There is also a campfire event every night. It is very suitable for families and office gatherings.

text: Udara sejuk. Ada alfamart. Rumah makan yang banyak fentilasinya, bahkan disuguhkan pemandangan hutan pinus langsung, walaupun masih terlihat baru karena hanya semenan saja, tapi bagus. Mushola luas kira-kira 5x4 meter. Kamar kecil yang banyak.
english_translation: Cool air. There's an Alfamart. A restaurant with lots of ventilation, even offering a direct view of a pine forest. Although it still looks new, only recently built, it's nice. A spacious prayer room, approximately 5x4 meters. Many small rooms.

text:
Pengalaman liburan tahun baru lalu menjadi hal yang sangat luar biasa
Selain tempatnya yang nyaman, sejuk serta banyak kuliner yang pas dilidah
Floating market ini harus dijadikan destinasi wisata wajib dibandung
Semoga menjadi lebih baik lagi
english_translation:
Last year's New Year's holiday experience was truly amazing.
Besides the comfortable and cool place, there were also many culinary options that suited our taste.
This floating market should be a must-visit tourist destination in Bandung.
Hopefully, it will become even better.

text: Pengalaman bagi yang akan berkunjung agar berhati hati nanti ada pemaksaan parkir mobil tdk resmi oleh masyarakat dengan alasan parkir penuh padahal tempat parkir lokasi masih luas,  jadi mohon pengelola agar diperhatikan spy pengunjung nyaman
english_translation: An experience for those who will visit, be careful, there will be unofficial forced car parking by the community under the pretext of full parking, even though the parking lot is still spacious. Therefore, the management is requested to pay attention so that visitors are comfortable.

text:
Bagus... treknya ga auzubillah..lewat hutan pinus byk hamox disewakan..murah meriah
Cm byr 10 rb plus parkir..jlnnya bagus..cm sayang debit airnya kecil dan byk sampah🖓..tolong diperhatikan... sm toiletnya ya..biar byk yg mau berkunjung..☺☺☺ …
english_translation:
Good... the track is incredibly challenging.. passing through a pine forest, there are many hammocks for rent.. cheap and cheerful
Just pay 10 thousand plus parking.. the road is good.. it's a shame the water flow is small and there's a lot of trash 🖓.. please pay attention to this... and the toilets too.. so that many people will want to visit.. ☺☺☺ …

text: Mantap, sejuk, adem, ada WC, ada sewa peralatan camping, camcer camping ceria, naiknya gak jauh jalannya, warung di bawah diatas gada, sunset dan sunrise dapat semua, view epic, track banyak untuk para hiking. Mantaplah. Masuk terjangkau juga.
english_translation: Awesome, cool, refreshing, there's a toilet, camping equipment rental available, happy camping, the climb isn't far, no shops above but there's one below, you can see both sunset and sunrise, epic view, lots of hiking trails. Awesome. Entrance is affordable too.

text: Spot bagus mskpn msh dalam pembangunan harga tiket 15 rb parkir luas,,anak umur 8 thn sudah byr🙄penyewaan prahu mahal bngt 45 ribu lama atau pun sbntr makanan diatas 30 rb penyewaan spda pun trblng mahal buat anak toilet dan mushola nyaman.. …
english_translation: Great spot even though it's still under construction. Ticket price 15k, spacious parking. Children aged 8 already have to pay 🙄. Boat rental is very expensive, 45k whether long or short. Food is over 30k. Bicycle rental is also considered expensive for children. Toilets and prayer rooms are comfortable.. …

text: Asik untuk bersantai.. tiket masuk 15rb/orang, mobil 10rb, bisa naik bebek 45rb untuk 2 org 1 anak, kawasan danau cukup luas, ada kereta api jg cuma sedang tidak beroperasi, 15/orang untuk naik kereta, disarankan ke sana sore hari biar teduh..
english_translation: Fun to relax. Entrance fee 15k/person, car 10k. You can ride a paddle boat for 45k for 2 people and 1 child. The lake area is quite large. There's also a train, but it's not operating at the moment. It's 15k/person to ride the train. It's recommended to go there in the afternoon so it's shady.

text:
Tepat ramai pengunjung, wisata arah lembang bandung, disarankan kalau datang dipagi hari untuk menghindari macet dan hujan, tempatnya dingin cocok buat hirup udara segar😊😊
Kalau mau selfi dipinggir rebing harap hati2 ada pengalaman terpeleset😥
english_translation:
Right in the middle of the crowd, the Lembang, Bandung tourist destination is recommended to come in the morning to avoid traffic jams and rain. The place is cold, suitable for breathing fresh air 😊😊.
If you want to take a selfie by the riverbank, please be careful, there was an experience of slipping 😥.

text:
Tmptnya bagus
Suasana yg asri dan banyaknya pohon pinus
Jadi kl buat foto bagus bangat
Trus tmpt buat rekreasi juga cocok
Udaranya juga sangat bagus
Tmpt bersih
Kl u/makanan msh blon lengkap bangat
Ya munkin temptnya kan masih lumayan baru...😀
english_translation:
The place is good
The atmosphere is green and there are many pine trees
So it's great for taking photos
It's also suitable as a recreation spot
The air is also very good
The place is clean
As for the food, it's not very complete yet
Well, maybe the place is still quite new...😀

text: Lokasi kemping keluarga kekinian... cocok buat yg mau cari udara dingin secara Jakarta panas dan terik. Jenis penginapannya macem2, bisa menyesuaikan budget.. dari yg model tenda, rumah hobbit dan camp glamour. Kegiatan outbound juga tersedia.
english_translation: A contemporary family campsite... perfect for those seeking cool air as Jakarta is hot and scorching. The accommodation types vary and can suit your budget... from tents, hobbit houses, and glamping. Outdoor activities are also available.

text: Tempat x tidak terlalu luas... Tapi sebentar saja kita berkunjung udah merasa puas banget...kenapa,karn tempat di lemngki dengan bunga bunga yang Bagus Bagus banget... Sehingga spot buat photo photo banyak banget dan kita puas dengan hasil x..
english_translation: The place isn't very spacious... But just a short visit makes us feel very satisfied... Why? Because the place is decorated with really beautiful flowers... So there are lots of photo spots and we're satisfied with the results.

text: Asri ...bisa bwt camp jg ..asik lah bikin acara d sini selain olahraga bwt sehat jg ..anak anak pun bebas beraktifitas ..curug nya masih asri,alangkah lebih baik d kelola bwt tempat menunggu ..ya seperti saung saung ..tp enak loh hiking d sini
english_translation: Asri... can also be used for camping... it's fun to hold events here, besides exercising for health... the children are also free to be active... the waterfall is still natural, it would be even better if it were managed for a waiting area... like gazebos... but hiking here is nice

text: Bintang 5 buat curug nya..sayang akses masuk dari parkiran kendaraan ke lokasi curug sangat berbahaya apalagi jika hujan..sangat berbahaya..selain licin juga curam..perlu perhatian dari dinas pariwisata kab.bandung barat atau dispar jawabarat.
english_translation: 5 stars for the waterfall..unfortunately, the access from the vehicle parking lot to the waterfall location is very dangerous, especially if it rains.. very dangerous.. besides being slippery, it's also steep.. it needs attention from the West Bandung Regency Tourism Office or the West Java Tourism Office.

text:
Tempat yang sangat indah di Burangrang Selatan, pemandangannya juga indah dengan latar belakang perkebunan teh pangheotan.
Sangat disayangkan akses jalan menuju tempat wisata ini masih rusak, apalagi saat musim hujan jalanan akan menjadi licin
english_translation:
A very beautiful place in South Burangrang, the scenery is also beautiful with the background of the Pangheotan tea plantation.
It is very unfortunate that the road access to this tourist spot is still damaged, especially during the rainy season the roads will become slippery.

text: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu begitu indah dan menakjubkan untuk dikunjungi pemandangan yg indah yg tdk dapat dipunyai tempat lain dengan kawah ratunya yg begitu luas dan kawah domas yg bisa dinikmati suasana didalam kawah, bisa rebus telur mantaaap
english_translation: Mount Tangkuban Perahu is so beautiful and amazing to visit, with a beautiful view that cannot be found anywhere else, with its vast Queen's crater and Domas crater where you can enjoy the atmosphere inside the crater. You can even boil eggs, amazing!

text: Bagus bgt pemandangannya di sini.. harga boleh mahal tp pas dgn safety di sepanjang jalan mau ke arah kawahnya.. biaya msuk 79rb/2 org naik motor.. sdh termsuk parkir.. cmn sayang sekali makanan disini mahal2 bgtt.. beli pop mie nya 12.5rb/pcs
english_translation: The scenery here is really great.. the price might be expensive but it's fitting with the safety along the way to the crater.. entrance fee is 79k for 2 people on a motorcycle.. already includes parking.. it's just a shame that the food here is very, very expensive.. bought Indomie for 12.5k/pc

text: Jalan k sana udah bagus nyampe k parkiran, tiket masuk 12 k per motor, biaya parkir 3 k, trs kita masih hrs jln kaki kurang lbih 1 jam perjalanan, tapi semua perjuangan ga sia2 stelah sampe ksana, curugnya keren abis, ga nyesel deh dateng ksini
english_translation: The road to get there is already good until you reach the parking lot. The entrance fee is 12k per motorcycle, and parking costs 3k. Then, we still have to walk for about an hour. But all the effort was worth it after we arrived. The waterfall is incredibly cool, no regrets coming here.

text:
Jalannya datar tidak terlalu jauh hanya harus hati hati karena harus melewati batu batu besar.

Bawa baju ganti karena berenang di alam terbuka akan memberikan pengalaman yang berkesan.  Oh iya bisa juga loncat dari ketinggian 3 meteran ke air.
english_translation:
The path is flat and not too far, just need to be careful because you have to pass large rocks.

Bring a change of clothes because swimming in the open will provide a memorable experience. Oh yes, you can also jump from a height of about 3 meters into the water.

text: Wisata alam yang indah. Wajib dikunjungi minimal satu kali seumur hidup. Hawa sekitarnya sejuk, jadi betah berlama-lama di sini. Kalo ke sini hari jumat, bisa sekalian jumatan di masjidnya. Banyak penjual makanan jadi jangan khawatir kelaparan.
english_translation: Beautiful nature tourism. A must-visit at least once in a lifetime. The surrounding air is cool, so you'll want to stay here for a long time. If you come here on a Friday, you can also perform Friday prayers at the mosque. There are many food vendors, so don't worry about going hungry.

text: Kalau mau menuju  ke Lokasi yang pakai kendaraan harus x-tra hati2 dikarenakan jalan turun dan arus kendaraan nya kencang dan ditempat tersebut tidak ada petugas dari pihak penyedia wisata yg membantu kendaraan masuk,saran kami kita harus hati2
english_translation: If you want to go to the location by vehicle, you must be extra careful because the road is steep and the traffic is fast, and there are no staff from the tourism provider to assist vehicles entering. Our advice is to be careful.

text: Suasananya bagus. Tempat sholat, toilet di dalam area setelah loket masuk nyaman. kalau sudah sampai ujung, ada shuttle (lebih spt angkot sih) buat nganterin pengunjung balik lagi ke atas, free. ada flying fox, ada mini golf yg lumayan menarik.
english_translation: The atmosphere is nice. The prayer room and toilets within the area after the entrance counter are comfortable. When you reach the end, there's a shuttle (more like a minivan, really) to take visitors back up, free of charge. There's a flying fox and a mini golf course that's quite interesting.

text: Tempat ini cukup luas dan nyaman, lebih enak dikunjungi dibandingkan Asia Afrika sebab lebih seger, adem dan family friendly. Byk bunga2 dan corak2 bangunan jepang, korea, dll. Bisa jg naik perahu disini. Makanan yg disajikan juga khas bandung.
english_translation: This place is quite spacious and comfortable, better to visit than Asia Afrika because it's fresher, cooler, and family-friendly. Lots of flowers and architectural designs from Japan, Korea, etc. You can also ride a boat here. The food served is also typical Bandung cuisine.

text:
Tempatnya luaaassss.. asri.. bagus konsepnya..

Bisa piknik, ada wahana adventure utk anak2 juga..

Ada free shuttle car dr pintu keluar sampai ke parkiran.. parkiran jg luas..

Toilet banyak n bersih..

Recommended place kalo main ke lembang..
english_translation:
The place is veeeery spacious.. green and pleasant.. the concept is good..

You can have a picnic, there are also adventure rides for kids..

There's a free shuttle car from the exit to the parking lot.. the parking lot is also spacious..

Toilets are plenty and clean..

Recommended place if you're visiting Lembang..

text:
2,5 tahun lalu ketika Kita out bond ini tempat masih hutan. Sekarang udah bagus. Cuma tiketnya yang Rp 35.000,00 lumayan juga karena kalau ingin lewat jembatan harus bayar lagi Rp 20.000,00.
Ada penginapan di depan pintu masuk. Ngak jauh amat..
english_translation:
2.5 years ago when we had our outbound here, this place was still a forest. Now it's good. It's just that the Rp 35,000 ticket is quite a lot because if you want to cross the bridge, you have to pay another Rp 20,000.
There are accommodations at the entrance. Not too far away..

text: Curugnya termasuk di maribaya natural hot spring resort. Jadi kalo mau ke curugnya aja kudu beli tiket masuk maribaya natural hot spring resort. Curugnya ga terlalu tinggi tapi lebar. Tapi pengunjung cuma bisa liat aja gabisa mandi2 di curugnya
english_translation: The waterfall is included in the Maribaya Natural Hot Spring Resort. So if you want to go to the waterfall, you have to buy an entrance ticket to Maribaya Natural Hot Spring Resort. The waterfall is not too high but it is wide. However, visitors can only look at it, they cannot bathe in the waterfall.

text: Baru kesini lagi setelah pertama mereka buka, banyak perubahan, harga tiketnya lumayan juga 30k kalau mau masuk ke permainan atau spot lain harus bayar lagi, tersedia musholla (bersih nyaman) pas kemarin kesana tempat jualannya banyak yg tutup.
english_translation: Just came here again after they first opened, a lot has changed. The ticket price is quite high, 30k. If you want to go on rides or to other spots, you have to pay extra. There's a prayer room (clean and comfortable). Yesterday when I went, many of the stalls were closed.

text: Tempatnya sejuk, ramai, akang2 nya baik, mreka suka nawarin foto pakai panorama dan bener2 gamau nerima uang. Mreka emg mau bantuin foto aja , paling nawarin dagangannya, ya kalau gamau beli jg gpp. Parkir luas, banyak jajanan harganya standar.
english_translation: The place is cool, crowded, the guys are nice, they like to offer to take photos using panorama and really don't want to accept money. They really just want to help with photos, at most they offer their merchandise, but it's okay if you don't want to buy. Parking is spacious, lots of snacks with standard prices.

text: Suasana disini enak banget karena masih sejuk, asri, bersih, fasilitas lengkap,  ramah buat anak kecil juga. Seneng bgt jalan disini karena alamnya bagus banget dan fasilitasnya itu loh konsepnya bagus. Paling suka yg rumah kaca berisi anggrek.
english_translation: The atmosphere here is really nice because it's still cool, green, clean, with complete facilities, and also child-friendly. I really enjoyed walking here because the nature is so beautiful and the facilities have a great concept. I liked the greenhouse filled with orchids the most.

text: Instragramable banget coy, hawanya sejuk kadang2 turun kabut. Jalan dari loket tiket ke lokasi wisata agak rusak tp is oke. Banyak spot2 foto. Toiletnya jg unik. Biar lebih puas datang sore hari karena lampu2 baru dinyalakan menambah keindahan.
english_translation: Super Instagrammable, dude. The air is cool, and sometimes fog rolls in. The road from the ticket booth to the tourist spot is a bit damaged, but it's okay. Lots of photo spots. The toilets are also unique. To get the most satisfaction, come in the afternoon because the lights are just turned on, adding to the beauty.

text: Tempat yg pas buat weekend dengan suasana alam, udaranya sejuk walaupun disiang hari yg panas..kalau yg suka tantangan ada flying fox, jembatan gantung, turun tebing, ada juga kebun strawberry, kandang rusa dll..kalau mau menginap bisa juga lho
english_translation: A perfect place for the weekend with a natural atmosphere, the air is cool even on a hot day. For those who like challenges, there's zip-lining, a suspension bridge, abseiling, and also a strawberry garden, deer enclosure, etc. If you want to stay overnight, you can too.

text: Curug maribaya memang bagus besar dan tempatnya indah perjalanan menuju curug lumayan agak jauh dari parkiran selama menuju curug di hiasi dengan banyak pohon yang besar besar dan perjalan agak naik lumayan den per wisata itu banyak kenangannya
english_translation: Maribaya waterfall is indeed beautiful, large, and the place is lovely. The journey to the waterfall is quite far from the parking lot. Along the way to the waterfall, it is decorated with many large trees, and the journey is somewhat uphill. This tourist spot holds many memories.

text: Sejarah asal-usul Bandung dari Bandung Purba, salah-satu kawasannya ada di Sanghyang Kenit. Batunya bagus, airnya jernih bagus untuk berphoto. Nyaman dikunjungi dengan fasilitas yang cukup untuk pengunjung seperti Mushola, warung, lahan parkir.
english_translation: The history of Bandung's origins from ancient Bandung, one of its areas is in Sanghyang Kenit. The rocks are beautiful, the water is clear and good for photos. Comfortable to visit with sufficient facilities for visitors such as a prayer room, warungs, and parking.

text: Cocok buat ngadem dan bersantai, suasananya segar, orangnya ramah-ramah, harga makanan murah, toilet dan mushola bersih, kebersihan terjaga, kalo naik terus dari tempat utama ada lagi view yang menarik dan ingat jangan buang sampah sembarangan.
english_translation: Perfect for cooling down and relaxing, the atmosphere is refreshing, the people are friendly, the food prices are cheap, the toilets and prayer room are clean, cleanliness is maintained, if you keep going up from the main area there are more interesting views, and remember not to litter.

text: Tempatnya super keren abis, spot fotonya banyak, airnya seger banget buat berenang, tiket masuknya murah cuma 10k, parkir motor 2k za, sewa pelampung 15k,,,,, track nya lumayan agak curam jadi hrs extra hati2, tapi bakal terbayarkn setelah sampe
english_translation: The place is super cool, lots of photo spots, the water is really refreshing for swimming, the entrance ticket is cheap at only 10k, motorbike parking is just 2k, renting a float is 15k. The track is quite steep, so you have to be extra careful, but it will be worth it once you arrive.

text: Wiiiiiiihh keren nih tempat, buat wisata keluarga atau sama gebetan, biaya masuknya terjangkau, seneng banget deh bisa main kesini. Terutama buat kids and old jaman now, ini tempat yang asik buat shelfie dengan bunga warna warni, pokoknya keren.
english_translation: Wiiiiihh, this place is cool. Great for a family outing or a date with someone you like. The entrance fee is affordable, I'm so happy I got to visit here. Especially for kids and old-school people now, this is a cool spot for a selfie with colorful flowers, it's just great.

text: Bunga-bunganya bagus dan terawat. Pemandangannya juga indah banget disini. Udaranya sejuk, tapi tempat parkir agak sempit kalo lagi banyak pengunjung. Spotnya lucu-lucu banget buat foto-foto. Jadi tempat favorit buat liburan bareng keluarga deh.
english_translation: The flowers are beautiful and well-maintained. The scenery here is also really amazing. The air is cool, but the parking lot is a bit narrow when it's crowded. The spots are super cute for taking photos. It's become a favorite place for family vacations.

text: Bagus banget tempat nya sejuk dingin area fotonya juga bagus banget kita busa tuker tiket nya sama permainan,melihat kebun stroberi,bisa ngasih makan rusa ,kita bisa liat dan kura2,tempat makan nya juga bagus beserta kamar mandinya bersih banget
english_translation: The place is really nice, cool and cold. The photo spots are also very good. We can exchange our tickets for games, see the strawberry garden, feed the deer, we can see turtles too. The dining area is also good, and the restrooms are very clean.

text: Menjadi salah satu favorit kunjungan wisatawan. Cuaca sewaktu kunjungan hangat (tidak begitu dingin), banyak penjual pernak pernik menjajakan dagangan. Begitu juga oleh oleh khas berupa dodol banyak dijajakan disini. Pandai pandai menawar ya..😄😄
english_translation: A favorite tourist destination. The weather during the visit was warm (not too cold), with many souvenir vendors selling their wares. Typical souvenirs like dodol are also widely sold here. Be good at bargaining... 😄😄

text:
Bagus.. tempatnya bersih.. ada petugas yang jaga juga lumayan membantu.. bisa dimintain tolong untuk fotoin rame2 dan petugasnya sudah tau spot2 foto yg bagus.. 😁
Mantap lah pokoknya.. ngga usah jauh2 tempat mainnya.. semoga semakin bagus lagi..
english_translation:
Good.. the place is clean.. there's also a staff member who's quite helpful.. you can ask them to take photos of groups and the staff already knows good photo spots.. 😁
Awesome, basically.. no need to go far for a place to play.. hope it gets even better..

text: Tempatnya bagus, dengan udara pegunungan yang segar. Makanannya kurang good dan variatif, booking catering dapet lauk daging ayam yang bau (gak fresh). Bukan tempat wisata yang cocok untuk menengah kebawah. Karena setiap permainan bayar lebih ;)
english_translation: The place is nice, with fresh mountain air. The food is not very good and varied; we booked catering and got chicken with a bad (not fresh) smell. It's not a tourist spot suitable for the lower to middle class because every game costs extra ;)

text: Untuk tempat sebaiknya sudah sangat asik untuk kemping, namun pada hari-hari libur, akan menjadi terlalu ramai dan beberapa pengunjung tidak membuang sampah pada tempatnya, akan lebih baik jika pengurus maupun wisatawan lebih menjaga kebersihan.
english_translation: For camping, the place is usually very nice, but on holidays, it gets too crowded and some visitors don't dispose of their trash properly. It would be better if both the management and the tourists paid more attention to cleanliness.

text: Harga tiket masuk terjangkau..kita bisa menikmati pemandangan bunga bunganya bermekaran dimana²..ambil foto yang paling the best krn view belakang kebun begonia ada perbukitan hijau.. recommended bgt buat melepas sejenak penat dan rutinitas kita
english_translation: Affordable entrance ticket price. We can enjoy the view of the blooming flowers everywhere. Take the best photos because behind the begonia garden are green hills. Highly recommended for releasing our fatigue and routine for a moment.

text: Cocok Untuk Tempat Liburan . Kesana waktu weekday jadi ga terlalu rame . Harga makanan dsana jg masih terjangkau . Tempatnya sangat Luas . Suasananya enakk masih Sejuk . Rekomend sih kalo mau liburan atau sekedar nongkrong2 di floating marketnya
english_translation: Suitable for a holiday destination. Went there on a weekday so it wasn't too crowded. The food prices there are also still affordable. The place is very spacious. The atmosphere is nice and still cool. Recommended if you want to go on vacation or just hang out at the floating market.

text: Untuk melakukan perjalanan ke Sanghyang Heuleut, perlu hati-hati apabila kondisi tanah masih licin sehabis diguyur hujan. Disarankan melakukan travelling pada saat cuaca cerah  agar bisa menikmati Warna Alami Air  kehijau-hijauan yang excited!!!
english_translation: To travel to Sanghyang Heuleut, you need to be careful if the ground is still slippery after rain. It is recommended to travel during clear weather so you can enjoy the exciting greenish natural water color!!!

text: Tempatnya begitu luas. Tapi sayangnya selera saya rada kurang pas disini. Merasa bosan. Tapi overall bagus kok. banyak spot2 foto, dari atas smpai bawah. Kalau capek mau ke atas, ada fasilitas shuttle yg mengantarkan pengunjung ke parkiran atas.
english_translation: The place is very spacious. But unfortunately, my taste isn't quite right here. I felt bored. But overall it's good. There are many photo spots, from top to bottom. If you're tired and want to go up, there's a shuttle facility that takes visitors to the upper parking lot.

text:
Suasanya emang sejuk, tapi banyak spot yang ditutup gerbang gak boleh masuk, dan harga tiket terlalu mahal udah sama bayar Parkir, diatas ada bayar parkir kembali.. untuk harga makanan disana relatif murah.

Jalan kurang dikelola masuk kawasannya
english_translation:
The atmosphere is indeed cool, but many spots are closed off by gates and you're not allowed in, and the ticket price is too expensive, already including parking, and then there's another parking fee on top. The food prices there are relatively cheap.

The roads are poorly maintained entering the area.

text: Situ Ciburuy laukna hese dipancing,nyeredet hate ningali ngemplak caina.Tempat ngadem dan memanjakan mata,lokasi tepi jalan raya akses mudaj,sekarang sudah di revitalisasi dengan tempat singgah yang lebih modern,dalam waktu dekat akan diresmikan.
english_translation: Ciburuy Lake's fish are hard to catch, but the clear water makes the heart flutter. A place to cool off and feast the eyes, its location is by the main road with easy access. It has now been revitalized with more modern resting spots and will be inaugurated soon.

text: Jalan masih berbatu tapi parkir cukup luas. Harga tiket masuk Rp 8.000 perorang untuk parkir mobil Rp.7000 dan motor Rp.5000. Kamar Mandi di kurang bersih tapi pemandangan indah apalagi saat cuaca cerah. Tapi hatihati jalan licin dan banyak batu.
english_translation: The road is still rocky but the parking is quite spacious. Entrance ticket price is Rp 8,000 per person, car parking is Rp 7,000, and motorbike parking is Rp 5,000. The bathroom is less than clean but the view is beautiful, especially when the weather is clear. But be careful, the road is slippery and rocky.

text: Akses jalan cukup jauh, saran saya yg bawa motor dibawa aja sampai pos terdekat dgn sanghyang. Setelah itu jalan kurleb 5 kilo dengan medan tracking yang cukup terjal. Tapi asli terbayar dengan view dan segernya air. Jangan lupa sewa pelampung👍 …
english_translation: The road access is quite far, my suggestion for those on motorcycles is to take them to the nearest post with Sanghyang. After that, it's about a 5 km walk with a fairly steep trekking terrain. But it's truly worth it for the view and the refreshing water. Don't forget to rent a life jacket 👍 …

text:
Perhutani bisa banget bikin kita rela ngluarin kocek.
Tempatnya asri adem hijau sejuk dan bersih pastinya.
Cocok buat main sama anak, keluarga, temen2, atau pacaran sama suami.
Tiket masuk lumayan sih, sayangnya wahana di dalam masih harus bayar.
english_translation:
Perhutani can really make us willing to spend money.
The place is natural, cool, green, and clean, for sure.
Suitable for playing with children, family, friends, or dating with your husband.
The entrance ticket is quite reasonable, unfortunately the attractions inside still require payment.

text: Akses menuju Curug Sawer sudah cukup bagus, namun begitu mendekati lokasi, jalanan akan menjadi sedikit sempit. Hati-hati karena jalanan tersebut agak licin. Air terjun yang tidak terlalu besar membuat kita dapat bermain di bawah aliran tersebut.
english_translation: Access to Curug Sawer is quite good, but as you get closer to the location, the road will become a bit narrow. Be careful as the road is rather slippery. The waterfall, which isn't too large, allows us to play under its flow.

text: Jalan menuju curug bisa dilewati mobil, tetapi jalanannya tidak terlalu bagus , tiket masuk Rp @15.000/ orang , tiket mobil Rp.5.000 , curugnya sendiri bagus , jalan ke curug nya tidak curam , aman dilewati orang yg tidak terlalu sering olah raga
english_translation: The road to the waterfall can be accessed by car, but the road is not very good. Entrance fee is Rp 15,000 per person, car fee is Rp 5,000. The waterfall itself is beautiful, the path to the waterfall is not steep, safe for people who don't exercise very often.

text: Salut. Walau musim liburan, tempat parkir masih bisa menampung mobil yang banyak! Luas banget parkirannya. Males belanja di floating. Harus pakai koin²an segala. Mending lgsg makan di Resto nasi timbelnya. Enak dan orang tua saya sangat berselera
english_translation: Hi. Despite the holiday season, the parking lot can still accommodate many cars! The parking lot is very spacious. I don't feel like shopping at the floating market. You have to use coins and stuff. It's better to just eat at the Nasi Timbel restaurant. It's delicious and my parents really enjoyed it.

text: Tempatnya bagus.... Pemandangan indah.. Banyak spot foto... Hanya sayang tiketnya menurut saya terlalu tinggi Rp. 50.000/orang itu pun di dalamnya setiap wahana atau spot foto harus bayar lagi. Menyenangkan bagi yang punya cukup banyak uang...😊 …
english_translation: The place is nice.... Beautiful scenery.. Lots of photo spots... It's just a shame the ticket price, in my opinion, is too high at Rp. 50,000/person, and even then, every ride or photo spot inside requires an additional payment. It's fun for those who have quite a lot of money... 😊 …

text: Keindahan alam yang di sajiakan menjadikan tempat ini cocok buat rekan2 yang ingin menghabisakn mlm di tempat ini. Dsni Jalnannya naik turun,kurang cocok buat para lansia. Wahana anak juga msh terbatas. Harga tiket dan jajanan sih ok di kantong..
english_translation: The natural beauty offered makes this place suitable for colleagues who want to spend the night here. The paths here go up and down, not very suitable for the elderly. The children's rides are also still limited. The ticket prices and snacks are pocket-friendly.

text:
Puncak gunung yg bisa di tempuh menggunakan kendaraan bermotor
Tersedia fasilitas
Toilet umum
Warung makan
Warung sovenir
Bisa berkuda
Parkiran luas
Masjid
Biaya masuk
Rp. 20.000 per orang
Rp. 25.000 untuk kendaraan roda 4
Parkir roda 4
Rp. 5.000
english_translation:
Mountaintop accessible by motorized vehicle
Facilities available:
Public restrooms
Food stalls
Souvenir stalls
Horseback riding available
Spacious parking
Mosque
Entrance fee:
Rp. 20,000 per person
Rp. 25,000 for 4-wheeled vehicles
4-wheeled vehicle parking:
Rp. 5,000

text: Melihat bandung di pagi hari dengan udara segar, dan track yang tidak terlalu jauh. Harus diperhatikan, bagi yang memliki belum terbiasa / tekanan darah rendah lebih baik lewat track yang umum saja, jangan potong kompas melewati track yang curam.
english_translation: Seeing Bandung in the morning with fresh air, and a track that isn't too far. Note, for those who are not accustomed / have low blood pressure, it's better to take the usual track, don't cut corners through the steep track.

text: Asrii dan nyaman cocok untuk healing, bisa adain acara disini juga seperti gatering. Belajar jenis tanaman tanaman Anggrek dan Rabbit house. Dengan tiket masuk yang tidak terlalu mahal sangat Worth it. Dekat sekali dengan wisata Tangkuban Perahu.
english_translation: Comfortable and relaxing, suitable for healing, and can also host events like gatherings here. Learn about orchid plant types and visit the Rabbit House. With an affordable entrance ticket, it's very worthwhile. Very close to the Tangkuban Perahu tourist spot.

text:
Tempat yang cocok buat piknik, bukan healing ya karna healing sebutan buat terapi untuk gangguan jiwa wkwk.

Disarankan datang pada saat hari kerja, kalau yang suka suasana sepi dan tenang, kalau hari libur atau weekend biasanya pengunjung bejibun
english_translation:
A suitable place for a picnic, not for "healing" because healing is a term for therapy for mental disorders lol.

It's recommended to come on weekdays if you prefer a quiet and peaceful atmosphere; on holidays or weekends, it's usually crowded.

text: Bagus tempatnya dan udaranya sangat sejuk tempatnya pun bersih , cocok lah buat rekreasi keluarga maupun pacar yang punya pacar tapi klo yang jomblo bisa lah bareng teman dan sahabat , bisa untuk menambah wawasan juga untuk mengenalkan kepada anak
english_translation: The place is nice and the air is very cool, the place is also clean, it's suitable for family recreation or for those with girlfriends, but if you're single, you can go with friends and buddies, it can also broaden your horizons and be introduced to children.

text: Destinasi wisata luar negeri yang dipaketkan disini (dari beberapa negara). Ada beberapa penambahan wisata baru (sedang dalam proses pembuatan). Jembatan gantung yang membentang, kalau didesain dari kaca, seperti di China pasti lebih keren lagi🤩🤩🤩
english_translation: Overseas tourist destinations are packaged here (from several countries). There are several new tourist additions (currently under development). The suspension bridge that stretches across, if designed from glass, like in China, it would be even cooler 🤩🤩🤩

text: Tempatnya bagus banget. Baru pertama ke Bandung nggak kecewa . View nya semua bagus bagus nggak nyesel jauh2 Dateng. Tempatnya masih natural bangettt. Kita duduk santai bangat nih di kursi tempat duduk didekat air terjunnya . Love buat Bandung 😘 …
english_translation: The place is really nice. First time in Bandung and not disappointed. The views are all beautiful, no regrets coming from so far away. The place is still very natural. We're sitting very comfortably on the seats near the waterfall. Love for Bandung 😘

text:
Anda akan memiliki jalur pendek alternatif untuk hiking. 2 atau 3 jam. Cukup jalan memutar melalui sungai dan kembali melalui tepi sungai bagian atas, atau Anda dapat memilih jalan-jalan teh.
Perhatikan jembatan bambu, perawatannya tidak bagus.
english_translation:
You will have an alternative short hiking path. 2 or 3 hours. Simply walk a loop through the river and back along the upper riverbank, or you can opt for the tea walk.
Please note the bamboo bridge, its maintenance is not good.

text: Tempatnya menyenangkan, banyak spot buat ambil foto, keindahan alam yang disajikan sangat memanjakan mata, ada fasilitas outbound berupa flying fox, areanya luas tapi tak usah khawatir jika sudah di bawah nanti ada shuttle ke atas ke tempat parkir
english_translation: The place is pleasant, with many spots for taking photos. The natural beauty presented is very pleasing to the eye. There are outbound facilities like a flying fox, and the area is vast, but don't worry, once you're down there, there's a shuttle to take you back up to the parking lot.

text: Parkiran sangat luas. Main rainbow slide 30k/org sekali naik. Ada jasa fotonya. Kalo mau di tebus softcopy harganya 10rb/foto. Tiket masuk di tukar dengan minuman gratis. Untuk makanan belinya pake koin dlu di tuker. Banyak wahana, tempatnya luas.
english_translation: The parking lot is very spacious. The rainbow slide costs 30k/person per ride. There's a photo service available. If you want to redeem the soft copy, it's 10k per photo. The entrance ticket can be exchanged for a free drink. For food, you need to buy it using coins first. There are many attractions, and the place is spacious.

text: Udah berasa kek di bali suasana dari patung-patungnya. Wisata alam di lembang ini cukup menarik. Viewnya bagus, banyak juga spot-spot untuk foto yang keren-keren. Harga tiket juga murah, parkir juga tergolong murah untuk wisata alam di lembang ini
english_translation: It feels like being in Bali with its statues. This natural attraction in Lembang is quite interesting. The view is good, and there are many cool photo spots. The ticket price is also cheap, and parking is also considered cheap for a natural attraction in Lembang.

text:
Area wisata tertata rapih, cukup bersih, area parkir banyak, tiket masuk tidak terlalu mahal.

Banyak pedagang yg jadi lokal guide dan fotografer - sehingga cukup membantu menemukan spot foto terbaik. Dan kehadiran mereka tidak memaksa utk membeli
english_translation:
The tourist area is well-organized, quite clean, with ample parking. The entrance fee is not too expensive.

Many vendors offer their services as local guides and photographers, which greatly helps in finding the best photo spots. Their presence is not pushy for purchases.

text: Masuk sini tiket masuk bisa ditukar jadi jus atau kopi. Tempatnya bagus, ada hewan-hewan dan bunga disusun rapi. Spot foto bagus semua. Jajanan di kapal terapung uang diganti koin dulu. Pedagangnya jualan di kapal kecil. Banyak pilihan makanannya.
english_translation: Come in here, the entrance ticket can be exchanged for juice or coffee. The place is nice, with animals and flowers neatly arranged. All the photo spots are good. For snacks on the floating boat, money is exchanged for coins first. The vendors sell from small boats. There are many food options.

text: Tempat camping dengan view terbaik di bandung. Tracking nya dekat cuma 30mnt. Tempat nya enak. Ada wc di Campsite. Warung cuma di parkiran. Klo malam udara nya dingin bgt. Biaya masuk sekitar 20rb per orang. Harus nitip KTP di basecamp klo camping
english_translation: The best camping spot with the best view in Bandung. The trek is close, only 30 minutes. The place is nice. There are toilets at the campsite. Shops are only at the parking lot. It's very cold at night. The entrance fee is around 20,000 IDR per person. You have to leave your ID card at the basecamp if you are camping.

text: Hutan pinus dengan view yang bagus n hijau. Cocok utk tempat refreshing dan yang suka foto2. Harga tiket masuk bisa ditukar dgn makan siang di Pine Kitchen. Suka banget dgn suasana disini, sejuk dan menenangkan. Wajib dikunjungi bila ke Bandung ya
english_translation: Pine forest with a nice and green view. Suitable for refreshing and for those who like taking photos. The entrance ticket price can be exchanged for lunch at Pine Kitchen. I really like the atmosphere here, cool and calming. Must visit if you go to Bandung.

text: Tempatnya bagus, bersih bgt. Tpi kemaren pas kesana hujan. Tpi tenang ada yg jualan mantel. Sekedar saran ya, kalo kesana harus siap pakaian tebal bagi yg gakuat dingin. Atau siapin duit lebih deh karna ada yg jualan sweater gitu. Serulah tmptnya.
english_translation: The place is good, very clean. But it was raining when I went there yesterday. But don't worry, there were people selling ponchos. Just a suggestion, if you go there, you should be prepared with thick clothes for those who can't stand the cold. Or be prepared to spend more money because there were people selling sweaters. It was fun there.

text: Tempat yang sangat bagus. Datang waktu sore hari, 2-3 jam sebelum tutup, nikmati suasana sore dan malam dengan lampu-lampu yang sudah dinyalakan. Jalanannya bersih dan cuacanya sejuk. Toilet lumayan bersih. Bisa duduk santai sambil dengerin musik.
english_translation: A very nice place. Come in the afternoon, 2-3 hours before closing, enjoy the afternoon and evening atmosphere with the lights already on. The streets are clean and the weather is cool. The toilets are quite clean. You can sit and relax while listening to music.

text: Nuansanya sejuk. Ke tempat curug nya juga gak jauh, airnya juga bersih. Tempatnya luas, bisa buat kemping juga. Dan ada permainan flying fox nya juga buat anak anak. Tiket masuknya murah dan terjangkau. Pokoknya cocok buat obat penghilang penat😍 …
english_translation: The nuances are cool. It's not far to the waterfall, and the water is also clean. The place is spacious, suitable for camping too. And there's a flying fox game for the kids. The entrance ticket is cheap and affordable. Overall, it's perfect for relieving fatigue 😍

text:
Taman BEGONIA adalah tempat Rekreasi Taman aneka  bunga,sayur dan buah buahan....
Banyak sport sport foto yang menarik dan unik.
Disini pengunjung bisa memetik buah buahan langsung , juga sayuran. Juga menjual bibit tanaman bunga dan buah buahan...
english_translation:
BEGONIA Park is a recreational park with various flowers, vegetables, and fruits....
There are many interesting and unique photo spots.
Here visitors can pick fruits directly, as well as vegetables. They also sell flower and fruit plant seedlings...

text: Masih disekitar area..saguling..setelah menempuh perjalanan sekitar 1 jam menelusuri bebatuan di aliran sungai..sampai juga ke lokasi yg di maksud...disarankan memakai sepatu hiking..karena jalan menuju tkp dijamin tidak mulus...amaziiing ..dijamin
english_translation: Still around the Saguling area... after traveling about 1 hour navigating rocks in the river flow... finally reached the intended location... recommended to wear hiking shoes.. because the path to the crime scene is guaranteed to be rough... amazing.. guaranteed

text: Asri banget tempatnya, dr parkiran ga jauh jalan nya sambil olah raga ..pas sampe tempar seger rasanya pemandabgan nya sejuk ,masih dlm tahap pembangunan moga kedepan lebih bagus lagi ,wisata alam yg harus d junjungi ya..tiket masuknya murah banget
english_translation: The place is very beautiful, not far from the parking lot to walk while exercising... upon arriving at the location, it felt refreshing, the scenery was cool, still under construction, hopefully it will be even better in the future, a nature tourism spot that must be visited.. the entrance ticket is very cheap

text: Bagus nya Kalau ke tempat ini,  Ga perlu jalan kaki smpai keatas, kendaraan langsung bisa sampai puncak, Sehingga aman bawa keluarga yg Sdh Lansia,  tempat makan Ada juga diatas,  Ada masjid juga,  ademm  banget Sholat diatas,... Pokoknya Mantap...
english_translation: It's great that when you go to this place, you don't need to walk all the way up. Vehicles can go directly to the summit, making it safe to bring elderly family members. There are also places to eat at the top, and a mosque. It's very peaceful to pray up there. Overall, it's fantastic...

text: Pokonya harus cobain ke tempat ini, fasilitas dan pelayanan dari para petugasnya bagus banget, siap membantu kita contohnya saat ingin berfoto👍👍👍 ga nyesel deh kesini malahan pengen balik lagi. Saat hujan pun sudah ada payung yang mereka sediakan …
english_translation: You absolutely have to try this place. The facilities and service from the staff are amazing. They are always ready to help, for example, when you want to take photos 👍👍👍 You won't regret coming here, in fact, you'll want to come back again. Even when it rains, they have umbrellas available...

text: Pemandangannya sangat indah dengan harga tiket masuk 20k  wajib dikunjungi bagi pecinta curug , air nya sangat jernih bisa berenang di dekat curug nya akses ke curug sudah baik , tetap jaga kebersihan jangan buang sampah sembarangan. Salam lestari.
english_translation: The view is very beautiful with an entrance fee of 20k. It's a must-visit for waterfall lovers. The water is very clear, you can swim near the waterfall. Access to the waterfall is good. Please maintain cleanliness, do not litter. Sustainable greetings.

text:
Mengisi materi kurikulum merdeka untuk sman 1  batujaya Karawang
Suasana cukup dingin namun hangat karena pesertanya penuh dengan semangat
Senang sekali bisa berkolaborasi dengan guru guru hebat dan luar biasa dari sman batujaya Karawang Jawa Barat
english_translation:
Filling in the curriculum content for SMA Negeri 1 Batujaya Karawang.
The atmosphere was quite cool but warm because the participants were full of enthusiasm.
It was a great pleasure to collaborate with the great and extraordinary teachers from SMA Batujaya Karawang, West Java.

text: Objek wisata alam, dengan pemandangan utamanya curug, sayang  airnya kotor. Tiket 40rb belum termasuk wahana selfi dan bermain yg lain. Sangat disayangkan bayar mahal tapi ke toilet tetep bayar. Seharusnya toilet itu fasilitas bukan wahana bermain.
english_translation: Natural tourist attraction, with the main scenery being a waterfall, it's a shame the water is dirty. The ticket price of 40,000 IDR does not include selfie and other attractions. It's very regrettable to pay expensively but still have to pay for the toilet. Toilets should be a facility, not an attraction.

text:
Asik juga kesini,  apalagi pada main perosotan rainbow yang memacu adrenaline ya...

Cemilannya juga enak enak,  ada tempat beli kaos untuk oleh oleh,  ada jual peyem dan oleh oleh lainnya juga.  One stop shopping,  bisa wisata + belanja oleh oleh.
english_translation:
It's also fun here, especially playing on the adrenaline-pumping rainbow slides...

The snacks are also delicious, there's a place to buy t-shirts for souvenirs, they also sell peyem (a type of fermented food) and other souvenirs. One-stop shopping, you can do sightseeing + souvenir shopping.

text: Nice place to have a family gathering here. Ada outbond nya juga (termasuk flying fox). Hutan pinus disana sini, ada rumah hobbit juga yg disewakan bagi yg ingin bermalam. Untuk restonya ada sundanese dan western food. Perfect escape deh pokonya ^^
english_translation: Nice place for a family gathering. They also have outbound activities (including flying fox). There are pine forests everywhere, and Hobbit houses that can be rented for those who want to stay overnight. For the restaurant, they serve Sundanese and Western food. It's a perfect escape, really ^^

text: pertama kali berkunjung petugasnya ramah2 dan rata2 bisa mengambil foto dg bagus… namun saat datang membawa rombongan satpamnya jutek minta kami segera beli tiket dulu tanpa bisa memeri kepastian apakah kami bisa melaui jembatan gantung atau tidak…
english_translation: First time visiting, the staff were friendly and could generally take good photos... but when we came with a group, the security guards were grumpy and demanded we buy tickets immediately without giving us any certainty whether we could cross the suspension bridge or not...

text: Dengan suasana lembang yang sudah padat, masih cocok untuk destinasi wisata keluarga. Wahana slide rainbow termasuk yang menantang adrenalin walau cuma 10detik dan wisata danau nya cocok untuk keluarga. Tempatnya beraih rapi dan tertata dengan baik
english_translation: Despite the already crowded atmosphere, it's still suitable as a family tourist destination. The rainbow slide ride is thrilling even if it's only 10 seconds, and the lake tour is perfect for families. The place is clean, tidy, and well-organized.

text:
Masih segar dengan pohon Cemara dan view perkebunan teh, cocok buat keluarga.
Hanya saja sampah masih berserakan.
Dan ada penjaga wana yg meminta tiket tambahan kalo mau ke arah perkebunan, padahal sebelum Curug tilu ada penjaga tiket masuk ke CIC.
english_translation:
Still fresh with pine trees and tea plantation views, suitable for families.
It's just that garbage is still scattered around.
And there's a forest ranger who asks for an additional ticket if you want to go towards the plantation, even though before Curug Tilu there's a ticket seller for CIC.

text:
Tempatnya nyaman dan tertata rapi.
Kafe2nya juga bagus dan makanannya enak.
Spot foto juga banyak, dan hampir gratis semua.
Ada paket piknik juga buat keluarga kecil.
Toilet dan fasilitas musholla juga bersih.
Harga masuknya 47.500 yaa.
Have fun ☘️
english_translation:
The place is comfortable and well-organized.
The cafes are also good and the food is delicious.
There are also many photo spots, and they are almost all free.
There are also picnic packages for small families.
The toilets and prayer room facilities are also clean.
The entrance fee is 47,500.
Have fun ☘️

text:
tempat wisata yang asik dan menyenangkan, tiket masuknya cukup terjangkau.
walaupun hanya melihat kawah, namun pikiran terasa jernih penat penat pun hilang.
hindari kesini saat musim liburan ,  saat kesini wajib makan indomie dan jagung bakar hahhaa
english_translation:
A fun and enjoyable tourist spot, the entrance ticket is quite affordable.
Even though it's just looking at the crater, my mind feels clear, and all the fatigue disappears.
Avoid coming here during the holiday season. When you visit, you must eat Indomie and grilled corn, hahaha.

text: Tempatnya asri. Pemandangannya bagus banget. Bikin seger sejauh mata memandang. Datang ke sini sekitar satu jam sebelum tutup. Kondisi sepi. Potongan karcis masuk bisa dituker sama minuman. Harga dan makanan so so. Sate ayam dan ketan bakarnya enak.
english_translation: The place is beautiful. The view is amazing. It's refreshing as far as the eye can see. Arrived here about an hour before closing. It was quiet. The entrance ticket stub can be exchanged for a drink. The price and food were so-so. The grilled chicken satay and sticky rice were delicious.

text: Tempatnya seru, sejuk dan banyak spot foto2. Menariknya lagi kita ngga harus bayar2 utk cobain atraksi2 di dalam kecuali berkuda dan playground anak. Tiket all in utk golf put put, feeding rabbits, masuk kebun anggrek. Nice place for adult and kids.
english_translation: The place is fun, cool, and has many photo spots. What's more interesting is that we don't have to pay extra for the attractions inside, except for horseback riding and the kids' playground. The all-in ticket includes mini golf, feeding rabbits, and entry to the orchid garden. Nice place for adults and kids.

text: Tempat Yang Nyaman Untuk Rekreasi Keluarga, ataupun mencari Spot Foto, Hanya Saja Pintu Masuk Tidak Terlihat Oleh tempat parkir & menutupi Tempat Yang Sejuk ini, Penginapan pun tersedia, & bisa membawa kendaraan Pribadi untuk yang Menginap Di Dalam.
english_translation: A comfortable place for family recreation or finding photo spots. The only issue is that the entrance is not visible from the parking lot and it covers this cool spot. Lodging is also available, and those staying overnight can bring their private vehicles.

text: Sekarang track untuk ke puncak jadi lebih mudah, ada gazebo juga sebelum puncak, view yg bagus ditambah cuaca yg sangat sejuk sangat pas. Saya rekomen untuk hiking di sini karna ga terlalu sulit untuk naik ke puncak hanya butuh waktu sekitar 40menit
english_translation: Now the track to the summit is easier, there's also a gazebo before the summit, the good view plus the very cool weather is perfect. I recommend hiking here because it's not too difficult to reach the summit, only takes about 40 minutes.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang cocok buat menikmati sejuknya alam. Pepohonan rindang batu batu besar menjulang gemericik air dan angin sepoi menenangkan. Cocok buat bersantai. Datang paling cocok saat pagi karena siang mulai jam 10 ke atas sudah mulai rame
english_translation: A natural tourist spot perfect for enjoying the cool of nature. Shady trees, towering large rocks, trickling water, and a gentle breeze are calming. Suitable for relaxing. The best time to visit is in the morning, as from 10 AM onwards it starts to get crowded.

text: Tempatnya bagus karena diantara pepohonan Pinus, villanya juga bagus. Tapi sayang lokasinya digabung dengan area wisata dan camping jadi kurang private dan agak berisik baik siang maupun malamnya karena banyak orang yg lalu lalang dan juga buat acara
english_translation: The place is nice because it's among pine trees, and the villa is also good. But unfortunately, the location is combined with a tourist and camping area, so it's less private and quite noisy, both day and night, because many people are coming and going and also for events.

text: Tempat nya bagus, nyaman dengan suasananya, tapi agak terganggu dengan pengamen yang ada, baru beres 1 tanpa ada jeda langsung datang lagi, yang ada tekor sama pengamen bukan dengan wisatanya, harap segera ada aturan untuk para pengamen, terima kasih
english_translation: The place is good, comfortable with its atmosphere, but it's a bit disturbed by the street performers. As soon as one leaves, another arrives immediately, without any break. We're losing money to the street performers, not from the tourism. We hope there will be rules for the street performers soon, thank you.

text: Sejuk, nyaman, bersih, tempatnya bagus, tersedia toilet umum di beberapa tempat yang tidak terlalu jauh, untuk kepulangan dr lokasi wisata ke tempat parkir disediakan shuttle antar jemput untuk kembali ke area parkiran gratis, banyak spot foto bagus.
english_translation: Cool, comfortable, clean, the place is nice, public toilets are available in several places not too far away, a free shuttle is provided for the return trip from the tourist location to the parking lot, many good photo spots.

text: Wisata alam yg sangat terkenal. Pemandangan sangat indah dan hawanya duingin sangat 😊. Rekomendasi utk liburan keluarga. Disarankan utk berangkat pagi2 (max jam 7 pagi), karena saat kita telat berangkat kita akan bertemu dgn om 'macetos'. Hehehe... …
english_translation: A very famous natural tourist spot. The scenery is very beautiful and the air is very cold 😊. Recommended for a family holiday. It's advised to leave early in the morning (maximum 7 AM), because if we leave late, we'll meet with Mr. 'traffic jam'. Hehehe...

text:
Hindari saat musim hujan, kalau mau musim ujan jangan lupa bikin parit.

Untuk harga kayu bakar 15rb periket mahal..
Itu gak sampe sejam aja abis apinya.

Kalau 2 hari 1 malam cukup bekal kompor aja buat masak teh anget, masak d atas ribet ternyata..
english_translation:
Avoid during the rainy season, if you want to avoid the rainy season, don't forget to make a ditch.

The price of firewood at 15rb per bundle is expensive..
The fire is gone in less than an hour.

For 2 days and 1 night, just bringing a stove is enough to make hot tea, cooking over a fire is apparently troublesome..

text: Harga masuk floating 30rb/orang, parkiran luas. Siapkan extracash untuk family yang main kesini, sebab di dalam jajanan ringan kurleb harga mulai 20rb, wahana anak2 juga kurleb mulai 20rb. Makan berat yang enak di nasi timbel 50rb paket komplit ENAK.
english_translation: Floating entrance fee is 30rb/person, spacious parking. Prepare extra cash for families playing here, because light snacks inside start from around 20rb, and children's rides also start from around 20rb. Delicious main meals are available at Nasi Timbel for a complete package of 50rb, DELICIOUS.

text: Tempatnya nyaman, kafe nya mantap jempolan.. bukan untuk backpaker. Untuk majet yang lebih mengutamakan tempat di sini tempatnya.. karena agak memakan kocek lebih dalam.. tapi terbayarkan lah untuk suasana santai, permainan2 di dalam. Dan air terjun.
english_translation: The place is comfortable, the coffee is top-notch. Not for backpackers. For those who prioritize the place, this is it. Because it's a bit more expensive, but it's worth it for the relaxed atmosphere, the games inside, and the waterfall.

text: lokasi bersebelahan dgn didieland punclut,  menuju lokasi diantar mobil wara wiri.. lokasinya dilembah.. cukup jauh klo jalan kaki siap2 utk jalan nanjak, ada landmark patung liberti, aquaman, santorini, menara eifel, cocok yg suka foto2 utk di medos
english_translation: Next to Didieland Punclut, you'll be driven to the location by a shuttle car. It's located in a valley. It's quite far if you walk, so be prepared for an uphill climb. There are landmarks like the Statue of Liberty, Aquaman, Santorini, and the Eiffel Tower. Perfect for those who love taking photos for social media.

text: indah banget tempatnya, banyak anggrek (yaiyalah kan namanya orchid hehe), terus tempatnya luas, bisa sekaligus olahraga sambil piknik tipis2... dan yang paling the best, fasilitas seperti mushola dan toiletnya bersih banget. jadi makin sayang *ehhhh
english_translation: The place is really beautiful, with lots of orchids (of course, it's called Orchid hehe), and the place is spacious, you can exercise and have a light picnic at the same time... and the best part, the facilities like the prayer room and toilets are very clean. So I love it even more *oops*

text: Wonderful place, lokasi cukup strategis, area camping keluarga yang menyenangkan dengan fasiltas yang cukup memadai, mudah dijangkau, tersedia aliran listrik/penerangan, warung2 yang buka 24 jam, keamanan baik. Kendaraan bisa  parkir disamping tenda.
english_translation: Wonderful place, quite a strategic location, a pleasant family camping area with adequate facilities, easily accessible, electricity/lighting available, 24-hour shops, good security. Vehicles can be parked next to the tent.

text:
Tempat yang sangat bagus untuk spot foto yah, apalagi pecinta Selfi dan fotonable, tiktokan, ada juga live music lho enak bgt buat nyanyi gitu.....
Voucher dituker minuman bagus banget, tiketnya juga pas banget karna udah termasuk semua spot foto....
english_translation:
A great place for photo spots, especially for selfie and photogenic lovers, TikTokers. There's also live music, it's really nice for singing.....
The voucher exchange for drinks is great, and the ticket is perfect because it already includes all the photo spots....

text: Suka sekali. Areanya luas, asri dan bersih. Koleksi anggreknya luar biasa. Ada live music juga. Menyenangkan berada disini. Dari tempat parkir ada shuttle yang siap mengantar kita ke area hutan anggrek. Banyak spot foto yang tentu saja instagramable.
english_translation: Love it. The area is spacious, beautiful, and clean. The orchid collection is amazing. There's also live music. It's enjoyable to be here. From the parking lot, there's a shuttle ready to take us to the orchid forest area. Lots of photo spots that are, of course, Instagrammable.

text: Sebelumnya sempet kesini buat picnic bawa makanan sendiri dan hari ini kesana udah gaboleh bawa makanan sendiri. Toilet ada yang ga ada air sama sekali dan bau. Atraksi wisatanya kurang banget ga ada yang special. Jalan keliling bentar langsung bosan
english_translation: Previously, I came here for a picnic with my own food, and today you're not allowed to bring your own food anymore. Some toilets had no water at all and smelled bad. The attractions were very lacking, nothing special. I walked around for a bit and got bored.

text: Kesini tahun lalu, ternyata lagi erupsi, lagi banyak debu, tapi gapapa sih, ga parah, masih bisa nikmatin pemandangannya. Awlnya kirain nyatu sama kawah putih, ternyata beda wkwkwk. Aku luoa sih tiket masuk nya waktu itu berapa karna dibayarin wkwkwk
english_translation: Came here last year, it turned out to be erupting, there was a lot of dust, but it was okay, not too bad, still able to enjoy the scenery. At first, I thought it was the same as Kawah Putih, but it turned out to be different lol. I forgot how much the entrance ticket was back then because it was paid for lol.

text:
