Hutan masih cukup asri, hanya diatas-cikole, hutannya kalah oleh pengembangan wisata.
HTM hiking-camping tidak terorganisir dgn baik, seperti pungutan liar. Tidak ada tanda tiket dan asuransi. Pos hiking-camping hari Sabtu-Minggu tidak ada yang jaga.
english_translation:
The forest is still quite beautiful, only above Cikole, the forest loses out to tourism development.
Hiking-camping entrance fees are not well-organized, like illegal levies. There are no ticket or insurance signs. The hiking-camping posts are not manned on Saturdays and Sundays.

text:
Tempat nya indah ..pemandangan hutan pinus yang luas serta tumbuhan hijau memanjakan mata
Namun tiket masuknya lumayan terhitung mahal
Tiket masuk perorang 40.000 biaya aduransi perhutani atau apa ya saya lupa 7.000 parkir motor 5000 dan mobil 10.000
english_translation:
The place is beautiful.. the view of the vast pine forest and green plants is a treat for the eyes.
However, the entrance ticket is quite expensive.
Entrance ticket per person is 40,000, a forestry administration fee or something, I forgot, 7,000, motorcycle parking is 5,000, and car parking is 10,000.

text: Tempat wisata kuliner yang beragam. Banyak wahana pilihan untuk keluarga tentunya ramah anak dan edukatif. Luangkan waktu khusus untuk kunjungan kemari agar dapat menikmati setiap wahana. Harga tiket yang murah untuk pengalaman berwisata yang menarik
english_translation: A diverse culinary tourist destination. Many ride options for families, of course child-friendly and educational. Set aside special time for a visit here to enjoy every ride. Cheap ticket prices for an interesting tourist experience.

text: Harga tiket masuk pada 2022 ini tergolong murah yakni sebesar 30k bisa ditukarkan dengan minuman yang telah disebar di beberapa titik. Selain itu, tempat ini memiliki view yang bagus. Arena bermain juga cukup beragam. Semoga ke depan lebih baik lagi.
english_translation: The entrance ticket price this year, 2022, is considered cheap, costing 30k, which can be exchanged for drinks distributed at several points. Additionally, this place has a good view. The play area is also quite diverse. Hopefully, it will be even better in the future.

text: Bismillaah MaashaaAllah tabarrakalloh.....tempat nya sangat asri....kalo sudah d dekat air terjun suami sampai  betah berlama lama.warung  juga ada kalo d bawah harganya pas lah tidak terlalu mahal ,kalo pas mau naik subhanallah hah heh hoh capek 😁 …
english_translation: In the name of Allah, whatever Allah has willed, blessed is Allah..... the place is very beautiful and natural.... when near the waterfall, my husband stays for a long time. There are also stalls below and the prices are reasonable, not too expensive. When it's time to go up, Subhanallah, puff puff pant, so tired 😁 …

text:
Tempat nya asyik.. sejuk.. udaranya bersih..
Harga terjangkau.. untuk outbond pas banget..
Akses dr jalan raya kurang bagus.. tapi visa masuk lewat villa istana bunga buat yg tau aja..
Masjid enak.. ada warung warung di depan, gakan susah cari makan..
english_translation:
The place is nice.. cool.. the air is clean..
Affordable prices.. perfect for outbound activities..
Access from the main road isn't great.. but you can enter via Villa Istana Bunga if you know how..
The mosque is good.. there are small shops in front, so you won't have trouble finding food..

text:
tempat yang nyaman tuk ajak anak2 lebih dekat dengan alam,d tunjang dengan pemandangan yang menyejukkan mata.
pemandangan yang indah,tempat camping yang enak juga karena ada d kaki gunung burangrang.pokoknya ga nyesel kalo kita ke bukit senyum cipada.
english_translation: A comfortable place to take children closer to nature, supported by eye-pleasing scenery. Beautiful views, a great camping spot too because it's at the foot of Mount Burangrang. You definitely won't regret it if you go to Bukit Senyum Cipada.

text: Spot fotonya bagus-bagus kereeenn...  Tiap lokasi bayar lagi... Taapii nanti kuponnya bisa buat beli makan di situ juga. Bisa lihat bandung.. Ada buat anak - anak outbond.. Lengkap lah.. Dan selalu ramai apalagi weekend.. Harus ke sini lah pokoknya...
english_translation: The photo spots are great and cool... Each location costs extra... But the coupons can be used to buy food there too. You can see Bandung.. There's outbound for kids.. It's complete.. And it's always crowded, especially on weekends.. You definitely have to come here...

text: Tempat yang enak untuk nongkrong dan bersantai. Ada aneka makanan khas tradisional, aneka permainan dan wahana, juga pemandangan yang bagus. Banyak spot2 foto yang menarik dan indah. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk wisata dengan pasangan dan keluarga :)
english_translation: A great place to hang out and relax. There are various traditional signature dishes, various games and rides, as well as beautiful scenery. Lots of interesting and beautiful photo spots. Highly recommended for a trip with your partner and family :)

text: Tempatnya sejuk, pemandanganya bagus banget, parkiran Luas, penjulanya ramah2 memberikan information gratis tentang objek, membantu foto Dan spot gratis, masuknya ticket 35rb/orang, 30rb mobil, lebih bagus klu kesana sebelum jam 9pagi, atau sore jam 4
english_translation: The place is cool, the view is very good, the parking lot is spacious, the vendors are friendly and provide free information about the object, help with photos, and free spots. The entrance fee is 35,000 IDR/person, 30,000 IDR/car. It's better to go before 9 AM, or in the afternoon around 4 PM.

text:
T4nya kemping kekinian yg seru.. mw glamping ato kemping tenda pun ada.. lokasi api unggun pun luas tuk nampung bnyk orang..
Kamar luas n bersih, ada air hangat yg terpenting krn super dingin areanya. Fast respon dr pelayanan n menu sarapan yg enak2..
english_translation:
Modern and fun camping spot... Whether you want glamping or tent camping, both are available... The bonfire area is also spacious enough to accommodate many people.
The room is spacious and clean, with hot water, which is the most important thing because the area is very cold. Fast response from the service and delicious breakfast menu...

text:
Curug tilu yang berada di dalam kawasan CIC, selain curug tilu anda juga bisa ke curug aseupan atau ke wilayah perkemahannya. Untuk curug tilu nya cukup bagus dengan keindahan alam yang bagus pula but kurang banyak tempat untuk beristirahat.
Goodluck^
english_translation: Curug Tilu, located within the CIC area, besides Curug Tilu, you can also visit Curug Aseupan or the camping area. Curug Tilu itself is quite good with beautiful natural scenery, but there aren't many places to rest.

text: Waktu paling pas buat main kesini saat lg Kemarau saya Juni 2018 air lg bening bgt hijau ke biru2an. Karena tracking untuk ke lokasi lumayan disarankan pake sepatu yg tidak licin, ga usah bawa banyak barang disana juga ada warung dan warga nya ramah2.
english_translation: The best time to visit here is during the dry season. I went in June 2018, and the water was very clear, a shade of green turning to blue. Because the trek to the location is quite challenging, it's recommended to wear non-slip shoes. You don't need to bring many things as there are also small shops there, and the locals are very friendly.

text: Menjadi salah satu pilihan destinasi di Lembang Jawa Barat, hanya saja banyak fasilitas di dalamnya harus membeli tiket kembali. Harusnya one stop tiket saja, lebih mudah dan memberikan kenyamanan pengunjung. Contohnya ke toilet saja perlu bayar lagi.
english_translation: Being one of the destination choices in Lembang, West Java, it's just that many facilities inside require an additional ticket purchase. It should be a one-stop ticket, which would be easier and provide more convenience for visitors. For example, even using the toilet requires paying again.

text: Sangat indah Bagus sekali dan pemandangan nya sejuk   nyaman dan Banyak permainan ,, sangat cocok utk anak2 melatih biyar tau  ada pemandam KeBakaran ,Bajak Laut, kaca Lebilin, Docter2an cara Bikin kue ,,, pokokny masih bnyk permain nya sgat memuaskan
english_translation: Very beautiful, very good, and the scenery is cool, comfortable, and there are many games, very suitable for children to practice and learn about firemen, pirates, doctor games, how to make cakes. Anyway, there are still many games, very satisfying.

text:
Harga tiket per Juni 2021 adalah Rp25,000,-. Harga cukup mahal untuk kebun yang tidak terlalu luas. Cukup 10-15 menit selesai eksplorasi semua tempat.
Area parkir tidak luas, kalau penuh harus di lapangan parkir seberang, biaya parkir Rp10,000,-/mobil.
english_translation:
Ticket prices as of June 2021 were Rp25,000. The price is quite expensive for a not-so-large garden. It's enough to finish exploring all the spots in 10-15 minutes.
The parking area is not spacious; if it's full, you have to park in the field across the street. Parking fee is Rp10,000 per car.

text: Untuk jalan jalan hiking recomended banget lah,masih ga rame,udara msh bersih,ada tujuan sampe di puncaknya,melewati rumah penduduk n.kebun kebun,sangat bagus untuk refresh mata,pikiran n bs sambil duduk dl kalo kecapean ditengah jalan krn bnyk rumput2
english_translation: Highly recommended for hiking trips, it's still not crowded, the air is still clean, there's a destination to reach the peak, passing by residents' houses and gardens, it's very good for refreshing the eyes and mind and you can sit for a while if you get tired along the way because there are many grassy areas.

text: Akses jalannya bisa untuk mobil cuman  jalannya jelek trus ada pungutan biyaya dri warga sekitar dan trus bayar tiket lgi ntr. buat yg suka selfie ini tmpt cocok bgt lah cmn hati hati soalnya disini bebatuan semua . disini cocok banget buat liat sunset
english_translation: The road is accessible by car, but the road is bad, then there's a fee collected from the locals, and then you have to pay for a ticket again. For those who like to take selfies, this place is very suitable, just be careful because it's all rocky here. This place is very suitable for watching the sunset.

text:
Tempatnya keren sih. Viewnya bagus, Asri banget, harga makanan2 di floating marketnya juga terjangkau. Beli nya pakai koin yang dibeli di penukaran uang. Menyenangkan. 😊

Kemarin kesana naik taxi Bluebird dari Bandung Kota cuma habis 80 ribuan. Nyaman.
english_translation:
The place is cool. The view is good, very lush, and the food prices at the floating market are also affordable. You buy things using coins purchased at the money exchange. It's fun. 😊

Yesterday I went there by Bluebird taxi from Bandung city and it only cost around 80,000. Comfortable.

text:
Indahnya.. sejuknya dipagi hari dan sore hari..ada  musik live , Sepuasnya Bermain Dan Berfoto2, jgn lupa bawa air minum dan makanan sendiri..
Pazalnya didalam kafe d standmobile harganya "WoW"untuk kelas menengah atas. Kecuali punya fulus lebih... 🤭 …
english_translation:
Beautiful.. cool in the morning and afternoon.. there's live music, Play and take photos to your heart's content, don't forget to bring your own drinks and food..
The prices at the mobile stands inside the cafe are "Wow" for the upper middle class. Unless you have extra cash... 🤭

text: Permainan yang bagus untuk pergi bersama keluarga dan teman (tanpa lansia). Bukit yang asyik untuk didaki dengan rute yang relatif mudah bahkan untuk anak-anak diatas 8-9 tahun. Jangan membawa bayi atau balita karena Anda akan kesulitan merawat mereka
english_translation: A great game to go with family and friends (without the elderly). A fun hill to climb with a relatively easy route even for children over 8-9 years old. Do not bring babies or toddlers as you will have difficulty taking care of them

text:
Akses menuju kesana memang aga jauh dri kota.
Sebelum menuju kesana bakal "dipalak" sama warga (karna akses kesana hrs melewati rumah warga dulu)
Akses jalan msh berbatu belom aspal,jalan msh "rusak"

But,ketika sampe atas pemandangan cukup terbayarkan
english_translation:
The access there is quite far from the city.
Before getting there, you'll be "shaken down" by the residents (because access requires passing through their houses).
The road access is still rocky, not asphalted, and still "damaged."

But, when you reach the top, the view is quite rewarding.

text: jarak tempuh gowes dari bandung tidak jauh melalui jalan Raya Bandung -  Cianjur. Sedikit macet di cimareme padalarang tapi terobati dengan suguhan pemandangan di stone garden yang merupakan bekas penggalian batu kapur dan marmer padalarang yg terkenal
english_translation: The cycling distance from Bandung is not far via the Bandung - Cianjur highway. There's a bit of traffic in Cimareme Padalarang but it's compensated by the scenic views at Stone Garden, which is a former quarry of the famous Padalarang limestone and marble.

text: Tempatnya recommended banget buat kalian yang mau cari udara segar dan ingin memanjakan mata Anda,, hanya saja harus di pastikan menyiapkan kesehatan nya ya guys untuk menempuh jalan ke curugnya butuh perjuangan dan kehati hatian tapi ga akan nyesel ko
english_translation: This place is highly recommended for those of you looking for fresh air and wanting to spoil your eyes. Just be sure to prepare your health, guys, because reaching the waterfall requires effort and caution, but you won't regret it.

text:
Subhanallah... Jalan jalan puasa sambil ngabuburit itu luar biasa , ttp ibadah . Meski panas ..
Stone Garden Citatah rekomen buat piknik di Bandung barat , menyajikan manora alam yg menarik .. Masi bnyk monyet monyet di sana yg Masi bnyk di temukan ....
english_translation:
Subhanallah... Walking around during fasting while waiting for iftar is extraordinary, it's still worship. Even though it's hot...
Stone Garden Citatah is recommended for picnics in West Bandung, presenting interesting natural scenery.. There are still many monkeys there that are still commonly found....

text:
Tempat yang bagus dengan tempat yang bagus untuk mengambil gambar
Di sekitar tempat ini ada kafe dan taman bermain
Juga ada bus antar jemput untuk membawa semua tamu ke sini karena tempat ini menuruni bukit
Cuaca bagus juga
Tempat ini tutup jam 8 malam
english_translation:
A great place with a great spot for taking pictures
Around this place, there are cafes and a playground
There's also a shuttle bus to bring all the guests here because this place is downhill
The weather is also good
This place closes at 8 PM

text: Wisata alam yg bagus, wonderfull, tiket gak begitu mahal, banyak yg jualan sovenir khas Bandung yg murah tapi bagus seperti tas, sepatu, topi, kaos, makanan tradisional, dll, ada kendaraan khusus dari area parkir ke atas, udara sejuk....puasss pokoknya.
english_translation: Great natural attractions, wonderful, tickets not too expensive, many selling cheap but good souvenirs typical of Bandung like bags, shoes, hats, t-shirts, traditional food, etc., there are special vehicles from the parking area to the top, cool air... totally satisfying.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata keluarga di bandung yang bisa di jadikan pilihan, dengan banyak aktivitas wisata seperti bermain air, naik perahu, belajar mengenal satwa dan ada juga pasar terapung yang menjual berbagai makanan khas daerah yang tentu saja enak
english_translation: One of the family tourist attractions in Bandung that can be an option, with many tourist activities such as playing in the water, boating, learning about animals, and there is also a floating market selling various local specialty foods that are of course delicious.

text: Suka bangett, glamping ke sini pas acara kantor, enak sejuk suasananya, kamar juga dibersihin tiap hari, ada air panasnya, pemandangannya sih yang juara, banyak banget spot buat foto-fotonya, baru pulang sehari udah rindu aja nih pengen balik lagii hehe
english_translation: Absolutely love it, went glamping here for a company event, the atmosphere was nice and cool, the room was cleaned daily, there was hot water, and the view was the absolute best. So many spots for photos, I've only been back a day and I'm already missing it and want to come back again hehe

text:
Sangat mengagumkan. Akses jalan sangat bagus,kebersihan sangat terjaga berkat managemen dan pengunjung yang sadar akan kebersihan obyek wisata.
Parkir mobil dan motor bisa sampai depan kawah ratu. Bus harus parkir dan melanjutkan pakai angkutan khusus..
english_translation:
Very amazing. Road access is very good, cleanliness is well maintained thanks to management and visitors who are aware of the cleanliness of the tourist attraction.
Car and motorcycle parking can go up to the front of the Ratu crater. Buses must park and continue using special transportation.

text: Datang saat hujan. Bahkan tempat pengambilan tiket parkir pun tdk ada atapnya. Di dlm pun tdk ada jalan setapak yg beratap. Praktis tdk bisa ke mana2 saat hujan. Dlm restoran ada kucing berkeliaran, meminta2 makan dan naik ke meja. Sungguh tdk higienis.
english_translation: Arrived during the rain. Even the parking ticket booth has no roof. Inside, there are no covered walkways. Practically impossible to go anywhere during the rain. Cats roam inside the restaurant, begging for food and jumping onto tables. It's truly unhygienic.

text: Tempat rekreasi keluar, cocok untuk anak kecil, banyak kegiatan yang bisa dilakukan disni, butuh seharian sih untuk ngelilingin lokasi disini. Untuk jajanannya agak pricey ya, harus pinter milih makanan biar gak dpt zonk harga mahal tapi gak enak wkwkkw
english_translation: An outdoor recreational place, suitable for small children, with many activities to do. It takes a whole day to explore the entire place. The snacks are a bit pricey, so you have to be smart about choosing your food to avoid getting ripped off with expensive but not-so-tasty options, lol.

text:
Cuaca sangat sejuk,udara segerrr
Tapi sayang,banyak orang merokok

english_translation:
The weather is very cool, the air is so fresh.
But unfortunately, many people are smoking.
There should be a "no smoking" announcement, even outdoors, it disturbs other people's comfort.
As for the access road, it's disastrous, please the road management fix it!

text: Karena pemandangan nya yg alami dan air yg tidak terlalu deras dan batuan batuan yg tinggi besar mengelilingi nya membuat banyak pengunjung yg datang,dgn bajet yg tidak terlalu mahal menurut saya sangat cocok untuk para wisatawan khusus nya para remaja.
english_translation: Because of its natural scenery, not-too-strong currents, and the tall, large rocks surrounding it, many visitors come. With a budget that isn't too expensive, in my opinion, it's very suitable for tourists, especially teenagers.

text: Suka banget sama suasana di sini. Udaranya sejuk, semua pemandangannya bikin hati teduh. Banyak banget spot bagus buat duduk2 sama foto2. Rasanya kurang puas kalo habisin waktu di sini hanya 2-3 jam aja, karena memang suasanya itu loh memang bikin betah.
english_translation: I really love the atmosphere here. The air is cool, and all the scenery is so calming. There are so many good spots to sit and take photos. It feels unsatisfying to spend only 2-3 hours here because the atmosphere really makes you want to stay.

text: Pernah denger dunk klo Bandung dulunya danau purba. Nah batu2an di sini bentuknya menyerupai koral2 yang ada di dalam lautan. Klo turun ke bawah tar nembusnya ke situs Gua Pawon. Aksesnya bisa hiking (hati2 curam) atau pakai kendaraan (lewat jalan raya).
english_translation: Have you heard that Bandung was once an ancient lake? The rocks here are shaped like corals found in the ocean. If you go down, you'll eventually reach the Pawon Cave site. You can access it by hiking (be careful, it's steep) or by vehicle (via the main road).

text: Tempatnya bersih banget,Sangat menyenangkan dan memuaskan,dan yang paling aku suka adalah keunikan di floating market yaitu jika ingin membeli makanan disana harus pakai koin,dan ada banyak sekali spot foto yang nyentrik gak kalah sama yang di luar-luar.
english_translation: The place is very clean, very pleasant and satisfying, and what I liked most was the uniqueness at the floating market, which is that you have to use coins to buy food there, and there are so many quirky photo spots, no less than those outside.

text: Penginapan dengan tema resort ini menjadikannya pengunjung betah untuk berlama lama menginap disini, penginapan dengan nuansa hutan pinus ditambah spot foto sesuai tema dan lahan untuk oubound cocok bagi rombongan menginap disini bahkan tamu keluarga 😍 …
english_translation: This resort-themed accommodation makes visitors feel at home and want to stay longer. With a pine forest ambiance, themed photo spots, and space for outbound activities, it's perfect for groups staying here, even for family guests 😍...

text: Beautiful place...pemandangannya bagus banget, apalagi kalo kesana tp lagi mendung lebih enak lagi, tapi kalo udah hujan dinginnya masyaallah..Gak bakalan krasa jalan naik turun krn setiap langkah mata kita termanjakan betapa dahsyatnya lukisan Tuhan😄😄 …
english_translation: Beautiful place... the scenery is really good, especially if you go there when it's cloudy, it's even more pleasant. But if it's raining, the cold is incredible... You won't feel the uphill and downhill walk because with every step, our eyes are captivated by the magnificence of God's painting 😄😄 …

text: Gunung yang cocok untuk buat pendaki pemula, karena medannya bersahabat ga begitu terjal, atau yg bukan pendaki gunung seperti saya tetep bisa nikmati Gunung Putri ini, fasilitasnya ada toilet, musholla, di bawah pas pintu masuk pun banyak warung-warung.
english_translation: A mountain suitable for beginner hikers, as the terrain is friendly and not too steep, so even those who are not mountain climbers like me can still enjoy Gunung Putri. Facilities include toilets and a prayer room, and there are many food stalls right at the entrance below.

text: Cocok buat keluarga... Harga makan relatif murah... Kupon bisa tukar minuman... Cocok juga buat foto2.. Cuaca nya adem... Bisa beli makanan ikan buat kasi ikan makan... Harus dicoba naik sampan nya seruuuu dan sangat berkesan buat kami sekeluarga 👍👍👍👍👍 …
english_translation: Great for families... Food prices are relatively cheap... Coupons can be exchanged for drinks... Also good for taking photos... The weather is cool... You can buy fish food to feed the fish... You must try the sampan ride, it's fun and very memorable for our whole family 👍👍👍👍👍 …

text: Tempat yang oke untuk foto foto cantik bersama kerabat. Banyak referensi jenis-jenis bunga, bisa dibeli juga. Kalau lewat maribaya sekalian mampir kesini. Harga tiket masuknya murah, cuman kalo bawa kamera kena charge lagi jadi pake handphone aja deh 😬 …
english_translation: An okay place for taking beautiful photos with relatives. Lots of flower references, can also be bought. If you're passing by Maribaya, drop by here. The entrance ticket price is cheap, but if you bring a camera, there's an extra charge, so just use your phone 😬…

text:
Hotel dan penginapan, Tempat team building dan wisata yg bagus buat keluarga maupun kantor.
View tempat nya bagus pondokan di dalam hutan pinus, Banyak outond flying fox dll.
Harga murah , ada kambing guling, dan resto untuk breakfast nya juga enak banget
english_translation:
Hotels and accommodations, Great team building and tour destinations for families and offices.
The place has a good view, cottages in the pine forest, lots of outdoor activities like flying fox, etc.
Cheap prices, there's roasted goat, and the breakfast resto is also very delicious.

text: Htm 20 weekday, grtis air mineral, klu g sm es podeng dng nmbh 5rb,,tp super mini podengny 2x suap j abis🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️,,, tmpt sejuk, pmndngn bgus, hrga mknnn terjangkau,, msih proses pmbngunan,, naik prahu 15/org,,, next lbh bnyk lg whana main/poto ny ya,,, …
english_translation: 20k weekdays, free mineral water, if you want ice cream it's an additional 5k, but the super mini ice cream is gone in 2 bites 🤦‍♀️🤦‍♀️,,, cool place, good view, affordable food prices,, still under construction,, boat ride is 15k/person,,, hope to have more rides/photo spots next time ya,,, …

text: Lumayan untuk merefresh fikiran, jarak lumayan dekat dari kota Bandung, dengan masuk tiket yang terjangkau, hanya saja disyangkan di jalan desa ada yang meminta sumbangan, mungkin pungli untuk perbaikan jalan katanya, tapi jalan nya juga tetap saja jelek,
english_translation: Decent for refreshing the mind, quite close to Bandung city, with an affordable entrance ticket, it's just a shame that on the village road there were people asking for donations, maybe an illegal levy for road repairs they said, but the road was still bad anyway.

text:
Setelah 2 tahun tidak kesini lagi, sudah banyak yang berubah, dari tempat dan jenis makanannya bertambah macam2. Permainan Air nya juga menarik, ada seperti naik Perahu besar layaknya menjadi Crew One Piece :)

Recommended: Rainbow Slider, One Piece Boat.
english_translation:
After 2 years of not coming here, much has changed, from the place to the variety of food options which has increased. The Water Games are also interesting, there's like riding a big Boat as if you were a One Piece Crew :)

Recommended: Rainbow Slider, One Piece Boat.

text: Untuk akses ke gunung putri lumayan penuh perjuangan, apalagi bawa sepeda, di puncak gunung putri pemandangannya keren seluruh kota garut bisa terlihat, tidak disarankan pergi ketika hari hujan atau mendung. Untuk fasilitas ada Toilet dan ada warung juga.
english_translation: To access Mount Putri is quite a struggle, especially when carrying a bicycle. At the summit of Mount Putri, the view is cool; the entire city of Garut can be seen. It is not recommended to go when it's raining or cloudy. For facilities, there are toilets and a small shop.

text: Geger bintang matahari yg berlokasi di lembang Jawa Barat tepatnya di gunung putri, adalah tempat wisata yang baik indah pemandangannya dan sejuk tempatnya "pas buat liburan bareng keluarga" dan cocok untuk melepas lelah selama bekerja. Bye:Iqbal Hendrian
english_translation: The Geger Bintang Matahari located in Lembang, West Java, specifically in Gunung Putri, is a good tourist spot with beautiful scenery and a cool atmosphere. It's "perfect for a holiday with family" and suitable for relieving fatigue from work. Bye: Iqbal Hendrian

text: Mantap. Wow bisa keliling dunia hanya beberapa jam. Harga sepadan dengan yg dilihat. Lewati jembatan gantung bayar per orang 15k dan mendapat passport yg akan dicap di setiap negara.dan passport yg sudah dicap bisa ditukar/dapat potongan harga merchandise
english_translation: Awesome. Wow, you can travel the world in just a few hours. The price is worth what you see. Crossing the suspension bridge costs 15k per person and you get a passport that will be stamped in each country. The stamped passport can be exchanged for or get a discount on merchandise.

text: Ok banget sih! Bersih dan terawat. Banyak spot foto lucu juga yg bikin dia beda sama hutan pinus lainnya. Ada shuttle juga untuk kembali ke tempat parkir. Harga tiket masuk standar, tapi sayang ada bbrp spot di dalam yg kalo mau masuk harus bayar lagi 😅 …
english_translation: Really good! Clean and well-maintained. Lots of cute photo spots that make it different from other pine forests. There's also a shuttle to get back to the parking lot. The entrance ticket price is standard, but unfortunately there are some spots inside that require an additional payment to enter 😅 …

text:
tempat yang pas untuk kegiatan berkelompok seperti family gathering, employee gathering, dll.

arena outbond luas, paket sudah termasuk makan siang, tapi tempat jajan juga tersedia.

sayang mushola nya kecil, ada masjid tapi cukup jauh ke tempat parkiran.
english_translation:
The perfect place for group activities such as family gatherings, employee gatherings, etc.

Spacious outdoor arena, package includes lunch, but snack stalls are also available.

Unfortunately, the prayer room is small, and there is a mosque but it's quite far from the parking lot.

text: Izin lintasan 10 ribu, parkir mobil 7 ribu , dan tiker perorang 8 ribu , di wilayah stone garden ada jembatan gantung indiana camp namun dikenai tiket 10 ribu, untuk pemandangan di stone garden banyak spot yang bisa dituju, silahkan ambil foto sepuasnya ,
english_translation: Permit for passage 10 thousand, car parking 7 thousand, and per-person ticket 8 thousand. In the Stone Garden area, there is the Indiana Camp suspension bridge, but it costs 10 thousand to enter. For the scenery in Stone Garden, there are many spots you can go to. Please take as many photos as you like.

text:
Tempat Wisata yang Sejuk dengan rute turunan dan tanjakan yang berkelok dan panjang, namun tidak begitu ekstrem.

Sangat melelahkan kalau perjalanan pulang gak makan dulu untuk energi. Lumayan banyak menu makanan yang disajikan di pinggir area wisata ini.
english_translation:
A cool tourist spot with winding and long downhill and uphill routes, but not too extreme.

It's quite tiring if you don't eat to refuel for the journey back. There are quite a lot of food menus served along the edge of this tourist area.

text:
Luar biasa luas layaknya hutan , hijau ,segar ,banyak bunga dan pohon besar tapi hutan yg sdh ditata jd aman dan ramah buat pengunjung ,ada beberapa koleksi binatang jg .

Incredibly vast like a forest, green, fresh, with many flowers and big trees, but it's a well-maintained forest, making it safe and friendly for visitors. There are also some animal collections.
Oh yeah, I came here in November last year, so these photos are also from November last year, guys.
👍👍👍👍

text: Bagus tempatnya cm kaya bird park dll masih dlm perbaikan..tempat bagus.. Makanan di taste of cikole lumayan enak harga jg ga terlalu mahal... Ada resort jg.. Mungkin next time klo dah selesai perbaikan bisa nginep sekalian review tempat yg lagi di benerin
english_translation: The place is nice, but things like the bird park are still under renovation. The place is good. The food at Taste of Cikole is quite delicious, and the price isn't too expensive either. There's also a resort. Maybe next time, when the renovations are finished, I can stay and review the places that are being fixed up.

text: mantap tempatnya tiket masuk murah 10rb/orang parkir motor 5rb rupiah saja. tempatnya adem, pemandangan indah buat melepas stress rekomended banget. cuman jalan ke lokasinya aja butuh sedikit usaha karena off-road banget jalanya kecil menanjak dan berkelok
english_translation: Great place, cheap entrance ticket for 10,000 rupiah per person, motorcycle parking only 5,000 rupiah. The place is cool, beautiful scenery to relieve stress, highly recommended. Only the road to the location requires a bit of effort because it's very off-road, the road is small, uphill, and winding.

text: Tempatnya bagus, keren, cma sayang petunjuk arah di pinggir jalan gk terlihat, jd kita sempet nyasar krna gtw belokannya.. Jalannya juga hrs d perbaiki rusak parah batunya gede" sempit,, tiket masuk murah 5rb/org malah lebih mahal tiket masuk kendaraannya.
english_translation: The place is nice, cool, too bad the roadside signs aren't visible, so we got lost because we didn't know the turn. The road also needs to be repaired, it's severely damaged, the rocks are big and narrow. The entrance ticket is cheap, 5 thousand per person, but the vehicle entrance ticket is more expensive.

text: Sangat keren sekali pemandangan disana, cuman agak panas sih kalo siang hari.. Ada tempat buat neduh tapi belum banyak, sarannya agak banyakan buat tempat untuk neduhnya. Soalnya yg masuk makin banyak, dan biar yang masuk kalo mau berteduh ga harus gantian
english_translation: The view there is really cool, it's just a bit hot during the day. There are places to take shelter but not many yet, so it's suggested to have more spots for shade. Because more and more people are coming in, and so that those who come in don't have to take turns if they want to take shelter.

text: Pemandangan alamnya bagus, hawanya sejuk banget, tempat parkir luas, para pemandu wisatanya ramah dan sopan menjelaskan seluk beluk ttg tangkuban parahu serta siap membantu wisatawan yg datang ke sana.....kami mengunjugi tempat itu 2 minggu sebelum meletus
english_translation: The natural scenery is good, the air is very cool, the parking lot is spacious, the tour guides are friendly and polite, explaining the ins and outs of Tangkuban Perahu and ready to help tourists who come there..... we visited the place 2 weeks before it erupted

text: It was fun 😍 tempat ini luasss jadi bisa jalan sampe capek.. kalau laper bisa makan ngemil minum di area floating marketnya.. jajan nya harus pake koin tapi gak bisa refund jadi harus itung2an dulu mau beli apa aja.. tiket masuk 30k/orang dan 10k/mobil.. …
english_translation: It was fun 😍 This place is so spacious, you can walk until you're tired.. if you're hungry, you can eat snacks and drinks at the floating market area. You have to use coins to buy things and they can't be refunded, so you have to calculate beforehand what you want to buy.. entrance ticket is 30k/person and 10k/car.. ...

text:
Gunung Putri adalah tempat bagi para org yang ga mau cape kalau mau naek gunung tapi pengen liat pemandangan yang amazing

Bandung dari sini keliatan super duper edan lah keren pisan

Tempat camping enakeun

Semua berasa bagus lah walapun harus nanjak dulu
english_translation:
Gunung Putri is a place for people who don't want to get too tired when hiking but want to see amazing views.

Bandung looks incredibly, unbelievably cool from here.

A comfortable camping spot.

Everything feels good, even though you have to hike up first.

text: Beberapa tahun nggak kesini sudah banyak berubah dan tertata lebih rapi. Sudah ada masjid, kamar mandi lebih banyak dan gazebo yang akan jadi tempat pertemuan atau acara. Sekarang juga cukup bersih dan sudah ada beberapa tempat bermain khususnya buat anak.
english_translation: It's been several years since I've been here, and it's changed a lot and is more organized. There's now a mosque, more bathrooms, and gazebos that will be used for meetings or events. It's also quite clean now and there are several play areas, especially for children.

text: Waktu itu sedang ada trip ke sekitaran sana, dan penumpang saya pengen ke sana dan pas ke sana memang masyaallohh tempatnya 🤩 saran sihhh pagi atau sore hari, supaya tidak terlalu panas, saya ke sana pas jam 1 siang jadi panas dan hasil fotonya kurang hehe
english_translation: At that time, there was a trip around there, and my passenger wanted to go there, and when we got there, it was truly amazing, the place 🤩 my suggestion is to go in the morning or afternoon, so it's not too hot. I went there around 1 PM so it was hot and the photo results were not great hehe

text: Lokasi sangat luas, banyak spot foto yg bagus dan parkiran juga luas. Sebelum kesini harus siap jalan kaki lumayan jauh karena memang lokasi nya luas. Saya paling suka tempat memberi makan kelinci. Krn kelincinya sangat terawat, jadi bulu nya lembut banget
english_translation: The location is very spacious, with many good photo spots and a large parking area. Before coming here, you need to be prepared to walk quite a distance because the location is indeed vast. I love the rabbit feeding area the most. Because the rabbits are very well-groomed, their fur is very soft.

text: tempat udah bagus asri, dingin. tapi tolong dong pengunjung yang kesana, sampahnya jgn ditinggal klen jgn cuma bisa nyampah aja....biasain bawa trash bag, buat sampah klen. Bagi pengelola tolong pasang banyak" plang buat dilarang buat sampah sembarangan...
english_translation: The place is already nice, green, and cool. But please, visitors who go there, don't leave your trash. You shouldn't just be able to litter... Get used to bringing trash bags for your garbage. For the management, please install more signs prohibiting littering...

text:
Nice placeeeee. Sejuk adem. Cocok buat keluarga maupun rombongan. Bisa outobund, flying fox, metik stoberi, ada penginapannya, dan cocok untuk foto-foto. Kalau mau piknik, barbequean, camp. Cocok banget.
Masuk gratis, di dalam ada yang jualan makanan juga.
english_translation:
Nice placeeeee. Cool and refreshing. Suitable for families or groups. Can do outbound, flying fox, pick strawberries, there's lodging, and it's good for taking photos. If you want to picnic, barbecue, camp. Very suitable.
Free entry, there are also food vendors inside.

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata di Lembang Bandung dengan tiket yang free minuman boleh juga jadi wishlist untuk liburan bareng keluarga atau teman2 yang bikin asik sih kalo aku rainbow slide lumayan tinggi juga and aman tiket 30k plus kalo mo save potonya 10k
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations in Lembang Bandung with free drinks can also be a wishlist for holidays with family or friends. What makes it fun, for me, is the rainbow slide, which is quite high and safe, with a ticket price of 30k, plus if you want to save your photos, it's 10k.

text: Menikmati unik nya batu2 yg muncuk begiyu sajjah dr dlm tanah konon katanya dulu disana bekas pantai karna batu yg ada pin mirip batu2 karang atau memang batu karang ya..coba aja berkunjung ..dtang lah di sore hari biar cantik hasil jepretan selfienya😊😊✌ …
english_translation: Enjoying the uniqueness of the rocks that just pop out of the ground. It's said that this used to be a beach because the rocks there resemble coral rocks, or maybe they really are coral rocks. Just try visiting. Come in the afternoon so your selfie photos will be beautiful 😊😊✌

text: Wisata Alam pegunungan Tangkuban Prahu, merupakan wisata alam yang menabjubkan, udara yang sejuk berkabut, mempunyai warna hijau di kawahnya, menurut legenda pendusuk setempat, dulunya kawah ini memiliki hubungan dengan cerita sangkuriang dan dayang sumbi.
english_translation: Tangkuban Prahu Mountain Natural Tourism, is an amazing natural attraction, with cool, misty air, and a green color in its crater, according to local legend, this crater used to have a connection with the story of Sangkuriang and Dayang Sumbi.

text: Salah satu taman bunga terbaik di daerah Lembang, terdapat berbagai macam bunga, apabila datang ke tempat ini disarankan dipagi hari karena bunganya terlihat masih sangat segar, sehingga bagus untuk dijadikan tempat berfoto bersama keluarga maupun pasangan
english_translation: One of the best flower gardens in the Lembang area, it has a wide variety of flowers. It is recommended to visit in the morning as the flowers look very fresh, making it a great place for photos with family or a partner.

text: Untuk buang suntuk lepas beban pikiran, recomended banget ini untuk liburan sama keluarga dan teman teruntuk pendaki untuk pemula cocok banget ini. Dan pemandangan gak kalah bagus, lembang kelihatan dari atas semua. Bersyukur pernah ke tempat ini tempat🚩 …
english_translation: To relieve boredom and burdens of the mind, this is highly recommended for a vacation with family and friends, especially for beginner hikers, it's perfect. And the scenery is just as beautiful, Lembang is visible from above. Grateful to have visited this place 🚩...

text: Bosan dengan kepenatan kota. coba ke cikole bnyak pemainan dan bsa menginap disini. Mau mkan bsa harga mkan terjaungkau tiket juga bisa di tukar makan atau permainan ya gengs.. Mau acara getring pas bgt dsni. Tmpat teduh aman dan berkumpul dngan bahagia😉 …
english_translation: Tired of the city's exhaustion. Try Cikole, there are many games and you can stay here. You can eat at affordable prices, and tickets can also be exchanged for food or games, guys. If you want to have a gathering event, this is the perfect place. A shady, safe place to gather happily 😉…

text: Pertama kali kesini. Tempat wisata yg bagus di bandung. Daerah nya dingin, adem, rame pengunjung, Tempatnya luas banyak spot foto foto dan view yg bagus. Banyak jajanan dijual di atas sampan, dan juga bisa sewa boat atau sampan utk mengelilingi kawasan tsb.
english_translation: First time here. A good tourist spot in Bandung. The area is cold, cool, crowded with visitors, the place is spacious with many photo spots and good views. Many snacks are sold on boats, and you can also rent boats to go around the area.

text: Pertama kesini bingung bgt harus lewat mana. Ga ada petunjuk yg jelas. Tp seru bgt sih buat nyampe kesini. Lewat2 hutan, sungai, batu2an. Selama perjalanan agak sepi, cuma ada beberapa org yg lagi mancing. Tp pas nyampe ternyata banyak orang yg lg berenang.
english_translation: First time here, was really confused about which way to go. There were no clear directions. But it was really fun to get here. Went through the forest, river, and rocks. It was quite deserted on the way, only a few people were fishing. But upon arrival, there were many people swimming.

text: Catching sunrise tp nginepnya di kota. Brangkat jam 3 pagi dari kota bandung. Titik sesuai map. Dijamin ga macet kalo jam 3. Gampang naiknya, ga begitu jauh dari parkiran. City car masih bisa naik, ga begitu terjal jalannya. Kereen. Best view pas summer ya.
english_translation: Catching the sunrise, staying in the city. Departing at 3 AM from Bandung city. Meeting point as per map. Guaranteed no traffic if you leave at 3 AM. Easy to climb, not too far from the parking lot. City cars can still make it, the road isn't too steep. Awesome. Best view during summer.

text:
Tempat instargramable di jawa barat .. HTM cuman 5k
View yg ditawarkan keren abis..
Tips hati hati saat naik bukitnya dan .. jika membawa barang bawaan(tas) harap d.simpan dgn baik karena ada banyak monyet yg mengira itu membawa makanan ... selebihnya keren
english_translation:
Instagrammable place in West Java.. Entrance fee is only 5k
The view offered is super cool..
Tips: be careful when climbing the hill and.. if you bring luggage (bags), please keep them well because there are many monkeys that think they are carrying food... otherwise, it's cool

text: Short hiking yg menyenangkan, mudah di capai ke puncak dengan pemandangan yg enao di mata, masuk bayar perborg hanya 10rb, plus parkir mobil 10rb, bisa camping pastinya krn banyak tempat landai ... Jumat dan Sabtu pastinya ramai yg hiking dan yg camping ...
english_translation: A fun short hike, easy to reach the summit with eye-pleasing views. Entrance fee is Rp 10,000 per person, plus Rp 10,000 for car parking. Camping is definitely possible as there are many flat spots. Fridays and Saturdays are definitely crowded with hikers and campers.

text:
Seru banget main disini. Tempat cukup luas. Sangat cocok untuk kegiatan gathering dengan teman kantor. Banyak kegiatan outbound yang bisa dilakukan.

Walaupun sayang, pada akhirnya hujan, jadi tidak bisa explore lebih jauh.

Main flying foxnya bikin nagih!!
english_translation:
It was so fun playing here. The place is quite spacious. It's very suitable for gathering activities with office friends. There are many outbound activities that can be done.

Although it's a shame, it rained in the end, so we couldn't explore further.

Playing the flying fox is addictive!!

text: Tempat wisata yang cantik & menarik banget. Harus luangkan waktu banyak ya utk bisa menikmati semuanya. Tanamannya cantik2 dan byk kegiatan yg bisa dilakukan bersama keluarga. Ada taman, cafe, food court, kelinci, kuda, flying fox, mini golf, dll. Rekomen 👍
english_translation: A very beautiful and interesting tourist spot. You must spend a lot of time to enjoy everything. The plants are beautiful and there are many activities you can do with your family. There's a garden, cafe, food court, rabbits, horses, flying fox, mini golf, etc. Recommended 👍

text: Wonderfull place.... Sejuk, bersih, tenang, dan masih fresh, banyak spot yg menarik buat di lihat, buat swafoto, cocok buat keluarga, dan cukup nyaman juga buat disabilitas atau bawa stroler. Idealnya mmg waktu senja kesini shg lampu2 hiasnya sdh menyala...
english_translation: Wonderful place.... Cool, clean, quiet, and still fresh, many interesting spots to see, for selfies, suitable for families, and also quite comfortable for people with disabilities or those with strollers. Ideally, it's best to come here at dusk when the decorative lights are already on...

text: Sejuk berada di area hutan Pinus, malam hari cuaca dingin, sedia payung atau jas hujan karena siang pun bisa turun hujan. Ada wahana seperti skybridge+gratis flying fox, playground anak Orchid castle dan sesuai nama tempatnya di sini banyak tanaman anggrek.
english_translation: It's cool in the Pine forest area; the weather is cold at night. Bring an umbrella or raincoat because it can rain even during the day. There are attractions like a skybridge + free flying fox, the Orchid Castle children's playground, and as the name suggests, there are many orchid plants here.

text:
Gila dingin banget disini
Sangat tidak rekomen kalo lagi hari libur karna banyak banget orang camping ceria jadi ga nyaman terlalu rame. Tapi sangat cocok ketika sepi codok untuk bertafakur, mengkaji diri sendiri
Parkiran aman kalo mau bawa mobil atau motor
english_translation:
It's really cold here.
Not recommended at all on holidays because there are too many people camping joyfully, making it uncomfortable and too crowded. But it's very suitable when it's quiet and secluded for contemplation, self-reflection.
Parking is safe if you want to bring a car or motorcycle.

text: Tempatnya luaaass,,adem,sejuk,ditambah ada kabut.ahh cocok banget buat refreshing...saran yaa ga boleh bawa makanan dari luar,jadi klo bekel nasi bisa makan diluar ada tempat nyewa tikar.makan sepuasnya sampe kenyang.soalnya klo jajan didalem mhal bingitsss
english_translation: The place is spacioouus,, cool, fresh, plus there's fog. ahh perfect for refreshing... a suggestion, you can't bring food from outside, so if you have a rice lunchbox, you can eat it outside where there are places to rent mats. eat to your heart's content until you're full. because buying food inside is very expensive

text: Spot buat poto" nya keren htm nya cuma 5K parkir motor 2K bisa langsung ke lokasi kalo buat mobil parkir di atas jalan nya deket. Pernah pertama kesini ditutup soalnya aliran air dari bendungan diarahkan ke Sanghyang kenit jd hanya bisa liat dari atas aja .
english_translation: The photo spots are cool, the entrance fee is only 5K, motorcycle parking is 2K, you can go directly to the location. If you're coming by car, park on the street, it's close. The first time I came here, it was closed because the water flow from the dam was directed to Sanghyang Kenit, so I could only see it from above.

text: Curug ini ada dua tempat air terjun, di pintu masuk ada beberapa kedai makanan,begipula di dalam area curug,biaya tiket masuk 25rb/orang dan bisa di tukarkan dengan kue pay/minuman,didalam curug ada beberapa spot foto serta rumah hobbit dan kandang domba...
english_translation: This waterfall has two waterfall spots. At the entrance there are several food stalls, as well as within the waterfall area. The entrance ticket costs 25 thousand per person and can be exchanged for a pie/drink. Inside the waterfall, there are several photo spots, as well as hobbit houses and a sheep pen.

text: Mencari udara seger adanya disini, dikelilingi pohon pinus dan view perkebunan teh, suasana disini sangat sejuk dan udara seger, untuk keluarga dan rombongan untuk menghilangkan rasa lelah dan jenuh tempatnya disini, lingkungan cukup bersih, seperti toilet.
english_translation: Seeking fresh air is here, surrounded by pine trees and tea plantation views, the atmosphere here is very cool and the air is fresh, for families and groups to relieve fatigue and boredom, the place is here, the environment is quite clean, like the toilets.

text: Pemandangannya bagus, asri, awas kalo kalian buang sampah jgn sembarangan yah, love nature, Dan hati2 juga saat selfie karma Ada tempat yg kalo gak  hati2 bisa fatal akibatnya, hati2 tergelincir juga, batu2kecilnya agak tajam2,be careful if take ur children
english_translation: The view is beautiful and lush, be careful not to litter carelessly, love nature, and also be careful when taking selfies because there are places that can be fatal if you're not careful. Be careful of slipping too, the small stones are a bit sharp.

text:
Berlokasi di Desa Cicadas, Gunung Halu, air terjun ini mengalir dalam 5 jalur, menghasilkan pemandangan yang megah dan memikat.

Air terjun ini masih satu rangkaian dengan Curug Katumiri, Manglid, Ngebul, Sumpel, Palisir, dan Pameungpeuk.

Tarif: Rp10.000,00
english_translation:
Located in Cicadas Village, Gunung Halu, this waterfall flows in 5 streams, creating a magnificent and captivating view.

This waterfall is still part of the same series as Curug Katumiri, Manglid, Ngebul, Sumpel, Palisir, and Pameungpeuk.

Entrance Fee: Rp10,000.00

text: Pertama kesini awal pembukaan dan hampir tiap sabtu dan minggu kesini, msh sepi dan sengaja cari hotel yg dkt sini biar minggu paginya bs olah raga disini.. Dan berjalan waktu ternyata tambah rame dan tambah banyak arena lain... Makanan nya pun tambah banyay
english_translation: First came here at the opening and almost every Saturday and Sunday came here, still quiet and intentionally looked for a hotel nearby so that on Sunday mornings could exercise here. And as time went on, it turned out to be more crowded and more other attractions... The food also increased a lot.

text:
11 Juli 2017
Destinasi wisata di Lembang, perlu di tingkatkan sarana wisatanya,  2 jam waktu tempuh dgn jarak 7 KM dari kota Bandung membuat tidak nyaman

28 December 2022
Kedua kali ketempat wisata ini dan sudah banyak perubahan dan penambahan sarana wisata
english_translation:
July 11, 2017
Tourist destinations in Lembang need to improve their tourism facilities; a 2-hour travel time for a distance of 7 KM from Bandung city makes it uncomfortable.

December 28, 2022
Second time at this tourist spot, and there have been many changes and additions to the tourism facilities.

text: Lahan luas, tertata dengan baik, tiket masuk 20.000 bisa ditukar dengan minuman. Harga harga jajanan relatif murah. Recommended banget untuk orang-orang yang lagi berlibur di Bandung. Weekend tidak pernah sepi, malah sering ga kebagian tempat parkir. Mantapp
english_translation: Spacious grounds, well-maintained, entrance ticket of 20,000 can be exchanged for a drink. Snack prices are relatively cheap. Highly recommended for people on vacation in Bandung. Weekends are never quiet, in fact, parking spots are often unavailable. Great!

text: Indah bgt tempatnya, cocok buat rekreasi atau ngecamp ceria bareng keluarga karna tersedia penginapan juga didalam. Kebetulan kemarin kesana pas weekday jadi sepi bgt berasa grafika milik berdua hehe. Dan yang paling buat nyaman staf grafikanya ramah² bgt ☺️
english_translation: The place is very beautiful, suitable for recreation or a cheerful camping trip with family because there are also accommodations inside. Coincidentally, I went there on a weekday, so it was very quiet, felt like Grafika was ours alone hehe. And what made it most comfortable were the very friendly staff at Grafika ☺️

text: Kesana waktu taun 2019 an htm murah terus adem danau nya juga baguss spot foto nya juga bagus cuman waktu kesana lagi masi tahap pembangunan yaa tapi tetep bagus ada nuansa ala ala bali nya juga hehehe recomended temen2 juga udah saya rekomenin datang kesana
english_translation: There in 2019, the entrance fee was cheap, it was cool, the lake was also nice, the photo spots were also good. It was still under construction when I went, but it was still good, it had a Bali vibe too, hehehe. Recommended, I've already recommended it to my friends to come here.

text: Ini tempat meuni "Wa'as" kalo bahasa sundanya, hehe.. biasa dipakai prewedding juga, angin nya sejuk karena di dataran tinggi, cuma ada banyak monyet liar disana.. tapi cukup aman kok, hanya saja untuk lebih berhati hati dan diusahakan jangan kontak langsung
english_translation: This place is really "Wa'as" in Sundanese, hehe.. it's usually used for pre-weddings too, the wind is cool because it's in a highland, there are just a lot of wild monkeys there.. but it's quite safe, just be extra careful and try not to make direct contact

text:
Lokasinya enggak jauh dari kota, tepatnya di Lembang, Kabupaten Bandung Barat, Jawa Barat.

Pendakian ke puncaknya pun enggak makan banyak waktu, cuma 30 menit. Meski begitu, semua pengunjung akan mendapatkan pemandangan matahari terbit yang indah dari sana.
english_translation:
The location isn't far from the city, specifically in Lembang, West Bandung Regency, West Java.

The hike to the summit also doesn't take much time, only 30 minutes. Despite that, all visitors will get a beautiful sunrise view from there.

text: Amazing untuk alamnya airnya bening tempatnya juga lumayan bersih cuma 1 yang bikin saya kecewa banget mba penjaga tiketnya saya nanya baik2 malah nyolot bikin emosi 😒 kalau orang nanya kan krn ga tau, mbanya yang ramah dong jelasinya ga usah pake nyolot 👎👎👎
english_translation: Amazing for its nature, the water is clear, the place is also quite clean, only 1 thing that made me very disappointed, the ticket attendant, I asked nicely but she was rude and made me angry 😒 if people ask it's because they don't know, you should explain kindly, no need to be rude 👎👎👎

text:
Sudah yg ke sekian kali nya berkunjung, sampai sampai si akang guide nya dah hapal betul dgn muka ini..ahaaa
Harus lebih banyak dibuat pengaman di setiap jalan yg bersebelahan dengan jurang saja, lain lain nya biarkan sesuai kehendak alam dan apa ada nya..🙏 …
english_translation:
This is the umpteenth time visiting, even the guide knows my face by heart... ahaaa.
More safety barriers should be built on every path adjacent to a cliff, let the rest be according to nature's will and as it is.. 🙏 …

text:
Lokasi mudah di cari dekat dengan Dusun Bambu daerah Lembang. Harga tiket masuk terjangkau. Tempat nya bersih  cocok untuk berwisata outdoor bersama keluarga.
Akses jalan masuk masih berbatu. Air terjun nya jernih dan sejuk. Banyak spot menarik untuk berfoto.
english_translation:
The location is easy to find, near Dusun Bambu in the Lembang area. The entrance fee is affordable. The place is clean and suitable for outdoor recreation with family.
The access road is still rocky. The waterfall is clear and cool. There are many interesting photo spots.

text: Selalu ada perbaikan dan berubahan tema background buat foto2, jadi tiap kesana selalu ada tempat baru untuk dijadiin destinasi foto. Tiket masuk terbilang murah krna hanya 10rb/org, untuk jenis kamera DSLR, Handycam maupun Drone dikenakan charge sebesar 50rb
english_translation: There are always improvements and changes to the background themes for photos, so every time you go there, there's always a new spot to make into a photo destination. The entrance ticket is considered cheap at only 10,000 IDR per person, while there is a charge of 50,000 IDR for DSLR cameras, Handycam, or drones.

text: Bagusssssss tapi Sayang rada creepy karena udh jarang di kunjungin orang, sepertinya faktor ppkm juga, tapi enak sih buat ngadem, paling the best mah hutan pinus sama kebun teh nya, semoga ke depan nya semakin bagus dan semakin nyaman lagi, yuk main ke cic🤗 …
english_translation: Great, but unfortunately a bit creepy because not many people visit it anymore. It seems like the PPKM factor played a role, but it's nice to cool down. The best parts are the pine forest and the tea garden. Hopefully, it will get even better and more comfortable in the future. Come visit Cic!

text: HTM 30rb/orang (usia 2 tahun ke atas diihitung tiket).. lumayan banyak tempat baru, sayangnya mayoritas harus bayar lagi klo masuk. Tempat sholat pria dan wanita sudah dipisah, sayangnya tempat wudhu masih jadi 1. Sebaiknya pengunjung kesini dilarang merokok.
english_translation: HTM 30k/person (ages 2 and up are charged for a ticket).. quite a lot of new places, unfortunately, the majority require additional payment for entry. The prayer areas for men and women are separated, unfortunately, the ablution areas are still combined. Visitors here should preferably be prohibited from smoking.

text: Saya berkunjung ke curug tilu leuwi opat yg keb lokasinya berdekatan dengan ciwangun indah camp tempat yang lumayan menguras tenaga untuk hiking dan sampai ke curug tilu gais dan berkesempatan juga melihat penampakan tujub bidadari lagi mandi di bawah curug 3
english_translation: I visited Curug Tilu Leuwi Opat, which is located close to Ciwangun Indah Camp. It's a place that requires a good amount of energy for hiking to reach Curug Tilu, guys. And I also had the chance to see the apparition of seven angels bathing below Curug 3.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk berjalan-jalan dan hiking ringan. Dan harga masuknya adalah Untuk 10k @orang dan 5k @mobil (5 okt 19). Tapi tempatnya agak kotor, sedikit tempat sampah dan setiap pengunjung dan penjaga harus ingat untuk menjaga kebersihan tempat itu.
english_translation: A nice place for a walk and light hiking. And the entrance fee is 10k per person and 5k per car (Oct 5, 19). But the place is a bit dirty, with few trash cans, and every visitor and guard should remember to keep the place clean.

text: Kalo mau kesini jarak mulai dari tempat parkir lumayan jauh,saha lupa itu tempat parkir teh pintu pertama kalo gak salah,bayar parkir dan helm sekitar 10000ribu dan bayar tiket masuk 10000/15000an per orang,dan bisa menyewa jasa tour gate biar tidak tersesat.
english_translation: If you want to come here, the distance from the parking lot is quite far. I forgot, the parking lot is the first entrance, if I'm not mistaken. Parking and helmet fees are around 10,000 rupiah, and entrance tickets are 10,000/15,000 per person. You can also hire a tour guide to avoid getting lost.

text: Pemandangannya indah banget... Banyak spot spot foto kayak berasa keliling dunia...mba mba dan mas masnya ramah dn dengan senang hati mau motoin kita.. keren lah..sayang belum semua jadi bngunannya..mungkin nanti.bakal lebih meriah dan bnyak lagi spot fotonya
english_translation: The view is really beautiful... Lots of photo spots, it feels like traveling around the world... The ladies and gentlemen there are friendly and happy to take photos for us... it's cool... It's a shame not all the buildings are finished yet... maybe later it will be more festive and have even more photo spots.

text: Cocok untuk liburan berasama keluarga maupun sahabat. Tempatnya luas. Ada beberapa tempat yg kalo mau masuk bayar lagi salah satunya kota mini. Kalo mau murah lebih baik include semua wahana yg ada. Kalo mau masuk floating markernya saja harga tiketnya 30.000
english_translation: Suitable for holidays with family or friends. The place is spacious. There are some places where you have to pay again to enter, one of them is the mini city. If you want it to be cheap, it's better to include all the existing rides. If you only want to enter the floating market, the ticket price is 30,000.

text:
Bayar tiket masuk per orang 35 ribu update per tanggal 03 Agustus 2019.

mengecewakan, Airnya tidak jernih, pelayanan tdk memuaskan, kebersihan tempat wisata tidak di jaga dengan baik oleh staff karyawan maribaya nya. Saya harap pelayanan nya lebih baik lagi.
english_translation:
Entrance ticket per person is 35 thousand, updated as of August 3, 2019.

Disappointing, the water is not clear, the service is unsatisfactory, the cleanliness of the tourist spot is not well maintained by the Maribaya staff. I hope the service will be better.

text: Tempatnya sudah pasti sejuk, nyaman kalau buat camp, naik keatasnya juga bentar sekitar 15menitan. Ada benteng belandanya juga, diatas ada 2 toilet, tapi 2 2nya kadang susah air dan bau. Kalau kebelet bgt harus turun ketoilet deket parkiran yg ada warung2nya.
english_translation: The place is definitely cool and comfortable for camping, and it only takes about 15 minutes to get up. There's also a Dutch fort. Upstairs there are two toilets, but both of them sometimes have water issues and smell bad. If you really have to go, you have to go down to the toilet near the parking lot with the small shops.

text:
wisata alam yang belum terjamah di Bandung Barat

Sebelum masuk hutan pinus ada pos tiket + portal tapi tidak ada orang yg jaga (sewaktu saya ke sana)

Penjaga tiket berada di dalam hutan skitar 500meter dr portal dimana ada warung2 jual makanan di sekitarnya
english_translation:
Untouched natural tourism in West Bandung

Before entering the pine forest, there was a ticket post + portal but no one was guarding it (when I went there)

The ticket keeper was inside the forest about 500 meters from the portal, where there were warungs selling food nearby.

text:
Curug Yang Sangat Indah Dan Air Nyapun Sangat Jernih..
Akses Jalan Nya Pun Ga Terlalu Sulit
Bawa Keluarga Pun Aman..
Dan Jangan Lupa Tetap Jaga Kebersihan Nya
Bawa Sampah Nya Pulang Ya Terima Kasih asih.. Lestari Kan Alam Biar Anak Cucu Kita Bisa Menikmatinya
english_translation:
A very beautiful waterfall with very clear water.
The road access is not too difficult either.
Safe to bring the family.
And don't forget to keep it clean.
Please take your trash home. Thank you. Preserve nature so that our children and grandchildren can enjoy it.

text: Kebun yang indah, berbagai jenis bunga ada disini, pelataran kebun cukup luas, untuk berphoto ria atau selfie, view telah disiapkan untuk photo, bunga yang aneka warna menambah serunya photo, mau beli bunga atau hasil kebun bisa disini, lokasi cukup strategis
english_translation: A beautiful garden, various types of flowers are here, the garden grounds are quite spacious, for taking photos or selfies, views have been prepared for photos, the multicolored flowers add to the excitement of the photos, you can buy flowers or garden produce here, the location is quite strategic

text: Tempat rekreasi balik ke alam yang sangat cocok untuk keluarga, di dalam banyak tempat untuk selfie instagram, ada juga kolam rendam publik dan private air gunung yg mengandung sedikit belerang, ada tempat bermain anak juga, tempat rekreasi terawat dan bersih
english_translation: A very suitable recreational place for families to return to nature, with many spots for Instagram selfies, there are also public and private natural spring pools with a slight sulfur content, there is also a children's playground, the recreational place is well-maintained and clean.

text: Tempat wisata menyenangkan untuk keluarga banyak spot foto yang indah dan keren2. Recommended banget. Waktu kesana weekdays jadi untuk foto2 lebih leluasa ga terlalu keganggu yang lain atau antri. Pokok nya keren dan patut di coba kalau yang blm pernah kesana.
english_translation: A fun tourist spot for families with many beautiful and cool photo spots. Highly recommended. Went there on a weekday, so it was more relaxed for taking photos without being bothered by others or having to queue. Anyway, it's cool and worth trying if you haven't been there before.

text: Tempat wisata yang udah terkenal dan tidak diragukan lagi, tiket masuknya 40rb untuk satu orang, perjalanan dari pos masuk ke puncak butuh sekitar 10 menit, pemandangannya indah. Lalu masih ada bau belerang juga. Worth it banget untuk yang belum pernah kesini.
english_translation: A well-known and undoubtedly famous tourist spot. The entrance fee is 40,000 IDR per person. The journey from the entrance post to the summit takes about 10 minutes. The view is beautiful. There's also a sulfur smell. It's really worth it for those who haven't been here before.

text: Curug paling dekat hanya 300m dari pintu masuk. Untuk pergi ke curug paling jauh(curug Tilu), akses jalannya masih belum di tata dengan rapih, kita seperti mengikuti jalur pipa air warga, saat sampai di tempat(curug paling jauh), wisatawan tidak boleh berenang
english_translation: The closest waterfall is only 300m from the entrance. To get to the furthest waterfall (Curug Tilu), the access road is not yet neatly arranged, it's like we're following the villagers' water pipe path. When you reach the location (furthest waterfall), tourists are not allowed to swim.

text: Gunung putri terletak di daerah lembang. Akses menuju kesana tidaklah sulit. Bisa pakai kendaraan umum maupun pribadi. Jalur untuk mencapai tempat camping nya pun cukup mudah hanya melewati beberapa tanjakan landai, estimasi memerlukan wakti sekitar 20menitan.
english_translation: Gunung Putri is located in the Lembang area. Accessing it is not difficult. You can use public or private transportation. The path to reach the camping site is quite easy, only passing a few gentle inclines, estimated to take about 20 minutes.

text: Setelah sekian lama ga ke TWA GTP, Alhamdulillah bs kesana lagi..dingin, seger, refreshing rasanya....prokes berjalan dg baik, mulai dari pengecekan bukti vaksin sampai ada petugas yg selalu mengingatkan utk tetap memakai masker, semoga tetap di pertahankan...
english_translation: After a long time of not going to TWA GTP, thank God I could go again.. it felt cold, fresh, and refreshing.... health protocols were well-implemented, starting from checking vaccination proof to having officers who always reminded us to keep wearing masks, hopefully, this will be maintained...

text: Wahana wisata keluarga yg wajib dkunjungi klu kbandung... Pasar apung nya beda dari yg lain karna kita hrs menukarkan koin utk belanjan di dalem nya.. Tiket masuk bisa dtuker dengan secangkir kopi or coklat hangat cocok dnikmati di udara yg sejuk... #letsguide
english_translation: A family tourist attraction that is a must-visit when in Bandung... The floating market is different from others because we have to exchange coins to shop inside... The entrance ticket can be exchanged for a cup of coffee or hot chocolate, perfect to enjoy in the cool air... #letsguide

text: Kayanya laen kali musti pake jaket jam 4 kabutnya mulai banyak.. eh para pedagang sana toh loohh baiknya jadii mereka nawarin foto... semangat banget kirain ma mereka mau di bayar.. ga taunya beneran mereka tulus mau motoin jepret2 dan nyari spot yang bagus...
english_translation: Maybe next time I have to wear a jacket at 4 o'clock, the fog starts to get thick.. Oh, the vendors there are so nice, they even offered to take photos... I was so excited, I thought they wanted to be paid... Turns out they genuinely wanted to take pictures and find good spots...

text:
Lokasi suasana oke.
Fasilitas seperti toilet buat yang camping cukup kotor termasuk air kurang bersih. banyak yang harus dibenahi.
Tenda camping kualitas kurang baik jika hujan rembes jadi disarankan bawa tenda sendiri jika ingin camping di sini.
Harga oke lah
english_translation:
The location and ambiance are okay.
Facilities like the toilets for campers are quite dirty, and the water is not very clean. Many things need to be fixed.
The camping tent quality is not good; if it rains, it leaks, so it's recommended to bring your own tent if you want to camp here.
The price is okay.

text: harga tiket nya lumayan pricy 47.500 perorang belum termasuk transport, tapi sebanding sama experience nya karena tempatnya luas banget dan disedian shuffle gratis untuk balik ke tempat parkir jadi ga capek. dan yang paling penting toilet nya ga susah ditemuin
english_translation: The ticket price is quite pricey at 47,500 per person, not including transport, but it's worth the experience because the place is very spacious and there's a free shuttle provided to get back to the parking lot, so you don't get tired. And most importantly, the toilets are easy to find.

text: Tempat nya cocok banget buat liburan keluarga, sahabat, pacar, gebetan, semuanyaaaa.. Dari anak kecil sampe orang tua jg sangat cocok disini. Sambil diiringi dengan udara yang segar, cocok banget deh buat kalian yang suka foto2 sekalian menikmati alam ..👌👌👌👌 …
english_translation: The place is perfect for a family vacation, with friends, a partner, a crush, everyoneeee.. From young children to the elderly, it's very suitable here. Accompanied by fresh air, it's really great for those of you who like to take photos while enjoying nature..👌👌👌👌 …

text: Cukup menarik untuk dikunjungi bersama keluarga di akhir pekan walau aga crowded. Tapi dilokasi ini banyak menyuguhkan banyak tema dari mulai danau buatan, mini zoo, bangunan tematik dan miniatur kereta api. Seru Banget dan tempatnya nya juga bersih dan rapih.
english_translation: Interesting enough to visit with family on the weekend, even though it's a bit crowded. But this place offers many themes, from an artificial lake, a mini zoo, thematic buildings, and a model train. Very exciting, and the place is also clean and tidy.

text: Tempat yang terbilang Baru, sarana menuju Curug Seupan cukup bagus, terdapat saung² istirahat, paket wisata outbound camping. Akses ke Curug Tilu tidak disarankan karena Jalan gelap & berbahaya. Kantin dekat curug seupan tutup, kantin gerbang masuk curug buka.
english_translation: A relatively new place, the facilities to reach Curug Seupan are quite good, with resting gazebos and outbound camping tour packages available. Access to Curug Tilu is not recommended due to the dark and dangerous road. The canteen near Curug Seupan is closed, but the canteen at the entrance to Curug is open.

text:
Ini iconya lembang dan pasti banyak pemandangan indah yg bisa kita lihat dari setiap sudut gunung ini...
Apalagi dengan historynya yg legend...
Dan goa jepang yang ada disana... Menjadi daya tarik lebih untuk berkunjung...
Dijalamin puas berlama lama disini...
english_translation:
This is the icon of Lembang and there are definitely many beautiful views we can see from every corner of this mountain...
Especially with its legendary history...
And the Japanese cave there... Becomes an added attraction to visit...
You can explore it and be satisfied for a long time here...

text:
Untuk Bandung dsk Gunung putri jadi Salah satu primadona jika ingin berburu sunrise.
Kalau sedang beruntung kalian bisa dapet view "lautan awan".
Jarak dari tempat parkir menuju lokasi juga ga terlalu jauh so friendly banget klo mau ajak nge-camp bareng family.
english_translation:
For Bandung and its surroundings, Gunung Putri is one of the prime choices if you want to hunt for the sunrise.
If you're lucky, you can get a "sea of clouds" view.
The distance from the parking lot to the location is not too far, so it's very friendly if you want to invite the family for a camping trip.

text:
Wow main kesini seperti berada di dunia lain.hamparan batu" cantik yang tersusun rapi serta tebing membuat indah pemandangan..
Rincian biaya masuknya .
Pungli Tanpa Tiket : Rp 5.000
Tiket Masuk Kawasan : Rp 8.000
Parkir Motor : Rp 5.000

Total Rp 23.000 / Orang
english_translation:
Wow, coming here feels like being in another world. The expanse of beautiful, neatly arranged stones and the cliffs make for a beautiful view.
Entrance fee details:
Unofficial fee (no ticket): Rp 5,000
Area entrance ticket: Rp 8,000
Motorcycle parking: Rp 5,000

Total Rp 23,000 / Person

text: Tempatnya sejuk banget, kasih makan bunny (beli wortel) cuma 8rb aja, staff nya ramah semua, ditiap sudut ada tempat cuci tangan, toiletnya juga bersih, mushola nyaman banget, tempat makan juga nyaman, makanannya enak2 dan yang pasti bakal balik lagi kesini deh
english_translation: The place is really cool, feeding the bunnies (buying carrots) is only 8k, all the staff are friendly, there are handwashing stations in every corner, the toilets are also clean, the prayer room is very comfortable, the dining area is also comfortable, the food is delicious and I will definitely come back here again

text: Tempatnya oke banget, parkiran juga tersedia, ada shuttle bus utk balik lagi ke parkiran. Hanya sangat disayangkan bukanya cuman sampai jam 18.00, mentok2 jam set 7. Buat ambil foto di spot yg ada lampu2 nya jadi terbatas, kalau bisa agak lebih lama gitu. Trims
english_translation: The place is really great, parking is also available, and there's a shuttle bus to get back to the parking lot. It's just a shame it only opens until 6:00 PM, at the latest 6:30 PM. This limits taking photos at the spots with lights, it would be better if it could stay open a bit longer. Thanks

text: Tiket masuk terjangkau fasilitas sudah sangat lengkap mulai dari mck, warung tempat ibadah, saung saung, viewnya bagus banget berasa kaya di jaman jaman batu, gaada petunjuk buat jalan masuknya dan jalannan masih berbatu sejalur dengan truk penambang batu kapur
english_translation: Affordable entrance ticket, very complete facilities from toilets, stalls, places of worship, gazebos, the view is really good, feels like it's from the stone age, there are no signs for the entrance and the road is still rocky, sharing the path with limestone mining trucks.

text:
Tempat lumayan bagus, view danau dan padang ilalang. Ada tempat outbond untuk anak-anak, kereta wisata, sepeda dan becak mini, kapal-kapal bebek, dermaga di danau.
Biaya masuk hanya Rp 10.000

Tapi saat saya berkunjung masih terlihat renovasi dibeberapa tempat.
english_translation:
A pretty good place, with views of the lake and a field of reeds. There is an outbound area for children, a tourist train, bicycles and mini rickshaws, swan boats, and a pier on the lake.
The entrance fee is only Rp 10,000.

However, when I visited, renovation was still visible in some areas.

text: Tempat nya lumayan bagus buat anak2. Sekedar informasi, Masuk ke tempat anak2 byr 25rb org, mau permainan ky jd  pemadam kebakaran per anak 25 rb. Tiket masuk di awal 35rb per orang, parkir 1 jam pertama 3000 klo ga salah. Di dalam taman mini nya ada cafe juga.
english_translation: The place is quite good for children. For your information, entry to the children's area costs 25,000 per person, and games like being a firefighter cost 25,000 per child. The general entrance ticket is 35,000 per person. Parking is 3,000 for the first hour, if I'm not mistaken. Inside the mini park, there's also a cafe.

text: Tempat yang sangat luas dan sangat indah untuk refreshing alam dengan penataan view yang luar biasa cantik sehingga banyak sekali spot yang bisa dijadikan untuk tempat berfoto. Ditambah harga yang ditawarkan pun terbilang murah antara 5ribu hingga 35ribu rupiah
english_translation: A very spacious and very beautiful place for nature refreshing with an exceptionally beautiful view arrangement, making it a place with many spots that can be used for taking photos. In addition, the prices offered are quite cheap, between five thousand to thirty-five thousand rupiah.

text:
Tempatnya bagus banget. Terlebih jika bawa anak2, mereka bisa bermain berlarian.
Terdapat taman tema yg bagus2 dan instagramable.
Fasiltas lengkap dari mulai disediakan shuttle untuk kembali ke parkiran.
Dan WC nya bersih dan tersebar jadi aman.

Lovely place ❤
english_translation:
The place is really nice. Especially if you bring children, they can run around and play.
There are nice and Instagrammable theme parks.
Complete facilities, starting from providing a shuttle to return to the parking lot.
And the restrooms are clean and spread out so they are safe.

Lovely place ❤

text: Tiket masuk 35rb/org. Mending bayar pake OvO lebih murah sedikit. Seger, adem tempatnya. Cocok kalo untuk liburan bareng keluarga. Tapi sayangnya gak bisa main air di air terjunnya. Boleh renang tapi di VIP pool sekitar 100rbuan. Ada playground utk anak anak😊 …
english_translation: Entrance fee is 35,000 IDR/person. It's better to pay with OVO, it's slightly cheaper. The place is refreshing and cool. Suitable for holidays with family. But unfortunately, you can't play in the waterfall. Swimming is allowed in the VIP pool for around 100,000 IDR. There's a playground for children 😊…

text: Sebelum ke curugnya, kita lewatin hutan pinus dulu yang jadi area untuk camping. Pemandangan menuju kebun teh sukawana. Ada monyet2 juga. Ada toilet dan warung, banyak spot foto. Disarankan untuk datang weekdays jika tidak ingin terlalu ramai banyak pengunjung.
english_translation: Before going to the waterfall, we pass through a pine forest that is also a camping area. The view leads to the Sukawana tea plantation. There are also monkeys. There are toilets and stalls, and many photo spots. It is recommended to come on weekdays if you don't want it to be too crowded with visitors.

text: Seperti nama wisata nya disini banyak sekali macam-macam bunga anggrek, tidak semua difoto karena terlalu terpesona sama keindahan anggrek ehe, untuk htm masuk Orchid forest Cikole ini 35k perorang dan untuk parkir bisa kasih seikhlasnya karena untuk kebersihan
english_translation: Just like the name of the attraction suggests, there are many kinds of orchids here. Not all were photographed because I was too mesmerized by the beauty of the orchids, ehe. The entrance fee for Orchid Forest Cikole is 35k per person, and parking is by donation as it's for cleanliness.

text: Untuk tempat sebagus ini seharusnya makanannya pun harus enak dan fresh....pengalaman saya memesan nasi Tutuk oncom hasilnya sangat tidak memuaskan karena menu tersebut dingin tidak panas bahkan hangat pun tidak seperti baru keluar dari kulkas. Mengecewakan.....
english_translation: For a place as nice as this, the food should also be delicious and fresh....my experience ordering the Tutuk oncom rice was very unsatisfactory because the dish was cold, not hot, not even warm, like it had just come out of the refrigerator. Disappointing.....

text: Tempatnya bagus, terjaga kebersihannya. Tinggal kesadaran pengunjung aja buat ga buang sampah sembarangan. Parkirnya oke buat mobil pribadi. Tapi di atas petugas parkirnya suka ngode kalo ga di kasih tips parkir 😂 jadi lebih baik kasih aja untuk tips parkirnya..
english_translation: The place is nice and well-maintained. It just needs visitors to be mindful and not litter. The parking is okay for private cars. But the parking attendants upstairs tend to hint around for tips if you don't give them one 😂 so it's better to just give them a tip for parking..

text:
Lumayan berinovatif ini floating market.
skrgbada swiming pool ada rainbow garden,
miniatur kereta api dll tp tyap masuk bayar 25rb/org
bisa bangkrut aku tuuu.

saran untuk pengelola : coba mulai diterapkan tiket terusan jadi gak kasian kasian amat pengunjungnya
english_translation:
This floating market is quite innovative.
There's a swimming pool, a rainbow garden,
miniature trains, etc., but you have to pay Rp25,000 per person to enter.
I'll go bankrupt at this rate.

Suggestion for the management: Try to implement a season pass so visitors don't feel so ripped off.

text: Pemandangan city view ke arah Lembang dan Bandung hampir 270derajat, cocok untuk menikmati sunrise sekaligus sunset, hanya spotnya panas saat siang. Ada juga hutan pinus bagi yang suka adem dan ketenangan. Parkir agak jauh, sekitar 30 menit menaiki tangga tanah.
english_translation: The city view towards Lembang and Bandung is almost 270 degrees, perfect for enjoying both sunrise and sunset, though the spot can be hot during the day. There is also a pine forest for those who prefer cool and quiet. Parking is a bit far, about a 30-minute walk up a dirt path.

text: Waktu pertama kali tiba di #stonegarden langsung disambut hamparan perbukitan dan #gunungmasigit yang berada disebelah barat. Indah teduh karena dibalik hamparan hijau tersebut terdapat batuan yang menjulang tinggi.  Gunung Masigit sendiri mempunyai arti MUSOLA.
