english_translation: The first time arriving at #stonegarden, I was immediately greeted by a stretch of hills and #gunungmasigit which is located to the west. It was beautifully shaded because behind that green expanse there were towering rocks. Gunung Masigit itself means MOSQUE.

text: TEMPAT YANG COCOK BUAT NGADEMMMM. tebing gak terlalu tinggi, tapi pemandangannya masyaallah banget:) di puncak ada patilisan banyak spot foto, ada monyet ekor panjang. Akses dari stasiun padalarang cukup naik angkot warna kuning. Klau kesana disarankan pagi/sore
english_translation: A great place to cool off. The cliffs aren't too high, but the view is absolutely stunning :) At the summit, there's a historical site with many photo spots and long-tailed monkeys. Access from Padalarang station is easy by taking the yellow public minivan. It's recommended to go in the morning or late afternoon.

text: Tempatnya bersih, suasana bagus, banyak sekali spot foto, pelanggan disuguhkan banyak satwa dan aneka pameran2. Ditambah lagi banyak sekali floating market yang ada disana. Saya respect dengan tukang bersih2 disana. Mereka care dan tetap ramah kepada pengunjung.
english_translation: The place is clean, the atmosphere is good, there are so many photo spots. Customers are treated to many animals and various exhibitions. In addition, there are many floating markets there. I respect the cleaning staff there. They are caring and remain friendly to visitors.

text:
B aja
Saran tempat ibadah nya (mushola) masa posisi nya pas bgt depannya (kiblat) kamar mandi satu tembok pulak, sholat jadi ragu.
Kelihatan bgt bangunnya asal²an dan ga pake ilmu ya mungkin yg punya juga non muslim jd gatau..
Semoga bisa diperbaiki ke depannya.
english_translation:
The prayer room (mushola) is located right in front of the bathroom, sharing a wall, which makes me doubt my prayers.
It's obvious that the building was constructed carelessly and without any knowledge, perhaps the owner is non-Muslim and doesn't know any better.
Hopefully, it can be improved in the future.

text: Tempatnya oke, cuma mungkin kalo bisa dibersihin lagi bisa lebih nyaman. Sisa-sisa kayu yg terbawa arus masih banyak berserakan di tempat, atau mungkin bekas jembatan yg tidak terpakai lagi bisa dibersihkan. Juga bisa dibuat tempat yg lebih layak untuk buang air
english_translation: The place is okay, but if it could be cleaned up more, it would be more comfortable. There are still a lot of wood scraps carried by the current scattered around, or perhaps the remnants of an unused bridge could be cleaned up. It would also be good to have a more suitable place for waste disposal.

text:
Destinasi wisata yang cocok bersama keluarga tempat yang menjadi pilihan di Kab. Bandung Barat.
Noted;
Saran bagi pengelola Managemen GC kiranya kebersihan Toilet/WC harus lebih diutamakan agar menjadi perhatian.
Dijaga dan dirawat supaya meninggalkan kesan baik
english_translation:
Suitable tourist destinations with family in West Bandung Regency.
Noted:
Advice for the GC Management, toilet cleanliness should be prioritized to be given attention.
Maintain and care for it so that it leaves a good impression.

text: Enak adem dingin air terjunnya bagus belum terlalu ramai juga, hanya fasilitas penunjang seperti toilet dan tampat untuk istirahat masih kurang.....ada tangga ke arah aor terjun paling tinggi namun tangga tsb kurang aman dan bahaya....harus bayar 10ribu pula....
english_translation: The waterfall is cool and refreshing, and the scenery is beautiful. It's not too crowded yet, but supporting facilities like toilets and resting areas are still lacking. There are stairs leading to the highest part of the waterfall, but the stairs are unsafe and dangerous. Plus, you have to pay 10,000 rupiah.

text: Tempatnya bagus, luas dan rapi tertata. Banyak tempat untuk foto yang pastinya "Instagramable" Buat jdi post/feed. Harga tiket masuk hanya 35k (4 juli 2019). Saran saya lebih bagus untuk ketempat itu pada saat malam karena lampu" Hiasnya sangat bagus untuk foto.
english_translation: The place is nice, spacious, and neatly organized. There are many spots for photos that are definitely "Instagrammable" for posts/feeds. The entrance ticket price is only 35k (July 4, 2019). My advice is it's better to visit at night because the decorative lights are very good for photos.

text: Tempat yang bagus dan cocok untuk hiking bersama keluarga. Cocok juga untuk anak anak. Nge camp juga cocok. Pelayanan dan guide cukup baik. Dan yang pasti tempat nya bersih dan rapi meskipun dialam bebas. Kembangkan terus untuk pengelola tempat ini... Keren.....
english_translation: A great place and suitable for hiking with family. Also suitable for children. Camping is also suitable. The service and guides are quite good. And most importantly, the place is clean and tidy even in nature. Keep developing this place's management... Cool.....

text: Yg pakai kendaraan pribadi untuk sampai ke atas kawahnya harus hati2 karna jalan yg menanjak agak curam berkelok kelok, di atas lahan parkir cukup memadai, toilet bersih, banyak penjual makanan juga. Disarankan pakai masker karna bau belerang yg cukup menyengat.
english_translation: Those using private vehicles to reach the crater should be careful as the uphill road is quite steep and winding. The parking lot at the top is adequate, the toilets are clean, and there are many food vendors. It is recommended to wear a mask due to the strong sulfur smell.

text:
Untuk pecinta udara sejuk alami.. Silakan kemari....karena kesini ibarat ke bukit hutan pinus tapi sudah tertata rapih
Harga tiket 47500/jumat
Mobil 10000
Dari jalan raya menuju tiket boot jalan rusak
Print foto 50000/lembar
Terdapat taman anggrek  dan foto boots
english_translation:
For lovers of natural cool air.. Please come here.... because coming here is like going to a pine forest hill but it's already neatly arranged
Ticket price 47500/Friday
Car 10000
From the highway to the ticket booth the road is damaged
Print photo 50000/sheet
There is an orchid garden and photo booths

text:
Sayang sekali tempat sudah bagus tapi fasilitasnya hancur..
Kota mini sebenarnya bagus.. harga juga masuk akal tapi sayang pakaian princess nya sudah sobek2 sangat tidak layak pakai.. tapi anak tetap minta pakai, karena memang menarik.. ibu salon nya sangat baik,
english_translation: It's a shame the place is good but the facilities are ruined.. The mini city itself is good.. the price is also reasonable but unfortunately the princess costumes are all torn and very unfit to wear.. but the child still wants to wear them, because they are indeed attractive.. the salon lady is very kind,

text: The best curug, sayang lebih suka yg lama sebelum ada buletan dan tulisan curug malela kesan alamiahnya hilang , untuk foto jadi kesannya modern, jalan kebawah cukup menguras energi apalagi baliknya, tapi adaojek untuk yg capek, hati hati musim hujan kalau kesini
english_translation: The best waterfall, darling prefers the old one before the circles and the sign for Curug Malela, its natural impression is gone. For photos, it gives a modern impression. The walk down is quite energy-draining, especially the return trip, but there are motorcycle taxis for those who are tired. Be careful during the rainy season if you come here.

text: kawasan lembang , bandung barat. Htm weekend 35k kalo ga salah. Di dalam wisata ini ada rumah2an kelinci, jembatan gantung 10k, beberapa curug/air terjun yang bisa disinggahi. Buat ke air terjun yg ada spot pohon foto ini berada di sisi kanan. Silahkan diexplore.
english_translation: Lembang area, West Bandung. Weekend entrance fee 35k, if I'm not mistaken. Inside this attraction, there are rabbit houses, a suspension bridge for 10k, and several waterfalls you can visit. To get to the waterfall with the photo tree spot, it's on the right side. Feel free to explore.

text:
Parkiranya kurang luas,
Dan kurang di rawat
Kalo di foto foto bagus.
Tapi aslinya kurang kerawat
Karena naek turun nya emng engap bgt sih
Kedepanya mungkin ada lift otomatis
Biar wisatawanya banyak yang mau

Karena mereka hanya foto dari atas ajah
Gk mau ke bawah
english_translation:
The parking is not very spacious,
And not well maintained.
It looks good in photos.
But in reality, it's not well cared for
Because the ups and downs are really tiring.
In the future, perhaps there will be an automatic lift
So that more tourists will want to visit.

Because they only take photos from above
They don't want to go down.

text:
Waktu kesini jalan keatas menuju kawah sempet hujan dan berkabut, hati" kalau ke sini waktu hujan karna jalannya cukup terjal dan berkelok.
Untungnya waktu sampe atas udah cerah dan tidak berawan. Udaranya sejuk dan cari top view biar angle fotonya bagus hahahaha
english_translation:
When I came here, the path leading up to the crater was raining and foggy. Be careful if you come here during the rain because the path is quite steep and winding.
Fortunately, when I reached the top, it was already clear and cloudless. The air was cool and I looked for the top view so the photo angle would be good hahaha.

text:
Harga sangat terjangkau ,cuma Rp 10.000 per orang kita bisa menikmati suasana sejuk dan udara yang bersih.
Cocok untuk camp dan orang yang suka hiking...

Note : harus musim hujan ke sini nya di karenakan kalau musim kemarau air sungai nya surut dan ga mengalir .
english_translation:
Very affordable price, only Rp 10,000 per person to enjoy the cool atmosphere and clean air.
Suitable for camping and people who like hiking...

Note: You must visit during the rainy season because during the dry season, the river water recedes and stops flowing.

text: Tempatnya cukup luas dan menyenangkan untuk saya dan keluarga, aktifitas jalan cukup jauh sehingga menyehatkan dan spot2nya juga menarik utk foto2 dan di share di sosmed. Ada tempat makan juga, tapi menunya terbatas, cukuplah utk mengganjal perut sambil istirahat
english_translation: The place is quite spacious and enjoyable for me and my family. The walking activities are quite extensive, making it healthy, and the spots are also interesting for taking photos and sharing on social media. There is also a place to eat, but the menu is limited, just enough to fill our stomachs while resting.

text: Tempat sejuta umat kl ke bandung. Tempatnya gausah di tanya lg, bagus banget. Tp pas weekend udh pasti rame bgt bgt. Akses ke maribaya agak jauh dan menegangkan bgt karena lewat jalur menanjak dan menurun yg panjang dan terjal bgt, ditambah banyak bis pariwisata.
english_translation: The place for a million people when going to Bandung. The place doesn't need to be asked again, it's really good. But on weekends, it's definitely super, super crowded. Access to Maribaya is a bit far and very nerve-wracking because it passes through long and very steep uphill and downhill routes, plus there are many tourist buses.

text: Tempat wisata keluarga yang indah, asri, sejuk, dan rindang. Lokasi yang luas, bisa digunakan untuk kemping, sekedar jalan-jalan menikmati suasana hutan, flying fox, berfoto. Bagi yang ingin melaksanakan pernikahan di alam terbuka tempat ini sangat representatif.
english_translation: A beautiful, natural, cool, and shady family tourist destination. The spacious location can be used for camping, simply strolling to enjoy the forest atmosphere, flying fox, and taking photos. For those who wish to hold weddings in the open air, this place is very representative.

text: Lokasinya tidak jauh dari jalan raya Bandung-Cianjur, sekitar 3-4 Km. Suasanya seperti membawa  ke zaman purba dgn batu" dinding tebing yg indah karena bekas tergerus air, juga membentuk seperti gua. Viewnya bagus sekali. Berada di Rajamandala, Kab Bandung Barat.
english_translation: The location is not far from the Bandung-Cianjur highway, about 3-4 Km. The atmosphere feels like stepping back to ancient times with beautiful cliff walls made of stone, eroded by water, also forming cave-like structures. The view is excellent. It is located in Rajamandala, West Bandung Regency.

text: Tempatnya oke banget kalau mau ke curug dan gak jauh² bangett. Tangganya banyakk, tapi kalau dinikmatinn asikkss. Harganya 20k, belum sama parkir. Ohiya, udah gak buka malem hari yaa disini (info tanggal 20Oktober 2021) jadii gaada pelangi yang kek di gugel gugel
english_translation: The place is really great for going to waterfalls and not too far away. There are lots of stairs, but if you enjoy them, it's fun. The price is 20k, not including parking. Oh yeah, they don't open at night anymore here (info from October 20, 2021) so there are no rainbows like in the Google pictures.

text: Lokasinya adem,,, bersih,, cuma dari gerbang karcis ke kawah lumayan jauh,  harus bawa kendaraan pribadi. Ada mushola,, toilet bersih,,,  jalan ke atasnya bagus,,  pemandangan bagus juga.  Ada kawah Ratu dan Kawah Domas.  Buat ke kawas Domas harus ditemenin guide
english_translation: The location is cool and clean, but from the ticket gate to the crater is quite far, so you must bring your own vehicle. There's a prayer room, clean toilets, the road up is good, and the view is also good. There's Kawah Ratu and Kawah Domas. To go to Kawah Domas, you must be accompanied by a guide.

text: Lokasi mudah dijangkau. Htm 45k pake motor, dari pintu ke dalam kurleb 1km lagi, parkir motor seiqlasnya. Masuk dapet voucher makan di dalam potongan 10k minimal 35k pembelian makanan. Didalam fully buat poto2. Cocok buat ciwi ciwi unyu yg hobi post di Instagram.
english_translation: Easily accessible location. Entrance fee is 45k for motorcycles. From the entrance, it's about 1km further in. Motorcycle parking is as is. Upon entering, you get a food voucher for 10k off with a minimum purchase of 35k for food. Inside, it's fully set up for photos. Perfect for cute girls who love posting on Instagram.

text:
Saya sering pergi ke sana dengan teman saya di Wana Wisata Jayagiri ketika saya di Bandung. Dari Lembang, saya mendaki bukit, berolahraga, dan jalan kaki menuju Tangkuban Parahu.
Juga, saya ingin pergi dengan teman-teman saya. Apakah kamu masih baik-baik saja?
english_translation:
I often went there with my friend at Wana Wisata Jayagiri when I was in Bandung. From Lembang, I would hike up the hill, exercise, and walk towards Tangkuban Parahu.
Also, I want to go with my friends. Are you still doing well?

text:
One of west Java most important tourist attraction...
Harus kesini kalo lagi di Bandung...
Banyak pilihan kuliner dan souvernir sebagai oleh oleh utk dibeli,,
Jangan lupa bawa jaket untuk yang tidak tahan udara dingin..
Yang hobi hiking bisa coba ke kawah Domas,,
english_translation:
One of West Java's most important tourist attractions...
Must visit if you're in Bandung...
Many culinary and souvenir options to buy as gifts to take home.
Don't forget to bring a jacket if you can't stand the cold air.
Those who enjoy hiking can try visiting Kawah Domas.

text:
Subhanalloh percikan air dari curug membuat sejuk... Alam yg sejuk pepohonannya rindang membuat betah berlama lama disini...tiket masuk 35k.
Memang sih sepandan dengan keindahan alam dan penataan tempatnya... Banyak tempat untuk selfi dan berkumpul dengan keluarga
english_translation:
Subhanallah, the splashes of water from the waterfall make it cool... The cool nature with its shady trees makes you want to stay here for a long time... Entrance ticket is 35k.
Indeed, it is commensurate with the natural beauty and the arrangement of the place... There are many spots for selfies and gathering with family.

text: Area luas, makanan lumayan, kolam lumayan, air terjun lumayan, walau airnya kotor banyak sampah dan busa detergen, sangat di sayangkan namun bagaimana.. pepohonan bagus, enak buat jalan jalan bersama pacar atau keluarga, bawa anak juga bagus. Bawa orang tua bisa..
english_translation: Spacious area, decent food, decent pool, decent waterfall, although the water is dirty with a lot of trash and detergent foam, it's a pity, but what can you do... the trees are nice, good for a walk with a partner or family, good for bringing kids. Can bring parents too..

text:
Tiket masuk 50 rb per orang
Motor 5 rb parkir.
Lokasi bagus, nyaman, sejuk hanya jalannya masih perlu dperbaiki , karna baru setengah yg bagus saat mau ke lokasi orchidnya. Makanan disini juga harganya standarlah gak mahal mahal amat. Cukup recomended buat liburan
english_translation:
Entrance fee 50,000 IDR per person.
Motorcycle parking 5,000 IDR.
The location is good, comfortable, and cool, only the road still needs improvement, because only half is good on the way to the orchid location. The food here is also reasonably priced, not too expensive. Quite recommended for a vacation.

text:
Juli 2019..
lokasi wisata yang dikelola penduduk setempat, masuk dari jalan utama sekitar 1km kondisi jalan kurang baik.. lalu ada pos untuk bayar 10k (lintas wilayah).. kemudian bertemu gerbang masuk resmi 4 orang 1 mobil bayar 39k.. untuk prewedding bayar 300k..
english_translation:
July 2019..
A tourist spot managed by locals. Entrance from the main road is about 1km, road conditions are not good.. then there's a post to pay 10k (inter-district fee).. after that, you'll reach the official entrance gate, 39k for 4 people and 1 car.. 300k for pre-wedding photos..

text: Buat olahraga jantung, paru paru, kaki, paket komplit. Tpi sampai bawah terbayar dengan segarnya embun embun air terjun. Anak tangga juga bagus, sebagian ada yg tergenang karena ada mata air yg mengalir hati hati licin. Sekali sekali latihan fisik di akhir minggu.
english_translation: Makes for a complete package of exercise for the heart, lungs, and legs. But reaching the bottom is rewarded by the refreshing mist of the waterfall. The stairs are also nice, some are flooded because of a flowing spring, so be careful, it's slippery. Physical exercise once in a while on the weekend.

text:
Kebun bunganya bagus, bisa beli bunga juga disini.

Trus bisa metik sayur ato buah juga bisa disini kalo masih mau panen ya. trus dibadrol harganya @30.000 perkilo untuk semua sayur ato buah.

Masuk bayar @20.000 per orang dihari libur ya

Parkirannya kurang luas.
english_translation:
The flower garden is nice, you can also buy flowers here.

Then you can also pick vegetables or fruits here if you still want to harvest. The price is set at IDR 30,000 per kilo for all vegetables and fruits.

Entry fee is IDR 20,000 per person on holidays.

The parking lot is not very spacious.

text: Bener2 liburan di hutan anggrek nan cantik.. Penataannya sangat indah, rapi dan bersih.. Yang paling disuka tidak perlu naik2, tak ada tanjakan yang bikin tersiksa ngos2an.. hanya ada turunan, trus sampai di pintu keluar diantar shuttle car naik lagi ke parkiran..
english_translation: Truly a vacation in the beautiful orchid forest.. The arrangement is very beautiful, tidy, and clean.. What I liked most is not having to climb, no uphill slopes that make you gasp for air.. there are only downhill slopes, then you reach the exit and are taken by shuttle car back up to the parking lot..

text:
Suasana hutannya enak... Pas kebetulan sedang tidak ramai. Sejuk. Sayangnya banyak pengunjung yang tidak bisa menjaga kebersihan, menibggalkan sampah dimana-mana.
Mungkin lebih bagus datang pas tengah musim kemarau, banyak Anggrek jadwal berbunga di musim kemarau.
english_translation:
The atmosphere of the forest was pleasant... It happened to be not crowded at the time. Cool. Unfortunately, many visitors couldn't maintain cleanliness, leaving trash everywhere.
Perhaps it would be better to visit during the peak of the dry season, as many orchids bloom during the dry season.

text:
Pembelian tiket langsung di jalanan saat mau parkir, jadi tidak ada loket khusus. Kondisi ramai Krn tanggal merah, makanan enak, uang dtukar koin untuk transaksi, unik juga.
Banyak makanan tradisional yang disajikan. Banyak wahana2 permainan. Cocok untuk keluarga.
english_translation:
Tickets are bought directly on the street when you want to park, so there are no special ticket booths. It was crowded because it was a public holiday. The food was delicious, and money is exchanged for coins for transactions, which is also unique.
Many traditional foods are served. There are many amusement rides. Suitable for families.

text:
Tempat yang luar biasa keren, spot foto melimpah, kalo belajar batuan juga bisa, climbing juga bisa (katanya..)
Cuma ya masuknya ada 2 kali tiket, tiket pertama kurang jelas untuk apa.
Tapi untuk lokasinya, recommended sekali lah kalo pecinta wisata alam bebatuan.
english_translation:
An incredibly cool place, abundant photo spots, you can also study rocks, and you can also climb (they say...).
It's just that there are two entrance fees, the first ticket is unclear what it's for.
But for the location, it's highly recommended for nature lovers who enjoy rocky landscapes.

text:
Tempatnya sangat sejuk dan alami. Udara yang segar disertai aktifitas yang menyenangkan untuk keluarga.

WC cukup bersih. Set tanamanan yang baik. Siapkan fisik untuk naik turun.

Di kantin makanan kurang banyak pilihan makanan. Rasa makanan standart menurut saya.
english_translation:
The place is very cool and natural. Fresh air accompanied by enjoyable activities for the family.

The toilet is quite clean. Good collection of plants. Prepare yourself physically for going up and down.

The canteen has limited food choices. The taste of the food is standard, in my opinion.

text:
Tempatnya bagus bersih harga tiketnya juga lumayan.
Cuma area parkir mobilnya memang sih luas tapi kurang masih berupa gundukan-gundukan batu serta banyak akar pohon sehingga kurang halus. Serta jalan menuju ke parkiran A kurang bagus. Semoga secepatnya diperbaiki
english_translation:
The place is nice and clean, and the ticket price is also reasonable.
However, the car parking area, although spacious, is still uneven with mounds of rocks and many tree roots, making it less smooth. Also, the road leading to parking area A is not good. Hopefully, it will be repaired soon.

text: Tempat rekreaksi keluarga tempat nya bagus . Tapi ada beberapa pedagang masker yang jual nya maksa. Padahal ga terlalu berbau untuk belerangnya. Harga tiket perorangnya weekend kena 30rb /orang untuk kendaraam roda 4 harganya 40rb lumayan mahal untuk kendaraan 😊 …
english_translation: A good family recreation spot. However, there are some mask vendors who are pushy. Even though the sulfur smell isn't that strong. Ticket prices are 30,000 per person on weekends, and 40,000 for a four-wheeled vehicle. It's quite expensive for the vehicle.

text: Kami dari group study tour dewan pimpinan daerah partai keadilan sejahtera kabupaten Musi Banyuasin Sumatera Selatan berkunjung kesini sangat terkesan atas keramahan penduduk setempat, terimakasih kami telah di sambut dengan panorama yang indah dan sangat memukau.
english_translation: We, from the study tour group of the regional leadership council of the Prosperous Justice Party, Musi Banyuasin Regency, South Sumatra, visited here and were very impressed with the hospitality of the local residents. Thank you for welcoming us with a beautiful and very stunning panorama.

text: Sekarang ada wahana baru rainbow slide, tiket masuk 30rb/org bisa ditukar dengan minuman dingin dan Kopi segelas. Kalo mau makan harus tuker dengan koin dan ditambah pajak. Banyak pilihan jajanan ringan sampai berat. Tempat ini cocok buat bawa keluarga dan anak2..
english_translation: Now there's a new rainbow slide ride. The entrance ticket is Rp 30,000 per person and can be exchanged for a cold drink and a glass of coffee. If you want to eat, you have to exchange it with coins and add tax. There are many choices of snacks, from light to heavy. This place is suitable for bringing family and children.

text:
Salah satu tempat wisata kuliner unik di Bandung. Harga makanan dan minuman tergolong murah (mulai dari Rp10 ribu)
Harus tukar koin untuk beli makanan, tp jangan tukar terlalu banyak krn gak bisa diuangkan lg.
Banyak wahana bermain untuk anak dan jg spot foto unik
english_translation:
One of the unique culinary attractions in Bandung. Food and drinks are relatively cheap (starting from Rp10 thousand).
You have to exchange for coins to buy food, but don't exchange too much as it cannot be refunded.
There are many play attractions for children and also unique photo spots.

text: Tempat yg indah utk ber swafoto, tempat nya kecil tp indah, tp kyk nya pembangunan msih berjalan, & kyk nya nnti bakal jd luas, tiket masuk 50 rb per orang, cmn jln nya, punclut itu kecil & sering macet, apalagi kl hr libur, & tempat ini menurut q bagus & indah 👍 …
english_translation: A beautiful place for selfies, the place is small but beautiful, but it seems construction is still ongoing, and it looks like it will become spacious later. Entrance fee is 50 thousand per person. Just the road, Punclut is small and often congested, especially on holidays, and this place, in my opinion, is good and beautiful 👍...

text: Spot wisata yang lengkap hanya dengan htm 10k bisa hiking melewati hutan pinus yang udara sangat sejuk banyak spot poto sepanjang perjalanan menuju airterjun ada tempat kemping nya juga, cuma ada kekurangan nya akses jalan sesudah dusun bambu lumayan kurang nyaman.
english_translation: A complete tourist spot for only 10k entrance fee, you can hike through a cool pine forest with many photo spots along the way to the waterfall. There's also a campsite. The only drawback is that the road access after Dusun Bambu is quite uncomfortable.

text:
Masuk kesana bayar per Orang 40rb. Ini hanya taman2 yg bagus (instagramable) utk spot2 foto.

Kalau menurut saya waktu terbaik kesana sore hari, krn lampu2nya nyala.

Parkiran banyak pohon2 pinus dan udara sejuk. Disekitar banyak penjual makanan seperti mie instan.
english_translation:
Entry there costs 40,000 per person. These are just nice (Instagrammable) gardens for photo spots.

In my opinion, the best time to go is in the afternoon, because the lights are on.

The parking lot has many pine trees and the air is cool. Nearby, there are many food vendors selling instant noodles.

text: Pemandangan kawah Tangkubanparahu dari dulu gak pernah mengecewakan. Fasilitasnya juga semakin baik. Namun harga tiket untuk turis asing yang hampir 10x lipat dari turis lokal, membuat spot yang menjadi icon wisata Jawa Barat ini seringkali mendapat review negatif.
english_translation: The view of the Tangkubanparahu crater has never been disappointing. The facilities are also getting better. However, the ticket price for foreign tourists, which is almost 10 times that of local tourists, often leads to negative reviews for this spot, which is a tourist icon of West Java.

text:
Pembayarannya unik, yaitu uang tunai yang kita miliki ditukar dengan koin yang dimiliki dari sana dan digunakan untuk transaksi di dalamnya.
Terdapat pula banyak makanan-makanan mulai dari yang ringan hingga yang berat.
Untuk wahana, saya rasa bisa untuk semua umur
english_translation:
The payment is unique, which is that the cash we have is exchanged for coins owned from there and used for transactions within.
There are also many foods ranging from light to heavy.
For rides, I think they are suitable for all ages.

text: Curug maribaya yang posisinya berdekatan dengan lodge maribaya. Jadi wisata ke curug maribaya sekalian aja langsung ke lodge maribaya. Akses jalan buat kesini juga mudah di akses. Harga tiket murah, parkiran juga terbilang cukup murah untuk mobil atau motor. Nyaman
english_translation: Curug Maribaya, which is located close to Maribaya Lodge. So, when visiting Curug Maribaya, you might as well go directly to Maribaya Lodge. The access road to get here is also easy to access. The ticket price is cheap, and parking is also quite cheap for cars or motorcycles. Comfortable.

text: Tempanya bagus, makanannya enak - enak tapi harganya ya lumayan mahal untuk porsinya.. dan sewa kostum sangat mahal dan jika mau ambil softcopy sangat mahal dan tidak bisa ambil per file.. untuk penyewaan kostum sangat tidak recommended.. selebihnya masih oke.. 👍 …
english_translation: The place is nice, the food is delicious but the price is quite expensive for the portion.. and the costume rental is very expensive and if you want to get soft copies it's very expensive and you can't get them per file.. the costume rental is highly not recommended.. other than that, it's still okay.. 👍 …

text: Layak untuk kembali lagi ke sini, ketika Anda ingin mendaki dan berkemah tetapi tidak memakan waktu terlalu lama. Hanya membutuhkan waktu 30 menit dari pusat kota Bandung. Cuacanya bagus. Mungkin sekitar 13 derajat celcius saat malam tiba. Untuk pemula, sempurna;)
english_translation: Worth coming back here when you want to hike and camp but it doesn't take too long. It only takes 30 minutes from Bandung city center. The weather is nice. Maybe around 13 degrees Celsius when night falls. Perfect for beginners ;)

text: Mulai lengkap, ada kereta wisata, ada perahu wisata, ada sepeda air, ada spot2 foto dengan latar belakang patung2 di bali, ada jg menunggang kuda, kalo yg mau sewa sepeda listrik atau sepeda biasa juga ada, cm utk makanan kurang variasi nya, lbh pas utk camilan aja
english_translation: Complete from the start, there are tourist trains, there are tourist boats, there are pedal boats, there are photo spots with Balinese statues as backdrops, there's also horseback riding. If you want to rent electric bikes or regular bikes, those are also available. However, the food variety is lacking; it's more suitable for snacks.

text:
Dulu sih pertama pertama kesitu oke tempatnya bersih tapi pas kemaren ke situ lagi ko kaya jadi banyak sampah ya?
Sayang banget padahal tempatnya bagus
Dan beli kesitu pun sekarang ga pake tiket
Tapi untuk harga masih sama
Nah ga tau tuh untuk uang tiketnya kemana🤣
english_translation: At first, when I went there, the place was clean, but when I went again yesterday, it seemed like there were a lot of trash. It's a shame, especially since the place is nice. And now you don't need a ticket to get in. But the price is still the same. I wonder where the ticket money went?

text:
kesini healing piknik bareng ibu2 rt, tiket lumayan mahal, dan utk ke jembatan gantung bayar lagi jika tiketnya gak terusan

namanya doang orchid forest, anggreknya sedikit, lebih dominan hutan pinus, banyak spot foto, lumayan segar, area luas, overall menyenangkan
english_translation:
Came here for a healing picnic with the neighborhood mothers. The ticket was quite expensive, and for the suspension bridge, you have to pay extra if it's not a package ticket.

It's called Orchid Forest, but there are few orchids. It's dominated by pine trees. There are many photo spots, it's quite refreshing, the area is spacious, and overall it was enjoyable.

text:
Bagus banget viewnya buat foto-foto, tapi harus hati-hati karena kadang ada banyak monyet.

Tapi kalau misal disamperin sama monyet, ingat ya harus tenang biar simonyetna gak merasa terancam, dan usahain jangan bawa tas yg terbuka biar gak di ambil sama si monyetna.
english_translation:
The view is great for taking pictures, but you have to be careful because sometimes there are a lot of monkeys.

But if a monkey approaches you, remember to stay calm so the monkey doesn't feel threatened, and try not to bring an open bag so the monkey doesn't take it.

text: Tempatnya luas banget, spot untuk foto" dan selfie banyak pokonya seneng main ke orchid forest,, apa lagi liat bunga anggreknya syuka banget, dan akhirnya beli juga anggerek bulan  harga 175 , pengen ke sini lg mau beli  bunga anggrek lagi nyesel ngak beli banyak...
english_translation: The place is really spacious, lots of spots for photos and selfies, overall I enjoyed visiting Orchid Forest. Especially seeing the orchids, I loved them so much, and in the end, I bought a moon orchid for 175. I want to come back here again to buy more orchids, I regret not buying more...

text: Tempat wisata ini banyak berbagai macam tanaman hias bunga bunga yang indah sehingga cuacanya terasa sejuk pemandangan sangat bagus buat refresing selfi banyak berbagai makanan khas tradisional dll. Tempat disini juga bisa menghirup udara segar bagus buat kesehatan.
english_translation: This tourist spot has a wide variety of beautiful flowering ornamental plants, making the air feel cool. The scenery is very good for refreshing and taking selfies, with many kinds of traditional local foods, etc. The air here is also fresh, which is good for health.

text: View nya bagus bgt, seger liat tanaman hijau dimana2 nan syantik ulala,, untuk area bermain anak d dlm pun bagus sekali, Mushola bersih, Toilet jg bersih bgt g jorok...Verry Recommended deh buat wisata keluarga,wisata selfie Krn bnyk spot foto bagus yg instragamble.
english_translation: The view is really good, it's refreshing to see green plants everywhere and they are beautiful, ulala,, the children's play area inside is also very good, the prayer room is clean, the toilet is also very clean, not dirty... Highly Recommended for family trips, selfie trips because there are many good, Instagrammable photo spots.

text: Seperti tempat tempat wisata yang lainnya, banyak spot buat poto poto, htm 50rb per orang belum termasuk wahana yang ada dialaminya, pun parkir mobil belum termasuk, lahan parkir cukup luas, suasana lumayan sejuk, bolehlah buat nambah wawasan tempat wisata dibandung
english_translation: Like other tourist attractions, there are many spots for taking photos. The entrance fee is IDR 50,000 per person, not including the rides experienced. Parking fees are also not included. The parking lot is quite spacious, and the atmosphere is pleasantly cool. It's worth considering to broaden your knowledge of tourist spots in Bandung.

text: Kemarin minggu pagi rencana hiking ke puncak Tangkuban perahu (Puncak Upas) lewat jalur wana wisata jaya giri tapi ternyata saat sampai lokasi kita di cegat oleh petugasnya di beri info kalo untuk hiking lokasi tutup dan akan di buka kembali tanggal 1 September'21..
english_translation: Yesterday, Sunday morning, the plan was to hike to the Tangkuban Perahu peak (Puncak Upas) via the Jaya Giri forest tourism path, but when we arrived at the location, we were stopped by an officer who informed us that the location was closed for hiking and would reopen on September 1, 2021.

text: Tempat camp yg lumayan, lebih enak d curug tilu nya, kalo ga lan camp bisa datang pagi pulang sore, ada penyewaan tenda dan atau alat2 camp lainnya, Tiket 15rb per orang, jarak tempuh yg ga terllau jauh dari parkiran,bisa main air dsungai, air jernih tp dingiiiiinnn
english_translation: A decent camping spot, it's nicer at Curug Tilu though. If you're not camping, you can come in the morning and leave in the afternoon. There's tent and/or other camping gear rental. The ticket is Rp 15,000 per person. The distance from the parking lot isn't too far. You can play in the river, the water is clear but coooooold.

text: Tempat ini memiliki pemandangan aliran sungai dan sungai berbatu yang indah, ada stalaktit stalagmit, gua dan kolam alami hanya dengan 10k .... Anda dapat menyewa tempat tidur gantung dan barang-barang seperti jaket pengaman atau mengambil foto di atas perahu bambu
english_translation: This place has beautiful views of a river stream and rocky rivers, there are stalactites, stalagmites, caves, and natural pools for only 10k.... You can rent hammocks and items like safety jackets or take photos on a bamboo boat.

text:
Adem banget tempatnya, cocok banget untuk refreshing keluarga.
pas banget lagi laper banyak yg jualan ada makanan favorit "soto mie Bogor" gw kira rasanya kayak kuah biasanya, ternyata enak banget.. rasa kuah gurih pedes cocok banget sama suasana Lembang yg dingin..
english_translation:
The place is very cool, perfect for a family refreshing.
It was the perfect time to be hungry, many vendors were selling, there was my favorite food "Soto Mie Bogor". I thought the taste was like usual broth, but it turned out to be very delicious. The savory and spicy broth taste was a perfect match for the cold Lembang atmosphere.

text:
tempatnya bagus,saran aja klo mau k stu pagi bgt atau menjelang sore klo dari jam 9 kesana d jamin panas kecuali musim hujan 😁😁
yg paling ga rekomen itu di depan suka ada karangtaruna yg nagih uang permotor 10rb,,, buat apa gt padahal tiket beda lh di dalem,...😁😁😁 …
english_translation:
The place is good. My suggestion is to go very early in the morning or towards the evening. If you go there from 9 AM, you are guaranteed it will be hot, unless it's the rainy season 😁😁
The least recommended part is the karangtaruna (youth organization) at the front who charge 10,000 rupiah per motorcycle. What's that for? The ticket is separate and already inside...😁😁😁 …

text: Tempatnya bagus banget dan aesthetic buat foto-foto dengan tema earth tone. Areanya sangat luas dan banyak spot foto bagus. Untuk naik ke jembatan gantung perlu beli tiket lagi. Paling bagus dikunjungi sore hari saat lampu-lampu di jembatan gantung mulai dinyalakan.
english_translation: The place is really nice and aesthetic for taking photos with an earth tone theme. The area is very spacious with many good photo spots. To go up the suspension bridge, you need to buy another ticket. It's best to visit in the late afternoon when the lights on the suspension bridge start to turn on.

text: Htm 30k/orang & parkir motor 5k. Tiket bs ditukar dgn free drinks. Banyak sekali penjual makanan di pasar apungnya, banyak spot untuk foto, udara sejuk walaupun ramai, toilet dan mushola dimana2 tersedia, banyak arena untuk bermain juga, sangat cocok untuk keluarga.
english_translation: Entrance fee 30k/person & motorcycle parking 5k. Tickets can be exchanged for free drinks. Lots of food vendors at the floating market, many photo spots, cool air even though it's crowded, toilets and prayer rooms available everywhere, many play areas too, very suitable for families.

text: Tempat rekreasi dan wisata kuliner yg cukup seru dan pnya pemandangan yang asri dan sejuk...ada kota mini wahana bermain anak yg bs bermain profesi dan yg paling seru wisata kulinernya di pinggir danau...makanannya banyak bgt variasinya dan harganya mayan terjangkau
english_translation: A recreational spot and culinary tourism destination that's quite exciting and has a beautiful, cool natural view... there's a mini city with a children's playground where they can play pretend professions, and the most exciting part is the culinary tourism by the lake... there are so many food varieties and the prices are quite affordable.

text: Seruuuuu tempatnya bersih, alam, sejuk, banyak acaraa kayak live music, makanan, golf, dan masih banyak deh... Bagus untuk yg bawa keluarga ngadem disini... Masuk tiketnya 40ribu perorang parkir 10ribu jdi 50 ribu itu untuk mobil... Recommend mesti kesini lg nanti...
english_translation: Awesome! The place is clean, natural, cool, with lots of events like live music, food, golf, and much more... Great for families to relax here... Entrance fee is 40,000 per person, parking is 10,000, so it's 50,000 for a car... Recommend I must come here again later...

text:
seruuu.. cocok untuk liburan keluarga atau gathering. Lebih seru lagi klo datang pas Weekday, karna permainan gak harus antri.

Tempatnya bersih. Tersedia toilet yang juga layak pengunjung.

Tiket masuk murah, tiket outbond bayar terpisah. Tapi harga juga terjangkau.
english_translation:
Exciting... suitable for family holidays or gatherings. It's even more exciting to come during the weekdays because there are no queues for the games.

The place is clean. There are toilets which are also decent for visitors.

The entrance ticket is cheap, outbound tickets are paid separately. But the prices are also affordable.

text: Tempat kemping murah meriah dan menantang. Perjalanan menuju lokasi cukup seru dgn jalan berbatu, lebih seru dgn kendaraan offroad. Pemandangan alam luar biasa indah. Ada area sungai dan air terjun, sesuai namanya. Kekurangannya hanya toiletnya sedikit dan berjauhan.
english_translation: Affordable and challenging campsite. The journey to the location is quite exciting with a rocky road, even more exciting with an offroad vehicle. The natural scenery is incredibly beautiful. There are river and waterfall areas, as the name suggests. The only drawback is that the toilets are few and far apart.

text: Agak jauh sih daei tempat masuk ke kawah ratu sekitar kurang lebih 4km, tp diatan keren banget view sekelilingnya, ga nyesel sih sama harga tiketnya cuma yang agak mahal buat parkirnya aja. Hati2 juga anginnya kuenceng di area kawahnya. But over all so beautiful view
english_translation: It's a bit far from the entrance to Ratu Crater, about 4km, but the surrounding view is amazing, no regrets about the ticket price, only the parking is a bit expensive. Also, be careful, the wind is strong in the crater area. But overall, the view is so beautiful.

text: Maribaya terletak di sebelah utara kota Bandung. Tepat nya berada di sebelah timur Lembang. Kawasan ini dulu terkenal dengan pemandian air panas nya. Tapi saat ini yang masih terkenal adalah alam nya yang masih asri dan menyatu dengan kawasan Taman Hutan Raya Djuanda
english_translation: Maribaya is located north of Bandung city. It is precisely located east of Lembang. This area was once famous for its hot springs. But today, what is still famous is its unspoiled nature, integrated with the Djuanda Forest Park area.

text: Staf reception ramah, staf resto ramah juga, makanan enak semua (pesan nasi goreng, karage, matcha, kopinya apalagi enak banget) harganya murah, bener2 memuaskan. vibe nya dapet banget !!!!!! Buat yang mau tenang sejenak dari keriwehan wajib bet kesini. ❤️This place.
english_translation: Friendly reception staff, friendly restaurant staff too, all the food was delicious (ordered fried rice, karage, matcha, and the coffee was especially delicious). The prices are cheap, truly satisfying. The vibe is spot on!!!!!! For those who want to be quiet for a moment from the hustle and bustle, this is a must-visit. ❤️This place.

text: Tempat buat santai sejenak dari aktifitaz kota yang rame macet polusi, tenangkan disini udaranya sejuk ada suara2 air yang menenangkan (iyalah namanya jg curug🤭) tempatnya luas, instagramable, dan meskipun ga main aer juga cukup puas foto2 dan sehat lah buat paru2. …
english_translation: A place to relax for a moment from the city's busy, jammed, and polluted activities. Calm down here, the air is cool, and there are soothing sounds of water (well, it's a waterfall, of course 🤭). The place is spacious, Instagrammable, and even if you don't play in the water, it's satisfying enough to take photos and healthy for your lungs. ...

text: Pas datang jam12 siang jd kbru kabutnya trun akhrny poto2 sbntr,, gerimis lg,, tiket 30/orng, mobil 40rb,, tmpt parkir luas,, hanya mushola dan toilet kurng bersih,, banyak yg bantuin untk pto dan g mau dikasih tips,, hnya qt aja yg peka untuk beli brng yg dia jual,,
english_translation: It arrived at 12 PM, so the fog had already descended. Finally, we took some quick photos, and it started drizzling again. The ticket was 30 per person, and parking for the car was 40,000. The parking lot is spacious. Only the prayer room and toilets were not very clean. Many people helped us take photos and didn't want tips. We just had to be perceptive enough to buy the items they were selling.

text: Tempatnya luas, nyaman, adem. Kalau mau nginep dipondokan juga bisa tapi bayarnya agak mahalan buat sport foto juga bagus. Kalau kesini sama keluarga sama teman kerja teman main teman kampus atau sekolah juga pas banget. Mau nginep, kantin, tempat buat games juga ada
english_translation: The place is spacious, comfortable, and cool. If you want to stay overnight in the boarding house, that's also possible, but it's a bit more expensive. It's also good for sports photography. It's very suitable to come here with family, work colleagues, playmates, or college/school friends. There's also lodging, a canteen, and a place for games.

text: pemandangannya keren banget, cuman waktu itu dari jalan gede buat ke dalemnya diperjalanan disuruh bayar 10 ribu, kirain udah sama tiket masuk ternyata engga, tiket masuknya beda lagi tapi seru sih tempatnya banyak buat spot foto gitu bahkan banyak yang foto prewed .
english_translation: The view is really cool, but at the time, from the main road to get inside, we were asked to pay 10 thousand. I thought it included the entrance ticket, but it didn't, the entrance ticket was separate. But it was fun, the place has a lot of photo spots, and many people even took pre-wedding photos there.

text: Bagussss dan terawatt.. luas lagi jadi puas jalan2nya dan ga nyesel bayar 50K buat HTM. Tapi akses jalan ke sini dari Bandung, susahhhh... pakai google maps dilewatin jalan yang kecil banget padahal pake mobil, selain kecil jalannya banyak yg rusak dan menanjak pula.
english_translation: Very good and well-maintained. It's also spacious, so it's satisfying to walk around, and I don't regret paying the 50K entrance fee. However, the road access to get here from Bandung is very difficult. Using Google Maps, it takes you down extremely small roads, even though you're in a car. Besides being small, many of the roads are damaged and also uphill.

text:
Walau akses jalan menuju lokasi rusak tapi lumayan terbayar dengan suasana yg di orchid forest

Tempat parkir: lebih diatur dan ditertibkan, karena berantakan, masih tanah.

Saran untuk pengunjung : pake sepatu olahraga, karena luasnya lokasi, supaya tidak pegal kaki
english_translation:
Although the road access to the location is damaged, it's somewhat compensated by the atmosphere at Orchid Forest.

Parking: More organized and orderly, as it was messy and still unpaved.

Advice for visitors: Wear sports shoes, due to the large size of the location, so your feet don't get sore.

text:
Salah satu curug/air terjun yang besar di jawa barat setelah curug cikanteh di ciletuh
Akses  jalan raya ke curug ini sudah bagus. Ada tempat swafoto, tempat makan dan juga saung untuk bersantai.
Tolong jangan buang sampah sembarangan ya, mari ikut melestarikan alam.
english_translation:
One of the large waterfalls in West Java, after Curug Cikanteh in Ciletuh.
The road access to this waterfall is already good. There are photo spots, eating places, and also gazebos to relax.
Please do not litter, let's participate in preserving nature.

text:
Tempat nya yg indah dan asri penuh tumbuhan.
Tpi menurut ku kurang worth it.

Masuk kedalam harus bayar 50rb dan kalau udh nyampe kedalam, dikuras disuruh bayar foto ini lah, bayar buat flying fox ama golf lah dll.

Yah menurut ku gk worth it
Tapi dalam cantik banget
english_translation:
The place is beautiful and lush with plants.
But in my opinion, it's not worth it.

To enter, you have to pay 50,000 rupiah, and once inside, they charge you for photos, flying fox, golf, etc.

Yeah, in my opinion, it's not worth it.
But the inside is very beautiful.

text:
Biaya masuk -20K
Parkir -5K
indomie - 10K
bala-bala - 1K
Kopi -5K
sewa pelampung -15K

Dengan pemandangan yang indah begini sih... worth it... dateng deh lebih pagi. btw, disini susah sinyal banget. bawa baju buat ganti biar bisa berenang. dateng juga pas musim panas
english_translation:
Entrance fee - 20K
Parking - 5K
Indomie - 10K
Bala-bala - 1K
Coffee - 5K
Float rental - 15K

With such a beautiful view... it's worth it... come earlier. By the way, the signal here is really bad. Bring clothes to change so you can swim. Come during summer too.

text:
Dari namanya aja udah ketahuan ya,jadi yang pasti banyak ornamen san suasana mirip dengan bali,ada patung patung tokoh pewayangan,
Ada wahana bermain untuk anak,boleh bawa hewan peliharaan juga.
Harga makanan juga relatif lah.
Ada feeding juga buat domba sama kelinci
english_translation:
From its name alone, it's already known, so for sure there are many ornaments and an atmosphere similar to Bali, there are statues of wayang figures,
There are play attractions for children, and you can also bring pets.
Food prices are also relative.
There's also feeding for sheep and rabbits.

text: Pemandangannya bagus. Udaranya enak dan segar. Medan tempuh masuk ke stone garden kurang bagus, jalannya berbatu sekali dan banyak debu. Expect a bit medium hike here. Tiket masuknya banyak. Mobil parkir 2x, jika mau masuk area aktivitas (indian camp) tambahan biaya.
english_translation: The scenery is good. The air is nice and fresh. The path to the stone garden is not very good, the road is very rocky and dusty. Expect a bit medium hike here. The entrance fee is a lot. Car parking is 2x, if you want to enter the activity area (Indian camp) there is an additional fee.

text:
Tempat indah buat nikmatin ketenangan bareng doi, bersih, luas.
Jalan menuju lokasi lumayan extreme, agak licin, dan gaada petunjuk jalan, kadang harus injek pipa air dan 1x jembatan, dll.
.
3 curug yang punya karakteristik masing".
Next time, kesana lagi.
RECOMMENDED
english_translation:
A beautiful place to enjoy tranquility with your partner, clean, spacious.
The road to the location is quite extreme, a bit slippery, and there are no road signs, sometimes you have to step on water pipes and cross one bridge, etc.
.
3 waterfalls, each with its own characteristics.
Next time, I'll go there again.
RECOMMENDED

text: Menikmati sunrise disini sangat menyenangkan. Tempat yang asyik untuk mengadakan kegiatan outdoor seperti camping atau api unggun. Lokasinya tidak terlalu jauh dari pusat kota sehingga jika ingin camping ala ala yang berada di sekitar Bandung, Gunung Putri pilihannya.
english_translation: Enjoying the sunrise here is very pleasant. It's a great place for outdoor activities like camping or bonfires. The location isn't too far from the city center, so if you want a "Bandung-style" camping experience nearby, Gunung Putri is the choice.

text:
Pemandangan di puncak udah bagus,

Kurangnya fasilitas jumlah kamar mandi, harus bayar lagi kalo buang air kecil/besar dan airnya sering habis,
Banyak botol bekas yg berisi air sisa pembuangan manusia.

Buat yg kesana siapin tempat sampah sendiri untuk di atas puncak.
english_translation:
The view from the summit is already good,

Lack of facilities, number of bathrooms, having to pay again for urination/defecation and the water often runs out,
Many used bottles containing human waste water.

Those going there, prepare your own trash can for the summit.

text: Areanya cukup luas ditengah hutan pinus yang rapi dengan udara yang segar. Bisa mencoba berbagai macam kegiatan outbond, ngasih makan kelinci, foto sama rusa, petik strawberry, dan ada pondokannya juga. Oh ya spot foto yang instagramable juga banyak. Pokoknya lengkap!
english_translation: The area is quite spacious in the middle of a neat pine forest with fresh air. You can try various outdoor activities, feed rabbits, take photos with deer, pick strawberries, and there are also cabins. Oh yes, there are also many Instagrammable photo spots. Basically, it's complete!

text:
Terimakasih buat semua penjaga curug Cimahi,pertama buat penjaga warung sama yg di pos simaksi,terimakasih udh ngobatin saya pas saya kecelakaan,,
Sekali lgi terimakasih
Curugnya mantep cuma himbauan aja jgn terlalu berani buat turun ke perairan,di situ batunya licin,
english_translation:
Thank you to all the caretakers of Curug Cimahi, first to the stall keepers and those at the simulation post, thank you for treating me when I had an accident.
Thank you again.
The waterfall is great, just a reminder, don't be too brave to go down to the water, the rocks there are slippery.

text: Tempatnnya baguss, tenangg, dan dingin di sore hari. Untuk ke jembatan bayar lg 20k. Datengnya saat hari minggu tp gaada musik yg sedang live, mungkin hanya acara2 tertentu kali ya. Setelah sampai bawah nnti ada angkot untuk kembali ke parkiran. Semoga selalu terawatt
english_translation: The place is nice, peaceful, and cool in the afternoon. To go to the bridge, it costs another 20k. We came on a Sunday but there was no live music, maybe it's only for certain events. After reaching the bottom, there will be a public van to return to the parking lot. Hope it's always well-maintained.

text: Harus siap macet macetan buat kesini pas weekend, lebih disarankan naik motor sih kalo weekend, biar bisa dapet banyak tempat lain di bandung. Kalo naik mobil bisa seharian buat kesini aja. Siap2 masker juga yaaa karena banyak tambang kapur dan jalanan berdebu banget.
english_translation: Be prepared for traffic jams if you come here on the weekend. It's highly recommended to take a motorbike on weekends so you can visit more places in Bandung. If you come by car, it might take you all day just to get here. Bring a mask too, because there are many limestone mines and the roads are very dusty.

text:
tempatnya bagus bgt.. walaupun jauhhhhhh.. rasa lelah di perjalanan akan terobati saat sampai di air terjun Malela..
aset jln dr parkiran ke lokasi hrs pakai ojeg.. bajetnya sekitar 70 rb PP..
tapi ga apa" lah..mending naik ojeg..klo jln 1.25 km kyanya cape bgt.. hehe
english_translation:
The place is really great.. even though it's farrrrrr.. the tiredness from the journey will be relieved when you arrive at Malela waterfall..
The road from the parking lot to the location requires a motorbike taxi.. the budget is around 70 thousand for a round trip..
But it's okay.. it's better to take a motorbike taxi.. if you walk 1.25 km, it seems like it would be very tiring.. hehe

text: Floating Market merupakan salah satu destinasi wisata di Bandung yang banyak dikunjungi para wisatawan dengan ciri khas-nya ada danau/situ. Sangat pas untuk liburan keluarga, tidak perlu ragu untuk bawa anak-anak juga, mereka akan senang apabila dibawa liburan kesini.
english_translation: Floating Market is one of the tourist destinations in Bandung that is frequently visited by tourists, characterized by its lake/reservoir. It's very suitable for family holidays, there's no need to hesitate to bring children along; they will be happy if taken on vacation here.

text: Masya Allah.... Udaranya dingin tapi sejuk, hijau, asri, makanan berlimpah, super duper cocok untuk merangkai cinta bersama keluarga tersayang. Tempat liburan yang cocok untuk semua usia. Btw, wajib naik perahu naga dan naik rainbow slide yang sangat memicu adrenalin.
english_translation: Masya Allah.... The air is cold but cool, green, beautiful, the food is abundant, super duper suitable for creating love with loved ones. A holiday destination suitable for all ages. By the way, you must ride the dragon boat and try the very adrenaline-pumping rainbow slide.

text: Cobain mampir kesini kalo pas kamu lagi ke lembang... Seger loh. Harga tiket masuk 20rb per org. Di dalem banyak tanaman dan bibit yg bisa di beli. Mulai dari sayur, tanaman hingga buah. Keren yah , bisa pelihara banyak bunga dan rapih. Sukses terus buat Kebun Begonia
english_translation: Cobain stop by here if you happen to be in Lembang... It's refreshing. The entrance ticket price is 20 thousand rupiah per person. Inside, there are many plants and seedlings you can buy. From vegetables, plants to fruits. Cool, right? You can keep many flowers and keep them tidy. Keep up the success for Kebun Begonia.

text: Seneng sekali bisa jalan-jalan di tempat ini, lumayan nambah langkah jalan per-hari. Udaranya sejuk banget dan ke sini hari Senin gak terlalu rame. Ada HTM di pintu masuk cuma lupa nominalnya. Walaupun anggrek ga terlalu banyak tapi hutan pinusnya menyenangkan sekali.
english_translation: It's great to be able to walk around this place, it helps increase my daily step count. The air is very cool and coming here on Monday wasn't too crowded. There's an entrance fee at the gate, but I forgot the exact amount. Although there weren't too many orchids, the pine forest was very enjoyable.

text: Stone garden citatah adalah sebuah geopark ribuan tahun yang lalu. Batunya sangat unik,  viewnya cantik... Dengan alam pegunungan yang hijau. Tempatnya sudah di kelola,  ada warung juga sebelum pintu masuk,  untuk kesana bagusnya pas hijau ya... Jangan musim kemarau..
english_translation: Stone garden citatah is a thousands-of-years-old geopark. The rocks are very unique, the view is beautiful... With green mountainous nature. The place is already managed, there's also a stall before the entrance, it's best to go when it's green... Not during the dry season..

text: Kesini udah 2 kali. Awalnya kesana cuacanya ga mendukung. Baru foto satu tempat langsung hujan dan kabut. Yg kedua kalinya Alhamdulillah cuacanya cerah dan mendukung. Jadi bisa keliling sampai jembatan panjang. Untuk harganya menurut saya lumayan mahal, overall okelah
english_translation: I've been here twice already. The first time, the weather wasn't supportive. I only managed to take photos in one spot before it started raining and got foggy. The second time, thankfully, the weather was clear and favorable. So, I was able to explore all the way to the long bridge. For the price, I think it's quite expensive, but overall it's okay.

text:
Baru pertama kali ke tangkuban perahu. Banyak Spot foto bagus, cuma sempit jalan kaki nya dan agak sulit karena bentuknya bebatuan gitu. Tapi aman

Toilet sayangnya mesti bayar, tempat sholat nyaman.

Untuk pedagang nya agak ngecer tapi emang dimana2 begitu si. Hehhe..
english_translation:
This is my first time visiting Tangkuban Perahu. There are many good photo spots, but the walking paths are narrow and a bit difficult because they are rocky. However, it is safe.

Unfortunately, the toilets require payment, but the prayer area is comfortable.

The vendors are a bit pushy, but that's the way it is everywhere. Heh heh...

text:
Buat ademin diri okay, buat Main okay, Jangan lupa mampir di curug ini ya guys

Mau bawa anak boleh, sodara, atau siapapun boleh

Pertanyaan?  Silahkan ke YouTube saya ahmadsetianto, bisa subscribe dlu untuk bergabung add ke komunitas Dan Nanti bisa bertanya di forum 😁
english_translation:
Cool yourself down okay, for playing okay, Don't forget to stop by this waterfall guys.

You can bring your children, siblings, or anyone you want.

Questions? Please go to my YouTube channel ahmadsetianto, you can subscribe first to join the community and then you can ask questions in the forum 😁

text: Kalau mau latihan mendaki gunung. Ini adalah salah satu tempat yang recomended banget. Tapi latihan bener-benar untuk orang yang ngga pernah mendaki gunung ya.  Bukan yang udah pernah tetus mau latihan fisik wkwkkw ... bjat latihan mendaki gunung si kecil juga bisa loh
english_translation: If you want to practice mountain climbing. This is one of the highly recommended places. But this is really for people who have never climbed a mountain before. Not for those who have already climbed and want to train physically, lol... even kids can practice mountain climbing here

text: Tempatnya lumayan ya, cuman itu ada salah satu pekerja cowo waktu saya ke sana pake baju item, eh mungkin semua item ya gatau dia doang wkwk, ga ngenakin banget omongannya, tolong buat dikondisikan ke pekerja di sana tentang tata krama ke pengunjungnya, makasih, sekian
english_translation: The place is okay, but there was one male employee when I went there wearing a black shirt, or maybe all of them were black, I don't know, he was really unpleasant to talk to. Please address the staff there about their manners towards visitors. Thank you, that's all.

text:
Tempat yg bagus sekali pemandangan yg luar biasa, alam yg masih seger itu tempat yg pas buat foto praweding cucok pokoknya.
Dah ingat jika anda berkunjung ke alam bebas jngan budayakan buang sampah sembarangan oke.
Alam yg bersih dan sehat itu buat kebaikan semua umat.
english_translation:
A very nice place with an amazing view, the fresh nature is a perfect spot for pre-wedding photos, absolutely great.
Remember, if you visit the great outdoors, don't litter, okay.
Clean and healthy nature is for the good of all people.

text:
Tempat yang sangat bagus, suasananya adeem dan tidak terlalu rame, view nya luar biasa..

Hiburan untuk anak2 ada sepeda air dll, berkuda, penyewaan sepeda listrik scooter dll utk keliling lembah..

Makanannya yg kurang variatif, dan tidak boleh membawa makanan dr luar
english_translation:
A very nice place, the atmosphere is cool and not too crowded, the view is extraordinary.

There is entertainment for children such as paddle boats etc., horse riding, rental of electric bikes, scooters etc. for touring the valley.

The food lacks variety, and outside food is not allowed.

text: Surga untuk yang seneng foto2 dengan background bunga-bunga warna warni. Fasilitas, kebun aneka tanaman bunga+ tanaman sayuran,  mushola, tempat makan, spot foto. Sekedar masukan, jumlah toilet ditambah agar sepadan dengan jumlah pengunjung yang klo pas weekend bejubel
english_translation: A paradise for those who love taking photos with colorful floral backgrounds. Facilities include gardens with various flowering plants and vegetables, a prayer room, a dining area, and photo spots. Just a suggestion, the number of toilets should be increased to match the number of visitors, which can be overwhelming on weekends.

text: di sekitar Stone Garden seharusnya dibuat juga seperti yang telah dibuat pada Guha Pawon. Sekarang Gunung Masigit, Balekambang, Karang Panganten diambang kepunahan, kalau hujan besar mesti saja ada getaran karena longsoran bekas para penambang yang tak bertanggunjawab.
english_translation: Around Stone Garden should also be made like what has been done at Pawon Cave. Now Mount Masigit, Balekambang, and Karang Panganten are on the brink of extinction, during heavy rain there will definitely be tremors due to landslides from irresponsible miners.

text: Kata saya perlu diperhatikan lebih lagi. Untuk pemeliharaannya. Biar kembali menarik wisatawan. Karena sayang banget ini ada di tengah kota, dan pinggir jalan raya. Akses angkutan umum juga mudah banget. Bangunan di tengah situ juga dihidupkan lagi. Biar makin keren...
english_translation: My words need to be paid more attention to. For its maintenance. So that it becomes attractive to tourists again. Because it's a shame that this is in the middle of the city, and on the side of the main road. Public transportation access is also very easy. The building in the middle there should also be revived. To make it even cooler...

text: Sarana high rope outbond lengkap. Bisa untuk company / family. Waktu itu kami mengadakan gathering di sana menggunakan EO Outbond Rainbow. Seruuu. Tempatnya nyaman, sejuk, segar. Ada paint ball dan memberi makan kelinci juga. Waktu berlalu cepat saat kita di sana hehehe
english_translation: Complete high rope outbound facilities. Suitable for companies/families. We held a gathering there at that time using EO Outbond Rainbow. It was fun. The place is comfortable, cool, and fresh. There's also paintball and a chance to feed rabbits. Time flies when we're there hehehe

text: Tempat wisata yg perlu di kunjungi bila berpergian ke lembang, konsepnya unik. Wisata air, dipadu dengan wisata kuliner, juga ada ala ala jepangnya.wisata edukasinya pun cukup lengkap. Bila ada kesempatan berkunjung ke lembang lagi, wisata ini, akan selalu jadi favorit.
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot when traveling to Lembang, its concept is unique. Water tourism, combined with culinary tourism, and also has a Japanese vibe. Its educational tourism is also quite complete. If there's a chance to visit Lembang again, this attraction will always be a favorite.

text: Fisik adalah faktor utama kalo mw hiking ke tempat ini, sampe puncak kalo santai bisa makan waktu 2 jam dengan jalan setapak yang cukup menantang. Tapi kalo dilakukan bersama teman dan keluarga semua itu bisa terbayar lunas dengan indahnya alam sekitar. Mantap bangeeet.
english_translation: Physical fitness is a major factor if you want to hike to this place. Reaching the summit can take up to 2 hours at a relaxed pace on a quite challenging trail. But if done with friends and family, it can all be worth it with the beautiful surrounding nature. Truly awesome.

text:
Tempat liburan bwt keluarga yg keren bgt! Apalagi klo bw anak2 sambil maen jg mengenalkan alam dgn cara yg menarik & santai
Rute dari pintu utama jalannya bener2 enak lancar sejuk pula
Pas nyampe ke atas lumayan panas n bau belerangnya lmyn nyengat, tp anak2 excited bgt
english_translation:
A really cool holiday spot for families! Especially if you bring children, it's a fun and relaxed way to introduce them to nature.
The path from the main entrance is really pleasant, smooth, and cool.
When you get to the top, it's quite hot and the sulfur smell is quite pungent, but the kids were really excited!

text: Tempatnya bagus dan ramai buat oleh2nya beragam .. dan enaknya itu udaranya jauh dari polusi dan buat tiketnya sih murah yahh .. buat penerangan jalan pas pulang sih menurut saya kurang menurut saya hati2 pas bekendara pulang .. perhatikan lampu depan dalam keadaan baik
english_translation: The place is nice and crowded, with a variety of souvenirs. And the best part is the air is far from pollution, and the ticket price is cheap. As for the street lighting when going home, in my opinion, it's lacking. I think you should be careful when riding home, pay attention to your headlights being in good condition.

text: Tempat cukup unik untuk foto2. Akses jalan agak sulit - karena jalan agak rusak dan tidak terlalu besar. Banyak area yg digunakan pasangan untuk melakukan hal-hal yg sebaiknya dilakukan di tempat private - perlu pengawasan ekstra (atau mungkin mereka yg bayar ekstra 😁🤭)
english_translation: A unique place for photos. Road access is a bit difficult - because the road is somewhat damaged and not very wide. Many areas are used by couples for doing things that should be done in private - requires extra supervision (or maybe they pay extra 😁🤭)

text:
Sayang banget pas sy dan team sampai...pas hujan trs berhenti...hujan lagi...berhenti lagi begitu trs ...
Akhirnya foto2nya kami kurang maksimal deh..heheheh...
Inshaa ALLAH jika ada waktu dan kesempatan lagi...kita akan kembali kesini...
Pemandangannya bagus banget....
english_translation:
It was such a shame when I and the team arrived...it rained, then stopped...rained again...stopped again, and so on...
In the end, our photos weren't the best...heheheh...
God willing, if we have time and another opportunity...we will come back here...
The scenery is really beautiful....

text: Jika akan pergi ke tempat wisata ini diharapkan melihat dulu kondisi cuaca agar pemandangan kawah terlihat jelas saat kondisi alam saat cerah.. tempat yang menyenangkan tak hanya menawarkan keindahan alam tapi juga berbagai macam keanekaragaman seni dan budayanya.. 😌❤ …
english_translation: If you plan to visit this tourist spot, it is expected that you check the weather conditions first so that the crater view will be clearly visible when the natural conditions are bright. A pleasant place not only offers natural beauty but also a variety of artistic and cultural diversity. 😌❤ …

text: Harga tiket masuk cukup murah, 15 ribu per orang, ada diskon rombongan untuk minimal 40 orang, tempat ini umumnya hanya berisi spot untuk berfoto, spot foto cukup banyak dan bervariatif di tempat ini, ada beberapa wahana seperti taman kelinci, berkuda, dan memetik sayur
english_translation: The entrance ticket price is quite cheap, 15 thousand per person, there are group discounts for a minimum of 40 people, this place generally only has photo spots, there are quite a lot and varied photo spots at this place, there are several attractions such as a rabbit park, horseback riding, and vegetable picking.

text: Banyak spot foto yg oke full color dan properties yg uniq, Wajib deh kalau ke Bandung sambangin nih tenpat hihi ga akan nyesel cuman sedia aja payung soalnya cuaca tak tentu, berjaga2 lebih baik, ada suasana pedesaan juga, outbond, ramah keluarga ah pokoknya banyak dehh
english_translation: Lots of great photo spots, full of color and unique properties. It's a must-visit if you're in Bandung, you won't regret it. Just bring an umbrella because the weather is unpredictable, it's better to be prepared. There's also a rural atmosphere, outbound activities, and it's family-friendly, basically, there's a lot to do.

text: Tiket masuknya 20k. Dari jalanan ga terlalu kelihatan ya disini ada wisata gitu. Tempatnya kecil. Ya lumayan lah, cuci mata dikit buat liat segernya bunga bunga, ada kebun sayurnya juga, bisa metik sendiri buat belanja, kurang worth it sih tapi 20k kaya gini doang hehehe
english_translation: The entrance fee is 20k. You can't really tell from the street that there's a tourist spot here. The place is small. Well, it's alright, a little bit of eye candy to see the fresh flowers, they also have a vegetable garden, you can pick your own to buy, it's not really worth it though for 20k for just this, hehehe.

text: jalan kedalemnya jauh,curug tilu itu jaraknya 2km dr parkiran.jadi ya edan sih jalannya jauh,sampe kaki temen saya berdarah gara gara jalanannya jelek,sama disitu airnya kadang ada kadang ngga.waktu saya kesitu airnya teu ngocor gaadaan teu turun airnya..kacau pokonamah.
english_translation: It's a long way in. Curug Tilu is 2km from the parking lot. So, yeah, it's crazy how far the walk is. My friend's leg even bled because the road was bad. Also, the water there is sometimes there and sometimes not. When I went, the water wasn't flowing, no water was coming down. It was a mess, basically.

text: Salah satu hidden paradise di kabupaten bandung barat...medannya cukup berat siapkan fisik dan mental...tiket masuknya cuma 5000 perak aja..klo ga kuat jalan ada banyak ojeg yg siap nganter...tapi jgn dikira enak da gampang juga pake ojeg disini bener2 diuji adrenalinnya
english_translation: One of the hidden paradises in West Bandung Regency... the terrain is quite challenging, prepare your physical and mental strength... the entrance fee is only 5000 rupiah... if you can't walk, there are many motorcycle taxis ready to take you... but don't think it's easy even with a motorcycle taxi here, your adrenaline will truly be tested.

text: Terminal Wisata Grafika Cikole, menghadirkan penginapan dg konsep alam yg berada di bukit & byk pohon pinus. Ada pilihan penginapan yaitu pinus, urban camp & camping ground. Udaranya dingin & menghadirkan suasana nyaman serta byk spot foto yg bagus. Very recommandend 👍 …
english_translation: Grafika Cikole Tourist Terminal, offering accommodations with a nature concept situated on a hill with many pine trees. There are accommodation options including pine, urban camp, and camping grounds. The air is cool and provides a comfortable atmosphere, with many good photo spots. Very recommended 👍 …

text: Perjalanan yg melelahkan tapi terbayar sama indahnya alam melalui batuan yg ada disana tetapi kurangnya tempat untuk rest karna pengunjung yg membludak di akhir pekan, di perjalanan kita akan menemukan 2 destinasi lain seperti sanghyang poek dan yg satunya lagi saya lupa
english_translation: The journey was tiring, but it was rewarded by the beauty of nature through the rocks there. However, there was a lack of places to rest because of the overflowing crowds on weekends. On the way, we will find 2 other destinations like Sanghyang Poek and the other one I forgot.

text: Seru, buat berakhir pekan bersama keluarga, menikmati udara pegunungan yang seger banget, viewnya syantik buat foto-foto, ada taman stroberry sekalian ngasih makan Rusa, kalau mau nginep banyak pilihan penginapan disesuaikan dengan budget, buat kemping keluarga juga seru
english_translation: Exciting, perfect for a weekend with family, enjoying the really fresh mountain air, the view is beautiful for taking photos, there's a strawberry garden where you can also feed the deer, if you want to stay overnight there are many accommodation options to suit your budget, family camping is also fun.

text: Harga tiket masuk yg murah dan terjangkau. Di sana ada byk mas2 yg jualan mknn khas oleh2, jualan strawberry, dan juga kalo mau hasil poto lbh bagus bisa memakai jasa mas2 di sana dg harga poto yg telah di cetak 20 rb/lembar.krn prg nya di weekdays, jd tdk terlalu ramai.
english_translation: The entrance ticket price is cheap and affordable. There are many gentlemen selling typical souvenirs and food, selling strawberries, and also if you want better photo results, you can use the services of the gentlemen there with the price of printed photos at 20,000 rupiah per sheet. Because it was a weekday, it wasn't too crowded.

text: Tempatnya adem, para petugas sangat baik dan memberi informasi yg cukup jelas, trek ga terlalu ekstrim lah, level moderate atau bahkan ringan, curugnya sdikit keruh karena hujan, lebih baik hindari weekend, penuh banget ga akan nyaman. Foto curugnya ga ada euy lupa moto.
english_translation: The place is cool, the staff are very kind and give clear information, the trek is not too extreme, moderate or even easy level, the waterfall is a bit murky due to the rain, it's better to avoid weekends, it's too crowded and won't be comfortable. I don't have a photo of the waterfall, I forgot to take one.

text:
Taman luas dan ada danau ditengahnya. Berbagai macam spot foto ala jepang dan gerai makanan yg lengkap. Ada juga taman kelinci, unggas dan burung dara. Ada juga kereta mini yg bisa dinaikin anak2.

Setiap Tiket masuk bisa ditukar dengan minuman yg tersedia di pintu masuk
english_translation:
A spacious park with a lake in the middle. Various Japanese-style photo spots and a complete food court. There are also rabbit, poultry, and pigeon gardens. There's also a mini train for children to ride.

Each entrance ticket can be exchanged for a drink available at the entrance.

text:
Makanan dan minuman bermacam macam, rasa makanan nya tidak terlalu spesial tp lumayan, ada banyak wahana bermain juga : rainbow slide, vr, 4D, perahu, dll. ada pijat refleksi juga.
Fasilitas lengkap, ada toilet, ada musholla 👍🏼. tiket masuk bisa ditukar dengan minuman 👍🏼
english_translation:
The food and drinks are varied, the taste of the food isn't too special but it's decent. There are also many rides: rainbow slide, VR, 4D, boat, etc. There's also reflexology.
The facilities are complete, there are toilets and a prayer room 👍🏼. The entrance ticket can be exchanged for a drink 👍🏼.

text: Curug ini berada di lembah , menuju curug ini badan harus fit , karena akan melewati  begitu banyak tangga , di tengah jalan ada 2 dek observasi , kalau tidak kuat ke curug nya , silahkan berhenti di dek observasi dan foto2 disana, uang masuk cukup murah @ 20 ribu / orang
english_translation: This waterfall is in a valley. To reach it, you need to be fit because you'll have to go up so many stairs. Midway, there are two observation decks. If you can't make it to the waterfall, feel free to stop at the observation decks and take photos there. The entrance fee is quite cheap, @ 20 thousand rupiah per person.

text:
Ga pernah bosen ke tempat ini, dari saya kecil sampai sekarang bawa anak 😁 hawa nya yg dingin bikin laper, untung banyak yg jual jajan disini... tempat yang oke buat memperkenalkan alam ke anak²

* jangan lupa kasih like yaaa, semoga yg kasih like makin banyak rezekinya 😍
english_translation:
I never get bored of coming here, from when I was a kid until now bringing my child 😁 the cold air makes me hungry, luckily there are many street food vendors here... a great place to introduce nature to children

* don't forget to like, may those who like it have more blessings in their rezeki 😍

text: Kebun bunga yang didominasi oleh bunga begonia ini terlihat cantik & menarik. Kita bisa foto2 dibeberapa sudut taman bunga, dan disediakan berbagai properti untuk menunjang hasil foto supaya lebih menarik. Kita juga bisa beli bunga begonia yang tersedia disana. Love it ❤️
english_translation: The flower garden, dominated by begonias, looks beautiful and attractive. We can take photos in several corners of the flower garden, and various props are provided to support the photos to make them more appealing. We can also buy begonias that are available there. Love it ❤️

text: Tempatnya bagus, walau tidak luas tapi banyak spot bagus utk photo, harga tiket masuk terjangkau, hanya 10k, sayang larangan bawa makanan dari luarnya berlebihan, jika ketahuan bawa makanan dari luar dendanya Rp 250 ribu, kalau photo ga bisa lama karena keburu haus hehe..
english_translation: The place is nice, although not spacious, there are many good photo spots. The entrance ticket price is affordable, only 10k. It's a shame the ban on bringing outside food is excessive; the fine for being caught is Rp 250,000. If you can't take photos for long because you get thirsty, hehe.

text: Pemandangan bagusss. Tiket masuk 35k sudah termasuk parkir motor. Akses jalan aspal sangat baguss. Bisa parkir motor dan mobil sampai area kawah, jadi bagi pemuda/pemudi jompo jan khawatir wkwkw #becandasayang. Terdapat toilet, musola, aneka warung dan pedagang oleh-oleh.
english_translation: Great views. Entrance fee is 35k, including motorcycle parking. The asphalt road access is very good. You can park motorcycles and cars all the way to the crater area, so no worries for elderly youth, lol #justkidding. There are toilets, a prayer room, various stalls, and souvenir vendors.

text:
Salah satu gunung yang naik ke puncaknya bisa naik mobil. hehehe
Pemandangan di kawah ratu sangat bagus dam suasana yang sejuk. banyak tempat belanja oleh-oleh dan makanan.
Parkiran motor sempit dan akses keluar masuk agak curam. Tiket masuk termasuk murah dan terjangkau.
english_translation:
One of the mountains whose peak can be reached by car. Hehehe.
The view at the queen's crater is very good and the atmosphere is cool. There are many places to buy souvenirs and food.
The motorcycle parking area is narrow and the access in and out is a bit steep. The entrance ticket is quite cheap and affordable.

text:
Mantap pokoe, tempat masih asri tapi sedikit kurang terurus karena banyak org yang masih tidak memperdulikan sampah yg di bawa dan di buang di tempat yang tidak seharusnya..
Padahal bisa di simpan dalam tas untuk sementara terus di buang di tempat yang sudah di sediakan..
english_translation:
Awesome, the place is still natural but a little neglected because many people still don't care about the trash they bring and throw it in inappropriate places.
Even though it can be stored in a bag temporarily and then thrown in the designated bins.

text: Tempat outbond nyaman, untuk fasilitasnya oke. Jika kau kesini diharapkan fisiknya oke karena jalannya naik turun didalam. Disarankan membawa baju hangat karena sangat dingin udaranya. Tetap memakai sunscreen walau udara dingin tetapi kalo siang kulit masih bisa terbakar.
english_translation: The outbound place is comfortable, and the facilities are okay. If you come here, it's expected that your physical condition is good because the path inside is hilly. It's recommended to bring warm clothes because the air is very cold. Continue to wear sunscreen even though the air is cold, because in the afternoon, your skin can still get sunburned.

text:
.tempatnya sangat luas..asyik untuk jalan2 dan selfie..sayangnya akses jalannya sangat buruk sekali..untung ada mobil jemputan ke atas dan ke bawah(untuk yang parkir di bawah)..
.htm 40rb, parkir 10rb..tapi ada beberapa zone yang harus bayar lagi di dalam..
.Rekomendasi..
english_translation:
The place is very spacious, fun for walking around and taking selfies. Unfortunately, the road access is in very bad condition. Luckily, there are shuttle cars going up and down (for those parking below).
