Entrance fee 40k IDR, parking 10k IDR. But there are several zones inside that require additional payment.
Recommended.

text: Apa yang saya ingat tentang tempat ini dekat dari perkemahan ciwangun indah, bagian terbaik dari lokasi ini adalah curug kedua, Anda harus membayar ekstra sekitar 10k, jika saya tidak salah namanya curug aseupan, Anda mungkin harus bertanya kepada staf tentang informasi.
english_translation: What I remember about this place near the beautiful Ciwangun campsite, the best part of this location is the second waterfall, you have to pay an extra 10k, if I'm not mistaken the name is Curug Aseupan, you might have to ask the staff for information.

text: Tempat yang sangat enak untuk melepas kejenuhan,letak curugnya yang agak tersembunyi,air curugnya yang jernih,serta butuh pengorbanan untuk sampai ke curugnya soalnya tidak ada petunjuk jalan dan hanya mengandalkan tanya tanya kepada petani di sepanjang jalan yang dilewati
english_translation: A very nice place to relieve boredom, the waterfall's location is somewhat hidden, the waterfall's water is clear, and it takes effort to reach the waterfall because there are no signs and one has to rely on asking farmers along the way.

text:
Harga tiket 20rb untuk weekday dan 25rb untuk weekend. Pemilik tempat ini betul betul cerdas karena bisa mengakomodir wisata kuliner dan wisata alam serta edukasi dengan sangat baik.
Bagi yang mau ke ares2 tertentu, dikenakan tiket tambahan lagi
Cth : miniatur kereta +20rb
english_translation:
Ticket price is 20k for weekdays and 25k for weekends. The owner of this place is truly smart because they can accommodate culinary tourism, nature tourism, and education very well.
For those who want to go to specific areas, an additional ticket is required.
Example: miniature train +20k

text: Jika sudah melewati perjalanan panjang dari pintu Taman Hutan Raya (Tahura) Dago sekitar 4 km, ada kelegaan saat tiba di curug Omas ini. Sayangnya curug hanya dapat dilihat dari jembatan yang ada dan tidak bisa turun ke sungainya. Sungainya juga kotor dan banyak sampahnya.
english_translation: After a long journey of about 4 km from the entrance of Dago Forest Park (Tahura), there is a sense of relief upon arriving at Curug Omas. Unfortunately, the waterfall can only be seen from the existing bridge and it's not possible to go down to the river. The river is also dirty and full of trash.

text: Enak buat nongkrong malem malem depan tenda sambil nikmati keindahan alam di atas gunung, dan juga gunung nya gk terlalu tinggi butuh waktu 3menit bagi saya dari pos pembayaran hingga ke puncak jadi gk begitu banyak waktu yg tersita,lumayan enak kalo buat pendaki pemula...
english_translation: Great for hanging out at night in front of the tent while enjoying the natural beauty on the mountain. The mountain isn't too high, it only takes me 3 minutes from the payment post to the summit, so it doesn't take up too much time. Quite good for beginner hikers.

text: Tempat kamping. Harga tiket cuma 10rb, parkir mobil 10rb. Suasana hutan pinus sejuk. Banyak monyet berkeliaran. Disayangkan jalan beraspal hanya sampai Dusun Bambu. Setelah itu jalan berbatu dan tidak rata. Sebaiknya tdk membawa mobil sedan atau city car karena agak sulit.
english_translation: Campsite. Ticket price only 10rb, car parking 10rb. Cool pine forest atmosphere. Many monkeys roaming around. Unfortunately, the paved road only goes as far as Dusun Bambu. After that, the road is rocky and uneven. It's better not to bring a sedan or city car because it's a bit difficult.

text:
Lembang emng surganya tmpat wisata ya gx ngerti lg bagus2 smua gx ada yg mengecewakan. Buat yg maubke sini tiket msuk 15k. Ini tuh tmpat camping dan nginep gitu. Ada outbound cafe dan penangkaran rusa. Next pengen nyoba stay di sini hehe.
Jgn lupa follow ig saya @randyndie
english_translation:
Lembang is indeed a paradise for tourist spots, I don't know what else to say, all of them are good, none are disappointing. For those who want to come here, the entrance ticket is 15k. This is a place for camping and staying overnight. There's an outbound area, a cafe, and a deer conservation. Next time I want to try staying here, hehe.
Don't forget to follow my Instagram @randyndie

text: Menjadi lebih bagus, lebih lengkap, lebih bersih dari kunjungan kami sebelumnya 1 tahun yang lalu. Fasilitasnya semakin lengkap dan menarik. Tempat yang sangat nyaman untuk liburan bersama keluarga. Food court dan restorannya juga semakin banyak dengan citarasa yang lezat.
english_translation: Becoming better, more complete, and cleaner than our visit 1 year ago. The facilities are becoming more complete and attractive. A very comfortable place for a family holiday. The food court and restaurants are also more numerous with delicious flavors.

text: Mantap pas kesana tgl 29 oktober cuaca kebetulan lagi halodo jadi gaada hambatan dijalan hehe, tiket terjangkau weekend pengunjung lokal Rp.30.000 / orang, karcis masuk roda dua  Rp.14.500 sama parkir Rp.2000 . Yo buruan atuh ke tangkuban perahu hiling atuh hiling wkwkwk:v
english_translation: Great, when I went there on October 29th, the weather happened to be dry, so there were no problems on the road, hehe. The tickets are affordable for locals on weekends, IDR 30,000 per person, motorcycle entrance ticket IDR 14,500, and parking IDR 2,000. Come on, hurry up to Tangkuban Perahu, let's go, let's go, hahaha:v

text:
Tiket masuk weekend 25rb/org, mbl 10 rb.
Tempat luas bisa sewa perahu bebek di danau, bisa naik kuda poni, naik kereta keliling, sewa sepeda, sewa scooter, dll (hrg tiket terpisah).
Banyak tmpt spot foto seperti di bali. Adem bgt sejuk udaranya.
Tiket sdh termasuk minuman.
english_translation:
Weekend entrance fee 25k/person, car 10k.
Spacious area, can rent paddle boats on the lake, can ride ponies, ride a tour train, rent bicycles, rent scooters, etc. (separate ticket prices).
Many photo spots like in Bali. Very cool and refreshing air.
Entrance ticket includes a drink.

text: View pemandangan mantab, kalau kesini antara pagi sampai siang karena akses jalan menuju kesana sangat macet dan petunjuk jalan kurang. Pakai Google Maps sering bingung kasih petunjuk mungkin bisa tanyakan penduduk sekitar. Disana banyak yg jual merchandise untuk oleh-oleh.
english_translation: Amazing view, if you go here, go between morning and noon because the road access to get there is very congested and the directions are lacking. Using Google Maps often gets confusing with directions, maybe ask the locals around. There are many people selling merchandise there as souvenirs.

text: Tempatnya bagus bgt sbnrnya, recomended buat yg suka camp. Tambah lg ads fasilitas musholla di area camping. Cuma sayangnya kamar mandi di area camping msh kurang memadai, smg kedepannya bisa diperbanyak lg jumlah kmr mandinya, jd gaperlu turun ke bawah kalau mau ke toilet.
english_translation: The place is really good actually, recommended for those who like camping. Plus, there are prayer facilities in the camping area. It's just a shame that the bathrooms in the camping area are still inadequate, hopefully in the future the number of bathrooms can be increased, so we don't have to go downstairs to use the toilet.

text: Sangat bagus buat kalian yang punya hobi foto foto, tempatnya nyaman, indah, bersih. Saran aja kalo mau kesana jangan terlalu siang, supaya tidak kepanasan aja. Jangan lupa siapkan kamera / handphone dengan daya full dan memori yang kosong ya agar kalian puas foto foto nya.
english_translation: Very good for those who have a hobby of taking photos, the place is comfortable, beautiful, and clean. Just a suggestion, if you want to go there, don't go too early in the day, so you don't get too hot. Don't forget to prepare your camera/phone with a full battery and empty memory so you can enjoy your photos.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk berenang melepas penat di kolam yang masih alami, akses dari tempat parkir lumayan menantang, disarankan untuk tidak mengunjungi tempat ini saat musim hujan karena airnya akan keruh, tolong jaga kebersihannya dengan tidak membuang sampah sembarangan.
english_translation: A great place to swim and relieve fatigue in a natural pool. Access from the parking lot is quite challenging. It is advisable not to visit this place during the rainy season as the water will be murky. Please keep it clean by not littering.

text:
Parkir cukup luas, wahana banyak sekali, sangat rekomended untuk tempat wisata liburan keluarga. Harga tiket masuk hanya Rp.20.000/orang. Masuk wahana mulai Rp.20.000 s/d Rp.50.000
Tiket masuk bisa ditukarkan dengan minuman. Jadi gak khawatir kehausan saat berwisata disana.
english_translation: Parking is quite spacious, there are many rides, highly recommended for a family holiday destination. The entrance ticket price is only Rp. 20,000/person. Rides start from Rp. 20,000 to Rp. 50,000. Entrance tickets can be exchanged for drinks. So you don't have to worry about getting thirsty while visiting there.

text: great place to escape from daily routines...Pemandangan pinus berjejer, udara segar, bunga anggrek berbagai jenis dan sudah pasti cantik², ditambah lagi sehat buat badan karena kita jadi banyak jalan...bisa main kelinci, main golf, flying fox sampai naik kuda juga disini...
english_translation: A great place to escape from daily routines...Scenery of lined pine trees, fresh air, various types of beautiful orchids, and definitely beautiful, plus it's healthy for the body because we end up walking a lot...You can play with rabbits, play golf, go ziplining, and even ride horses here too...

text: Tempat wisata wajib ini. menurut aku lengkap banget wahana disini. Apa aja ada. Kalo udah kesini terus ketempat wisata lain tu kaya, lah di floating market juga ada yg begini. Pas kesana keliling rainbow garden. Cantik banget. Seharian disini, walaupun pegel, tapi worth it.
english_translation: This is a must-visit tourist spot. In my opinion, the rides here are very complete. They have everything. When you've been here and then go to other tourist spots, it's like, "Oh, they have this at the Floating Market too." When I went there, I walked around the Rainbow Garden. It was so beautiful. I spent all day here, and even though my feet hurt, it was worth it.

text: Gunung putri tempat yg indah untuk menikmati view kota dari tempat ketinggian. Jarak dari tempat parkir mobil ke puncak kira2 satu kilometer dengan elevasi 100. Ada warung kopi n indomie serta kamar mandi di dekat tempat parkir mobil. Nyaman dikunjungi saat sunrise n sunset
english_translation: Gunung Putri is a beautiful place to enjoy city views from a high vantage point. The distance from the car park to the summit is approximately one kilometer with an elevation of 100 meters. There are coffee and Indomie stalls, as well as restrooms near the car park. It's a comfortable place to visit during sunrise and sunset.

text:
Luar biasa pemandangan yang sangat indah yang tak bisa di ungkapkan dengan kata2 sungguh menyejukan hati dan fikiran ketika kita mendengar gemuruh air terjun yang bergemuruh keras.. Tapi malah meluluhkan hati pendengarnya.
Sulit untuk menolak tapi gampang untuk mengiyahkan.
english_translation:
Extraordinary, a very beautiful view that cannot be expressed in words, truly refreshing for the heart and mind when we hear the thunderous roar of the waterfall... But it melts the listener's heart.
Difficult to refuse, but easy to agree.

text:
Anaku seneng banget kalau kesini soalnya variatif banget, harga tiketnya juga terjangkau..
Untuk peak season entah itu liburan sekolah atau lebaran pasti ngantri banget panjaang banget dan macet.
Yang belom harus coba deh ke floating market👍
Sukses dan sehat selalu...aamiin
english_translation:
I'm very happy when I come here because it's so varied, and the ticket price is also affordable.
During peak season, whether it's school holidays or Eid al-Fitr, there are always very long queues and traffic jams.
Those who haven't been yet should definitely try the floating market👍
Wishing you success and good health always... amen.

text: Tempat bagus, tiket masuk 50k/org (Des 2022) wajib cadh. Tiket jembatan 20k/org (plus flying fox[Des 22]), banyak warkop, ada cafe, spot foto banyak. saran, Punya kendaraan sendiri. Jangan naik angkot (harga warga biasa 5k-15k tapi kalo pewisata bisa dimintai 55k per orang)
english_translation: Nice place, entrance fee 50k/person (Dec 2022) mask required. Bridge ticket 20k/person (plus flying fox [Dec 22]), many coffee stalls, there's a cafe, many photo spots. Suggestion, have your own vehicle. Don't take public transport (local price 5k-15k but tourists can be charged 55k per person)

text:
Cocok untuk wisata keluarga, terutama yang menyukai wisata kebun dan bunga karena pada dasarnya ini adalah wisata kebun.

Tempatnya tidak begitu luas tapi sangat mudah ditemukan dengan kecepatan normal.

Kita juga bisa belanja sayuran yang kita petik langsung dari kebunnya.
english_translation:
Suitable for family tourism, especially those who like garden and flower tours because it is basically a garden tour.

The place is not very spacious but is very easy to find at normal speed.

We can also buy vegetables that we pick directly from the garden.

text: Tempatnya strategis berada dikaki gunung yang menyajikan pemandangan indah alami,udaranya sejuk dan hawa dingin,cocok bagi wisatawan yang punya adrenalin berpetualang karna tempat menunuju curug sangatlah jauh namun selama diperjalanan disuguhi pemandangan yang sangat indah.
english_translation: The location is strategic at the foot of the mountain, offering beautiful natural scenery, cool air, and a chilly atmosphere, suitable for adventurous tourists because the path to the waterfall is very far, but along the journey, you are treated to very beautiful views.

text: Pemandangannya Mantap tapi rame banget pas Public holiday jadi untuk dapat spot foto yang belakangnya tidak ada orang itu susah banget. Kebanyakan spot foto bagus itu sudab dikuasai sama agen foto dan harus bayar ya kalau mau nyetak fotonya, jadi saya kasih bintang 4 aja ya.
english_translation: The view is amazing, but it's very crowded during public holidays, so getting a photo spot without people in the background is really difficult. Most of the good photo spots are already monopolized by photo agents, and you have to pay if you want to print the photos, so I'm giving it 4 stars.

text: Sudah ada toilet baru yang bersih ditepi jalan setapak area pinus,  dan tersedia suvenir tanaman hias. Beberapa warung sedia liwet,  di dekat curug juga ada warung tapi hanya hari ramai pengunjung. View terbaik ke kebun teh Sukawana daripuncak bukit,  sayang kini harus bayar
english_translation: A new, clean toilet has been installed by the pine forest path, and ornamental plants are available as souvenirs. Some stalls offer liwet rice dishes, and there's also a stall near the waterfall, but only on busy days. The best view of the Sukawana tea plantation is from the hilltop, but unfortunately, there's now a fee.

text: Salah satu wisata alam yg terbaik dibandung. Sepanjang perjalanan dimanjakan dengan pemandangan alam hijau yang bisa membuat hati tenang setelah berjuang panjang di ibu kota. Tiket masuk yang terbilang cukup murah dan dipuncak juga ada pedagang pedagang makanan dan souvenir.
english_translation: One of the best nature attractions in Bandung. The journey is pampered with green natural scenery that can calm the heart after a long struggle in the capital city. The entrance ticket is quite cheap and at the top, there are also food and souvenir vendors.

text:
Kemarin 2 orang+motor masuk kena 79ribu, terus diatas parkir motor bayar seikhlasnya,
Enaknya mobil+motor boleh parkir atas jadi gak perlu naik ontang anting
Cukup ramai waktu weekend
Terdapat:
Penjual oleh2✔
Tempat duduk2 santai✔
Makanan cemilan aneka macam✔
Masjid✔
Toilet✔
english_translation:
Yesterday, 2 people + a motorcycle entered and it cost 79 thousand. Then above, parking for motorcycles is pay-as-you-wish.
It's nice that cars + motorcycles can park upstairs, so no need to go back and forth.
It's quite crowded on weekends.
Available:
Souvenir sellers ✔
Relaxing seating areas ✔
Various snacks ✔
Mosque ✔
Toilets ✔

text: Salah satu temlat wisata yang sangat populer di wilayah jawa barat terutama bandung. Akses jalan yang bisa dilalui dari arah bandung atau subang. Selain temlat wisata yang bersejarah disekitaran wilayahnya juga banyak spot temlat wisata yang ga kalah jauh dengan yang lainnya
english_translation: One of the very popular tourist spots in the West Java region, especially Bandung. The road access can be reached from the direction of Bandung or Subang. Besides being a historical tourist spot, in the surrounding area there are also many tourist spots that are not far behind others.

text: Temoat penginapan dengan konsep alam hutan pinus. Cocok untuk liburan keluarga atau ada acara gathering kantor/sekolah. Harga terjangkau (1.265.000/malam/6 orang). Tersedia beberapa tipe kamar. Ada breakfastnya jg. Ada beberapa wahana bermain dan kasih makan rusa dan kelinci
english_translation: Pine forest nature concept lodging. Suitable for family holidays or office/school gatherings. Affordable price (1,265,000/night/6 people). Several room types available. Breakfast is included. There are also several attractions and the opportunity to feed deer and rabbits.

text: Bagi kami pecinta tanaman so excited kesini ..sebenarnya bunganya biasa aja cuma karna ditata rapi dirawat dijaga dipelihara makanya jadi super cantik trus daerah dingin jadi bunganya seger puas sih tiket msk 25/org ga dpt apa² ga ky t4 lain dapet bingkisan sbg ciri khas nya
english_translation: For us plant lovers, we were so excited to come here. Honestly, the flowers were just ordinary, but because they were arranged neatly, cared for, guarded, and nurtured, they became super beautiful. Plus, it's a cold region, so the flowers were fresh. We were satisfied. The entrance ticket was 25 per person, and we didn't get anything, unlike other places where you get a souvenir as a characteristic of the place.

text:
Begonia Park is one of the beautiful tourist spots with flowers that grow in the garden. And has a great photo spot.

Buat teman-teman yg sudah lama tinggal di rumah kalau mau refreshing menghirup udara segar bisa ke Taman Begonia.

Because it's a beautiful place - menurutku
english_translation:
Begonia Park is one of the beautiful tourist spots with flowers that grow in the garden. And has a great photo spot.

For friends who have been home for a long time and want to refresh by breathing fresh air, you can go to Begonia Park.

Because it's a beautiful place - in my opinion

text: Tempatnya sangat bagus , pemandngan kota lembangnya terlihat lebih luas , bisa di gunakan untuk berkemah , pokonya cocok untuk mrngisi akhir pekan ini dan udaranya dinginnya sangan segar untuk di hirup , saya saya yakin tidak akan gagal apabila datang ke gunung putri lembang
english_translation: The place is very good, the valley city view looks wider, it can be used for camping, it's perfect for filling this weekend and the cold air is very fresh to breathe, I am sure it will not fail if you come to Gunung Putri Lembang.

text: Pas kesana libur akhir tahun,  jadi rame banget,  makanan enak dan bayarnya mesti pake koin dg kelipatan 5k, 10k, 20k dst. Ada kebun bunga dg penataan sangat bagus buat yg suka foto²an, sayang kurang ditambah lg utk wahana permainan anak², kota mini jg bagus,  sofar keren👍 …
english_translation: During the year-end holiday, it was very crowded. The food was delicious, and payment had to be made with coins in multiples of 5k, 10k, 20k, etc. There was a beautifully arranged flower garden for those who like to take photos. Unfortunately, more children's rides are needed. The mini city was also good. So far, it's cool 👍

text: Perjalanan ke lokasi banyak variasi nya.jembatan kayu..jembatan batang kayu..menyebrangi sungai..naik turun batu..menyusuri anak sungai..menarik👍..dianjurkan pakai sepatu boot..biar ga licin..tempat indah..sayang keburu kecapean ga sempet berenang..😁..ini jalur anak muda.😂 …
english_translation: The journey to the location has many variations. Wooden bridges.. log bridges.. crossing rivers.. climbing up and down rocks.. following streams.. interesting 👍.. recommended to wear boots.. so it's not slippery.. beautiful place.. too bad I got tired and didn't have time to swim.. 😁.. this is a trail for young people. 😂

text: Berada jauh dr jalan raya , perlu jalan kaki naik turun bebatuan. Sekitar 1 jam jalan kaki baru sampai.j gn lupa bawa persediaan air dan makanan untuk di jalan . Kondisi air pada saat kami berkunjung airnya keruh. Menikmati bebatuan pahatan dari Alam yang sangat mengagumkan.
english_translation: Located far from the highway, it requires walking up and down rocky terrain. It takes about 1 hour of walking to arrive. Don't forget to bring water and food supplies for the journey. The water condition during our visit was murky. Enjoy the amazing natural rock carvings.

text: Datang siang hari panas , intruksi nya di mushola adain mukena nya atuh , terus kalau anak anak turunin harga tiketnya 🤗 kami sebagai wisatawan dari garut , panik anak usia 3 tahun harus bayar sesuai orang dewasa . Padahal dia disana enggak main panas banget siang hari.... …
english_translation: Arriving during the hot day, the instruction is to have the prayer mats available in the prayer room. Also, if it's for children, lower the ticket price 🤗. We, as tourists from Garut, panicked that a 3-year-old child had to pay the same as an adult. Even though they weren't playing out in the intense heat of the day...

text: amazing.tiket masuk cuma 5rb.selfi?recomended bgt.kereeeennnnnn.bawa bekel makan rame rame oke,jangan lupa jaga kebersihannya.sering dipakai photo prewed,,kalau dari stasion padalarang naek angkot ke jaramandala turun di stone garde.ntar jalan sekitar 15menit sampai dech.....
english_translation: Amazing. Entrance ticket only 5k. Selfie? Highly recommended. Awesomeeeeee. Bringing packed lunches to eat together is okay, don't forget to keep it clean. Often used for pre-wedding photos. If coming from Padalarang station, take a public van to Jaramandala and get off at Stone Garden. Then walk for about 15 minutes and you'll arrive.

text: Suasana dingin , dan tangga menuju air terjun cukup lumayan. Sampai bawah air terjun capek hilang terobati keindahan alam yang alami. Tempat strategis , warung banyak dan area parkir lumayan. Binatang kera cukup banyak , hati-hati kera di sana lumayan galak , jangan di ganggu
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool, and the stairs leading to the waterfall are quite decent. Reaching the bottom of the waterfall, the tiredness disappears, replaced by the beauty of the natural scenery. The location is strategic, with many food stalls and a reasonable parking area. There are quite a lot of monkeys, be careful, the monkeys there are quite fierce, don't bother them.

text: Tempatnya bagus sayang gk ngajak anak sama istri, pemandangannya bagus hamparan hijau dimana mana ada bukit hijau juga, di tambah udara nya yang sejuk, ada kolam berenangnya juga, ada danau juga dan bisa naik bebek2 an. Semoga bisa ajak anak dan istri saya kembali lagi kesama
english_translation: The place is nice, darling, too bad you didn't bring the kids and wife. The view is good, a vast expanse of green everywhere, with green hills too. Added to that is the cool air, there's also a swimming pool and a lake where you can ride pedal boats. Hopefully, I can bring my children and wife back again.

text: Jalan menuju kesana berat, harus dama penduduk desa, soalnya ga ada tiket atau di kelola oleh penduduk sekitar, jadi tempatnya sulit di temukan, pas kesana berasa curug milik sendiri, soalnya ga ada siapa siapa, lumayan horror, perjalanan menuju sini juga jalannya masih jelek
english_translation: The path to get there is difficult, you have to ask the villagers, because there are no tickets or it's managed by the local residents, so the place is hard to find. When you get there, it feels like the waterfall belongs to you, because no one else is there. It's quite eerie. The road to get here is also still bad.

text: Selalu menjadi tempat tujuan pertama kalo liburan arah ke lembang, dan ga pernah bosen tiap diajakin jalan2 ke floating market ini, makanan lengkap, tiket masuk yg masih terjangkau, mushola juga ada, spot2 yg instagramable juga banyak, pokonya kalo ke lembang harus kesini ya.
english_translation: Always the first destination when holidaying towards Lembang, and never bored every time I'm invited to visit this Floating Market, complete food options, affordable entrance tickets, a prayer room is also available, and lots of Instagrammable spots. In short, if you go to Lembang, you must come here.

text: Yang sibuk dengan aktivitas sehari².. dengan bisingnya suara motor dan lalu lalang mobil.. butuh ketenangan dan relaksasi mata dengan yg hijau²... Yuuuk kesini aja... Nyaman loh.. mata dimanjakan dengan yg sejuk.. villa nya juga alami terbuat dr kayu².. pokoknya serba alami..
english_translation: For those busy with daily activities, with the noisy sound of motorcycles and passing cars... needing peace and eye relaxation with greenery... Let's come here... It's comfortable, you know. Your eyes will be pampered with the coolness... The villa is also naturally made of wood... everything is natural.

text: Tempat wisata yang cocok untuk keluarga, teman-teman, siswa sekolah, dan umum. Banyak tempat makanan minuman, juga tersedia oleh-oleh menarik. Fasilitas umum lengkap seperti toilet dan musala. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk berlibur di sini. Ada wahana air juga seperti perahu.
english_translation: A tourist spot suitable for families, friends, school students, and the general public. Many food and drink places, as well as interesting souvenirs are available. Complete public facilities like toilets and prayer rooms are provided. Highly recommended for a holiday here. There are also water attractions like boats.

text: Jalan menuju air terjun cukup landai b8sa dijangkau pakaibsepeda hingga menuju air terjunnya, banyak spot camping, air terjunnya dingin bgt.... parkir mobil motor luas, mushollah tersedia.. jajanan banyak hehehe dan terjangkau..tiket murah 15rb per kepala umur 7 th ke atas...
english_translation: The path to the waterfall is quite gentle, reachable by bicycle until you get to the waterfall. There are many camping spots, the waterfall is very cold.... The car and motorcycle parking is spacious, a prayer room is available. Lots of snacks, hehehe, and they're affordable. The ticket is cheap, 15 thousand per person for ages 7 and up...

text:
Tempat yang asik buat foto” di alam terbuka. Sayang akses menuju tempat ini masih cukup sulit di jangkau dan minim penunjuk jalan.
Di tempat ini sdh cukup terkelola dengan baik. Ada MCK warung” dan musolla yang bersih.
Tarif masuknya 5000/org dan parkir motor 3000 mobil 5000.
english_translation:
A cool place for outdoor photos. Unfortunately, access to this place is still quite difficult to reach and there are minimal signs.
This place is already quite well managed. There are clean restrooms, kiosks, and a prayer room.
The entrance fee is 5,000 per person, and parking is 3,000 for motorcycles and 5,000 for cars.

text: Baru saya kasih 4 soalnya saya kemarin pas kesana agak kecewa,di bawah udah bayar masuk+parkir tp d atas malah di minta bayar parkir lagi 2000.. tapi buat yang mau kesana coba deh agak ke atas dikit view pohon Pinus nya oke banget, lumayanlah buat nambah stok foto profil hehe
english_translation: I only gave it 4 stars because I was a bit disappointed when I went there yesterday. I had already paid for entrance + parking downstairs, but upstairs they asked me to pay for parking again, 2000. But for those who want to go there, try going a little further up. The view of the pine trees is really good, decent enough to add to your profile picture stock, hehe.

text:
Asik spotnya buat jalan2 plus udara yang dingin syekaliii 🥶🥶🥶 okelah untuk jalan2 cari pemandangan hutan pinus,cuman klo lwt jembatan sama. Flying fox sepaket 50ribu lumayan deh hehe
Banyk tempat makan juga ok dan khusus bunga anggrek dan kaktus banyak pilihan dn dijual  juga
english_translation:
Cool spot for a stroll plus the air is super cold 🥶🥶🥶. Okay for a walk to find pine forest views. However, if you go via the bridge, the flying fox is a package deal for 50,000 Rupiah, quite alright hehe.
There are also many okay food places and specifically for orchids and cacti, there are many choices and they are also sold.

text: Sempet gak nyangka skrg hampir berubah drastis semenjak revitalisasi Situ Ciburuy, rumah uwak ane jg disitu persis, kalo dulu Lebaran suka nginep, pagi sama sore sering jalan kaki santai sekitaran Situ Ciburuy. Naik perahu keliling danau, skrg udh bagus.... Nice Job Kang Emil!
english_translation: Didn't expect it to change so drastically since the revitalization of Situ Ciburuy. My uncle's house is right there too. When it was Eid, I used to stay over, and in the morning and afternoon, we would often take leisurely walks around Situ Ciburuy. Rode a boat around the lake, now it's so beautiful.... Nice job, Kang Emil!

text:
Penilaian yang sangat subjektif sekali karena kebetulan  saya suka explore tempat yang luas :

Not much to see untuk tiket masuk seharga 25 ribu rupiah.. Kebunnya memang kecil tp banyak spot poto untuk anak2 dan ada supermarket untuk tanaman, tp juga memang kurang bervariasi..
english_translation:
A very subjective assessment, as I happen to like exploring vast places:

Not much to see for a ticket price of 25,000 rupiah. The garden is indeed small, but there are many photo spots for children and a supermarket for plants, though it's also true that it lacks variety.

text: Jalan akses menuju TWA Gn. Tangkuban Parahu masih bagus.. aspal.. minim lubang, suasana di atas kawah saat weekend sangat padat di sarankan jika mau kesini sebelum jam 8 pagi supaya bisa menikmati suasana alamnya. Jangan lupa bawa topi juga kalau sudah siang pasti panas.. hehe
english_translation: The access road to TWA Gn. Tangkuban Parahu is still good.. asphalt.. with minimal potholes. The atmosphere above the crater on weekends is very crowded. It is recommended to come here before 8 AM so you can enjoy the natural scenery. Don't forget to bring a hat too, as it will definitely be hot after midday.. hehe

text: Warga disekitar/didalam curug halimun sangat baik, ramah dan sopan sekali, apalagi para penjaga curugnya baik-baik. Saat lelah pun warung2 kopi siap melayani kita sehangat kopi sehangat obrolan dan canda tawa dengan para penjual yg santun "CURUG HALIMUN SURGA YANG TERSEMBUNYI"
english_translation: The residents around/inside Curug Halimun are very kind, friendly, and extremely polite, especially the caretakers of the waterfall, who are very good people. Even when tired, the coffee stalls are ready to serve us with the warmth of coffee and the warmth of conversations and laughter with the courteous vendors. "CURUG HALIMUN IS A HIDDEN HEAVEN"

text: Tempatnya ga seberapa besar tapi pas masuk kita dibuat amaze sama banyaknya bunga yg ada disana .. tempat shalat dan toilet nyaman. Pelayanan ramah. Bisa buat prewedding dana da layanan foto dslr juga disana.. bisa berbelanja sayur dan benih bunga.. htm @15k, parkir motor 5k..
english_translation: The place isn't very big, but upon entering, we were amazed by the sheer number of flowers there. The prayer room and toilet are comfortable. The service is friendly. It can be used for pre-wedding photos, and there's also DSLR photo services available. You can also buy vegetables and flower seeds. Entrance fee is @15k, motorcycle parking is 5k.

text: Alhamdulillah.... Akhirnya nyampai pula ke CIC dalam rangka kegiatan Pramuka anak2 MI. Hijratul Fath... Tiketnya murah hanya 10rb... Anak2 senang karena tempatnya rindang dan sejuk... Tapi sayang jalan masuk ke CIC nya kurang bagus.. Jadi kita harus pandai pandai memilih jalan
english_translation: Alhamdulillah... Finally arrived at CIC for the MI children's Scout activities. Hijratul Fath... The ticket was cheap, only 10 thousand rupiah... The children were happy because the place was shady and cool... But unfortunately, the road leading to CIC is not very good... So we have to be clever in choosing our way.

text: Daerah punclut sesudah restoran sudut pandang, parkir mobil di bawah resto sudut pandang. Diantar dengan mobil khusus ke sarae hills Htm 50k, htm jembatan merah 15k, tersedia toilet, mushola, cafe, tempat instagramable dengan miniatur berbagai tempat hits di dunia, ok mantap👍👍👍
english_translation: Punclut area after the viewpoint restaurant, park your car below the viewpoint resto. Transported by special car to Sarae Hills. Entrance fee 50k, Red Bridge entrance fee 15k, toilets, prayer room, cafe, and Instagrammable spots with miniatures of various famous places around the world are available. Great! 👍👍👍

text:
Tempat ini menjadi salah satu destinasi ecowisata. Nuansa alam yang asri.. banyak yang melakukan kegiatan hiking, bukan hanya anak muda melainkan keluarga.

Satu hal yang perlu diingat, selalu jaga kebersihan. Jangan membuang sampah sembarangan, agar kita nyaman saat berwisata.
english_translation:
This place has become an ecotourism destination. The natural ambiance is beautiful. Many people, not just young people but families as well, engage in hiking activities.

One thing to remember is to always maintain cleanliness. Don't litter, so we can have a comfortable travel experience.

text: Tempat yang alami banget dan sejuk akses jalan ke sana lumayan bagus dengan di kelilingi hutan pinus yang rindang tapi untuk petunjuk kurang ke sana kurang sesekali harus bertanya sama warga sekitar tp setelah tiba di sana kita akan di suguhkan pemandangan dan tersenyum bahagia
english_translation: A very natural and cool place, the road access is quite good, surrounded by shady pine forests. However, the directions there are a bit lacking, occasionally you have to ask the locals. But once you arrive, you will be presented with a view and smile happily.

text: sukaa banget disini.. tempatnya tenang bgt, walau awalnya jalan menuju kesini ada yg rusak parah skitar 1km (yg bannya ceper lbh baik pikir 2x) tapi pas masuk worth it bgt.. dingin, pemandangan bagus dan pulangnya menuju parkiran bisa naik free shutle car jadi ga berasa capek..
english_translation: Love it here so much. The place is very peaceful. Even though initially the road leading here was badly damaged for about 1km (those with flat tires should think twice), once you arrive, it's totally worth it. It's cool, the view is good, and on the way back to the parking lot, you can take a free shuttle car, so you don't feel tired.

text: Recommend datang pagi, atau sore (jam 6 sudah buka, apalagi utk y g photo prewedding, harga 300K ada karcisnya).  Bawa air besih di Botol ya..  Toiletnya gak keurus  banget, jd kl gak kepaksa bgt lebih baik ke toilet di pom bensin atau warung makan..  Sembari makan siang/jajan.
english_translation: Recommend coming in the morning or afternoon (it opens at 6 AM, especially for those doing pre-wedding photos, the price is 300K and includes a ticket). Bring clean water in a bottle. The toilets are very neglected, so if you're not desperate, it's better to use the toilets at a gas station or a food stall while having lunch/snacking.

text: Suasana asri, cocok ini untuk refreshing hanya saja jalur ke tempat ini merupakan jalur macet sehingga kadang belum sampai ke lokasi tujuan sudah bete duluan, tapi meskipun begitu suasananya sepadan lah dengan macet macetannya, buat yang tidak sabaran macet harap bersabar hehe…
english_translation: The atmosphere is lush and beautiful, perfect for refreshing. The only downside is that the route to this place is prone to traffic jams, so sometimes you get frustrated before even reaching your destination. However, despite that, the atmosphere is worth the traffic jams. For those who are impatient with traffic, please be patient, hehe...

text: Untuk pemerintah Jalan Lebih diperhatikan aset berharga. Kawasan tetap di Jaga kelestariannya kebersihan pengunjung ok fasilitas Kantin Toilet, tempat wudhu mushola ok spot Foto Lokasi kemah ok, lokasi wisat lebih ditingkatkan ditata lebih baik lagi Pengelola Ramah, Harga Siip.
english_translation: For the government, the road should be given more attention as a valuable asset. The area should maintain its sustainability, cleanliness, and visitor facilities such as canteens, toilets, prayer rooms, and photo spots. Camping sites are okay, and tourist locations should be further improved and better organized. The management is friendly, and the prices are good.

text: Tempat nya deket The Orchid Forest Cikole sekitar 15 menitan ,HTM 54 ribu untuk 2 orang 1 motor ,Suhu nya sangat dingin dekat ke Kawah nya, Banyak penjual disekitar kawah yang siap membantu mengambil foto ,Banyak warung2 makan dan oleh-oleh ada penyewaan kuda ,Masjid juga ada ,
english_translation: The place is near The Orchid Forest Cikole, about 15 minutes away. The entrance fee is 54 thousand for 2 people and 1 motorbike. The temperature is very cold, close to the crater. There are many vendors around the crater ready to help take photos. There are also many food stalls and souvenir shops, and horse rentals are available. There is also a mosque.

text:
Wisata batu di kabupaten bandung barat
Batuan alami sungguh menakjubkan
Tiket masuk rp 8.000
Tiket parkir rp 5.000
Akses masuk ke lokasi masih jalan berbatu namun tidak terlalu membuat kesulitan yang berlebihan
Banyak penjual jadi tidak usah khawatir dengan makanan atau minuman
english_translation:
Stone tourism in West Bandung Regency
Natural rocks are truly amazing
Entrance ticket Rp 8,000
Parking ticket Rp 5,000
Access to the location is still a rocky road but not overly difficult
Many vendors so no need to worry about food or drinks

text:
Tempatnya enak banget tenang, dingin, utk istirahat sejenak dr kepadatan ibukota.
Sambil minum yg hangat ato makan yg hangat2 mantap.
Pemandangannya oke
Ada flying fox, kasi makan kelinci, spot foto, dll
Jenis anggreknya tidak terlalu banyak
Namun jalanannya masi banyak lobang2
english_translation:
The place is very nice, quiet, and cool, for a short break from the capital's density.
While drinking something warm or eating something warm is great.
The view is okay.
There's a flying fox, feeding rabbits, photo spots, etc.
The variety of orchids isn't too much.
However, the roads still have many potholes.

text: Bermain ala outbound...senang2...bagus buat gathering kantor...sejuk..bagusnya rombongan...ada kemping..dll...wc ok...hanya mushola kecil...kalau buat rombongan antri dulu...tempat wudhu tidak terpisah antara pria n wanita...tapi look nya bagus...kalau jalan2 asri pegunungan...
english_translation: Playing in an outbound style...fun...good for office gatherings...cool...good for groups...there's camping...etc...toilets okay...only a small prayer room...if for a group, you'll have to queue first...the ablution area isn't separated for men and women...but the look is good...if you're looking for a natural, mountainous getaway...

text: Seru sejuk banget.. bisa keliling area pakai kereta2an, tp bayar lagi, driver kereta2annya baik bgt suka nawarin moto2in😁 tiket masuk bisa ditukar air mineral, atau minuman lain (susu murni/es podeng/teh poci) tp dikenakan biaya tambahan.. cocok tuk destinasi rekreasi keluarga …
english_translation: Very cool and refreshing.. can tour the area using the train, but it costs extra, the train driver is very kind and likes to offer to take photos 😁 entrance tickets can be exchanged for mineral water, or other drinks (pure milk/es podeng/teh poci) but with an additional charge.. suitable for family recreation destinations…

text:
Jalan masih belum bagus, meskipun mobil bisa masuk. Masuk 8000, parkir motor 5000 mobil 1000, camping 25000 per orang, pre wed 300
Hati hati dengan barang bawaan terutama makanan. Karena banyak kawanan monyet yang mengincar makanan. Klo bisa jangan buang sisa makanan di sekitar.
english_translation:
The road is still not good, although cars can enter. Entrance fee 8000, motorcycle parking 5000, car parking 1000, camping 25000 per person, pre-wedding shoot 300.
Be careful with your belongings, especially food, because there are many troops of monkeys eyeing food. If possible, do not leave leftover food lying around.

text: Goa di daerah Rajamandala. Aliran sungai Citarum Purba. Kenit/Kedit memiliki arti melingkar. Karena jika diperhatikan dengan baik, bentuk dari Goa yaitu melingkar/bulat. Begitupun ketika aliran Sungai Citarum Purba ketika keadaan normal, arusnya berbentuk melingkar dan berputar.
english_translation: Goa in the Rajamandala area. The flow of the Purba Citarum River. Kenit/Kedit means circular. Because if observed carefully, the shape of the cave is circular/round. Likewise, when the Purba Citarum River flows under normal conditions, its current is circular and swirling.

text: Akses jalan nya udah bagus..  Pake aspal.. Bisa bawa mobil sampe atas perbukitan.. Sampe lokasi banyak kudakuda buat kita keliling tempat wisata..  Bisa juga jalanjalan sampai atas mulut gunung..  Dari atas bakalan dapet view yang bagus..  Dan bisa liat kawah nya dengan jelass..
english_translation: The road access is already good.. It's paved.. You can drive a car all the way up the hills.. Upon arrival, there are many horses available for you to explore the tourist attractions.. You can also walk all the way up to the mouth of the mountain.. From the top, you'll get a good view.. And you can see the crater clearly..

text: Seru seruan anak anak. Dari punya anak 1 sampe 2. Dari anak pergi di 2018. 2019.2022. Ga tau kenapa santai aja jalan kesini anak mamak bapak bisa jajan di pinggiran sungai. Tutut sate cuanki gada gada cireng tujuannya.... sisanya anak2 main emak duduk aje santai sambil merkatiin
english_translation: Kids having fun. From having 1 to 2 children. Since the children left in 2018. 2019. 2022. Don't know why, we just casually walked here, mom and dad's kids can snack by the river. Tutut, satay, cuanki, gado-gado, cireng, the goal is... the rest of the time the kids play, mom just sits relaxed while watching them.

text: Saya dah 2x kesini, so Far bisa bikin anak2 sy happy kok... Cm yg agak kurang nyaman parkirannya aja, kl pas penuh dpt parkiran dilapangan yg becek, krn tanah gt.. Tp utk tempatnya bagus suasananya... Recomended dg harga tiket masuk yg standart murah, cm gak boleh bawa makanan...
english_translation: I've been here twice, and so far, it's made my kids happy. The only thing that's a bit uncomfortable is the parking. When it's full, you get parking on a muddy field because it's dirt. But the place itself is nice, and the atmosphere is good. Recommended for the standard cheap entrance fee, but you can't bring your own food.

text:
Tempatnya keren utk yg hobby koleksi foto2. Petugasnya juga ramah2. Area nya bersih. Sedikit saran, petugas hendaknya mengingatkan pengunjung utk tidak berlama lama ambil foto, jd bisa bergantian dgn pengunjung lain.
Saya berharap nanti saya kesana lagi ada spot terbaru lagi. 😊😊😊
english_translation: The place is cool for those who enjoy collecting photos. The staff are also friendly. The area is clean. A small suggestion, the staff should remind visitors not to take too long to take photos, so they can take turns with other visitors. I hope when I go there again, there will be new spots. 😊😊😊

text:
Gag terpikir tempat wisata ini sangat dikelolah dengan baik.
Rapih, tertata dengan baik, bersih, tersedia toilet cukup, wastafel cuci tangan yang tersebar disemua area.
Cocok untuk orang pacaran dan yang berkeluarga bawa anak kecil. Bisa main putt putt golf murah seharga 10 ribu.
english_translation:
I never thought this tourist spot would be so well managed.
Neat, well-organized, clean, with sufficient toilets and handwashing sinks spread throughout all areas.
Suitable for couples and families with young children. You can play cheap putt-putt golf for 10 thousand.

text: Tempat wisata alam yg sejuk di Matibaya, daerah Lembang inisdh lama terkenal namun setelah di renobasi ulang tempatnya semakin menarik dan udara alam yg sejuk membantu melepaslan penat. Banyak tempat atau spot indah utk berfoto selfie atau bersama keluarga sebagai momen yg indah.
english_translation: Matibaya's cool natural tourist spot, in the Lembang area, has long been famous. However, after renovations, the place has become even more attractive, and the cool natural air helps relieve fatigue. There are many beautiful places or spots for selfies or with family for beautiful memories.

text: Tenpatnya bagus mudah dijanhkau banyak batuan2 kapur yg bagus, parkiran luas. Jam buka hingga pukul 18.00. Makanan disini murah2. Masih alamo sehingga banyak monyet di stone gardennya. Hati2 yg pake perhiasan mending dicopot. Sunsetnya bagus bgt sampe d kamera ho gak dpt bagusnya
english_translation: The place is good and easy to reach with many beautiful limestone rocks and a spacious parking lot. It's open until 6:00 PM. The food here is cheap. It's still natural, so there are many monkeys in the stone garden. Be careful if you're wearing jewelry, it's best to take it off. The sunset is very beautiful, even the camera couldn't capture its beauty.

text: Mudah dijangkau, lokasi cukup bagus buat kemping dengan track menuju camping ground yang lumayan menanjak, , toilet ada di tiap kemping ground, sayang musholla kurang terawat dan banyak anak muda yang berisik banget, sampai malem pada berisik, tidak menghormati pengunjung lain...
english_translation: Easily accessible, the location is quite good for camping with a rather steep track leading to the camping ground. Toilets are available at each camping ground. Unfortunately, the prayer room is poorly maintained, and many noisy young people are very loud until late at night, not respecting other visitors.

text: Udaranya sangat segar, air dingin dan sejuk, pemandangan hijau, ada permainan seperti flying fox, tempat berkemah, tempat menginap juga, cocok untuk perusahaan yang ingin capasity building. Tapi ada sebagian lokasi yang masih belum 100% jadi, masih dibangun. Kurang Instagrammable
english_translation: The air is very fresh, the water is cold and cool, the scenery is green, there are games like flying fox, camping spots, and accommodation available. It's suitable for companies looking for capacity building. However, some areas are still under construction and not yet 100% complete. It's not very Instagrammable.

text: Pelayan ramah, areanya sangat luas.. Bagus dan indah sampe pegel muter muter.. Cuma mungkin untuk harga wahana (baik kota mini /floating market ) agar lebih murah karena saya rasa tidak sesuai dengan experience nya, atau bisa ditambah keseruannya agar setimpal dengan yg dibayar..
english_translation: The staff is friendly, the area is very spacious.. It's so good and beautiful that my feet hurt from walking around.. It's just that maybe the price of the attractions (both mini town / floating market) could be cheaper because I feel it doesn't match the experience, or maybe add more fun so it's worth what you pay..

text:
Aman dan nyaman,
Hanya saja saya kurang mengerti,
Karcis masuk kendaraan roda empat, karcis masuk pengunjung nusantara,
Penataan parkir, semuanya jelas,
Tapi ko kadang petugas diatas masih meminta uang parkir, apakah mereka pekerja disitu? Dan harus berapa kali kami bayar parkir?
english_translation:
Safe and comfortable,
It's just that I don't quite understand,
Vehicle entry ticket, domestic visitor entry ticket,
Parking arrangement, everything is clear,
But why do the officers above sometimes still ask for parking fees? Are they workers there? And how many times do we have to pay for parking?

text: Untuk akses masuk jalan nya kurang baik agak rusak ... Tiket masuk kedalam murah dan banyak sekalia tempat area datar baik untuk camp, kegiatan komunitas dan lainnya .. selain itu juga ada beberapa wahana outbond ada mushola dan tempat istirahat atau makan.. parkiran cukup luas..
english_translation: The access road is not good, it's a bit damaged... The entrance ticket is cheap and there are many flat areas, good for camping, community activities, and more.. Besides that, there are also some outbound rides, a prayer room, and places to rest or eat.. The parking lot is quite spacious..

text:
Sejuuuuuuukkkk bgt tempatnya. Referensi untuk keluarga, acara kantor, dan honeymoon😋
Ada wahana outbound (flyingfox dll), kebun strowberry yg bisa metik, makanannya pun enak dan harganya terbilang terjangkau lah ya (start 15rb-70rb).
Tempat tidurnya enak, dingin banget, worth it!
english_translation:
The place is very cool. Recommended for families, office events, and honeymoons😋
There are outbound rides (flying fox, etc.), a strawberry garden where you can pick them, and the food is also delicious and the prices are quite affordable (starting from 15k-70k).
The beds are comfortable, it's very cold, worth it!

text: Tempat yang sangat cocok untuk yang mencari wisata alam. Tenpatnya sejuk, tenang dan indah. Banyak spot foto dan permainan. Bisa untuk tempat wedding juga. Harga sangat terjangkau. Di sediakan kendaraan saat pulang untuk kembali ke tempat parkir. Sayang jalan kendaraan agak rusak
english_translation: A very suitable place for those looking for nature tourism. The place is cool, quiet, and beautiful. Many photo spots and games. It can also be a wedding venue. The price is very affordable. A vehicle is provided for the return trip to the parking lot. It's a shame the road for vehicles is a bit damaged.

text: Gunung putri lembang ini tidak jauh dari kota Bandung. Hanua saja jika ingin datang ketempat ini sebaiknya pagi hari untuk menghindari macet. Selain itu datang dipagi hari lebih menyenangkan, karena kita bisa menikmati pemandangan yg luar biasa indah dan menghirup udara yg segar.
english_translation: This Lembang mountain area is not far from Bandung city. However, if you want to come here, it's best to come in the morning to avoid traffic jams. Besides, coming in the morning is more pleasant because we can enjoy the incredibly beautiful scenery and breathe the fresh air.

text: tempatnya banyak disatu tempat, bawah sarae hills atas ada d'dieuland, sudut pandang dan lainnya. sarae hillsnya tempatnya adem dan luas, tempatnya bagus, pegawainya ramah banget dan mau bantu foto, ada beberapa tempat duduk, dan bisa ditukar minuman, shuttle nya juga cepat banget
english_translation: The places are many in one location, below is Sarae Hills, above is D'Dieuland, viewpoint, and others. Sarae Hills is cool and spacious, the place is nice, the staff are very friendly and willing to help take photos, there are several places to sit, and you can exchange it for drinks, the shuttle is also very fast.

text: Tiket 20rb mbl 10rb. Jalur trekingnya bagus cukup menantang dan jauh. Lebih baik ke sini kalau tidak hujan beberapa hari karna tanah nya nempel di sepatu pdhal kemaren2 gujan juga sebentar. Ĺebih baik pagi2, kalau siang sudah byk org. Ga nyaman. Buat foto2. Seru kalau bawa anjing.
english_translation: Ticket 20rb, car 10rb. The trekking path is good, quite challenging and long. It's better to come here if it hasn't rained for a few days because the mud sticks to your shoes, even though it rained a little yesterday. It's better to come early in the morning; if you come during the day, there will be many people, which is uncomfortable. Good for taking photos. It's fun if you bring a dog.

text: Konsepnya sangat bagus untuk dibuat jalan jalan seharian ga akan terasa karena banyak spot khususnya utk pecinta tanaman ataupun wisata alam yg ringan, tempatnya luas, bersih, banyak wahana dan spot2 foto yg sayang untuk dilewatkan, masih pengen ksana lagi bareng keluarga nantinya
english_translation: The concept is very good for a day trip, it won't feel long because there are many spots, especially for plant lovers or light nature tourism. The place is spacious, clean, has many attractions and photo spots that would be a shame to miss. I still want to go back there with my family later.

text:
akses masuk ke lokasi wisata jelek, tulisan keterangan objek wisata juga kecil tapi begitu sampai ke lokasi worth lah bosku 👌
harga jajanan juga murah
recommended ke sini di pagi hari & di musim kering/kemarau karena kalo pas musim hujan, jalananan ke atasnya licin dan belok tanah
english_translation:
Entrance access to the tourist spot is bad, the writing of the tourist attraction description is also small, but once you get to the location, it's worth it, boss 👌
Snack prices are also cheap.
Recommended to come here in the morning & during the dry season/summer because if it's the rainy season, the road up is slippery and turns to dirt.

text: Harganya standar murah 15k kalo gak salah, sudah dapet minuman ( mineral/tehpucuk /dll) tempatnya masih kelihatan baru jadi wahananya pun blm terlalu banyak, tapi tetep oke buat dikunjungi. Daya tarik utamanya danau buatan..  saran saya sih dibuat tempat outbound lebih seru lagi..
english_translation: The price is standard and cheap, 15k if I'm not mistaken, and it includes a drink (mineral water/Teh Pucuk/etc.). The place still looks new, so there aren't too many rides yet, but it's still okay to visit. The main attraction is the artificial lake. My suggestion is to make it a more exciting outbound spot.

text: Tempatnya luas, keren. Konsep food court unik menggunakan pasar terapung. Beli makanannya harus pakai koin yang bs anda tukar dengan uang rupiah anda. Harga tiket 25K sudah termasuk welcome drink. Harga makanan di floating market nya kisaran 15K-35K. Ada wahana permainan air juga.
english_translation: The place is spacious, cool. The food court concept is unique, using a floating market. You have to buy food with coins that you can exchange with your rupiah money. The ticket price of 25K includes a welcome drink. Food prices at the floating market range from 15K-35K. There are also water play attractions.

text:
pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan
kita bersama rombongan temen2 tukang kayu dan tukang cat hari ini minggu 5 mei 2019 telah membuktikan betapa bagus dan indah'ny wisata alam gunung tangkuban perahu ini
rekomed banget pokok'ny tempat'ny.g nyesel pasti'ny kalo dateng ke tempat ini
english_translation:
A very pleasant experience.
We, along with a group of carpenter and painter friends, on this Sunday, May 5, 2019, have proven how good and beautiful the natural tourism of Mount Tangkuban Perahu is.
Highly recommended, that's for sure. You definitely won't regret coming to this place.

text:
Tempatnya rekomen bgt buat acara keluarga mau camp ataupun hy skdr botram
Cm jalannya saja dr dusun bambu ke gerbang tiket curug layungnya yaa bs dibilang kurang bagus
Untuk tiketnya masih terbilang murah lah..
Fasilitas lengkap..
Toilet mushola dan warkop ada
Lahan parkir luas...
english_translation:
The place is highly recommended for family events, whether camping or just a picnic.
Only the road from Dusun Bambu to the Curug Layung ticket gate is, you could say, not very good.
The ticket price is still considered cheap.
Facilities are complete.
Toilets, prayer rooms, and coffee stalls are available.
Spacious parking lot.

text:
Pagi pagi kesini dapet view yg sangat bagus
Kalau udah kesiangan biasanya kabut turun dan mendadak ujan
Jadi pastiin pagi pagi kesini
Ada beberapa fasilitas disini
Musola.toilet .pusat informasi dan pusat oleh oleh juga ada
Bagi yg pengen naik kuda juga bisa
Karna ada fasilitasNya
english_translation:
Arrive early in the morning for a very good view.
If you arrive late, fog usually descends and it suddenly rains.
So, be sure to come early in the morning.
There are several facilities here.
There is also a prayer room, toilets, an information center, and a souvenir shop.
Those who want to ride a horse can also do so.
Because the facility is available.

text: Best place to see a sunset in Bandung Barat, sayang kesadaran pengunjung akan kebersihan masih kurang, terlihat beberapa sampah terselip diantara rumput hijau, tempatnya udah sepi ngga seramai dulu waktu viral. Waktu berkunjung maksimal jam 6 sore. Pemandangannya keren sih ini 🔥🔥🔥
english_translation: Best place to see a sunset in West Bandung, it's a shame visitors' awareness of cleanliness is still lacking, some trash is visible tucked among the green grass. The place is now quiet, not as crowded as it used to be when it went viral. Visit by 6 PM at the latest. The view is really cool though 🔥🔥🔥

text: Kalau ingin foto dengan Patung Liberty, Sphinx, Menara Eiffel, Santorini, dll, bisa disini. Bisa juga naik kuda poni, kereta dll. Tiket 50,000 utk yang biasa dan 65,000 (bisa ke jembatan). Dapat free 1 drink. Lebih baik datang pagi supaya enak foto2 + ga terlalu panas mataharinya.
english_translation: If you want photos with the Statue of Liberty, Sphinx, Eiffel Tower, Santorini, etc., you can do it here. You can also ride ponies, carriages, etc. Tickets are 50,000 for regular and 65,000 (includes access to the bridge). You get 1 free drink. It's better to come in the morning for good photos + the sun won't be too hot.

text: Kebun bunga yg indah subur bersih pemandangan yg menawan buat kamu" yg lg honeymoon waah kesini cucok bgt loohh.. suasana yg romantik terhampar bebungaan brmacam warna ulallaa..bny tmpt spot foto menarik 😍 tiket masuk 25rb/org include es potong buah dg brmacam varian enak looh..😁 …
english_translation: A beautiful, lush, clean flower garden with a charming view for you who are on your honeymoon. Wow, this place is perfect. The romantic atmosphere is filled with flowers of various colors, amazing! Lots of interesting photo spots 😍. Entrance ticket is Rp 25,000/person, which includes fruit ice pops with delicious various flavors. 😁

text: Bayar 50 per org utk weekend dan mbl 10 rb. Disana ada hutan pinus, cafe,  tempat utk foto2, taman orchid buat sy sih biasa2 aja tamannya. Anggrek nya jg yg umum2 aja. Utk tiket masuk 50 rb seorg sebenernya kemahalan krn kt tdk dpt apa2. Cuma jalan liat pohon pinus n taman Anggrek.
english_translation: Pay 50k per person for the weekend and 10k for the car. There's a pine forest, a cafe, photo spots, and an orchid garden. For me, the garden was just okay, and the orchids were also quite common. The 50k entrance fee per person is actually too expensive because you don't get anything. You just walk around and see pine trees and the orchid garden.

text: Tempat cukup luas ada pemandian air panas nya tapi bayar lagi 90.000, ada tempat memberi makan hewan tapi agak jauh dari jalanan dan akses bus tidak bisa masuk. Disediakan mobil khusus. Bagi anak kecil banyak untuk bermain tapi untuk dewasa sungguh membosankan. Spot foto cuma dikit
english_translation: The place is quite spacious, there's a hot spring but it costs an extra 90,000. There's a place to feed animals, but it's a bit far from the road and buses cannot access it. A special car is provided. There's a lot for small children to play, but it's very boring for adults. There are only a few photo spots.

text: Kebun Begonia. Tidak terlalu luas. Banyak spot fotonya. Ga ngabisin waktu lama untuk menjelajahinya. Tersedia juga cafe, toilet dan mushola. Ada juga bibit tanaman yang dijual. Lumayan indah dan menyejukkan. Apalagi kalau jalannya sama orang2 kesayangan. Hati senang pikiran tenang.
english_translation: Begonia Garden. Not too spacious. Lots of photo spots. Doesn't take long to explore. A cafe, toilets, and prayer room are also available. Plant seedlings are also sold. Quite beautiful and refreshing. Especially if you walk with loved ones. The heart is happy and the mind is at peace.

text: Semua keren disini, cuma aksesnya aja atau petunjuk jalannya yang agak kurang jelas menuju kesana, jadi kita perlu parkir diluar saat itu. Tapi secara keseluruhan semua area dan konsepnya menyenangkan. Fasilitas umum terawat baik dan kita perlu tukar dengan koin untuk makan disana.
english_translation: Everything here is cool, it's just that the access or directions to get there are a bit unclear, so we had to park outside at that time. But overall, all the areas and concepts are enjoyable. The public facilities are well-maintained, and we need to exchange money for coins to eat there.

text: Berkunjung hr kamis..tiket seorang 47500..mahal sih menurut aku .menurut akuu yaa....ga bs ditukar sesuatu gt ky tempat wisata lain..anak kecil pun tetap d hitung..padahl udh tiket sm parkir 5rb..eh ditmpat parkir atas tetep di pinta lagi..mending ga usah itung parkir d tmpt tiket.
english_translation: Visited on Thursday.. the ticket per person is 47,500.. it's expensive in my opinion. In my opinion, that is... you can't exchange it for anything like other tourist attractions.. even small children are still counted.. even though the ticket plus parking is 5,000.. then at the upper parking lot, they ask for it again.. it's better not to count parking at the ticket counter.

text: Baguslah buat bohongin orang jakarta.he he he.minimal mrk datang Bs foto² dan plg sudah senang.lucu jg ya tiket Bs ditukar minuman.teenyata minumannya cuma sirup ABC. Kaya minuman dijual di sekolah SDN gtu.lebih baik di hilangkan saja.kasian buat orang tua.takut nanti kencing manis
english_translation: Good for lying to Jakarta people. Heh heh heh. At least they can come, take photos, and go home happy. It's funny that the tickets can be exchanged for drinks. Turns out the drinks are just ABC syrup. Like drinks sold at elementary schools. It's better to just get rid of it. Pity the parents. Afraid they'll get diabetes later.

text:
Curug Maribaya ini terletak di dalam lokasi Wisata Maribaya Natural Springs Resort
Air terjunnya tidak terlalu tinggi airnya juga tidak terlalu jernih tetapi alirannya cukup deras
Sebenarnya penataan oleh pengelola sudah cukup baik hanya tinggal penyempurnaan dan perawatannya saja.
english_translation:
Curug Maribaya is located within the Maribaya Natural Springs Resort tourist area.
The waterfall is not very high, and the water is not very clear either, but the flow is quite strong.
Actually, the arrangement by the management is already quite good; it just needs refinement and maintenance.

text: mantabb tidak sia-sia datang ke stone garden, biaya masuk yang cukup murah Rp.5000/org. dan biaya parkir mobil Rp.7000. karena posisinya diatas bukit kapur. sangat disarankan untuk membawa perlengkapan yang bisa untuk melindungi tubuh dari sinar matahari,karena sangat panas disini.
english_translation: Awesome, it wasn't a waste of time coming to Stone Garden. The entrance fee is quite cheap at Rp. 5000/person, and the car parking fee is Rp. 7000. Because it's located on a limestone hill, it is highly recommended to bring equipment to protect yourself from the sun, as it's very hot here.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata Lembang yang lama tapi masih favorit. Suasana danaunya yang luas makin mantap sambil dinikmati dengan bandrek dan pisang goreng gula aren di pujaseranya enak. Bisa naik perahu jg sambil diterpa udara lembang yg sejuk. Kostum jepangnya jg bagus2 dan premium.
english_translation: One of Lembang's older but still favorite tourist spots. The atmosphere of the vast lake becomes even more delightful enjoyed with bandrek and palm sugar fried bananas at the delicious food court. You can also ride a boat while being caressed by Lembang's cool air. The Japanese costumes are also nice and premium.

text: Jujur if you’re a tourist ato sekedar visit iseng, this is a nature place bener” nature jadi bener” carefully yaa naik ke atasnya rekomendasi kalo mo pergi pagi” itu bawa senter yah. Pakai sepatu juga jangan sendal kalo musim ujan licin, curam juga tapi bener” bagus pemandangannya!
english_translation: Honestly, whether you're a tourist or just visiting casually, this is a truly natural place, so be very careful when going up. It's recommended to bring a flashlight if you go in the morning. Wear shoes, not sandals, especially if it's the rainy season because it's slippery and steep, but the scenery is really beautiful!

text: Bagus view nya .. Cuma pas di bagian beli snack nya seedikit keceewa. Beli kentang spiral tp kentangnya masi blom mateng n lembekw basah gt .. Hadeuhh.. Rame sich bole aja tp tetep hrs utamain kualitas. Tadi si anak yg beli jd ga ngerti komplain. Kalo. Saya pst akan saya tolakk ...
english_translation: The view is nice.. It's just a little disappointing at the snack purchase section. Bought spiral potato but the potato was still undercooked and soggy like wet.. Oh dear.. It's okay if it's crowded but quality should still be prioritized. The child who bought it didn't know how to complain. If it were me, I would definitely have refused it...

text:
Tempat yang asik buat ngadem bareng keluarga,  ada 2 jalur yang bisa d pakai untuk mencapai lokasi ini, lewat maribaya, atau lewat hutan raya ir. H djuanda.
Sya pakai jalur hutan raya, jalur ny cukup menyenangkan untuk tracking, kalau lelah tracking juga ada ojek yang siap antar ko.
english_translation:
A cool place to relax with family, there are 2 paths you can take to reach this location, via Maribaya, or via the Ir. H. Djuanda forest park.
I took the forest park path, the path is quite enjoyable for tracking, if you get tired of tracking, there are also motorcycle taxis ready to take you.

text: Meskipun jalannya masih bebatuan, tapi mudah diakses. Naiknya tidak terlalu tinggi. Tidak terlalu jauh dari kota Bandung. Bisa menikmati angin semilir dan pemandangan hijau. Baiknya bawa minum sebelum naik ke puncaknya supaya tidak bolak-balik karena di atas tidak ada yang berjualan
english_translation: Although the path is still rocky, it is easily accessible. The climb is not too steep. It's not too far from Bandung city. You can enjoy the gentle breeze and green scenery. It's best to bring water before climbing to the summit so you don't have to go back and forth because there are no vendors at the top.

text: Dari jalan raya tuh masih naik keatas lagi terusss, jalannya ekstrem sih nanjak banget dan bebatuan gitu. Cuma muat 1 mobil jalannya tuh. Tiket masuknya 15rb. Ada musholla dan toilet. Ada warung jual indomie dan popmie. Bisa buat camping dan menyusuri, curug, outbond, dan kebun teh.
english_translation: From the highway, it's still uphill and then continues on, the road is extreme, very steep and rocky. The road only fits one car. The entrance fee is 15,000 Rupiah. There is a prayer room and toilets. There is a stall selling Indomie and Pop Mie. It can be used for camping, trekking, visiting waterfalls, outbound activities, and the tea garden.

text: Tempat yang sangat bagus untuk refreshing keluarga, susana sejuk rimbun dibawah pepohonan pinus, tertata rapih dan kebersihannya juga terjaga, sayang setelah pandemi batas waktu berkunjung hanya sampai pukul 18.00 sore padahal efek lampu baru terlihat efeknya setelah hari agak gelap
english_translation: A very good place for family refreshing, cool and lush atmosphere under the pine trees, well-organized and the cleanliness is also maintained, it's a shame that after the pandemic the visiting hours are only until 6:00 PM, even though the effect of the new lights is only visible after it gets a bit dark.

text: Salah satu gunung yg masih aktif di indonesia, view nya bagus bgt buat foto2 tiket masuk 2 orang 1 motor sebesar Rp79.000, harga makanan dan minuman di warung sekitar standar wisata tidak terlalu mahal, masih banyak kera berkeliaran di jalan menuju kawah, indonesia memang bagus, 😙 …
english_translation: One of the still active volcanoes in Indonesia, the view is really great for photos. The entrance ticket for 2 people and 1 motorbike is Rp79,000. The prices of food and drinks at the roadside stalls are standard for tourist areas, not too expensive. There are still many monkeys roaming the road leading to the crater. Indonesia is indeed beautiful, 😙 ...

text: Nice place to visit kalau ke Bandung. Banyak cafe-cafe Instagram-worthy juga di dalemnya, kayak 450 Degree Pizza, Golden Pine, dsb. Banyak juga spot foto dan aktivitas (wahana?) seperti Kebun Anggrek, Wood Bridge, Flying Fox. Harga tiket masuk Rp 50rb per orang belum termasuk parkir
english_translation: Nice place to visit if you're going to Bandung. Lots of Instagram-worthy cafes inside too, like 450 Degree Pizza, Golden Pine, etc. Many photo spots and activities (rides?) like the Orchid Garden, Wood Bridge, Flying Fox. Entrance ticket price is Rp 50k per person, excluding parking.

text: Bagus tempatnya,bayarnya cukup terjangkau.Saran jangan ajak ortu yang sudah sepuh kasian karena banyak jalanan yg naik.Jadi sistemnya kalo disini itu bayar sekali di depan habis itu kalo di dal mau masuk wahana yg lain juga bayar tapi banyak yg free juga kok.Overall oke tempatnyaaa.
english_translation: The place is nice and the price is quite affordable. My suggestion is not to bring elderly parents, as it's a pity because there are many uphill paths. So the system here is you pay once at the entrance, and then if you want to enter other attractions inside, you still have to pay, but many are free too. Overall, the place is okay.

text: Jenis makanan yang djual sangat variatif,jadi memanjakan lidah Pecinta kuliner.Harga makanan lumayan mahal untuk sekelasnya,tapi pemandangan lumayan adem.sayangnya wahananya kurang terawat terutama diarea kampung sunda dan kebun bunga.saran saya usahakan pagi2 kesininya agar nyaman.
english_translation: The types of food sold are very varied, thus pampering the taste buds of culinary lovers. The food prices are quite expensive for their class, but the view is quite pleasant. Unfortunately, the facilities are not well maintained, especially in the Sundanese village and flower garden areas. My advice is to try to come here in the morning for a comfortable experience.

text:
Tempat nya lumayan sesuai dengan standar sapta pesona.
Sangat cocok untuk traveling atau adventure dan juga untuk liburan family juga tempat ini sangat cocok.

Namun harus ttp waspada dan berhati-hati kepada pengunjung yg membawa anak anak agar harap lebih diperhatikan saat berenang
english_translation:
The place is quite in line with Sapta Pesona standards.
It is very suitable for traveling or adventure and also for family holidays, this place is very suitable.

However, visitors with children must remain vigilant and careful, so please pay more attention when swimming.

text:
Makanan nya ENAK ENAK
parkiran luas , staff ramah
Kopi dan minuman penukaran dr tiket masuk ENAK

parkiran per jam

Wahana permainan bayar lagu , per spot permainan

Tidak ada masjid didalam tempat wisata, kalo mau jumatan keluar aja ada MASJID ALFURQON di pinggir jalan raya lembang
english_translation:
The food is DELICIOUS
Spacious parking, friendly staff
Coffee and drinks exchanged from entrance tickets are DELICIOUS

Hourly parking

Game rides are paid per song, per game spot

There is no mosque inside the tourist spot, if you want to pray Friday, just go out, there is MASJID ALFURQON on the side of the main Lembang road

text: Curuk air terjun yg indah serta mudah di akses di kawasan bandung barat.. nuansa alam yang exotice memanjakan mata dengan hijau nya pepohonan di tambah gemercik suara air terjun yang terngiang kebawa pulang.. dan ingin rasanya kembali mengunjungi pbjek wista tersebut.. curug malela.
english_translation: A beautiful and easily accessible waterfall in the West Bandung area. The exotic natural ambiance spoils the eyes with the green of the trees, plus the splashing sound of the waterfall that rings in your ears when you go home. And you'll feel like visiting that tourist attraction again... Curug Malela.

text: Luas, kalo yg doyan taman2 sama buat foto2 ala taman dan jepang2an gt di sana ada. Paling suka adem banyak pohon, angin sepoi, udaranya ga tercemar, sama paling oke bisa makan jajajan seabrek dari tepi danau. Jajanannya anyway belinya pake coin ala2 traditional gt, disediain di sana.
english_translation: Spacious, if you like gardens and taking photos like in a garden and Japanese style, it's there. I like most that it's cool, lots of trees, a gentle breeze, the air is not polluted, and the best part is you can eat tons of snacks from the lakeside. By the way, you buy the snacks using traditional-like coins, which they provide there.

text: Salah satu tempat kemping yg masih kuat sinyal internetnya karena lokasi tidak terlalu jauh dari pasar lembang.. cocok buat para pemburu sunrise dan kabut negeri di atas awan.. cuma sekarang suhu udaranya lagi dingin dinginnya bisa nyampe 15 derajat celcius. Ramah juga buat anak anak
english_translation: One of the campsites with a strong internet signal because it's not too far from Lembang market. Suitable for those hunting for sunrises and mist in the land above the clouds. Currently, the air temperature is at its coldest, reaching 15 degrees Celsius. It's also child-friendly.

text:
Parkiran luas, masuknya kemarin 17.500, nanjaknya gak jauh, di atas luas area untuk kemah, pemandangannya mantap, bisa nikmati sunrise kalau beruntung, tapi ada aja yg ninggalin sampah di atas
Untuk yg dadakan atau ga mau repot ada sewa tenda paketan 200rb sudah siap semua matras dll
english_translation:
Spacious parking, entry fee yesterday was 17,500. The climb isn't far, and at the top there's a large area for camping. The view is excellent, you can enjoy the sunrise if you're lucky, but there are still people who leave trash up there.
For those who are spontaneous or don't want to bother, there's a tent rental package for 200,000 which includes everything like mattresses, etc.

text:
bagus untuk foto dan jalan-halan. kalau ke sini lebih baik persiapan jaket, sweeter, kacamata hitam, masker,  tongsis, dan kamera.
untuk kuliner di sini bisa jalan2 sambil makan buah strawberry dan minum bandrek alias wedang Jahe.  jangan lupa beli akar dan belirang untuk obat alami.
english_translation:
Good for photos and walking around. If you come here, it's better to prepare a jacket, sweater, sunglasses, mask, selfie stick, and camera.
For culinary delights here, you can walk around while eating strawberries and drinking bandrek, also known as ginger tea. Don't forget to buy roots and sulfur for natural medicine.

text: Salah satu tempat untuk memanjakan diri di KBB, tempatnya sangat nyaman dan sejuk, akses toilet gampang juga bersih. lalu ada juga tempat bermain anak dan tempat untuk foto" ria, harga makanan disini sangat affordable, tidak terlalu mahal. bahkan sama harganya dengan warung" sekitar.
english_translation: One of the places to pamper yourself in KBB, the place is very comfortable and cool, the toilet access is easy and clean. There is also a children's play area and a place for photos. The food prices here are very affordable, not too expensive. Even the same price as the surrounding stalls.

text: Tempat nya bagus dengan formasi batu batu karang yg kemungkinan dulunya bekas di lautan terbentuk jutaan tahun yg lalu. Akses jalan dr jalan utama ke lokasi kurang bagus krn hanya batuan tp msh bisa di lalui kendaran kecil spt sedan. Hati hati di saat musim hujan krn cenderung licin.
english_translation: The place is nice with rock formations that were likely once part of the ocean, formed millions of years ago. The road access from the main road to the location is not very good as it's just rocky but still passable for small vehicles like sedans. Be careful during the rainy season as it tends to be slippery.

text: Kebun bunga yang indah dan bagus banget buat liburan keluarga. Terletak di daerah Lembang, Bandung yang tidak begitu jauh dari D'Ranch Lembang. Banyak banget spot foto yang bisa dimanfaatkan untuk Selfi atau wefie. Untuk yang bawa kamera, di kenakan charge lagi selain tiket masuk ya.
english_translation: A beautiful flower garden, really great for a family holiday. Located in the Lembang area, Bandung, not too far from D'Ranch Lembang. There are so many photo spots that can be used for selfies or wefies. For those who bring a camera, there is an additional charge besides the entrance ticket.

text: Tempatnya instagramable banget...  Seolah-olah keliling dunia. Tempatnya tertata rapi dan bersih. Harga masuk terjangkau termasuk transportasi utk capai lokasi. Dianjurkan untuk datang lbh pagi atau agak sore supaya ketika berfoto tdk kepanasan. Tapi all 4 all keeerreeennnn banget...
english_translation: The place is super Instagrammable... It feels like traveling around the world. The place is well-organized and clean. The entrance fee is affordable, including transportation to reach the location. It's recommended to come earlier in the morning or later in the afternoon so you don't get too hot when taking photos. But overall, it's absolutely amazing...

text: Tempat yang bagus banget ga bosen bahkan ga bisa kenjangkau ke semua arah karna luas banget, bentuk perahu kebaliknya sudah tidak bisa keliatahan karena meletus berkali" tapi kalo dari jauh masih keliat kek perahu kebaliknya, harus pake masker, jalannya keren banget. Semua tempat ok.
english_translation: A really great place, not boring, can't even reach everywhere because it's so vast. The upside-down boat shape can no longer be seen because it has exploded multiple times, but from a distance, it still looks like an upside-down boat. You have to wear a mask, the path is really cool. All the places are okay.

text:
buka jam 8 pagi tapi sampai di sini terlalu dini. Air terjunnya luar biasa, jalannya beraspal cukup bagus tapi perlu hati-hati karena bisa licin

jalan turun sangat menyenangkan karena saya
Anda hanya turun, tetapi jalan kembali pasti membuat Anda kehabisan napas, latihan yang bagus
english_translation:
Opens at 8 am but arrived too early. The waterfall is amazing, the paved road is quite good but need to be careful as it can be slippery

the way down is very enjoyable as I
you only go down, but the way back will definitely make you breathless, a good workout

text: 1) Pembayaran tdk 1 pintu, ribet. 2)Anak diatas 2 thn (dibawah 5 thn) sdh harus bayar full. 3) Petugas pintu masuk dan wahana kota mini gak ramah. Jujurly bukan soal harganya tp caranya. Taman safari bogor kita bayar 230ribu/orang namun sepadan dgn servis yg di dapat.. Semoga lbh baik
english_translation:
1) Payments are not one-stop, it's complicated.
2) Children over 2 years old (under 5 years old) already have to pay full price.
3) The staff at the entrance and in the mini city attractions are not friendly. Honestly, it's not about the price, but the way they do things. At Taman Safari Bogor, we pay 230,000 per person, but it's commensurate with the service received. Hopefully, it will be better.

text:
Ada wahana baru namanya Rainbow Slide.
Harga tiketnya 30rb/org diluar HTM Floating Marketnya.

Wahananya cukup tinggi dan jalurnya juga panjang, worth it sih untuk harga segitu.
Kalo mau meluncur seharian juga bisa, bayar 80rb/org.
Tapi naik ke atasnya cape juga karena lewat tangga ;D
english_translation:
There's a new ride called Rainbow Slide.
The ticket price is 30,000 Indonesian Rupiah per person, excluding the Floating Market entrance fee.

The ride is quite high and the track is also long, it's worth it for that price.
If you want to slide all day, you can too, for 80,000 Indonesian Rupiah per person.
But climbing to the top is tiring because you have to use the stairs ;D

text:
Rute hikingnya komplit, bareng anak2 jg ok. Ada curug dan danau, bs berenang, airnya mantap, ada hutan pinusnya, ada sawah, dan nasi liwetnya enak jg 👍
Kekurangannya cuma akses jalan dan akses parkir (kami ke sana Nov 2020), mgkn skrg sdh ada perbaikan. Semoga bs hiking lg ke sana 😇 …
english_translation:
