The hiking trails are complete, good for going with kids too. There are waterfalls and lakes, you can swim, the water is great, there are pine forests, there are rice fields, and the nasi liwet is delicious too 👍
The only drawbacks were road access and parking access (we went in November 2020), perhaps there have been improvements by now. Hope to hike there again 😇 …

text: Tempat nya MasyaAllah sangat sejuk, enak buat berlibur bersama teman-teman dan keluarga, saat berkunjung kesini terasa adem Damai Untuk merenungkan betapa maha besarnya Allah dgn CiptaanNya, namun ini belum seberapa dan belum ada apa-apa nya.  Msh bnyak keMaha besaran Allah yg lainnya
english_translation: The place is Alhamdulillah very cool, nice for a holiday with friends and family. When visiting here, it feels calm and peaceful to contemplate the greatness of Allah with His creation. However, this is not much and is nothing compared to His other infinite greatness.

text: So beauty.... berkali-kali kesini tetep takjub dengan ciptaan Allah. Keindahan alam dan suasa yang selalu bikin kangen.. bawa rombongan juga sudah pasti diarahkan ke sini. Spot fotonya banyak. Dan cantik2... mudah-mudahan kebersihan tetap dipertahankan terutama bagi pengunjung.. ntaap
english_translation: So beautiful... I've been here many times and I'm still amazed by God's creation. The natural beauty and atmosphere always make me miss it... Taking a group here is a must. There are many photo spots. And they are all beautiful... Hopefully, cleanliness will be maintained, especially by visitors... Awesome.

text:
Wisata daerah yg wajib dikunjungi dan sekarang fasilitas sdh lebih baik dan bersih...penjaja souvenir dan makanan banyakkk utk spot photo mereka paling PAHAM dimana yg bagusss dan terdapat pusat seismograf di tunjukkin sm mereka...
Silahkan beli souvenirnya dan berilah tip seikhlasnya
english_translation: A must-visit local tourist spot, the facilities are now better and cleaner... There are many souvenir and food vendors. They are very knowledgeable about the best photo spots and can show you the seismograph center. Please buy souvenirs and give a tip as you wish.

text: Tiket masuknya 50rb/org bayar perhutani 10rb/mobil. Tempatnya enak...adem...anak2 bisa lari2 ada lapangan..ada rumah kelinci juga buat anak2. Toilet dan musholanya enak bersih. Kalau lapar ada cafe2 nya juga. Ada tempat bermain anak juga...bayar 40rb/anak. Flying fox juga ada 20rb/org
english_translation: The entrance fee is 50,000 IDR per person, and you pay 10,000 IDR per car to the forestry department. The place is nice... cool... kids can run around there's a field... there's also a bunny house for kids. The toilets and prayer rooms are nice and clean. If you're hungry, there are also cafes. There's also a playground for kids... it costs 40,000 IDR per child. There's also a flying fox for 20,000 IDR per person.

text: Tempat yang tidak biasa ditemui di bandung, terhampar luas padang dan bukit bebatuan. menarik untuk dikunjungi, akses jalan menuju stone garden kurang begitu bagus, tapi masih bisa dilalui oleh motor dan mobil. banyak yang prewed dan banyak pula yang ngumpul buat makan-makan papahare.
english_translation: An unusual place found in Bandung, with vast fields and rocky hills stretching out. Interesting to visit, the access road to Stone Garden is not very good, but it can still be passed by motorcycles and cars. Many people have their pre-wedding photoshoots there, and many also gather for picnics.

text:
Tempat altrnatif wisata untuk keluarga yg murah.
Mungkin wahana paforitnya prahu bebek atau penyewaan sepeda, baik speda biasa atau speda listrik. Ada juga penyewaan kuda polandia, yg katanya harganya sampe 300 juta. Untuk sewa kuda skitar 70 K, sewa sepeda 15 K, sewa prahu bebek 45 K
english_translation:
Affordable alternative tourist spots for families.
Perhaps the favorite attractions are paddle boats or bicycle rentals, either regular bicycles or electric bikes. There are also Polish horse rentals, which are said to cost up to 300 million. Horse rental is around 70K, bicycle rental is 15K, and paddle boat rental is 45K.

text:
Tempatnya cocok buat menenangkan diri. Duduk diantara pohon pinus, nikmati udara segar lalu berkontemplasi. Datangnya pas weekday kalo gak mau rame.
Mungkin pada tiket diberi map kecil untuk wahana apa aja yang tersedia dan lokasinya. Karena gak semua orang bisa ngebaca arah petunjuk.
english_translation:
The place is suitable for calming yourself. Sit among the pine trees, enjoy the fresh air, and contemplate. Come on a weekday if you don't want crowds.
Perhaps a small map could be included with the tickets detailing available attractions and their locations. Not everyone can read directional signs.

text:
Ma syaa Allah... takjub akan kebesaran Ciptaan Allah SWT. Skrg Masuknya harus pake scan vaksin.
Tiket 30.000 hari libur
tiket mobil 35.000
parkir 5.000
Alhamdulillah rapih bersih nyaman, para pedagang juga ramah² bs minta tolong juga untuk potoin pengunjung.
Seru banget .... enjoy.
👍👍
english_translation:
Ma syaa Allah... amazed by the greatness of Allah SWT's Creation. Now entry requires a vaccination scan.
Ticket 30,000 on holidays
Car ticket 35,000
Parking 5,000
Alhamdulillah, neat, clean, comfortable, the vendors are also friendly, they can also be asked for help to take photos of visitors.
So much fun.... enjoy.
👍👍

text:
Salah satu tempat favorit keluarga saat ke Lembang / Bandung

Banyak spot foto yang instagramable, bisa sewa baju ala jepang dg spot foto yang mendukung, makanan di food courtnya enak dan berbagai macam dengan nuansa pasar apung dan pemandangan danau, berbagai macam arena bermain anak
english_translation:
One of the family's favorite spots when visiting Lembang / Bandung

Many Instagrammable photo spots, you can rent Japanese-style clothing with supporting photo spots, the food at the food court is delicious and varied with a floating market ambiance and lake views, various children's play areas.

text: Situ Ciburuy laukna hese dipancing kmargi teu Aya nu melak😄 skrang tempatnya menjadi bersih dan tertata cocok buat gowes pemula kesini karena jalurnya datar dan tempatnya juga cocok buat acara keluarga tapi jangan berharap jajananya murah karena ini tempat wisata....bomber adventure …
english_translation: The fish in Situ Ciburuy are hard to catch because no one cultivates them. Now the place is clean and well-organized, suitable for beginner cyclists because the trails are flat and the place is also suitable for family events. But don't expect the snacks to be cheap because this is a tourist spot... bomber adventure...

text:
Pergi ke floating market pas weekday emang udah paling bener, jalan kesananya gak macet, dan bisa nikmatin suasananya yang asri. Lumayan untuk cuci mata.
Tiket bisa ditukar minuman (kopi/es jeruk/milo). Untuk pembelian tiket bisa dibeli on the spot atau kalau saya sih lewat Traveloka.
english_translation:
Going to the floating market on a weekday is indeed the best idea. The journey there isn't congested, and you can enjoy the serene atmosphere. It's quite a good way to refresh your eyes.
Tickets can be exchanged for drinks (coffee/orange juice/Milo). You can buy tickets on the spot, or if you're like me, through Traveloka.

text: Sungguh sangat takjub dgn ciptaanmu y Rab, begitu banyak keindahan alam salah satunya yaitu : Air Terjun Niagara Mini (Curug Malela) begitu indah dan terpampang nyata di alam semesta ini,,,, aku sangat bersyukur kepada mu y Rab :) => and l am very pround of all your beauty of God °^_^
english_translation: Truly amazed by Your creation, O Lord. So much natural beauty, one of them being: Mini Niagara Falls (Curug Malela), so beautiful and truly displayed in this universe. I am very grateful to You, O Lord :) => and I am very proud of all Your beauty of God °^_^

text:
Air terjun nya bagus, pemandangan indah. Jalan dari park area tidak terlalu jauh cuma 1-2 km saja.
Hanya jalanan nya ada sebagian masih tanah, licin kalo habis hujan. Tempat untuk istirahat yang disediakan juga  bagus... Belum selesai pembangunan nya. Tapi ke depan nya pasti keren lah
english_translation:
The waterfall is beautiful, the scenery is lovely. The walk from the parking area isn't too far, only 1-2 km.
However, some of the path is still dirt, slippery after rain. The resting spots provided are also good... Construction is not yet finished. But it will surely be cool in the future.

text: Kesana untuk hiking bersama rombongan, terakhir jalannya belum jadi jd agak sulit medannya, tapi cukup menantang, juga banyak warga sana yang membantu. Ada beberapa warung hanya di pintu masuk, jd sebaiknya bawa bekal yg cukup sebelum naik. Cenderung sangat sepi di hari biasa/weekdays.
english_translation: Went there for a group hike. The road wasn't finished last time, so the terrain was a bit difficult but quite challenging. Many locals there also helped. There are a few small stalls only at the entrance, so it's best to bring enough provisions before heading up. It tends to be very quiet on weekdays.

text:
Sekarang banyak sekali pedagang yang agak memaksa dalam menawarkan dagangan.

Saya tidak nyaman selalu diikuti pedagang saat sedang menikmati pemandangan atau berfoto.
Kadang juga menawarkan bantuan untuk menfoto secara gratis, tapi salah satu strategi agar bisa menawarkan dagangannya.
english_translation:
Nowadays, many traders are rather pushy in offering their wares.
I feel uncomfortable being constantly followed by traders while enjoying the scenery or taking photos.
Sometimes they also offer to take photos for free, but it's a strategy to be able to offer their merchandise.

text:
Lokasi bersahabat untuk liburan bersama keluarga,

meski siang hari datangnya di sarankan bawa jaket untuk yg kurang tahan udara dingin, dan kabut.

Jangan lupa bawa tongsis atau tripodnya karna byk spot foto keren 😄📸

Sangat Recommend untuk yg ingin tenangkan diri, dengan suasana alam
english_translation:
A friendly location for a family vacation,

although during the day it is recommended to bring a jacket for those who are not resistant to cold air and fog.

Don't forget to bring a selfie stick or tripod because there are many cool photo spots 😄📸

Highly recommended for those who want to calm themselves down with nature's atmosphere

text: Tempat untuk wisata kuliner dengan pemandangan yang beda dari biasanya. Para penjual menggunakan perahu untuk berjualan. Jajanan tradisional hingga modern tersaji. Jangan lupa membawa uang karena sulit tuk menemukan ATM. Untuk membeli kita harus menukarkan uang kita dengan koin khusus.
english_translation: A place for culinary tourism with a view different from the usual. The sellers use boats to sell. Traditional to modern snacks are available. Don't forget to bring cash as it's difficult to find ATMs. To buy, we have to exchange our money for special coins.

text:
Untuk ke lokasi search cililin dulu.. baru direction ke lokasi.. kalo langsung dr padalarang jalanya kecil (hanya muat 1,5 mobil)

Dr parkiran jalan kaki menurun kira kira 2km
baru sekitar 1/10 jalan yg di beton.. sisanya tangga tanah.. kl musim hujan mending ga kesini krn tangga licin
english_translation:
First, go to the Cililin search location, then get directions to the location. If you go directly from Padalarang, the road is narrow (only fits 1.5 cars).

From the parking lot, walk downhill for approximately 2km.
Only about 1/10 of the path is concreted, the rest is dirt stairs. If it's the rainy season, it's better not to come here because the stairs will be slippery.

text:
Curugnya sangat indah,,tpi butuh perjuangan yg sgt berat untuk perjalanan menuju curugnya..medan jalannya sgt curam juga licin,diharapkan untuk berhati hati untuk para wisatawan yg akan mengunjungi curug malela..

Salam dari kami keluarga besar FOGI Bandung,Forza Owner Grup Indonesia..
english_translation:
The waterfall is very beautiful, but it takes a very hard struggle to get to the waterfall. The path is very steep and slippery, so tourists visiting Malela waterfall are advised to be careful.

Greetings from us, the big family of FOGI Bandung, Forza Owner Grup Indonesia.

text:
asik dan seru untuk berfoto ria bersama keluarga ataupun pasangan.

the best part, jembatan merah.. bagi g yg fobia ketinggian gak mudah, but.. g bisa melawatinya :v

ohya.. deket tempat Wisata lainnya juga 👍 (D'DLand, Kawasan Punclut, Sudut Pandang)

salah 1 Rekomenlah klo Ke LEMBANG.
english_translation:
Fun and exciting for taking photos with family or a partner.

The best part, the red bridge.. for those who are afraid of heights, it's not easy, but.. I managed to cross it :v

Oh yeah.. also close to other tourist attractions 👍 (D'DLand, Punclut Area, Sudut Pandang)

One recommendation if you go to Lembang.

text: Luas....udara sejuk, ada taman bermain untuk anak2, ada kasih makan hewan...kelinci, kambing...ada hewan2 ternak lainnya, ada naik kuda juga, naik perahu, tentunya tempat makanpun tersedia banyak sekali....ada kolam renang juga....lengkap sekali...pokoknya ok utk main bersama keluarga.
english_translation: Spacious... cool air, there's a playground for kids, you can feed animals... rabbits, goats... there are other farm animals, there's also horseback riding, boat rides, and of course, plenty of places to eat.... there's also a swimming pool.... very complete... all in all, it's good for playing with the family.

text: Tempat penginapan yg menyatu dengan alam.. Hehehe.. Cocok yg mencari ketenangan dan udara sejuk khas bandung. Ada restoran nya juga, makanannya enak.. Kalau bisa lebih banyakin lagi wahana-wahana hiburannya. Apa karena sekarang masih pengembangan yah.. Hehe.. Seru deh klo ke tempat ini.
english_translation: Accommodation that blends with nature.. Hehehe.. Suitable for those seeking tranquility and the cool air typical of Bandung. There's also a restaurant, the food is delicious.. If possible, add more entertainment attractions. Is it because it's still under development now.. Hehe.. It's fun to go to this place.

text: Tempatnya tidak terlalu luas, tapi lumayan bagus buat melihat bunga-bunga dan juga sayuran. Untuk sayuran bisa metik sendiri, kalau bunga gak boleh, tapi bisa beli bibit bunga yang disukai. Sayang kemarin kesini waktu musim kemarau, jadi bunganya kurang seger, sayurannya juga agak layu.
english_translation: The place isn't too spacious, but it's quite nice for seeing flowers and vegetables. You can pick your own vegetables, but you're not allowed to pick the flowers, though you can buy seedlings of your favorite flowers. Unfortunately, I came here during the dry season, so the flowers weren't very fresh, and the vegetables were also a bit wilted.

text: Kami datang saat weekday serasa yang punya curug. Kalau weekend kurang tau. Tempatnya bersih & nyaman, kekurangannya hanya di tempat ganti baju/kamar mandinya sangat jauh. Dan ada beberapa spot yg tidak terurus (mungkin efek pandemi juga?). HTM : Rp. 25.000 (sudah termasuk parkir mobil)
english_translation: We came on a weekday and it felt like we owned the waterfall. I'm not sure about weekends. The place is clean and comfortable, the only drawback is that the changing rooms/bathrooms are very far away. And there are a few spots that are not well-maintained (maybe also an effect of the pandemic?). Entrance Fee: Rp. 25,000 (includes car parking)

text: Ketiga kalinya kesini, dengan pemandangan eksotis yg masih sama. Hanya saja, terakhir kali mengunjungi tempat ini, akses jalan menuju lokasi dirasa semakin rusak. Dan, baru sadar, banyak monyet berkeliaran, yg membuat saya berlarian kesana kemari. But, yah,, still enjoy and hot yg pasti
english_translation: Third time here, with the exotic view still the same. It's just that, the last time I visited this place, the road access to the location felt more damaged. And, I just realized, there were many monkeys roaming around, which made me run back and forth. But, well, still enjoy it and it's definitely hot.

text: Aneka jajanan yang di tawarkan banyak konsep berjualan diatas perahu mungkin jadi ikon floating market Lembang ... Sebelum menikmati kuliner di floating market Lembang ini kita harus tukar uang kita dengan koin ya guys ... Baru setelahnya itu kita bisa kulineran naik perahu ya guys ....
english_translation: The variety of snacks offered with many selling concepts on boats might be the icon of Lembang's floating market... Before enjoying the culinary offerings at this Lembang floating market, we have to exchange our money for coins, guys... Only then can we go on a culinary adventure on a boat, guys...

text:
Tempat nya umum saja, hanya spot foto dari beberapa icon belahan dunia
Hanya saja tempat ini tidak ramah untuk pengguna kursi roda dan stroller, tidak ada track khusus untuk fasilitas tersebut, banyak anak tangga, lokasi nya menurun lumayan curam, dan setelah pulang menanjak nya lumayan
english_translation:
The place is ordinary, just photo spots from several world icons.
However, this place is not friendly for wheelchair and stroller users, there are no special tracks for these facilities, many stairs, the location is quite steeply downhill, and the uphill climb on the way back is quite a lot.

text: Tempatnya enak bersih dan staffnya ramaaahhh banget. Kalo nginep disini harus sepaket sama breakfast karna makanannya enak enak. Sama malemnya ada api unggun. Ada wahananya juga kaya paint ball sama flying fox, tapi ada juga greenhouse, penangkaran burung, tempat kelinci, dll. Worth it!
english_translation: The place is nice, clean, and the staff are suuuper friendly. If you stay here, you must get the package with breakfast because the food is delicious. And at night, there's a bonfire. There are also rides like paintball and flying fox, but there's also a greenhouse, a bird sanctuary, a rabbit enclosure, etc. Worth it!

text: Pemandangan menakjubkan di setiap urutan saat Anda berjalan menuruni tangga dan semakin dekat ke air terjun. Angin menyegarkan meniupkan air dan sinar matahari yang indah berkilauan sekitar pukul 9 hingga 10 pagi. Meskipun melelahkan saat berjalan ke atas 😅 pergi ke sana pada Mei 2021.
english_translation: Amazing views at every turn as you walk down the stairs and get closer to the waterfall. The refreshing breeze blows mist and beautiful sunlight sparkles around 9 to 10 am. Although it was tiring walking back up 😅 went there in May 2021.

text: Tempat wisata yang pas banget buat nenangin diri, suasananya adem nyaman dan juga bersih. Bisa sewa sepeda juga disini , fasilitas juga oke, ada toilet, kantin dan kafe. Biasanya dipake buat prewed dan jogging, ada bebek-bebekan juga. Cocok banget buat keluarga yang mau piknik sama anak.
english_translation: A perfect tourist spot for calming yourself, the atmosphere is cool, comfortable, and also clean. You can also rent bicycles here, the facilities are also okay, there are toilets, a canteen, and a cafe. It's usually used for pre-weddings and jogging, there are also pedal boats. Very suitable for families who want to picnic with children.

text: Beautiful sunrise here! Jadi ada 2 tempat, Stone Garden sama satunya apa gitu lupa masuknya bayar lagi. Tapi kalo stone garden engga, cuma bayar perbaikan jalan pas pertama masuk gang kecil (pake mobil), sama parkir. Must visit banget, pagi-pagi kesini biar sepi dan adeeem banget. Sejuk.
english_translation: Beautiful sunrise here! So there are 2 places, Stone Garden and another one, I forgot, you have to pay to enter that one. But Stone Garden doesn't require an entrance fee, you just pay for road maintenance when you first enter the small alley (by car), and parking. It's a must-visit, come here early in the morning so it's quiet and very cool. Refreshing.

text: memang objek wisata yg mengajak kita utk bèrolah raga karena akan naik tangga dan terlihat masih adanya penghuni asli  yaitu para monyet yg memang liar tp tidak terlalu menggangu pengunjung , untuk spot2 foto nya sgt instagramable deh tp menurut sy tiket nya agak sedikit diatas rata2 yah
english_translation: Indeed, it's a tourist attraction that encourages us to exercise because we'll have to climb stairs, and you can still see the native inhabitants, namely the monkeys, who are indeed wild but don't disturb visitors too much. The photo spots are very Instagrammable, but in my opinion, the ticket price is a bit above average.

text: Banyak pilihan wahana2 bermain yg tentu saja tambah bayar lagi utk tiap wahananya. Bagi yg mau santai2 cari udara segar disini cocok krn hutan pinusnya bikin kualitas udara disini jadi bagus. Lumayan naik-turun treknya jadi gak disarankan pake sandal2 cantik macam high heels atau wedges.
english_translation: There are many amusement rides, but of course, you have to pay extra for each ride. For those who want to relax and get some fresh air, this is a good place because the pine forest makes the air quality here good. The trails are moderately hilly, so it's not recommended to wear pretty sandals like high heels or wedges.

text:
Akses ke curug jauh, jarak dari curug ke curug jauh banget tapi cocok bagi yang suka tracking...masih ada pungli bayar tiket parkir pas balik katanya tiketnya cuma setiker aja harus bayar 5k lagi....
Kelebihannya enak ada ojeg 20k/orng buat dari pos 1 sampe ke jalan sebelum nurunin curug
english_translation:
Access to the waterfall is far, the distance between waterfalls is very far, but it's suitable for those who like tracking... there's still illegal extortion, paying for parking tickets on the way back, they said the ticket was just a sticker, so we had to pay another 5k...
The advantage is that there are motorcycle taxis for 20k/person from post 1 to the road before descending to the waterfall.

text: Tempat alternatif buat ngecamp yg gamau jauh" naik gunung,tempatnya bagus lumayanlah cuma banyak sampah yg pada abis ngecamp pada gak dibawain jadi kotor.untuk biaya ngecamp 17,5rb beda lagi kalo hiking 10rb,parkir motor 10rb.lumayan murah kalo weekend selalu rame apalagi yg paling atas.
english_translation: An alternative place for camping if you don't want to go far up the mountain. The place is nice, decent enough, but there's a lot of trash because people who finished camping didn't bring it back, making it dirty. The camping fee is 17.5 thousand, and it's different for hiking which is 10 thousand, and motorcycle parking is 10 thousand. It's quite cheap. On weekends, it's always crowded, especially the highest spot.

text: Must visited place kalo ke Lembang! HTM 35k dapet one stop entertainment semua ada, banyak spot selfie, mainan anak lengkap, makanan lengkap dan harga terjangkau rata2 20-25ribu aja. Banyak wahana main anak tp berbayar lagi, ada kota Mini juga tp bayar lg htm. Overall puas sih kesini 🥰 …
english_translation: Must-visit place when going to Lembang! Entrance fee 35k gets you one-stop entertainment, everything is there, lots of selfie spots, complete kids' toys, complete food and affordable prices, averaging only 20-25 thousand. Lots of kids' rides but they're additional costs, there's also Mini Town but that's an additional entrance fee. Overall, satisfied coming here 🥰 ...

text: Pertama kali ke sini kesan nya luaar biasa keren, tiket masuk yang terjangkau, spot selfie yang lumayan banyak, cuma beberapa spot selfie justru harus datang saat malaam hari, terdapat kumpulan bunga anggrek dari berbagai dunia, lokasi di daerah lembang lokasi strategis di pinggir jalan,
english_translation: First time here, the impression was incredibly cool. Affordable entrance ticket, quite a few selfie spots. However, some selfie spots are better visited at night. There's a collection of orchids from all over the world. The location is in Lembang, strategically situated by the roadside.

text:
Tempat yg nyaman sejuk untuk liburan bersama anak anak dan keluarga
Makanan enak enak harga juga masih terjangkau
Semoga kedepan nya ada akses untuk yg bawa stoler / kursi roda , soalnya banyak tangga yg tidak bisa di lalui stoler harus diangkat
Toilet bersih nyaman
Mushola juga tersedia
english_translation:
A comfortable, cool place for a holiday with children and family.
The food is delicious and the prices are still affordable.
Hopefully in the future there will be access for those who bring strollers/wheelchairs, as there are many stairs that cannot be passed with strollers and have to be lifted.
The toilets are clean and comfortable.
A prayer room is also available.

text:
Sebenarnya tempat nya asik,  sejuk & luas
Tp klo bisa fasilitas nya ditambah
Dan spot photo nya hrs diperbanyak biar tambah rame
Klo utk skr sih kata saya masih kurang spot photo nya
Dan agak kaget jg sih pas disini beli kopi hitam biasa sj yg biasa di warung dijual 3 rb,  disini 8 rb 😁😁
english_translation:
Actually, the place is nice, cool & spacious
But if possible, add more facilities
And the photo spots must be increased to make it livelier
For now, in my opinion, there are still not enough photo spots
And I was a bit surprised when I bought a regular black coffee here, which is usually sold for 3 thousand at a stall, here it's 8 thousand 😁😁

text: Tempat wisata alam yang keren, hijau dan ada danaunya. Cocok untuk semua usia tapi harus memperhatikan anak2 untuk sekitar danau. Ada banyak permainan air, sepeda air, kano dll. Banyak juga pilihan makanan untuk jajanan ataupun makan. Salah satu tempat favorit untuk wisata daerah Bandung
english_translation: Cool natural tourist spot, green and has a lake. Suitable for all ages but need to supervise children around the lake. There are many water games, pedal boats, canoes, etc. Lots of food options for snacks or meals. One of the favorite places for touring the Bandung area.

text:
Curugnya ini dari aliran sungai yang mengalir kebawah, namun sayangnya banyak sampah berserakan di bawah sungai. Mungkin dari hulu ada warga buang sampah, karena selama dijalan saya hampir tidak menemukan sampah, bersih cuy..

Tiket 12rb saja dari thr juanda. Kalo dari maribaya blm tau..
english_translation:
This waterfall comes from a river flowing downwards, but unfortunately, there's a lot of trash scattered below the river. Perhaps residents upstream are throwing their trash, because along the way, I almost didn't find any trash, it was clean, man.

The ticket is only 12 thousand from THR Juanda. I don't know about from Maribaya yet.

text: yups... tiketnya lumayan murah lah 25k.. pemandunya ramah... ngasih masukan take poto yg bagus... bkan cman bunga bunga, tp ada rumah rumahan jga.. dan d bagian belakang ada kebun sayur yg bsa d petik dan ditimbang untuk d beli.. taman ini juga dilengkapi dengan restoran dan toko sofenir
english_translation: Yup, the ticket was quite cheap, 25k. The guide was friendly, giving tips on taking good photos, not just of the flowers, but also of the little houses. In the back, there's a vegetable garden where you can pick and weigh produce to buy. The garden also has a restaurant and a souvenir shop.

text: Tempat yang SANGAT SANGAT SANGAT TIDAK RECOMMEND 👎, sebagian besar tenant resto jika ingin masuk harus bayar per orang, belum biaya makan, parkir per jam 5ribu... Ngerampok lu? Tempat tujuan sempit or lwt tempat lain TERJAL dan CURAM.... Bagi yang tidak percaya,silahkan datang sendiri. …
english_translation: A place that is HIGHLY HIGHLY HIGHLY NOT RECOMMENDED 👎. Most restaurant tenants, if you want to enter, you have to pay per person, not including the cost of food. Parking is 5 thousand per hour... Are you robbing us? The destination is cramped or the path to other places is ROUGH and STEEP.... For those who don't believe me, please come and see for yourself. ...

text: Pemandangannya seperti danau biasa tetapi bagian terbaiknya adalah ketika Anda bisa melakukan lompat tebing, harganya terlalu mahal terutama ketika Anda pertama kali pergi ke sini. Saya sarankan Anda membawa teman yang tahu tempat danau suci sehingga Anda tidak perlu menggunakan pemandu
english_translation: The scenery is like a regular lake, but the best part is when you can cliff dive. It's too expensive, especially when you go here for the first time. I suggest you bring a friend who knows the sacred lake spot so you don't have to use a guide.

text: Pemandangan indah, terletak tidak begitu jauh dari Alun-Alun Lembang, jalur yang terang, layanan yang cukup bagus dari penjaga setempat. Biaya masuk Rp 52k untuk dua orang & dua sepeda motor. Tapi tidak ada air yang mengalir meskipun ada beberapa toilet umum, tetapi tangki airnya kosong
english_translation: Beautiful view, located not too far from Lembang Square, the path is clear, pretty good service from the local guards. Entrance fee Rp 52k for two people & two motorcycles. But there is no running water even though there are some public toilets, but the water tanks are empty

text:
Tempat yg asik buat refreshing. Tapi trekking nya lumayan jauh. Sekitar 1 jam dari tempat loket sampe lokasi.
Tapi tenang aja...
Di lokasi ada warung nya kok.
Dijamin gak kelaperan dan harga cukup terjangkau.
Buat goweser, ada juga loh yg sampai bawa sepeda ke lokasi.
Mantap deh pokoknya
english_translation:
A great place for refreshing. But the trekking is quite far. About 1 hour from the ticket counter to the location.
But don't worry...
There's a small shop at the location.
Guaranteed you won't go hungry and the prices are quite affordable.
For cyclists, there are even those who bring their bikes to the location.
Definitely awesome.

text: Objek wisata baru dengan pemandangan indah dan replika ikon dunia, seperti menara Eiffel, santorini, patung liberty dll. Tempatnya tidak terlalu besar, jadi masih wajar untuk berjalan dan selesai dalam 2-3 jam. Mereka juga menyediakan mobil kecil untuk membawa Anda berkeliling menanjak.
english_translation: A new tourist attraction with beautiful views and replicas of world icons, such as the Eiffel Tower, Santorini, the Statue of Liberty, etc. The place is not too large, so it's still reasonable to walk around and finish within 2-3 hours. They also provide small cars to take you around uphill.

text: Tiket masuk 50k/orang yg nanti dapat ditukar dengan minuman jus orange atau thai tea , untuk masuk jembatan gantung merah dikenakan biaya lagi sebesar 15k/orang , tetapi bila hujan maka jembatan di tutup , untuk foto di tempat lain tidak dikenakan biaya lagi , cukup banyak spot untuk foto
english_translation: Entrance fee is 50k/person, which can be exchanged for orange juice or Thai tea. To enter the red suspension bridge, there is an additional fee of 15k/person. However, if it rains, the bridge will be closed. There is no additional charge for photos at other locations; there are quite a few photo spots.

text:
Akses jalan kesini udha bagus.
Tempatnya di lembang, cuma belokan ke arah gunung nya dari jalan gede ga keliatan, jadi jangan ngebut pas di lembang nya, suka kelewat.
Tempatnya asri, enaknbuat camping ceria, parkir motor ama mobil ada, terus tempat camp paling 5 menit jalan dari parkiran.
english_translation:
The road access here is already good.
The place is in Lembang, but the turn towards the mountain from the main road is not visible, so don't speed when you're in Lembang, you might miss it.
The place is beautiful and pleasant for happy camping. There is parking for motorcycles and cars, and the campsite is only a 5-minute walk from the parking lot.

text:
Bersih, terawat, tiket masuk bisa ditukarkan minuman diarea floating market. main slides 30rb. Ada 2 tipe yg untuk anak kecil dan dewasa (atau anak yg sudah lebih berani), ada petting animal sheep, owl and dove (ada jual pakannya),
Tempat makannya masih sama seperti sebelum2nya. Variatif.
english_translation: Clean, well-maintained, entrance tickets can be exchanged for drinks at the floating market area. Main slides are 30,000 IDR. There are 2 types, one for small children and one for adults (or braver children). There are petting animals: sheep, owls, and doves (food is sold). The food court is still the same as before, with variety.

text: Tempatnya sejuk karena byk pohon2 pinus cocok utk refreshing, fasilitasnya juga lumayan, cuma jalan akses khusus masuk ke lokasi belum mulus, masih berbatu dan licin kalau hujan.. Semoga ke depannya bisa dikelola lebih baik lagi supaya bisa menjadi salah satu obyek wisata yang diminati...
english_translation: The place is cool because there are many pine trees, suitable for refreshing. The facilities are also decent, only the access road to the location is not yet smooth, still rocky and slippery when it rains. Hopefully in the future it can be managed better to become one of the popular tourist attractions.

text: Jalanan menanjak dan agak licin. Hati hati saat musim hujan. Gunakan sepatu dan usahakan bukan sandal (kecuali sandal gunung). Perjalanan sekitar satu setengah jam dari.pintu masuk tahura... apabila lelah dan kehausan ada warung sepanjang jalan dan setibanya.di curug juga ada tempat makan
english_translation: The road is uphill and a bit slippery. Be careful during the rainy season. Wear shoes and try not to wear sandals (except hiking sandals). The journey is about one and a half hours from the Tahura entrance. If you are tired and thirsty, there are stalls along the way and upon arrival at the waterfall, there are also places to eat.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk melakukan aktivitas luar ruangan seperti hiking, trekking. Baik untuk pertemuan perusahaan atau outbond. Hanya untuk perbaikan, beberapa fasilitas pendakian perlu diperbaiki (exp: jembatan bukit). Toh tempat ini masih alami dan tidak terlalu terekspos oleh media
english_translation: A great place for outdoor activities like hiking, trekking. Good for company gatherings or outbound. Just for improvement, some hiking facilities need to be repaired (e.g., hill bridges). However, this place is still natural and not too exposed by the media.

text:
Ulala dong ya setelah dipermak jadi cantik. Harganya juga selangit. Ah males deh kalau cuma berburu spot selfie bayar mahal-mahal. Masih banyak lokasi lain yang lebih ciamik buat diburu.
Mungkin suatu saat nanti datang ke lokasi ini buat nambah koleksi foto di curug tapi gak janji deh 😂✌.
english_translation:
It looks so great after being spruced up and made beautiful. The price is also sky-high. Ah, I don't feel like it if I just hunt for selfie spots and pay so much. There are still many other more stunning locations to hunt for.
Maybe someday I'll come to this location to add to my waterfall photo collection, but no promises 😂✌.

text: Tempat makan sekaligus rekreasi yang menyenangkan, semua berada dalam satu komplek. Utk anak-anak sangat cocok ada unsur edukasi yang menarik, untuk orang dewasa dengan pemandangan dan alam Lembang yang sejuk cukup bagus untuk di nikmati. Makanan yang di jual pun cukup variatif dan enak..
english_translation: A fun place to eat and recreate, all within one complex. Very suitable for children with interesting educational elements, and for adults, the cool Lembang scenery and nature are quite enjoyable. The food sold is also quite varied and delicious.

text: Htm 3 kls;  50, 70 & 90K, ada kupon tukar minuman di pintu keluar. Begitu anda masuk, Awali wisata anda dgn menyebrangi jembatan gantung merah lwt jalur kanan. Parkir dlm gedung diatas, turun lewat tangga, menuju gerbang msk. Oh iya disini ada mbl/ bus transit turun/naik, gratis 1401'2023
english_translation: Htm 3 kls; 50, 70 & 90K, there's a drink voucher at the exit. Once you enter, start your tour by crossing the red suspension bridge via the right path. Park in the building above, descend via the stairs, and head towards the entrance gate. Oh yes, there's a free shuttle car/bus for drop-off/pick-up. 1401'2023

text:
Tempat yg nyaman, cocok sekali untuk bersantai dengan keluarga. Banyak fasilitas & wahana yg bisa di dapat .
Dengan harga tiket yg murah, hanya 10ribu bisa ditukar dengan minuman teh pucuk atau le mineral .
Tempatnya masih sepi, apalagi jika datang saat weekday. Berasa milik sendiri hehehe
english_translation:
A comfortable place, very suitable for relaxing with family. Lots of facilities and attractions to enjoy.
With a cheap ticket price, only 10 thousand can be exchanged for a bottle of Teh Pucuk or Le Mineral.
The place is still quiet, especially if you come on a weekday. It feels like your own, hehehe.

text: Tempatnya bagus, pemandangannya juga indah dan nyegerin. Tempat ini cocok utk orang-orang yg suka hunting foto, selfie bareng si doi apalagi buat foto pre-wedding. Pokoknya rekomended bgt dah. Klo liburan jangan lupa ajak kawan, saudara, kerabat, keluarga atau pacar kesini aja gaes 👍👍👍😆😎 …
english_translation: The place is nice, the view is beautiful and refreshing. This place is suitable for people who like to hunt for photos, take selfies with their loved ones, especially for pre-wedding photos. Definitely highly recommended. If you're on vacation, don't forget to bring your friends, siblings, relatives, family, or girlfriend here, guys 👍👍👍😆😎 …

text: Terdapat situ atau danau yang di sekeliling nya terdapat pedagang yang berjualan di atas perahu, pembeli/pengunjung bisa berjalan di tepi danau, di atas jembatan kayu, menaiki perahu, terdapat wahana nuansa Jepang, bisa sewa kimono atau busana Jepang bisa foto bareng cosplay samurai Jepang
english_translation: There is a lake or pond surrounded by vendors selling from their boats. Buyers/visitors can walk along the lake's edge, on wooden bridges, or take a boat ride. There are Japanese-themed attractions, and one can rent kimonos or Japanese attire, and take photos with Japanese samurai cosplayers.

text: wisata disini udah pasti jadi pilihan terbaik, bisa makan disini, bisa rekreasi disini, plus ada juga wahana rainbow slide buat anak-anak dengan harga sekali naik 30K tapi harga kalo sepuasnya/all-day 80K, ya saran saya beli tiket sekali naik aja. Harga masuk per-orang nya relatif mahal😪 …
english_translation: The tour here is definitely the best choice. You can eat here, recreate here, plus there's also a rainbow slide ride for the kids at a price of 30K for one ride, but for unlimited/all-day it's 80K. My advice is to just buy the single ride ticket. The entrance fee per person is relatively expensive 😪...

text: Kebun bunga yg asri banget. Warna-warni bunganya bikin seger apalagi lokasinya di sekitaran Lembang, dingin-dingin tapi mata anget alias cerah ceria. Ada juga kebun sayur dg beragam jenisnya. Bisa dibeli lohbuat oleh-oleh. Yg jelas ke sini sama keluarga sekadar mengisi liburan, oke juga...
english_translation: A really beautiful flower garden. The colorful flowers are refreshing, especially since the location is around Lembang, it's cool but the eyes feel warm, meaning bright and cheerful. There's also a vegetable garden with various types. You can buy them as souvenirs. Definitely, coming here with family just to fill a holiday is also great...

text: Tempat yang recommended untuk Family Trip. Ada area bermain anak, menghirup udara segara, fasilitas kamar mandinya banyak, dan ada tempat break untuk makan & minum. So pasti ada fasilitas musholla juga guys. Harga ticket masuk murah / standard cuma 50rb perorang (diluar kendaraan ya guys).
english_translation: A recommended place for a Family Trip. There's a children's play area, you can breathe in fresh air, there are many bathroom facilities, and there's a break area for eating and drinking. Of course, there's also a prayer room, guys. The entrance ticket price is cheap/standard at only 50,000 per person (excluding vehicle, guys).

text:
Mampir disini kalau ke Lembang. Tidak jauh dari floating market.
Kebun bunga Begonia benar-benar memanjakan mata. Bunga dimana-mana.
Parkir gampang, fasilitas juga cukup baik. Toilet bersih dan mushola ada disini. Tempat ngemil juga ada.
Yang jelas sih untuk selfie-selfie disini tempatnya.
english_translation:
Stop by here if you're going to Lembang. Not far from the Floating Market.
The Begonia flower garden is truly a feast for the eyes. Flowers everywhere.
Parking is easy, and the facilities are quite good. The toilets are clean and there's a prayer room here. There are also places to snack.
The main thing is, this is a great place for selfies.

text: Lokasi sesuai titik di maps, harga tiket masuk terjangkau, pemandangan cukup bagus, banyak warung dan ada penjual kayu bakar untuk yg ngecamp, toilet dan mushola tersedia di area parkir dan di area camp. Tracking tidak sulit dan tidak terlalu jauh. Cocok untuk melepas penat dari rutinitas.
english_translation: Location matches the point on the map, entrance ticket price is affordable, the view is quite good, many stalls and there are firewood sellers for those who camp, toilets and prayer rooms are available in the parking area and camping area. Tracking is not difficult and not too far. Suitable for relieving fatigue from routine.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang terkenal di Jawa Barat. Suasana meski ramai tapi tetap nyaman. Pemandangannya sangat indah. Udaranya sejuk dan asri, banyak tanaman. Toiletnya bersih. Tidak perlu khawatir untuk mencari makanan di sini. Cocok untuk berekreasi bersama keluarga maupun solo backpacker.
english_translation: A famous natural tourist spot in West Java. The atmosphere, though crowded, is still comfortable. The scenery is very beautiful. The air is cool and natural, with many plants. The toilets are clean. No need to worry about finding food here. Suitable for recreation with family or for solo backpackers.

text:
Lokasi masuk arah dusun bambu
Kondisi jalan setelah dusun bambu jelek.
Biaya parkir 5000 per motor, tiket masuk 10000 perorang, di dalam ada spot fotobayar 5000 perorang.
Kondisi trek jalan sejuk indah kalau tidak hujan. Wisata air terjun ini banyak dikunjungi wisata keluarga airnya dingin
english_translation:
Entrance location towards Dusun Bambu.
Road condition after Dusun Bambu is bad.
Parking fee is 5000 per motorcycle, entrance ticket is 10000 per person, inside there's a photo spot for 5000 per person.
The trekking path is cool and beautiful when it's not raining. This waterfall attraction is often visited by families, the water is cold.

text: Tempatnya asyik buat keluarga, pondokan ditujukan untuk keluarga dengan kapasitas 2 s.d 6 orang, area cukup luas, ada fasilitas outbound, jogging track, restorant, perkemahan dan banyak spot foto. Harga menginap untuk pondokan kapasitas 6 orang Rp 1 JT blm termasuk pajak dan service charge.
english_translation: The place is great for families, the accommodations are intended for families with a capacity of 2 to 6 people, the area is quite spacious, there are outbound facilities, a jogging track, a restaurant, camping grounds, and many photo spots. The overnight price for a 6-person accommodation is Rp 1 million, excluding tax and service charge.

text: Tempatnya enak banget, sejuk banget, bersih banget juga, tersedia musholla dan toilet dimana-mana, ada banyak tempat sampah juga, didalamnya lumayan banyak cafe, sayangnya akses jalan dari pintu masuk loket ke pintu masuk orchid forestnya rada lumayan jauh dan jalannannya lumayan rada rusak
english_translation: The place is really nice, very cool, very clean too. There are prayer rooms and toilets everywhere, and plenty of trash cans. Inside there are quite a few cafes. Unfortunately, the access road from the ticket entrance to the Orchid Forest entrance is quite far, and the road is a bit damaged.

text:
Untuk tukar minumannya, lebih baik disediakan juga di dekat lokasi, bukan hanya di pintu masuk saja. Menurut saya untuk 50K harusnya sudah termasuk untuk jembatannya agar lebih worth it.
Untuk saran masukan, agar disediakan permainan untuk anak sesuai jenis permainan yang ada di objek foto.
english_translation:
To exchange drinks, it would be better to also provide them near the location, not just at the entrance. In my opinion, for 50K it should already include the bridge to be more worth it.
As a suggestion, games for children should be provided that are in line with the types of games found in the photo objects.

text: salah satu tempat wisata di bandung barat tepatnya di daerah lembang. merupakan wisata alam yang mana di dalamnya terdapat kuliner khasnya yang gunakan perahu untuk penjualnya dan transaksi jual beli gunakan koin khusus. namun semenjak pandemi kondisinya sepi tp masih layak untuk dikunjungi
english_translation: One of the tourist attractions in West Bandung, precisely in the Lembang area. It is a nature tourism spot which has its own culinary specialties where vendors use boats for selling and transactions are made using special coins. However, since the pandemic, the condition has been quiet, but it is still worth visiting.

text:
Pemandangan alam yang luar biasa dengan udara yang fresh menjadikan tempat ini ramai dikunjungi dan sangat cocok untuk wisata keluarga sambil camping mengajak anak2 berwisata alam menikmati panorama dan mengabadikannya lewat foto.
Benar2 wisata dengan budget terjangkau tapi sangat berkesan.
english_translation:
An extraordinary natural landscape with fresh air makes this place crowded and very suitable for family tourism while camping, taking children on nature tours to enjoy the panorama and capture it through photos.
Truly a memorable and affordable trip.

text: Salah satu destinasi wisata yg lagi ramai. Akhirnya nyempetin kesini waktu ke Bandung dan sengaja milih kesini hari Senin biar gak ramai. Suasananya enak, asri sejuk sendu. Ditambah ada irama aliran air yg dijamin bikin stress dan penat kamu hilang, tapi sayang ada beberapa spot yg ditutup.
english_translation: One of the tourist destinations that's currently popular. Finally made time to visit here when I went to Bandung, and intentionally chose to come on a Monday to avoid crowds. The atmosphere is nice, natural, cool, and serene. Coupled with the rhythm of flowing water that's guaranteed to make your stress and fatigue disappear, but unfortunately, some spots are closed.

text: Dateng pas hari jumat jadi enak ga terlalu ramai banget... pemandangannya MashaAllah keren, banyak tukang2 yang bantuin foto gtu jelasin juga tentang gunungnya, tapi pas kelar dia nawarin jualannya kaya gantungan kunci gelang kalung dll tawar aja itung2 dpt kang foto gratis lumayan... hehehe
english_translation: Friday was a good day, not too crowded... The view was Allah-ly amazing, lots of vendors helped take photos and explained about the mountain. But at the end, they offered their wares like keychains, bracelets, necklaces, etc. Haggling is good, you get a free photographer, which is quite nice... hehehe

text: Aksesnya udah enak cmn msh ada bbrp jalan berlubang sih tp dikit jd masih oke. Wktu itu beli strawberry disana enak manis, masjidnya gede tp sayang utk jatah akhwatnya sangat² sedikit pdhl bisa diperluas lg biar gak terlalu menumpuk & padat. Gak begitu bau belerang yg menyengat msh aman sih.
english_translation: The access is already good, though there are still a few potholes, but they are few so it's still okay. Last time I bought strawberries there, they were delicious and sweet. The mosque is big, but unfortunately, the section for women is very, very small. It could be expanded further so it wouldn't be too crowded and packed. It doesn't smell too strongly of sulfur; it's still bearable.

text:
Boleh lah buat camping santai, atau cuma buat foto2 doang, di lokasi juga ada warung toilet gak perlu ribet.
Tiket masuk juga cukup murah, bisa tukar susu kemasan.
Kurang direkomendasikan buat anak2 apalagi hujan atau sehabis hujan, jalan sedikit licin dan berlumpur.
Area parkir lumayan luas
english_translation:
It's okay for a relaxed camping trip, or just for taking photos. There's also a shop and toilets on site, so no need to worry.
The entrance ticket is also quite cheap, you can exchange it for packaged milk.
Not highly recommended for children, especially when it's raining or after rain, as the path can be a bit slippery and muddy.
The parking area is quite spacious.

text: Tempatnya oke pemandangan mantul lah pokoknya... minusnya pengelolaannya kurang baik... tiap ke toilet harus bayar.. dijagain... pas airnya abis ga boleh masuk toilet dan ga ada solusi gmn baiknya dr pihak pengelola.. jd klo kebelet pipis dan air habis bisa batu ginjal sepulang dari sana....
english_translation: The place is nice, the view is awesome, all in all... the downside is the management is not good... every time you go to the toilet, you have to pay... it's guarded... when the water runs out, you can't use the toilet and there's no solution from the management... so if you really need to pee and there's no water, you might get kidney stones after leaving there...

text: Tamannya bagus banget tertata rapi, tidak ada sampah di dalam lokasi, kamar mandi tidak bayar, kamar mandinya pun sangat bersih tidak bau, pengurus kebun nya ramah, ada tempat untuk membeli hasil dari kebun disana, hanya saja jajanan nya memang cukup mahal. Wajar sih kareena di tempat wisata
english_translation: The garden is very nice and well-organized, there is no trash on the premises, the restrooms are free to use, and the restrooms are very clean and odorless. The gardener is friendly. There is a place to buy produce from the garden there, but the snacks are indeed quite expensive. It's understandable though, because it's a tourist spot.

text: Wana wisata dikaki Gn Tangkuban Perahu  dgn suasana alam yg indah dan sejuk.  Cocok utk penyuka Hiking, Motocros dan Sepeda Gunung.  Jalan menuju lokasi mulus tapi sempit dan penuh tanjakan .  Kondisi lingkungan sekitar cukup kotor banayk sampah dari para pengunjung tanpa pernah dibersihkan.
english_translation: Tourism at the foot of Mount Tangkuban Perahu with a beautiful and cool natural atmosphere. Suitable for hiking, motocross, and mountain biking enthusiasts. The road to the location is smooth but narrow and full of inclines. The surrounding environment is quite dirty with a lot of trash from visitors, never cleaned up.

text: Taman bunga dan kebun buah yg cantik. Terdapat bermacam2 jenis bunga dan buah. Cocok untuk tempat hunting foto atau sekedar menikmati indahnya hamparan taman bunga. Tersedia beberapa spot foto yg memang sudah disiapkan oleh pihak pengelola. Disediakan topi anyaman jg yg bisa dipinjam gratis.
english_translation: Beautiful flower garden and fruit orchard. There are various types of flowers and fruits. Suitable for a photo hunting spot or simply to enjoy the beauty of the flower garden. There are several photo spots that have been prepared by the management. Woven hats are also available for free loan.

text: Tempat wisata yg bagus , bersih , menyenangkan 🥰 ada banyak spot poto juga tempat2 yg unik 😘 puas lah main2 kesini cocok dengan segala umur dan acara 😎 jika mau makan kita bisa menyeberang naik perahu , pembayaran menggunakan koin khusus yg sudah kita tukar kan dng mata uang kita ☺️ seruuu …
english_translation: A great tourist spot, clean, and enjoyable 🥰. There are many photo spots and unique places too 😘. Satisfied with playing here, suitable for all ages and occasions 😎. If you want to eat, we can cross by boat. Payment uses special coins that we exchange with our currency ☺️. So much fun…

text:
Mata anda akan dimanjakan dengan warna - warni bunga nan elok. Ada kebun sayur juga...tempat ini bisa jadi sarana edukasi bagi anak² untuk mengenalkan jenis² bunga dan sayur mayur 🤗

Buat para selebgram...cucook abisss untuk selfie 📸 😉

Note : dilarang bawa kamera dslr or etc / bayar IDR 50k
english_translation:
Your eyes will be spoiled with the beautiful colors of the flowers. There's also a vegetable garden... this place can be an educational tool for children to introduce different types of flowers and vegetables 🤗

For the selebgrams... it's absolutely perfect for selfies 📸 😉

Note: DSLR cameras or etc. are not allowed / pay IDR 50k

text: Cocok untuk healing di tengah hutan pinus yg sejuk, area bersih dan terawat, toilet bnyk dan lumayan bersih (masuk tidak diperbolehkan membawa makan kecuali minuman). Bagusnya datang bukan hari libur biar tidak terlalu banyak pengunjung. Klo gak salah tiket masuknya 47rb/ org (Januari 2023).
english_translation: Suitable for healing amidst the cool pine forest, the area is clean and well-maintained, with plenty of relatively clean toilets (bringing food inside is not allowed except for drinks). It's better to come on a weekday to avoid too many visitors. If I'm not mistaken, the entrance ticket was 47,000 IDR per person (January 2023).

text: 582 anak tangga, tetapi Anda juga memiliki air terjun yang besar! Bawalah sesuatu untuk diminum dan dimakan, karena cukup mendaki! Anda bisa memasukkan kaki Anda ke dalam air untuk memulihkan diri. Sangat sepi, sedikit turis, dan beberapa monyet sebagai pelengkap. Banyak bersenang-senang!
english_translation: 582 steps, but you also have a huge waterfall! Bring something to drink and eat, as it's quite a climb! You can put your feet in the water to recover. Very quiet, few tourists, and some monkeys to complete the scene. Have lots of fun!

text:
Serunya klo ke stone garden itu back packer aja...klo saya karna dari Cibaduyut pergi k stasiun Bandung naik angkot,d sambung naik kereta sampai stasiun Padalarang dan naik angkot lagi k stone garden sekitar 20menit....
Daannn nikmatin dech hiking si stone garden.....selamat mencobaaa...🤗💪💪 …
english_translation:
It's exciting to go to Stone Garden as a backpacker... As for me, since I'm from Cibaduyut, I take an angkot to Bandung station, then take a train to Padalarang station, and then take another angkot to Stone Garden, which takes about 20 minutes....
And then, enjoy hiking at Stone Garden..... Happy trying...🤗💪💪 …

text: Tempatnya sepi sekali mungkin krn pandemi. Nyaris tdk ada pengunjung. Konsep nya danau dengan perahu perahu dan taman. Jd jika hujan ya tdk bs pakai perahu. Ada resto tapi pelayanan nya lama sekali. Tiket masuk per orang 20rb klo tdk salah. Dan bs ditukar 1 btl air minum kemasan per tiketnya.
english_translation: The place was very quiet, perhaps due to the pandemic. There were almost no visitors. The concept is a lake with boats and a garden. So if it rains, you can't use the boats. There is a restaurant but the service was very slow. The entrance ticket per person was 20,000 Rupiah, if I'm not mistaken. And it can be exchanged for 1 bottle of bottled drinking water per ticket.

text: Orchid forests cikole : luas, bersih, bagus, rapih, parkirannya luas , toilet dan mushola nya bersih, wisata nya lengkap, harga tiket terjangkau dan cuacanya dingin dan sejuk, tempat wisata ini cocok banget untuk healing dan jalan jalan bareng keluarga dan teman teman, wajib untuk dikunjungi.
english_translation: Orchid Forests Cikole: spacious, clean, beautiful, tidy, spacious parking, clean toilets and prayer rooms, complete attractions, affordable ticket prices, and the weather is cool and refreshing. This tourist spot is very suitable for healing and outings with family and friends, it's a must-visit.

text:
Tempatnya oke.. Seneng liat yg berwarna warni (bunga-bunganya)..

Selain bunga, juga ada beragam tanaman hias dan buah.

Bibit tanaman hias, sayuran, dan buah-buahan pun bisa dibeli lho..

Cuma yang perlu menjadi perhatian adalah Lahan Parkirnya...

Lahan parkir yang disediakan kurang luas...
english_translation:
The place is nice.. Happy to see the colorful things (the flowers)..

Besides flowers, there are also various ornamental and fruit plants.

Seedlings of ornamental plants, vegetables, and fruits can also be bought..

The only thing that needs attention is the parking lot...

The provided parking lot is not spacious enough...

text: Setelah sekian lama ga kesini, terakhir kesini pas masih jaman sekolah study trip mungkin sekitar tahun 2010an, jujur perubahannya banyakkkk bangetttt, sekarang jauh lebih cantik & bagus. Untuk alurnya tetep sama setiap kali masuk kesini dapet minuman gratisssss😋 wahananya juga lebih banyak …
english_translation: After not coming here for so long, the last time I was here was during a school study trip, probably around the 2010s. Honestly, the changes are massive, it's much more beautiful and better now. The flow remains the same, every time you enter here, you get a free drink 😋, and there are more rides too...

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk keluarga dan membawa anak-anak Anda😻 Rasanya seperti melakukan perjalanan ke sisi Barat dunia, Eropa, Amerika dan Mesir. Jembatan itu ditempati untuk syuting sehingga kami tidak bisa mendapatkan paspor dan stempel dari awal. Either way, itu super ramai di akhir pekan.
english_translation: A great place for families and bringing your children😻 It feels like a trip to the West, Europe, America, and Egypt. The bridge was occupied for filming so we couldn't get our passports and stamps from the start. Either way, it's super crowded on weekends.

text: Tempat ini sebenarnya sangat indah dan alami. Tapi infrastrukturnya perlu diperbaiki. Jalan menuju ke sini cukup buruk, terutama jika Anda mengendarai sepeda motor. Juga, ada monyet di dalam tempat ini dan mereka cukup agresif, jadi berhati-hatilah dan jaga anak Anda jika Anda memilikinya.
english_translation: This place is actually very beautiful and natural. But the infrastructure needs to be improved. The road to get here is quite bad, especially if you are riding a motorcycle. Also, there are monkeys in this place and they are quite aggressive, so be careful and watch your children if you have them.

text:
Tempatnya keren guys... penuh bunga, terawat...
Jenis bunganya juga beragam, cocok bget juga untuk edukasi...
Ad bberap bunga juga dijual, cntik2dan hrga terjangkau...
Ad mushalla nya juga gan, restonya juga...
Dijamin puas, gk kecewain...
Bawa satu keluarga masih aman,spot fotonya buanyak...
english_translation:
The place is cool, guys... full of flowers, well-maintained...
The types of flowers are also diverse, very suitable for education too...
Some flowers are also sold, they are pretty and affordable...
There's also a prayer room, and a restaurant too...
Guaranteed satisfaction, won't disappoint...
Bringing the whole family is still fine, lots of photo spots...

text: Tempat Wisata baru di daerah punclut lembang bandung, tiket masuk Rp. 50.000 per orang sudah termasuk welcome drink, untuk naik dan berfoto di atas jembatan gantung perlu tambahan Rp. 15.000 lagi per orang. Ada menara eiffel, bangunan ala santorini, coloseum, patung liberty dan piramida mesir
english_translation: New tourist spot in the Punclut Lembang Bandung area, entrance ticket Rp. 50,000 per person includes a welcome drink, to go up and take photos on the suspension bridge requires an additional Rp. 15,000 per person. There is an Eiffel Tower, Santorini-style buildings, the Colosseum, the Statue of Liberty, and Egyptian pyramids.

text: hati-hati kalo mau ke sini, selain jalannya yang ekstrem, jalan menuju stone garden juga melewati padalarang yang di lewati truk dan bus yang besar, jangan memaksakan diri kalau sedang musim hujan. tapi kalau musim panas, pemandangannya bagus cuk kalo dari atas. haha. selamat menikmati gess..
english_translation: Be careful if you want to come here, besides the extreme road, the road to Stone Garden also passes through Padalarang which is traversed by large trucks and buses, don't push yourself if it's the rainy season. But if it's summer, the view is good, man, if you're from above. haha. Enjoy, guys..

text: Puass, banyak spot photo dan permainan. Kamar luas, malam ada api unggun yg dapat dinikmati sambil makan jagung bakar, rebus atau jasuke. Sarapan bervariasi menunya dan rasanya enak. Udaranya dingin dan semakin malam semakin dingin. Pastikan bawa jaket yg tebal. Jika hujan hati2 jalanan licin
english_translation: Satisfied, many photo spots and games. The room is spacious, at night there's a bonfire that can be enjoyed while eating grilled, boiled, or cheese corn. The breakfast menu is varied and tastes good. The air is cold and gets colder as the night progresses. Make sure to bring a thick jacket. If it rains, be careful, the roads are slippery.

text: Perjalanan panjang dan akses terjal bebatuan yang rumit dilewati terbalaskan dengan pemandangan air terjun malela yang indah ini.. Dari trmpat parkir jaraknya jauh bnget, tapi menurun,  kalo pulangnya nanjak. Buat yg males jalan ada jasa antar ojek sampai parkiran, harganya 50rb an dulu mah..
english_translation: The long journey and the difficult rocky path were rewarded with this beautiful view of Malela waterfall. From the parking lot it's very far, but downhill, and uphill on the way back. For those who dislike walking, there's a motorcycle taxi service to the parking lot, it used to cost around 50,000 rupiah.

text: Lumayan liburan kesana menyenangkan ada outbound tali gantung, panjat tebing, dan playing fox,. Banyak spot buat bertoto juga,. Suasana sejuk dan seger, karna di kelilingi hutan pinus, banyak tempat penginapan dari tenda sampai kaya penginapan elit ada,, restorannya juga lumayan masakannya,..
english_translation: The vacation there was quite enjoyable, with activities like zip-lining, rock climbing, and a flying fox. There are many spots for photos too. The atmosphere is cool and refreshing, as it's surrounded by pine forests. There are many lodging options, from tents to quite luxurious accommodations. The restaurant's food is also decent.

text: Taman alam yang didominasi dengan batu tentunya yang berada di puncak dan pemandangannya mantep banget.. Memang untuk jalan masuknya rada susah karena masuk ketempat batu kapur dan tempat pembayarannya tidak begitu meyakinkan jadi waktu pertama kali kesana ragu" juga apa benar bayarnya disini
english_translation: A nature park dominated by rocks, certainly at the peak, and the view is really amazing. The entrance is a bit difficult because it's a limestone area and the payment place isn't very convincing, so the first time I went there, I was hesitant about whether this was the correct place to pay.

text: Nice place for camping and hiking. Jalannya agak rusak dan berbatu. Harus ekstra hati hati kalau naik kendaraan roda dua. Sedangkan untuk roda empat siap-siap pijet kaki-kaki mobil. Wide camping ground around pine forest. Biaya masuk 10k per orang. Parkir kendaraan 5k. Better views at sunrise.
english_translation: Nice place for camping and hiking. The road is a bit damaged and rocky. You have to be extra careful if you're riding a two-wheeled vehicle. For four-wheeled vehicles, be prepared for a car suspension massage. Wide camping ground around a pine forest. Entrance fee is 10k per person. Vehicle parking is 5k. Better views at sunrise.

text: Tempat wisata yg cukup terjangkau untuk tiket masuknya, meskipun ga terlalu luas, tapi cukup untuk mengurangi stres... Persis dipinggir jalan, 1 arah jika mau ke maribaya, pemandangan sekitar jg indah, disediakan topi tikar saat di dalam kebun, hanya saja bunganya masih belum terlalu banyak...
english_translation: A quite affordable tourist spot for the entrance ticket, although not too spacious, it's enough to relieve stress... Right on the roadside, one-way if you want to go to Maribaya, the surrounding scenery is also beautiful, straw hats are provided inside the garden, it's just that there aren't too many flowers yet...

text: Kebiasaan kesini tuh trail run lewat sukawana trs dah lama banget g jalur wisata.. Jadi kerasa mahalnya pas masuk.. Biasanya mah gratis.. Fasilitasnya lebih komplit but why ke kawah upas ditutup n harus pake guide yg seharga 100 ribu.. Yaaa aga sedih ajaa haha.. Banyak calo calo yang kaya gitu
english_translation: My habit of coming here is trail running through Sukawana, and it's been a long time since I've been on the tourist trail. So it feels expensive when you enter. It used to be free. The facilities are more complete, but why is Kawah Upas closed and requires a guide costing 100 thousand? Yeah, it's a bit sad, haha. Lots of touts like that.

text: Taman bunga nya tdk terlalu luas tp bnyk spot untk foto2, cocok buat pasangan yg ingin romantis2an, tiket masuk weekend 15rb/org,,parkir mobil 10rb, tmpat parkirnya sempit jd klo dtng agak siang kebagian parkir yg d seberang jln, klo bawa kamera selain kamera hp kena pajak 25rb - 50rb/ kamera.
english_translation: The flower garden isn't too big, but there are many photo spots. It's suitable for couples who want to be romantic. Weekend entrance ticket is 15,000 IDR per person, car parking is 10,000 IDR. The parking lot is narrow, so if you come a bit later, you'll get parking across the street. If you bring a camera other than a phone camera, there's a tax of 25,000 - 50,000 IDR per camera.

text: Pemandangan cukup bagus, Kesana sebelum lebaran idul fitri 2021 ternyata malah dibohongi, katanya buka tapi pas masuk kedalam ehh malah tutup dan saya sudah membayar tiket masuknya. dan apesnya pas balik lagi ke pos tempat bayat tiket udah gaada orangnya kabur. akses jalan bebatuan cukup buruk
english_translation: The view is quite nice. Went there before Eid al-Fitr 2021 and was actually lied to. They said it was open, but when I entered, it was closed. I had already paid the entrance ticket. Unfortunately, when I went back to the ticket booth, the person was gone, they ran away. The access road with stones is quite bad.

text:
Liburan suasana Alam terbuka utk penginapan di bagian Cemara sekitar 1.3jt dengan kapasitas 6 orang dan maks 8 org...

Makanannya juga standard kalau review saya.... tidak terlalu wah....

Permainan anak juga sangat banyak...

Sangat fun wisata di Taman wisata grafika cikole... family fun.....
english_translation:
Outdoor nature vacation accommodation in the Pine area for around 1.3 million, with a capacity of 6 people and a maximum of 8 people...

The food is also standard in my review... not too amazing...

There are also many children's games...

It's a very fun trip at Taman Wisata Grafika Cikole... family fun.....

text: Tempatnya luas banget.. ga cukup sehari buat eksplore semuanya.. sarana toilet di parkiran bersih, mesjid juga bersih, warung ada. Pas nyampe curug tilu opat ga ada warung, jembatan agak sudah koyak, harus hati2 sekali jalannya krn licin juga. Tapi ttp menyenangkan kok, semoga tambah rame ya..
english_translation: The place is really spacious.. not enough for a day to explore everything.. the toilet facilities at the parking lot are clean, the mosque is also clean, there are stalls. When we arrived at Curug Tilu Opat, there were no stalls, the bridge was a bit broken, you have to be very careful on the path because it's also slippery. But it was still fun, I hope it gets more crowded.

text:
Akses masuk ke sana untuk mobil bus cukup ekstrem (turunan/tanjakan tajam, jalan sempit untuk dua bus), tidak rekomen untuk backpaker, hampir semua berbayar. Untuk curugnya kurang terjaga kebersihannya.
Ada mobil anter jemput dari area pakir bus ke tempat wisata. Tempatnya bagus untuk berfoto.
english_translation:
Access there for cars and buses is quite extreme (steep downhill/uphill, narrow road for two buses), not recommended for backpackers, almost everything is paid. The cleanliness of the waterfall is not well maintained.
There is a shuttle car from the bus parking area to the tourist spot. The place is good for taking photos.

text: Cocok banget untuk tamasya bareng teman atau keluarga karna tempatnya luas, banyak free seating area, tiket masuk murah (Rp 35 ribu per orang) dan wahana permainannya juga bisa dinikmati bersama seperti boat rental dan rainbow slides.. ada mini zoo juga isi nya angsa, domba, ayam n burung hias
english_translation: Perfect for a picnic with friends or family because the place is spacious, has many free seating areas, cheap entrance tickets (Rp 35,000 per person), and the amusement rides can also be enjoyed together like boat rentals and rainbow slides. There's also a mini zoo with swans, sheep, chickens, and ornamental birds.

text: Tempat favorit untuk ngadem. Udah seringkali kesini. Mulai dari tugu polisi yang belum diganti, sampe sekarang telah direnovasi. Cocok untuk pemula yang ingin nanjak. View kota dan udara lembang ya adem. Buat kemping juga enak. Di atas sekali ada bangunan bersejarah bekas jaman penjajahan dulu
english_translation: Favorite place to cool off. I've been here many times. From the old police monument before it was replaced, to now that it's been renovated. Suitable for beginners who want to hike. The city view and the cool Lembang air are nice. It's also good for camping. At the very top, there's a historic building from the colonial era.

text: Beautiful 😍 Banyak booth yang mendukung buat foto-foto, ketika masuk disediakan topi anyaman gituu. Biaya masuknya 15.000, kebetulan saya dateng pas weekend. Di luarnya ada yang jualan strawberry, blackberry, dll dan diseberang jalan ada yang jual kaos khas bandung dengan harga yang murah 👌😊 …
english_translation: Beautiful 😍 Lots of booths that are good for taking pictures, when you enter, they provide woven hats. The entrance fee is 15,000, I happened to come on a weekend. Outside, there are people selling strawberries, blackberries, etc., and across the street, there are people selling typical Bandung t-shirts at a cheap price 👌😊 …

text: tempat yg menarik utk di kunjungi, bukan hanya utk wisata atauoun outbound tetapi juga bisa menginap. tim outbound nya juara utk family gathering, kompak dan bisa mencairkan suasana sehingga peserta menjadi semangat. flying fox nya panjang dan tinggi serta dapat di lalui pergi dan pulang balik.
english_translation: An interesting place to visit, not only for tourism or outbound activities but also for overnight stays. The outbound team is a champion for family gatherings, cohesive, and can break the ice, making participants enthusiastic. The flying fox is long and high, and can be traversed back and forth.

text:
Tiket masuk 20rb/org free kopi/milo hangat
Tempatnya bagus cocok untuk rekreasi bersama keluarga, banyak spot foto, bs mengedukasi anak2 tentang jual beli & memberi makan hewan ternak,juga budaya negara Jepang .. Konsepnya bagus, sayangnya waktu ksana hujan agak susah buat cari tempat berteduh.
english_translation:
Entrance fee 20,000 IDR/person, free warm coffee/milo
The place is nice, suitable for recreation with family, many photo spots, can educate children about buying and selling & feeding farm animals, as well as Japanese culture. The concept is good, unfortunately when I went it was raining and it was a bit difficult to find shelter.

text: Benar-benar masih asri, banyak pohon, jalan serapaknya juga sangat rapi menurut saya, banyak monyet dan juga suara serangga, sayang ya curug dan  sungainya penuh sampah dan air berwarna keruh kecoklatan, sangat disayangkan bisa rusak seperti itu.. ayo mulai jgn buang sampah ke sungai guys 🙏🙏🙏 …
english_translation: Truly still pristine, lots of trees, the walking paths are also very neat in my opinion, lots of monkeys and also insect sounds. It's a shame that the waterfall and the river are full of trash and the water is murky brownish, it's a great pity it could be damaged like that. Let's start, don't throw trash into the river guys 🙏🙏🙏...

text: Sarae Hills lokasinya berada di daerah punclut atas, sangat cocok untuk bermain bersama keluarga, di tempat banyak beragam kafe" menurut selera masing" menunya di sini, sarana bermain maupun tempat' berphoto sangat bagus di area sekitarnya, apa lagi di malam hari,.lampu" gemerlapan di sana sini
english_translation: Sarae Hills is located in the upper Punclut area, very suitable for playing with family. The place has a variety of cafes with menus to suit everyone's taste. The play facilities and photo spots are very good in the surrounding area, especially at night, with twinkling lights everywhere.

text:
Menikmati suasana sore hari di Gunung Tangkuban Parahu, hanya sebentar karena tutup jam 5 sore kurang bagi kami untuk menjelajah seluruh area wisata di Gunung Tangkuban Parahu.
Tidak ramai pengunjungnya mungkin karena mau tutup dan masih PPKM dengan protokol kesehatan yang ketat dari manajemen.
english_translation:
Enjoying the afternoon atmosphere at Mount Tangkuban Parahu, only for a short while because it closes at 5 PM, which was too short for us to explore the entire tourist area of Mount Tangkuban Parahu.
It wasn't crowded with visitors, perhaps because it was about to close and PPKM (Community Activity Restrictions) was still in effect with strict health protocols from management.

text:
Beli tiket terusan aja kalo ke sini 50rb udah cucok permainannya.. Tiket masuknya 15rb/orang. Cek foto ya macam permainan dan tarifnya.. Jus strawberrynya juga enak nih..

Hawanya sejuk, tp matahari bikin silau juga.. Tempat penginapan mulai 200rb per orang semalam.
Cocok buat family gathering.
english_translation:
Just buy the all-access pass if you come here, 50rb is more than enough for the games. The entrance fee is 15rb per person. Check the photos for the types of games and their prices. The strawberry juice is also good.

The air is cool, but the sun is also glaring. Accommodation starts at 200rb per person per night.
Suitable for a family gathering.

text:
Bunga2 nya banyak variasi dan terawat.. walaupun gak terlalu besar lokasinya tapi banyak spot foto yg bagus.. harga masuknya juga gak mahal..

Kalao lagi hujan bisa neduh sambil makan di restonya..

Yg agak kurang terawat dibagian kebun sayuran.. kalo mau petik2 sendiri tidak banyak variannya..
english_translation:
The flowers are varied and well-maintained. Although the location isn't very large, there are many good photo spots. The entrance fee is also not expensive.

If it's raining, you can take shelter and eat at the restaurant.

The vegetable garden area is a bit less maintained. If you want to pick things yourself, there aren't many varieties.

text:
Tempatnya nyaman, ramah buat anak dan ga pusing juga ama makanan karena restoranya juga OK.

Untuk stay sendiri, pilihannya banyak ... mulai dr tenda dome, ampe glamping yg eksekutif.

Kebetulan saya ambil yg tipe urban untuk 4 org.

outdoor activity nya juga banyak pilihan dan cukup terjangkau
english_translation:
The place is comfortable, kid-friendly, and not stressful about food because the restaurant is also OK.

For accommodation, there are many options... ranging from dome tents to executive glamping.

Coincidentally, I chose the urban type for 4 people.

There are also many outdoor activity options, and they are quite affordable.

text: Suka banget, bersih dan tertata dengan baik. Kayanya kalo ajak pacar kesini asik banget. Eh tapi sekeluarga ama anak istri asik juga. menikamati jembatan tali atau sekedar menikmati indahnya pohon anggrek  juga duduk duduk dibawah pohon pinus. Seru banget lah pokonya. Pengen lagi dateng kesini.
english_translation: Absolutely love it, clean and well-organized. Seems like it would be really fun to bring a girlfriend here. Oh but it would also be fun with the whole family, wife and kids. Enjoying the suspension bridge or just admiring the beautiful orchids, or sitting under the pine trees. It's just really exciting. I want to come back here again.

text:
Harga masuk Rp.25.000/ orang weekend
Rp.20.000/ orang hari biasa
Masuk RINABOW GARDEN  bayar lg Rp. 25.000/ orang
Masuk wahana bayar lg 5 wahana Rp.98.000/ orang
Naik beca mini Rp. 20.000
Naik kereta mini  Rp.20.000
Dll... banyar lg
Parkir mobil  Rp. 3000 jam pertama, Jam berikutnya Rp.  10.000
english_translation:
Entrance fee Rp. 25,000/person weekend
Rp. 20,000/person weekdays
Enter RINABOW GARDEN, pay another Rp. 25,000/person
Enter attractions, pay another Rp. 98,000 for 5 attractions/person
Mini bike ride Rp. 20,000
Mini train ride Rp. 20,000
Etc... pay more
Car parking Rp. 3,000 for the first hour, next hour Rp. 10,000

text:
Salah satu tempat wisata di daerah cikole lembang
Tiket masuk per orang 50k
Lebih baik menggunakan sepatu yang nyaman seperti flat shoes atau sneaker karena untuk menikmati area ini perlu jalan
Ada beberapa area yang bisa dinikmati secara free ada yang harus membayar lagi diluar dari tiket masuk
english_translation:
One of the tourist attractions in the Cikole Lembang area
Entrance ticket per person 50k
It is better to wear comfortable shoes like flat shoes or sneakers because to enjoy this area, walking is required
There are several areas that can be enjoyed for free, and some require an additional payment beyond the entrance ticket

text: Tempat wisata ini posisinya berada di tengah hutan, maka kondisi perjalanan menuju lokasinya pun cukup terjal dan menguras banyak tenaga. Selain karena jauh, lokasi wisata ini masih minim akses dan fasilitas penunjang. Maka ketika berwisata kesana anda perlu membawa perbekalan dahulu sebelumnya.
english_translation: This tourist spot is located in the middle of the forest, so the journey to its location is quite steep and exhausting. In addition to being far, this tourist location still has minimal access and supporting facilities. Therefore, when traveling there, you need to bring supplies beforehand.

text: Datang saat weekend, tidak begitu ramai. Musholla cowok cewek ada 1 shaf yang buat menunggu lama. Serta makanannya terlalu mencolok (sangat manis, sangat asin, sangat pedas). Food court yang pakai koin koin pun tidak banyak pilihan. Yang menyenangkannya adalah taman kelinci dan luncuran rainbow.
english_translation: Came on the weekend, not too crowded. The male and female prayer rooms have one row, which causes a long wait. Also, the food is too overpowering (very sweet, very salty, very spicy). The coin-operated food court doesn't have many choices either. What was enjoyable were the rabbit garden and the rainbow slide.

text: Curugnya bagus baget, walaupun airnya ga bersih tapi gaberbau dan viewnya oke banget, jalannanya masih cukup mainstream terjal dan menanjak apalagi kalau hujan karna jalannya masih tanah jadi sangat licin, fasilitas udah lengkap banget, bangunan bangunan sekitar pinggiran curugnya dirapihin lagi
english_translation: The waterfall is very good, even though the water isn't clean, it doesn't smell and the view is really okay. The path is still quite mainstream, steep and uphill, especially if it rains because the path is still dirt so it's very slippery. The facilities are very complete. The buildings around the edge of the waterfall have been tidied up.

text: Dari kota Bandung ke Taman Lembah Dewata Jaraknya 16 km, tidak terlalu jauh. Kalo menggunakan motor 40 menit, kalo pake mobil sekitar 1 jam. Masuk nya Rp 10.000, parkir Rp. 5.000. tempat parkirnya lumayan sangat luas, tempatnya nyaman & sejuk banyak spot buat foto, kafe nya di dalem juga banyak.
english_translation: From Bandung city to Taman Lembah Dewata is a distance of 16 km, not too far. If using a motorcycle, it takes 40 minutes; if using a car, it takes about 1 hour. Entrance fee is Rp 10,000, parking is Rp 5,000. The parking area is quite spacious, the place is comfortable & cool with many photo spots, and there are also many cafes inside.

text: Tempat wisata yang wajib di kunjungi ketika di lembang. Disana banyak penjual gelang dan aksesoris...,, sangat ramah,, menawarkan jadi fotografer dan bahkan tourguide.. Tetapi mereka tidak mau meminta bayaran....,, mereka mau repot2 tanpa dibayar. Untuk menghargai mereka..belilah dagangan mereka
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot when in Lembang. There are many vendors selling bracelets and accessories... they are very friendly, offering to be photographers and even tour guides. But they don't want to be paid... they go through the trouble without payment. To appreciate them, buy their merchandise.

text: Tiket masuk 50ribu per orang untuk wahana yang biasa. Harga tiket untuk masuk castle dan jembatan beda lagi. Sebenarnya area ini sebagian besar untuk yang suka sekali sama foto-foto. Pas siang hari matahari cukup menyengat disarankan bawa topi atau payung. Aku sih cukup sekali saja ke tempat ini
