english_translation: Entrance ticket is 50,000 per person for the regular rides. The ticket price to enter the castle and bridge is different. Actually, this area is mostly for those who really like taking photos. During the day, the sun is quite strong, so it's recommended to bring a hat or umbrella. I personally think once is enough for this place.

text: Bagus. Makanan juga enak banget. Cocok untuk bawa rombongan. Ada tempat untuk mandi juga. Cuman air panasnya agak lama panasnya. Pemandangan juga bagus. ada wahana outbound nya juga. Cuman belum pernah coba. Ruang kru juga bersih. Pokoknya mantap deh. Puas banget d sini. Pelayanannya juga ramah.
english_translation: Good. The food is also very delicious. Suitable for bringing a group. There's also a place to bathe. Only the hot water takes a while to heat up. The view is also good. There are outbound attractions too. Just haven't tried them yet. The crew room is also clean. Overall, it's great. Very satisfied here. The service is also friendly.

text:
Cocok untuk tempat camping karena tempatnya luas juga bersih, disini dapat liat sunrise dengan pemandangan kota lembang dari atas yang masih tertutup kabut
Kalau kesini jangan terlalu siang karena jam 6.15 sudah mulai cerah, jadi sebelum set 6 harus sudah ada disini kalau ingin cuaca yang bagus.
english_translation:
Suitable for camping because the place is spacious and clean, here you can see the sunrise with a view of Lembang town from above, still covered in mist.
If you come here, don't come too late because it starts to get bright at 6:15 AM, so you should be here before 6 AM if you want good weather.

text: Sejuk asri dingin dan bila mana bertepatan waktunya akan bertemu dengan hewan monyet yang sering berdiam diri di dekat pintu masuk air terjun mungkin itu dekat dengan habitatnya, meskipun sudah berbaur dengan masyarakat akan lebih baiknya kita tetap berhati-hati karena hewan tersebut hewan liar.
english_translation: Cool, lush, and cold, and if you happen to be there at the right time, you might encounter monkeys that often stay near the entrance of the waterfall, possibly close to their habitat. Even though they are accustomed to people, it's best to remain cautious because they are wild animals.

text: Suasananya sangat sejuk dan cocok untuk berbagai kalangan. Bagi yang memakai kursi roda atau stroller juga sangat aman karena jalannya dibuat halus namun harus diperhatikan ketika jalanan naik ataupun turun. Tempatnya sangat luas untuk dijelajahi. Jangan lupa bawa air minum agar tidak dehidrasi.
english_translation: The atmosphere is very pleasant and suitable for all ages. It is very safe for wheelchair users or those with strollers because the paths are made smooth, but caution is advised on uphill or downhill sections. The place is very spacious to explore. Don't forget to bring water so you don't get dehydrated.

text: Air terjun nya lumayan bagus untuk di kunjungi,banyak spot untuk berpoto ria.hanya saja rute nya yang lumayan menantang, jauh dr tempat parkir,tanjakan nya agak curam,walaupun ada ojeg untuk naik maupun turun, tetep mesti extra hati hati apalagi kalau hujan karena trek nya tanah, otomatis licin.
english_translation: The waterfall is quite good to visit, with many spots for taking photos. The route is a bit challenging, far from the parking area, and the incline is quite steep. Even though there are motorcycle taxis for going up and down, you still need to be extra careful, especially if it's raining because the track is dirt, which will be slippery.

text: Hutan pinus yang ditata apik (walaupun orchidnya ga gitu banyak & variatif ya), udara sejuk & angin sepoi2 bakal memanjakan para pengunjung yang datang. Fasilitas toilet tersebar di berbagai titik lokasi wisata, kebersihannya juga terjaga dengan baik. Banyak spot kece buat foto2. HTM 50k / orang.
english_translation: Neatly arranged pine forest (although the orchids aren't that many & varied), cool air & gentle breeze will spoil the visitors who come. Toilet facilities are spread across various points of the tourist attraction, and their cleanliness is well maintained. Many cool spots for photos. Entrance fee 50k / person.

text: Seperti di Bali ,, banyak patung2 ,, tanaman di tata indah ,  masuk bayar 20 rb , tiket ditukar dgn air minum 1 botol uk kecil , parkir bayar , tp belum ada petugas parkir . ada kereta utk keliling , becak kecil , sepeda air , ada tempat jajanan tapi blm komplit , masih dalam tahap pembangunan ..
english_translation: Like in Bali, lots of statues, plants are arranged beautifully. Entry fee is 20,000 IDR, ticket can be exchanged for a small bottle of drinking water. Parking costs money, but there are no parking attendants yet. There are carts for touring, small rickshaws, paddle boats. There are food stalls but not yet complete, still under development.

text:
Kalau kabut sedang turun serasa dingin sekali, kalau cerah justru panas.
Tolong pengunjung jaga kebersihan untuk buang sampah pada tempatnya, karna sayang sekali tempat sudah indah namun dipenuhi sampah.
Jangan lupa pakai masker karna bau blerang dan pakai sunscreen supaya terlindungi dr matahari
english_translation:
When the fog is descending, it feels very cold, but when it's sunny, it's hot.
Please visitors maintain cleanliness by disposing of trash in its place, because it's a shame that the place is already beautiful but filled with garbage.
Don't forget to wear a mask because of the sulfur smell and wear sunscreen to protect yourself from the sun.

text: Destinasi wisata batu yang baru nampak setelah terendam ribuan tahun lalu.. Sanghyang kenit merupakan aliran sungai citarum purba. Gradasi warna yang indah dan aliran air sungai yang jernih membuat tempat ini tampak Indah luar biasa. Terdapat dua goa yang dapat terhubung dengan sanghyang tikoro..
english_translation: A newly discovered rock tourist destination, submerged for thousands of years. Sanghyang Kenit is an ancient tributary of the Citarum River. The beautiful color gradation and the clear flow of the river water make this place extraordinarily beautiful. There are two caves that connect to Sanghyang Tikoro.

text:
cakepp tempatnya terus luas banget, tapi karena tempatnya luas jadi kita butuh effort buat menelusuri semua sudut, jalan menuju ke tempatnya juga lumayan rusak jadi harus pelan-pelan biar gak bocor ban motornya kaya Saya🤓
kalo hiling hiling di sini terbayarkan banget sihh sama pemandangannya 💗💗 …
english_translation:
The place is great and really spacious, but because it's so large, you need effort to explore all the corners. The road leading to the place is also quite damaged, so you have to go slowly to avoid a flat tire like mine 🤓
If you're looking for a getaway, it's totally worth it here for the view 💗💗...

text:
Tempat Wisata Gn. Tangkuban Perahu telah banyak Mengalami perubahan. Lebih tertata rapih dan nyaman untuk rekreasi bersama keluarga ataupun teman. HTM  hari libur orang 30rb dan Motor 17rb Parkir Motor 2rb.
Datang Lebih pagi agar bisa menikmati sejuknya udara di Kawah Ratu Gunung Tangkuban Parahu
english_translation:
Mount Tangkuban Perahu Tourist Spot has undergone many changes. It is now more organized and comfortable for recreation with family or friends. Entrance fees on holidays are IDR 30,000 per person and IDR 17,000 per motorcycle. Motorcycle parking is IDR 2,000.
Come earlier to enjoy the cool air at the Ratu Crater of Mount Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Menakjubkan , salah satu wisata alam yang ada di daerah lembang . Ada beberapa jalan menuju puncak gunung putri . Pertama bisa di lalui lewat jayagiri , yang suka hiking saya sarankan lewat sini . Karena sepanjang perjalanan kita akan di manjakan dengan melalui hutan . Ga bakal nyesel dah pokonya
english_translation: Amazing, one of the natural attractions in the Lembang area. There are several routes to Putri Mountain's peak. The first can be accessed via Jayagiri. For those who like hiking, I recommend this route. Because along the way, you'll be spoiled by going through the forest. You definitely won't regret it.

text: Tidak recommended, airnya cokelat, jaraknya jauh dan waktu tempuhnya lama kalo jalan kaki itu dari pintu masuk sekitar 5,5 km. Tidak recommended nya kenapa? Karena perjalanan yang ditempuh cukup jauh namun tidak terbayarkan dengan keadaan curug yang tidak bisa disentuh ataupun dilihat dari dekat.
english_translation: Not recommended, the water is brown, it's far and the travel time is long if you walk from the entrance, it's about 5.5 km. Why is it not recommended? Because the journey is quite far but not worth it with the condition of the waterfall which cannot be touched or seen up close.

text: Isinya cuma tempat foto dan itu cuma 5 tapi lokasi kesananya curam hanya untuk anak muda. Belum lagi kalau siang hari terik panasnya. Tidak ramah keluarga terutama yang bawa baby stroller atau pengguna kursi roda. Ada tangga tapi stroller ga bisa lewat tangga kan. Tiket 50rbnya mending buat makan
english_translation: It only contains photo spots, and there are only 5 of them, but the road to get there is steep, only suitable for young people. Not to mention the scorching heat during the day. It's not family-friendly, especially for those with baby strollers or wheelchair users. There are stairs, but strollers can't go up them, can they? The 50,000 ticket fee is better spent on food.

text: Termasuk tmpat wisata baru, sarana dan prasarana jg msh kurang...klu mau ke sini lbh baik pagi atau sore, krna klu siang panas bngt dan tmpat berteduhnya minim. Tp so far view nya lumayan bagus, buat yg ga mau jln kaki buat kelilingin danau bisa kok naik kereta, sewa sepeda atau naik becak kecil.
english_translation: Including new tourist attractions, facilities and infrastructure are still lacking... if you want to come here it's better in the morning or afternoon, because during the day it's very hot and there are minimal shaded areas. But so far the view is quite good, for those who don't want to walk around the lake, you can take a train, rent a bicycle, or ride a small pedicab.

text: Puas sih kesini. Harga tiketnya kalau weekday cuma 10k aja dan dapet minum. Tempatnya adem dan banyak spot foto keren. Paling enak kalau lagi sepi, bisa puas foto-foto dan nggak bising juga. Posisinya juga deket kalau dari arah dago giri dan tempatnya mudah ditemukan. Top deh, recommended banget.
english_translation: I'm satisfied with visiting here. The ticket price on weekdays is only 10k and it includes a drink. The place is cool and has many great photo spots. It's best when it's not crowded, so you can take photos to your heart's content without it being noisy. Its location is also close if you're coming from the Dago Giri direction, and the place is easy to find. Top-notch, highly recommended.

text: kebun bunga nya cantik.. bagus terawat emang tempat bagus untuk selfi, koleksi bunga2 nya juga banyak warna warni, bisa metik sayuran juga, macam macam bnyak sayuran, tiket masuk 15rb Parkir 5rb, parkir mobilnya kecil, hanya terbatas dan untuk dekorasi terlalu sempit jd banyak selfi bedesak desak,
english_translation: The flower garden is beautiful. It's well-maintained and a great place for selfies. The flower collection is also abundant and colorful. You can also pick vegetables; there are many kinds. The entrance fee is 15,000 Rupiah, and parking is 5,000 Rupiah. The car park is small and limited. The parking area is too narrow for the decorations, so many people are crowded for selfies.

text: Curug tilu leuwi opat ini ada di dalam CIC lembang, seneng banget kesini, lokasi yg dekat, di dalam ada saung nya, masuk nya waktu itu sih cuma bayar parkir aja.. view yg eksotis dan wah bener bener bisa jadi tempat untuk menghilangkan stress seperti itu... Air terjun nya bikin pengen balik lagi..
english_translation: Curug tilu leuwi opat is located inside CIC Lembang. It was very enjoyable to come here, the location is close by. Inside there are gazebos. At the time, we only paid for parking to get in. The exotic and amazing view is truly a place to relieve stress. The waterfall makes me want to come back again.

text: Mengenang masa-masa SMA dulu pertama kali mengunjungi Curug Maribaya yang terletak di kawasan sejuk, Lembang Bandung yang fenomenal. Malah pertama kalinya kala itu jalan kaki dari gua pakar Dago menyusuri lebatnya hutan sampai ke Curug Maribaya tersebut. Satu pengalaman hidup yang tak terlupakan..
english_translation: Remembering high school days when I first visited Curug Maribaya, located in the cool, phenomenal Lembang area of Bandung. It was even the first time I walked from the Pakar Dago cave, traversing the dense forest all the way to Curug Maribaya. An unforgettable life experience.

text: Berkunjung ke wisata alam  gunung tangkuban perahu saat weekend  cukup ramai meskipun masih pandemi. Saat diatas bau belerang masih menyengat untung pakai masker. Parkir sangat luas dan ada masjid juga yg besar buat pengunjung yg mau sholat. Oleh oleh juga tidak terlalu mahal asal pintar nawar aja
english_translation: Visiting the Tangkuban Perahu mountain nature tourism on the weekend was quite crowded even though it was still during the pandemic. Up on top, the smell of sulfur was still strong, luckily I was wearing a mask. Parking is very spacious and there is also a large mosque for visitors who want to pray. Souvenirs are not too expensive as long as you're good at bargaining.

text: Area tangga yang berkarat dan jebol mungkin bisa dilakukan perbaikan, sampah di area bebatuan sungai masih banyak, anak tangga yg hancur sehingga licin dan membahayakan juga semoga bisa jadi perhatian, area kamar kecil kurang layak, jembatan kecil pun sudah tidak dalam kondisi baik. Tetap semangat
english_translation: The rusty and broken stair area might be repairable, there is still a lot of trash in the river rock area, the destroyed and slippery, dangerous steps hopefully can also be a concern, the toilet area is not very suitable, the small bridge is also no longer in good condition. Keep up the spirit.

text:
bermain disini dulu....
kalo dari stasiun cipatat bisa carter mobil angkot estimasi ongkosnya sekitar 25rb PP/orang
tiket masuknya 8rb/ormg
untuk jelajah goa tiketnya ada yg 25rb/ orng
ada yg 150rb/orng

kalo mau tau bedanya harga jelajah goa mending datang sendiri biar seru, sekalian biar tahu...
english_translation:
Let's play here first....
If coming from Cipatat station, you can hire a public car (angkot) with an estimated cost of around 25,000 IDR round trip/person.
Entrance ticket is 8,000 IDR/person.
For cave exploration, there are tickets for 25,000 IDR/person and others for 150,000 IDR/person.

If you want to know the difference in cave exploration ticket prices, it's best to come yourself to make it more exciting, and to find out for yourself...

text: Semua lokasi wisata harus bayar harusnya di buat paket 1 kali masuk semua kawasan bisa di jelajahi. Jadi, mau yang berwisata semua atau tidak 1 x bayar. Mau kuliner wilayah sana juga harus bayar tiket masuk. Pengelola sana tolong diperhatikan saran saya biar tetap ramai walau baru 11 bulan di buka
english_translation: All tourist attractions should be paid for, it should be made into a package with one entry fee allowing all areas to be explored. So, whether one wants to tour everything or not, it's a one-time payment. Even culinary exploration in that area requires an entrance ticket. The management there, please consider my suggestion so that it remains crowded, even though it has only been open for 11 months.

text: This cafe is inside orchid cikole. Settingnya ala ala British Cafe, menyajikan varian teh dan pastry. Kesegaran hutan pinus cikole under the sun ditemani secangkir teh dan kudapan yg lezat memang membuat cafe ini patut dicobain. Warna biru cafe dan glass house cafe menarik sekali untuk dikunjungi.
english_translation: This cafe is inside Orchid Cikole. The setting is like a British cafe, serving a variety of teas and pastries. The freshness of the Cikole pine forest under the sun, accompanied by a cup of tea and delicious snacks, truly makes this cafe worth trying. The blue color of the cafe and the glasshouse design are very attractive and worth a visit.

text: Tempatnya sejuk, kendaraan bisa parkir di atas, viewnya bagus saat tidak ada kabut, saat weekday cenderung tidak ramai sehingga menikmati suasana disekitar lokasi lebih memuaskan, diatas terdapat masjid, toilet, warung makan & toko oleh oleh, jika ingin berfoto terdapat jasa foto tarifnya 20rb/foto
english_translation: The place is cool, vehicles can park above, the view is good when there is no fog, on weekdays it tends to be not crowded so enjoying the atmosphere around the location is more satisfying, upstairs there is a mosque, toilet, food stall & souvenir shop, if you want to take photos there is a photo service with a rate of 20 thousand per photo.

text:
A good petfriendly place

Tempat : Mudah di jangkau, cukup luas, banyak spot foto, namun jika hujan kurang banyak tempat untuk berteduh

Lahan parkir : Cukup Luas

Tiket Masuk : 25k/org (weekend, parkir 10k untuk mobil) , tiket bisa di tukar minuman

Harga : Cukup murah

Staff : Ramah

Score : 7/10
english_translation:
A good pet-friendly place

Place: Easy to reach, quite spacious, many photo spots, but if it rains, there aren't many places to take shelter.

Parking lot: Quite spacious

Entrance ticket: 25k/person (weekend, 10k parking for cars), ticket can be exchanged for drinks.

Price: Quite cheap

Staff: Friendly

Score: 7/10

text: Air terjun ini terletak di bawah jalan. Pemandangannya luar biasa. Perlu hati-hati dalam perjalanan turun ke lokasi. Saya tidak akan merekomendasikan Anda untuk berenang karena kami tidak yakin dari mana airnya berasal. Semoga fasilitasnya ditingkatkan sehingga dapat menarik lebih banyak wisatawan
english_translation: This waterfall is located below the road. The view is amazing. Be careful on the way down to the location. I wouldn't recommend swimming because we are unsure where the water originates from. Hopefully, the facilities will be improved to attract more tourists.

text: Tempat liburan yang menyenangkan dengan pemandangan yang indah. Namun, akses menuju kesana rusak dan juga pada siang hari kondisi cuaca yang berasap membuat kurang nyaman. Lebih dianjurkan dikunjungi pada pagi atau sore hari, karena asap sudah berkurang sehingga pemandangan dapat terlihat jelas 😊 …
english_translation: A pleasant holiday spot with beautiful views. However, access to it is damaged, and also, the smoky weather conditions during the day make it less comfortable. It is more recommended to visit in the morning or afternoon, as the smoke has reduced, allowing the views to be clearly seen 😊 …

text: Tempat wisata alam yang bagus, disini suhunya dingin. Jika baru datang ke Bandung tidak afdal kalau tidak kesini. Untuk karcis masuk Weekend seharga 30.000 per orang diluar parkir kendaran dan tiket masuk kendaraan. Untuk sepeda motor, parkirnya seharga 2000 ditambah karcis masuk sepeda motor 17000.
english_translation: A good natural tourist spot, the temperature here is cold. If you are new to Bandung, it is incomplete if you do not come here. The entrance ticket for the weekend is IDR 30,000 per person, excluding vehicle parking and vehicle entrance tickets. For motorcycles, parking costs IDR 2,000 plus a motorcycle entrance ticket of IDR 17,000.

text:
Salah satu curug dengan akses yang sangat baik. Hanya perlu menuruni anak tangga dari tempat tiket masuk.

Disini terdapat banyak monyet ekor panjang jadi waspada dengan barang bawaan. Oia siapin energi yang baik klo mau ke tempat ini. Karena walaupun cuma naik turun tangga, lama-lama cape juga hehe
english_translation:
One of the waterfalls with excellent access. You only need to descend stairs from the ticket booth.

There are many long-tailed monkeys here, so be cautious with your belongings. Oh, and prepare a good amount of energy if you want to go to this place. Because even though it's just going up and down stairs, it can get tiring after a while, hehe.

text:
Wisata alam kali ini menurut saya cukup bagus vieuwnya bwt foto2, liburan bersama keluarga sangat cocok tuk yg suka dgn alam, htm per/org 5rb, roda 4 5rb, roda 2 3rb
Jajanan juga standart ga main pukul.. hanya satu kekurangannya yaitu akses jalan menuju kesana masih rusak, klo naik motor harus hati2
english_translation:
This nature tour, in my opinion, has pretty good views for photos. It's very suitable for family vacations for those who love nature. The entrance fee is IDR 5,000 per person, IDR 5,000 for four-wheeled vehicles, and IDR 3,000 for two-wheeled vehicles.

The snacks are also standard and not overpriced. The only drawback is that the road leading there is still damaged. If you're riding a motorcycle, you need to be careful.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata di bandung barat, tempatnya agak sulit dicari jalannya juga agak kurang bagus. Tapi setelah sampai tempatnya cukup bagus, cuma mungkin jalan setapaknya agak kurang. Waktu kesana ada yang lagi prewedding boleh dicoba juga buat yang mau prewedding mungkin bisa foto-foto disini
english_translation: One of the tourist attractions in West Bandung, the place is a bit hard to find and the road is also a bit poor. But once you arrive, the place is quite nice, just maybe the walking path is a bit lacking. When I went there, someone was doing a pre-wedding photoshoot, so it can be tried by those who want to have a pre-wedding photoshoot, maybe you can take photos here.

text: Datang di hari weekend gaada anteran, cukup ramai, tiket masuknya 20k/orang motor 3k, untuk mencapai curug kamu harus menuruni anak tangga, pemandangannya bagusss luar biasa ga mengecewakan, curug ini adalah curug tertinggi di bandung raya. Fasilitasnya ada kantin indomie rebus 13k, musholla, toilet
english_translation: Arriving on the weekend meant no queue, it was quite crowded. The entrance fee is 20k per person, motorcycle 3k. To reach the waterfall, you have to descend stairs. The view is amazing, truly outstanding and not disappointing. This waterfall is the highest waterfall in the Bandung Raya area. Facilities include an Indomie noodle canteen for 13k, a prayer room, and toilets.

text:
Harga tiket bersahabat, Pemandangannya indah, sangat bagus dan bisa menghilangkan stress.. Cocok untuk keluarga dan anak - anak.

Bisa sewa kostum jepang - jepangan dan bisa berfoto dengan samurai. Bisa juga sewa perahu untuk berkeliling di danau.

Banyak stand makanan juga yang pastinya enak - enak.
english_translation:
Friendly ticket prices, beautiful scenery, very good and stress-relieving. Suitable for families and children.

You can rent Japanese-style costumes and take photos with samurai. You can also rent a boat to go around the lake.

There are also many food stalls that are definitely delicious.

text: Hari libur rame pengunjungnya. View nya bagus. Ada danau nya. Dan kuliner di sekitarnya yang sangat bermacam menu nya. Harga menurut saya agak mahal tp ya wajarlah krn lokasi wisata. Saya makan sate maringgih enak. Es durian enak jiga. Mushola terpisah ikhwan dan akhwat. Bagus. Silahkan berkunjung...
english_translation: The holiday was crowded with visitors. The view is nice. There is a lake. And the culinary options around it are very diverse. The price, in my opinion, is a bit expensive, but that's understandable given it's a tourist location. I ate delicious sate maringgih. The durian ice was also delicious. The prayer room is separated for men and women. Good. Please visit...

text: Htm kisaran 55rb per orang (termasuk harga tiket masuk dan parkir). Tempatnya cocok bgt buat healing, suasanya sejuk dan nyaman. Cuma masakan di cafe dalem kurang pas rasanya, harganya jg agak mahal, jadi better yang mau kesini bawa makanan dan minuman asik gelar tiker sendiri buat picnic. Enjoy! ☺️✨
english_translation: Around IDR 55k per person (including entrance fee and parking). The place is very suitable for healing, the atmosphere is cool and comfortable. It's just that the food at the cafe inside isn't quite right in taste, and the prices are a bit expensive, so it's better to bring your own food and drinks if you want to come here and lay out your own mat for a picnic. Enjoy! ☺️✨

text:
ternyata Sarae Hills ini berada di satu tempat dengan Tasso Barn,

posisi Sarae Hills berada di bawah (wahana baru),
untuk karcis masuk ada 3 macam paket yang tersedia 50rb, 65rb dan 80rb,
bila weekend bertambah 10rb dari jenis2 paket nya

tidak ada wahana lain, selain hanya tempat berfoto saja dsana
english_translation:
It turns out Sarae Hills is in the same location as Tasso Barn,
Sarae Hills is located below (the new attraction),
there are 3 types of entrance ticket packages available: 50k, 65k, and 80k,
on weekends, there's an additional 10k to each package type

there are no other attractions, only photo spots there

text: Tempat wisata yang menawarkan pemandangan dan tempat selfie dan berfoto. Ada banyak wahana selfie dan nyaris semuanya berbayar. Per wahana sekitar 20rb-30rb. Ada juru foto di tiap wahana, sayangnya untuk menyalin file fotonya saja juga harus bayar 10rb/file. Mahal..belum lagi kalo mau cetak fotonya..
english_translation: A tourist spot offering views and places for selfies and photos. There are many selfie rides, and almost all of them are paid. Each ride costs around 20,000-30,000. There are photographers at each ride, and unfortunately, even copying the photo file costs 10,000 per file. Expensive... not to mention if you want to print the photos.

text: Tempat itu belum 100% selesai ketika saya terakhir berkunjung, masih ada pembangunan, tapi secara keseluruhan tempat ini bagus. Bagi saya pribadi mereka bisa menambahkan lebih banyak, yang terbaik dari semuanya hanya jembatannya meskipun menakutkan. Fyi, kalau mau ke jembatan itu harus bayar ekstra.
english_translation: The place wasn't 100% finished when I last visited, there was still construction, but overall the place is good. Personally, I think they could add more, the best of everything is just the bridge although it's scary. FYI, you have to pay extra to go to that bridge.

text: Berhubung tempat Nya masih baru dalam tahap pengembangan jadi belum begitu ramai pengunjung,, tempat yg santai untuk  menikmati kesejukan,, keindahan alam sekelilingnya.. sambil naik perahu juga ada tersedia, tiket murah dan semoga tetap murah,,, #mushola nya kalo bisaa lebih di perluas. Hatur nuhun.
english_translation: Since the place is still in its early stages of development, it's not very crowded yet. It's a relaxing place to enjoy the coolness and the surrounding natural beauty. Boat rides are also available, and the tickets are cheap, hopefully they'll stay that way. #The prayer room, if possible, could be expanded. Thank you.

text: Harga tiket masuknya per orang Rp 15.000 dan motor Rp 2.000. Tempatnya dikelola dengan baik, rapi dan banyak tanaman. Harga makanan juga tidak terlalu melonjak meskipun tempat wisata. Akses ke curug tidak begitu jauh dan sangat family friendly. Kalau datang weekend dan mau agak sepi bisa datang pagi.
english_translation: The entrance ticket price is Rp 15,000 per person and Rp 2,000 per motorcycle. The place is well-maintained, tidy, and has many plants. Food prices are also not too high despite it being a tourist spot. Access to the waterfall is not too far and it is very family-friendly. If you come on the weekend and want it to be a bit quiet, you can come in the morning.

text: Sungguh indah tempat ini, kita pakai jasa bapak buat ambil foto. Keren2 hasilnya, karena beliau tahu harus ambilnya dari mana. Untuk harga tiket Rp. 14 rb..Untuk parkir Rp. 5 rb. Kondisi sekarang masih dalam pengembangan karena tamannya belum jadi. Kalau sudah tumbuh bunganya pasti akan makin cantik.
english_translation: This place is truly beautiful, we used the Bapak's service to take photos. The results are amazing because he knows exactly where to take them from. The ticket price is Rp. 14 thousand. Parking is Rp. 5 thousand. The current condition is still under development because the garden isn't finished yet. When the flowers bloom, it will surely be even more beautiful.

text: Tempatnya sejuk dan luas. Cocok untuk rekreasi keluarga. Bisa menyewa kapal atau bebek-bebekan untuk berkeliling danau. Bisa memberi makan ikan di danau dengan membeli pakan yang sudah tersedia. Terdapat taman bermain untuk anak-anak. Makanan yang dijual banyak macamnya dengan harga yang cukup mahal.
english_translation: The place is cool and spacious. Suitable for family recreation. You can rent boats or paddle boats to go around the lake. You can feed the fish in the lake by buying the available feed. There is a playground for children. The food sold is varied with quite expensive prices.

text: Tempatnya masih asri dan alami banget. Yang merasa penat bisa jadi fresh kalo kesini ,, apalagi dimulut goanya adem bgt. Bisa berenang, mkan bersama keluarga, fto2 dgn latar bebatuan, dan juga bisa susur goa purba untuk melihat2 stalagtit, stalagmit dan kehidupan didalem goa. Sangat menyenangkan 🌿🌿 …
english_translation: The place is still very natural and pristine. Those who feel tired can become refreshed if they come here, especially since it's very cool at the mouth of the cave. You can swim, eat with family, take photos with a rocky background, and also explore the ancient cave to see stalactites, stalagmites, and life inside the cave. It's very enjoyable 🌿🌿 …

text: Well, parkirannya banyak, jarak kawah dari parkiran deket banget, cocok buat wisata keluarga. Ga capek buat muter dari ujung ke ujung. Ada masjidnya besar, kamar mandi umum juga oke, bersih. Pemandangan mantab kalo ga ada kabut. Tiket retribusi juga tidak mahal. Banyak pedagang buat makan dan oleholeh
english_translation: Well, there's plenty of parking, the crater is very close to the parking area, perfect for family tourism. It's not tiring to walk from one end to the other. There's a big mosque, and the public restrooms are okay and clean. The view is great if there's no fog. The entrance fee isn't expensive either. There are many vendors for food and souvenirs.

text: Tangkuban Parahu atau Gunung Tangkuban Perahu adalah salah satu gunung yang terletak di Provinsi Jawa Barat, Indonesia. Sekitar 20 km ke arah utara Kota Bandung, dengan rimbun pohon pinus dan hamparan kebun teh di sekitarnya, Gunung Tangkuban Perahu mempunyai ketinggian setinggi 2.084 meter. Wikipedia
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu, or Mount Tangkuban Perahu, is a mountain located in West Java Province, Indonesia. Approximately 20 km north of Bandung City, with lush pine trees and sprawling tea plantations surrounding it, Mount Tangkuban Perahu has a height of 2,084 meters. Wikipedia

text: Wisata alam yang nyaman banget buat yang mau camp dan benar benar menginginkan kenyamanan karena tempatnya ga terlalu ramai. Lalu, tempat untuk campnya juga cukup luas. Yang terpenting jaga barang bawaan anda. Untuk tiket masuk hanya 15.000. Buat kalian yang bawa motor bisa dititipkan di pos penjagaan
english_translation: A very comfortable nature tour for those who want to camp and truly desire comfort because the place is not too crowded. Also, the camping area is quite spacious. Most importantly, take care of your belongings. The entrance fee is only 15,000. For those of you who bring motorcycles, you can leave them at the guard post.

text: Suasana hijau dan asri, area cukup luas untuk bisa berjalan kaki menikmati pemandangan. Banyak spot foto menarik dan bagus. Untuk pasar terapung nya itu menjual makanan, untuk pembayaran bisa melalui kartu khusus yang bisa di top up. Di pintu masuk menjual jas hujan plastik, buat jaga jaga jika hujan.
english_translation: Green and beautiful atmosphere, quite a spacious area to walk around and enjoy the scenery. Many interesting and good photo spots. The floating market sells food, and payment can be made via a special card that can be topped up. At the entrance, they sell plastic raincoats, just in case it rains.

text: Dari pusat kota bandung 3 jam naik motor , jalan bagus namun tanjakan dan turunan berkelok-kelok. Tiket masuk 5000 belum termasuk parkir. Dari tempat parkir ke air terjun lumayan jauh 10-15 menit berjalan kaki menuruni anak tangga. Ada jasa ojek untuk yg lelah berjalan kaki dengan ongkos ojek 10.000 .
english_translation: From Bandung city center, it's a 3-hour motorbike ride. The road is good, but winding with inclines and declines. The entrance fee is 5000, not including parking. From the parking area to the waterfall, it's a considerable walk of 10-15 minutes down stairs. There's a motorbike taxi service for those tired of walking, costing 10,000.

text: Nanggung, mau banyak wahana tapi kurang memaksimalkan lahan, alhasil dari spot foto ke spot lainnya kejauhan.. ga besar juga per spot fotonya, santorininya sempit kali. Patung liberti backgorundnya rumput :( kesana pas hapening banget jadi sumpek, jangan dateng pas weekend, harga pertiketnya jadi 50rb
english_translation: Too bad, wanted to ride many rides but didn't maximize the land. As a result, it's far from one photo spot to another. The photo spots aren't big either, the Santorini area is very narrow. The Statue of Liberty has a grass background :( Went there when it was very happening, so it was crowded. Don't go on the weekend, the ticket price becomes 50,000.

text:
bagus banget , tertata , setiap toilet pasti sanding mushola.
makanan juga enak , harga ya standar tempat wisata lah.

tempat duduk juga banyak , cuaca jangan ditanya , bikin pengen gelar tiker hehehe (sayang ga bawa tiker).

baru pertama ini kesini , klo maen ke lembang kapan kapan pasti kesini lagii
english_translation:
It's really good, well-organized, every toilet is next to the prayer room.
The food is also delicious, the price is standard for a tourist spot.

There are also many seats, don't even ask about the weather, it makes you want to spread a mat, hehehe (too bad I didn't bring one).

This is my first time here, if I play in Lembang anytime, I will definitely come here again.

text: Yg suka dengan suasana alam wajib datang (ngecamp) disini terutama buat pemburu sunrise di kota bandung. HTM nya terjangkau bgt cuma 16rb aja, jadi ajak aja semua kawan atw keluarga kalian ya, btw buat kalian yg pemula gunung ini cocok bgt buat latihan hiking karena ga terlalu jauh dari pusat kota yaw.
english_translation: Those who love nature must come (camp) here, especially for sunrise hunters in Bandung city. The entrance fee is very affordable, only 16 thousand rupiah. So, invite all your friends or family! By the way, for those of you who are beginners, this mountain is very suitable for hiking practice because it's not too far from the city center.

text:
Parkir untuk bus dan kendaraan kecil luas. Pas banget untuk yg keluarga mau menginap. Rombongan yang mau outbond, paintball atau hal lain.

Tempatnya adem. Ada resto. Harga relatif terjangkau. Untuk rasa tergantung selera ya. Tiket masuknya sekarang Rp 20.000/orang.

Stafnya lumayan kooperatif dan baik
english_translation:
Parking for buses and small vehicles is spacious. Perfect for families wanting to stay overnight. Groups wanting to do outbound, paintball, or other activities.

The place is cool. There's a restaurant. Prices are relatively affordable. Taste depends on personal preference. The entrance ticket is now Rp 20,000/person.

The staff are quite cooperative and kind.

text: Masalah pemandangan yang indah, udara yang sejuk menambah keindahan suasananya. Bau belerang yang masih tercium cukup kencang tidak merusak suasana. Jalanan menuju kawah Ratu cenderung berliku namun kondisinya bagus. Hanya agak kecil, jadi jika berpapasan dengan bis ada beberapa jalur yg harus gantian.
english_translation: The beautiful scenery, the cool air adds to the beauty of the atmosphere. The sulfur smell, which is still quite strong, does not spoil the atmosphere. The road to Ratu crater tends to be winding but is in good condition. It's just a bit narrow, so if you meet a bus, there are some sections that require taking turns.

text: Bwt pemula yang mau kesini siapkan energi dan badan yang fit ya,,soalnya perjalanan menuju sanghiyang heuleut dari parkiran motor menuju lokasi itu 1jam,,,,tidak bisa masuk kendaraan,lokasinya berada ditengah hutan,,,jadi kalo mau berkunjung kesini harus bener2 fresh terutaama bawa persediaan air minum
english_translation: For beginners who want to come here, prepare your energy and make sure your body is fit, because the journey to Sanghiyang Heuleut from the motorbike parking lot to the location takes 1 hour. Vehicles cannot enter, and the location is in the middle of the forest. So, if you want to visit here, you really need to be fresh, especially bringing drinking water supplies.

text: Keren pake bgt murah meriah byk tempat pilihan buat ambil angle terbaik oh ya iklan Indomie nya Nicholas Saputra ternyata shooting nya di stone garden lho disana juga tersedia dinding foto artis yg pernah ke stone garden lengkap JD seperti puzzle bangga klo bisa menemui angle tempat artis tersebut foto
english_translation: Super cool, very affordable, and lots of great spots to get the best angles. Oh, and by the way, the Indomie commercial starring Nicholas Saputra was actually shot at Stone Garden! There are also photo walls of celebrities who have visited Stone Garden, making it like a puzzle. It's really satisfying when you can find the exact spot where an artist took their photo.

text: Asik banget main ke Orchid Forest, lokasi tertata rapi, bersih, toiletnya juga bersih, banyak spot buat foto2 yg instagramable. Lokasi ini cocok banget utk keluarga dan kelompok pencinta alam terbuka tapi ga perlu effort terlalu berat, karena lokasinya sudah didesain agar midah dilalui dan dieksplor...
english_translation: It's so fun playing at Orchid Forest, the location is neatly arranged, clean, the toilets are also clean, and there are many Instagrammable photo spots. This location is very suitable for families and groups of nature lovers but doesn't require too much effort, because the location has been designed to be easy to navigate and explore...

text: Ingin melihat matahari terbit dengan mudah? Saya merekomendasikan Anda untuk pergi ke Gunung Putri. Tidak perlu mendaki, Anda bisa melihat indahnya matahari terbit dari atas. Berkemah di sini adalah salah satu pilihan juga. Tapi tolong, jangan buang sampahmu di sembarang tempat. Jaga kebersihannya ya?
english_translation: Want to see the sunrise easily? I recommend you go to Putri Mountain. No need to hike, you can see the beautiful sunrise from the top. Camping here is also an option. But please, don't litter. Keep it clean, okay?

text: Untuk tamannya bagus. Suka sama bunga2nya. Pegawainya ramah. But, why I give 4 star?? Menurut aku terlalu mahal dg harga 20k. Cz di tmpt lain 20k biasanya udah dapat free drink. Terus kebun yg bagian blkng (sayur) juga keliatan kurang dirawat. Sayang banget sebenernya. Semoga bisa terus berkembang yaaa.
english_translation: The garden is nice. I liked the flowers. The staff are friendly. But, why did I give 4 stars? In my opinion, it's too expensive for 20k. Because elsewhere, 20k usually gets you a free drink. Also, the back garden (vegetable patch) looks a bit neglected. It's a real shame. I hope it can continue to grow.

text: tempat wisata yg Ada didaerah punclut, memurutku ini tempat wisata hanya untuk foto foto saja, kuliner masih minim harga ticket masuk  50.000 Dan ternyata untuk masuk jembatan harus membeli tiket masuk lagi seharga 15.000/orang, paling cocok kalai datang siang/pagi hari karena klo siang cuacanya panas,,
english_translation: Tourist attractions in the Punclut area, in my opinion, are only for taking photos. Culinary options are still limited. The entrance ticket price is 50,000, and it turns out that to enter the bridge, you have to buy another entrance ticket for 15,000 per person. It's best to come in the afternoon/morning because it's hot during the day.

text:
Didominasi lokasi camp. Banyak tipe tempat camp. Tinggal pilih 😁
Selain jalan2, camping, outbound, tempat makannya juga banyak. Harga bersaing.
Tempat parkirnya habis oleh bis wisata yg cukup banyak.
Mobil pribadi jadi prioritas kedua.

Tiket 160918 : Rp 15.000 (masih murah untuk wilayah wisata Lembang)
english_translation:
Dominated by camp locations. Many types of camping spots. Just choose 😁
Besides sightseeing, camping, and outbound activities, there are also many places to eat. Competitive prices.
The parking lot is filled by a considerable number of tour buses.
Private cars are a second priority.

Ticket 160918: Rp 15,000 (still cheap for the Lembang tourist area)

text: Tempatnya bagus, luassss banget tp nggak bikin capek karena dimanjakan dg pemandangan yg ciamik, banyak bunga2 cantik, terdapat miniatur kota dan floating market tentunya, dijamin nggak akan bosen lama2 disini. Selain itu tiket dapat ditukarkan dg segelas susu hangat. Cocok banget dg hawa dingin lembang
english_translation: The place is nice, very spacious but not tiring because you're pampered with amazing views, lots of beautiful flowers, a miniature city, and of course a floating market, guaranteed you won't get bored here for long. Besides that, the ticket can be exchanged for a glass of warm milk. It's very suitable for the cold Lembang air.

text: Kirain bisa main-main di curugnya, ternyata ngga. Kalopun bisa, paling di batu-batu dan ga puas karena ga leluasa. Di beberapa sudut curug ada sampah plastik. Curugnya juga termasuk kecil menurut gue. Harga masuk 35 rb udh termasuk liat curug, mini zoo, air mineral atau pie susu. Harga masuk motor 5 rb.
english_translation: I thought I could play around in the waterfall, but it turns out I can't. Even if I could, it would probably just be on the rocks and unsatisfying because I wouldn't be able to move freely. In some corners of the waterfall, there was plastic trash. The waterfall is also quite small in my opinion. The entrance fee of 35,000 includes seeing the waterfall, the mini zoo, mineral water, or milk pie. The motorbike entrance fee is 5,000.

text:
Wah gabisa diungkapan dengan kata2 deh, pokoknya takjub banget liatnya buat yg gapernah liat kawah gunungyg aktif. Harga tiketnya (6/9/20) 30k, Parkir motor 19k.
Di kawasan ini, selain kaeah ratu (utama) da banyak kawah lainnya juga, dan katanya masuk lagi kedalemnyaa. Jalur kesana jalannya bagus sekali
english_translation:
It can't be described with words, I was just so amazed to see it, especially for those who have never seen an active volcano crater. The ticket price (6/9/20) was 30k, motorcycle parking was 19k.
In this area, besides the main crater (Kawah Ratu), there are many other craters as well, and they say you can go deeper inside. The path there is very good.

text:
Seru cocok untuk liburan keluarga, untuk anak2 karena ada outbound nya.
Toiletnya bersih, musholanya  oke. Ada kebun strawberry, rusa, outbound, vila, camping dll. Luas banget tempatnya dan kemaren belum sempat eksplore semua spot nya... Buat rombongan juga cocok, masakan restauran nya juga lumayan enak
english_translation:
Exciting, suitable for a family vacation, especially for kids because there's an outbound activity.
The toilets are clean, the prayer room is okay. There's a strawberry garden, deer, outbound activities, villas, camping, etc. The place is very spacious, and we didn't have time to explore all the spots yesterday... It's also suitable for groups, and the restaurant's food is quite delicious.

text: Tempatnya enak buat camp..tapi pelayanannya kurang baik..kalo maen aja kesini ticketnya 10rb..saya mau camp pas masuk gak ada harga buat camp to di tagih 30rb /orang, 5 org jadi 150rb..yg lebih parahnya gak di kasih ticket / bukti pembelian ticket buat camp..gak tau tuh dana yg kita bayar masuk kemana..
english_translation: The place is nice for camping, but the service is not good. If you're just visiting, the ticket is 10,000 IDR. I wanted to camp, and when I arrived, there was no price listed for camping, but they charged me 30,000 IDR per person. For 5 people, that was 150,000 IDR. What's worse is they didn't give us a ticket or proof of purchase for the camping fee. I have no idea where the money we paid went.

text: tempat wisata di daerah lembang Bandung dengan suasana tematik yang asri dan banyak tempat bermain, ada labirin, sepeda danau, kereta api keliling, berkuda. Terdapat banyak spot untuk berfoto-foto bersama kekasih, teman, dan keluarga. Lahan wisata yang luasnya kurang lebih 70 hektar, luas tempat parkir.
english_translation: A tourist spot in the Lembang Bandung area with a beautiful thematic atmosphere and many play areas, including a maze, swan boats, a miniature train, and horse riding. There are many photo spots to take pictures with your lover, friends, and family. The tourist area is approximately 70 hectares, with ample parking space.

text: kawasan dengan berbagai resto dengan tema berbeda, bagus untuk dijadikan spot foto, tiap resto mesti beli voucher dulu, sayang, akses ke sini jalan terlalu sempit, harusnya ada rekayasa arus dari atas dan dari bawah, kayanya akses jalan dari dago (jl citra green) lebih nyaman dari pada lewat ciumbuleiut
english_translation: an area with various restaurants with different themes, good for taking photos, you have to buy a voucher first at each restaurant, too bad, the access road here is too narrow, there should be traffic engineering from above and below, the road access from Dago (Jl Citra Green) seems more comfortable than going through Ciumbuleuit

text:
Bagus tempatnya..
Tapi buset deh pop mie beli di dalem harganya 18.000, pop mienya ada lapisan emasnya kali ya... perasaan pop mienya sama air panasnya juga sama, apa jangan2 air panasnya dimasak di neraka ?, gilak kali, udah bayar tiket masuk jajanan harganya selangit, mikir2 deh kalo mo jajan disitu !
english_translation:
The place is nice...
But wow, the Pop Mie bought inside costs 18,000, maybe the Pop Mie has a layer of gold on it... I feel like the Pop Mie and the hot water are the same, or maybe the hot water was cooked in hell? Crazy, you've already paid for the entrance ticket and the snacks are outrageously priced, think twice if you want to snack there!

text: Keren..sejuk cocok untuk jalur tracking jalan kaki...ada penginapannya juga ..tiket 25rb/org bisa naik flaying fox..20rb/org bisa ditukar sama makanan manis/asin..semua keren hanyab1 kritik sy buat managemen tolong buat t4 wudhu wanita yg tertutup dan ketersedian  mukena yg bersih ...baarakallahu fiikum
english_translation: Awesome...cool, suitable for walking/hiking trails...there's also accommodation...ticket is 25k/person, can include a flying fox ride...20k/person can be exchanged for sweet/savory food...everything is awesome, I only have 1 critique for management, please make closed ablution places for women and provide clean prayer garments...may Allah bless you.

text:
Masih banyak pembangunan dan masih sepi, harga tiket masuk masih 20.000 untuk weekday dan 25.000 untuk weekend
Bisa naik kuda, bebek"an, lihat kuda poni, tapi untuk weekdays food vendorsnya sedikit sekali. Tiket masuk bisa ditukar air mineral botol kecil atau dengan tambah 3000 bisa diuprade ke Teh Poci
english_translation:
There is still a lot of development and it is still quiet, the entrance ticket price is still 20,000 for weekdays and 25,000 for weekends.
You can ride horses, pedal boats, see ponies, but for weekdays, there are very few food vendors. The entrance ticket can be exchanged for a small bottled mineral water or by adding 3,000 you can upgrade to Teh Poci.

text: Tempatnya enak cocok untuk acara gathering dan acara keluarga. Paket camping di tenda nya nyaman fasilitasnya juga ada dispenser dan air galon, ada colokan, ada api unggun dan dapet jagung bakar+pop mie, free parking. Kalo weekend disini rame banget jadi kalo mau sepi sepi disini lebih baik weekday aja.
english_translation: The place is nice, suitable for gatherings and family events. The tent camping package is comfortable with facilities like a dispenser and gallon water, power outlets, a bonfire, and includes grilled corn + instant noodles, plus free parking. It gets very crowded here on weekends, so if you want peace and quiet, it's better to come on weekdays.

text: Bersyukur sekali ada trip kesini dari sekolah anakku, katanya seruuu, baguss banyak bunga, foto-foto teruss sama temen-temennya.. Ga terlalu bikin cape jalan-jalan, banyak spot foto-foto, bunganya seger-seger dan terawat, parkir luas, mushola dan toilet juga tersedia,. Cocok jadi rekomendasi liburan 🎉 …
english_translation: So grateful there was a school trip here for my child. They said it was super fun, beautiful, lots of flowers, and they took tons of photos with their friends. It wasn't too tiring to walk around, there were many photo spots, the flowers were fresh and well-maintained, parking was spacious, and a prayer room and toilets were also available. Suitable as a holiday recommendation 🎉 …

text: Destinasi rekreasi yang cocok untuk keluarga. Ada sewa sepeda yang bisa di pakai sepuasnya. Naik kereta mobil dan naik kuda bisa menjadi alternatif keliling lembah. Spot swafhoto yang menarik dan lokasi lembah yang mudah di jangkau serta lembah yg luas. Ada juga danau yang di lengkapi dengan sepeda air.
english_translation: A recreation destination suitable for families. There is unlimited bicycle rental available. A car train ride and horseback riding can be alternatives for touring the valley. Interesting photo spots, an easily accessible valley location, and a spacious valley. There is also a lake equipped with paddle boats.

text:
Tempat nya bagus,tersedia toilet dan mushola, pemandangan nya bagus juga.
Banyak tempat untuk makan bersama keluarga, flying fox, ayunan, dan permainan anak
Tiket 5000 masih murah meriah.

Kekurangan cuman diperjalanan menuju kesana, beberapa titik masih jalan berbatu/rusak. Tapi hanya beberapa titik aja
english_translation:
The place is nice, with toilets and a prayer room available, and the view is also good.
There are many places to eat with family, flying fox, swings, and children's games.
The ticket price of 5000 is still very affordable.

The only drawback is the journey there, with some sections still having rocky/damaged roads. But it's only a few sections.

text:
Tempat yang sangat menarik untuk dikunjungi karena mereka memiliki beberapa jenis air terjun yang berbeda juga masih banyak monyet liar di sekitar area tersebut.
Mereka memiliki jalur pelacakan yang sangat panjang ke dalam hutan, sedikit menyeramkan tapi menurut saya masih layak untuk aktivitas keluarga
english_translation: A very interesting place to visit because they have several different types of waterfalls and still many wild monkeys around the area. They have very long tracking paths into the forest, a bit spooky but I think it's still worth it for family activities.

text: datang pas mepet bgt closing ticket, but overall puas, lumayan buat healling walau cuma sebentar.. toilet bersih, harga makanan di area parkir masih tergolong standart (gatau ya kalau yang di dalam).. gausah khawatir cape, karena nantinya ada mobil jemputan untuk pickup kita dari pintu keluar ke parkiran
english_translation: Arrived just before ticket closing, but overall satisfied, quite healing even though it was short.. the toilet was clean, food prices in the parking area are still considered standard (don't know about inside).. no need to worry about getting tired, because there will be a shuttle car to pick us up from the exit to the parking lot.

text: Tempatnya unik banyak bebungaan cuma tidak  terlalu besar.  Dan sayang kalau datang musim hujan dingin sekali dan ga bisa foto dong kena hujan. Taman bunganya ada resto untuk berteduh, menyajikan kopi,  teh, bandrek minuman khas bandung? Snack dan makanan berat seperti nasi goreng. Ada kebun tomat cherry
english_translation: The place is unique with many flowers, but not too big. And it's a shame if you come during the rainy season because it's very cold and you can't take photos because of the rain. The flower garden has a restaurant to shelter in, serving coffee, tea, bandrek, a typical Bandung drink, snacks, and heavy meals like fried rice. There is a cherry tomato garden.

text:
Sudah dua kali nge camp di gunung putri Lembang. Emang rasanya ingin kembali lagi nge camp disana... Udaranya sejuk, untuk mencapai tempat nge camp juga tidak terlalu jauh dari tempat parkir, cocok untuk nge camp keluarga.
Sekarang di atas sudah ada sarana MCK dan Musholla, jadi membuat tenang l, hehe...
english_translation:
I've camped twice at Gunung Putri Lembang. I really want to go camping there again... The air is cool, and getting to the campsite isn't too far from the parking lot, making it suitable for family camping.
Now there are bathroom and prayer room facilities available, which is reassuring, hehe...

text: Datanglah pagi2 segar, adem, dan masih sepi. Mushollanya bagus, bagus dan unik. Desain mushollanya suka deh. Untuk duduk2 maupun main nyaman dan seru. Ada juga panggung untuk acara ttt. Panggung yg kl dpake serasa lg manggung ditengah hutan yg rapi. Tpt kelincinya juga bersih ada keran u tpt cuci tangan.
english_translation: Come early morning, it's fresh, cool, and still quiet. The prayer room is nice, good, and unique. I really like the prayer room's design. It's comfortable and fun for sitting around or playing. There's also a stage for events. When used, the stage feels like you're performing in the middle of a neat forest. The rabbit enclosure is also clean, with a faucet for handwashing.

text: Jalan-jalan ke Tahura akan terasa lengkap jika sampai ke Curug Omas. Kalau di papan petunjuk awal jarak dari pintu pos 2 sampai ke tahura sekitar 4.3 KM. Jauh tapi terbayarkan dengan pemandangan yang menyenangkan. Lengkap rasanya setelah berjalan jauh, bisa duduk santai sambil menikmati bunyi air terjun.
english_translation: A trip to Tahura would feel complete if you reached Curug Omas. According to the initial signpost, the distance from the pos 2 entrance to Tahura is about 4.3 KM. It's far, but the pleasant scenery makes it worthwhile. It feels complete after a long walk, being able to sit back and enjoy the sound of the waterfall.

text: Cocok untuk refreshing, denger air curug yang ngalir otakk jadi fresh, enak tempatnyanya di bawah juga sudah ada warung, jadi ga perlu bawa makanan dari luar,k alau weekend selalu padat pengunjingnya, perjalanan naik sama turun tangganya lumayan berkeringet 😅, tidak rekomendasi untuk usia di atas 60 tahun
english_translation: Suitable for refreshing, listening to the sound of the waterfall flowing makes the mind fresh, the place is nice, there's already a stall below, so no need to bring food from outside. If it's the weekend, it's always crowded with visitors. The journey up and down the stairs is quite sweaty 😅, not recommended for people over 60 years old.

text:
Seru. Wajib dicoba. Jalan kaki ke Curug halimun nya turunan terus, jalan agak licin walaupun kering. Curug nya bagus, bisa berenang, warna airnya hijau. Perjalanan pulangnya tracknya naik terus.
HTM: 10.000
Sewa pelampung: 15.000

Paket komplit serunya dapet, keindahan alamnya dapet, bisa berenang. Mantap
english_translation:
Exciting. A must-try. Walking to Curug Halimun is all downhill, the path is a bit slippery even when dry. The waterfall is beautiful, you can swim, the water color is green. The way back is all uphill.
Entrance Fee: 10,000
Life Vest Rental: 15,000

The complete package offers excitement and natural beauty, and you can swim. Awesome.

text: Datang di siang hari, parkirnya gampang, pas mau masuk nanti akan ditawari mau pilih dengan tiket jembatan atau tidak. Kalau pilih dengan tiket jembatan, kita akan diajak jalan diatas jembatan gantung warna merah, kemudian difotoin sama mas nya. Begitu selesai lanjut ke wisata yg ada dibawah naik shuttle.
english_translation: Arrive during the day, parking is easy. When you are about to enter, you will be offered whether you want to choose the bridge ticket or not. If you choose the bridge ticket, you will be taken for a walk on the red suspension bridge, and then you will be photographed by the staff. Once finished, proceed to the attractions below by shuttle.

text:
Tempetnya bagus, luas tempatnya palkiran juga luas.
Tempatnya sejuk, akses jalannya mudah.
Tapi sayang tempat ibadahnya kecil.
Kalo pas rame pengunjungnya ngatrinya lama.
Saran... Kalo bisa tempat ibadahnya di perbesar.
Tapi ttep buat keluarga floating market recomended.
Ni dah ke 3 kalinya ke tempat ini.
english_translation:
The place is nice, spacious, and the parking area is also spacious.
The place is cool, the road access is easy.
But unfortunately, the prayer room is small.
If it's crowded with visitors, the wait is long.
Suggestion... If possible, make the prayer room bigger.
But it's still recommended for families at the Floating Market.
This is my third time visiting this place.

text:
tempatnya keren dengan banyak batuan karang purba
reminder aja. hati2 awal masuk stone garden banyak monyet liar. jangan bawa kantung kresek, karna mereka pasti ngikutin
lebih baik pake tas ransel kl mau bawa makanan
trus jangan lupa bawa buah2an ya. kasian mereka mengandalkan makanan dari pengunjung juga
english_translation:
The place is cool with many ancient coral rocks.
Just a reminder. Be careful when you first enter the Stone Garden, there are many wild monkeys. Don't bring plastic bags, because they will definitely follow you.
It's better to use a backpack if you want to bring food.
Also, don't forget to bring fruit. It's a pity they rely on food from visitors too.

text:
magical.

harga tiket masuk 30rb per orang & 19rb/motor. yg biasa diakses yaitu kawah ratu. spot fotonya juga banyak, rekomen untuk sedikit effort jalan ke atas lagi karena lumayan sepi dan puas foto2nya.

untuk kawah domas denger2 dari warlok sana, harus bayar guide lagi karena lokasinya masih hutan2 gitu
english_translation:
magical.

Entrance ticket price is 30,000 IDR per person & 19,000 IDR per motorcycle. The commonly accessed one is Kawah Ratu (Queen's Crater). There are also many photo spots. It's recommended to put in a little effort to walk further up because it's relatively quiet and you'll be satisfied with the photos.

For Kawah Domas (Domas Crater), I heard from the locals there, you have to pay for a guide again because the location is still quite forested.

text:
Cikole orchid park tempat yg sangat instragamble
Banyak spot foto
Di kelilingi hutan pinus
Recomen utk liburan brg keluarga atau pun org terkasih
Tiket masuk pun masih terjangkau
Dan SOP WHO msh di terapkan
Jgn lupa pake masker ya jg bawa handsanitizer juga jg jarak 😇😘
Happy weekend happy holiday man teman
english_translation:
Cikole Orchid Park, a very Instagrammable place.
Many photo spots.
Surrounded by pine forest.
Recommended for a holiday with family or loved ones.
The entrance ticket is still affordable.
And WHO SOPs are still being implemented.
Don't forget to wear a mask, bring hand sanitizer, and maintain distance 😇😘
Happy weekend, happy holiday, friends.

text: Biaya per orang iya,biaya kendaraan iya terus Klau mau cetak foto 70 ribu cuman dua foto, tiap wahana harus bayar lagi,pegawai nya gak ada ramah ramah nya Badd manners bgt, trus yang fotoin nya gak bisa ngatur kamera masa pencahayaan gelap,apa perlu d ajarin sama saya, mending training dulu deh pegawai nya
english_translation: Per person cost yes, vehicle cost yes, then if you want to print photos it's 70 thousand for just two photos, each attraction has to pay again, the employees are not friendly at all, very bad manners, then the one taking the photos can't even adjust the camera for lighting, it's dark, should I teach them? The employees should be trained first.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata yg ada di daerah Lembang, Bandung -Jawa Barat. Sangat cocok untuk liburan keluarga. Tersedia berbagai wahana wisata alam untuk anak-anak dan kuliner khas. Tempatnya asri dan nyaman, udara sejuk dan segar. Sarana dan prasarana cukup lengkap dan banyak spot foto yg bagus dan menarik.
english_translation: One of the tourist attractions in the Lembang area, Bandung - West Java. Very suitable for family holidays. Various natural tourist attractions for children and local culinary delights are available. The place is green and comfortable, with cool and fresh air. Facilities and infrastructure are quite complete and there are many good and interesting photo spots.

text: Tempatnya cukup luas. Hanya perlu beberapa jam untuk eksplorasi seluruh bagian. Banyak bagian yg exclude dari tiket masuk. Bunganya cantik dan terawat. Makanannya enak, booth coin mudah diakses. Harga makanan rata ±25k (berat) dan ±15k (ringan). Perahu variatif bentuknya. Banyak spot foto di seluruh bagian
english_translation: The place is quite spacious. It only takes a few hours to explore the entire area. Many sections are excluded from the entrance ticket. The flowers are beautiful and well-maintained. The food is delicious, and the coin booths are easily accessible. Food prices are around ±25k (heavy) and ±15k (light). The boats come in various shapes. There are many photo spots throughout the area.

text: Udaranya sejuuuuk..dingiiin.. jauh dri pusat kota.berada di daerah Bandung perbatasan Subang..dri jalan raya sekitar 10 mnit untuk mencapai puncakny..jalan menuju ke atas sudah beraspal bagus tpi berkelok-kelok kanan kiri hutan tpi klo sudah sampai puncak smua terbayar dg suguhan pemandangan yg bgitu indah
english_translation: The air is cooool.. freezing.. far from the city center. Located in the Bandung area bordering Subang.. about 10 minutes from the main road to reach the top.. the road leading up is good asphalt but winding, with forests on the right and left, but once you reach the top, everything is paid off by the incredibly beautiful scenery.

text: Ada beberapa tmpat yg ga ke urus,bnyk pambatas yg berkarat keropos jg ada yg hilang ga kebayang kalau ada anak kecil yg bermain di sekitar sana,jg atapnya sudah rusak benar2 ga ke urus tp terima kasih utk pemandangan dan spot2 utk berfotonya di tambah pedagang2 cinderamata yg ramah mau membantu utk berfoto
english_translation: There are some neglected places, many rusty and corroded fences, some are also missing. I can't imagine if there were small children playing around there, and the roof is also really damaged and neglected. But thank you for the views and photo spots, plus the friendly souvenir vendors who are willing to help take photos.

text: Tempatnya menarik, ada berbagai macam outbond seperti flying fox, paint ball, jembatan tali, jembatan goyang, turun tebing. Selain itu terdapat banyak sekali pohon pinus dan kebun strawberry. Terdapat rumah hobbit yang membuat Grafika Cikole semakin menarik untuk dijadikan tempat berlibur dan berfoto-foto.
english_translation: The place is interesting, there are various outbound activities such as flying fox, paintball, rope bridges, shaking bridges, and rappelling. Besides that, there are many pine trees and strawberry gardens. There is a hobbit house, which makes Grafika Cikole even more attractive as a holiday destination and for taking photos.

text: Nih kak, alternatif liburan murah sekitaran bandung tepatnya di padalarang namanya stone garden, yup disini kakak bisa liat keren nya tumpukan batu2 alami bagaikan bekas peninggalan bangunan purba, yang pasti buat pencinta foto2 menangtang, bolju nih, tiket masuk nya 10.000 tapi pastiin ga musim ujan ya...
english_translation: Here, sis, a cheap holiday alternative around Bandung, specifically in Padalarang, is called Stone Garden. Yep, here you can see the cool natural rock formations like ancient ruins. Definitely a challenge for photo lovers, so worth it! The entrance ticket is 10,000, but make sure it's not the rainy season...

text: Sudah lama tidak ke sini. Nggak bosen-bosen ke sini. Banyak perubahan yang baik. Spot-spot, pagar-pagar banyak diperbaiki. Pedagang2 tertib di sini. Toilet2 juga bersih dan rapih. Kalau mau enak emang mustinya hari weekdays ya ke sini. Bayangan saya kalau weekend crowded. Sayangnya kawas upas nggak dibuka.
english_translation: It's been a long time since I've been here. I never get tired of coming here. There have been many good changes. The spots and fences have been greatly improved. The vendors here are orderly. The toilets are also clean and tidy. If you want a pleasant experience, you really should come here on weekdays. I imagine it would be crowded on weekends. Unfortunately, the upas area isn't open.

text: tiket masuk 30rb parkir 10, trs nanti kalo mau kulineran bayarnya pake kepingan koin gitu. tempatnya nyaman buat santai bareng keluarga maupun teman, pilihan jajanan nya lumayan banyak dr pisang goreng, tahu gejrot sampai nasi pecel jg ada. untuk weekend biasanya slalu penuh jd  susah dapet tempat duduknya
english_translation: Admission is 30,000 IDR, parking is 10,000 IDR. Later, if you want to eat, you pay with tokens. The place is comfortable for relaxing with family or friends. There are quite a lot of snack options, from fried bananas and tahu gejrot to nasi pecel. It's usually always crowded on weekends, so it's hard to get a seat.

text: Obyek wisata yang sangat bagus. Pengalaman mengesankan saya terutama di jembatan gantungnya yang bisa melihat ke bawah, bolongannya terasa seperti sensasi jatuh ke jurang. Bagi yang phobia/takut akan ketinggian sebaiknya berhati-hati atau siapkan keberanian sebelum mencoba menyeberangi jembatan gantungnya.
english_translation: A very good tourist attraction. My impressive experience was especially on the suspension bridge, where looking down through the gaps felt like a sensation of falling into an abyss. Those with a phobia or fear of heights should be careful or prepare their courage before trying to cross the suspension bridge.

text: View yang bagus untuk camping dan menikmati indahnya kota bandung dari ketinggian. Harga camping disini per malam standar saja tidak terlalu mahal. Dan juga fasilitas oke ada mushalla dan toilet serta warung di dekat parkirannya. Masih asri hutannya disini. Cocok untuk camping plus outbond training disini.
english_translation: Great view for camping and enjoying the beauty of Bandung city from above. The camping price here per night is standard and not too expensive. The facilities are also okay, with a prayer room, toilets, and a small shop near the parking area. The forest here is still pristine. Suitable for camping plus outbound training here.

text: Tempatnya bagus, bunga2 berbagai macam jenis bermekaran dan warna warni, terdapat juga tanaman sayur dan buah yg bisa dibeli disana. Bisa mendapat pendidikan soal tanam menanam juga. Harga tiket masuk 15rb, untuk kamera besar bayar lagi 50rb. Tapi untuk kamera hp bebas biaya. Bisa beli bibit2 tanaman juga.
english_translation: The place is nice, various kinds of flowers are blooming in many colors, there are also vegetables and fruits that can be bought there. You can also get education about planting. The entrance ticket is 15,000, and there's an additional charge of 50,000 for a large camera. However, mobile phone cameras are free. You can also buy plant seedlings.

text:
Tempat yang cocok buat ngecamp dan melepas penat di sibuknya rutinitas harian...
Buat yang mau menikmati quality time disini bisa jadi destinasi yang cocok untuk keluarga apalagi yang seneng outbond pas des....
Ada juga tempat menginap kaya tenda gitu pokoknya yang suka tidur di alam bebas disini tempatnya
english_translation:
A suitable place for camping and relieving stress from the busy daily routine...
For those who want to enjoy quality time, this can be a suitable destination for families, especially those who like outbound activities during the dry season.
There are also places to stay like tents, so for those who like sleeping in the great outdoors, this is the place.

text:
Masih sama seperti dulu, tapi ada jalur ke kawah yg ditutup, antisipasi adanya pergerakan aktifitas gunung berapi.
Tiket masuk lokal 30.000 (harga per 18 Oktober 2020). Untuk ke kawah Domas harus bayar tiket lagi, per 1-5 org 100.000.
Manajemennya sepertinya sudah bagus, penataan kawasannya juga sudah rapi.
english_translation:
Still the same as before, but there is a path to the crater that is closed, anticipating volcanic activity.
Local entrance ticket is 30,000 (price as of October 18, 2020). To go to the Domas crater, you have to pay an additional ticket, 100,000 per 1-5 people.
The management seems to be good, and the area arrangement is also neat.

text:
Awalnya ngira bakalan tinggi banget curugnya (air terjun) ternyata nggk terlalu tinggi,
Kalau kesini pagi-pagi udaranya masih bagus banget, super dingin menurut saya. Disini bagus fasilitasnya, ada kolam air hangat tapi waktu itu saya nggk nyoba. Menurut saya disini bagus kalo untuk foto". Lumayan recommend
english_translation:
At first, I thought the waterfall would be very high, but it wasn't that tall.
If you come here in the morning, the air is still really good, super cold in my opinion. The facilities here are good, there's a hot spring pool, but I didn't try it at the time. In my opinion, this place is good for photos. Quite recommendable.

text: So beautiful. Ada flying fox, panahan. Sungai nya bagus, bisa buat mandi, dan yang paling bagus itu pemandangan waktu tracking ke curug tilu, meski curug tilu nya biasa aja, tp yg bagus itu waktu tracking nya. Ga terlalu jauh juga utk tracking, sekitar 2km, 30menitan. Bawa jaket anti air, karna sering hujan
english_translation: So beautiful. There's a flying fox, archery. The river is nice, good for swimming, and the best part is the view during the trek to Curug Tilu. Even though Curug Tilu itself is just okay, the trek is what's great. It's not too far for the trek, about 2km, 30 minutes. Bring a waterproof jacket, because it often rains.

text: Puncaknya lembang, jalanan naik turun cuaca sejuk dingin tp saat ksna kawah sdng aktif jd disarankan memakai masker krn bau blerang menyengat. But semua aman, wisata alam betapa indahnya ciptaan-Mu. Bisa foto dari atas dgn jalur yg sudah disediakan dan ada spot foto lainnya. Cocok bgt buat merefresh sejenak
english_translation: The peak of the plateau, roads go up and down, the weather is cool and cold, but when you get there, the crater is active so it's recommended to wear a mask because the sulfur smell is pungent. But everything is safe, nature tourism, how beautiful is Your creation. You can take photos from above with the provided path and there are other photo spots. Very suitable for a refreshing break.

text:
Waktu kesana tiketnya 15ribu parkir 2rb.
Dateng pas sepii.. jadi enak banget serasa milik sendiri hehe jd ga khawatir dan juga aman nyaman ga banyak orang😂
Tempatnya cocok banget untuk yg suka pemandangan..
Naik bebek2kan 45rb 30 menit..
Harga makanan standar 20-38rban..
Pemandangan bagus, bersih pokoknya!!
english_translation:
When I went there, the ticket was 15 thousand, parking was 2 thousand.
Arrived when it was quiet.. so it was really nice, felt like it was all mine hehe so not worried and also safe, comfortable, not many people😂
The place is very suitable for those who like scenery..
Riding the pedal boats was 45 thousand for 30 minutes..
Food prices are standard, 20-38 thousand..
The view is good, clean, overall!!

text: Seru banget berkunjung ke floating Market.. Tempatnya luas, adem, bawa anak juga ramah bgt karena banyak wahana dan bisa liat hewan hewan juga.. Tapi sayangnya ga nyoba wahana yg baru rainbow slide karena kesiangan dan udah bNyak pengnjung. Next coba kesini lagi buat liburan keluarga dan nyoba rainbow slide
english_translation: Visiting the Floating Market was so fun! The place is spacious and cool. Bringing kids is also very friendly because there are many attractions and you can see animals too. But unfortunately, I didn't try the new rainbow slide attraction because it was too late and there were already many visitors. Next time, I'll try to come here again for a family holiday and try the rainbow slide.

text: Tempatnya sangat bagus untuk foto. Hanya saja kalau siang hari udara sangat terik. Lokasinya tidak terlalu jauh dari jalan raya. Tiket masuknya berlapis-lapis. Pertama izin lintas lingkungan, kedua tiket masuk perorangan, ketiga biaya parkir. Untuk fasilitas lumayan lah... Cuma jalan masuk perlu diperbaiki.
english_translation: The place is very good for photos. It's just that during the day the air is very hot. The location is not too far from the main road. The entrance ticket is layered. First, a neighborhood permit, second, individual entrance tickets, third, parking fees. The facilities are okay... Only the entrance road needs improvement.

text: Htm 50/orng mobil 10,,wood brigade 20/otng grtis plying fox,, udara segar, lmn dngn hijau,,cocok untuk refresing  pkoknya,, hny akses jln trunan,, jd wjib pke alskaki nymn dan g licin ya,, jlnnya papingblok bolong besar jd bw stroler nyangkut2,,, mg next akses untuk stroler/kursi roda bs lbh dbkin nymn ya,,
english_translation: HTML 50/orange Mobil 10, Wood Brigade 20/orange free, Plying Fox, fresh air, green lemon pond, perfect for refreshing overall. Only accessible via Trunan road, so wear comfortable, non-slip shoes. The path is made of large-holed paving blocks, so strollers can get stuck. Hopefully, stroller/wheelchair access can be improved next time.

text:
This place is awesome...
Asli keren banget, pemandangannya keren banget.
Batu-batunya banyak dan oh iya disini panas bangett temans kalo siang, karena tempatnya terbuka... yuks main ke Stone garden... aku kesini dari Bandung naik kereta lokal bayarnya Rp 5.000 trus, naik ojek online. Tiket masuknya Rp 8.000
english_translation:
This place is awesome...
It's really cool, the scenery is amazing.
There are many rocks and oh yes, it's very hot here during the day, friends, because it's an open space... let's go play at Stone Garden... I came here from Bandung by local train, it cost Rp 5,000, then I took an online motorbike taxi. The entrance ticket is Rp 8,000.

text: Masya Allah... Cakep banget pemandangan nya. Pas di pintu gerbang ngerasa kaya mau masuk ke Jurassic Park. Yang menantang buat jompo belia kaya saya ya jalan kaki yang lumayan jauh. Tapi worth it. Pemandangan bagus, adem, sejuk, asri. Btw enak ya ditempat dingin, kelayapan seharian juga ga bikin keringetan.
english_translation: Masya Allah... the view is so beautiful. At the gate, I felt like I was entering Jurassic Park. The challenging part for an "elderly youth" like me is the rather long walk. But it's worth it. The view is good, it's cool, refreshing, and green. By the way, it's nice in a cold place; roaming around all day doesn't make you sweat.

text: Hari sabtu ke hot springnya sama keluarga, pp. Kita kesana jam 5 sore sampe jam 7 malem kurang. Sepi walaupun weekendd. Bersih tempatnyaa. Trus ada kolam gede dan ada kolam kecil yg terpisah sama bambu2 gtu. Klo vip, bisa ke yg bambu2. Harga tiketnya cukup pricy buat aku, tp worth it bgt dengan fasilitasnya.
english_translation: Saturday, went to the hot springs with family, round trip. We got there at 5 PM and left a little before 7 PM. It was quiet even though it was the weekend. The place was clean. Then there was a big pool and a small pool separated by bamboos. If you go VIP, you can access the bamboo area. The ticket price was quite pricey for me, but totally worth it given the facilities.

text:
Cocok buat orang-orang yang suka alam.
Udaranya sejuk dan buat saya suasananya romantis
Banyak spot foto yang instagramable.
Butuh waktu seharian disana karena banyak spot yang harus dikunjungi.
Harus siap capek juga karena tempatnya luas.
Tapi tempat ini tutup jam 5 sore.
Harga tiket masuknya 30 ribu/orang.
english_translation:
Suitable for people who like nature.
The air is cool and makes the atmosphere romantic for me.
Lots of Instagrammable photo spots.
It takes a whole day there because there are many spots to visit.
You also have to be prepared to be tired because the place is vast.
But this place closes at 5 PM.
The entrance ticket price is 30 thousand per person.

text: Tmpt yg sangat bgs buat pencinta tnmn dan yg sk hijau3 seperti sy...lmyn jg luasnya utk olahraga in kaki. Udaranya jg sejuk bgt , jd biar trn naik jlnnya ..g terlalu gobyos keringet. Cm...kok hrga anggreknya sgt jauh lbh mhl dr yg di luaran ya...jd ..hnya sekedar cuci mata aja utk liat koleksi anggrek disini
english_translation: A very good place for plant lovers and those who like green things like me...the space is quite large for walking/exercising. The air is also very cool, so even if you go up and down the path...you won't sweat too much. It's just...why are the orchid prices so much more expensive than outside...so...it's just for window shopping to see the orchid collection here.

text:
Curug layung masuknya dari ciwangun Indah camp, masuk awal 5000 terus masuk lagi bayar 15000 sehabis itu ada karcis lagi 10000, tapi untung nya terbayarkan dengan pemandangan nya
Jalan yang ditempuh untuk nyampe lumayan tracking selama 1 jam kurang lebih 2km,tidak disarankan dateng sehabis hujan Karena licin
english_translation:
Curug Layung's entrance is from Ciwangun Indah Camp. The initial entrance fee is 5,000, then another 15,000 to enter further. After that, there's another ticket for 10,000. However, the beautiful scenery makes it worth it.

The journey to get there is quite a trek, approximately 1 hour and less than 2km. It's not recommended to visit right after it rains because it's slippery.

text: Tempatnya keren, cocok untuk keluarga, aksesnya bagus, tiket masuk murah, banyak gazebo untuk beristirahat, kurang petunjuk arah dari jalan raya utama. Hati-hati barang bawaan terutama makanan karena ada monyet yang suka ambil. Waktu yang cocok pagi hari, jam 10AM sudah lumayan panas. Waktu buka 06AM - 06PM.
english_translation: The place is cool, suitable for families, has good access, cheap entrance fee, many gazebos for resting, lacks directions from the main highway. Be careful with your belongings, especially food, because there are monkeys that like to snatch them. The best time to visit is in the morning, it's already quite hot by 10 AM. Opening hours are 6 AM - 6 PM.

text: Cara yang sangat buruk jika pergi dengan sepeda motor karena jalanannya penuh batu. tapi itu membayar lebih jika datang dan melihat betapa indahnya tempat ini. Anda bisa berkeliling hutan, camping ground juga melihat air terjun. Jika Anda pergi bersama keluarga, arena ini adalah zona nyaman untuk anak-anak.
english_translation: A very bad way to go by motorcycle because the roads are full of rocks. But it pays off more if you come and see how beautiful this place is. You can go around the forest, camping grounds, and see the waterfall. If you go with family, this area is a comfort zone for children.

text: Menyenangkan liburan disini, apalagi prosotannya, nahih banget ampek 2x naik. Kebersihannya lumayan lah walau masih ada orang2 yg suka buang sampah sembarangan. Lumayan sih untuk jalan, menguras tenaga krn luas banget. Untuk makanan lumayan, cuman rada ribetnya pake koin yang kalo sisa ga bisa dbalikin lagi.
english_translation: A fun holiday here, especially the slides, so cool I rode them twice. The cleanliness is okay, although there are still people who like to litter. It's quite good for walking, it's draining because it's so vast. The food is okay, it's just a bit of a hassle with the coins that can't be returned if there are leftovers.

text: Taman Bunga Begonia ini sebetulnya memiliki kawasan yang tidak begitu luas namun ditata agar dapat dinikmati pemandangannya sebagai tempat untuk selfie bersama pasangan, teman dan keluarga. disarankan tidak datang pada weekend karena arus lalu lintas menuju lembang selalu padat pada saat weekend atau liburan.
