english_translation: This Begonia Flower Garden is not very large, but it is arranged to be enjoyed for its scenery, making it a good spot for selfies with your partner, friends, and family. It is advised not to visit on weekends because traffic towards Lembang is always heavy on weekends or holidays.

text: Kalo kamu pingin olahraga tapi bosen jogging di komplek, mungkin tempat ini bisa dijadikan destinasi. Tempatnya luas banget sampe pegel jalannya. Hhe. Menyejukkan mata jalan sambil liat ijo2 plus bebungaan yg dirawat dg apik. Banyak juga wahana tambahan kayak flying fox, trus meniti jembatan yg berayun2 gitu.
english_translation: If you want to exercise but are bored of jogging around the complex, maybe this place can be a destination. It's so spacious that walking around makes you tired. Hehe. It's refreshing to walk and see greenery plus well-maintained flowers. There are also many additional attractions like a flying fox and crossing a swaying bridge.

text: Bagus, namun pengelolaan sampahnya kurang, dan peraturan mengenai membawa makanan tidak ada, karena itu ada yg membawa makanan ke atas alhasil yg membawa makanan menjadi merasa takut karena di ganggu sma monyet yang banyak berkeliaran bebas d sana. Mungkin bisa di beri aturan dilarang membawa makanan ke atas.
english_translation: Good, but waste management is lacking, and there are no regulations regarding bringing food. Because of this, some people bring food up, resulting in them feeling scared because they are disturbed by the many monkeys roaming freely there. Perhaps a rule could be implemented prohibiting food from being brought up.

text: Seru nih bisa ajak anak2 main ke floating market, khusunya ke kota mini...disini anak2 bisa latihan profesi..ada jadi chef, suster, pemadam kebakaran, polisi, dekor kue, salon dll, nah kalau utk chef atau yg profesinya bikin2 gtu..nanti hasil karyanya boleh dibawa, yg pasti anak2 excited bgt...emaknya juga😅 …
english_translation: It's exciting to bring the kids to play at the floating market, especially to the mini town... here the kids can practice professions... there's being a chef, nurse, firefighter, police officer, cake decorator, salon, etc. For chefs or professions that involve making things, the results of their work can be taken home. The kids are definitely very excited... and so are the moms 😅...

text: Banyak wahana di sini. Setiap wahama kudu bayar lagee...lumayan mahal sih menurutku. Tiket masuk 40ribu. Dapet tips dari bapak sopir grab bahwa sebaiknya kalo dateng ke sini pas pagi banget. Biar gak kejebak macet. Last but not least, have fun aja di sini. Nikmati jalan kaki sebagai olahraga yang menyehatkan.
english_translation: There are many rides here. Each ride has to be paid for again... it's quite expensive, in my opinion. The entrance ticket is 40,000. I got a tip from the Grab driver that it's best to come here very early in the morning. So you don't get stuck in traffic. Last but not least, just have fun here. Enjoy walking as a healthy exercise.

text:
Salah satu tempat yang wajib dikunjungi di Bandung Barat. Kalau mau datang, lebih baik pas musim kemarau, airnya lebih jernih.

Siap stamina buat ke tempat ini. Dari parkiran masih harus jalan sekitar 45 menitan. Tapi sepanjang perjalanan sejuk melewati sungai dan hutan. Banyak juga warung saat di perjalanan.
english_translation:
One of the must-visit places in West Bandung. If you want to visit, it's better during the dry season, the water is clearer.

Prepare your stamina for this place. From the parking lot, you still have to walk for about 45 minutes. But the journey is cool, passing by rivers and forests. There are also many small food stalls along the way.

text:
Ini Di Dalam kawasan Punclut.
Harga masuk 60 ribu biasa Dan 75 ribu jika mau jembatan golden gate.
Fasilitas bagus Dan tempat Santorini, Colosseum, Eiffel tower, Sphinx, Golden gate bridge bagus.
Staff ramah Dan sopan Dan mau Bantu cepat.
Parkir sedkt atas jadi harus turun tangga.
Ada Mobil untuk Pulang pergi
english_translation:
This is inside the Punclut area.
Entrance fee is 60 thousand for regular access and 75 thousand if you want the Golden Gate bridge.
Good facilities and good replicas of Santorini, Colosseum, Eiffel Tower, Sphinx, Golden Gate Bridge.
Staff are friendly, polite, and willing to help quickly.
Parking is a bit higher up, so you have to go down stairs.
There are cars for round trips.

text: Telah bermalam di sini pada tahun 1995, tahun lalu. 2001 dengan ozog gubrag, pupuk olegun!! Hahaha... sayang bukan era digital... dokumentasi selebihnya dari tahun 1998!! Dahulu masih banyak monyet... di pagi hari" berkerumun di sisi tenda! Bangun dari tidur dengan tenda terbuka ke mata monyet...!!! Hahaha
english_translation: Stayed here in 1995, last year. 2001 with ozog gubrag, olegun fertilizer!! Hahaha... too bad it wasn't the digital era... the rest of the documentation is from 1998!! There used to be a lot of monkeys... in the morning, crowding the side of the tent! Waking up from sleep with the tent open to monkey eyes...!!! Hahaha

text:
Kalo mau foto-foto cantik ini cukup menarik buat d kunjungin. Lokasi nya deket dari parkiran mobil. Apalagi motor masih bs masuk lagi ke parkiran dalem, cm track nya tu semen melingkar gitu kaya saluran aer (bentuk nya kaya pipa setengah lingkaran) lupa gk foto / video.
Spot foto nya lumayan banyak disini 😍😍😍😍
english_translation:
If you want to take beautiful photos, this is quite interesting to visit. The location is close to the car park. Moreover, motorcycles can still enter the inner parking area, but the track is circular cement like a water channel (shaped like a semi-circular pipe). I forgot to take photos/videos.
There are quite a lot of photo spots here 😍😍😍😍

text: Tempatnya enak, parkiran juga luas. Mungkin belum semua pembangunannya selesai. Baru beberapa saja yang selesai. Harga tiket masuknya terjangkau. Tempatnya juga tidak terlalu jauh dari tempat wisata yang lain, jadi bisa sekalian mampir ke tempat-tempat wisata lainnya yang ada di kawasan lembang dan sekitarnya.
english_translation: The place is nice, and the parking is also spacious. Perhaps not all of the construction is finished yet. Only a few parts are completed. The entrance ticket price is affordable. The place is also not too far from other tourist attractions, so you can stop by other tourist spots in and around Lembang as well.

text: Kawasan ini sudah tertata rapi. Spot photo banyak di sana sini. Pedagangnya siap membantu bila kamu minta d photoin, free lohh. Ramai pengunjung baik lokal maupun wisatawan asing. Souvenir dan aneka dagangan banyak. Ga kuatir bila ingin ngemil, jajan2, dan ngopi. Ada masjid besar utk menunaikan sholat 5 waktu.
english_translation: This area is well-organized. There are many photo spots everywhere. The vendors are ready to help if you ask them to take your photo, it's free! It's crowded with both local visitors and foreign tourists. There are many souvenirs and various goods. Don't worry if you want to snack, buy food, or have coffee. There is a large mosque for performing the five daily prayers.

text:
Wisata treking menyusuri hutan cocok bgt buat yg nyari ketenangan, persiapan buat naik gunung yg lebih tinggi lagi.
Keinget dulu ke tangkuban perahu, kawan ngajakinnya lewat jalur biasa yg bisa dilalui motor tapi saya lebih milih ngajak lewat jalur ini sekalian olahraga hehehe.
Pokoknya wajib bgt dicoba deh 👍👍
english_translation:
Trekking tourism through the forest is very suitable for those seeking peace and preparation for climbing higher mountains.
I remember when I went to Tangkuban Perahu, my friend invited me to take the usual path that motorcycles could use, but I preferred to take this path to get some exercise, hehehe.
Definitely a must-try! 👍👍

text: Jalan menuju puncak gunung tanjakan dan tikungan tajam,, hindari pennggunaan handphone, tetap konsentrasi berkendara, begitu juga pada saat kembalinya turunan dan tikungan tajam. jagan sekali2 mematikan mesin atau menetralkan porsneling kendraan anda, karna akan menyebabkan tidak terkendalinya saat pengereman,
english_translation: The road to the summit of the mountain is steep and has sharp turns. Avoid using your mobile phone and remain focused on driving. The same applies when descending, which also has steep slopes and sharp turns. Never turn off your engine or put your vehicle in neutral, as this will cause loss of control during braking.

text:
Destinasi wisata di Bandung, untuk belanja di Floating market kita wajib menukar rupiah dng koin nilai tertentu. Mohon diperhatikan koin tidak bisa di uangkan jika lebih.
Ada beberapa wahana, yg terkenal adalah seluncuran rainbow. Cuma pas anak sy naik dpt bagian tengah ban nya macet  berhenti di tengah jalan.
english_translation:
Attractions in Bandung, to shop at Floating Market, we must exchange rupiah for coins of a certain value. Please note that unused coins cannot be exchanged for money if there's a remainder.
There are several rides, the most famous is the rainbow slide. However, when my child went on it, the middle part of the tube got stuck and stopped midway.

text:
Salah satu lokasi perkemahan yang direkomendasikan. Tidak jauh dari Bandung, dekat dengan Villa Istana Bunga.
Curug nya banyak dan ada yang kids friendly, tinggal bawa perahu karet ... anak2 bisa senang main di sungai nya.
Kekurangannya hanya di toilet nya, jika dibuat lebih bersih.....maka akan lebih mangtab.
english_translation:
One of the recommended camping locations. Not far from Bandung, close to Villa Istana Bunga.
There are many waterfalls, and some are kid-friendly. Just bring an inflatable boat... the kids can have fun playing in the river.
The only downside is the toilet; if it were cleaner, it would be even better.

text: Ini tempat yang enak untuk acara out bond kantor. Fasilitatornya bisa membawakan games dengan baik, ditambah lagi ada beberapa wahana yang cukup menarik, misalnya Flying Fox, Turun Tebing, atau Jembatan Gantung. Selain itu, ada juga paket wisata lain seperti melihat rusa, memetik buah/sayur, atau yang lainnya.
english_translation: This is a great place for company outbound events. The facilitators can run the games well, plus there are several quite interesting attractions, such as Flying Fox, Cliff Descent, or Suspension Bridge. Besides that, there are also other tour packages such as seeing deer, picking fruits/vegetables, or others.

text: Jalan kedalamnya memang belum bagus, tapi worth it karena dalemnya bagus banget buat foto-foto, pokoknya jangan sampe lupa bawa kamera sama air mineral kalau kesini. Pasti diatasnya betah deh ngeliat pemandangannya. Oh iya, petugas yang ada disananya juga baik banget loh suka nunjukin tempat foto yang bagus😂 …
english_translation: The road leading into it isn't good yet, but it's worth it because the interior is really great for photos. Make sure not to forget to bring a camera and mineral water if you come here. You'll definitely be comfortable up there enjoying the view. Oh, and the staff there are also really kind, they often show you good spots for photos 😂…

text: tempatnya oke, pelayanan oke, hanya akses ke tempatnya sungguh nanjak., selain itu di dalam untuk informasi mushola agak kurang informatif kurang adanya tanda2., untuk harga sesuailah namanya juga tempat wisata., disana klo untuk orang dewasa kebanyakan untuk foto2., petugas ramah2 dan mau membantu untuk foto..
english_translation: The place is okay, the service is okay, only the access to the place is really uphill. Besides that, inside, information about the prayer room is a bit lacking, with not enough signs. As for the price, it's appropriate, it's a tourist spot after all. For adults there, it's mostly for taking pictures. The staff are friendly and willing to help with photos.

text: Tempat wisata outbond yang cukup bagus. Ga cuma buat outbond bisa juga buat lokasi foto prewedding atau foto booklet. Tempatnya cukup bersih ada restorannya juga dan toko oleh oleh. Waktu kesana pas lagi musim hujan jadi agak becek dan licin mungkin persediaan bawa sendal dan payung kalau kesana pas musim hujan
english_translation: A quite good outbound tourist spot. Not only for outbound activities, it can also be used as a location for pre-wedding photos or booklet photos. The place is quite clean, there is also a restaurant and a souvenir shop. When I visited, it was the rainy season, so it was a bit muddy and slippery. It's probably best to bring sandals and an umbrella if you go during the rainy season.

text: Sudah 4x wisata ke kawah ratu gunung tanggungan parahu. Ada banyak perubahan di tiap kunjungannya. Sudah lebih tertata, rapih dan bersih. Mungkin karena pandemi, suasananya jauh lebih sepi. Namun sebagian pedagang, petugas dan pendukung sdh mengikuti protokol kesehatan... Moga segera membaik dan kembali normal.
english_translation: This is my 4th trip to the Ratu crater of Mount Tanggungan Parahu. There have been many changes with each visit. It's become more organized, tidy, and clean. Perhaps due to the pandemic, the atmosphere is much quieter. However, some vendors, staff, and supporters are already following health protocols. Hopefully, things will improve soon and return to normal.

text: Tempat wisata yg masih mudah untuk dijangakau dg harga yg terjangkau, kalau pake mobil bayar 10 rbu, untuk tiket masuk 8 rbu /orng dan parkir 7 rbu. Bagus buat foto" dan liat sunset, ada beberapa pondok" untuk duduk", cocoklah buat yg mau pacaran atau jalan breng kluarga karna track buat naik gak terlalu sulit.
english_translation: A tourist spot that is still easy to reach and affordable. If you use a car, it costs 10,000 Rupiah for parking. The entrance ticket is 8,000 Rupiah per person, and parking is 7,000 Rupiah. It's good for taking pictures and watching the sunset. There are several huts to sit in, suitable for those who want to date or go out with family because the track to ascend is not too difficult.

text:
Momen yang menyenangkan untuk menikmati alam bersahabat-sahabatku yang selalu kubanggakan

saat itu 2014, kami pergi kesini
sudah berbeda dengan tahun sekarang ini
Dulu belum banyak spot dan wahana yang bisa dinikmati seperti sekarang

namun keasrian
Tali agar tidak tersesat di daerah pegunungan
Wah asri sekali
english_translation:
A pleasant moment to enjoy nature with my friends, whom I am always proud of.

It was 2014, we went here.
It's already different from this year.
Back then, there weren't as many spots and attractions to enjoy as there are now.

However, the natural beauty...
A rope to avoid getting lost in the mountainous area.
Wow, it's so beautiful and natural.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk objek wisata akan tetapi jika menggunakan google map hati2 bisa salah jalan di tempat titik tertentu tidak ada sinyal lebih baik tanya saja biar lebih aman, ditempat objek wisatanya jalannya masih belum baik sehingga harus menggunakan jasa ojek warga setempat itu pun jalannya masih tanah
english_translation: A good place for tourist attractions, but if you use Google Maps, be careful as you might get lost at certain points due to lack of signal. It's better to ask for directions to be safer. The road to the tourist attraction is still not good, so you have to use the local residents' motorcycle taxi service, and even then, the road is still dirt.

text: HTM 35rb belum biaya spot permainan bayar lagi yg rata2 juga 35rb. Bny spot selfi yg juga bayar. Dilarang membawa makanan dr luar. Mandi air panas HTM 70rb hari biasa, 90rb weekend dg fasilitas handuk dan boleh masuk 4 kolam air panas yg tersedia. Ada spa dg aroma therapy. Cafe dg view air terjun. Rumah hobbit.
english_translation: Entrance fee is 35,000 IDR, not including the game spot fee which is also around 35,000 IDR. There are also selfie spots that require payment. Bringing outside food is prohibited. Hot spring entrance fee is 70,000 IDR on weekdays and 90,000 IDR on weekends, which includes a towel and access to 4 available hot spring pools. There is a spa with aromatherapy. A cafe with a waterfall view. Hobbit house.

text: tempat wisatanya luas, banyak spot juga, jajanan di floating marketnya juga beragam, pembayaran jajanan menggunakan koin, jadi kita tukar koin dulu, ada danau yang luas, bisa mengitari danau dengan perahu, ada kota mininya juga, dll, biaya masuk floating market + kota mini 40k, kupon bisa ditukar dengan minuman
english_translation: The tourist spot is spacious, with many spots. The snacks at the floating market are also diverse. Payment for snacks uses coins, so we exchange coins first. There's a large lake where you can go around on a boat. There's also a mini city, etc. The entrance fee for the floating market + mini city is 40k. Coupons can be exchanged for drinks.

text: tempatnya bagus sekali. masih jarang yang kesini. jalana aspalnnya sudah bagus, tapi dari parkiran menuju ke lokasi treknya lumayan berat. harus jalan kurang lebih 2 jam. dengan curamnya trek. tapi sebanding sama pemandangan di curugnya. bisa main air juga.cuma belum ada wc bersih, dan belum diurus dengan baik.
english_translation: The place is very good. Not many people come here yet. The asphalt road is already good, but from the parking lot to the track location it's quite tough. You have to walk for approximately 2 hours with the steepness of the track. But it's worth it for the view at the waterfall. You can also play in the water. It's just that there are no clean restrooms yet, and it's not well managed.

text:
Kesini waktu Desember 2022, tempatnya luas dan sejuk cocok untuk menghilangkan stress. Tuker tiketnya sama coffee latte terus duduk di danaunya, asli ngilangin penat banget.
Mungkin next nya bikin 1 tempat khusus smooking area biar orang" yg pure mau nikmatin udara sejuk ga terganggu sama asap orang yg ngerokok
english_translation:
Came here in December 2022, the place is spacious and cool, perfect for de-stressing. Exchanged the ticket for a coffee latte and then sat by the lake, it was truly refreshing.
Maybe next time create a dedicated smoking area so people who purely want to enjoy the cool air aren't bothered by smoke from smokers.

text:
Tempat nya luas, banyak spot selfie yg bagus..
Tempat yg nyaman jg bawa anak kecil..
Ada taman", bisa liat dan ngasih makan binatang kaya kelinci, ayam, kambing, angsa, ikan, musang..
Makanan variatif harganya mulai 15 k
Tiket masuk weekday 20k, weekend 25k tiket bisa ditukar minuman coklat/kopi latte/lemon tea
english_translation:
The place is spacious, with many good selfie spots.
It's also a comfortable place to bring small children.
There are gardens, where you can see and feed animals like rabbits, chickens, goats, geese, fish, and civets.
Food options are varied, with prices starting from 15k.
Entrance tickets are 20k on weekdays and 25k on weekends. Tickets can be exchanged for a chocolate drink, coffee latte, or lemon tea.

text: The most beautiful waterfall yang pernah ku datengin. Indah bangettttttt! Kalian kalo ke Bandung wajib sih mampir kesini, curugnya terawat dengan baik. Sebelum kesini siapkan stamina ya buat turun & naik karna lumayan banget track-nya. But, ga akan rugi sama view yang akan kalian rasain. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED HAHA
english_translation: The most beautiful waterfall I've ever visited. Sooooo beautiful! You guys should definitely stop by here if you go to Bandung, the waterfall is well maintained. Before coming here, prepare your stamina for going down and up because the track is quite challenging. But, you won't regret the view you'll experience. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED HAHA

text: Poto Poto yang gentayangan di Instagram menghoda banget pengen ke sini. Pas ke sini pas pandemi..jadi leluasa. Fresh air oksigen sejuk...Playground nya juga seru. Mushola toilet nya juara 🏆 ni...klo udah ke lewat satu..ntar di depan ada. Ga pake riweuh balik lagi.gitu. Cocok buat family, keluarga atau geng... …
english_translation: The photos circulating on Instagram are very tempting, making me want to visit. I came here during the pandemic, so it was uncrowded. Fresh, cool oxygen air... The playground is also fun. The prayer room and toilets are winners 🏆... if you pass one, there's another one up ahead. No hassle going back. It's suitable for families, relatives, or groups...

text: Tempatnya bagus banget, menampilkan suasana bali terutama ornamen benteng pintu masuk dan beberapa patung bali. Danau buatan dengan ciri khas romantisnya. kemudian kita bisa sewa sepeda, beca kecil, dan ada foodcort untuk ngopi dan makan. cocok sekali bawa pasangan dan keluarga ketempat ini. view nya luar biasa.
english_translation: The place is really great, it showcases a Balinese atmosphere, especially with the entrance gate ornaments and some Balinese statues. It has a man-made lake with its romantic characteristics. Then we can rent bicycles, small tricycles, and there's a food court for coffee and food. It's very suitable to bring a partner and family to this place. The view is amazing.

text: Harga tiket masuknya tidak sesuai sama wahana di dalam, isinya cuman sedikit bahkan curugnya saja banyak sampah, untuk pemandian air panasnya terlalu mahal itu pun kotor, untuk foto pakai hp sendiri saja bayar :"). Tiap permainanya kemahalan. Saran, tempat di bersihkan wahananya tambahin dan jangan terlalu mahal
english_translation: The entrance ticket price doesn't match the attractions inside. There's very little to see, and even the waterfall is full of trash. The hot springs are too expensive and dirty. You even have to pay to take photos with your own phone. Every ride is overpriced. My suggestion is to clean the place, add more attractions, and don't be too expensive.

text:
Silakan yg stok labelnya udah menipis atau mau mulai pake label di pakaiannya,

english_translation:
Please, for those whose label stock is running low or who want to start using labels on their clothes,

We can help, Boss 😊

text: Letak lokasi tidak jauh dari jalan raya. Cocok untuk yg sedang mencari ketenangan dari bisingnya kota. Harga tiket 15.000 bulan desember 2020. Termasuk murah dan view nya bagus, tapi untuk penyewaan perahu, dan yg lainnya termasuk aga mahal sih ya sama tempat yg lain. Makanan juga harganya kebanyakan diatas 30rb
english_translation: The location is not far from the highway. Suitable for those seeking tranquility from the city's noise. Ticket price was 15,000 in December 2020. It's quite cheap and the view is good, but for boat rentals and other things, it's a bit expensive compared to other places. Food prices are mostly above 30,000 as well.

text: Tempat wisata alam yang sangat luas. Pelayanan baik. Tidak ada mainan untuk anak. Tiket masuk 20rb untuk weekday, 25rb weekend yang bisa ditukar secangkir minunan. Tempatnya bersih. Parkiran luas. Tersedia aneka wahana air dengan biaya tambahan. Serta kostum busana jepang dan spot fotonya juga dengan biaya lagi.
english_translation: Very spacious natural tourist destination. Good service. No toys for children. Entrance ticket is 20k on weekdays, 25k on weekends which can be exchanged for a cup of drink. The place is clean. Spacious parking. Various water rides are available at an additional cost. As well as Japanese costumes and photo spots, also for an additional fee.

text: Ga perlu trekking buat liat kawah. Wisata keluarga bgt, bayar masuknya lumayan mahal. Kalo bisa berangkat pagi, sebelum kabutnya turun. Kalo mau foto kliatan perahunya, pake mode panorama. Ga boleh turun k kawah, beda sama ijen yg boleh turun k bawah. Tapi klo dibandingkan dg ijen masih bagus kawah ijen, hehe...
english_translation: No need for trekking to see the crater. Very family-friendly tourism, the entrance fee is quite expensive. If possible, leave early, before the fog descends. If you want to photograph the boat clearly, use panorama mode. You can't go down into the crater, unlike Ijen where you can go down. But compared to Ijen, Ijen crater is still better, hehe...

text: Suasananya lumayan asik, ada di dataran tinggi bandung barat, jadi pemandangan sekitarnya lumayan. Banyak spot² foto yang bagus. Disana juga ada bapak² yang bisa nunjukin spot foto bagus sekaligus motoin kita, bayarannya seikhlasnya, hasilnya bagussss. Kalo kesini mending pake jass bapaknya, bagus² hasil fotonya
english_translation: The atmosphere is quite nice, it's located in the highlands of West Bandung, so the surrounding scenery is decent. There are many good photo spots. There are also gentlemen there who can show you good photo spots and take pictures of you, the payment is voluntary, the results are great. If you come here, it's better to use the gentlemen's suits, the photo results are good.

text:
Ke sini tgl 6 Feb 2021.
Hari Sabtu.
Kondisi tidak terlalu ramai.
HTM 1 orang 30 ribu, Mobil 35 ribu.
Banyak pedagang dan orang yg menawarkan potret, tpi masih normal.
Hanya saja prokes tidak dilaksanakan dengan baik.
Banyak pedagang TIDAK pakai masker.
Pengelola atau pemda harus lakukan sesuatu terhadap hal ini.
english_translation:
Came here on Feb 6, 2021.
It was Saturday.
The place wasn't too crowded.
Entrance fee was 30 thousand per person, 35 thousand per car.
There were many vendors and people offering portraits, but it was still normal.
However, health protocols were not implemented well.
Many vendors were NOT wearing masks.
The management or local government should do something about this.

text:
Datang dipenghujung liburan sekolah ternyata masih rame tapi masih wajar,tidak terlalu padat..banyak spot2 untuk berfoto tapi lebih suka nyobain makan sate ayam dan sate kelinci dari pasar apungnya, tentunya dengan cara tuker koin untuk transaksinya.

Satenya lezat bumbunnya..harganya masih bisa ditoleransi lah.
english_translation:
Arriving at the end of the school holidays, it was still crowded but still reasonable, not too packed. There were many spots for photos, but I preferred trying the chicken satay and rabbit satay from the floating market, of course, by exchanging coins for the transactions.

The satay was delicious, the sauce was... the price was still tolerable.

text: Hutannya top markotop, banyak warung, tapi kekurangannya jalurnya ga jelas dari pintu masuk ini. Kita mutermuter 4 jam ga ketemu puncak dan ternyata jln mnuju puncaknya ada di bawah kita...yaudh krn kelelahan kita balik aja keluar di jalur cikole. Kekurangan lain adalah ga ada simaksi bwt pendaki cuma tiket aja.
english_translation: The forest is top-notch, lots of stalls, but the downside is that the trail isn't clear from this entrance. We wandered around for 4 hours without finding the peak, and it turned out the path to the peak was below us... well, because we were tired, we just turned back and exited via the Cikole trail. Another drawback is there's no climbing permit, only an entrance ticket.

text:
- Kebun atau kebun raya yang dipenuhi anggrek.
- Lokasi searah dengan wisata tangkuban perahu.
- Tiket masuk 35K/org Cukup mahal untuk sebuah kebun raya.
- Luas area sekitar 12Hektar
- Sore hari lebih bagus view nya.
- Jarak 40menit dari kota Bandung.
- Disediakan shuttle car untuk kembali ke parkiran kendaraan.
english_translation:
- A garden or botanical garden filled with orchids.
- Location is on the way to Tangkuban Perahu tourist spot.
- Entrance fee is 35K/person. Quite expensive for a botanical garden.
- Area size is around 12 hectares.
- The view is better in the afternoon.
- 40 minutes from Bandung city.
- Shuttle cars are provided to return to the vehicle parking area.

text: Ini cocok untuk yang mau mendaki pemula, ketinggian nya 1580mdpl, ga jauh dari pemukiman, disini juga bisa camping, cocok untuk keluarga, di atas juga ada toilet...asik pokoknya, yang belum dan mau kesini, silahkan, untuk kondisi jalan, aman untuk di lalui kendaraan pribadi dan tersedia lahan parkir yg cukup luas
english_translation: This is suitable for beginners who want to hike, the altitude is 1580 meters above sea level, not far from settlements. You can also camp here, it's suitable for families, and there are toilets at the top... it's really fun. For those who haven't and want to come here, please do. Regarding the road conditions, it is safe for private vehicles to pass and there is ample parking space available.

text:
Lokasinya wow.. bertemakan nuansa bali... cocok buat ngajak keluarga atau yg punya pasangan ke tempat ini.. suasana pegunungan dan spot2 utk berfoto ria, taman bermain, bahkan bisa naik "angsa" di danau yg cukup luas..
Tempat aneka jajanan dan makanan juga tersedia, lapangan parkir yg luas, pas utk lokasi liburan
english_translation:
The location is wow.. themed with Balinese nuances... suitable for bringing family or a partner to this place.. mountain atmosphere and spots for taking photos, a playground, you can even ride a "swan" on the quite large lake..
An assortment of snacks and food is also available, a spacious parking lot, perfect for a holiday location

text: Tempat yg cocok untuk liburan bersama keluarga, atau bersama grup kantor atau sekolah,,,  tempatnya yg indah dan luas,,,  dengan pemandangan yg sangat indah sejuk dan alami,,,  tidak hanya itu,,  disini juga banyak tempat bermain outbond yg bisa menguji adrenalin,,,  grafika cikole dijamin mantaps buat liburan,,,
english_translation: A suitable place for a holiday with family, or with an office or school group,,, the place is beautiful and spacious,,, with very beautiful, cool, and natural scenery,,, not only that,, there are also many outbound play areas here that can test your adrenaline,,, Grafika Cikole is guaranteed to be great for a holiday,,,

text:
Ambil paket yang 65.000 bisa foto di Jembatan Golden Gate, Sphinx, Colosseum, Menara Eiffel, Santorini, Patung Liberty.
Kalau mau masuk Castile harus bayar lagi. Kalau hujan, ada petugas yang menawarkan payung, ada shelter juga untuk berteduh. Ada hiburan musik jalan di Amphitheater, dan bisa sholat di musholla..
english_translation:
Take the 65,000 package and you can take photos at the Golden Gate Bridge, Sphinx, Colosseum, Eiffel Tower, Santorini, and Statue of Liberty.
If you want to enter the Castle, you have to pay extra. If it rains, there are staff who offer umbrellas, and there are also shelters to take cover. There is street music entertainment at the Amphitheater, and you can pray at the prayer room.

text: Pertama kali berkunjung kesini kesannya langsung sejuk dimata. Suasana nya menenangkan dan cocok untuk yang ingin berlibur dari hiruk pikuk kota dengan melihat berbagai tanaman anggrek. Banyak tersedia stand makanan dan minuman didalam. Toiletnya bersih sekali dan menerapkan protokol kesehatan dengan sangat baik.
english_translation: This is my first time visiting here and the impression was instantly pleasing to the eyes. The atmosphere is calming and suitable for those who want to escape the city's hustle and bustle by seeing various orchid plants. Many food and drink stands are available inside. The toilets are very clean and adhere to health protocols very well.

text: Waktu dateng lewat jembatan agak takut karna goyang goyang dan tinggi sekali😂 tapi karna tempatnya cantik ilang takutnya. Berasa ada di Paris, Santorini, Pulau Liberty tempat tempat yg maybe akan kita kunjungi soon, replikanya dulu aja udah soo happy hihii. Once again it's a very beautifull place💛 worth to visit😉
english_translation: When I arrived via the bridge, I was a little scared because it swayed and was very high😂 but because the place was beautiful, my fear disappeared. It felt like I was in Paris, Santorini, Liberty Island, places we might visit soon, even if it's just a replica, I'm already so happy hihi. Once again, it's a very beautiful place💛 worth to visit😉

text:
Bagus banget kebunnya, banyak sekali jenis jenis tanaman dan bunga bunga indah. Tempat spot foto yang bagus. Tiket masuknya lima belas ribu Tempatnya ga seberapa luas tapi cukup bagus utk refreshing melihat yang hijau2.
Tempatnya dan suasana sejuk di lembang. Tempat yang pas untuk berakhir pekan. Very recommended
english_translation:
The garden is really great, with so many types of plants and beautiful flowers. Good photo spots. The entrance fee is fifteen thousand. The place isn't very large, but it's good enough for refreshing by looking at the greenery.
The place and atmosphere are cool in Lembang. A perfect place for a weekend getaway. Highly recommended.

text: Tempat tenang, adem, sejuk. Tiket masuk wisata 47500 per org dapet masker dan voucher makan 10ribu. Banyak spot photo instagramable. Masuk ke wood bridge dan flying fox bayar lagi 20ribu. Ke tempat permainan anak2 juga bayar lagi 40ribu. Yg gratis masuk ke rabbit house. Untuk balik ke parkiran disediakan shuttle.
english_translation: Quiet, cool, and refreshing place. The entrance ticket for tourists is 47,500 per person and includes a mask and a 10,000 food voucher. There are many Instagrammable photo spots. Entering the wood bridge and flying fox requires an additional payment of 20,000. The children's play area also costs an extra 40,000. The rabbit house is free to enter. A shuttle is provided to return to the parking lot.

text:
Bagi yang pengen suasana santai, sejuk dan tenang. Dengan nuansa pinus. Cocok dikunjungi bersama keluarga mau Pacar.

Namun sayang akses jalan dari kaki gunung berlubang dan berbatu, jika menggunakan kendaraan bermotor harap hati hati.

Overall, ini sangat layak dikunjungi kalo mampir ke bandung, lembang - cikole
english_translation:
For those who want a relaxed, cool, and peaceful atmosphere with a pine forest vibe. Suitable to visit with family or a partner.

However, unfortunately, the road access from the foot of the mountain is full of holes and rocky, so please be careful if using a motorized vehicle.

Overall, this is highly recommended to visit if you're stopping by Bandung, Lembang - Cikole.

text: Sarae Hill tempatnya berada di lembah dengan hawa yg sejuk.. Di tengah2 ada danau kecil dan bnyk tempat buat foto lumayan bagus tempatnya ... Cuma dari jln raya ciumbuluit jauh sekali mana jalannya kecil agak rusak.. Klo rombongan pakai bus gk bisa masuk.. Pengelola tempat wisata harap perhatikan jalan yg rusak...
english_translation: Sarae Hill is located in a valley with cool air. In the middle, there's a small lake and many pretty good spots for photos. However, it's very far from the main Ciumbuleuit road, and the road is narrow and somewhat damaged. Buses carrying groups cannot enter. Tourist spot management, please pay attention to the damaged road.

text: Tempat yang asik banget buat sekedar nanjak-nanjak santai kalo kangen naik gunung tp ga punya waktu, buat jalan-jalan santai, buat ngecamp-ngecamp bareng temen ataupun keluarga. Untuk sampai dipuncak dari parkiran sekitar 15-20 menit. Untuk tiketnya 10 ribu kalo ga ngecamp, tp kalo ngecamp kalo ga salah 17,5 ribu.
english_translation: A really cool place for a relaxed hike if you miss the mountains but don't have time, for a leisurely stroll, or for camping with friends or family. It takes about 15-20 minutes to reach the summit from the parking lot. The ticket price is 10 thousand if you're not camping, but if you are camping, it's 17.5 thousand, if I'm not mistaken.

text: Tempat kemah yang cukup ramai karena letaknya tidak terlalu jauh dari pusat kota Lembang, tempatnya tidak terlalu tinggi tapi view pegunungan+kota nya balance jadi cukup recommended untuk pemula. Saya kemah di gunung putri saat musim kemarau jadi hawanya sejuk bahkan cenderung biasa (suhu normal) menuju siang hari
english_translation: A rather crowded campsite due to its proximity to Lembang city center. The location isn't too high, but the balance of mountain and city views makes it quite recommended for beginners. I camped at Gunung Putri during the dry season, so the air was cool, even tending towards normal (room temperature) towards midday.

text: Tempat yg nyaman. Sejuk dan nyaman bagi siapapun yg ingin merasakan dinginnya alam nuansa dewata yg kental. Sangat cocok untuk keluarga. Belajar berkuda dan sepedah mini untuk anak anak. Juga mobil wara wiri untuk mengantar pengunjung taman berkeliling seluruh tempat serta tempat yg pas untuk swafoto bagi siapapun
english_translation: A comfortable place. Cool and comfortable for anyone who wants to feel the coolness of nature with a strong divine nuance. Very suitable for families. Learn horseback riding and mini cycling for children. Also a shuttle car to take visitors around the park to all areas, as well as a perfect place for selfies for anyone.

text: Untuk kalian yg mau nyantai , selfie2 , tenang dengan udara yg segar dan sejuk , disini pas banget , spot foto selfie nya banyak, uang masuk terjangkau , tempat cukup luas , parkir kendaraan di lapangan parkir "A" ( atas ) jalanan cukup baik, selesai berkunjung ada mobil yg akan antar kita ke tempat parkir semula.
english_translation: For those of you who want to relax, take selfies, and enjoy fresh, cool air, this is the perfect place. There are many selfie photo spots, the entrance fee is affordable, the place is quite spacious, and vehicle parking is available at parking lot "A" (upper). The road is quite good, and after your visit, a car will take you back to your original parking spot.

text: Jajan di atas perahu..ada banyak wahana dsini. Tiket masuk 30rb per orang. Masuk arena bermain anak2 klo mau masuk semua bayar 98rb. Playground,flying fox,kereta mini,becak. Klo untuk bermain d satu wahana aja. Bayar 25rb. Pokok nya dijamin puas klo kesini. Bisa nyewa kostum jepang,naik perahu naga,naik sepda air.
english_translation: Snacking on the boat... there are many rides here. Entrance fee is 30,000 per person. To enter the children's play area and experience all rides, it costs 98,000. Includes playground, flying fox, mini train, becak (pedicab). If you only want to play on one ride, it costs 25,000. You are guaranteed to be satisfied if you come here. You can rent Japanese costumes, ride the dragon boat, and ride the paddle boat.

text:
Tempat outbond yang super keren
Selama outbond nanti akan diberikan gelang dengan 3 tiket permainan. Bisa untuk flying fox, panjat tebing, meniti tali
Super challenging sekali, dan yang pasti aman karena sudah ditangani profesional
Spot foto alam juga sangat keren
Wajib kesini dengan rekan kerja untuk tim building
english_translation:
A super cool outbound location
During the outbound, you will be given a bracelet with 3 game tickets. It can be used for flying fox, rock climbing, and rope traversing.
It's super challenging, and definitely safe because it's handled by professionals.
The natural photo spots are also very cool.
Must come here with colleagues for team building.

text: Masuk dengan tiket Rp 50.000 dapat untuk masuk dan menikmati wisata baru, serta dapat minuman ‘selamat datang’. Untuk menyeberang Jembatan wajib membayar Rp 15.000,- atau naik mobil yang mengantar ke lokasi dibawah. Yang sedikit memicu andrenalin karena sebagian jalan memakai besi lubang yang dapat melihat kebawah
english_translation: Entry with a ticket of Rp 50,000 includes admission to the new tourist attraction and a 'welcome' drink. Crossing the bridge costs Rp 15,000 or you can take the car service to the location below. The adrenaline-pumping part is that some of the path is made of grated metal, allowing you to see down.

text:
Kesini pas libur lebaran ..
Jadi ramai pol, akses jalan dibuat 1 arah, jd harus puter dulu..
Parkir padat tp masih bisa dpt, juru parkirnya helpfull
Tiket disini bisa ditukar minuman hangat (kopi, cokelat) atau dingin (lemon tea). Panas ..
Antri rainbow slide sampai 1jam lebih krn antrinya mantap jiwa ..
Tp seru !!
english_translation:
Came here during the Eid holiday..
So very crowded, the access road was made one-way, so had to go around first..
Parking was packed but still managed to find a spot, the parking attendant was helpful
Tickets here can be exchanged for hot drinks (coffee, chocolate) or cold drinks (lemon tea). It was hot..
Queued for the rainbow slide for over 1 hour because the queue was insane..
But it was fun!!

text:
Ternyata tidak seluas yg dibayangkan... Kukira seperti taman bunga nusantara...ternyata tidak... Namun cukup bagus tempatnya, bersih namun sangat disayangkan variasi bunya tidak terlalu banyak dan tempat yg menurut saya cukup sempit/ tidak luas..

Enak kesana pagi2 sekali karena segar bisa menghirup udara yg bersih
english_translation:
It turns out it's not as wide as I imagined... I thought it would be like a Nusantara flower garden... but it's not... However, the place is quite nice, clean, but it's a shame the variety of flowers isn't too much and the place, in my opinion, is quite cramped/not spacious..

It's nice to go there very early in the morning because it's fresh and you can breathe the clean air.

text: tempat wisata yang belum ada di sumatera, tempatnya bersih hanya tempat wisata airnya kurang dominan menurutku. berharapnya semua restorannya terapung. dan kita juga maunya makan sambil ngapung. hehehe..ini mah usul wae but so far I love this place. and I really love the price as well. harganya bersahabat banget :)
english_translation: A tourist spot that doesn't exist yet in Sumatra. The place is clean, only the water attractions are not very prominent in my opinion. I hope all the restaurants are floating. And we also want to eat while floating. Hehehe.. this is just a suggestion, but so far I love this place. And I really love the price as well. The prices are very friendly :)

text: Sudah mulai buka kembali TWG (Tempat Wisata Gunung Tangkuban Perahu). Berkali-kali kesini dan selalu kagum dengan mountain view nya dan crater nya. Bagus bangettt... Bakal kesini lagi. Tempat wisata nya bersih dan terpelihara. Pedagangnya pun ramah2, ada pedagang souvenir dan makanan. Tingkatkan terus kinerjanya...
english_translation: TWG (Tangkuban Perahu Mountain Tourist Spot) has started to reopen. I've been here many times and am always amazed by the mountain view and the crater. It's really great... I'll be back again. The tourist spot is clean and well-maintained. The vendors are also friendly, there are souvenir and food vendors. Keep up the good work...

text: Tempat wisata keluarga yang berada di lokasi kota lembang, sangat rame dan selalu penuh. Dengan jajanan yang sangat banyak pilihan dan ternjangkau,udara yang nyaman, tempat bersih fasilitas lengkap dan tedapat musola itu yang membuat penting. Dengan tiket masuk Rp 2.000 hari biasa dan Rp 25.000 untuk weekend/orang.
english_translation: A family tourist spot located in the city of Lembang, very crowded and always full. With a wide and affordable selection of snacks, comfortable air, clean facilities, and a prayer room, that's what makes it important. With an entrance ticket of Rp 2,000 on weekdays and Rp 25,000 for weekends/person.

text: Datang hr minggu ga terlalu byk pengunjung, tiket masuk 30rb/org tiket parkir motor 19rb. pemandangan dr mesjid n tempat parkir motor yg diatasnya bagus cm krn musim hujan jd ketutup kabut tp masih bagus kok. Beli gehu sama bala2 hrgnya 3000an kecuali pisang sama ubi goreng di patok ceban tp mang gede bgt sih 😅😅. …
english_translation: Sunday didn't have too many visitors, entrance ticket is 30k/person, motorcycle parking ticket is 19k. The view from the mosque and the motorcycle parking area above is good, but because it's the rainy season, it was covered by fog, but it's still good. Bought gehu and bala-bala for around 3k, except for fried bananas and sweet potatoes which were 10k, but they were really big 😅😅. …

text:
Tempat wisata yg terbilang baru di lembang bandung menyajikan tempat wisata yg sejuk n keren pemandangan alamnya.
banyak spot2 foto yg instagramable...ada cafe..live musik...penyewaan kuda..sewa sepeda..sewa kereta2an untuk keliling...dan yg bikin seru lagi...bisa foto2 nuansa bali...harga tiket masuk 20rb sd 25rb.
english_translation:
A relatively new tourist spot in Lembang Bandung offers a cool and scenic natural attraction.
There are many Instagrammable photo spots... there's a cafe... live music... horse rental... bicycle rental... toy train rental for touring... and what makes it even more exciting... you can take photos with a Bali theme... entrance ticket prices range from 20,000 to 25,000 Rupiah.

text: Mohon diberi petunjuk arah jalan dari ciawitali , saya baru pertama lewati jalan situ jalan nya sangat membingungkan banyak nya per3n . Bahkan saya tadi berangkatnya lewati jalan bojongsero jalanya sangat extrime tanah licin terjam tanjakan nya menantang dilewati motor , nih ada cuplikan vidio lewati via bojongsero
english_translation: Please provide directions from Ciawitali. This is my first time passing through there, and the roads are very confusing with many intersections. I even took the Bojongsero route earlier, and the road was very extreme, slippery, and the inclines were challenging for motorcycles. Here's a clip of my video passing through the Bojongsero route.

text: Air terjun ini memiliki ketinggian sekitar 15 meter, memiliki 2 sumber aliran sungai Bandung Barat yaitu Ciwakari dan Sungai Cigulung. Air curug akan terlihat sangat jernih ketika musim kemarau. Hempasan air dari atas curug akan membawa sensasi sejuk terlebih ketika terdapat angin yang menghembus kepada air terjun.
english_translation: This waterfall is about 15 meters high and has 2 sources from the Bandung Barat river: Ciwakari and Cigulung River. The waterfall's water will appear very clear during the dry season. The splashing water from above the waterfall will bring a cool sensation, especially when the wind blows towards the waterfall.

text: Camping ground di puncaknya luas buat yg mau bikin acara, tapi kalo buat camping biasa di deket2 mushola udah oke banget dapet view keren. Tiket 20rb per orang, parkir motor 5rb. Di warung parkiran ada yg sewain tikar, jual kayu bakar, gas propane, indomi2 buat yg hikin doang atau gowes madep tuh. Ngecas jg gratis.
english_translation: The campsite at the summit is spacious for those who want to hold an event, but for regular camping, staying near the prayer room is great and offers a cool view. Tickets are 20,000 per person, motorcycle parking is 5,000. At the parking lot stalls, they rent out mats, sell firewood, propane gas, and Indomie noodles for those who are just hiking or cycling. Charging is also free.

text:
Tempat wisata disuatu lembah dan bukit bercerita tentang bangunan2 terkenal di benua Eropa,Afrika dan Asia.Keren banget...membawa kita ke berbagai negara dalam satu waktu...keren banget..Spinx,Santorini,menara Pisa dll
Wisata sambil olah raga..setelahnya lapar kita bisa menikmati kuliner yang ada Didaerah tersebut.
english_translation:
A tourist spot in a valley and hills tells the story of famous buildings in Europe, Africa, and Asia. So cool... it takes us to various countries at once... so cool.. Sphinx, Santorini, Leaning Tower of Pisa, etc.
Sightseeing while exercising.. afterwards, we get hungry and can enjoy the local cuisine.

text:
Curug tilu leuwi opat merupakan sebuah tempat wisata rekreasi alam berupa air terjun yang sangat indah.
Terletak di wilayah kabupaten bandung barat, dan sangat mudah jika anda ingin menemukan lokasinya.
Biaya masuknya pun sangat terjangkau, dan anda bisa melihat pemandangan alam berupa air terjun yang sangat indah.
english_translation:
Curug Tilu Leuwi Opat is a beautiful natural recreational tourist destination featuring a waterfall.
It is located in the West Bandung regency and is very easy to find.
The entrance fee is very affordable, and you can enjoy the beautiful natural scenery of the waterfall.

text: Taman Bunga yang bagus , cukup terawat dan besar. Tapi berhubung saya biasa aja liat bunga2 jadi ya kurang terasa greget.. mungkin buat yang suka aneka tanaman dan bunga bisa lebih menikmati. Suasananya cukup enak sih, ga ramai juga. Tiket masuk bisa ditukerin makanan seharga tiket, jadi ya worth it lah untuk dicoba
english_translation: A nice flower garden, well-maintained and large. But since I'm just an average person when it comes to seeing flowers, I didn't feel that much excitement. Maybe for those who like various plants and flowers, they can enjoy it more. The atmosphere is quite pleasant, not crowded either. The entrance ticket can be exchanged for food worth the ticket price, so it's worth trying.

text: Udah sering banget kesini dan gak pernah bosen karna memang setiap sudut pemandangannya yang menenangkan. Malem malem bisa liat citylight, pagi nya bisa dapetin sunrise.. Hanya 1 hal yang harus diperhatikan oleh pengelola, yaitu TOILET. Kadang gak ada airnya, kadang banyak juga sampah yang betebaran di dalam toilet.
english_translation: I've been here many times and never get bored because the view from every corner is so calming. At night, you can see the city lights, and in the morning, you can catch the sunrise. There's just one thing that the management should pay attention to, and that's the TOILETS. Sometimes there's no water, and sometimes there's a lot of trash scattered inside the toilets.

text: parkir luas.bau belerang lumayan kuat.masjid besar.banyak penjual oleh2.harga makanan standar wisata(murah tdk.mahal iya).utk yg mau beli oleh2 strawbery.rasbery atau blueberry disarankan beli diparkiran.harga lebih murah.diatas/sekitaran masjid dijual paling murah 100rbu dpt 4..tpi kalau diparkiran 1bngkus 10rbu😁 …
english_translation: Spacious parking. Quite a strong sulfur smell. Large mosque. Many souvenir vendors. Food prices are standard for tourist spots (not cheap, but expensive). For those who want to buy strawberry, raspberry, or blueberry souvenirs, it is recommended to buy them at the parking lot. The prices are cheaper. Above/around the mosque, they sell at the cheapest for 100,000 for 4. But at the parking lot, 1 pack is 10,000.

text: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu adalah salah satu gunung api Aktif di Indonesia yang menjadi salah satu destinasi wajib para wisatawan yang datang ke Bandung. Berada di daerah Lembang yang tidak jauh dari kota Bandung menjadi alasan para wisatawan untuk berkunjung kesini. menyajikan keindahan alam yang masih asri dan segar.
english_translation: Mount Tangkuban Perahu is one of the active volcanoes in Indonesia and is a must-visit destination for tourists coming to Bandung. Located in the Lembang area, not far from Bandung city, it is a reason for tourists to visit. It offers still-original and fresh natural beauty.

text: Tempatnya sejuk adem ,bersih banyak spot foto , HTM 100ribu untuk 2 orang 1 motor , naik jembatan lampu bayar lagi 20 ribu , ada beberapa wahana harus bayar lagi ,ada juga yang gratis , banyak penjual yang keliling dan siap membantu untuk foto foto , ada Bis gratis yang jemput dari bawah untuk naik keatas parkiran,,
english_translation: The place is cool and pleasant, clean with many photo spots. The entrance fee is 100,000 IDR for 2 people and 1 motorcycle. Riding the light bridge costs an additional 20,000 IDR. There are several attractions that require an extra fee, while some are free. Many vendors are roaming and ready to help with photos. There's a free shuttle bus from the bottom to the parking area upstairs.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk camping ground dekat kota bandung, akses jalan raya sangat mudah. Udara dingin dan bersih dikelilingi hutan pohon pinus. Di lembah, Anda dapat menemukan air terjun dan perkebunan teh. Fasilitasnya sangat bagus, ada mushola, resto, rest room, dan masih banyak fasilitas lainnya yang tersedia
english_translation: A great place for a camping ground near Bandung city, with very easy access from the main road. The air is cold and clean, surrounded by pine forests. In the valley, you can find waterfalls and tea plantations. The facilities are very good, with a prayer room, restaurant, restrooms, and many other available facilities.

text: Akses menuju curug ini masih sangat susah, belum ada tangga yang aman bagi anak-anak. Sangat tidak disarankan ke Curug ini saat hujan. Namun yang terbaik dari curug ini adalah banyaknya batu-batu kecil di sekitar aliran curug yang berguna bagi anda yang ingin merasakan kesejukan air curug tanpa harus berbasah-basah.
english_translation: Access to this waterfall is still very difficult, there are no safe stairs for children. It is highly not recommended to visit this waterfall during rain. However, the best thing about this waterfall is the abundance of small rocks around the waterfall's flow, which are useful for those who want to feel the coolness of the waterfall's water without getting wet.

text:
Suka pemandangan dan lanskap.
Air terjunnya indah, kalau mau bisa mandi di bawah air terjun.
Yang saya suka adalah Anda tidak perlu melakukan perjalanan jauh, hanya 40 menit dari pusat kota.
Tapi saya tidak menyarankan untuk membawa anak-anak ke sini, mereka memiliki seribu tangga dari gerbang ke tempat air terjun.
english_translation:
I like the scenery and landscape.
The waterfall is beautiful, if you want you can bathe under it.
What I like is that you don't have to travel far, it's only 40 minutes from the city center.
But I do not recommend bringing children here, they have a thousand stairs from the gate to the waterfall.

text: Tempat yang nyaman untuk melihat lihat pemandangan, walaupun terbatas tempatnya dan tidak luas tapi tetap oke, ada pemandian air hangatnya, air terjunnya, ada mini zoonya, ada permainannya juga untuk dewasa dan anak, tapi sayang di air terjunnya banyak sampah, mungkin pengelola setempat bisa lebih memperhatikan lagi
english_translation: A comfortable place to sightsee, although the space is limited and not spacious, it's still okay. There's a hot spring, a waterfall, a mini zoo, and games for both adults and children. Unfortunately, there's a lot of trash in the waterfall, so perhaps the local management can pay more attention to it.

text:
Hutan wisata yang sangat bagus.
Terawat dan bersih.
Suasana asri dan nyaman.
Menyenangkan untuk bersantai melupakan sejenak hiruk pikuk perkotaan.
Banyak pohon pakis yang mengingatkan pada hutan di Selandia Baru.

Kekurangannya:
Jalan dari pintu masuk ke parkiran rusak parah.
Kurangnya variasi/gerai makanan/minuman.
english_translation:
A very good tourist forest.
Well-maintained and clean.
Natural and comfortable atmosphere.
Pleasant for relaxing, forgetting the urban hustle and bustle for a moment.
Many fern trees reminiscent of forests in New Zealand.

Disadvantages:
The road from the entrance to the parking lot is severely damaged.
Lack of variety of food/drink stalls.

text: Wajib dikunjungi untuk yang ada dikawasan Bandung. Lokasinya ada di Lembang dan gampang untuk di jangkau. Buat yang suka treking ini juga bisa jadi alternatif untuk merasakan treking di pagi hari saat weekend. Kalau datang pagi bisa lihat kabut yang nyelimuti kawasan pedesaan yang bisa kita lihat dari atas bukit ini.
english_translation: A must-visit for those in the Bandung area. Its location is in Lembang and it's easy to reach. For those who like trekking, this can also be an alternative to experience trekking in the morning on weekends. If you come in the morning, you can see the mist covering the rural area from the top of this hill.

text: Pemandangan yang begitu megah dengan tingginya dinding-dinding tebing dan banyaknya bebatuan. Harga tiket masuk hanya 8000/orang dan parkir hanya 2000/untuk motor, disini kalian bisa bermain air menggunakan pelampung (sewa pelampung 5000/orang), bisa arum jeram (ketika air besar/tinggi) atau hanya menikmati alam. 💯 …
english_translation: Such a majestic view with tall cliff walls and many rocks. The entrance ticket price is only 8000/person and parking is only 2000/for motorcycles. Here you can play in the water using floats (float rental 5000/person), go rafting (when the water is big/high), or just enjoy nature. 💯

text: Pasar apung aka floating market ini emang tujuan wisata n tempat ngemil yg bisa bikin Happy sekeluarga. Giant rainbow slide wahana baru thn 2022 ini bikin floating market jadi tujuan yg ok. Baik adult n kids bisa happy. Elderly bs nikmati rainbow garden yg filled with beautiful flowers dan scenery menyejukan di danau
english_translation: This floating market is indeed a tourist destination and a place for snacks that can make the whole family happy. The giant rainbow slide, a new attraction in 2022, makes the floating market a great destination. Both adults and kids can be happy. The elderly can enjoy the rainbow garden filled with beautiful flowers and refreshing scenery on the lake.

text:
Tempat wisata yang lumayan freshhhh, tempat luas & sejuk, banyak spot foto dan spot untuk bersantai. Saya berkunjung 3 September 2022, harga tiket masuk 55rb + free minuman.
Saya datang menggunakan grab, dan sampai di gerbang diberikan fasilitas tumpangan mobil berangkat - pulang dari dan ke atas objek oleh pengelola
english_translation:
A pretty refreshing tourist spot, spacious & cool, with many photo spots and places to relax. I visited on September 3, 2022, the entrance ticket price was 55rb + free drink.
I came by Grab, and upon reaching the entrance, I was provided with a car ride service to and from the attraction by the management.

text: Cocok buat liburan bareng kluarga, ngadem, ngopi, atau sekedar mandi-mandi manja, selain tiket yg sangat murah kita juga akan dimanjakan oleh bebatuan sungai dan dinding-dinding tebing dngan warna warna yang natural ditambah dengan tumbuhan yg mnjuntai mnambah eksotis tempat ini. Apalagi goa nya cantik banget pokonya
english_translation: Perfect for a family vacation, chilling out, having coffee, or just a relaxing bath. Besides the very cheap tickets, we will also be pampered by the river stones and cliff walls with their natural colors, plus hanging plants that add to the exoticism of this place. Especially the cave is so beautiful, in short.

text: Ada di daerah Lembang, jalan masuknya sama kaya mau ke farm house cuma ini lebih ke dalem lagi. Waktu kesini pas libur lebaran harga tiketnya 20 ribu seorang udah plus dipinjemin topi jeraminya. Di dalam cuma boleh bawa kamera handphone. Dan emang cocok buat foto-foto yang ala Instagramable, ada tempat makannya juga.
english_translation: It's in the Lembang area, the entrance is the same as going to Farm House, only this one is further in. When I came here during the Eid holiday, the ticket price was 20 thousand per person, which already included a straw hat rental. Inside, you're only allowed to bring a mobile phone camera. And it's indeed suitable for Instagrammable photos, there's also a place to eat.

text: Nuansa baru bagi kami yg datang dari sidoarjo Jawa Timur. Spot foto berlatarkan pohon pinus, cafe, live musik, mushola, toilet ada semua, harus kuat jalan karena area nya sangat luas. Pas kesini akan tahun baru imlek yaitu minggu 22 Januari 2023. Tiket 50 rb per orang. Ada kendaraan untuk penempatan ke parkiran mobil.
english_translation: A new nuance for us coming from Sidoarjo, East Java. Photo spots with pine trees as a backdrop, a cafe, live music, a prayer room, and toilets are all available. You need to be prepared to walk because the area is very spacious. We visited around the Lunar New Year, Sunday, January 22, 2023. Tickets are 50,000 IDR per person. There are vehicles available to take you to the car parking area.

text:
Harga Tiket Masuk Rp.20.000
Parkir Motor Rp.5.000
Didalamnya banyak wahana lagi
Dan kita harus beli tiketnya lagi
Harga Wahana berkisar dari Rp 10.000 s/d Rp.25.000
Konsep unik dan menarik
Tapi kalo Weekand ramainya luar biasa
Kalo mau suasana yang lebih tenang dan tidak terlalu ramai, coba datang kesini pas Weekdays.
english_translation:
Entrance Fee Rp.20,000
Motorcycle Parking Rp.5,000
There are many rides inside
And we have to buy tickets for them again
Ride prices range from Rp 10,000 to Rp 25,000
Unique and interesting concept
But on weekends, it's incredibly crowded
If you want a calmer and less crowded atmosphere, try coming here on weekdays.

text: tempat yg menarik&keren untuk menikmati pegunungan dengan tidak capek..karna bisa dijangkau dengan mobil sampai kawah di atas...harga tiket 20rb/orang&30rb untuk mobil...dan di atas sudah free tanpa membayar apapun lagi..dikawah banyak spot yg bagus untuk foto,,ada toilet&stand2 makanan dan oleh2 khas tangkuban perahu
english_translation: An interesting and cool place to enjoy the mountains without getting tired... because it can be reached by car right up to the crater at the top... the ticket price is 20 thousand rupiah per person and 30 thousand for the car... and at the top, everything is free without paying anything further... the crater has many good spots for photos, there are toilets & food stalls and souvenirs typical of Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Perlu diacungi jempol soal kebersihannya. Fasilitas toilet juga tersebar dimana-mana. Pola taman-tamannya asri dan alami. Sayangnya cuma jalan masuknya masih banyak yg rusak meski pendek. Ada shuttle angkot juga gratis untuk keluar masuk area. Cafe juga ada di berbagai pojok, baik modern maupun tradisional.  Good job!
english_translation: The cleanliness is commendable. Toilet facilities are also spread everywhere. The garden patterns are beautiful and natural. Unfortunately, only the entrance road is still quite damaged, even though it's short. There's also a free angkot shuttle to get in and out of the area. Cafes are also available in various corners, both modern and traditional. Good job!

text: Suasananya sejuk, asri, rindang. Memang cocok untuk acara gathering dan liburan. Spot2 fotonya juga menarik sekali. Ada penginapan yg disewakan dan juga tenda yg di sewakan. Letak penginapan dan tendanya tertata rapi. Disediakan juga tempat api unggun untuk yg menginap. Banyak sekali para wisatawan yg berlibur kesini.
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool, beautiful, and shady. It's indeed suitable for gatherings and holidays. The photo spots are also very interesting. There are accommodations for rent and also tents for rent. The location of the accommodations and tents is neatly arranged. A campfire area is also provided for those staying overnight. Many tourists vacation here.

text: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu merupakan salah satu wisata yang ada di Jawa Barat tepatnya di utara kota Bandung. Salah satu gunung yang memiliki cerita legendaris yang menjadi daya tarik tersendiri dari gunung ini. Jika kalian berwisata ke daerah Bandung dan sekitarnya, tempat ini menjadi tempat yang wajib untuk di kunjungi.
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu Mountain is one of the tourist attractions in West Java, precisely north of Bandung city. It is one of the mountains with a legendary story that makes it a unique attraction. If you are traveling to Bandung and its surroundings, this place is a must-visit.

text:
Kembali dan sdh bnyak spot2 baru,dari slide rainbow,garden,kotamini,miniatur kereta,4d...anak2 betah bgt smw mau dicoba..sprti biasa tiket bsa dutukar minuman hangat/dingin..

Syg lg seru2nya ujan ckup lama, pasar apung nya lmyan mahal tpi bkin nagih efek cuaca 😄😄..
Ditanya mau lagi dtg gak?? Anak2 kompak blg mauuuu 😁😁
english_translation:
Back again and there are many new spots, from the rainbow slide, garden, Kotamini, miniature trains, 4D... the kids were so comfortable, they wanted to try everything.. as usual, tickets can be exchanged for hot/cold drinks.

It's a shame it rained for quite a while when we were having the most fun. The floating market is quite expensive but addictive because of the weather effect 😄😄..
Asked if they want to come again?? The kids unanimously said yes 😁😁

text:
Good place udah gada pungutan lainnya selain masuk
Tapi yang sangat di sayangkan ketika mau naik jembatan kita harus membayar lagi
Harganya 20.000 udah plus flyfox
Tapi cuma sampe jam 17.00 nah kalo ga kedapetan tgl segitu bayar bisa
Harusnya ada toleran gt kalo udah jam 17.00 baiknya di discount 50%😂 kan gapake flyfox
english_translation:
Good place, there are no other fees besides the entrance fee.
But what's very regrettable is that when we want to go up the bridge, we have to pay again.
The price is 20,000, which includes the zipline.
But it's only until 5 PM, so if you can't make it on that date, you can still pay.
There should be some tolerance, like if it's already past 5 PM, it should be discounted 50% 😂 since you're not using the zipline.

text: Tempatnya enak. Cukup banyak perubahan yang dulu area sungainya kotor sekarang sudah mulai bersih dan banyak wahana yang dibuat untuk menarik para wisatawan datang kesini. Dari tempat ini dengan berjalan kaki dapat menembus Taman Hutan Ir. Juanda yang terletak di Dago. Dengan kendaraan pribadi akses kesini cukup mudah.
english_translation: The place is nice. There have been quite a few changes; the river area used to be dirty, but now it's starting to get clean and many attractions have been built to attract tourists here. From this place, you can walk through the Ir. Juanda Forest Park, which is located in Dago. Access here by private vehicle is quite easy.

text: Jalannya dari parkiran sampai ke lokasi jauhhhhhhh banget, tempatnya masih sepi. Kalo bisa ditemenin warga lokal atau jgn sendirian. Masih banyak batu2 besar. Ada yg jualan makanan namun terbatas. Kalo bisa bawa bekel makan dan minum. Asik bagi yg suka jalan jauh dg pemandangan pepohonan besar dan sungai serta bebatuan
english_translation: The walk from the parking lot to the location is very, very far. The place is still quiet. If possible, go with a local or don't go alone. There are still many large rocks. There are food vendors, but limited options. If possible, bring your own food and drinks. It's great for those who like long walks with views of large trees, rivers, and rocks.

text:
Tangkuban perahu adalah tujuan wisata yg terkenal di bandung selain pemandangan yang indah kita akan di suguhkan suasana dan kesegaran yang bisa menghilangkan rasa jenuh dan pikiran kembali fresh
Wisata ini sangat kental sekali dengan legenda masyarakat sunda yang turun temurun masih berkembang yaitu legenda sangkuring
english_translation: Tangkuban Perahu is a famous tourist destination in Bandung. Besides the beautiful scenery, we are presented with an atmosphere and freshness that can eliminate boredom and refresh the mind. This tour is very closely related to the Sundanese folk legend of Sangkuring, which has been passed down through generations and is still developing.

text: Lokasinya bagus buat yang hobi selfi. Info jalan dri gugel juga udh jelas. Cuma punglinya aja x ya. Dri pertama masuk udh kena bayar 10k permobil, trs msk lgi kena 8k perorang, trs itk parkir kena 10k permobil. Utk kuliner disini kurang paling cuma ada bakso n mie. Disaranin klo kesini pagi/sore. Cz klo siqng panas bgt
english_translation: The location is good for selfie enthusiasts. Google Maps directions are also clear. The only thing is the illegal fees, perhaps. From the moment you enter, you have to pay 10k per car, then another 8k per person, and then parking costs 10k per car. The culinary options here are lacking, with only meatballs and noodles available. It's recommended to visit in the morning/afternoon because it's very hot during the day.

text:
Tempat sejuk, banyak tanaman hias yang membuat relax dan refresh.
Hutan Pohon Pinus, Green House Anggrek bahkan Bazar Tanaman.
Outbound seperti flying fox.
Berkuda didampingi pelatihnya.
Camp dengan fasilitas yang memadai.
Shelter Car secara gratis untuk kembali ke tempat awal.
Foto & Cetak berkualitas juga disediakan.
english_translation:
Cool place, lots of ornamental plants that make you relax and refresh.
Pine Tree Forest, Orchid Greenhouse, even a Plant Bazaar.
Outbound activities like flying fox.
Horseback riding accompanied by its trainer.
Camping with adequate facilities.
Free car shelter to return to the starting point.
High-quality photo printing is also provided.

text: Main kesini dengan modal "gasengaja" krena tujuannya gabut sbnrnya, pas liat yaudah masuk aja dan HTM nya murah bgttt 20k bisa kukulilingan gaes sepuasnya. Trs buat naik flying fox cm 15k utk satu putaran klo bulak balik 25k. Spot foto jg ga byk yg alay2, bagus pokonya mah. Makasih, nnti klo libur lg bakal kesini lg🥰 …
english_translation: I came here by "accident" because I was actually just bored and looking for something to do. When I saw it, I decided to go in, and the entrance fee was super cheap! For only 20k, you can wander around as much as you want, guys. Then, to ride the flying fox, it's 15k for one round, or 25k for a round trip. The photo spots aren't too cheesy either; they're just good, really. Thank you, I'll definitely come back again when I have another day off. 🥰

text: Ada beberapa spot gunung putri Lembang yang bagus untuk selfie. Tapi view terbaik adalah di puncak. Maka nya sayang sekali kalau datang gak lihat sun rise di puncak. Di sana juga ada penyewaan camping set dengan harga terjangkau. Jadi bisa camping bersama keluarga atau teman sambil lihat sun rise bareng, mantap ga tuh.
english_translation: There are several good spots on Mount Putri Lembang for selfies. But the best view is at the summit. It would be a shame to come and not see the sunrise from the top. There's also a rental for camping gear at an affordable price. So you can camp with family or friends while watching the sunrise together, how awesome is that.

text: Datang ke sini di weekday enak banget ya bisa bebas foto2 tanpa ada back ground orang banyak. Viewnya bagus2, semua lokasi bikin kita pgn foto2. Ada mbak2 yg bisa ambilin fotonya, jadi dia tau lokasi foto yg bagus2. Skr bayar 1 harga bisa masuk kesemua tempat spt rainbow garden, kota mini dll. Puas deh keliling2 disini
english_translation: Coming here on a weekday is really nice, you can take photos freely without a lot of people in the background. The views are beautiful, every spot makes you want to take pictures. There are ladies who can take your photos, so they know the best photo locations. Now for one price, you can enter all the places like Rainbow Garden, Kota Mini, etc. I'm satisfied after wandering around here.

text: Meskipun berada di Lembah terbuka, udaranya cukup sejuk. Belum banyak fasilitas yang tersedia. Tapi mushola,kantin,toilet sudah tersedia. Bisa sewa kuda tunggang jg. Kalo sekedar olah raga ringan jalan2 di perbukitan, no bad . Konon kalo lagi musim ilalang berbunga, bukit2nya tampak indah . Angin nya kenceng lho disini
english_translation: Although it's in an open valley, the air is quite cool. Not many facilities are available yet. But a prayer room, canteen, and toilets are available. You can also rent horses for riding. If you just want to do light exercise by walking in the hills, it's no problem. It's said that when it's the season for flowering reeds, the hills look beautiful. The wind is strong here, you know.

text: Harga tiket memang murah, di dalamnya tidak terlalu besar, dan tiap area harus bayar lagi. Salah satu akstraksi bisa bermain dan memberi makan kelinci, tp kelincinya hanya satu, dan hanya berada di dalam gua. Foto pemandangan yang beredar cukup menipu, tidak sebagus itu. Kurangi ekspektasimu kalau tetap berminat kemari.
english_translation: The ticket price is indeed cheap, it's not too big inside, and each area requires an additional payment. One attraction is being able to play with and feed rabbits, but there's only one rabbit, and it's only in a cave. The circulated photos of the scenery are quite deceptive, it's not that good. Lower your expectations if you're still interested in coming here.

text: masuknya 25rb, tamannya ga terlalu luas tp ditata dengan sangat rapi. waktu kesana ada keluarga yg lagi gathering dan suasananya bagus bgt. parkir motor 2rb dan pas masuk kita bisa pake topi bambu buat foto foto. topinya gratis dipakai selama di dalam wisata. ibu penjaga tiketnya ramah sekali jadi merasa sangat disambut
english_translation: Entrance fee is 25,000 IDR. The park isn't very large, but it's very neatly arranged. When I visited, there was a family having a gathering, and the atmosphere was really nice. Motorcycle parking is 2,000 IDR. Upon entering, you can use bamboo hats for photos. The hats are free to use within the tourist area. The ticket attendant was very friendly, so I felt very welcomed.

text: Tempat yg menyuguhkan pemandangan yang indah. Perjalanan dari Bandung bisa naik kereta api di stasiun Bandung ke stasiun Padalarang. Dari sana naik angkot Rajamandala warna kuning. Turun di mesjid Al ikhlas dan jalan kaki ke sana. Ikuti saja jalan setapak. Harga karcis kereta 5rb dan angkotnya 5rb juga. Tiket masuk 8rb.
english_translation: A place that offers beautiful scenery. The journey from Bandung can be taken by train from Bandung Station to Padalarang Station. From there, take a yellow Rajamandala minibus. Get off at Al Ikhlas Mosque and walk there. Just follow the footpath. The train ticket price is 5 thousand rupiah and the minibus is also 5 thousand rupiah. The entrance ticket is 8 thousand rupiah.

text: Kesini naik motor, tiket masuk per orang 20k, parkir motor 14k/motor. Lumayan lah keren tempatnya banyak spot foto keren, disini bau belerangnya kerasa banget, bagi yang gak biasa bisa mual trus habis pulang dari sini badan saya gatal2 dan panas dingin, sepertinya kena kontaminasi asap belerang. Bener2 lah harus dicoba.
english_translation: Came here by motorbike, entrance ticket is 20k per person, motorbike parking is 14k/motorbike. It's quite good, the place is cool with many great photo spots. The sulfur smell is very noticeable here. For those not used to it, it can cause nausea. After returning from here, I had itchy skin and felt feverish and shivery, I think I was contaminated by the sulfur fumes. You really have to try it.

text: Akses menuju basecamp dari simpang jalan lembang terbilang jelek, banyak lobng dan kondisi jalan tidak rata. Tapi tempat parkir cukup luas, dipatok dengan harga 10k/motor. Biaya masuk area gunung putri sebesar 17,5k/orang. Di atas ada musola dan toilet. Sayangnya, setiap orang dipatok harga 2k jika ingin menggunakannya.
english_translation: Access to the basecamp from the Lembang junction is quite bad, with many potholes and an uneven road condition. But the parking lot is quite spacious, charged at 10k/motorcycle. The entrance fee for the Gunung Putri area is 17.5k/person. Upstairs there is a prayer room and toilet. Unfortunately, everyone is charged 2k if they want to use them.

text: Lokasi gak terlalu Jauh dari kota bandung, jalan masuk jelek banget, tp mobil kecil masih bisa masuk asal gak ceper ya. Harus pinter cari spot biar dapet foto yg bagus, disarankan jgn kesana pas mendung, dan jgn tengah hari krn panas banget. Jam 18.00 tutup. Toilet kotor, kuliner gk banyak, mending makan di bandung aja.
english_translation: The location isn't too far from Bandung city, the access road is really bad, but small cars can still enter as long as they're not lowered. You have to be clever in finding a spot to get a good photo, it's recommended not to go there when it's cloudy, and not in the middle of the day because it's very hot. Closes at 6 PM. The toilets are dirty, there aren't many food options, it's better to eat in Bandung.

text: Tempat wisata yang wajib banget dikuncungi jika kita jalan-jalan ke lembang. Mobil bisa sampai ke puncak gunung karena jalan sudah bagus. Parkiran juga banyak, jadi ga perlu khawatir tidak dapat parkir. View nya mantab, udaranya segar. Tersedia masjid yang cukup besar, cukup untuk sholat jumat. Restoran juga ada. Mantab
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot if you're traveling to Lembang. Cars can reach the mountaintop because the road is good. There's also plenty of parking, so no need to worry about not finding a spot. The view is great, and the air is fresh. There's a large mosque, big enough for Friday prayers. Restaurants are also available. Fantastic!

text:
Tempat ini lumayan ok untuk rekreasi keluarga dan teman.. tetapi untuk menuju ke tempat Sanghyang heuleut ini harus di tempuh jalan kaki yg lumayan jauh..😂
Sekitar 2 kilo meter dengan perkiraan waktu 1½ jam jalan kaki..
disarankan untuk mempersiapkan fisik untuk menempuh perjalanan menuju tempat Sanghyang heuleut ini..😅
english_translation:
This place is quite okay for family and friends recreation.. but to get to Sanghyang Heuleut, you have to walk quite a distance.. 😂
About 2 kilometers with an estimated walking time of 1½ hours..
It is recommended to prepare physically for the journey to Sanghyang Heuleut.. 😅

text:
Curug ini cukup indah dan nyaman untuh bersantai, jangan lupa jika kesini untuk membawa baju ganti, karena cukup di sayangkan jika sudah kesini tetapi tidak mandi di bawah deburan air nya yg sangat segarr..
Jalur menuju curug 3 cukup jauh, dan jalannya cukuo licin dan menurut saya cukup berbahaya. Tapi keseluruhan bagus
english_translation:
This waterfall is quite beautiful and comfortable for relaxing. Don't forget to bring a change of clothes if you come here, because it would be a shame to come all this way and not bathe under its very refreshing splashes.
The path to waterfall 3 is quite long, and the road is quite slippery and, in my opinion, quite dangerous. But overall it's good.

text:
Good place. Udaranya masih segar. Dari tempat parkir jalan 900meter untuk sampe ke curugnya. Bayar Rp10000 perorang, ditambah dengan harga asuransi dan kendaraan jadinya bisa sampai Rp15000.
Kalo ingin olahraga, bisa jalan di jalan setapak yang menyambung ke Taman Hutan Juanda Dago Pakar sejauh kurang lebih 5 kilometer.
english_translation:
Good place. The air is still fresh. From the parking lot, it's 900 meters to the waterfall. It costs Rp10,000 per person, plus insurance and vehicle fees, so it can reach Rp15,000.
If you want to exercise, you can walk on the trail that connects to the Juanda Forest Park, Dago Pakar, for approximately 5 kilometers.

text: Tempat wisata yg sangat nyaman dan bersih,amat recommended untuk dikunjungi,perlu fisik yg lebih tuk berkeliling karena luasnya, pengelola masih menambah wahana nya , parkiran luas ,tiket masuk reasonable dengan fasilitas nya,akses masuk kesana cukup kecil tp memang sulit untuk dipelebar sejak dulu. secara umum ok punya
english_translation: A very comfortable and clean tourist spot, highly recommended to visit. You'll need good stamina to explore it all because it's quite spacious. The management is still adding attractions. The parking area is vast, and the entrance ticket is reasonable considering the facilities. The access road to get there is quite narrow, but it's been difficult to widen it for a long time. Overall, it's great.

text: Tempatnya indah untuk Melihat sunrise dan citylight Bandung di malam hari. Tiket cukup terjangkau, jalan lumayan terjal dan berbatu, tenpat bersih dan nyaman. Cocok untuk berlatih fisik sebelum hiking ke gunung yang lebih tinggi, kamar mandinya bersih dan terkadang airnya susah keluar. Juga kamar mandinya masih terbatas.
english_translation: The place is beautiful for seeing the sunrise and the Bandung city lights at night. The ticket price is quite affordable, the road is quite steep and rocky, the place is clean and comfortable. Suitable for physical training before hiking to a higher mountain, the bathroom is clean and sometimes the water is difficult to get out. Also, the bathroom facilities are still limited.

text: Yang suka suasana alam dan pepohonan cocok ke orchid cikole.. Ada jalur. Khusus buat yg bawa hewan peliharaan.. Bisa Banyak lihat koleksi anggrek yg macem-macem.. Banyak arena spot foto.. Ada banyak spot untuk makan.. Ada pine resto dan sebagainya.. Cocok lah yg pengen healing-healing santai deket dari kota bandung.. 😁😁😁
english_translation: For those who like nature and trees, Orchid Cikole is a good place to go.. There are paths. Especially for those who bring pets.. You can see many different orchid collections.. There are many photo spots.. There are many spots for eating.. There is Pine Resto and so on.. It's suitable for those who want a relaxing healing near Bandung city.. 😁😁😁
