text: Harga tiket 40rb/orang sudah termasuk kendaraan, disetiap tikungan terdapat petugas keamanan, sepanjang jalan dr mulai jalan Tangkuban Parahu bersih, tidak terlihat sampah. Harga souvernir bisa ditawar(asal pinter tapi jangan sampai dibanting, kasian).naik kuda 50rb/2 orang. Untuk makanan dan minuman mendingan bekel aja.
english_translation: Ticket price is 40,000 IDR per person, which includes the vehicle. There are security guards at every turn. The road from Tangkuban Parahu is clean, no trash is visible. Souvenir prices are negotiable (if you're good at it, but don't bargain too hard, it's a pity). Horse riding is 50,000 IDR for 2 people. For food and drinks, it's better to bring your own.

text: Wisata alam yang menyajikan pemandangan bebatuan khas kawasan kars dari terumbu karang purba yang menjadi batuan gamping/kapur. Banyak spot untuk berfoto yang bagus dan sering dijadikan untuk lokasi foto prewed dengan budget sedikit dengan hasil yang pro. Recommended pokonya. Jangan buang sampah sembarang disana ya guys.
english_translation: Nature tourism that presents the typical karst landscape views from ancient coral reefs that have become limestone. Many good photo spots and often used for pre-wedding photoshoots on a small budget with professional results. Highly recommended. Don't litter there, guys.

text: Harus kuat jalan karena dr parkir juga jalannya turun naik tangga .walaupun pulangnya disediakan shuttle bus tetapi ytk ke lokasi spot foto tetap harus berjalan. Dimulai dr menyusuri golden gate (jembatan gantung) lalu ada coloseum,danau teratai,santorini dll. Ada mushola tiket bs ditukar dgn minuman lemontea atau coklat
english_translation: You need to be strong for the walk because from the parking lot, the road is up and down stairs. Although a shuttle bus is provided for the return trip, you still have to walk to reach the photo spots. It starts with walking along the Golden Gate (suspension bridge), then there's the Colosseum, lotus lake, Santorini, etc. There is a prayer room, and tickets can be exchanged for lemon tea or chocolate drinks.

text: Alhamdulillah bisa sampai tempat ini, yang jadi pertanyaan saya itu kawah kan udah puluhan atau mungkin ratusan tahun, trus kalau hujan airnya kemana ya... kalau mau beli kaos mending di pasar baru atau di Cibaduyut standar harga 100 ribu 5 kaos yang baju anak celana kaos sama 100 dapat 3 kalau makanan murah disini 25/kg
english_translation: Alhamdulillah, I was able to reach this place. My question is, the crater has been there for tens or maybe hundreds of years, so where does the rainwater go... If I want to buy t-shirts, it's better to buy at Pasar Baru or Cibaduyut. The standard price is 100 thousand for 5 t-shirts. For children's clothes, pants and t-shirts, for 100 thousand you get 3. If food is cheap here, it's 25 thousand per kg.

text: Sangat indah sekali pemandangannya, hamparan batu2pualam yg tersusun alami ditambah dg prmandangan sekeliling nya yg indah, sayang akses ke tempat ini, jalannya masih berbatu dan minim penunjuk jalan, tdk ada penerabfan yg memadai klo malam ditambah dgn karcis masuk yg tergolong mahal, apa lagi utk sesi foto dan shooting
english_translation: The scenery is very beautiful, a natural expanse of marble stones arranged naturally, plus the beautiful surrounding views. It's a shame about the access to this place, the road is still rocky and there are minimal signposts, there's no adequate lighting at night, plus the entrance ticket is quite expensive, especially for photo and video sessions.

text: Biaya masuk dan camping kalo yg di bawah 25rb per orang, kalo yg atas 35rb per orang (per Desember 2019). Ada toliet dan mushalla. Ada colokan listrik. Kalo yg di bawah ada Curug tilu, lebih cocok buat keluarga. Kalo di atas banyak mahasiswa dan pelajar. Udah 3 kali camping disini bersama keluarga dan asik pisan euy 👍👍 …
english_translation: Entrance and camping fees are IDR 25,000 per person and above IDR 35,000 per person (as of December 2019). There are toilets and a prayer room. There are electrical outlets. If you're below, there's Curug Tilu, which is more suitable for families. If you're above, there are many university students and schoolchildren. I've camped here three times with my family and it was super fun 👍👍 …

text: Bagus… ya nature lah. Klo d jkt kan susah cari pemandangan bgni. Di dlmi main flying fox 20rb per org. Klo mau foto di print @35 per foto. Ntr bakal d krm ke wa jg softcopynya. Klo yg castle (mainan anak2) 40.000 per org. Klo dh smpe bawah mls naik ad shuttle bus jg utk ke parkiran.  Mantappp… toilet jg ad dmn2 bagus deh
english_translation: Good... yeah, nature. In Jakarta, it's hard to find scenery like this. Down there, flying fox is Rp 20,000 per person. If you want printed photos, it's Rp 35,000 per photo. Later, the soft copy will also be sent to WhatsApp. For the castle (kids' playground), it's Rp 40,000 per person. If you're tired of climbing back up after reaching the bottom, there's also a shuttle bus to the parking lot. Awesome... there are also toilets everywhere, it's really good.

text:
Untuk pecinta selfie atau groupie oke aja.
Biaya masuk Rp 30.000,- per orang
Mobil Rp 30.000,-
Parkir Mobil Rp 10.000,-

Disediakan shuttle di pintu keluar terakhir, jadi ga perlu capek jalan kaki lagi untuk sampai parkiran mobil.

Untuk makanan di sekitar lokasi juga sangat terjangkau.
Favoritku udah pasti Indomie donk 😆
english_translation:
Okay for selfie or groupie lovers.
Entrance fee Rp 30,000 per person
Car Rp 30,000
Car parking Rp 10,000

A shuttle is provided at the last exit, so you don't have to walk anymore to reach the car park.

Food around the location is also very affordable.
My favorite is definitely Indomie 😆

text:
Tempat Wisata
Cikole Orchid Forest.Lembang Bandung.
menyuguhkan tempat dan pemandangan Alam yang sejuk ,banyak pohon pinus yang menjulang tinggi,serta tempat untuk mengabadikan moment bersama Keluarga,teman,maupun pacar
Dengan Biaya Masuk
Rp.50.000/ orang
parkir motor=5.000
mobil=10.000
Karcis dapat ditukar dengan Minuman
english_translation:
Tourist Spot
Cikole Orchid Forest. Lembang Bandung.
presents a cool natural place and scenery, many towering pine trees, as well as a place to immortalize moments with family, friends, or a partner.
With Entrance Fee
Rp. 50,000/person
motorcycle parking = 5,000
car parking = 10,000
Tickets can be exchanged for drinks

text:
Tiket masuk ga mahal, lahan parkir (selain di hari long weekend) mencukupi koq..
Yang jelas koleksi bunga nya bikin relax mata..
Kalo lagi weekend, saran c dtg pagi aja.. Memudahkan pilih spot parkir, foto2, dan belum terlalu rame jadi masih asik pilih frame foto tanpa gangguan lalu lalang pengunjung lain..
Happy holiday!
english_translation:
Admission isn't expensive, and parking is sufficient (except on long weekends).
What's clear is that the flower collection is relaxing for the eyes.
If it's the weekend, it's recommended to come in the morning. It makes it easier to choose a parking spot, take photos, and it's not too crowded yet, so it's still fun to pick photo frames without being disturbed by other visitors walking by.
Happy holiday!

text:
12/06/2022
Htm 15rb
Parkir mobil 5rb

-mendekati lokasi jalan sedikit jelek.
-Untuk jalan tracking menuju curug tilu dan curug putri agan sedikit jelek, jembatan2 kurang terawat dengan baik (jalan kaki sekitar 1-2km)
-air sedikit keruh apabila hujan (hati2)
-toilet sangat jarang, hanya ada di area utama
-terdapat mushola.
english_translation:
12/06/2022
Entrance fee 15,000 IDR
Car parking 5,000 IDR

- The road approaching the location is a bit bad.
- The trekking path to Curug Tilu and Curug Putri is a bit rough, the bridges are not well maintained (about 1-2 km walk).
- The water is a bit cloudy when it rains (be careful).
- Toilets are very scarce, only available in the main area.
- There is a prayer room.

text: Tempat yg bagus untuk berfoto, dgn latarbelakang perbukitan. Bisa di capai dengan menggunakan sepeda motor tetapi sediakan masker Krn berdebu dan hati-hati saat berjalan di stone garden Krn jika hujan jalan licin dan batu-batuannya tajam. Dan juga di stone garden ini tiket masuknya berfariasi tergantung jenis kunjungan...
english_translation: A great place for photos, with a hilly background. It can be reached by motorbike, but bring a mask because it's dusty and be careful when walking in the stone garden because if it rains, the path is slippery and the stones are sharp. Also, in this stone garden, the entrance ticket varies depending on the type of visit...

text:
A must visit place with breathtaking view. Salah satu tujuan wisata alam yang harus dikunjungi. Biaya masuk per orang Rp 20rb dan mobil Rp 10rb.
Kalau datang di bawah jam 10, angin masih kencang & udara masih super dingin. Setelah jam 10, angin berkurang & lumayan panas.
Tapi pemandangannya luar biasa bagus.
Recommended 👍
english_translation:
A must-visit place with breathtaking views. One of the natural tourist destinations that must be visited. Entrance fee is Rp 20,000 per person and Rp 10,000 per car.
If you arrive before 10 AM, the wind is still strong and the air is super cold. After 10 AM, the wind decreases and it becomes quite hot.
But the scenery is exceptionally beautiful.
Recommended 👍

text: Tempat ny keren, cuma jalan akses menuju k pintu gerbang dan parkiran nya masih berdebu dan harus di perbaiki. Banyak spot2 foto yg keren. Di saran kan pakai sepatu olahraga biar kaki ny kuat,karena kko mau sepatu high hill mah bakal lecet deh. Semoga next time sudah ada perbaikan yg lebih baik lg untuk tempat wisata ini.
english_translation: The place is cool, it's just that the access road to the gate and parking lot is still dusty and needs to be repaired. There are many cool photo spots. It's recommended to wear sports shoes so your feet are strong, because high heels will cause blisters. Hopefully, next time there will be better improvements for this tourist attraction.

text: tempatnya bagus, tapi sudah tidak terawat. arena bermain nya sudah banyak karat dan terbengkalai. untuk curugnya sendiri tergolong lumayan bagus. airnya fresh, pemandangan nya oke. cuman kalo bulan puasa tempatnya sepi bangettt~~ sebenernya banyak yg jualan makanan tp pada tutup. biaya masuknya 15k/org sama parkir motor 2k
english_translation: The place is nice, but it's no longer well-maintained. The playground is very rusty and abandoned. The waterfall itself is quite good. The water is fresh, and the view is okay. It's just that during Ramadan, the place is extremely quiet~~ Actually, there are many food vendors, but they are all closed. The entrance fee is 15k/person and motorcycle parking is 2k.

text: Cobain honeymoon di rumah panggung seru banget, pemandangan sekitar nya asri banget kalo keluar dari Grafika juga banyak restoran dan tempat oleh oleh. Di dalam Grafika sendiri juga banyak wahana ada outbound flying fox petik strawberry dll seru cocok juga buat ajak keluarga ramai-ramai harga termasuk murah sarapan lengkap
english_translation: Cobain's honeymoon at the stilt house was really fun. The surrounding scenery is very beautiful. If you go out from Grafika, there are many restaurants and souvenir shops. Inside Grafika itself, there are also many attractions like outbound, flying fox, strawberry picking, etc. It's fun and also suitable for bringing the whole family. The price is quite cheap and breakfast is complete.

text: bingung aja sih, kalau kata temen total ke sini tuh abisnya cuma 13000 untuk dua orang dan satu motor. eh tapi di awal belokan kaya ada semacem pungli gitu yg minta uang 4000 buat masuknya. padahal ga ngasih tiket. tapi disini pemandangannya bagus, anginnya kenceng banget. cuma kalau nyari sunrise ga bisa disini, ga bagus.
english_translation: Just confused, because a friend said the total cost to come here was only 13,000 for two people and one motorcycle. But at the beginning of the turn, there was something like an illegal fee asking for 4,000 to enter. Even though they didn't give a ticket. But the scenery here is good, the wind is very strong. It's just that if you're looking for sunrise, you can't do it here, it's not good.

text: Harga tiketnya lumayan murah dan bisa d tukar dengan welcome drink, untuk family gathering lumayan bagus, cuma untuk beli souvenir disana harga nya lumayan mahal 3x lipat dr harga aslina😱, tidak ada jalur/akses untuk stroller/kursi roda pas d pintu masuk jadi harus d gotong-gotong dulu. Untuk tahu gejrot nya recomended😋👍 …
english_translation: The ticket price is quite cheap and can be exchanged for a welcome drink, which is quite good for a family gathering. However, buying souvenirs there is quite expensive, 3 times the original price! There is no path/access for strollers/wheelchairs at the entrance, so they have to be carried. The tahu gejrot is recommended.

text: Saat weekend tiket masuk 15rb. Tidak diperbolehkan foto2 menggunakan kamera. Bagi yg membawa kamera harap dititipkan di tempat penitipan. Bunga2 yg ada disini bagus2. Tertata rapi. Spot2 fotonya juga banyak. Selain taman bunga, disini juga terdapat kebun yg menghasilkan buah2an dan sayuran. Hasil kebunnya pun dijual disana.
english_translation: On weekends, the entrance fee is 15,000 IDR. Taking photos with cameras is not allowed. Those who bring cameras must leave them at the locker. The flowers here are beautiful and well-arranged. There are also many photo spots. Besides the flower garden, there is also a farm here that produces fruits and vegetables. The produce from the farm is also sold there.

text: Saya pikir tempatnya satu, ternyata ini adalah kumpulan dari beberapa restoran yang berada di satu tempat. Untuk setiap restorannya memiliki manajemen tiket yang berbeda, sehingga kita harus membayar untuk setiap restoran yang kita kunjungi. Sangat disayangkan mengingat tempat ini memiliki pemandangan yang luar biasa bagus.
english_translation: I thought it was one place, but it turns out to be a collection of several restaurants in one location. Each restaurant has its own ticketing system, so you have to pay for each one you visit. It's a shame considering the place has an exceptionally good view.

text: Harga prewednya murah cuman 300k. tempatnya bagus dan indah, tidak dianjurkan pada saat sunrise, tetapi pada saat sunset, akses jalan untuk bermobil sedan lumayan sulit. kurang bersih sampah puntung rokok dimana2 walaupun tidak terlihat karna tertutup batu2. pengelola orang lokal dan ada pos jaga di depan untuk tiket masuk.
english_translation: The pre-wedding price is cheap, only 300k. The place is good and beautiful, not recommended during sunrise, but during sunset. The road access for sedans is quite difficult. It's not very clean, cigarette butts are everywhere, although they are not visible because they are covered by stones. The management is local people and there is a guard post at the front for entrance tickets.

text: Alternatif Wisata alam : bagi yg ingin menikmati sejuk nya udara pegunungan , rute bisa diakses dari bbrp jalur antara lain : Kolonel Masturi belok setelah SPN Cisarua, Dari arah Padalarang sebelum kantor KBB belok kiri. Jalan relatif bagus cuma jalan sempit apalagi pas menuju pintu masuk lebih sempit lagi tdk bisa papasan.
english_translation: Alternative nature tourism: for those who want to enjoy the cool mountain air, the route can be accessed from several paths, including: Kolonel Masturi, turn after SPN Cisarua, from Padalarang direction before the KBB office, turn left. The road is relatively good, only narrow, especially when approaching the entrance, it gets even narrower, so cars cannot pass each other.

text: Tiket masuk hanya 30rb dan bisa tukar tiketnya dgn pilihan minuman hangat atau dingin. Seru bawa anak jalan kesini, bisa lihat banyak atraksi hewan² friendly! Masuk rumah kelinci 25rb untuk 1 anak (>2th), belum termasuk pendamping. Kasih makan ikan dan burung merpati, bisa beli makanannya di kios terdekat dgn harga 5rb saja
english_translation: Entrance ticket is only 30k and can be exchanged for a hot or cold drink. It's fun to bring kids here, you can see many friendly animal attractions! Entering the rabbit house is 25k for 1 child (>2 years old), not including the guardian. Feeding fish and pigeons, you can buy food at the nearest stall for only 5k.

text:
Sy datang pas kabut lgi tebal, sayang sih, jadi susah liat kawah, banyak penjaja souvenir sampe berebut, awal nya bagus sih bantuin foto2, kemudian nawarin souvenir, y jadi kasihan jg kita beli.

Tempatnya dingin dan angin besar..
Pokoknya siapkan jaket tebal dan js hujan kalo perlu, 😀

Tiket standar 30 rb

Overall mantap 👍
english_translation:
She came when the fog was thick, which was a shame, so it was hard to see the crater. Many souvenir vendors were vying for attention. At first, it was nice, they helped take photos, then they offered souvenirs, so we felt sorry and bought some.

The place was cold with strong winds.
In short, prepare a thick jacket and a raincoat if needed, 😀

Standard ticket 30 thousand rupiah

Overall, it was great 👍

text: Menarik untuk keluarga. Biaya masuk tidak mahal hanya 20K/orang, jika bawa kamera ada charge tambahan jd 50K/orang. Di dalamnya ada kebin bunga, kebun buah dan sayuran dan juga Taman Kelinci dll. Buat foto2 cukup instagramable. Semuanya organic disini. Bisa beli untuk dibawa pulang juga. Ada cafe juga jika pengen nongkrong.
english_translation: Interesting for families. The entrance fee is not expensive, only 20K/person, if you bring a camera there is an additional charge to 50K/person. Inside there is a flower garden, fruit and vegetable garden, and also a Rabbit Garden etc. It's quite instagrammable for taking photos. Everything here is organic. You can also buy things to take home. There is also a cafe if you want to hang out.

text:
Tempat yang bagus untuk berlibur bersama keluarga. Tempatnya sangat luas sekali.
Gampang dicari.
Tempatnya sangat bersih sekali.
Cocok untuk berswafoto disana.  Banyak view buat berfoto. Tiket cukup terjangkau Rp 15.000 untuk weekend dan tiket bisa ditukar dengan minuman ringan. Cuma di lokasi masih dalam tahap pembangunan.
english_translation:
A great place for a family vacation. The place is very spacious.
Easy to find.
The place is very clean.
Suitable for taking selfies there. Many views for taking photos. The ticket is quite affordable at Rp 15,000 for the weekend and the ticket can be exchanged for a soft drink. Only, the location is still under construction.

text: Lokasi strategis di Lembang... hutan pinus dg diwarnai berbagai jenis bunga mawar .. byk spot foto yg menarik... dilengkapi musholla dan food court, area bermain anak, free shuttle angkot tuk k bus/mobil 😀  bisa juga tuk acara gathering.  dg tiket masuk pas 50rb bisa sepuasnya nikmati sejuknya hutan pinus... sukses orchid …
english_translation: Strategic location in Lembang... pine forest colored with various types of roses... many interesting photo spots... equipped with a prayer room and food court, children's play area, free shuttle to buses/cars 😀. Also suitable for gathering events. For an entrance ticket of just 50rb, you can enjoy the cool pine forest to your heart's content... success Orchid…

text:
Tempat wisata yang cocok dikunjungi oleh keluarga maupun acara bersama rekan.

Cuaca yang dingin dan bersahabat membuat saya nyaman dalam mengeksplorasi berbagai tempat di dalamnya.

Tersedia juga shuttle car bagi pengujung yang dapat digunakan secara gratis.

Untuk koleksi tanaman terkhusus anggrek, sangat banyak dan baik.
english_translation:
A tourist spot suitable for visiting with family or for events with colleagues.

The cool and friendly weather made me comfortable exploring the various places within it.

There is also a free shuttle car available for visitors.

The collection of plants, especially orchids, is very extensive and well-maintained.

text: Tempatnya bagus dan cukup luas cuma beberapa tempat dibatasi dan harus bayar kembali. Harga tiket masuk Rp. 20000,-. Variasi makanan cukup banyak dan terjangkau untuk harga sekelas tempat wisata namun membeli harus menggunakan koin yang bisa ditukarkan disana. Membeli koin secukupnya saja karena tidak dapat diuangkan kembali
english_translation: The place is nice and quite spacious, but some areas are restricted and require an additional payment. The entrance fee is Rp. 20,000. There's a good variety of food and it's reasonably priced for a tourist spot, but you have to buy it using coins that can be exchanged there. Only buy enough coins as needed because they are non-refundable.

text:
Tempatnya mudah dijangkau. Pemandangannya bagus banget & terbentuk secara alami yg katanya dari jaman purba. Airnya jernih, bajyak dipakai prewed juga.

Tiket masuknya sangat terjangkau hanya 8-10 rb/orang & parkir mobil jg sekitar segitu.

Ada guide jg di sana kalo mau arung jeram / naik perahu / lanjut ke sanghyang heuleut
english_translation:
The place is easy to reach. The scenery is really good & naturally formed, said to be from ancient times. The water is clear, and it's often used for pre-wedding photos.

The entrance ticket is very affordable, only 8-10 thousand rupiah per person & car parking is also around that price.

There are also guides there if you want to go rafting/take a boat ride/continue to Sanghyang Heuleut.

text:
Tempatnya enak untuk dikunjungi. Namun sayang, bagi orang yang ingin kesini harap membawa duit banyak karena wahananya memiliki harga yang lumayan😁
Meskipun begitu wahananya worth it lah sesuai dengan harga juga... Overall, 10/10. Semuanya ada disana, wahana, makanan, minuman, dan barang-barang ikon Floating Market tersebut!
english_translation:
The place is nice to visit. However, unfortunately, those who want to come here should bring a lot of money because the attractions are quite expensive 😁
Despite that, the attractions are worth it for the price... Overall, 10/10. Everything is there, attractions, food, drinks, and the iconic Floating Market items!

text: Lokasi mudah dicari ,pelayanan ramah,Selain sebagai tempat rekreasi ,bisa menambah ilmu cara pengembang biakan tanaman begonia,,spot foto cantik2 instagramable,halaman parkir tersedia ,toilet, untuk romb tersedia tempat untuk berkumpul spt aula ,menyediakan souvenir yg dijual seperti mug bergambar,gantungan kunci,bibit benih
english_translation: Easy to find location, friendly service. Besides being a recreation spot, you can also gain knowledge on begonia cultivation. Beautiful, Instagrammable photo spots. Parking lot available. Toilets. For groups, there are gathering spaces like a hall. Souvenirs are available for purchase, such as mugs with pictures, keychains, and seed packets.

text: Tempat wisatanya okee kalo kalian Dateng kesitu lebih baik pagi pagi sekalian saat sunset lagi mau terbit disana masih adem dan dapet foto yang bagus kalo dah siang agak mulai panas disana cocok buat foto prewedding bertema journey dan jgn lupa berbagi sama kera disana dia baik gak bgtu liar asal kitanya aja bagaimana ke dia
english_translation: The tourist spot is great. If you go there, it's better to go in the early morning, especially during sunset. It's still cool there and you can get good photos. Once it's midday, it starts to get a bit hot. It's suitable for pre-wedding photos with a journey theme. And don't forget to share with the monkeys there; they are friendly and not too wild, depending on how you interact with them.

text: Mau ke sini lagi. Di sana 3 jam kuraaaaanggg sayangnya harus bayar pas mau ke Jembatan. Bisa piknik 1 jam, main golf mini 1 stgh jam, foto di satu area bisa 15 menitan. Belum lagi video2 dan explore bunga2. Wah 3 jam ga berasa deh. Cocok main dr jam buka sampai jam tutup deh. Worth it and definitely visit again in the future!
english_translation: Want to come here again. Three hours there was sadly not enough. Unfortunately, we had to pay to get to the bridge. We could picnic for an hour, play mini golf for an hour and a half, and take photos in one area for about 15 minutes. Not to mention taking videos and exploring the flowers. Wow, three hours flew by. It's suitable to play from opening time until closing time. Worth it and definitely visit again in the future!

text:
Sayang hujan deres pas sampe sini, jadi ga bisa eksplore banyak, spot foto dimana² area outbond untuk anak, wisata petik buah, hutan pinus, plus hawanya sejuk banget
Tiket masuk 15rb kalo ga salah, tapi blm termasuk wahana kaya outbond dll
Cocok bgt buat wisata keluarga
Aksesnya lebih deket kalo via Subang dan ga macet juga..
english_translation:
Too bad it rained heavily when we got here, so we couldn't explore much. There are photo spots everywhere, an outbound area for kids, fruit-picking tours, a pine forest, plus the air is really cool.
The entrance ticket was 15,000 Rupiah if I'm not mistaken, but it doesn't include attractions like outbound, etc.
It's very suitable for family tourism.
Access is closer via Subang and it's not congested either.

text:
Gunung Tangkuban Parahu

HTM: 30k/org
17k+2k/motor
Ga ngerti ini tiketnya gmna 😅 *harga weekend

Jalan menuju puncak lumayan ekstrim dengan menggunakan motor 😂 sampai di puncak Spot foto banyak, suhu di puncak dingin banget.. disarankan menggunakan pakaian tebal (jaket tebal) dan sarung tangan. Angin di puncak sangat kencang.
english_translation:
Tangkuban Parahu Mountain

Admission Fee: 30k/person
17k+2k/motorcycle
Don't understand how this ticket works 😅 *weekend price

The road to the summit is quite extreme by motorcycle 😂 Upon reaching the summit, there are many photo spots, and the temperature at the top is very cold... it is recommended to wear thick clothing (thick jacket) and gloves. The wind at the summit is very strong.

text: Tempat wisata yang berbedaa dari tempat yg lain, disini menyajikan makanan2 yang dijual diatas perahu secara terapung, selain itu disini juga banyak spot poto dan jugaaa ada kolam berenang yang sangat nyaman. Dengan membayar tiket masuk kita dapat menukarkan tiket tsb dengan minuman atau makanan yang telah disediakan khussus.
english_translation: A tourist spot unlike any other, here they serve food sold on floating boats. Besides that, there are also many photo spots and a very comfortable swimming pool. By paying an entrance ticket, you can exchange it for specially provided drinks or food.

text:
recomended buat yg suka tracking, seru jg buat main air deket curugnya..
bagusnya kalo kesini hrs bener2 sehat biar kuat sampai curugnya apalagi pulangnya mantepp poll di kaki..
Cuman kmrn air terjunnya keliatan coklat sebagian trs banyak sampah di pinggiran kali bawahnya, kalobisa dirawat dan diperbagus lg tempat istirahatnya
english_translation:
Recommended for those who like trekking, it's also fun to play in the water near the waterfall.
It's best to come here when you're really healthy so you can make it to the waterfall, especially on the way back, your legs will be tired.
However, yesterday the waterfall looked partly brown and there was a lot of trash on the edges of the river below, if it could be maintained and the resting areas improved.

text: Tempat yang cocok buat orang2 yang suka sama bunga2 dan tanaman. Bunga'a warna-warni cantiiiiiik banget. Tertata dengan rapih dan apik. Banyak spot2 foto. Kemarin pas dateng ternyata aku pengunjung pertama, jadi puas banget keliling2 dan foto2, berasa kebun sendiri 😂. Tiket masuk 25rb/org. Parkir 5rb. Toiletnya cukup bersih. …
english_translation: A suitable place for people who love flowers and plants. The flowers are very beautiful and colorful. Neatly and artfully arranged. Lots of photo spots. Yesterday when I arrived, I was the first visitor, so I was very satisfied walking around and taking photos, it felt like my own garden 😂. Entrance ticket Rp 25k/person. Parking Rp 5k. The toilets are quite clean. …

text: Tempatnya nyaman banget sejuk wat santai santai sambil ngopi , sambil nunggu anak anak main , karena banyak permainan untuk anak-anak nya , ada kereta mini jga untuk keliling taman , sepeda yg disewakan , ada kuda poni jga untuk anak-anak yang mau bermain kuda . Parkirannya luas , pokoknya recommended banget wat ajak keluarga.
english_translation: The place is really comfortable and cool, perfect for relaxing while having coffee, and while waiting for the kids to play, because there are many games for children. There's also a mini train to go around the park, bicycles for rent, and ponies for children who want to play with horses. The parking is spacious, so it's highly recommended for bringing the family.

text: Taman bunga dan sayuran yang lumayan luas nyaman buat wisata sambil mengajari anak tentang bunga dan sayuran. Hanya sayang banyak tanaman sayuran yg seperti tidak ter urus dengan baik jd bnyk yg layu da rontok daun nya, semoga kedepan nya bisa lebih d perhatikan lagi untuk kebersihan dan perawatan tanaman buah dan sayuran nya.
english_translation: The rather spacious flower and vegetable garden is comfortable for a trip while teaching children about flowers and vegetables. It's a shame, though, that many vegetable plants seem neglected, with many wilting and losing their leaves. Hopefully, in the future, more attention can be given to the cleanliness and maintenance of the fruit and vegetable plants.

text: Sukaaa banget,, pemandangannya asyik,, banyak yg jualan masker dibawah,  tapi klo sdh diatas tidak berasa bau belerangnya, ketiup angin jadi masker kurang berfungsi,, klo pengen lebih maksimal lg naek ke tempat yg paling tinggi untuk mengcover foto biar bisa keambil semua,, jadi hasil fotonya bagus,, harga tiket weekday 25rb,,
english_translation: Really love it, the scenery is great. Lots of mask vendors below, but once you're up high, you don't feel the sulfur smell. The wind blows, so the masks don't work as well. If you want to get the most out of it, go to the highest spot to frame your photos so everything is captured. That way, your pictures will turn out nicely. Weekday ticket price is 25,000.

text:
Bagus banget. Taman bunga gitu deh. Mungkin jenis bunganya ga sebanyak di floating market, tapi penataannya bagus. Terus kalau jalan ke dalem bisa liat kebun sayurnya. Dan ga bakal ada penjaga yg ngikutin pas lg jalan-jalan.
Bisa banget buat foto-foto. Tapi jangan sampe merusak. Cocok untuk melepas penat dr suasana lampu kota.
english_translation:
It's really great. Like a flower garden. Maybe the variety of flowers isn't as much as at the floating market, but the arrangement is good. Then, if you walk further inside, you can see the vegetable garden. And there won't be any guards following you while you're walking around.
It's perfect for taking photos. But don't damage anything. Suitable for relieving stress from the city's bright lights.

text: Tempatnya cocok banget buat camping, hiking atau acara outing. Untuk wahana ada flying fox, shaking bridge, three in one, sama paint ball (kalo ga salah namanya hehe). Alat camping bisa sewa dan untuk harga ga mahal kok, harga wajar. Dan enaknya tuh ga banyak kena biaya. Cuma memang kesan "hutan"-nya kurang kerasa kalau siang.
english_translation: The place is very suitable for camping, hiking, or outing events. For attractions, there are flying fox, shaking bridge, three in one, and paintball (if I'm not mistaken with the name, hehe). Camping equipment can be rented and the prices are not expensive, reasonable prices. And the good thing is, you don't incur many additional costs. However, the "forest" feel is indeed less noticeable during the day.

text: Lokasinya ada kp parongpong lembang. Bandung barat.ht2 di jln nya krn tepat di lembah .tebing nya curam.masih banyak kerak liar harus penuh ke hati2an.usahakan jln bersamaan dn ada intruktur nya yg tau seluk beluk lokasi nya. Udara nya bersih dn air nya dingin banget.yg punya rematic ataw encok harus bawa minyak gosok yg anget
english_translation: The location is in Kampung Parongpong, Lembang, West Bandung. Be careful on the road as it's located right in a valley with steep cliffs. There are still many wild plants, so proceed with extreme caution. It's best to travel together with an instructor who knows the ins and outs of the area. The air is clean and the water is very cold. Those with rheumatism or joint pain should bring warming liniment.

text: Ke sini bawa doggy ternyata gabisa ke tempat utamanya, sudah bayar tiket masuk, bayar lagi di dalem untuk pet dan hanya jalur lurus tanpa ada spot foto... seharusnya tidak usah ada tiket masuk karena pengunjungnya tidak dapat benefit apapun...... padahal datang jauh dari jakarta ekspektasi bisa foto". Malah pulang tanpa hasil.
english_translation: Came here with the doggy, turns out it can't go to the main area. Already paid the entrance ticket, then paid again inside for pets, and it was just a straight path with no photo spots... There shouldn't be an entrance fee because visitors get no benefits at all...... even though I came all the way from Jakarta with expectations of taking photos." Ended up going home with nothing.

text:
sudah tertata rapi, cocok untuk dikunjungi dari anak2 hingga orang tua dgn aman&nyaman...bawa tikar digelar, buka bekal...asik lah
klo mau santai dan terhindar macet, jam 7 pagi udah di lokasi, keliling2 santai2, siang bisa pulang.

hanya kalau untuk petualang sangat kurang karena trek nya dipotong jadi hanya bisa liat 3 curug
english_translation:
It's well-arranged, suitable for visiting from children to the elderly safely and comfortably... bring a mat, spread it out, open your packed lunch... it's fun. If you want to relax and avoid traffic, be at the location by 7 AM, stroll around leisurely, and you can go home by noon.

However, for adventurers, it's quite lacking because the trails have been cut, so you can only see 3 waterfalls.

text:
Wisata kuliner yang cukup luas dengan udara yang sejuk. Datang saat musim liburan dan musim hujan. Lumayan padat.
Akses masuknya dari jalan raya Lembang harus masuk lagi. Saat pulang diarahkan lewat belakang. Ternyata ada tanjakan yang sangat curam dan cukup panjang. Kalau mobilnya tidak kuat, lebih baik mengambil arah yg biasa
english_translation:
A wide culinary tourism area with cool air. Come during the holiday season and rainy season. It's quite crowded.
The entrance is from the Lembang highway, then you have to go in further. When leaving, you're directed to go through the back. It turns out there's a very steep and quite long incline. If your car isn't strong enough, it's better to take the usual route.

text: Tiket masuk 50ribu/org, tp worted sih krn dpt minum plus bs foto di byk spot foto bagus tp untuk foto dijembatan merah bayar terpisah.. Kalo mau kesini lebih enak pas weekday, tmpt ga terlalu penuh, jd lbh leluasa buat selfie. Jgn khawatir hrs jalan jauh kebawah krn ada mobil yg antar dr atas sampe ke dpn pintu msk sarae hill..
english_translation: Entrance fee is 50,000 IDR/person, but it's worth it because you get a drink plus you can take photos at many good photo spots, but photos on the red bridge are charged separately. If you want to come here, it's better to come on a weekday, the place won't be too crowded, so you'll have more freedom for selfies. Don't worry about walking far down, because there's a car that will take you from the top to the entrance of Sarae Hill.

text: Fasilitas di dlm kamar cukup baik, hanya selimutnya lebih dingin dari cuaca sekitar, mungkin krn bahannya yg kurang pas utk menghangatkan. Cocok untuk acara-acara yg melibatkan banyak orang. Utk keluarga juga cocok krn banyak taman2 yg bisa digunakan anak2 bermain. Makanan di restonya enak2. Terima kasih, sukses selalu ya TWGC.
english_translation: The facilities in the room are quite good, only the blanket is colder than the surrounding weather, perhaps due to the material not being suitable for warming. Suitable for events involving many people. Also suitable for families because there are many gardens where children can play. The food at the restaurant is delicious. Thank you, always successful TWGC.

text:
Lokasinya sangat luas, cocok untuk acara yang sekalian camping ⛺ dan outbound. Banyak hal yang bisa dikunjungi disini. Dari pintu masuk ke tempatnya masih jauh, bagi yang tidak membawa kendaraan pribadi ada jemputan shuttle dari pintu masuk.
Harga ticket kemaren saya Rp 40.000,- per orang, dan shuttle nya Rp 10.000,- per orang.
english_translation:
The location is very spacious, suitable for events that also include camping ⛺ and outbound activities. There are many things to visit here. From the entrance to the location is still far, for those who don't bring private vehicles, there is a shuttle pick-up from the entrance.
The ticket price yesterday was Rp 40,000,- per person, and the shuttle was Rp 10,000,- per person.

text:
Htm 22.500 per orang
Anak anak beda harganya
5 tahun ke bawah gratis
Tempat yang menggasikan untuk melihat kawah ratu yaitu saat pagi hari.
Alamnya sejuk, berkabut
Banyak penjual souvenir
Banyak penyewa kuda untuk dinaiki, sekedar foto.
Banyak tukang foto
Saya dan saudara sangat menikmati liburan di TWA Gunung Tangkuban Parahu.
english_translation:
Htm 22,500 per person
Children have different prices
5 years and below are free
The most fun place to see the queen's crater is in the morning.
The nature is cool and misty.
Many souvenir sellers
Many horse rental services for riding, or just for photos.
Many photographers
My sibling and I really enjoyed our vacation at TWA Mount Tangkuban Parahu.
